Comment: Slowly away but soon moved up along rail to 5th place about 3 to 4Ls back. Ran on final 300 M but could not match speed with principals final 50 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Took lead from 1000 M. Kept on in straight but got swamped inside 50 M.
Soon at rear from wide draw. Shifted wide upon straightening and made up good late ground despite hanging in and proving difficult to ride final 200 M.
Lost ground after jumping in the air and got crowded before dropping to the rear. Never a factor.
Slowly away but soon ridden forward to be in midfield. Closed off strongly final 100 M to be narrowly beaten after being held up at 400 M and 200 M. Unlucky.
Jumped best and led to 1000 M before sitting in 2nd place. Kept on in straight and had to steady when already giving ground 100 M out.
Ridden forward to take 3rd place. Kept on well in straight despite being momentarily held after 200 M and got outsprinted by the first pair final 50 M.
Thereabout to 350 M whilst travelling wide and without cover. Dropped out quickly inside 300 M. (Mucopus and see Racing Incidents.)
Soon midfield or worse but trapped wide. Ran on gamely 300 M and just got up to win despite shifting wider in the closing stages.
Soon dropped behind midfield or worse. Held up at 400 M and shifted in for running. Ran on final 300 M to just miss a place in a tight finish.
Midfield or worse whilst being niggled along. One-paced in straight.
Towards rear. Steadied off heels at 700 M and again at 500 M. Held up at 350 M but failed to make much impression when in the clear.
Settled just off the pace. Took the lead after straightening and led by 2Ls with 200 M left. Responded strongly in the straight and out-paced others for an easy win.
Midfield or better. Hard ridden on straightening. Fought on steadily closing stages without quickening. Outpaced by first three with no threat.
Soon led on fence. Led by half a length rounding home. Kept on steadily on straight without quickening. Weakened at 200 M out.

Was difficult to settle early stages. Stayed 2 wide 2Ls behind the lead at 800 M. Shifted out for better running after straightening. Battled on over the concluding stages and provided late contest for the 2nd place.
Jumped well and stayed within 2Ls from leader off the rail until making home turn. 4th to enter straight. Hung out over the final 300 M. Ran on nicely to keep 2nd over closing stages.
Jumped well from wide draw. 3 wide 3Ls off the lead at 800 M. Shifted wider for better running. Found nothing in the straight and weakened badly at 300 M.
Slow to begin. Ridden to keep pace on the rail. 3Ls behind leaders at 400 M. No response when asked and weakened thereafter.
Began awkwardly. Raced rearward. At least 4Ls behind leader after straightening. Stayed on well but found no extra. Never looked like a threat.
Began slowly. Tailed most of the race. Last few to enter straight. Saved ground along the rails making home turn and ran past beaten runners in the straight.
1L off pace in a 3-wide position rounding home turn. Travelled wide and without cover throughout. Failed to keep pace and weakened badly at 250 M out.
Fair jump from an outside barrier. Kept last few, 3 wide with cover. Last to enter straight. Shifted wide onto the track. Made up some ground to be closest at finish.
Midfield or worse. 3Ls off the lead in a 3 wide spot at 800 M. Failed to quicken and was one-paced in the final stages.
Niggled along to race 2-wide behind the leaders. Failed to keep pace on straightening and weakened thereafter.
Settled on fence at midfield. Stayed within 3Ls of the leader making home turn. Trapped in a box until inside final 100 M. Never tested.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. Swung out for a run on straightening and rallied for a minor placing.
Niggled along and raced alongside the leader. Kept pace with leader going into the straight but failed to quicken and dropped out final stages.
Ridden along to take the lead. Kept a slim advantage on straightening. Unable to sustain effort and was swamped final 200 M.
At rear early stages. 3-wide behind midfield making home turn. Ridden along and was widest turning in. Rallied nicely but ran out of ground to catch the winner.
Niggled along but was outpaced by leaders. Settled on fence behind the pace until home straight. Failed to respond when asked near 300 M and weakened final stages.
Dropped to race behind midfield. 4-wide in rear section making home turn and was last to enter home straight. Made up some ground.
3-wide at midfield. Remained 3-wide and kept within 3Ls of the leader making home turn. Stayed on fairly in the straight to make the frame.
Jumped awkwardly and raced towards the rear. Checked at 1400 M and trailed field until straightening. Only ran past a pair of beaten runners.
Off slowly. Raced mostly behind midfield. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Hard ridden but was outpaced by leaders. Settled 3-wide just off the pace until home straight. Unable to pick up and dropped out.

Raced wide at midfield. Steadily improved in a 4-wide spot when making the turn and reached within 2Ls of the leader on straightening. Quickened nicely and drew clear at 200 M. Kept on well final stages to deny a charging rival.
Missed the jump and was hard ridden before steadying at 1400 M. Raced on fence towards the rear until straightening. Made up some ground in the straight.
Midfield but always posted 4-wide no cover, under pressure taking home turn when 5-wide, soon beaten and tailed off.
Slowest away losing 3Ls on field, 8Ls last at 1000 M, 5Ls last on straightening, stayed on very strongly down centre of track, nearest at finish, promising debut.
Mostly 3-wide no cover despite prominent position about 2Ls off speed through to 600 M, pressed on to dispute lead at top of stretch, fading when 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, weakened.
Midfield with cover about 4Ls off pace down back straight until hanging out at 800 M, 4-wide into homestretch when 3Ls down in midfield, never troubled principals.
About 10th place when 3-wide with cover 4Ls to 5Ls off the speed through to final bend, never really threatened to take a hand in the finish but not helped by being short of room final 100 M.
Steadied at start, in rear bunch about 7Ls behind pace through first half, marginally closer turning for home, kept on quite well late, never nearer.
One from rear at least 7Ls off pace at 1000 M, forced wider on circle and 6-wide (widest of all) turning for home when 4Ls down turning for home, never really competitive.
Midfield or slightly worse about 4Ls off speed through to the 800 M when steadied, 3Ls back in mid-division taking home turn, never likely to threaten quinella pair, just grabbed 3rd spot.
Midfield about 4Ls behind lead on fence at 1000 M, closer turning for home, 2Ls down in 6th or so when all out at 200 M, retreated a little close home.
Pressed on out wide from gate 13 to lead by 2Ls on fence at 1000 M, under pressure when headed at top of home straight, faded out rapidly.
Midfield 2-wide about 3Ls behind down the back, steadied at 800 M and steadied again, shifting out on straightening when 2Ls down in 4th, disputing lead at 200 M, no extra inside final 100 M.
Early leader on fence at 1200 M, headed at 1000 M, about 1L down in 2nd until regaining advantage at top of stretch, joined from 300 M to about 100 M before asserting again close home.
3-back on fence within 2Ls to 3Ls of the pace from back to homestretch, same position at 200 M and all out to pick up, could only keep on at same pace.
Awkward break, always towards rear at least 5Ls behind until home straight when switched out to make a challenge, hung out on the run-in, crowded at 200 M but always well held.
Hindered at 1200 M when about 5Ls behind in midfield, similarly placed taking final bend, much too one-paced to figure.
Slowly away, never better than 7Ls off pace from 1200 M to home turn, dropped out further.
Had the run of the race about 2Ls or so off the speed on fence from 1200 M to home straight, outpaced by quinella pair but still plugged on modestly for 3rd.
2-wide and about 3Ls off the speed in 4th or 5th from 1300 M to home turn, all out at 200 M when same margin back in 4th, always one-paced but narrowly held from 3rd.
Slowly away, about 9Ls last at 1200 M and similar on straightening, kept on past a few stragglers inside final 100 M.
Hard ridden to lead on fence by 2Ls at 1400 M, 1L ahead at 800 M and a neck ahead at final bend, briefly headed from 300 M to 250 M, soon back on terms and pulled away again gamely final 100 M.
2-wide and 1L down in 2nd at 1300 M and at 800 M, a neck 2nd at home turn, briefly looked the winner when leading at 300 M, large weight concession to winner was too much to cope with.
Slowly away, blundering when clipping heels, steadied at 1000 M when 7Ls off pace near rear, 6Ls down in 10th on straightening, made fair late ground past beaten rivals, nearest at finish.
In rear group and never better than 6Ls off the speed until home straight, made no impression.
Blundered at 1000 M on fence when in 9th place or so and 6Ls off speed, not much of a better position turning for home, never dangerous.
3-wide with cover about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed in mid-division through to home straight, failed to show anything approaching a turn of foot.
On fence early on but 3-wide with cover 6Ls behind leader in 10th at 1000 M, 4-wide (widest) turning for home when in a similar position, never on terms.
3-back on fence about 4Ls off speed at 1000 M in midfield, similar margin behind in 5th at final bend, much too one-paced to threaten front runners.
Always prominent about 2Ls off pace in 4th but 3-wide no cover through to the circle, struggling before final bend, faded markedly.
In touch to 300 M. Weakened badly inside 200 M.
Forward of midfield about 3Ls back. Made up a little late ground in straight.
Slowly away before moving up to behind midfield but proved difficult to settle at 1200 M and checked off heels at 1100 M. Held up at 400 M. Ran on for a distant 3rd despite hanging in.
Slowly away. Always at rear. Never a factor.
Soon led and made all to win by a big margin.
Slowly away. Towards rear. Improved along rail to midfield from 1000 M. Took closer order rounding home bend. Failed to quicken upon straightening.
Dropped steadily towards rear from wide draw. Steadied off heels at 200 M and was then reluctant to shift back out for running. Not fully tested.
Behind midfield or worse. 6-wide turning in. Not a threat in straight.
Slowly away but soon moved up to 3rd or 4th position about 2Ls back. Ran on in straight for a distant 2nd.
Soon around midfield but trapped wide and without cover from 1000 M. Not a threat in straight.
Forward of midfield about 3Ls back. Tried hard in straight but was well beaten for a minor placing.
Slowly away. Midfield or worse. Towards rear upon straightening. Never a threat.
Dropped steadily towards rear from wide draw. Not a threat in straight.
Soon in 2nd place. One-paced final 200 M before weakening 50 M out.
Made all. Hung on well under pressure in straight.
Chased leader throughout. Failed to quicken to threaten inside final 200 M.
Never better than midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Mainly in forward of midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Never seen with a chance.
Travelled towards rear to straight. Never nearer.
Broke well. Settled just off the pace. Shifted out for a run approaching home turn but unable to quicken under pressure in straight.
Travelled towards rear on rails to straight. Kept on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Never far off. Slightly held up on rails after straightening. Produced moderate progress inside final 300 M but unable to peg back winner.
Raced mainly 2 wide in midfield. Ran on steadily down straight. Did best work at finish.

Broke well, showed good early speed to race prominently early, caught 3 wide without cover from awkward alley, raced 2Ls off them closing to hit lead entering straight, overhauled at 300 M and only battled thereafter.
Average into stride, given time to settle 5 back on fence 2nd last 9Ls away, used nothing to turn, angled clear in straight and made some ground late from well back.
Slow to begin, took up position 2 wide 6Ls away from front just worse than midfield, in traffic entering straight, found nothing when pressured and dropped right out.
Broke well, showed good early toe to challenge for early lead, kept pressure on when unable to cross, raced at leaders girth to turn, early effort told and weakened right out in straight.

Away well, ridden along early to hold forward spot behind leader, travelled well in mid section, had dream run to turn, held up slightly when looking for run but only plugged along when clear in home stretch.
Away well, pushed hard to hold lead on rails, pressured throughout with speed good, backed off to turn, under pressure entering straight, lacked dash to figure and weakened to be well beaten.
Ordinary to begin, drifted back to take up rearward spot 7Ls off lead on fence, had good trip through middle stages, pushed along entering straight and battled steadily making some late ground.

Slow to begin, dropped out last early 8 to 9Ls from lead 2 wide, enjoyed soft trip through middle stages, came 3 wide from 600 M, 7 wide on turn and unleashed powerful sprint to claim them and score well.
Average to begin, ridden up early to hold spot midfield on rails, 4 to 5Ls away, had soft trip to turn, followed fence in straight, held up passing 300 M, chased hard when clear over final furlong.
Away well, took up prominent position, 1 out 1 back 2Ls away, enjoyed run of race to turn, placed under pressure entering straight but gave nothing when asked.
Jumped with field, restrained to take midfield position 2 wide 3 to 4Ls from front runners, had good run in middle stages, under pressure on turn, lacked usual hard finish. (Irregular heart beat.)

Broke with field, unable to slot in from wide alley, raced 3 wide midfield 3 to 4Ls away, moved up strongly 1L away on turn, hit lead passing 250 M but wide run took effect and unable to maintain effort last bit.

Fair to begin from widest gate, unable to get in when restrained for cover, raced 3 wide with cover 5Ls away in mid section, made 5 wide run on turn and chased gamely in stretch, unable to match winner.
Away with them, trapped 4 wide without cover from wide alley, 3 to 4Ls away to turn, hard ridden into straight, couldn't sustain effort and weakened to be beaten a long way.
Midfield far side. Towards rear into straight. Made up good late ground inside final 200 M.
Very slow into stride. Steadily picked up to rear of midfield coming out of back straight. Sustained progress down home straight to be nearest at finish.
Wide in midfield. Effort rounding home bend. Gradually faded in straight.
Mainly in forward of midfield. Did not have much room in the run home.
Shared pace early. Settled just behind leaders coming out of back straight. Remained same on rails turning for home but could find no clear run throughout the straight.
Ridden to midfield early. Gradually weakened out of contention after straightening.
Towards rear. Ran on down straight to be nearest at finish.
Never in contention. (Bled.)
Jumped best. Quickly crossed to rail and attempted to make all but swamped under pressure close to home.
Never seen with a chance.
Well there. Held every chance early in straight. Unable to peg back leader and swamped for a placing final strides.
Jumped fairly. Settled at the back. Circled field rounding home bend. Sustained headway down centre of straight without threatening.
Midfield early. Took closer order rounding home bend. Some 1L 3rd turning in. Shifted in away from whip passing 200 M. Pushed out to gain upper hand final strides.
Never far off. Close up in 5th turning in. Raced tightly between runners early in straight and forced to steady passing 200 M. No clear passage throughout final stages.
Broke with field, caught 3 wide midfield 5Ls off lead through mid section, travelled fairly to turn, wide run took its toll and gradually weakened out of it in straight.
Slowly into stride, settled second last 12 lengths from lead, swung widest turning for home, made up huge amount of ground from impossible position to be closest at finish.
Fair to begin, drifted back to worse than midfield 10Ls off speed, stuck to fence throughout and enjoyed good run to turn, made up late ground between runners in straight giving too great a start.
Fast to break, showed early speed to cross easily, raced keenly in front throughout, maintained length break to turn, drifted out in straight but fought strongly to hold out all but winner.
Began with field, restrained from awkward alley to settle worse than midfield 7 to 8Ls from lead, had clear running to turn and produced fair effort when pressured in straight making some ground.

Jumped with field, niggled along in early stages to hold spot 3 back on fence 5Ls from lead, spent nothing in run, under pressure entering straight, lacked sprint to make ground and only battled away.
Broke well, had enough speed to take up forward position, raced 1 out 1 back 2-3Ls off leader, had good run to turn, made some ground in straight but never looked comfortable over last 300 M.

Away with them, ridden hard to go forward, crossed to sit outside leader, raced on bit at leaders girth throughout (speed good), under pressure entering straight, couldn't sustain effort and weakened last 200 M (breathing problems).
Away with them, showed good early speed to hold spot behind leader, had run of race throughout, followed rails in straight, obtained inside run at 350 M and dashed through to score impressively.
Away well, restrained from wide gate to obtain trail in rearward position, raced 2 wide and 4th from rear 10Ls off lead to home turn, pressured in straight but lacked usual finishing burst.
Best into stride, lacked early pace and drifted back to midfield position 2 wide 5Ls from leaders, travelled well to turn, made run between horses in straight and chased hard sticking to task gamely.
Slow to begin, drifted back to clear last 10Ls from front runners, hard at it throughout, showed nothing when required in straight to be beaten a long way.
Behind midfield or worse. Proved difficult to settle and hung out passing the winning post 1st time. Widest turning in. Unbalanced at 800 M. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Went forward from 1800 M to take lead at 1400 M after being trapped wide with no cover. Headed upon straightening and soon dropped out rapidly.
Took lead from 1st turn. Headed at 1400 M. Under pressure from 600 M when 2Ls off the lead. Kept on in straight until weakened inside 200 M.
Led briefly before settling in 2nd or 3rd place. Under pressure from 700 M to hold its position. Dropped to the rear rounding the final turn.
Midfield or worse but trapped wide and without cover. Went forward to race outside the lead after 800 M. Kept on in straight until finding no extra 100 M out.
At rear. Headway along back straight to be behind the pace but trapped wide turning in. Dropped out quickly inside 200 M.
At rear and proved difficult to settle after 1800 M. Unbalanced at 800 M. Last upon straightening. Ran past beaten runners final 200 M.
Midfield or worse. One-paced in straight.
Soon settled behind the pace. About 3 to 4Ls back in midfield or worse from 1200 M. Steady headway 700 M out to be 4th turning in. Responded well final 200 M and won easily going away.
2 to 3 back on the fence. About 4Ls back in midfield from 1200 M. Shifted out and put under pressure from 500 M. Ran on steadily to a distant 2nd.
Midfield but trapped wide and without cover. Went forward to race outside the lead after 800 M. Disputed lead upon straightening before weakening badly final 150 M.
At rear. Improved to midfield turning in by saving ground along the rail but got held up. Ran on final 100 M to just miss a distant 2nd after shifting out twice for running.

Jumped well. Midfield or slightly behind. Within 5Ls from leader in a 2 wide position with cover. 8th coming home. Stayed on well early part of straight. Became unbalanced at 200 M. Kept on nicely without improving position.
Jumped well, settled well midfield in a 2 wide position with cover. Shifted out entering Straight and shifted wider at 200 M. Found plenty when challenged to capture a narrow margin victory.
Began slowly. Within 4Ls from leader on the rail. 7th to entering Home Turn. Shifted out for better running inside 350 M. Kept on nicely with no extra to stay in contention. Closest at finish.

Kept rearward, at least 7Ls from leader. Ridden along on turn. Slightly behind midfield entering home turn. Shifted wide after straightening. Made up good ground late whilst hanging in and provide late contest to first pair.
Kept rearward. 4th last on rail at 800 M. Last few entering Straight. Responded well to riding early part of the Straight. Hit traffic and unable to stride freely inside 100 M, was not fully tested.
Raced in a rearward position and trailed field. Remained in rear section and 2nd last to enter home straight. Found nothing in the straight.
Jumped cleanly. 2Ls off pace in a 2 wide spot with cover. Hung out making the turn. Battled on over the concluding stages. Tried hard. Ran on nicely to keep close 2nd.
Jumped well. Settle 3rd on rail, within 2Ls from leader. 4th coming home and ran on well in straight. Failed to turn up a notch and lost 3rd late. Whip got knocked away inside final 50 M.
Jumped well. 2 wide off pace and gained slight lead after straightening. Led by half a length at 200 M. Kept on steadily with one pace but found no extra. Faded gradually.
Settled 3 deep on rail most of the race. 6th to enter Straight. Saved ground along rails making home turn. No clear running early part of straight and did not quicken closing stages.
Good early speed to take the lead off the fence. Set strong pace until being passed after straightening and not a factor thereafter. Weakened badly at 200 M.
Last to jump. Tailed most of the race. Ran passed beaten runners inside 200 M. Made no impression.
Settled on fence behind the pacesetters until home straight. Took the lead on straightening and opened up a 2Ls advantage. Unable to hold off winner at 200 M.
Niggled out of the gates and raced 3-wide in a forward position. Remained 3-wide among leaders in the back straight and making home turn. Weakened on straightening.
Niggled along to race 2-wide behind the pace early stages. Kept alongside the leader in back straight and held a slight advantage making home turn. Dropped out soon after straightening.

Jumped awkwardly and trailed field early stages. 2-wide near the back in back straight. Ridden along making home turn and was checked severely after straightening. Recovered and closed the race off strongly.
2-wide and no better than midfield until 700 M. Steadily improved making home turn and swung out on straightening to make a run. Quickened nicely and charged to the lead at 200 M.
Settled on fence in rear section. Remained in similar position making home turn and near last on straightening. Made up some ground in the straight.
Settled 3-wide behind midfield. Switched out to make a run on straightening. Ran on fairly in the straight.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Saved ground making home turn and continued well in the straight to claim a minor placing.
Settled at the rear and trailed field into home straight. Lacked a quickening pace and only ran past a beaten runner.
2-wide and no worse than midfield. Kept within 3Ls of the pace in back straight and reached within a length of the leader making home turn. Checked on straightening and ran on fairly thereafter.
Showed good early speed from widest draw and took the lead. Remained racing in the front until joined by others at 700 M. Disputed lead turning for home but dropped out steadily in the straight.
Settled 3-wide at midfield. Widest turning for home and stayed on same pace in the straight.
3-back on fence 3Ls off pace in 4th at 1100 M, 4Ls down in 5th and 3-wide on straightening for home, tended to hang in under pressure at 200 M when 2Ls down in 3rd, no extra.
Held early lead until being headed at 1200 M, about 3Ls behind speed in 4th on fence from 800 M to home turn, found nothing off the bit.
A little slow to begin, settled on fence 6Ls off pace in 9th at 1100 M and similarly positioned turning for home, headway 3Ls back in midfield when switching out, kept on well to lead final 30 M.
5Ls down in 8th when 2-wide at 1100 M, slightly closer on straightening, 3Ls down in 5th at 200 M, failed to match kick of quinella pair but did just enough for 3rd.
Awkward break, 1L down in 3rd at 1200 M, pressed on to lead by 1L at 800 M and by 2L at 600 M and turning for home, all out when headed at the 200 M, weakened close home.
On fence in 6th about 4Ls off speed at 1100 M, 5Ls back in midfield on straightening, always rooted in midfield.
Tracked winner 6Ls off speed in 10th or so from 1200 M to homestretch, stayed on well but always trailed the winner by a neck in doing so.
Never competitive, lost ground at start after an awkward break, 8Ls back in 11th at 1200 M, struggling turning for home, well beaten.
Slow away, 3Ls off speed in 5th when 2-wide at 1100 M, 2Ls down in 3rd at 800 M and was 2nd turning for home, all out when leading at 200 M, grabbed inside final 50 M and lost a place.
Slowest away and switched to rail from wide gate, always about 10Ls last from 1200 M to home turn, stayed on strongly out wide to nearest at finish but given a fraction too much to do.
Always 3-wide no cover, 5Ls off speed in 7th at 1200 M, 4Ls down in 6th at 800 M, 4-wide on straightening when same margin behind, soon faded.
Disputed lead at 1200 M and led by 1L at 1100 M until being headed at 1000 M, under pressure to keep within 2Ls of the pace on the circle, dropped out in stretch.
Always deep on the track in or around midfield but mostly with cover, 5Ls down in 10th at 600 M, showed nothing in home straight.
On fence within about 2Ls of the speed better than midfield until home straight, over 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, one-paced in the finish.
Tended to hang in early when worse than midfield, 5Ls off pace towards rear from 600 M to home turn, never competitive.
Better than midfield within 2Ls of the pace until home turn, 1L down at 200 M, kept on finding but never looked like catching the winner.
Hindered at start and lost some ground, behind early but made some ground on fence to be 3Ls back on fence turning for home, never properly on terms, however.
Made all, narrow advantage on fence for most of backstretch, about 2Ls clear entering homestretch and going well, same margin ahead at 200 M, driven out.
Caught very deep on track at least 4 and 5-wide down the back, restrained to be 6Ls last turning for home, never dangerous.
In midfield within 2Ls or 3Ls of the leader until the 500 M, forced 5-wide (widest of all) taking home turn when 4Ls behind, failed to redress this margin.
Checked at start and got back at least 4Ls off pace towards rear until home turn, made some good late headway to take 3rd.
Mostly 3-wide without cover, within 1L of the pace in 3rd until the 600 M, 4-wide and 2Ls down in 5th entering home straight, soon faded.
Tracked winner out 2-wide a neck down in 2nd until the circle, hung out quite badly and 4-wide on straightening when 2Ls down in 2nd, didn't find a great deal under pressure.
In midfield or slightly worse from 3Ls to 4Ls off the speed until home bend, always held by principals.
2 back on the fence. Steadied at 250 M. Kept on but was not ridden out after being held up close home.
3 back on the fence. Steadied at 200 M. Kept on without threatening thereafter.
Soon behind midfield or worse about 6 to 7Ls off the lead. Took closer order rounding the turn. Steadied at 200 M before closing the race off strongly.
Slowly away. At rear. Hung in rounding home turn and in straight. Made up good ground inside 200 M until hitting traffic close home.
Soon forward of midfield about 3Ls back. Responded well final 300 M and held on to win after hitting front 100 M out.
Soon led. Hung out in straight and dropped right out of contention after 200 M.
Soon midfield or worse. Steadied off heels at 700 M and 500 M. Ran on steadily final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Midfield or better but trapped wide and without cover. 4th rounding home turn. Kept on in straight until finding no extra 200 M out.
Soon towards rear. Behind midfield about 5 to 6Ls back along back straight. Steadied off heels at 500 M. Ran on well final 200 M and lost 2nd final strides.
Soon travelling prominently on 2nd or 3rd position. Took lead 200 M out despite hanging in. Could not match speed with placed horses inside 100 M.
At rear. Swung wide turning in. Made up good ground to be nearest at finish final 200 M.
Dropped towards rear from wide draw. Improved on the outside to midfield rounding the turn. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Settled in last few. Made up good ground down centre of straight to reach 3rd late.
Settled in rear. Saved ground on rails turning in. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Raced 3-wide in midfield. Made short-lived effort coming out of back straight. Weakened before home turn.
Mainly 2-wide in midfield. Switched out for a run turning in but found nil.
Settled at the back. Commenced move turning in only but ran on past beaten horses to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield on rails. Only produced moderate headway in straight without ever threatening.
Chased leader to straight. Weakened.
Settled behind midfield. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight without quickening.
Never far off and 2-wide until giving ground rounding home bend. (Lame following morning.)
Held up just behind pace. Unable to sustain effort and gradually faded passing 200 M.
Gradually crossed to rails and took up running approaching stable bend. Led until worn down final strides.
Settled in forward of midfield. Commenced move turning in. Ran on resolutely under pressure to give upper hand short of line.
Began reasonably, unable to slot in an posted 3 wide in main division without cover 12-13Ls away, wide run took its toll when unable to quicken in stretch and only battled away.
Broke with them, held midfield position on rails in 3rd position leading main division, carted field up to tearaway leaders, tried hard in straight but lacked the dash to figure in the finish.
Away well, pushed along to hold 4th position on fence 11Ls away with cover, had soft run throughout, pushed along entering straight, unable to sprint and plugged on steadily.

Best away, showed early speed to cross from widest gate to sit outside leader, engaged in early speed battle, sat in 2nd 5Ls away, 5Ls from main body, under pressure entering straight but early effort told over final 100 M.

Began fairly, allowed to settle early midfield on fence 12Ls from tearaway leaders (pace fast), enjoyed good run throughout, angled 2 wide on turn and came with strong run down outside in straight to narrowly score.
Slow to begin, well back in last position 15Ls away, used nothing in run with speed on in front, made 5 wide run on turn and sprinted hard down outside to figure in finish. Big effort.
Jumped with rest, drifted back to worse than midfield 2-wide in main division 13Ls away, had cover throughout, pushed along entering straight, lacked usual hard finish and was well beaten.

Began with field, showed more speed than usual to take up position 5th without cover in main body 11Ls away, niggled along to make ground on turn, loomed strongly close to lead at 150 M but weakened last bit.

Broke well, showed good early speed to take up running, pressured early and overraced badly in middle section going out to 10L lead from main body to fast clip, held advantage to 150 M and fought hard when tackled. Not beaten far.

Jumped with them, taken back to slot in mid-division 2 wide 13Ls away, travelled fairly throughout with cover, made run between runners in straight making good ground before being held up at 100 M and not fully ridden out.
Slow to begin, drifted back to 2nd last on fence 14Ls away, had soft run to turn, followed paint into straight 8-10Ls away, came with strong finish to narrowly go down.
Slow to begin, drifted back to 3rd last 3 wide 15Ls away, had cover throughout, under pressure on turn, only battled away over last 200 M.
Soon led. Kept on in straight until headed 200 M out and weakened inside 100 M.
Soon 3rd or 4th about 2Ls behind the pace. Awkwardly placed on heels at 600 M. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Began awkwardly. At rear. Held up at 400 M. One-paced in straight.
Steadied shortly after start. Midfield or worse from 1000 M. Hung out whilst improving on the outside at 800 M. Last from 300 M.
Soon midfield or better about 3Ls behind the pace. One-paced in straight.
Towards rear early. Behind midfield about 5 to 6Ls back from 1000 M. Steadied at 300 M and again at 200 M before closing off strongly to be nearest at finish.
Bumped and unbalanced at start but recovered to be within 2Ls behind the pace from 1000 M. Held up at 400 M. Ran on final 300 M but could not match speed with first pair.
Soon 1 out and 1 back. Ran on well upon straightening and took lead 200 M out only to be outpaced by the winner inside 50 M.
Midfield about 4Ls back from 1000 M. One-paced in straight before dropping out of contention inside 200 M.
Always thereabout within 3Ls off the lead. Headway rounding home bend to 3rd. Kept finding in straight and gained upper hand 50 M out.
Midfield or worse about 4 to 5Ls back. 4-wide turning in. Ran on upon straightening but effort not sustained final 150 M.
Soon taken from wide draw towards rear. Swung widest turning in. Ran on a bit early straight but found nothing inside 200 M.
Jumped well. Kept 2 wide in midfield with cover. Within 3Ls from leader rounding home. Shifted wider on the track inside 300 M. Hard ridden but failed to quicken.
Always in rear. At least 6Ls off pace with cover until home turn. Last to enter straight. No response to riding at all. Never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.)
No better than midfield throughout. 4th last rounding home turn, at least 5Ls from lead. Ran on steadily without improving position.
Raced wide early stages. Ridden to go forward and cross to the lead at 1100 M. Led until straightening. Over used early and weakened badly at 300 M out.

Slow to begin. Rearward most of the race. Shifted out for better running early part of the straight and shifted wider after 250 M. Stayed on well early part of straight but never likely. Faded gradually.
Bounded in the air, bumped the inside gate and lost ground early. At least 5Ls off lead on fence at 800 M. Ran on nicely on the inside but found no extra final 200 M.

Raced prominently off pace. Stayed within 2Ls of the leader throughout the back straight. Took over the lead after passing the 350 M mark. Fought hard to stay on but did not find enough to finish with a win.
Travelled wide and without cover on back straight. Raced in a 3-wide position with no cover at 800 M. Made moderate progress down straight. Within 2Ls from leader final 200 M. One-paced till finish.
Began slowly. Around midfield in a 3-wide position. Shifted out to be 4 wide after straightening. Responded well inside 250 M to be closest at finish.

Never far off. 2 wide with cover within 4Ls from pacesetter on back straight. 1L off the lead in a 3-wide position at 400 M. Ran on well and was outpaced by the first pair. Held on to the third over closing stages.
2 deep on the rail and stayed within 3Ls from leader. 4th upon straightening in a prominent position. Then shifted away from the fence but only ran home one paced.
Kept rearward. Remained in rear section into the straight. 3rd last on straightening. Made no impression and ran home one-paced.

Midfield or better most of the race. Settled well on fence. Responded well and shifted out for running upon straightening. Finished off strongly inside 200 M and chased down leader inside final stages for the close win.

Last few at the first turn. Shifted to a 3-wide spot at 1000 M. 4 wide and ridden to go forward rounding the turn. Shifted wider onto the track after straightening. Responded fairly in the straight and kept on evenly to line.
Botched the jump but kept pace behind leaders early. Shuffled back after the 800 M and was 3-wide and 3Ls back making home turn. Remained on same pace to 200 M and weakened thereafter.
Jumped well from wide draw. Dropped steadily into the rear section. Widest making the turn and was last to enter home straight. Made no impression thereafter.
Outpaced early and raced on fence no better than midfield. Unable to pick up on straightening and weakened final 200 M.
Off slowly, checked after start and raced at the rear. Shifted to the fence and remained at the rear making home turn. Quickened nicely when placed under pressure and finished the race off strongly.

Missed the jump and was last to leave the gates. Hard ridden to catch up and raced behind the leaders. Settled on fence behind the leader making home turn. Lacked a response and failed to keep pace on straightening.
Settled 2-wide near midfield. Lacked a response when placed under pressure on straightening and kept same pace to the finish.

Best out and led briefly early stages. Eased slightly but stayed within a length of the pace middle stages. Raced alongside the eventual winner turning for home and duelled for the lead until bowing down at 200 M.
Hard ridden and raced among leaders early stages. Eased slightly before the turn and raced 2 to 3Ls off the pace making home turn. Failed to keep up in the straight and faded.

Good jump despite having knuckled. Drifted back to race in rear section. Awkwardly placed for some distance after 600 M and remained towards the rear on straightening. Ran on well in the straight to be closest at finish.

Only fair to jump but steadily improved to be in a forward position. Led on rails making home turn and held a slim advantage on straightening. Fought well when challenged for the lead and shook off pursuer at 200 M.
Niggled along and raced in the lead in a 5-wide position until the turn. 4-wide and stayed within a length of the pace making the turn. Kept on fairly in the straight to make the frame.
Hard ridden but was outpaced early stages. Raced in rear section and was 3-wide making the turn. Made a late rally and finished with a minor placing.
Switched from wide gate to fence, head up at 1400 M when about 10Ls last, switched out at 500 M to be 4-wide on straightening when 8Ls down in 12th or so, stayed on fairly, never nearer.
Sluggish and ridden along early, 5Ls behind in midfield at 1000 M, lost position on the circle and towards rear about 8Ls behind off final bend, very weak in the stretch.
On fence 8Ls behind lead at 1400 M, niggled along to take closer order from 1000 M, under pressure when 7Ls down taking home turn, no impression.
4-wide no cover early on before pressing to lead by 1L at 1000 M, 1L clear turning for home and kicked over 2Ls clear at 200 M, tired close home and just hung on, gamely, well ridden.
9Ls off pace in 13th at 1400 M, similarly placed entering homestretch, plugged on past a few tired rivals.
Slow away, 3-wide no cover when 4Ls off speed in 5th at 1400 M, always without cover until home straight when 5Ls down in midfield, kept on fairly without fully threatening to place.
5Ls off pace when 3-wide with cover in 8th at 1000 M, drifted further back on circle to be 8Ls off the pace near rear turning for home, worsened.
5Ls off pace in 6th when 2-wide at 1400 M, 4Ls down in 5th taking home turn, over 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, kept on finding but post came a fraction too soon.
Reared exiting gates losing about 4Ls on field, worse than midfield 8Ls off speed at 1200 M, 7Ls down in midfield turning for home, never looked like getting much closer.
Slow away, worse than midfield 7Ls off speed at 1400 M, pressed on to 2nd 1L off pace out 2-wide from 1000 M to stretch, over 2Ls down in 2nd at 200 M, one-paced but did enough for 3rd.
Raced too freely early on, 3Ls off pace at 1400 M when 2-wide in 4th place, 3Ls down in 3rd taking home turn, always well held inside final 300 M.
Had the run of the race in 3rd off pace on fence by 2Ls at 1400 M, 3-back on fence at 1000 M, struggling to keep up when 5Ls down turning for home, faded out further.
3-wide with cover about 9Ls behind in 13th at 1400 M, about 9Ls last at top of home straight, never a factor.
Keen early on, led on fence at 1600 M, left with the run of the race 2Ls off pace at 1000 M, weakened on the circle and very tame thereafter.
Bumped at the start, one from rear about 9Ls off the speed from 1200 M to home turn, held up until the 300 M, made up some modest late ground.
Soon led on fence, headed at 1000 M and under 1L down in 2nd until top of home straight when regaining a narrow advantage, stayed on well inside final 200 M.
In 5th on fence 4Ls behind at 1200 M, checked about 450 M out and left 5Ls down in midfield on straightening, 4Ls down in 5th at 200 M, ran on strongly to take 2nd close home.
Mostly in 8th place about 5Ls or so off the speed out 2-wide through to the final bend, very one-paced from then on.
Awkwardly away, mostly midfield about 5Ls off the speed on fence through to home straight when checked, all out to be 6Ls down in 7th at the 200 M, eased close home.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, about 2Ls down in 3rd from 800 M to home turn and at 200 M, kept on at same pace, only narrowly missed a place.
Unbalanced at 1400 M and left 3-wide no cover from 1200 M to home straight about 4Ls off the speed in midfield, left behind at top of home straight, eased close home.
Always worse than midfield at least 8Ls off the pace from 1000 M to home straight, never posed much of a threat.
Got back about 10Ls last early on, improved marginally to be 8Ls down in 11th on taking home turn, stayed on well from off the pace to be nearest at the finish.
Bumped at start, 3-wide no cover early on, sent on to lead narrowly out 2-wide from 1000 M to home straight when headed, all out at 200 M when a head 2nd, lost out on 2nd place final strides.
Bumped, buffeted and checked at the start, 10Ls off pace in 12th at 1000 M, hard ridden to take closer when still a long way off pace towards final bend, no impression.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 6th and struggling when turning for home, came home in own time.
3-wide with cover towards rear about 8Ls off the pace from 1200 M to home straight, struggled from final 300 M.
Always a little better than midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls off the speed until home turn, failed to quicken up sufficiently.
Soon midfield or worse. About 5Ls back from 1000 M. Ran on well final 300 M and took charge in the closing stages.
3rd or 4th from 1200 M about 1 to 2Ls back. Ran on in straight for a distant 3rd.
Towards rear. Not a threat in straight.
Led until headed by the winner when one-paced in the closing stages.
2nd early. Dropped back from 1200 M to forward of midfield but proved difficult to settle at 1000 M. One-paced in straight until no extra inside 100 M.
Behind midfield or worse about 6Ls back and trapped wide. Made up a little late ground.
Moved up to 2nd from 1200 M. Kept on in straight until weakened inside 200 M.
At rear. Made up some late ground.
Began well. Attempted to drift back but proved difficult to settle. Went forward after 1000 M to 3rd place and continued to be wide without cover. Weakened badly inside 300 M.
Forward of midfield about 3Ls back. Shifted out for clear running at 350 M but unable to quicken and hung out final 200 M.
Forward of midfield about 3Ls back. Weakened 300 M out.
Slowly away and dropped to the back. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Towards rear. Improved steadily along rail to midfield at 800 M. Held up at 400 M. Ran on without threatening placed horses.
Around midfield but trapped wide and without cover. Soon dropped out upon straightening.
Never seen with a chance.
Mainly in forward of midfield. Made only modest progress in straight without threatening.
Broke well. In front briefly. Dropped back to midfield and very wide rounding home bend. Faded further in straight.
Prominent to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Soon took up running. Led field until headed over 250 M out. No extra.
Mainly in rear of midfield to straight. Faded.
Settled in last few. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening.
Ridden for pace early after beginning from poor draw. Settled one back on rails inside leader rounding home bend. Soon faded in straight.
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Midfield on rails to straight. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Always prominent. Hit front under pressure 200 M out. Held on well to the line.
Settled at the back. Made up some ground in straight.
Jumped in air and last ground at start, raced in rear division with cover in middle of track 3Ls away, made some late ground passing tired horses.
Broke well, crossed to sit outside leader on grandstand rail, continued to pressure throughout, still in it until 200 M but condition gave out and weakened thereafter.
Average to begin, allowed to settle off speed in last position only 3Ls away, made run between horses at 300 M, closing strongly to take lead inside last 100 M to score good win.
Broke with them, held spot midfield without cover 3 off outside rail, just off pace throughout, under pressure from 300 M, unable to offer anything when asked over final 200 M.
Average to jump, raced at rear furthest from rails 3 to 4Ls away, struggling at 300 M mark, unable to match them and only plugged away last 200 M.
Away well, showed good early speed, took up position just off pace on the grandstand side, hit lead at 200 M and fought strongly holding off all but winner.
Only fair to begin, raced in rear division on outside rail, outpaced early, under pressure at 300 M, got going late to be closest at finish.

Broke with them, showed good early speed to take up position in leading division racing near outside rail, just behind them throughout, showed good dash over concluding stages but unable to match top 3.
Jumped with field, held midfield position early 4Ls off rails. First under pressure at 400 M and weakened right out to be well beaten.
Average to begin (bumped at start) held midfield position in middle of track, came with strong run to 200 M but couldn't sustain effort and weakened last 100 M.
Broke well, showed good speed but unable to cross to rail, raced in middle of track 2 to 3Ls off them, under pressure at 200 M and only battled away to line.
Began well, showed good speed to take lead and make running on outside rail, under hard riding at 600 M, couldn't keep going and plodded last 200 M.
Jumped well, drifted back to midfield 2 to 3Ls away in middle of track, hard ridden at 300 M, one paced and weakened from that point.
Began only fairly, raced rear to rail on stand side, had cover throughout only 3Ls off them. Made run between horses last 200 M and sprinted hard doing best work late.
Close up early. Settled in forward of midfield around home bend. Quickened to hold some chance early in straight but could find no extra closing stages.
Never far off. Quickened to hit front momentarily over 200 M out. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Raced very wide in prominent position after beginning from poor draw. Soon faded after straightening.
Settled in rear. Not clear run early in straight. Picked up well inside 300 M to grab 2nd late.
Began awkwardly. Not far off pace far side. Dropped to rear of midfield rounding home bend. Lost further ground after straightening.
Broke well. With leaders. Hit front briefly upon straightening. Dropped out passing 200 M.
Close up. Baulked behind runners about 300 M out. Kept on steadily closing stages.
Raced mostly 4 wide in midfield. Gradually shifted out to grandstand rails early in straight and sustained effort to grab lead passing 200 M. Won well.
Well there. Gained slender advantage coming out of back straight. Headed turning for home and soon weakened.
Settled at the back. Only produced moderate headway down grandstand side of straight. Never threatening.
Mainly in rear of midfield. Made up some ground in straight.
Forward of midfield to straight. No extra.
Settled in last few. Made up good ground past beaten horses down centre of straight.
Midfield throughout. One-paced under pressure in straight.

Average to begin, niggled along to hold spot 4 back on fence 4 to 5Ls from speed, enjoyed soft run through middle stages, travelled strongly to turn, made run through pack in straight making some late ground.

Fair to begin, ridden up to hold position 3 back on fence 2Ls away, had run of race to turn, came between horses entering straight and switched back to rail to close race off strongly with little room last 50 M.
Average to begin, showed no early speed to settle worse than midfield 7 to 8Ls off lead, followed rails through mid section, near to last to turn, stuck to paint in straight but only battled away.

Away well, showed good early dash to take up spot outside leader, enjoyed good run with average pace in mid section, pushed along to chase leader entering straight, couldn't match them and weakened right out last 200 M.
Slowly into stride, taken back to race at rear of field 12Ls from leaders, lobbed along at tail throughout, switched wide in straight in search for better ground, closed race off fairly.
Broke with them, held midfield position 2 wide with cover 4 to 5Ls off speed, enjoyed good trip throughout, under pressure entering straight, one paced when asked for final effort.
Fairly away, drifted back to 5th from rear worse than midfield, raced 2 wide 9Ls away through mid section, came 3 wide from 500 M, tried hard but gave away too great a start. Doing best work late.
Slow to begin, settled in 3rd last position on rails 10Ls away from leader, not asked in middle stages, moved 2 wide from 800 M, came between horses with good run in straight, doing best work late.
Even break, raced in midfield position 5Ls away, 3 wide with cover throughout, made 4 wide run on turn, one paced in straight, bumped at 250 M but was a spent force at that point.

Jumped with them, restrained from awkward alley to obtain cover, raced 3 wide midfield 6 to 8Ls away, had cover and tracked nicely to turn, stuck to task well in straight. Unable to get closer with fast last sections.
Away fast, showed good early speed to cross to lead after 300 M, dictated terms in front at leisurely pace, held together to turn, kicked strongly in straight and held on for sound win.
Showed good early speed to challenge for early lead, raced behind leader throughout on bit, under pressure entering straight, checked when giving ground in straight.
Broke well, immediately restrained from wide alley to take up spot at tail of field, raced 3 wide throughout, had field in front entering straight, switched to outside rail but only plugged home.
Broke with them, allowed to settle just off pace 2 to 3Ls away, raced 3 wide without cover throughout, gave leader 2Ls entering straight and chased hard to be closest at finish.
Midfield or better from 1st turn but trapped wide and without cover most of the way. Unable to quicken in straight and weakened 100 M out.
Dropped to the rear from wide draw. 7 to 8Ls last from 1200 M. 5Ls back turning in. Ran on well final 200 M and took charge in the closing stages.
Towards rear after having to steady at 1300 M. Hung in rounding home turn and in straight. Never a threat.
Slowly away. Towards rear about 5Ls behind the pace from 1200 M. Unbalanced turning in. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish despite steadying on the line.
Crowded at start and then proved difficult to settle. Midfield but 3-wide along back straight. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Pulled up and retired from race soon after start for refusing to stretch out.
Midfield. One-paced in straight.
Went forward from wide draw and took lead from 1200 M. Kept on well and rallied hard with 2nd horse final 100 M and was narrowly beaten to 3rd.
Went forward from 1300 M to be 1 out 1 back after being trapped wide and without cover. Commenced to hang out when under pressure rounding the home turn and finished one-paced.
Led to 1200 M before tracking the leader. Ran on well in straight and fought hard inside 100 M to grab 2nd by the narrowest margin.
In touch early. Dropped back to midfield or worse after having to steady off heels at 1400 M and 1100 M. Made up good ground final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
About 3Ls back in 4th or 5th position from 1200 M. Hung in and made no impression in straight before dropping out of contention inside 200 M.
Broke well. Hard ridden to stay with pace. 3 wide in midfield around the bend. Shifted wider on straightening. Found nothing in Straight. Faded final 200 M.
Kept rearward. Steadied at 600 M and unable to recover ground. Unable to quicken when placed under pressure. Lacked needed response in the Straight. Never a threat. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well. 2 wide within 2Ls from leader until straightening. Finished off strongly final 200 M and chased down leader final stages. Held off late charges by narrow margin for a close win.

Slow to begin. Remained rearward most of the race. Last few to enter Straight. Saved ground on fence until shifted out for better running. Ran on strongly final 200 M to make some late impression near finish.

Away well. 3 wide at least 2Ls off pace with cover. Pressured on bend to keep up with pace. 2Ls behind the lead inside 200 M. Quickened nicely in open ground to chase down the winner but found the goal too soon.
Jumped slowly and began awkwardly. 4Ls from the lead on fence upon straightening. Ran on nicely early part of Straight. Hit traffic and unable to stride freely inside 100 M. Not fully tested.
Midfield. 2 wide 4 deep with cover. 7th to get on Straight. Kept on evenly in the closing stages but found no extra to stay in contention.
Hampered at 600 M. Last rounding home turn. Found nothing in the Straight. Far from the winner and never a factor.
Mostly behind midfield. Checked at 600 M. Remained towards rear on straightening until switching wide final 300 M. Responded strongly and made some good ground to be closest at finish.

Great early speed to take the rail from the wide barrier. Attempted to make all. Failed to hold off the principals closing stages. Was crowded just prior to the winning post and was not ridden to the end.

Began slowly. Kept 3Ls from leader on the rail. Saved ground from fence entering Straight. Tried hard, but lacked an extra kick. Crowded closing stages, not ridden out to the line as it normally would.
Raced handy. 2Ls off pace on fence. Went on evenly early part of Straight. Made a late dash on the inside rail, kept on well but failed to match stride with top pair closing stages.
Travelled on fence at midfield. Niggled along making home turn. Unable to quicken when pressured on straightening and kept same pace to finish.

Disputed lead before settling behind the leader in back straight. Remained in a prominent spot until shifting out to tackle the leader on straightening. Took the lead at 200 M but was gunned down by winner last few strides.
Jumped fairly but was crowded a few times early stages and raced behind midfield. 2-wide making home turn and lacked a rally when placed under pressure on straightening.
Jumped fairly and race 3-wide without cover early. Pulled its way into a forward position in the back straight and raced outside the leader making home turn. Faded steadily final 200 M.
Ridden along to keep up with leaders early. Settled 2-wide and within 3Ls of the pace in back straight and home turn. Made up ground steadily in the straight and ran down rival close to the line.
Outpaced and raced at the rear. Trailed field throughout and made no impression in the straight.
Jumped well but was eased back to race on fence at midfield. Kept within 3Ls of the pace making the turn and quickened on straightening. Stayed on well over the final stages for a minor placing.
Allowed to drift back from wide draw. Checked near 1000 M and dropped further back to rear section. 3-wide making home turn. Only ran past beaten runners in the straight.
Settled 3-wide behind midfield. Commenced to improve its position after the Rock and advanced to midfield but widest turning in. Steadily made up ground in the straight and was closest at finish.

Dropped back from widest draw and raced towards the rear. Made the home turn along the fence and picked up well on straightening. Continued a strong run before being held in traffic over the last 100 M.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. Swung out on straightening but only able to keep same pace in the straight.
Ridden to take the lead. Took a length's advantage into the straight before being headed at 200 M. Weakened slightly closing stages.
Never dangerous, crowded at the jump, 5Ls down in 8th when 3-wide with cover at 1100 M, similar situation entering homestretch, didn't find much off the bridle.
Sent on out wide to lead by 1L on fence at 1000 M, about a neck clear or disputing advantage from 800 M to home straight, quickly swamped.
4-wide no cover when 3Ls off lead in 5th at 1100 M, sent on to dispute lead out 3-wide no cover from 600 M to home turn, all out to maintain this proximity at 200 M, faded thereafter.
Keen at 1200 M when on fence, opted for 2-wide run about a neck off pace in 2nd or 3rd from 1000 M to home straight, still right there at the 200 M but folded late.
Tended to hang in ungenerously, 3-wide no cover when 2Ls down in 4th at 1200 M, lost position from 600 M and 4-wide (widest) when 3Ls down in mid-division, weakened rapidly.
3-back on fence in midfield about 3Ls off speed from 1200 M to home straight, quickened through a nice gap to dispute lead at 150 M, kept on for pressure, not much in hand.
Never got much of a run, on fence 5Ls down in 10th at 1200 M, similarly placed taking final bend, switched out at 300 M for a run, blocked at 200 M and no passage thereafter, hardly tested at all.
Led early until handing up advantage at 1100 M, box-seat position on fence 2Ls off speed in 4th or so through to home straight, outpaced.
Slowly away, 2-wide and 5Ls back in 9th at 1100 M, edged closer to be 3Ls down outside winner turning for home, switched out wider, ran on strongly inside final 200 M, post came too soon.
2-wide and 3Ls down in 7th at 1100 M, improved to be just 1L behind entering stretch, picked up well to take narrow lead at 200 M, joined 150 M out by winner, no extra final 50 M.
Awkward break losing about 3Ls on field, one from rear 7Ls behind lead at 1100 M, 6Ls last turning for home, stayed on pretty well along fence, nearest at the finish.
7Ls last at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 10th on straightening for home, stayed on well without reaching principals.
4Ls back in 7th when 2-wide at 1100 M, identical position off home turn, still 4Ls back in 6th at 200 M, got going late, ran on strongly final 50 M for a place.
4Ls off pace on fence in or around midfield from 1200 M through to home turn, never looked significantly improving this position.
Fractious in gates and slowly away, 8Ls behind lead in 11th at 1200 M, worse off in rear at the 400 M, never a factor.
Always within 2Ls of the lead in 2nd or 3rd out 2-wide from 1200 M to home turn, kept on to be a neck down in 2nd at 200 M, led inside final 100 M, driven out.
Dictated very slow tempo leading by 1L to 2Ls from 1300 M to home turn, only a neck clear at 200 M and in trouble, headed inside final 100 M, just about hung on for 2nd.
6Ls back in 9th on fence at 1100 M, marginally closer turning for home, never got fully involved.
3Ls down in 4th 3-back on fence from 1100 M to final bend, one-paced in the finish.
Slow break losing about 3Ls on the leader, 2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 10th at 1100 M, headway out wide to be 4-wide (widest) when 6Ls down in 9th off home turn, never troubled leaders.
Had the run of the race on fence in 2nd or 3rd about 2Ls off the speed from 1000 M to home straight, had every opportunity to figure in the finish but lacked the kick.
About 3Ls off pace when 2-wide in 4th or 5th from 1200 M to home turn, 2Ls down in 3rd and with every chance of a place at 200 M, couldn't quicken up.
Hung out badly throughout, 3-wide no cover when 6Ls behind in 8th at 1100 M, improved out wide from 600 M to be 4Ls down in midfield entering straight, soon emptied out.
Mulish in the paddock, slowly away, 9Ls last when 2-wide at 1200 M, still 8Ls down off home turn, posed no threat.
Prominent early before settling in midfield or better. One-paced in straight before weakened 200 M out.
At rear. Made the home turn awkwardly. Made up a little late ground after being tightened after 200 M.
Towards rear. Midfield turning in by saving ground along rail. Not a threat in straight.
Dropped from wide draw towards rear. Awkward rounding the turn at 600 M. Hung in and made no impression in straight.
In touch early before steadied at 600 M and dropped back to 4th place about 3Ls back. Weakened badly 200 M out.
Midfield but trapped wide and without cover throughout. Cornered wide at 600 M. Kept on without threatening placed horses in straight.
Took lead after 800 M. Kicked home strongly to win going away and equalling the course record.
Led to 800 M before steadying to allow the winner to cross in front. Kept on in straight but lost out on a distant 2nd close home.
Towards rear at least 6Ls back. Behind midfield turning in. Ran on determinedly to gain a distant 2nd in the closing stages.
Lost considerable ground at start. Remained at back. Ran past beaten runners in the closing stages.
Slowly away. Recovered to be in midfield from 800 M. Made the turn at 600 M awkwardly and steadied off heels. Kept on without threatening principals.
4th from 800 M. One-paced in straight before weakened final 200 M.
Settled in rear. Made up some late ground down centre of straight past beaten runners.
Settled well back. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Settled just off the pace. Quickened well to lead after straightening. Just staved off runner-up's strong late challenge closing stages.
Led to straight. Dropped out tamely.
Settled in midfield. Made moderate progress down straight without threatening.
Chased leaders. Disputed lead briefly turning for home. Soon weakened.
Settled in rear. Ran on well but lost placing final strides.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Gradually improved to forward of midfield position early stages. Remained same into home straight and ran home one-paced.
Prominent. Unable to sustain effort and yielded ground passing 200 M.
Settled well back. Finished off race strongly inside final 200 M to grab 3rd late.
Raced wide in midfield. Came to challenge upon straightening. Responded well under pressure to just fail to get up on line.
Jumped with them, pushed along to go forward, raced 4 back on rails 5-6Ls from speed, used nothing in run, made 2 wide run into straight, tried hard to fight out finish finding first two too strong.

Fastest into stride, took up running early and pressured until 1000 M, surrendered lead and raced behind leaders 2 wide from that point, came with 3 wide run on turn to hit lead but early effort told. Big run. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, rolled forward to hold prominent spot 2 wide 4Ls off lead with cover, had good run throughout, switched out in straight but only battled away to line.

Slowly into stride, settled last early, raced 2 wide 8Ls off speed throughout middle section, travelled well, under pressure entering straight, lacked the dash to figure and only battled away in stretch. (See Racing Incidents.)

Broke with them, restrained to take up spot behind speed, raced midfield 2-wide 5-6Ls away from leaders, travelled well throughout, made run between horses in straight getting clear last 150 M to sprint hard and score.
Away with them, showed early speed to battle for lead taking up running after 1000 M, shaded throughout and always working lead into stretch but couldn't keep going after early effort.
Fair to begin from wide alley, restrained to 2nd last spot 2 wide 9Ls off speed, travelled comfortably at tail, made 3-4 wide run on turn and made up fair amount of ground widest in straight.

Fairly into stride from widest alley, continued to push on 3 wide early to lead shading inside horse, fast early sections, travelled on bit to turn, stuck to task to 200 M before early workload had effect and dropped out.

Broke well, held inside position to settle 3 back on fence 3-4Ls behind leaders, had run of race in middle stages, followed paint into straight and came with promising run until 200 M but couldn't sustain effort.

Average to begin, taken in behind, raced 5 back on fence 8Ls away early, had soft run to turn, angled wide entering straight and came from well back with strong run to chase down all but winner. (See Racing Incidents.)

Slowly away, drifted back to last on rails 10Ls away, lobbed along at tail throughout, under pressure to improve on turn, gave enormous start entering straight but got going late to make good ground last 200 M.
Average to begin, raced 4 back on rails 6Ls off speed, had reasonable run throughout, followed paint in straight, closed strongly but badly checked at 100 M and race was over from that point.
Never seen with a chance and hung out most of the way.
Behind midfield at least 4Ls from the lead. Kept on without threatening final 400 M.
Shifted towards the outside rail but remained towards rear throughout.
Led from wire to wire. Held off late charge by 2nd horse whilst hanging out final 400 M.
At rear over 7Ls back. Made up a little late ground.
Slowly away. Never a factor at the back.
Jumped awkwardly but soon behind the leader in 3rd or 4th place. Kept on without threatening the first pair and lost 3rd inside 50 M.
Midfield or better about 3 to 4Ls behind the pace. Ran on well final 400 M to be nearest at finish.
2nd about 1L behind the leader. Unable to keep up 300 M out and dropped quickly out of contention 200 M from home.
Stumbled on jumping. Towards rear some 6 to 7Ls back. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Slowly away. Never better than midfield about 4 to 5Ls off the speed. Nothing left 400 M out.
Around 6th or 7th about 2 to 3Ls off the pace. Ran on well final 200 M to grab 3rd without troubling the first pair.
Around 5th or 6th about 2Ls back. Weakened 200 M out.
Thereabout in 4th or 5th place within 2Ls from the lead. Faded away 200 M out.
Great start. Held back to seek cover. Kept 3 wide rearward. Last few to enter straight. Shifted wider on track. Same pace till the line with no difference to position.
Midfield, at least 4Ls from pacesetter. Saved ground on fence entering straight. Improved strongly along inside, hit traffic closing stages. Narrowly missed a place. Was not fully tested.
Midfield or better on rail. Over-raced in middle stages. Responded nicely after straightening. Made good ground and produced some late impression. Continually made ground under hard riding.
Bumped and hampered on jumping. Lost early ground and ran in rear section most of the way. Ran on moderately on the rail after straightening. Made up nice ground final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Jumped well. Travelled midfield or better. 2-wide within 3Ls from the lead with cover. Pressured on the bend to be 6th rounding home. Yielded ground at 500 M and kept on same pace thereafter.
Raced handy, within 2Ls behind the speed on fence. 3rd after straightening. 1L behind pacesetter at 200 M. Battled on until last stride but found the winner too good.
Set 2 wide 1L behind the pace most of the way. Within 3Ls from leader inside final 400 M. Hard ridden but failed to quicken. No extra finding 200 M and faded gradually.
Slow to begin. Lost ground after being bumped. Tailed throughout. Switched wide after straightening. No response when asked. Never a factor.
Bumped and hampered on jumping. Raced in the rear section on back straight. 3rd last on straightening. Kept on steadily but never a threat.
Broke well. Difficult to settle early stages. Settled behind midfield in a 3-wide position prior to the bend. Closed the race off fairly. Kept on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Travelled midfield, 3Ls off speed at 1000 M, 3 deep with cover. Similar making home turn, never got much closer. Failed to turn up a notch and kept on same pace.
Great early speed to set pace on fence. Attempted to make all. Held a 2Ls advantage inside final 200 M. Weakened final 100 M. Headed by the first pair, driven out to hang on for 3rd.
Jumped well. Slightly behind midfield in a 2-wide spot at 800 M. Pressured to keep up rounding the turn. Found nothing under riding and weakened quickly into straight.
Away well. Raced prominently about 3Ls off pace in 4th from 1000 M. Always 3 wide without cover. Chased gamely final 200 M. Swept to the lead inside 100 M and held off late charges.
2-wide and 3Ls off the pace at 1000 M. Advanced to be within 2Ls of the leader on straightening. Lacked a response when asked 300 M out and faded final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly and stumbled. Ridden along from a wide draw and advanced steadily to cross to the lead going into the turn. Maintained a length's advantage at 400 M but was swamped final 200 M.

Ridden along to set the early pace. Remained in the lead until 1000 M. Settled prominently behind the leader making the turn and kept on well on straightening. Contended for the lead at 200 M but was outpaced by the top pair.
Dropped back from a wide draw and shifted to the fence. Switched out turning for home and had to weave through rivals to find daylight. Made a strong closing run and hunted down rival final 50 M.
Slowly away and raced on fence in rear section. Trailed field on straightening and made no impression in the straight.

Settled on fence at midfield. Got shuffled back near 800 M and was in rear section on straightening. Chased along the inside but ran into traffic 250 M. Switched outside for a clear run and closed the race off well.
Didn't settle well in a forward position early stages. 2-wide and a length off the pace making the turn. Moved past the leader 300 M out but was swamped final 200 M.

Settled 2-wide and no better than midfield. Moved to the fence and improved slightly making home turn to reach within 4Ls of the leader on straightening. Ran on well in the straight to make the frame.
Settled 3-wide in rear section. Widest turning for home and made a strong rally to take the lead inside 200 M. Kept on well but was gunned down by the winner final 50 M.
Best out but was allowed to drop to the rear. 4-wide in rear section turning for home. Steadily made up ground in the straight but unable to sustain effort final 100 M.
Jumped awkwardly and then was crowded. Ridden to make up ground and raced 2-wide behind midfield until straightening. Quickened and made up ground nicely but found no extra final 100 M.
Settled behind the leader early stages. Shuffled back at 900 M and continued to lose ground making the turn. Last to enter home straight and finished tailed out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped awkwardly and raced 3-wide slightly behind midfield. Under the whip making home turn but lacked a response. Dropped out in the straight.
Jumped fairly. 3-wide without cover and kept within 3 to 4Ls of the pace. Remained in similar position making the turn. Lacked a response on straightening and weakened.
Midfield 3-wide no cover before pressing to be 2nd about 1L off pace at 800 M and disputed for the lead off home turn, headed at the 200 M by the winner, lost out on a place close home.
Always close up in 5th or so and about 2Ls off the lead until home turn, outpaced from top of home straight.
Settled in midfield about 4Ls off pace at 1000 M, a little closer turning for home, stayed on well but never likely to catch the winner.
Slowly away, about 4Ls behind lead and slightly worse than midfield until home straight, same at 200 M, never threatened.
5-wide no cover down the backstretch in midfield about 3Ls off pace, under pressure to maintain this position turning for home, weakened.
Head up and over-racing when about 5Ls off the speed towards rear, a little closer taking final bend, always outpaced.
3-wide but with cover about 2Ls off pace in midfield at 1000 M, 1L down in 3rd at final bend and all out to maintain this position at 200 M, faded thereafter.
1L behind lead in 3rd at 1000 M, over 2Ls down in 5th at final bend, found nothing under pressure.
Hindered at the start and lost ground, 8Ls last on fence at 1000 M, 6Ls down in 13th entering home straight, stayed on well close home, nearest at the finish.
4-wide no cover early on towards rear, struggling to lie up at 800 M when 5Ls off pace in 11th or so, well beaten before home turn.
Led by 1L on fence at 1200 M, joined at 800 M and still disputing the lead on straightening, tired inside final 200 M.
Always well-placed on fence no worse than 2Ls off the lead in 3rd or 4th until home turn, quickened up to lead at the 200 M, pulled clear, comfortably.
Towards rear at least 5Ls off the pace through to home turn, improved to be 3Ls down in midfield at 200 M, no extra.
Slow to start, 3-back on fence about 3Ls off pace in midfield until homestretch, kept on at same pace.
6Ls off speed when 3-wide with cover in 8th at 1000 M, nice progress to be 3Ls down in 5th off home turn, couldn't quicken up and rather one-paced final 200 M.
Bounded in air on jumping losing some ground, one from rear about 10Ls behind at 1000 M, 9Ls last entering straight, never competitive and eased close home.
Over-raced when 2-wide and 1L down in 2nd at 1000 M, still 1L down in 2nd at final bend, swamped 200 M out.
Awkwardly away at start losing about 3Ls on leaders, recovered to be about 4Ls down in 6th on fence from 1000 M to home turn, not got any closer.
Always 3-wide no cover, 4Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, pressed on to be 2Ls down in 3rd at top of home straight, couldn't sustain effort and gone before 200 M.
2-wide worse than midfield about 6Ls off pace at 800 M, 5Ls behind in 10th or so at final bend, stayed on nicely for a place but never likely to catch the winner.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off pace in 3rd on fence at 1000 M, under pressure to keep this prominent spot on straightening, soon well beaten. (Bled.)
Led by 1L on fence at 1100 M, same margin clear entering home straight, grabbed by winner inside final 50 M but still stayed on well for 2nd.
Towards rear 3-wide and about 9Ls off pace in 10th at 1000 M, checked at 800 M, headway to be 5Ls down in midfield entering home straight, quickened up very well to lead inside final 50 M.
Slowly away, in 12th place about 8Ls behind at 1000 M, 6Ls down in 13th entering straight, 4Ls behind and still nearer rear at 200 M, one-paced.
5Ls down in 7th when 2-wide at 1000 M, crowded entering homestretch when 4Ls down in midfield, outpaced by front quartet.
Never better than midfield at any stage, slowly away, in 8th on fence 5Ls off pace at 800 M, slightly worse off taking final turn, no acceleration.
2-wide and 3Ls behind lead in 4th at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 4th on straightening, every chance when under 1L down in 2nd at 300 M, failed to find extra gear, lost out on a place close home.
Head up at start and switched from wide gate to 12Ls last on fence at 1200 M, improved to be 6Ls down in 12th turning for home, 3Ls down in midfield at 200 M, no extra late on.
Forward of midfield about 3 to 4Ls behind the pace. Kept on in straight until no extra 150 M out.
Midfield about 4Ls off the lead. Unable to quicken in straight and tired in the closing stages.
At rear. Never a threat.
Behind midfield. Widest turning in. Not a threat in straight.
Dropped to the rear from wide draw about 10Ls off the pace. Behind midfield turning in by saving ground along rail. Shifted out for running near 200 M and made up some late ground. (Inquiry.)
Travelled prominently in 2nd or 3rd place. Proved difficult to settle near 1000 M. Ran on strongly final 200 M to win going away 50 M out.
Led until outsprinted by the winner 50 M out.
Prominent 2nd or 3rd. Kept on in straight and lost out on a minor placing in the closing stages.
Midfield or better. Kept on in straight until no extra final 100 M.
Towards rear some 7Ls off the lead. One-paced in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away but soon in a forward position but proved difficult to settle. Unbalanced on heels after 1100 M. Midfield rounding home bend. Faded 200 M out.
Around midfield about 4Ls back and on rail. Ran on well to snatch 3rd close home without troubling the first pair.
Forward of midfield early but trapped wide and without cover. Improved from 1100 M to 3rd turning in. Weakened badly final 200 M.
Always at rear. Never seen with a chance.
Mainly in rear of midfield to straight. Weakened.
Never far off, racing keenly far side. Went wide into straight. Only produced moderate headway without threatening. Lost 3rd placing late.
Well back. Went past wide runners into midfield turning in. One-paced in the run home.
Raced wide in midfield. Gave ground gradually coming out of back straight.
Raced wide in forward of midfield. Faded into straight.
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Always close up. Quickened well to challenge upon straightening but found winner too good.
Soon took up running and made all. Won easily.
Chased leader to straight. Weakened.
Settled towards rear. Gained midfield turning in on rails. Sustained progress down straight to reach 3rd late.
Around midfield most of way. Weakened out of contention early in straight.
Never in the hunt.
Raced wide in last few. Made short-lived effort rounding home bend. No extra in straight.
Began well, took up prominent position early, raced behind leader 3 to 4Ls away on rails (had easy run), followed paint into straight, made up some ground over concluding stages.

Broke well, restrained to obtain trail but was posted 3 wide without cover 3 to 4Ls away, travelled fairly well throughout, challenged strongly in straight, hit lead passing 200 M and drew clear for strong win.
Jumped with line, taken back from awkward alley, raced 2nd last 2 wide 10Ls away, came widest on turn with field to beat, showed nothing over last 300 M when asked for effort.
Away fairly from gates, trapped 3 wide with cover worse than midfield 8Ls away, had even run to turn, failed to respond in straight and raced very one paced.
Broke with them, drifted back from awkward draw to race in last spot on rails 10Ls away, travelled well to turn, tried hard in straight making up a little late ground from well back.
Jumped with field, ridden up in early stages to cross to lead, raced on bit throughout at even tempo, held 1/2L advantage on straightening, weakened out of it when tackled to be well beaten.

Best into stride, led early before handing up to race behind leader, raced comfortably at leaders girth from midway point, took charge at 300 M but couldn't hold off finish of first two over concluding stages.
Average to begin, not pushed early, allowed to settle midfield 2 wide 6Ls off pace, in traffic entering straight made run between runners and made steady ground last 300 M.
Broke well from widest draw, drifted back to midfield when unable to cross, raced 3 wide with cover midfield 6Ls away, eased wider in straight and tried hard but lacked dash to pick them up.
Away well, worked across to take up forward spot 2 wide 3Ls off lead, raced in 3rd position just behind first two to turn, had relatively easy run but struggled in straight when difficult to ride.
Slowly away after bumping, raced well back on rails 8Ls away, spent nothing in run, under pressure entering straight and lacked any turn of foot and was well beaten.
