Average to begin, settled 4th last 2 wide 7 to 8Ls away, had even run in mid section, pushed along entering straight, made up a little ground over final 200 M but gave too great a start.
Jumped with field, took up spot midfield on rails 6Ls from frontrunners, spent nothing in run, followed paint into straight, angled wider but failed to respond and only held ground to line.
Jumped fairly, ridden up to hold prominent spot, travelled in 6th position 2 wide 4Ls away, between horses entering straight, angled clear at 250 M and chased hard but unable to reduce margin.
Settled behind midfield. Did not find room for a run in straight.
Settled in midfield on fence. Not much room early in straight. Made steady headway between runners inside final 200 M to narrowly miss a placing.
Settled in forward of midfield. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening. Gained upper hand close to home.
Prominent 3-wide most of way until coming one-paced under pressure inside final 200 M.
Never seen with a chance.
Settled in rear of midfield one off the fence. Switched out for a run upon straightening. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Settled in last few. Found no room behind horses early in straight. Produced good late impression once into the clear inside final 150 M.
Towards rear and 3-wide most of way. Never nearer.
Well there. Disputed lead under pressure early in straight. Hit front momentarily inside 200 M but quickly overhauled.
Always well behind. Never nearer.
Always well there. Not much room on rails in straight. Produced late impression inside final 100 M.
Attempted to make all. Joined by runners early in straight and swamped passing 200 M.
Settled 3-wide in midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Bounced out with them, raced in rearward position 2 wide 9 to 10Ls away, spent nothing in run, made 3 wide run between horses entering straight, made up some late ground from impossible position.

Steady to begin, raced 3 back on fence 5Ls off speed, had great run in mid section, used nothing to turn, angled wider entering straight and slightly held up, got clear at 250 M and dashed well to nearly pinch it.

Broke with first few, taken hold of to obtain cover (over racing) drifted back and raced 4 wide with no trail, always working throughout, came 6 wide on turn, workload took its toll and was well beaten.
Jumped with rest, restrained to rear to obtain cover from wide alley, raced 3 wide at rear 9 to 10Ls away, made ground from 600 M, came 5 wide on turn but only plugged away in straight. (Mucopus.)
Fastest into stride, driven along to take up running, rolled along at fair clip, pressured throughout, held length lead in stretch and kept going well despite being unable to match placegetters.
Broke well, used up to sit outside leader, raced behind first two 2 wide throughout, travelled fairly to 400 M, unable to respond when required and weakened thereafter.
Began only fairly ridden along to hold position midfield 2 wide 5Ls off lead, 6th to turn, made 4 wide run entering straight and sprinted hard to take lead and really dug deep to score.
Jumped well, took up more forward position than usual, raced 5th throughout 3 to 4Ls away 2 wide with cover, came 3 to 4 wide entering straight, raced very one paced in stretch under hard riding.
Average to begin, driven through to hold spot worse than midfield 2 wide 7 to 8Ls away, had fair run, angled into clear at 300 M and ran on well without threatening winner.
Average to begin, restrained from wide alley, held two wide spot just worse than midfield 7Ls away, under pressure and unable to go with them entering straight. Dropped right out.

Broke with them, immediately restrained the tail 11 to 12Ls from leaders, had quiet run throughout, had field in front on home turn, made run between runners in straight making up good late ground, gave too great a start.
Slow into stride, allowed to relax 5 back on fence 9Ls off speed, used nothing in run, travelled well to turn, followed rails in straight making up some ground without 100% clear running.
Broke with them, held midfield position on rails 7Ls from speed, did little in run, placed under pressure entering straight, raced very one-paced over final 200 M.

Jumped well, took up prominent position behind leader 2Ls away, had easy run throughout, angled 3 wide approaching turn, came with strong run to hit lead momentarily at 250 M but couldn't sprint with first two.
Soon at rear. Never seen with a chance.
In touch in 4th or 5th place behind the pace. Kept on in straight until one-paced inside 200 M.
Soon midfield or better and on rail. About 3Ls back along back straight. Ran on steadily but looked 2nd all the way.
Checked at start. At back. Ran past beaten runners final 200 M.
Prominent 2nd. Took lead 800 M out. Kept on strongly to win unchallenged.
Took lead at 1000 M and raced ungenerously after failing to find cover. Headed 800 M. Weakened badly inside 200 M. (Blood in trachea and see Racing Incidents.)
Jumped best but soon dropped back steadily to 5th or 6th at 700 M. Trapped wide without cover throughout. 5Ls back at 600 M. Unable to quicken in straight and nothing left 100 M out.
Soon midfield and niggled along. Made the turn at 600 M awkwardly and checked off heels. Ran on in straight to grab a minor placing close home.
Soon midfield despite being unbalanced and lost ground near 1100 M. Raced ungenerously for the remainder of the race and finished one-paced.
Towards rear. Never a threat.
Slowly away. Behind midfield or worse after being trapped wide rounding the 1st turn. 7Ls back at 800 M. Behind midfield turning in. Not a factor in straight.
In touch. 3rd from 800 M. Kept on without threatening in straight and lost out on a minor placing close home.
Began awkwardly. Tailed until straightening. Kept on nicely on the inside. Ran well between runners. Made up nice ground to be closest at finish.

Jumped well. Midfield going into back straight in a 2-wide spot. 3 wide 4Ls from pacesetter right before straightening. Responded nicely after shifting wider final 300 M but found the winner too good.
Jumped well. Worked hard early on to stay with pace. Stayed 2 wide 2Ls behind leader at 800 M. 4th entering straight. Kept on evenly and failed to quicken. Faded.

Fair jump from wide barrier. Tracked leader in a 2 wide position. Pressured to keep pace at 600 M. Weakened badly on the bend. Yielded ground to be very far from other runners. (See Racing Incidents.)

Clean jump from an inside draw. Settled on rail within 3Ls from leader. 3rd after straightening. Fought on steadily with no extra final 200 M. Raced tight closing stages. Not ridden out as normally would.
Always rear. 2nd last in a 2-wide spot on back straight. Inconvenienced and checked before straightening. Ran home one-paced. Never seen with a chance.
Midfield or better most of the race. Settled well on fence. Responded well and shifted out for running upon straightening. Finished off strongly whilst hanging in final 200 M.
Began awkwardly. Ridden to keep pace making the first turn. Throughout the race travelled wide with no cover. Shifted wider after straightening. Very weak in straight.
Broke well. Set steady pace on fence. Led by 1L at 800 M. Held the lead until 200 M. Tried hard but no extra finding. Weakened and not a factor thereafter.
Missed start. Kept 2-wide behind midfield with cover. 4th last to turn home. Stayed on well but no response closing stages. One-paced till finish.
Jumped well. Kept rearward on fence. Still about 7Ls behind leader at 400 M. Closed the race off strongly early part of straight. Ran into traffic final stages and had to be steadied before the post.

Best out. Pushed hard to take the rail before the first turn. Raced prominently 2Ls off pace. 2nd to enter straight. Chased down leader near 150 M. Outpaced by first pair final stages and worked hard to hold onto 3rd.
Bad jump and resulted in racing 2-wide in rearward position. Lacked a response under the whip in the straight.
Crowded on jumping but was hard ridden to maintain position. Settled 3-wide in rear section. Took some time to quicken on straightening and made up some late ground.
Outpaced at the start and raced 2-wide at the tail end of the field until home straight. Swung wide on straightening and only ran past a beaten runner.
Jumped fairly and was pushed along to be racing 2-wide in front of midfield. 3Ls off the pace making the turn and 3-wide turning for home. Kept on only fairly in the home straight.
Niggled along out of the gates and race 2-wide at midfield. Kept on same pace in the home straight.
Jumped well and soon led the field. Maintained a length's advantage into the straight but unable to find more. Swamped inside final 200 M.
Settled towards the rear until home straight. Had to switch out to look for a run at 200 M. Produced a late rally to claim a minor placing.
Got squeezed back on jumping. Settled on fence near midfield. Switched out before straightening to make a run. Quickened and made up ground when asked but unable to draw closer in the final stages.
Niggled out of the gates and raced 3-wide at midfield. Pressured making home turn and only managed to stay on same pace. No improvement in the straight and weakened closing stages.

Checked to rear after start. Settled on fence in rear section early. Improved to be behind midfield backstraight. Saved ground making the turn. Gradually made up ground on winner over last 200 M but posed no serious threat.
Raced on fence in a prominent position behind the leader. Quickened on straightening and took over the lead 250 M. Kept on well under a drive and was never seriously threatened final stages.
Pushed along from widest draw and raced outside the leader. Remained 2-wide and kept within a length of the pace until home straight. Failed to respond when asked on straightening and weakened 200 M.
5Ls back in 5th when 2-wide at 1100 M, under pressure to get to within 3Ls of the leader in 4th taking final turn, swamped at the 200 M.
Always 3-wide no cover in rear pack from 6Ls to 10Ls off pace until home straight, never threatened.
In midfield from 5Ls to 7Ls off pace from 1200 M to home straight, briefly loomed a threat when 3Ls down at 200 M, found no extra.
Slowly away, niggled along early when 10Ls off pace in rear, not much closer off final bend, kept on only fairly but still not far off at the close.
Always towards rear, 8Ls back in 8th place at 1100 M, about 7Ls down entering home straight, always outpaced.
4Ls back on fence in 3rd at 1100 M, 3Ls down in 3rd at home turn, bumped at 200 M and checked badly at 150 M when 2Ls down in 3rd, wasn't going to win anyway.
Driven along 4-wide no cover early to lead by 2Ls on fence from 1000 M to home turn when hard ridden, all out at 200 M, headed about 50 M out, just hung for a place.
9Ls back in 9th at 1200 M, about 6Ls down in same position on straightening, kept on fairly well down the outside, never nearer.
Disputed early lead, settled 2Ls off pace in 2nd from 1000 M to home turn, 1L down and all out at 200 M, hindered at 150 M when tiring, weakened close home.
On fence between 4Ls and 6Ls back in 4th from 1200 M to home straight, stuck to fence and bumped 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, squeezed through on fence at 150 M to lead 50 M out, well ridden.
Held inside in 7th about 6Ls or 7Ls behind lead from 1200 M to home turn, 3Ls down in 6th at 200 M, ran on strongly late post came too soon.
Towards rear about 10Ls off pace at 1100 M, 7Ls down at final bend, steadied at 200 M and 100 M but still ran on well, nearest at the finish.
Always travelled well about 2Ls off the speed in 2nd or 3rd from 1000 M to home straight, eased to the front at 250 M out, driven clear, commandingly.
4Ls down in 7th when 2-wide at 1100 M, 3-wide on final bend when 3Ls down in 5th and 2Ls back at the 200 M, one-paced thereafter.
Awkward break, 4Ls down in 6th on fence at 1100 M, bumped twice at top of home when switching out 4Ls off pace in midfield, kept on fairly well without threatening quinella pair.
Led by 1 to 2Ls from 1000 M to home straight, headed at 250 M out, weakened quickly.
3Ls down in 4th on fence at 1100 M, a little closer when turning for home, 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, never going to catch winner but still stayed on well for 2nd.
10Ls down in 10th at 1200 M, 7Ls back in 10th at home straight entrance, 3Ls back in mid-div at 200 M, tight for room inside final 50 M but never really dangerous anyway.
Bounded at start, on fence 6Ls back in 8th at 1100 M, 4Ls down in midfield on fence off final bend, 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, one-paced thereafter.
8Ls off pace in 9th when 2-wide at 1100 M, 4-wide (widest of all) when 4Ls back in 9th taking home turn and bumped at 300 M twice, stayed on well out wide, never nearer.
10Ls off speed in 11th at 1200 M, 3-wide no cover from 800 M, 7Ls behind taking home turn, made some modest late ground, nearest at the close.
3Ls down in 5th when 2-wide at 1100 M, 4Ls back at 800 M in 5th, lost position on the circle and very weak in home straight. (Heart Irregularity.)
3-wide no cover when 2Ls down in 3rd at 1100 M, got in 2-wide 1000 M, under pressure at 500 M to stay 2Ls down in 3rd, weakened rapidly from top of stretch and eased final 200 M.
12Ls last at 1100 M, 8Ls last off home turn, never a factor.
In touch just 1L or so off the pace but remained wide and without cover throughout. Dropped back to midfield from 700 M. Never a threat in straight.
Soon dropped to the rear from wide draw. Last turning in. Made up a little late ground.
Well there. Took lead from 850 M. Kept on well in straight and just did enough to hold off the 2nd horse by the narrowest margin.
Disputed lead briefly at 1000 M before sitting 1 out 1 back off the lead. Soon weakened upon straightening. (Collapsed after race.)
Mainly towards rear. At least 4Ls back at 800 M. Midfield turning in. Kept on in straight without threatening principals.
Forward of midfield just 2Ls behind the speed. 2nd or 3rd turning in. Kept on well in straight and lost out on a minor placing after racing tightly with the 3rd horse final 50 M.
Jumped well and commenced to over-race. Midfield or worse after being carried wide at 1000 M. Wide turning in. Not a factor in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Blundered at start. Towards rear from 1000 M and trapped wide and without cover throughout. Headway rounding home turn but widest turning in. One-paced in straight.
Dropped to the rear from wide draw. Midfield turning in by saving ground along rail. One-paced in straight.
At rear. Never a factor.
Led to 850 M. Maintained 2nd pace but trapped wide with no cover throughout. Kept on well in straight and grabbed 3rd after racing tightly with the 4th horse final 50 M.
Midfield about 3-4Ls off the pace. Ran on strongly final 250 M and just failed to get up by the narrowest margin.
Settled in midfield on rails. Steadied for a stride and shifted out for a run over 200 M out. Only produced moderate headway in the run home.
Never better than midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Raced mainly 3-wide in midfield. Kept on same pace under pressure.
Always in last few. Made no impression in straight.
Slightly sluggish at start. Held up towards rear. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Always well back. Never seen with a chance.
Midfield throughout. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Well back to straight. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Chased leaders on rails. Fought on steadily down straight to just fail to get up on line.
Tracked leader. Hit front under pressure upon straightening. Just held on to the line.
Attempted to make all. Dropped out shortly after straightening.
Never far off. Came to challenge upon straightening holding every chance closing stages only to be denied narrowly.
Best away, taken straight to rail, raced 3 back on fence 2-3Ls behind the speed, enjoyed run of race throughout, on bridle entering straight, battled away steadily without threatening winner.

Taken in behind at start, raced in last spot 14Ls away, travelled well throughout, made run between horses on turn, had little luck entering straight and no room over concluding stages. Not fully tested. (See Racing Incidents)
Jumped well, showed good early speed to rail in lead after 400 M, rolled along at a good clip throughout, pressured from 400 M, lead into straight but showed little fight last 200 M.
Broke with them, drifted back to 2nd last 13Ls from front runners, ridden along at tail to make ground, had field to beat on home turn and make up some late ground widest in straight.

Jumped fairly, showed good speed to cross and race 1L off lead first without cover 2 wide, pressured throughout by horse on outside, niggled along on turn, raced very flat in stretch and dropped right out. (Mucopus.)
Began reasonably well, raced in midfield on fence 4Ls from lead, used nothing in run, under pressure on turn, only battled away when hard ridden in straight.

Jumped with them, allowed to settle in rearward division, 4th from tail 10Ls away throughout, ridden along from 800 M to make ground, sustained wide run on turn and made good ground down outside in straight.

Fair to begin, not pushed early and allowed to settle 12Ls off pace on rails, travelled well throughout and tracked nicely 2 wide to turn, made run up rails in straight, came with strong sprint getting split at 150 M to overhaul them.

Broke well, driven forward to take up running, raced behind leader after 300 M, enjoyed good trip through middle stages, followed paint in straight, hit lead at 150 M and fought hard, unable to hold off winner.
Jumped with them, held midfield spot 2 wide 4Ls off lead, had great run to turn spending nothing, made 4 wide run entering straight but raced very one-paced final furlong.

Broke with field, ridden along to obtain forward position, trapped 3 wide without cover outside leaders, always working in run, hard ridden on turn, couldn't sustain effort and dropped out final 100 M.
Average to begin, pushed along to hold spot early, checked badly on first turn, raced midfield on rails 8Ls away, hard ridden on turn, only plugged away in straight.
Always in touch around 2Ls behind the pace and on rail. Tracked leader upon straightening before shifting out for run at 200 M and held on well after hitting front inside 100 M.
Never featured after losing significant ground at the start.
Behind midfield or a little worse. Under pressure rounding home turn. Ran on without threatening in straight until finding no extra close home.
Stook flat-footed and lost considerable ground at start. At rear. Headway 700 M to be in midfield but 5-wide turning in. Ran on steadily whilst hanging in to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Steadied off heels at 1200 M and proved difficult to settle at 800 M. One-paced in straight.
Took up running and gave up advantage briefly after 1600 M. Kept on well in straight but could not match speed with the first pair final 100 M.
Midfield or better about 4Ls behind the pace. Proved difficult to settle and awkward on heels at 1200 M. Ran on steadily without threatening in straight.
In touch about 2Ls behind the pace. Failed to respond in straight and soon dropped out of contention. (Bled.)
Dropped to the rear from wide draw. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Midfield or worse about 4 to 5Ls back. Steady headway rounding home bend to be 2Ls back but 4-wide turning in. Ran on steadily and got outsprinted by the winner inside 100 M.
Towards rear. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Went forward from wide draw and led briefly at 1600 M before steadying to sit outside the leader. Weakened badly inside 200 M.
About 3Ls behind the pace whilst being trapped wide and without cover throughout. Gave ground 300 M out.
Midfield and had to be niggled along. Never a threat in straight.
Jumped best. Steadied to be in a 2 wide prominent position end of back straight. Yielded ground despite being ridden on the bend. Did not improve position and same pace till the line.
Fair jump. Midfield in a 2 wide position making the turn. Switched wide for better running after straightening. Looked likely early straight. Lacked the extra kick closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly and blundered. 2nd last at 800 M. Behind midfield after straightening and hit traffic. Did not have clear running in straight. Not fully tested.
Kept behind midfield on fence. 5Ls behind pacesetter on straightening. No clear running room early straight. Weakened final 200 M.
Clear jump and ridden early to keep midfield. Was 4 to 5 wide no cover at 800 M to be about 4Ls off pace. Shifted ground on the bend. Last few to enter straight. Found no extra.

Around midfield on the fence. Saved ground along rail rounding the turn. 4Ls behind pacesetter at 400 M. Responded strongly final stages on the inside. Made up late ground to capture the win at the line.
Jumped well from the widest gate to set pace on rail. Attempted to make all. Still led by over 3Ls at 200 M. Found no extra inside 50 M to hold on for the win. Got caught at the line.
Broke with them. 3Ls off pace on rail. 2nd to enter straight in a handy position. No response to riding and weakened badly after 350 M. (See Racing Incidents.)

Kept in a rearward spot on back straight. 1 off with cover and improved on the bend. Shifted wide straightening. Fought on hard with rider trying to straighten. Outpaced by first pair but held on for close 3rd.
Fair jump. Midfield or better in a 3 wide position. Improved to be 2 wide and 3rd on straightening. Ran on moderately at similar pace. Lost 3rd late at the line.
Fair jump. Midfield or better. 4 wide rounding home. Very weak in straight. Never a factor.
Jumped well. 2Ls off pace in a 3-wide spot without cover. Hung out making the turn at 800 M. Ran on evenly. Faded gradually inside 200 M.
Last one out. Tailed and at least 7Ls behind leader. Last to enter straight. Ran on moderately under pressure. Ran passed beaten runners whilst making up ground. Never in contention.
Slow to begin. Ridden to make up ground. Kept 3 wide rearward after 800 M. Checked on straightening. Responded strongly whilst hanging. Made up good ground inside 250 M. Closest at finish.
Raced along the fence and no better than midfield. Switched out and ran on well in the straight to make the frame.
Eased to the rear. Remained in rear section in back straight and was last to enter home straight. Ran on well and steadily made up ground.
Jumped well and took the early lead. Overtaken in the back straight but kept pace behind the leader until straightening. Weakened final 200 M.

Raced 2-wide and no worse than midfield. 4Ls off the lead at 1200 M and steadily improved to be 2Ls down on straightening. Kept on fairly in the early part of the straight but was one-paced final 200 M.
Outpaced and raced 2-wide in rear section. 3-wide making home turn and produced a nice rally in the straight to claim a minor placing.

Shifted to the rails and raced behind midfield. Rear section making home turn and was held up after straightening. Switched out into the clear at 300 M and hit lead 100 M. Kept on strongly to hold off rival.

Jumped well and raced among leaders early stages. 2-wide and stayed within a length of the pace from 1200 M until home straight, hit the front briefly 300 M but found no more to stay in hunt final stages.
3-wide in a forward position into first turn. Led field into back straight. Kept a slight advantage going into home straight but was swamped near 200 M.

Ridden out of the gates and was 4-wide among leaders into first turn. 3-wide and no more than 3Ls off the pace back straight. Unable to quicken when pressured on straightening and faded closing stages.

Kept within 3Ls of the pace early stages. Settled on fence at midfield back straight. Steadily picked up on straightening but ran into some traffic at 300 M. Made up some late ground when clear and was closest at finish.

Settled 2-wide behind midfield early stages. Improved to be closer to midfield in the back straight. Switched out on straightening and quickened to the lead at 200 M. Headed final 100 M and unable to fight back.
Slowly away and settled at the rear. Remained in rear section into home straight. Only ran past a pair of tiring runners.

Raced wide among leaders into first turn before dropping to midfield for cover. Remained near midfield and raced 3-wide back straight. Chased along early home straight but found no extra final stages.
Compromised by a bias against the far side, always at least back in midfield or worse until the final 200 M, never on terms.
Head up at start losing some ground, towards rear about 8Ls off the pace at 800 M, made some minor late ground through final 200 M.
Between 3Ls and 4Ls behind pace in 4th through to the final 300 M, all out to be 2Ls down at 200 M, no extra.
Led by about 2Ls at the 800 M, headed at the 200 M, one-paced through final stages.
Slowest and awkwardly away, 8Ls last at the 700 M, headway to be 4Ls back in midfield at 200 M, kept on well to take 2nd final strides.
Always within about 2Ls of the speed in 2nd or 3rd until the 400 M, every chance when a neck 2nd at 200 M, hung in under pressure and lost 2nd close home.
No worse than midfield about 3Ls behind lead until the final 200 M, weakened thereafter.
Bumped at start and at 750 M when over 4Ls back in mid-division, never threatened to get much closer.
Bumped at start and at 750 M when over 4Ls back in mid-division, a little further back and struggling at the 400 M, dropped out.
Travelled well within about 2Ls of the lead in 4th until taking up the running at the 200 M, quickened away smartly, comfortable win.
Crowded at start and slowly away, soon towards rear on far side (slower part), well beaten when detached in rear over 200 M out.
About 2Ls down in 2nd at 800 M, 1L down in 3rd at the 400 M, all out when 1L down in 4th at 200 M, faded.
Took up running on the far side but no better than 5th overall about 3Ls off the lead until the 200 M, kept on only evenly close home.
Mostly midfield about 3Ls off the pace through the 600 M, 4-wide when over 2Ls down at final bend and headway to 1L back at the 200 M but couldn't sustain the run.
Towards rear at least 3Ls or 4Ls off the speed through to home straight, always outpaced.
Worse than midfield about 4Ls off the pace until the home straight, gone well over 200 M out, eased down late.
3-wide with cover when 2Ls back in 4th at 1200 M, left 3-wide no cover from 800 M and a neck down in 3rd taking home turn, still stuck on pretty well despite the wide trip.
Held up in rear about 6Ls or 7Ls off speed until the 600 M, 3-wide on straightening when 4Ls back in 12th, ran on very strongly down the outside to take 2nd on line.
On fence 4Ls back in 8th at 1200 M when 3-wide, closer just 2Ls down at 800 M and improved to be 4-wide and 1L down taking home turn, flattened out inside final 200 M.
Stumbled slightly on jumping, a neck down in 2nd at 1200 M, settled over 2Ls down in 5th at the 800 M and same margin back in midfield at final bend, outpaced by principals.
Disputed lead on fence from 1200 M to top of home straight, battled gamely but still gave way by a neck at 200 M, kept on one-paced.
Left 4-wide no cover at the 800 M when 3Ls down in midfield, couldn't get in and pitched out 5-wide (widest of all) taking home turn, weakened inside final 200 M.
Disputed lead out 3-wide no cover early on, got in 2-wide disputing advantage from 1000 M to home turn, dug in gamely to poke head in front at 200 M, just hung on.
Steadied at start, on the fence about 3Ls back in midfield until home turn, plugged on at the same speed on the rails.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off the pace in 4th or so until the home straight, laboured to quicken up and still 1L down in 4th at 200 M, could only keep on at same pace.
8Ls last at 1200 M, trying to make some ground when checked on straightening and left 7Ls last, never recovered.
3Ls down in 6th when 2-wide at 1200 M, about 2Ls back in 5th when 3-wide on straightening, 1L down in 4th at the 200 M, no extra.
Led or disputed lead to 250 M. Weakened steadily thereafter.
Dropped towards rear from wide draw and niggled along. Still 5 to 6Ls back turning in. Ran on steadily final 250 M to be nearest at finish despite hitting traffic near the post.
Well there but trapped wide and without cover throughout. Weakened badly 300 M out.
Prominent 3rd or 4th just behind the pace. Unable to quicken in straight and nothing left inside 200 M.
At rear. Never in contention.
Towards rear about 8Ls back. Behind midfield turning in by saving ground along rail. Made up some ground final 200 M for a minor placing.
Slowly away but soon moved up to 6th place about 4Ls off the lead. 2Ls back rounding home bend. Held up briefly after 400 M before running on gamely to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear about 8Ls back. Only ran past beaten runners in straight.
Midfield or behind. Widest turning in. Ran on steadily in straight until one-paced close home.
In touch 1 to 2Ls off the lead. Ran on determinedly upon straightening. Took lead at 250 M and held off strong challenge from 2nd horse.
At back. Never seen with a chance.
Forward of midfield. Ran on steadily in straight and just lost out on a minor placing.
Led or disputed lead to early straight. Weakened rapidly final 200 M.
Slowly away. Moved up to midfield from 1200 M. Ran on in straight and held 3rd 100 M out before finishing one-paced close home.
Never far off on grandstand side. Closed on leader strongly inside final 200 M but just failed to peg him back.
Well there early. Dropped out passing 300 M.
Gradually shifted to outside rails early and remained well there to 300 M. Weakened.
Showed early speed, leading inside pack and disputing lead of the field early. Gradually lost touch from grandstand side pack approaching course proper. Ran home one-paced. (Mucus.)
Settled behind midfield on grandstand side. Made modest progress under pressure inside final 300 M without threatening.
Chased leaders of inside pack early. Found nothing under pressure inside final 200 M.
Settled at the back. Shifted out for a run on grandstand side passing 400 M but only one-paced under pressure.
Broke well and quickly shifted to race on grandstand rails. Kicked 1L clear under pressure inside 200 M. Just held off runner-up's strong late challenge.
Racing with the inside group never far off the lead. Came to challenge down centre of track passing 300 M but could not match pace of grandstand side runners.
Settled in rear on grandstand rails. Ran on well under pressure inside final 300 M to be nearest at finish. (Lame.)
Never seen with a chance.

Slow to begin, beaten for early speed and allowed to relax at tail of field many lengths away, easy run mid section, trailed field into straight and made up some late ground without threatening winner. Set too great a task.

Bounced out well from wide alley, not enough speed to cross, posted 3 deep without cover 3 to 4Ls off them, moved forward to be 1/2L from lead on straightening and hit lead at 300 M. Fought strongly but workload took toll.
Average to begin, driven up to hold midfield spot 2 wide 6Ls from front runners, struggling from 600 M, hard ridden entering straight, stuck to rails and made little impression in stretch.

Best into stride, crossed to lead from wide alley to take up running, rolled along in front at fair clip, travelled on bit to turn, fought on strongly when headed at 300 M and just lacked extra gear to figure.
Standard to jump, ridden up to hold midfield position 4 to 5Ls behind speed, travelled well in mid section angled 3 wide on straightening, lacked turn of foot to match it with this class.

Average to begin, beaten for early speed, drifted back to 5th from rear on rails 7 to 8Ls away, had soft trip throughout middle stages, angled wider entering straight and made steady ground down middle of track.

Away with field, restrained from awkward alley to take up rearward spot 2 wide 8 to 9Ls away, travelled well and tracked nicely into race, 4 wide with cover eased out at 250 M and showed great turn of foot to overhaul them.

Average to jump from inside draw, settled midfield on rails 5Ls away from speed, had run of race in middle stages, tracked nicely to turn, angled wider but held up badly in straight. Unable to make impression when clear.

Average to begin, ridden along to take closer charge, settled midfield 6Ls away with cover, had reasonable run mid race covering ground, in traffic entering straight and battled strongly just lacking dash to beat first two.

Fast into stride, rolled on from outside draw to hold spot outside leader (fair speed), eased in for trail at 600 M, followed paint into stretch, received dream opening in straight but couldn't capitalise.

Slow to begin, niggled along early, settled 7 to 8Ls away 2 wide worse than midfield, travelled strongly throughout, made 4 wide run into race on turn, challenged strongly at 250 M and showed good fight holding off all but winner.

Broke with them, taken back to 2nd last from wide gate to race 12Ls off lead, lobbed along at tail throughout, came 5 wide on turn and angled to outside rail in straight, showed good dash but couldn't make up ground.

Broke well, took up position on rails behind leader, travelled well 1L away throughout, angled 2 wide from 600 M, under pressure entering straight, showed no turn of foot and only battled to line. (Mucopus.)

Jumped well, showed good early speed to match it with leading division, raced 1 out 1 back in mid section before sitting outside leader approaching turn, moved up to challenge in straight but couldn't go with them last 200 M.
Settled at the back. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Slowly away. Settled at the back. Made up good ground inside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Never far off. Ran on under pressure down straight to assert authority inside 200 M.
In similar position in midfield throughout. (Mucus.)
Attempted to make all. Swamped inside final 200 M.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Close up. Weakened under pressure after straightening.
Mainly in forward of midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Chased leader to straight. Dropped out into straight.
Settled towards rear on rails. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Raced wide towards rear. Ran on down centre of straight without threatening.

Away well, restrained to trail early speed, raced 2 wide in 5th position 4Ls away early, allowed to slide forward to be 3 wide without cover from 1000 M mark, moved up to hit lead on straightening but couldn't match first 3 over last 200 M.

Jumped with them, showed no early speed, raced in 2 wide spot 8Ls away 3rd from tail, had easy time throughout, checked on turn, pushed along entering straight, made run between runners making steady ground.
Broke well, pushed forward to hold spot outside leader from widest draw, raced at leaders girth throughout, loomed up entering straight but had nothing to offer and lost ground from that point.
Slow to begin, ridden up to hold spot behind leader had soft run through middle stages, not fully settling, on bit to turn, followed rails in straight but lacked dash to figure.
Slow to begin, drifted back to race at tail 9 to 10Ls from speed, had easy run to turn, made 4 to 5 wide run on turn, lacked speed to figure in finish and passed tired horses late. (Mucopus.)

Away with them, trapped wide early and taken back to obtain cover, trapped 4 wide without cover for duration of trip 2 to 3Ls off lead on straightening, wide run took its toll and dropped out last 200 M.

Average to begin, pushed along early, raced 3 wide with cover midfield 6 to 7Ls from front runners moved forward to be 1L away on straightening, made run with eventual winner and fought strongly to go down narrowly.
Broke well, pushed along to cross to rails, dictated terms in front at even tempo, on bit to turn, tackled on straightening and found little extra and only plugged home from that point.
Jumped with them, held midfield position 2 wide 6Ls from leaders, enjoyed fair run until turn without fully settling, pushed along on straightening, unable to respond and simply plugged home.

Jumped with them, restrained from awkward alley to take up spot 2nd last 9Ls off lead, travelled 3 wide with cover in middle stages, tracked into race nicely 4 wide and came with strong run to overhaul them and score well.

Fairly away, allowed to settle in early stages, travelled worse than midfield on rails 7Ls off speed, tracked nicely to turn, made run between horses in straight, closed race off fairly without a lot of room.

Slow to begin, taken hold from wide draw to obtain cover, raced 3 and 4 wide with cover for best part of race, pushed along on turn, stuck to task well in straight making solid ground despite wide run.
Fair to jump, held position 3 back on rails 4 to 5Ls away, spent nothing in run, hung out throughout, stuck to paint in straight but displayed no turn of foot in run home.
Fast into stride, crossed to 2 wide position from wide alley, raced 1 out 1 back in middle stages, in traffic entering straight, got clear at 250 M and doing best work late to be closest at finish.
Soon 2nd about 1 to 2Ls off the lead. Hit front briefly before headed by the winner. Kept on but lost out on a distant 2nd close home.
Soon behind midfield about 5Ls off the pace. Headway rounding home bend to be just off the pace in 4th turning in. Ran on steadily to grab a distant 2nd close home.
Midfield but trapped wide and without cover throughout. Dropped towards rear turning in. Never a factor.
Ridden forward to take 3rd place about 2 to 3Ls behind the lead. Shifted out rounding home bend and kicked home strongly to win easily despite hanging in.
Soon midfield. Unbalanced and checked after bumping the rail at 700 M. Found nothing in straight.
Slowly away. Niggled along at rear at least 7Ls back. Made up a little late ground to make the frame but a long way back from the placed horses.
Went forward from wide draw to take up running. Headed upon straightening. Weakened badly inside 200 M.
Soon towards rear despite being ridden along. Never a factor.
Midfield. Never a threat in straight.
Around midfield. Dropped towards rear rounding home turn. Never a threat.
Soon at rear. Never seen with a chance. (Bled.)
Slowly away. Towards rear. Under pressure rounding home bend. Never looked likely.
Slow to begin. Midfield making the turn. Made up ground on the bend about 3Ls from pacesetter on fence. Responded strongly when clear final 200 M. Got going late.
Slow start. Stayed midfield in a 3-wide spot before making the turn. 6th coming home. Stayed on well early straight. Carried wider inside 200 M and one-paced thereafter.
Clean jump from the outside gate. 2nd last to make the turn in a 4 wide spot. Switched wide on straightening. No response to riding on straight. Never a factor.
Broke well from the outside barrier. Raced wide without cover and taken back at 800 M. Last few to enter straight. Failed to keep pace and found nothing in straight. (Mucopus.)
Jumped well. 4 wide midfield with no cover making the turn. Started to yield at 600 M under pressure. Dropped out approaching straight. (Bled.)
Began awkwardly. Ridden to take lead on fence and set pace throughout. Held a 1L soft lead on straightening and clear by almost 2Ls inside 200 M. Kept on evenly and held off late charges.
Broke well. Tracked leader in a 2 wide position. 2nd after straightening. 1Ls off lead at 300 M. Fought on steadily with no extra findings.
Fair jump. Hard to settle early on. Raced handy 2 wide 2Ls off pace. Looked likely early straight. Lacked extra kick when asked. Same pace till finish.
Broke fairly. Settled at the tail of the field. Made up ground rounding home. Did little when pressured. Very weak in straight.
Jumped well. 2-wide 3Ls behind pacesetter at 800 M. Ran on strongly final 200 M. Made up some good ground to be closest at finish.
Jumped best. Pressured to race prominently 2Ls off pace on rail. 3rd to enter straight. Ran on moderately behind leader on the inside and produce some late impression final stages.
Lost ground after bumping at the start. Rear section at 800 M. Similar turning for home, did not get much closer. Never a hope.
Settled 2-wide at midfield and was switched out to find a run on straightening. Made a nice rally in the straight and took the lead final 50 M.
Dropped to the rear from a wide draw. 3-wide making home turn and trailed field into home straight. Only ran past a pair of beaten runners.
3-wide better than midfield. Improved around the bend and came within a length of the leader at 600 M. Weakened on straightening and finished tailed out. (Bled.)
Niggled along early but was outpaced. Settled behind midfield and no response when ridden making home turn. Tailed out in the straight.

Knuckled on jumping and taken back to race near the rear. 2-wide behind midfield making home turn and was switched out on straightening. Matched strides with winner in the straight but lost the duel inside final 50 M.

Jumped awkwardly and was checked shortly after start. Raced towards the rear until straightening. Quickened well but had to steady away from traffic at 250 M. Continued to make up ground over the final stages.

Jumped well but was allowed to drop back to midfield. Checked at 800 M but didn't lose much ground. Closed to within 3Ls of the leader making home turn. Kept on same pace in the straight and faded final stages.
Disputed lead before taking a sit behind the leader 900 M. Tracked leader into home straight. Unable to find extra to keep pace with top pair closing stages.
Niggled along to keep pace behind the leaders. Dropped a few lengths after steadying at 800 M. 3Ls off the pace making home turn and made no impression in the straight.
Hard ridden to be near the pace. 2-wide and within 2Ls of the leader at the bend. Lacked a quickening pace on straightening and faded closing stages.
Raced along the fence at midfield. Switched out on straightening to get a run and quickened well. Kept on fairly closing stages.
Ridden along to take the lead and crossed to the fence at 900 M. Took a length's advantage into the straight and maintained its lead at 200 M. Headed by placegetters final stages.
On fence and better than midfield. Steadied to midfield at 800 M and was 2-wide making the turn. Kept on fairly in the straight but unable to turn up a notch closing stages.
Settled in a rearward position and among last few to enter home straight. Made up ground in the straight.
Slowly away, in 3rd or 4th place about 4Ls off the speed until home straight, went 4Ls down in 2nd at the 200 M, lost out on 2nd place at 100 M.
Away well and led on fence by 2Ls at 1000 M, 4Ls clear and going well turning for home, pulled further ahead under hand riding at 200 M, very easily.
3-wide with cover when 8Ls off pace towards rear at 1000 M, further back taking home turn, very one-paced. (Bled.)
3-wide no cover at 800 M when 6Ls back in midfield, a little further back entering home straight, comprehensively outpaced.
10Ls last and struggling at 1000 M, no closer turning for home, plugged on past several well beaten rivals late.
Very slowly away losing 4Ls on field, recovered to be 7Ls behind leader and worse than midfield at 800 M, hard pressed and further behind taking home turn, no impression.
Bumped at start losing a little ground, worse than midfield no closer than 6Ls off the pace through to straightening, never landed a blow.
Mostly 3-wide no cover down back straight and at least 7Ls off pace worse than midfield, lost touch on the bend and well beaten before home turn, eased down late.
Dropped in midfield about 5Ls or so off pace through first half of race, made some headway turning for home and stayed on fairly for remote 2nd.
Away well, 2Ls down in 2nd on fence at 800 M, 4Ls down and toiling at final bend, found nothing off the bridle.
5Ls back in 5th at 800 M, lost position on circle and 7Ls down turning into stretch, quickly left behind.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 3rd at the 1000 M, lost ground on the circle and weakened markedly in home straight while hanging out.
Away well and soon led by 1L to 2Ls through to home straight, headed at 300 M, weakened.
Awkwardly away losing some ground, 10Ls last at 800 M, never on terms.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls back in 3rd at 1000 M, 3Ls back in 3rd and under pressure turning for home and 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, always held by principals.
Bounded at start, 3-wide with cover when 4Ls back in midfield at 800 M, no cover from 600 M to straightening for home when 6Ls behind lead, soon lost further ground. (Mucopus.)
3Ls off pace in 4th but under pressure at 1000 M, 5Ls back in midfield and struggling entering home straight.
Worse than midfield no better than 6Ls off the pace until home straight, still 3Ls down in 5th at 200 M, stayed on well to lead on line.
Awkwardly away, 3-back on fence about 4Ls off the speed early on, 4Ls down in 4th taking home turn, one-paced thereafter.
Towards rear about 6Ls off pace through first half, checked at 700 M and nearly 10Ls down entering home straight, made some minor late ground.
2-wide and 2Ls down in 2nd at 1000 M, 1L down in 2nd at home turn and led 300 M out, headed at the 100 M and only just missed out on a place.
Very green and difficult when about 4Ls off the speed through first half, 3Ls back in 5th when hanging in at 400 M, made good ground to dispute lead at 100 M, kept on well, just missed out.
A little worse than midfield about 5Ls or 6Ls behind the lead until final bend, always outpaced.
3Ls off pace in 4th but hard pressed at the 800 M, lost position on the circle and 8Ls down towards rear taking home bend, soon weakened right out.
4-wide no cover down the backstretch when about 5Ls off the pace in 10th or so, gained some cover on the circle but nearer last off home turn, no impression.
Settled towards rear about 6Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover down the back, same margin down when 5-wide (widest) taking home turn, stayed on very strongly on the outside for a place.

Checked soon after start. Mainly towards rear and proved different to settle in back straight. Unbalanced bumping rail at 700 M and checked severely at 500 M. Made up a little late ground after finding clear running inside 200 M.
Tracked leader from the 1st turn. Unable to quicken and dropped out of contention inside 200 M.
Towards rear entering back straight. Made no impression in straight.
Soon in 3rd or 4th place. Struggled to hold ground in midfield rounding home bend and soon dropped out of contention upon straightening.
3rd or 4th from the 1st turn. 2nd turning in before weakened 200 M out.
Midfield or better. Difficult to settle along back straight. Ran on without threatening placed horses after being held up for some distance upon straightening and again at 200 M.
Stumbled badly and dislodged rider at the start.
Led going into the 1st turn. Kept on strongly to win unchallenged.
At rear. Never a factor.
Slowly away. At rear. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Ridden forward but trapped wide and without cover around midfield from the 1st turn. Headway along back straight to 2nd or 3rd taking home bend. Weakened badly 300 M out.
Midfield or better. Kept on in straight and steadied when already one-paced near 200 M.
Behind midfield after being trapped wide on the 1st turn. Steady headway rounding home bend. Ran on steadily to secure a distant 3rd.
Dropped towards rear from wide draw. Headway on the outside to be in midfield rounding home bend. Ran on nicely in straight without threatening the winner.
Sluggish at start. Soon dropped to rear. Never a factor.
Never better than midfield. Kept on one pace to the line. (Blood in trachea.)
Wide in forward of midfield. Weakened into straight.
Well back. Took closer order rounding home bend. Sustained progress from towards rear into straight without threatening.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Soon took up running after beginning from poor draw. Led field until headed over 200 M out.
Mostly in midfield. Gave ground gradually from home bend.
Tracked leader. Quickened to lead over 200 M out and soon went clear under pressure.
Midfield to straight. Dropped out. (Blood in trachea.)
Settled in forward of midfield. Commenced run approaching home turn and gained 4th some 2Ls back into straight. Kept on steadily without any further progress.
Ridden for pace on rails early, gradually moving up from midfield to hold 3rd some 2Ls back. Fought on steadily under pressure to reach 2nd late.
Always in last few.

Average to begin, pushed along to take up midfield spot 3 back on rails 3Ls off speed, enjoyed run of race throughout, on bridle entering straight, pushed between horses in straight and charged hard late to claim them.

Broke with them from outside draw, niggled along to go forward, trapped 3 wide midfield 7L's away throughout under pressure from 700 M, made 5 wide run on turn, wide run took toll and didn't finish off.
Broke well, took up position behind the leader, had run of race through middle stages, on bit to turn, in mix until 250 M but unable to sprint with them and weakened out from that point.
Fastest into stride, took up running and pressured for early lead, kept them rolling at genuine clip, dictated terms to turn held 1/2L advantage to 250 M, showed usual fight to be right in finish.

Away well, ridden hard to hold forward position, pushed on in early speed duel outside leader, raced at leaders girth throughout, under pressure entering straight, there until 300 M but workload took its toll.
Fairly away, pushed along to hold midfield position on rails, 7Ls off speed throughout, lost touch from 800 M and battled away steadily from that point.

Average to begin, settled last early. 10Ls off them 2 wide, circled field 3 wide from 300 M, still 6-8L away entering straight, switched to outside and ran on strongly to be closest at finish. Solid effort.

Broke with field, 5 wide into first turn, pushed on but unable to get closer to rail, race 3 wide with cover 3Ls away throughout, pushed along entering straight, angled 4 wide but only plugged to line.
Jumped with them, drifted back to be 3rd from rear 2 wide 8Ls off them, did little in run, pushed along from 600 M, made up significant amount of ground along rails, doing best work late.

Jumped well from awkward draw, taken hold to obtain cover, lobbed in nice spot 1 out 1 back 2Ls away, enjoyed good run in middle stages, came with strong run 3 wide into stretch, hit lead at 200 M but was overhauled late.
Slow to begin, ridden up to hold midfield spot 2 wide 3Ls from front runners, travelled well after working early, hard ridden on home turn, stuck to task well in straight being closest at finish.

Average to begin, no pace in early stages to be back 2nd last on rail 9-10Ls from lead, used nothing in run, field in front on home turn, closed steadily only passing tired horses. Gave too great a start.
Broke well from wide alley, ridden hard 6 wide into first turn to take up closer spot, raced 3 wide throughout under hard riding, weakened out from turn to be well beaten.
Began with rest, ridden up in early stages to go forward 3 wide outside leaders, raced 3 wide without cover for entire journey, under pressure on turn, set too great a task and only plodded home.
Towards rear at least 4Ls behind the leader. Midfield going down the centre of track at 400 M. Commenced to hang in and never looked dangerous.
Behind midfield about 3Ls back. Weakened badly 300 M out.
Around midfield 2Ls off the pace. Found nothing inside 300 M.
Crowded at start. At rear at least 5Ls back. Hung out and failed to quicken final 400 M.
At rear. Under pressure but failed to respond 600 M out. Held up for considerable distance after 400 M and not properly tested. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Steadied for some distance and shifted in after 400 M but never ran on.
Led to 400 M. Weakened thereafter.
Travelled nicely in 2nd position just 1L behind the leader. Hit front at 400 M and kept on well to score.
Midfield or better 1 to 2Ls off the pace. Kept on without posing a threat to placed horses final 400 M.
In touch within 2Ls off the lead. Kept on without threatening the winner and was outsprinted by the 2nd horse inside 50 M.
Midfield or worse. Produced late charge inside 100 M whilst hanging in to be nearest at finish.
Prominent 3rd just 1L behind the leader. Dropped quickly out of contention inside 300 M. (Inflammed throat and displaced soft palate.)
Towards rear. One-paced final 400 M.
At rear. Very one-paced final 400 M.
Began awkwardly. Pressured to set pace on rail. Stayed within 2Ls off pace after being crossed. 4th entering straight. Held run until 250 M but found no extra thereafter.
Awkward to begin. Kept 4th last 5Ls from lead on fence before the turn. Made slight improvement on position after straightening. Held up most of straight. (Blood in trachea.)
Jumped cleanly. Stayed 2Ls off pace on rail at 1200 M. Never worse than midfield. Saved ground on rail rounding home. Crowded final 200 M and not a factor thereafter.
Fair start. Kept rearward, 3 wide with cover. 3rd last entering straight. Came with strong run in straight. Made up good ground when pressured. Went down narrowly.
Jumped well. Raced wide with no cover throughout. 4-wide 1L off pace at 800 M. Over used early and found nothing in straight. Weakened badly from 200 M out.
Average to begin. Ridden but failed to keep pace. Settled 2nd last on fence about 7Ls off pace. Amongst the last few on straightening. Responded strongly once in the clear. Nearest at finish.
Slow to begin. Kept 2 wide midfield before shifting to the fence around 800 M. Ran 2 wide again rounding home. No running room early straight. Steadied near 300 M and no clear run until final 100 M.
Average start. Ran in the rear section. 2 wide around 4Ls from lead at 800 M. Switched out to obtain run after straightening. Failed to make impression. One paced till finish.
Began awkwardly. Tailed, 7Ls from lead in a 2 wide position at 1000 M. Last to enter straight, then switched wide on the track. Ran on nicely and made up good ground on the outside.
Jumped well. Settled outside leader. Took lead before the bend. 1st to enter straight on fence. Responded well early in straight. Outpaced by first pair and failed to hang on for 3rd.
Good start. Showed good early speed. Restrained to race 2 wide midfield. 3rd at 400 M. Looked likely early in straight but couldn't go with them when they sprinted.
Average away. Midfield, 3 wide within 3Ls off pace. Raced keenly at 900 M. Shifted out and bumped on straightening. Rallied strongly whilst hanging in. Found the first pair too good.
Broke well. Race forward within 2Ls off lead one off fence. Urged forward to take up lead on the bend. Moved up to be on terms at 400 M, failed to maintain effort and faded gradually.

Amongst the first out. Kept around midfield. 3 wide 4Ls behind pacesetter at 600 M. Travelled comfortably on the bend. Switched wide on the track on straightening. Motored home and held off challengers.
Jumped awkwardly. Raced 2-wide at midfield. Lacked a response when pressure on straightening and faded away.
Sat on fence behind the pace until home straight. Switched out on straightening and quickened nicely to assume the lead 350 M. Continued well final 200 M and drew further away from rivals.
Stumbled out of the gates and nearly fell. Trailed early but was ridden along to race behind midfield. Hugged the rails making the turn and only remained on same pace in the straight.
Jumped well and was allowed to drop to rear section. 2-wide making home turn and only ran past a few beaten runners in the straight.
Jumped well. Raced 3-wide without cover in midfield until straightening. Kept on well in the straight.
Missed the kick and was hard ridden to recover. Settled on fence in midfield. Kept on fairly in the straight.
Niggled along from outside draw to keep pace with leader. Took over the lead at 700 M. Headed 350 M but held on in the final strides to make the frame.
Raced wide behind midfield. 3-wide making home turn and was one-paced in the straight.
Pressed forward and led until 700 M. Behind leader on straightening but unable to pick up and weakened in the straight.
Jumped fairly and raced better than midfield. 2-wide and kept within 3Ls of the pace making the turn. Contended for the lead at 350 M but unable to keep pace with winner final 200 M.
Raced wide and without cover in a rearward position. Only ran past tired runners in the straight.
Dropped to a rearward position on fence. Near last on straightening and made no impression thereafter.
Allowed to drop back from wide draw and raced 3-wide in a rearward position. Rallied in the straight for a minor placing.
Dropped back from a wide draw and trailed field until home straight. Stayed on one-paced thereafter.
Slowly away and crowded shortly afterwards. At rear and carried wider after 1200 M. Widest turning in. Made no impression in straight.
Soon travelling kindly in 4th or 5th place about 2 to 3Ls off the pace. Kept on in straight and lost 2nd by the narrowest margin on the line.
Thereabout in 4th or 5th place. Kept on in straight until finding no extra 50 M out.
Around midfield but raced wide and without cover from wide draw most of the way. Ran on steadily final 300 M to grab 2nd on the line without troubling the winner.
Disputed lead to 1200 M before settling in 2nd or 3rd place just behind the pace. Hit front upon straightening but got swamped when run ended inside 50 M.
Midfield or worse but trapped wide and proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Soon dropped out upon straightening. (Dropped whip.)
Forward of midfield. About 3 to 4Ls back rounding home bend. Kept on without threatening placed horses in straight.
Disputed lead to 1200 M before settling in 2nd or 3rd place just behind the pace. Weakened badly 200 M out.
Behind midfield and niggled along. Kept on one-paced without threatening despite strong riding in straight.
Went forward from wide draw and took lead at 1100 M. Headed upon straightening and gave ground 200 M out.
Midfield or better but proved difficult to settle in the early stages. One-paced in straight. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Elected to come back around 1000 M and stayed wide despite clear running on rail. Ran past beaten horses in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield or better. 5Ls behind the lead at 1000 M. Ran on well final 300 M to assert authority 50 M out.
Slowly away. At rear. Reluctant to shift out after 400 M for clear running. Made up some ground final 100 M to be nearest at finish.
Never far off. Ran on steadily in straight and just failed to peg back the winner.
Well there. Lost touch over 200 M out.
Mainly 3-wide in midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Broke well. Gradually crossed inside from widest draw to lead early. Just held off runner-up's challenge under pressure final stages.
Settled in forward of midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Wide towards rear throughout.
Settled in rear. Shifted outward for a run after straightening but failed to quicken under pressure.
Towards rear. Made some late headway past beaten horses closing stages.
Settled in midfield on rails. Not much room early in straight. Made up some late ground under pressure inside final 200 M.
Slowly away. Settled in rear far side. Took closer order on rails rounding home bend. Ran on from towards rear inside final 300 M down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Always struggling at the back.
Never far off to straight. Soon weakened.
Mostly in forward of midfield. Kept on steadily in straight without quickening.
Settled in rear of midfield. Obtained clear run shortly after straightening. Produced only moderate late progress closing stages.
Behind midfield at least 4Ls back. Ran on gamely inside 200 M and fought hard to grab 2nd after being bumped and unbalanced 100 M out.
Towards rear after losing ground at start. Midfield turning in by saving ground along rail. Made up good ground before getting held up for some distance near 200 M.
Never far off but trapped wide and without cover throughout. Kept on in straight until finding no extra inside 200 M.
Prominent 2nd or 3rd. Kept on in straight until finding no extra inside 100 M.
Dropped to rear from wide draw and failed to muster speed near 800 M. Made up some ground whilst shifting out in straight.
Around midfield. Widest turning in. Weakened badly inside 200 M.
Midfield or better. Dropped rapidly out of contention 200 M out.
Jumped best before steadying to sit 2 to 3Ls off the pace. Ran on well final 300 M and held off late charge from both placed horses.
Always in touch about 2Ls behind the lead. Held up in straight before shifting out and making up good late ground final 200 M. Just missed 2nd.
Around midfield. Kept on without threatening in straight and was severely checked near 100 M.
At rear. Severely checked at 400 M. Never a threat.
Soon led. Headed when already one-paced 200 M out.
Slowly away. Towards rear. Very wide turning in. Made up some ground without threatening in straight.
Soon 3rd but 3-wide. Ran on in straight and hit front briefly 200 M out before finishing one-paced final 100 M.
Raced outside leader. Gained slender lead upon straightening but soon conceded lead 200 M out. Kept on.
Mainly in forward of midfield. Steadied between runners upon straightening. Kept on before producing some late impression closing stages.

Soon took up running after beginning from wide draw. Narrowly headed turning in but fought back under pressure to regain advantage 200 M out only to be collared by fast-finishing winner final strides.
Close up. Failed to quicken to challenge upon straightening and swamped for a placing closing stages.
Never better than midfield. Faded gradually in straight.
Never seen with a chance.
Midfield on rails. Found nothing under pressure in straight.

Settled in rear. Went inside for a run upon straightening. Improving well when baulked by runner shifting ground moments before forced to swerve inside for clear passage 150 M out. Sustained effort to score impressively.
Never far off. Some 2Ls 4th 3-wide turning in. Ran home one-paced.
Mainly 3-wide in midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Settled in last few. Made moderate progress down centre of straight without threatening.
Settled at the back. Ran on well inside final 300 M down centre of straight to narrowly miss a placing.

Slow to begin and checked early, drifted back to race 2nd from tail, raced 2 wide 6Ls off pace, travelled on bit to turn, came between runners in straight and finished off well to be closest at finish.
Began with them, positioned 3 to 4 wide with trail 4Ls from speed, always working wider in run, unable to get into it with wide run on turn and plugged steadily to line.
Jumped with them, pressed forward to race outside leader from wide alley, made race of it pressuring for lead throughout, kept finding until 200 M but ran out of gas and weakened out of it.
Away with them, took up closer position than usual 1 out 1 back 1L away, travelled well to turn, ridden with confidence when travelling easily to 250 M, found plenty when asked to score strong win.

Fairly away, drifted back to settle in rearward division 3 wide 4 to 5Ls from pace, had cover through mid-section, made wide run on turn and showed great on turn of foot late to make up ground down outside.

Jumped best, challenged for early lead, restrained from speed battle to race behind leader (good clip) pushed along from 600 M, under hard riding for most of straight and responded well to be just behind them without threatening.
Fast into stride, challenged for early lead and took up running after 300 M, kept on at solid clip, pressured throughout, held lead until 250 M but couldn't match it with them over final furlong.
Average to begin, took up midfield spot 2 wide 4Ls away, had soft run throughout with good tempo, tracked nicely to turn, held up to 250 M, sprinted strongly when clear to pass all but winner.

Slow to begin, pushed along to take up rearward spot 4 back on fence 6Ls off them, travelled fairly in run (checked 800 M) followed rails in straight, didn't have a lot of room and unable to improve final 200 M.
Broke with field, trapped 3 wide without cover not far from lead throughout, pressed on to be 1L away on straightening, lacked turn of foot from 300 M to figure in finish and battled to line.
Best away, pushed on from wide alley to hold forward spot, trapped 4 wide without cover for most of journey, 1L off them on straightening, workload told and dropped out last 200 M.
OK to begin. Settled 3 back on fence 4Ls from leader, had run of race to turn, stuck to paint in stretch but raced very one paced in run home merely holding position to line.
Lost ground at start, taken in behind early, raced in last position 7Ls from them, began to circle 3 wide from 800 M, made run between horses in straight and closed strongly giving too great a start.
Jumped with them, took up closer position than usual 2 wide midfield 3Ls away, travelled well to turn, held up early in straight but lacked gear charge when clear and battled to line.
Close up. Weakened upon straightening.
Settled at the back. Obtained split between runners over 300 M out. Finished off race strongly down centre of straight to snatch 2nd late.
Midfield on rails. Weakened under pressure passing 250 M.
Travelled in rear of midfield. Steadied for a run about 300 M out. Produced late impression behind horses nearing finish.
Well there to straight. Dropped out quickly shortly after straightening.
Raced keenly in rear of midfield. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening.
Always prominent. Kept on steadily without quickening under pressure in straight.
Midfield far side. Took closer order rounding home bend and hit front upon straightening. Soon went clear for a comfortable victory.
Settled in last few. Gained midfield position turning in saving ground on inside rails. Improved between runners despite tight run early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Mainly in forward of midfield racing wide. Improved under pressure to reach 2nd shortly after straightening. Failed to hold place and swamped close to home.
Settled in last few. Made modest progress under pressure down centre of straight without threatening.
Wide in last few throughout. Made no show in straight.
Led field to 400 M then folded up quickly.
Raced wide in midfield. Ran home one-paced in straight.

Average into stride, hard ridden to take closer charge, pushed on to race 3 wide outside leaders without cover, moved up to challenge on turn, workload told and couldn't muster effort to figure in stretch.

Away with them, pushed along to go forward and take up running, dictated terms in front at slow to even pace, pressured throughout, held 1/2L advantage into stretch, still there until 200 M but couldn't go on.

Broke well, restrained to race midfield 2 wide 3Ls off speed, enjoyed good run, in traffic entering straight and held up until 200 M, weaved between horses and showed great turn of foot when clear to score easily.
Average to begin, settled at tail of field 6 to 7Ls from speed, travelled comfortably in mid section, showed nothing from turn and dropped right out as if amiss.
Broke with rest, pushed forward but unable to get closer, trapped 4 wide without cover 3 to 4Ls away, pushed on to be a length from them on turn, set too great a task and didn't finish race off.

Best away, moved forward from widest gate to hold spot outside leader, raced at leader's girth throughout at slow to even tempo, moved up to challenge on turn and hit lead briefly at 200 M but couldn't sustain effort last bit.
Slow to begin, took up spot 3 back on fence 4Ls from front runners, had fair run throughout, followed paint into straight, offered little when asked for final effort.

Away with them, pressed forward to hold forward position 1 out 1 back 1L off pace, travelled well throughout, on bit entering straight, came with strong run in final 200 M but couldn't match first two.
Average to begin, drifted back to worse than midfield on rails 4Ls away, spent nothing in run, tracked nicely to turn, angled wide in straight and sprinted hard last 200 M. Doing best work late.

Jumped with them, hard ridden to be first to rails, handed up after 300 M, raced behind leader on rails with run of race from that point, pushed along approaching turn, lacked required dash to figure.

Began a little awkwardly, urged along to get closer early, raced 3 wide with cover throughout 3Ls from leaders, tracked into race nicely, slow to warm up when clear but chased strongly. Found winner too good.

Fast into stride, restrained to obtain cover, raced in rearward position 4 to 5Ls away, unable to obtain trail, forced to press on 3 and 4 wide with cover, tried hard in straight, workload took toll and battled home.
Slow to begin, settled in rearward division, 2 wide 4Ls off speed, tracked well in middle stages, made run between horses in straight, lacked another gear to figure in finish.
Began well, taken back to tail from wide alley, raced in 2nd last position 2 wide 5 to 6Ls off pace, circled field approaching turn, sprinted hard down outside but set too great a task.
Soon led. Tracked eventual winner in 3rd place approaching 800 M. Kept on well in straight but looked 2nd all the way.
At rear. Steadied off heels near 800 M widest turning in. Never a factor.
Towards rear. 6Ls back rounding the turn. Not a threat in straight.
Began well. 4th rounding the turn about 3Ls back. Kept on in straight until weakened 200 M out. (Hung in throughout.)
Midfield or better. Steadied off heels at 800 M. Nothing left 200 M out.
Soon midfield or better but trapped wide and without cover throughout. Beaten upon straightening. (Blood.)
Slowly away after blundering badly. At rear. Midfield turning in by saving ground along rail. Never ran on in straight.
At rear. Never seen with a chance.
Around midfield. About 5Ls behind the pace rounding the turn. Ran on steadily in straight and grabbed a distance 3rd 50 M out.
At rear and raced ungenerously approaching the turn at 800 M. Never a threat in straight.
Prominent 2nd most of the way. Kept on in straight until one-paced inside 100 M and lost out on a distant 3rd 50 M out.
Went forward from wide draw and crossed to take up running approaching 800 M. Kept on strongly to win comfortably.
Forward of midfield. 2Ls back rounding the turn. 4th or 5th turning in. One-paced and never looked threatening in straight.
Hugged rail always within 3Ls off the pace. Kept on in straight until finding no extra inside 200 M.
Broke well. Kept rearward. Switched to 5 deep rounding home. Responded strongly whilst hanging in once in the clear. Took lead at 200 M and outpaced others for an easy win.

Broke well. Raced comfortably on fence making the first turn. At least 4Ls behind leader at 1200 M. Saved ground along rail rounding home. 4th to enter straight. Kept on evenly when clear after 300 M. Lacked an extra kick.
Jumped well. Ridden to take lead on rail. Set good pace throughout. Held a 3Ls lead at 1000 M. Found nothing in straight. Failed to keep pace after 300 M and steadily dropped out.
Jumped with them. Outpaced early and trailed field on fence. Last to enter straight. Shifted wider on track for better running. Made up late ground to be closest at finish.
Fair to begin. Settled 2 wide 4Ls off lead around midfield. Similar rounding home. Shifted wide and bumped on straightening. Not a factor thereafter.
Average to begin. Worked to stay 2 wide 3Ls behind pacesetter at 1400 M. Made up little ground on the bend. 3rd to enter straight. Faded shortly after straightening. (Abnormal breathing noise.)

First one out. Ridden early to hold the rail, surrendered the lead at 1700 M. Raced prominently off pace. Never far off the leader. Took the lead after the 250 M. Fought hard to stay on but found winner too good.
Ridden out of the gates and contended for the early lead. Took a sit after 1000 M and stayed within 2Ls of the pace until straightening. Kept on well in the straight for a minor placing.
Ridden along to gain lead near 1000 M. Pressured at 400 M and kept on well. Held a 2Ls advantage at 200 M and stayed on strongly closing stages to deny rivals.
Steadied shortly after start and trailed field until home straight. Only ran past a pair of beaten runners.
Off slowly and niggled along in rear section. Widest turning in and was last to enter home straight. Only ran past weakening runners.
Best out and led briefly early stages. Outpaced at 1000 M but tracked leader until straightening. Weakened in the home straight.
3-wide at midfield until home straight. Kept on fairly closing stages.
Checked on jumping and raced towards the rear. Remained near the back and swung 3-wide making home turn. Made no impression in the straight.
Ridden along from wide draw and raced 3-wide better than midfield. Improved to be within 2Ls of the leader making home turn. Kept chasing in the straight but unable to turn up a notch final stages.
Jumped fairly and gradually dropped back to race behind midfield on fence. Switched out on straightening and steadily made up ground in the straight.
2-wide and better than midfield. 3 to 4Ls off on straightening and only kept same pace to line.
Raced wide and without cover at midfield. Improved along the outside making home turn but found nothing in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and raced no better than midfield. Dropped further back after checking at 800 M. Wide making home turn. Made up some late ground in the straight despite hanging in.
Behind leaders early. Settled on fence in midfield until home straight. Kept gaining ground in the straight and finished well.
Checked after start and lost ground. Hard ridden and recovered to settle midfield. Weaved through rivals in the straight to find clear running and closed the race off well.
8Ls last at the 1200 M when 3-wide with cover, 6Ls back in rear turning for home, stayed on dourly to claim 3rd place inside final strides.
Led at 1000 M on fence, headed at 900 M, 2Ls down in 4th at top of home straight, faded.
3-back on fence in or around midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls behind the speed until 600 M, a little closer on straightening when short of room, never threatened any further once clear.
No speed early on fence about 8Ls off pace in rear group, about 5Ls behind leader at home straight entrance and 200 M, never on terms.
Got much further back than normal and sat 6Ls off pace at the 800 M while wide but with cover, raced ungenerously in places, 5Ls down in 10th off home turn, never dangerous.
4-wide no cover at 900 M when about 4Ls back in mid-pack, gained cover on circle and improved to be a hard-pressed 4th 2Ls back turning for home, rather one-paced thereafter.
Prominent about 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1000 M, further headway to lead by a neck at the 400 M and with every chance, headed at the 200 M and very weak close home.
Disputed lead at 1200 M but soon niggled along when back 3Ls off pace in 4th on fence, all out to remain with field taking home turn, eased a long way out.
2-wide in rear bunch between 5Ls and 7Ls off the speed until home turn, headway to be 3Ls back in 5th at the 200 M, clear but remote 3rd at 100 M, lost out on a place in final strides.
Restrained about 6Ls off pace towards rear through first half, 4Ls back in midfield off final bend, picked up well to lead at 200 M, kept on for strong pressure.
About 3Ls off pace in 5th or so down the back, left 3-wide no cover on circle while advancing to be a neck back in 3rd entering homestretch, swamped at the 200 M and weakened right out.
Slow break, 2-wide worse than midfield 6Ls off pace at 1000 M, went for home before home turn and 3Ls down in mid-division at 400 M, a neck 2nd at 200 M, always held by winner.
Midfield about 4Ls off the pace at 100 M, under pressure to maintain this position at 600 M, found nothing off the bridle and quickly back-pedalled.
Caught 5-wide no cover early before pressing on to lead by 2Ls on fence at 800 M, headed at top of home straight and retreated hastily.
Towards rear 3-wide with cover about 5Ls off the pace down back straight, not much closer when turning for home but picked up well to be 1L down in 3rd at the 200 M, stayed on well for 2nd.
Raced 3 and 4-wide but with cover about 3Ls off the pace in midfield through first half, hung out on the circle and 5Ls down in 9th entering home straight, always outpaced.
2-wide about 4Ls or 5Ls behind leader in mid-division until home turn, headway to be 2Ls down in 5th at the 200 M, stayed on dourly and unable to enter the frame.
2-wide and a neck 2nd at 1200 M, led by half a length at top of home straight, headed by winner at the 200 M, weakened inside final 100 M.
Always in rear at least 7Ls last until home straight, made no impression down centre of the track.
Slowest away, about 6Ls off pace on fence towards rear at 1000 M, 4Ls behind when worse than midfield at 400 M and 200 M, lost ground again close home.
3-back on fence about 3Ls off the pace in midfield until the 600 M, held up for a run off home turn, picked up once clear to be 1L back in 4th at 200 M, kept on well for a place.
Couldn't muster speed to lead early, within 3Ls of the pace in midfield through to home straight, never looked likely to improve from this position.
Had a perfect run on fence 2Ls off pace in 4th from 1200 M to the 500 M, quickened up well to lead at the 200 M, did enough under pressure to hang on for the win.
3-wide no cover when 1L off pace in 3rd from 1200 M to home straight, swamped at the 200 M and faded out.
One from rear about 6Ls off the pace through to home straight, made good ground down centre of the track to be nearest at the finish.
Always 4-wide no cover in midfield between 2Ls and 3Ls behind the speed from 1200 M to home turn, soon folded under pressure and beaten when tightened for room at 200 M.
3Ls down in 6th with cover at 1000 M, similarly placed when off the bit at 600 M, 5Ls back in 10th at final bend, rallied again to be 3Ls down at the 200 M in midfield, one-paced close home.
Led by a neck at the 1200 M, all out when headed at top of homestretch, dropped away quickly.
Slowly away. Midfield from 1200 M. Made up good ground final 200 M to just miss 2nd when doing best work at finish.
Always within 3 to 4Ls off the pace. Hung in and awkward on heels early straight. Ran on final 300 M but got on heels again 50 M and not ridden out.
Behind the leaders in 3rd or 4th place. Kept on until one-paced final 100 M.
At rear. Hampered after straightening. Made no impression thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slow into stride. At rear. Never looked likely.
Went forward from wide draw and sat outside the leader from 1000 M. Weakened badly 200 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped fairly but soon outpaced towards rear from 1200 M. Made up some ground without threatening principals.
Towards rear. Shifted out upon straightening. Kept on one-paced without posing a threat.
Jumped best before settling 2 to 3Ls off the pace. Unable to quicken upon straightening and packed up 200 M from home.
Soon led. Headed 1100 M. 3rd or 4th whilst hanging out in the middle stages. Kicked home strongly 300 M out and held on well to win.
In touch about 2 to 3Ls off the the lead. Shifted off the rail to find running early straight. Ran on well final 250 M but was well held by the winner.
Midfield at best despite being niggled along. Wide turning in and dropped out.
Reared and lost significant ground at start. Recovered to be behind midfield from 1000 M. Carried wide at 300 M and never looked threatening.
Took up running from 1100 M. Headed 250 M and soon tired badly.
