Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to hold every chance but found winner too strong.
Settled in rear. Commenced move approaching home turn but not much room early in straight. Made up some late ground inside final 200 M.
Never far off. Hit front about 300 M out but collared close to home.
Settled towards rear. Ran on well inside final 300 M to get up on line.
Mainly in rear of midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Forward of midfield before checked and lost position coming out of back straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Well there to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Trailed the field most of way. Never nearer.
Made running to 400 M. Gradually weakened.
Began only fairly, drifted back to worse than midfield on rails, sat 5 to 6Ls away using nothing throughout, stuck to rails in straight but showed no turn of foot in order to make up ground.

Jumped with them, trapped wide early from awkward draw, raced 3 wide without cover 3 to 4Ls away. Pushed along entering straight, unable to make impression in straight after wide run and slowly dropped out.

Began with them, pushed hard to lead them early, surrended lead after 300 M to take trail behind leader, had run of race thereafter, pushed along on turn, tried hard but unable to sprint to figure in finish.
Jumped with them, restrained to rear from wide alley, raced 3rd from tail 8Ls away throughout, made run between runners in straight but lacked gear charge and made no impression.
Away well, showed good early speed to cross to lead after 300 M, rolled along at even clip dictating terms to turn, led them up till 250 M but unable to sprint with them, held on to make the frame.
Bounced out quickly, held position behind early leader, shuffled back to be 3 back on fence 3Ls away, eased 2 wide entering straight and closed strongly with winner but lacked dash to take prize.

Fastest into stride, unable to cross to fence, rolled across to sit at leader's girth, travelled well throughout, made challenge in straight to briefly hit lead at 250 M but overhauled shortly after and stuck on well for third.
Jumped with line, lacked early speed and drifted back to rear 10Ls away, never comfortable and under pressure from 600 M, dropped out to be beaten a long way.

Slow to begin, took up position at rear of field on fence 8Ls from front runners, used little in run, angled wide in straight, set impossible task but made up some strong late ground passing tired runners.

Average to break, pushed along to settle just worse than midfield 3 wide with cover, 4 to 5Ls away to turn, made run between horses in straight, battled away steadily in stretch passing a few but not threatening winner.

Bumped stall on jumping, broke well but caught very wide from awkward draw, raced 3 and 4 wide with cover throughout, made 5 wide run into stretch, unable to show usual finish after doing so much work.
Broke with field, settled midfield 5 to 6Ls away in 2 wide position, had even run throughout and travelled well to turn, unable to muster any speed at business end and only battled away.

Began only fairly, allowed to relax and settle midfield 2 wide 4Ls away, travelled well throughout, made run between runners in straight weaving a passage clear at 200 M to finish powerfully and score easy win.
Began with them, drove through to hold prominent spot 1 out 1 back 3Ls away, travelled comfortably to turn, angled 3 wide into straight, showed no turn of foot when asked and only plugged to line.
Mainly in last few. Never nearer.
Midfield throughout. Kept on one pace in straight.
Mainly towards rear. Did not make much impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent after beginning from wide draw. Ridden to take up running coming out of back straight. Went 2Ls clear 200 M out and hung on well to finish.
Brief lead far side. Just off the pace rounding home bend. Weakened out of contention over 200 M out.
Well there early before settling in forward of midfield. Fought on steadily to gain 2nd some 2Ls back 200 M out. Swamped for a placing late.
Settled in midfield. No clear passage behind horses early in straight. Made up some late ground inside final 200 M.
Sluggish at start. Trailed the field to straight. Produced good late finish down centre of track to snatch 2nd late.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. Soon dropped out.
Chased leader to straight. Gradually weakened. (Blood in trachea.)
Never far off. One-paced under pressure in straight and swamped closing stages. (Blood in trachea.)
Settled in midfield. Improving when steadied for a run over 300 M out. Sustained headway inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled at the back. Made up good ground in straight to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
No early speed, taken across heels to rails to race 10Ls from lead, had easy time throughout, stuck to paint turning for home and made up good late ground over final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Began well, drifted back to just worse than midfield 5 to 6Ls away on rails, made run between horses in straight, made up good late ground without threatening winner.
Bounced with them, pushed along to take up lead into first turn, lobbed along in front at slow speed, niggled along on turn, lacked dash in straight and only battled to line.
Jumped with them, drifted back to worse than midfield, held 2 wide position 10Ls from speed, under pressure approaching turn, dropped out as if amiss. (Irregular heart beat.)

Broke well, 4 wide into first turn, settled midfield 2 wide 4Ls away from speed, enjoyed good trip throughout, made 3 wide run at 500 M, challenged strongly to claim them at 300 M and pushed on for strong win.

Crowded early, pushed along to contest for early lead, took up spot at leaders girth, had good run with slow speed in middle stages, challenged entering straight and hit lead but beaten shortly after and battled to line.
Average to begin, settled 3 back on fence 4Ls away, had great run throughout, angled wide entering straight, chased strongly when clear to be closest at finish.
Away well, showed good early speed to cross to spot behind leader, had run of race with slow pace in mid-section, made run between runners in straight, chased hard but unable to peg back advantage.
Began with them, settled 2nd last on rails 11 to 12Ls away from lead, enjoyed good run throughout, gave big start turning for home and lacked dash to make up ground in stretch.
Broke with them, pushed on to obtain closer position, raced midfield 2 wide 5 to 6Ls away, tracked eventual winner into race, lacked dash to keep up but kept on strongly to make frame.
Broke well, restrained to find cover, settled well back 9 to 10Ls away 2 wide, travelled comfortably throughout, pushed along entering straight, could only manage one speed in run home.
Only average to begin, drifted back to settle 3rd from rear 12Ls from speed, made 3 wide run from 600 M, set impossible task on turn but chased strongly to make up considerable ground.
Broke with field, restrained from wide gate to take up spot at rear 12 to 13Ls away, began to circle field at 500 M, raced very one-paced in straight and was well beaten.

Showed good early speed to take up prominent spot 1 out 1 back 2 to 3Ls away from leader, pushed along entering straight, kept on strongly when clear but lacked turn of foot to make impression. Not fully ridden out last bit.
Midfield or better but trapped wide and without cover in the early stages. 4th or 5th about 2Ls back along back straight. Dropped out soon after straightening.
Led and nearly made all until pipped by the winner right on the line.
Unseated rider at start.
Prominent 3rd about 2Ls off the speed. 1 out and 1 back from 1000 M. Kept on in straight until weakened final 100 M.
Tracked leader from the 1st turn. Kept on in straight without threatening the first pair.
Jumped very awkwardly and slowly causing rider to lose stirrup. Remained at rear. Took closer order along rail turning in. Weakened 200 M out.
Slowly away. Towards rear. Never a factor.
Around midfield. Checked on heels at 1100 M and again when hampered at 900 M. Headway from 600 M to 4th rounding the bend. Found nothing in straight.
Midfield early. Came wide by another runner and then hampered by riderless horse near 1000 M. Dropped towards rear along back straight. Never a threat in straight.
Niggled forward along rail to 4th or 5th place about 2 to 3Ls off the pace. Ran on determinedly final 200 M and just got up in time to win by the narrowest margin. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield. Unbalanced at 900 M. Made up some ground final 200 M without threatening placed horses.
Fair begin. Kept rearward. Remained in rear section into straight. Last few on straightening. No response when asked. Never a threat.

Broke well. Around midfield or better on fence within 3Ls of pace taking back straight. 5th entering straight. Shifted into clear for running inside 300 M. Responded strongly final 150 M. Went down narrowly.
Broke well. 2 wide slightly behind midfield at 1000 M. Shifted ground to be amongst last few at end of back straight. Last one on straightening. Switched widest at 200 M and made up some late ground.
Jumped with them. Behind midfield at 1000 M. Wide with no cover and improved position in back straight. Pressured on the bend and shifted wide on straightening. Same paced till finish.

Fair start. Settled at tail. 2 wide 6Ls from leader with cover at 800 M. Pressured to make ground on the bend in the 3 wide position. Switched wide in straight. Made good ground whilst hanging in. Took 3rd at the line.

Average begin. Lost position on rail after being steadied at 1200 M. Stayed 2 wide 2Ls off the lead at 1000 M. Fought on hard after straightening to hold some chance. Was crowded closing stages and not ridden out fully.
Good start. Raced handy on fence within 2Ls from pacesetter. 4th to enter straight. Tried hard but lacked an extra kick. Same pace till finish. Not enough to hang on for 3rd at the line.
Broke well. Around midfield. Inconvenience at 1200 M. 2 wide 3Ls off pace with cover at 800 M. No response to hard riding on straightening. Checked at 150 M whilst weakening.

Broke well from outside barrier. Tracked leader in a 2 wide position on back straight. Caught up with leader on straightening. Held a 2Ls advantage at 200 M. Held off late charges for a narrow victory.

Fair start. Behind midfield on rail. About 4Ls behind leader at 1000 M. Failed to obtain inside run after straightening. Shifted back out into limited running space at 200 M. Produced some late impression.
Began awkwardly. Raced in the rear section major part of the race. Saved ground on rail entering straight. Responded nicely on the inside final 300 M. Never looked likely.
Broke well. Showed early speed to take fence before first turn. Set solid pace throughout. Got passed on straightening and not a factor thereafter.

Niggled along on jumping and raced 2-wide behind the pace early. Better than midfield and was 3Ls off the pace back straight. 3-wide and 3Ls down turning in. Quickened and ran down the early leader final 100 M.
Jumped well and allowed to drift back to race on fence at midfield. Looked to move away from the rails on straightening and found clear run inside final 200 M. Kept on well to the finish.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Unable to pick up in the home straight and was one-paced to line.
Jumped well and soon led. Held a length's advantage into home straight. Headed final 100 M but stayed on well for a minor placing.

Missed the jump and raced on fence in a rearward position. Made a ground saving trip along the rails making home turn and had to weave through traffic final 200 M to get a clear run. Made a late dash to finish 2nd.
Jumped well and raced behind the pace until home straight. Lacked a response when pressured and weakened.
Jumped only fairly and was ridden along to be in a forward position. Kept alongside the leader and was pushed along at 400 M to keep pace. Faded final 200 M.
Slowly away and raced 2-wide behind midfield. Swung wide making home turn and made no impression in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and settled on fence behind midfield. Switched out turning for home and steadily made up ground.
Trailed field for the majority of the race and swung wide turning in. Closed the race off well.

Slow to muster speed and raced 4-wide midfield early. Improved to 3-wide in a forward position back straight and was a length off the leader at 600 M. Widest making home turn and weakened in the straight.
Caught 4-wide without cover in midfield about 3Ls off the pace until the 600 M, gained some cover 3-wide on the circle, one-paced in the homestretch.
One from rear and 2-wide about 5Ls off the pace until home turn, 4Ls down but short of room at 200 M in 10th, switched out and ran on very well late, just missed out.
Awkward break, 4Ls behind in 8th or so at 1000 M, checked at the 600 M and 5Ls down in 11th turning for home, soon outpaced.
Slowest away, about 6Ls or 7Ls last until home straight, didn't find much running room thereafter but never likely to figure anyway.
2-wide and between 2Ls and 3Ls off pace in midfield through to home turn, found no running room in the home straight and not properly tested, should have finished closer.
2-wide and 1L off the pace in 2nd at 700 M, a neck down in 2nd turning for home, all out to be half a length down in 2nd at 200 M, tired late.
Keen early, 2-wide and worse than midfield between 3Ls and 4Ls behind leader until home turn, always held by principals.
3-back on fence about 3Ls off the speed through to home straight, kept on only fairly, short of room late but never likely to figure in quinella.
Good speed from wide gate to lead on fence by 2Ls at 1000 M, a neck clear turning for home, half a length ahead at 200 M, kept on gamely to scrape in.
Well placed on fence 2Ls behind pace in 3rd or so until final bend, always a fraction outpaced.
Better than midfield about 2Ls or so off the pace but mostly 3-wide no cover until home turn, kept on fairly well but never looked the winner.
Bumped after an awkward break, in rear bunch about 4Ls off the speed through to final bend, didn't figure any further.
Hung out down the backstretch in midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls off the pace, weakened out home straight.
Worse than midfield about 4Ls off the pace early, keen at 600 M, 3Ls back in midfield at the 200 M, stayed on strongly to take 2nd place.
One from rear racing inside the winner about 6Ls or so off the pace until home straight, made some fair late ground without threatening to figure in the frame.
Settled in 8th place about 5Ls off the speed at the 800 M, 6Ls down in 11th and 4-wide turning for home, no impression.
Away well from wide gate, hung out badly disputing lead at 1000 M, only crossed to the fence 500 M, 1L clear turning for home, headed close home.
On fence about 1L off the pace in 2nd or 3rd from 1000 M to home straight, had every chance but failed to quicken up adequately.
4Ls behind in midfield at the 800 M, 3Ls down in 5th turning for home, had every chance when under a length behind leader with 150 M to go, no extra.
3-back on fence between 3Ls and 4Ls off the speed in midfield until home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Settled towards rear about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace, stayed on very well out wide to lead close home.
Tended to hang out and race ungenerously throughout, 3Ls down in 4th at 800 M and turning for home, always outpaced. (Lame next morning.)
Bumped at start, 8Ls last at the 600 M, made some minor late ground past a few beaten rivals.
Prominent 2-wide about 1L down in 2nd or 3rd until home straight when stumbling and losing momentum, soon beaten.
Blundered at start but soon racing 1 to 2Ls off the lead. Dropped right out of contention soon after straightening.
Midfield or worse. One-paced in straight.
Slowly away. At rear at least 10Ls back from the 1st turn. One-paced in straight.
Soon 4th around 2 to 3Ls off the pace. Ran on well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear over 8Ls back rounding the 1st turn. Made up good ground final 200 M to be closest at finish without troubling placed horses.
Settled in midfield. About 5Ls back entering back straight. Improved along rail to be 2Ls back in 3rd turning in. Kicked home strongly final 200 M to snatch win just before the line.
Slowly away. Towards rear. One-paced in straight.
Led and nearly made all until pipped by the winner just before the line.
3rd rounding the 1st turn about 2Ls back. Just 1L behind the leader turning in. Kept on well in straight until not quickened inside 100 M.
Midfield early. Severely checked passing winning post 1st time and dropped towards rear. Headway along rail to be in midfield turning in. One-paced in straight.
At rear. Not a factor in straight.
Towards rear. Never a factor.
Settled in forward of midfield. Kept on steadily without threatening in straight.
Settled in forward of midfield. Produced good late finish inside final 200 M to narrowly miss the winner.
Mainly 2-wide in midfield. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Well back to straight. Ran on steadily on rails to be nearest at finish.
Soon took up running and led until overhauled inside final 100 M.
Broke well. Settled just off the pace. Tight between runners early in straight. Kept on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Behind midfield into straight. Finished off race well under pressure before running out of room 50 M out.
Always prominent. Quickened well to hit front over 100 M out. Just held off runner-up's strong late challenge close to home.
Settled in rear of midfield. Did not find much room early in straight. Made some late impression closing stages.
Wide in midfield early. Gave ground steadily after Rock.
Always in rear. Never nearer.
Mainly in rear of midfield. Ran home one-paced.

Broke with them, restrained to find cover from wide alley, trapped 3 wide (with cover) just worse than midfield 5Ls from pace, tracked into race well coming 4 wide on turn, tried hard but outpaced by winner.

Fair to begin, niggled along to hold ground early, took up spot 1 out 1 back 3-4Ls off speed, enjoyed good run through middle stages, in traffic approaching turn, lacked turn of foot to make impression in straight.

Slowly into stride as usual, settled at tail of field on rails 7Ls away from speed, travelled well through middle section easing 2 wide from 700 M, made 4 wide run on turn and sprinted hard to claim them and win comfortably.

Broke well, showed good early speed to cross to rail, raced behind leader but pulled way out to lead at 1000 M, didn't settle in front, held length advantage turning for home and fought strongly for 2nd.

Broke with them, went with them early to take up prominent spot, settled 3 back on rails 2-3Ls away, had run of race throughout, tracked well to turn, followed paint in straight but could only hold ground in run home.
Fairly away, in mix early and settled outside leader 1L away, had fair run with moderate speed in front under pressure on turn, lacked usual finishing fight and weakened out.
Slow to begin, drifted back to near rear, raced in 4th last spot on rails 6Ls from front, travelled well to turn, made late ground in straight before being severely checked at 100 M.

Broke with them, lacked early speed to take up forward spot, caught 3 wide without cover 4-5Ls away, midfield working throughout, pushed on to be 2Ls away on turn, wide run took its toll and plugged to line.

Bounced out best, lacked early speed and drifted back to worse than midfield, raced in 2 wide spot 5-6Ls from front runners, enjoyed good trip to turn, pushed along to make ground but couldn't muster and finished off fairly.

Jumped fairly, mustered early speed to cross from wide alley, used up first 400 M, handed up front and raced behind leader from 1000 M, followed paint in straight, tried hard and battled on to make the frame.
Broke with them, lacked early toe and restrained to tail 2 wide 8-9Ls from leaders, lobbed along at rear throughout, used little to turn, hard ridden in straight and offered nothing when asked.
Average to begin, outpaced early and settled 4 back on rails, raced 4-5Ls off them using nothing in middle stages, made run between runners in straight but showed no turn of foot to make up ground.
Steadied off heels shortly after start but soon 2 to 3Ls off the pace. Kept on without threatening placed horses.
Slowly away. Always well back. Never remotely a chance.
Led the pack towards the outside rail. Kept on well final 400 M and held on for 3rd.
Thereabout 1 to 2Ls off the speed on the inner rail. Weakened badly 200 M out.
Slowly away. Towards rear of the inside pack about 4Ls off the speed. Made up some ground final 400 M to just miss a place.
Prominent early. Midfield around 400 M before dropping right out of contention.
Stayed within 2Ls off the pace towards the inner rail. Kept on without threatening final 400 M and hung in over the concluding stage.
In touch about 1L behind the leader on the inner rail. Weakened 100 M out.
In touch about 2Ls behind the pace. Shifted out from another runner after 600 M. Kept on without threatening placed horses.
Led the pack towards the inside rail. Outpaced by winner whilst hanging out in the concluding stages.
Well there early before dropping back to midfield around 400 M. One-paced thereafter.
In touch early about 1 to 2Ls behind the pace on the outside rail. Kept on one-paced to the line. (Dropped whip.)
Slowly away. Always at rear and hung out most of the way. Never a factor.
Jumped fairly but soon towards rear of the outside pack at least 5Ls off the pace. Responded strongly final 200 M to snatch win final strides.
Fair away. Wide with no cover early stages. Raced prominently at 1000 M, 2 wide 3Ls behind lead. No response rounding home. Yielded ground quickly before straightening. Very far from other runners.
Average begin. No early speed and ran in a rearward position. 3 wide with no cover approaching the turn at 600 M. 6Ls off lead, last to get on straight. Very weak in straight.
Broke well. Pressured to stalk leader on fence. Kept 2nd to be 1L off pace at 600 M. Responded strongly after straightening. Kicked away to lead by 4Ls final 200 M. Easy win.
Began awkwardly. Behind midfield. Failed to avoid fallen runner after the 1000 M and dislodged its rider.
Average to begin. Midfield or better. 4 wide with no cover at 800 M. Made ground along the bend in a 3 wide position. Looked likely early straight. Failed to maintain effort and faded final 150 M.
First few out. Ridden to contest for lead in a 2 wide position. Claimed lead approaching final turn at 600 M. 1L ahead upon straightening. Over used early and weakened badly final 200 M.
Slow to begin. Ran comfortably around midfield on fence. Kept within 5Ls of leader until straightening. Responded only fairly under pressure and went on evenly till finish.
Jumped best. 3 wide making the first turn. Fell after the 1000 M and dislodged its rider. (Bled.)
Taken back across runners after the start. Checked severely at 1000 M. Tailed until straightening. Quickened when asked. Continued to make up ground to be closer at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Fair begin. Midfield or better on fence. 3Ls off lead at 1200 M. 4th to enter straight, 4Ls behind the pacesetter. Kept on nicely in straight. Found winner too good but held on for second.

Slow to begin. Ran in the rear section despite being hard ridden. 3rd last 2 wide at least 6Ls off leader at 800 M. Switched wide on track on straightening. Held run until 250 M but no extra thereafter.
Average begin. Midfield on fence. At least 5Ls off the lead at 800 M. 6th after straightening. Unable to quicken under the whip and weakened steadily final 300 M.
Quick start. Ridden to stay midfield. Checked at 1000 M. Shifted to the rear section at 800 M. 3rd last entering straight. 5Ls behind lead on fence. Failed to keep pace and found nothing in straight.
Got its head up on jumping. 2 wide behind midfield after first turn. Pressured to make ground on the bend in a 3 wide spot. Shifted wider on straightening. Improved steadily over closing stages.
Led or disputed lead until home straight. Weakened after being headed 400 M.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Kept on fairly in the straight but unable to threaten.

Slowly away but improved steadily along the rails to be near midfield at 800 M. Made a ground saving trip around the turn and had to switch out for a clear run after 400 M. Charged through rivals and was in control final 100 M.
Raced on fence in a prominent position behind the pace. Switched out at 400 M and kept on well to the line.

Raced behind leaders early. Niggled along to go forward and race 2-wide disputing lead making the turn. Took sole possession of the lead 400 M and remained in front before bowing out final 100 M with a minor placing.
Settled 3-wide behind midfield early stages. Dropped further back at the turn and was towards the rear on straightening. Took some time to quicken but made up some late ground inside final 200 M.
Disputed lead until 1000 M. 2-wide and 2Ls off the lead making the turn. Kept pace with leader at 200 M but unable to find extra to stay in contention final stages.
Crowded on jumping. Raced towards the rear and was last to enter home straight. Lacked a response when pressured and stayed on same pace to the finish.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Steadily made up ground in the straight.
Dropped back from widest draw and shifted to the rails. Raced in a rearward position until home straight. Only ran past tired runners in the straight.
Raced 3-wide and without cover at midfield. Kept within 3Ls of the leader making home turn but remained 3-wide. Unable to find more in the straight and weakened final 200 M.
Lacked the speed to race prominently, in rear bunch with cover but between 6Ls and 8Ls off pace through to home turn, no impression.
Slowly away, 2-wide in rear bunch about 7Ls off pace at 1200 M, 6Ls back and worse than midfield off final bend, stayed on pretty well late but never likely to run a place.
Awkward break but recovered to have the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or so through to home straight, all out to hold this position at the 200 M, weakened markedly close home.
Under pressure in rear early on, 6Ls down in 12th or so at 800 M, similarly placed off home turn, never dangerous.
Towards rear with cover between 6Ls and 8Ls off the pace until home straight, never on terms.
Midfield or slightly worse between 4Ls and 5Ls behind leader from 1000 M to homestretch, never threatened to get much closer.
Driven along to lead by 1L on fence at 1300 M, same margin clear at 800 M and turning for home, all out when grabbed by winner over 50 M out, still hung on for 2nd.
Mostly 3-back on fence in midfield about 4Ls off speed until straightening for home, over 2Ls down in 5th at the 200 M, quickened up well to lead over 50 M out.
2-wide and 4Ls behind leader in midfield at 1000 M, under pressure when 3Ls back in 5th entering home straight, 2Ls down in 3rd at the 200 M, always held by quinella pair.
3-wide no cover early on, under pressure at the 800 M when 2Ls off speed in 5th or so, struggling turning for home, eased a long way out.
2-wide and 1L off the speed in 2nd at 1300 M marker, over-raced in places, hung out on the circle and a neck down in 2nd at 400 M, one-paced thereafter.
Widest at first bend (1400 M out), always 4-wide without cover between 2Ls and 3Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th until home straight, retreated quickly.
Switched from widest gate to fence, 8Ls last at 1400 M, still towards rear turning for home, ran on well late to be nearest at the finish.
3-wide with cover outside winner in midfield 4Ls off the speed at the 800 M, lost position on circle and 4-wide entering straight when 8Ls down in 11th, gone over 200 M out.
3Ls off pace in 3rd and 2-wide at 1000 M, 1L down in 2nd at 800 M to leading at top of home straight, headed 250 M out, one-paced close home.
Disputed early lead, 2Ls off pace in 2nd at 1000 M, all out to lie up turning for home, soon well beaten.
Head up at 1400 M, 3-wide with cover when 4Ls off pace in midfield from 1000 M to home straight, never looked like improving from midfield position.
Settled in rear about 6Ls off pace and 3 or 4-wide with cover through to the 600 M, further behind entering straight, no chance at 300 M.
Jumped left exiting widest gate, pressed on to lead by 1L on fence at 1200 M, disputing lead at top of home straight, passed by about five rivals at 200 M, soon well held.
On fence in rear about 6Ls off pace at 1000 M, switched out wider off final bend when 5Ls down in 12th, ran on strongly and only just missed out on 2nd place.
3-wide no cover and 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 1000 M to the home turn, beaten over 200 M out.
Always 4-wide no cover, 3Ls down in 6th at 800 M, closer but still very wide turning for home, all out when over 2Ls behind at 200 M, faded late.
In rear about 8Ls off pace at the 800 M, no better off home turn, never got fully involved.
Better than midfield within 2Ls of the lead until home straight, picked up well to lead 250 M out, hung on dourly for pressure.
Prominent early on, 4Ls back on fence in 4th at 1000 M, 3Ls down in mid-pack turning for home, soon outpaced.
3-back on fence at 1200 M about 4Ls off pace, shuffled back at 800 M to be 6Ls off pace and short of room turning for home in 11th, still without much room at 200 M, soon well beaten.
2-wide and 4Ls back in midfield at the 800 M, 3Ls down still in mid-division off final bend, headway to be 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, always held by the winner.
Worse than midfield at least 5Ls off the speed until the 600 M, closer on straightening for home, 2Ls down in 4th at the 200 M, no extra inside final 100 M.
Towards rear. At least 7Ls back at 800 M. Made up some late ground despite steadying at 250 M and proving difficult to ride due to hanging in over the concluding stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Forward of midfield but trapped wide. Not a threat in straight.
Soon sat behind the leader. Kept on well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Slowly away. At tail. Made up a little late ground final 200 M.
Forward of midfield about 3 to 4Ls off the pace. Kept on well in straight but was always outpaced by the first pair.
Thereabout in 5th place about 3Ls back but proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Checked at 400 M. Not a factor thereafter.
In touch about 2Ls off the pace but trapped wide and without cover throughout. Ran on in straight until one-paced inside 100 M.
Soon led and kept on well to fend off 2nd horse inside 100 M.
2nd outside the leader from 1000 M. Kept on in straight until weakened 200 M out.
Towards rear. At least 8Ls back rounding the turn. Carried wide turning in. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Slowly away. Midfield at best. Dropped out rapidly 200 M out.
Slowly away. Soon moved up to midfield whilst proving difficult to settle. Ran on in straight and was 3rd briefly before finishing one-paced in the closing stages.
Midfield or worse. Dropped towards rear upon straightening.
Led field to 200 M. No extra.
Settled in rear. Ran on well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Ran on inside final 200 M to just get up on line.
Never far off. Quickened to hit front over 100 M out but caught final strides.
Wide in midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Never seen with a chance at the back. (Bled.)
Always prominent. Held every chance passing 200 M but unable to sustain effort nearing finish.
Settled in rear of midfield. Moderate headway along rails in straight before baulked passing 200 M.
Disputed lead on rails far side. Settled just off the pace rounding home bend. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening but baulked throughout final 200 M.
Settled in forward of midfield. Ran on steadily in straight before running out of room inside final 100 M.
Travelled towards rear. Only kept on at the one-pace in straight.
Midfield before dropped out home bend.
Settled in rear. Ran on stoutly under pressure in straight to be nearest at finish.
Always well there. Swamped when no extra under pressure nearing finish.

Average to begin, settled worse than midfield from wide alley 7 to 8Ls from front 2 wide, had fair run throughout, made 5 wide run on turn to make up good ground in straight. Good effort at first AWT run.
Away OK from outside alley, went forward but unable to cross, trapped 3 wide without cover 3Ls away throughout, always working to turn, spent force in straight and dropped out.

Broke well, pushed on to take up running, rolled to front at first turn and kept them going at a solid speed, held length advantage turning for home, tackled at 250 M and early effort took toll and weakened last 200 M.
Fastest into stride, 4 wide into first turn, unable to cross and trapped wide early, pushed on to race outside leader 1L away (speed good), hit lead at 250 M but workload told and weakened last bit.

Began only fairly, drifted back to worse than midfield 7 to 8Ls away on rails, pushed along to hold position, under pressure entering straight, stuck to paint and made steady ground last 200 M. (Steadied 100 M.)
Broke with field, ridden hard to take up prominent spot outside leader, raced 1 out 1 back 3Ls away in mid-section, under pressure on turn and showed nothing in straight.
Away well, unable to muster early speed and drifted back to 3rd last 3 wide, never really travelling and weakened right out from 600 M. (Bled.)
Jumped with them, showed good early speed to hold position behind the leader (good speed), travelled well throughout, eased out in straight and tried hard but couldn't quicken to seriously threaten.
Away fairly, unable to muster early speed and drifted back to race 4 back on rails 6Ls away, spent nothing in run, made good ground between runners in stretch to be closest at finish.

Broke with field, drifted back to last position 10 to 12Ls away, lobbed along at tail throughout, made run from 600 M with field to beat, made run widest in straight making good late ground. Set too great a task.
Began fairly, pushed along to maintain midfield position, raced 4Ls from frontrunners throughout, made 3 wide run into race and dashed well to hit lead briefly at 100 M. Went down fighting.
Began with them, restrained to obtain trail, settled midfield 2 wide 5Ls off lead, travelled well through middle stages, made 4 wide run on turn and came with strong run to overpower them last 100 M.
Began with field, restrained from wide alley to race 2nd from rear 9 to 10Ls away, had little to do throughout, under pressure on turn and only passed tired horses in the straight.

Slow to begin, pushed up to hold position 3 back on fence. 3 to 4Ls away, had run of race in mid-section, followed rails into straight, easing clear and made solid challenge, unable to match first two.
Settled in midfield. Came under pressure to challenge upon straightening. Only produced moderate headway without threatening.
Settled towards rear. Ran on well in straight to just get up on line.
Settled in rear. Made up some ground in straight.
Settled in forward of midfield. Not much room early in straight. Made no impression closing stages.
Always in last few.
Settled in rear of midfield. Did not find much room 200 M out. Produced moderate impression late.
Led first 400 M. Travelled 3 wide in prominent position from 1200 M until finding no extra over 200 M out.
Settled in rear. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Chased leaders to 300 M. No extra.
Soon took up running and led until overhauled 200 M out.
Well there to 200 M. No extra.
Close up. Did not find much room on inside in straight until after 200 M. Ran home one-paced.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. No extra.
Settled behind midfield. Quickened well shortly after straightening to hold 1L break 200 M out only to be pipped at post.

Fast away, restrained to find cover, raced just behind speed 1 out 1 back 2Ls away throughout, enjoyed good trip to turn, held up but got clear at 250 M and came late but found winner too good (checked last 100 M).
Average to begin, drifted back to last, raced 2 wide 9 to 10Ls from front runners, made 3 wide run from 600 M, had field to beat at 400 M, passed tired runners late.
Away well, challenged for early lead before restraining to race behind leader, had run of race and tracked well to turn, followed rails in straight but lacked turn of foot when required.

Slightly slow to begin, lacked early speed and settled on rails near rear 7 to 8Ls from speed, made run between horses at 500 M, in traffic until 300 M but made some late ground giving too great a start.

Away well, pushed along to settle 3 back on rails (3 to 4Ls away), spent nothing in run, eased out when entering straight, tried hard in straight but lacked an extra gear to match them over final 200 M.
Began with field, lacked early speed, settled 3rd from rear 8Ls away in a 2 wide spot, used little in mid-section, came 3 wide from 600 M, very one-paced in straight making little ground.
Broke with field, hard ridden to cross from wide alley to race outside leader, travelled well through mid-section, in mix in straight and carried wide after 300 M. Battled steadily thereafter.
Jumped well, showed good early speed to cross to lead, travelled well in front 1L clear, dictated terms to turn, drifted out in straight but always in control, won like a good horse (hand and heels).
Jumped with them, unable to slot in and forced to race 3 wide without cover 1 to 2Ls from leader, made challenges entering straight, bumped at 200 M and did well to stick on, given wide run.
Average to begin, hard ridden to hold spot 4 back on fence 5Ls off lead, travelled well on bit to turn, lost ground when they quickened but closed race off well to be nearest at finish.
Slow to begin, drove through to midfield spot, 3 wide with cover 4Ls from front runners, tracked well to turn to be 3Ls away, unable to quicken and weakened right out in straight.
Average to begin, settled in midfield 2 wide 5Ls away from lead, didn't settle in mid-section, under pressure entering straight, only battled away in straight.
Jumped with rest, caught 3 wide when unable to get in midfield 3 to 4 wide without cover throughout 4Ls away, wide entering straight, workload took its toll and only plugged to line.
Bounced out, took hold and restrained for cover, raced worse than midfield 3 wide 5Ls away, did plenty of work, tracked 4 wide on turn but only battled away in stretch.
Towards rear about 5Ls off the pace. Midfield turning in by saving ground along rail. Ran on steadily to snatch 2nd in the closing stages without threatening the winner.
Slowly away. At rear. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Went forward from wide draw to sit outside the leader. Kept on in straight until weakened 200 M out.
Midfield. Failed to make any impression in straight.
Around midfield but trapped wide and without cover all the way. Weakened badly 200 M from home.
Led to 200 M. Weakened badly thereafter.
Travelled nicely in 3rd or 4th place 2Ls back along back straight. Tracked leader turning in but unable to quicken final 200 M and lost 2nd in the closing stages.
Midfield or better about 3 to 4Ls back. 2Ls down upon straightening. Kept on steadily without threatening placed horses.
Travelled kindly in 3rd or 4th place 1 to 2Ls off the lead. Niggled along in the back straight. Under pressure 400 M out to improve on the outside. Pulled away to win unchallenged 200 M out.
Behind midfield or worse and trapped 3-deep. Widest turning in. Made up some ground final 250 M but never looked likely to get a placing.
Towards rear. Hung in after straightening. Never a factor.
Very slowly away. At back and hung out most the way. Made up some late ground final 200 M but simply had too much to do.
Broke well. Kept in a prominent position on fence, 3Ls off pace at 600 M. Saved ground along rails to be 2nd entering straight. Responded nicely on the inside final 200 M, but found winner too good.
Fair to begin. Held back across behind runners at rear. 7Ls behind pacesetter on fence at 600 M. 3rd last to enter straight on the inside. Responded well on the inside to be nearest at finish.
Broke with them. Ridden early to keep pace. 1 off 2Ls back at 5th approaching the turn. Switched very wide on straightening. Ran on moderately early in straight before fading gradually.
Fair to begin. Ridden early to stalk leader in a 2 wide spot. 1L off pacesetter at 600 M. Over used early. Shifted ground from 400 M on and very weak in straight.

Average begin. Towards the rear early on, made up ground to be 4Ls off pace on fence at 600 M. Saved ground along rails to be 5th after straightening. Responded strongly final 200 M and took charge 50 M out to win readily.
Fair jump. Taken back and kept 2nd last. 2 wide 8Ls back midway. Switched very wide on straightening. Made some late headway final 50 M. Closest at finish.

Fair begin. Not enough early speed to keep up. Ran in the rear section. 2 wide 7Ls back midway. 4th last after straightening. One paced in the middle of the track. Blundered and checked badly at 100 M.
Fair to begin. Raced handy. 2 wide at least 2Ls off lead at 600 M. Shifted 3 wide at 400 M and switched wider on straightening. Found nothing after 300 M.
Jumped best. Good early speed to lead on rail. Set steady pace throughout. Still led by at least 1L inside final 200 M. Fought on hard and managed to hold on to 3rd placing.
Broke with them. 1 off with cover midfield, 4Ls from leader at 800 M. Failed to show any acceleration after shifting into clear after 300 M.
Fair to begin. Outpaced early. Tailed throughout. At least 10Ls behind leader at 600 M. Similar taking home and did not get much closer.
Average out. Slightly behind midfield. 2 wide 5Ls off speed at 700 M. Improved steadily along rail rounding home. Battled on fairly over concluding stages without threatening.
Dropped back from a wide draw to race at the rear. Last to enter home straight and closed the race off fairly.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Steadily moved out after straightening and picked up nicely at 200 M. Swept home strongly and grab win final stages.

Jumped well and among leaders early. Settled prominently behind the pace back straight. Under the stick making home turn and was a length off into the straight. Kept on in the straight but unable to turn up a notch final stages.
Jumped well but was outpaced by leaders. Raced on fence at midfield. Niggled along making home turn and ran into some traffic near 300 M. Stayed on well closing stages for a minor placing.
Took the lead at 1000 M and went into home straight with a length's advantage. Headed near 200 M and weakened out of contention.
Missed the jump but was ridden along to get back to race behind midfield. Continued in similar position making the turn but only remained on same pace in the straight.
3-wide and better than midfield. Kept within 2Ls of the leader making the turn but remained 3-wide. Tired inside final 200 M.

Among leaders early. Tracked leader in a 2-wide spot back straight and was a length down on straightening. Moved in front near 200 M and had a clear lead 100 M. Kept on well but failed to hold off a late charging rival.
Jumped awkwardly and dropped back to the fence. Remained racing along the rails in a rearward position until home straight. Stayed on same pace to the line.
Slowly away, received check on 1st turn, raced towards the rear until home straight. Only ran past a beaten runner.
Jumped fairly and raced 2-wide better than midfield. Niggled along making the turn but hung badly. Steadily faded in the straight.
Eased back from a wide draw and raced behind midfield. 2-wide making home turn and swung out to make a run on straightening. Kept on without threatening.
Always 4-wide no cover, about 1L or so off pace in 4th or 5th until the 600 M, hung out badly on the circle and 6-wide (widest) when 5Ls back in 10th into stretch, soon tailed off.
2-wide when keen and racing ungenerously at 800 M about 4Ls off pace in 9th, a little further back when 5-wide turning for home, soon well beaten, very weak effort.
Mostly 3-wide but with cover about 2Ls off the speed in 4th until home straight entrance, 3Ls back in 3rd at the 200 M, kept on at same pace.
Slowly away, hard ridden and 10Ls last as early as 1000 M out, always detached, poor effort.
Settled one from rear about 6Ls off pace down the back stretch, 4Ls down in 8th entering straight and same passing 200 M, ran on quite well late to go into 2nd place 30 M out.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at the 800 M, struggling to preserve this prominent position off final bend, hindered when swamped over 200 M out.
3-back on fence in or around midfield about 3Ls behind leader until home straight, plugged on modestly.
Best away from widest gate but opted to settle 3-wide with cover about 3Ls off pace in mid-div through to final bend, one-paced thereafter.
2-wide about 3Ls behind leader in midfield right through to homestretch, always outpaced by principals.
5Ls off pace in 10th at the 800 M, ridden along in 11th when still 5Ls back, ran on fairly well past several one-paced rivals to be nearest at the finish.
Slowly away but quickly recovered to be about 2Ls off pace in 3rd or so through to home turn despite becoming unbalanced 500 M, clear 2nd about 2Ls down at 200 M, lost 2nd final 30 M.
Led by 1L on fence from 800 M to top of home straight, picked up well to go 2Ls clear passing 200 M, always in command.
Raced too freely when 5Ls off the speed in 7th about 1500 M out, 4Ls down in 7th on turning for home, faded out steadily.

Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd through to the 600 M, under pressure to quicken up entering homestretch, disputing 2nd a neck off pace at 200 M just lost out on a placing in a tight finish close home.
7Ls back in 10th passing winning post for first time, 6Ls last on the swing for home, made some fair late ground, never nearer.
7Ls off pace in rear passing winning post for first time, 5Ls back but 6-wide (widest of all) heading for home stretch, ran on strongly (hung in a little) out widest of all to lead close home.
Awkward break, always 2-wide and worse than midfield about 5Ls or 6Ls behind pacesetter until final bend, always outpaced by leading group.
On fence 6Ls off the pace in 8th early on, 5Ls down in 9th turning for home, awkwardly placed with 250 M to race but still ran on well to gain a place late in a very tight finish.
On fence 4Ls behind leader in 5th with 1400 M to race, same margin behind in 6th turning for home. Ran on determinedly in straight only to be outpaced by the winner close home.

Always 3-wide no cover, 5Ls back in 6th passing winning post first time, steadily improved to 2Ls down in 5th entering home straight out 5-deep, a neck back at 200 M, narrowly missed out on a placing final strides.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 2nd from 1600 M to 600 M out, 1L down in 2nd at the 400 M, led 300 M out, headed about 150 M out, lost a place inside final 50 M.
Set very slow tempo leading by about 2Ls on fence from 1800 M to 600 M, headed at top of home straight, swamped 200 M out, very weak.
3Ls off speed in 4th 2-wide from 1400 M to 600 M, ridden along 2Ls down in 4th into homestretch, every chance when 1L down in 4th at 200 M, failed to find an extra gear.
Midfield or worse. Ran on a bit early straight before finishing one-paced final 200 M.
No speed despite ridden along. At back and never in the race. (See Racing Incidents.)

Ridden forward. Trapped 3-wide and without cover 1st turn. Allowed to go on to be 1 out and 1 back off the leader from 1100 M. Hit front briefly upon straightening before being outsprinted by the first pair 100 M out.
Towards rear. Wide turning in. Not a threat in straight.
Towards rear. Some 10Ls back at 1000 M. Improved on the outside rounding the turn to be in midfield but widest turning in. Ran on steadily to be closest at finish.
Led to 200 M. Weakened steadily thereafter.
Forward of midfield about 4 to 5Ls back from 1000 M. One-paced in straight and found no extra 200 M from home.
Midfield or worse and proved difficult to settle whilst racing wide and without cover. Hung in upon straightening and checked off heels at 200 M. Not a threat thereafter.
Slowly away. Towards rear. Jumped to midfield on the inside rounding home bend. Ran on well final 200 M to be nearest at finish but always held by the winner.
Tracked leader on rail about 1 to 2Ls back. Unable to find sufficient room to improve along the rail upon straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield or worse. Towards rear upon straightening. Kept on one-paced.
Went forward from wide draw and settled in 4th place about 2 to 3Ls back from 1000 M. Responded well 250 M out and always managed to hold off 2nd horse.
Settled in rear. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield to straight. Kept on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Settled in last few. Quickened well into straight to assert authority over 150 M out.
Midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Mainly in rear of midfield to straight. Made no impression after straightening.
Led early. Chased leaders to straight. Kept on one pace without quickening.
Towards rear. Ran on past beaten horses.
Well there. Hit front briefly passing 200 M out but soon swamped.
Always in rear. (Lame next morning.)
Well there. Moved up to lead approaching 1000 M bend. Dropped out tamely over 200 M out.
Always prominent. Fought on steadily under pressure but outsprinted close to home.
Never far off to straight. Failed to quicken under pressure.
Away well, showed good early speed to cross from widest alley and take up lead, kept them going at good speed in front, held lead until 100 M mark but early effort told and just nailed on line.
Slow to begin, ridden up to take up midfield spot 3 back on fence 3-4Ls away, didn't settle well, saved ground following rails into straight and chased strongly to be closest at finish.
Average to begin and checked early, drifted back to 2nd last 3-wide 7Ls away from leaders, always working throughout, hard ridden in straight and made no impression.

Average to begin, restrained early to settle in rearward position on rails, raced 5 back on fence 7-8Ls from leader, gave big start on turn, made up large amount of ground from impossible spot. (See Racing Incidents.)

Bounced out well, restrained to obtain cover, had cover midfield early but raced 3 wide (no cover) from 600 M, came with run 4-5 wide on turn, tried hard in straight but could only hold ground without threatening.
Fairly away, drove throughout to hold position behind the leader, had run of race throughout, received dream split on turn, lacked dash to capitalise and only held ground to line.
Broke with them, lacked early toe to cross, trapped 3 wide midfield 4-5Ls away with cover, travelled well to turn, didn't have 100% clear running in straight but drove hard to snatch 3rd when clear.
Fairly away, lacked early dash and settled in rearward spot 5Ls away from front runners, under pressure approaching turn, very one-paced in straight and showed nothing to line.
Average to begin, drove through to be in midfield early, drifted back to settle 2 wide 6Ls away, under pressure entering straight, showed no turn of foot last 200 M and plugged to line.
Jumped with them, caught wide early, raced 4 wide without cover throughout, always working to turn, came widest in straight and held ground well despite wide run.

Jumped with them, showed speed to take up position outside leader (good clip) under pressure on turn 1 length away, stuck to task well in straight and kept coming to snatch victory on line. More improvement to come.
Fast away, showed speed to cross to near rails, raced 1 out 1 back 2Ls away thereafter, enjoyed fair trip to turn, under hard riding early in straight, kept giving to be right in finish.
1 to 2Ls off the speed until weakened 200 M out.
1 to 2Ls off the pace. Hung in throughout and proved difficult to ride. Nothing left inside 200 M.
1 to 2Ls off the pace. Hung in throughout and proved difficult to ride. Weakened 200 M out.
Slowly away. At back. Never in the race.
About 4Ls off the pace in midfield. Nothing left inside 200 M.
Slowly away. At rear. Never a factor.
Soon well there. Hung in and proved difficult to ride from 600 M. Unable to go with first pair final 100 M and lost 3rd in the closing stages.
Always 4 to 5Ls off the speed before sprinting home strongly final 100 M to be nearest at finish.
Led or disputed lead. Won easily going away final 100 M despite hanging in from 200 M.
Well there to 100 M after hanging in and proving difficult to ride from 600 M. No match for winner in the run home but did enough to secure 2nd.
Blundered on jumping and outpaced early stages. Unable to keep pace under pressure. 3rd last 3 wide with cover at 800 M. 5Ls back on straightening. Failed to make impact.

Slow to begin. Ridden along out of the gates and raced 2 wide no better than midfield. Pressured on turn. 4th last turning in. Steadily made ground in straight but unable to threaten. Closest at finish.
Broke well. Showed good early pace to take up running. Had easy trip to turn on fence. Led field until straightening. Unable to quicken and surrendered the lead early straight. Weakened thereafter.
Average to begin. Raced in the rear section. Pressured at 600 M but no response to riding. At least 6Ls behind leader on straightening. Dropped out under pressure in straight.

Broke well. Raced prominently on fence under pressure. Niggled along rounding home turn to be within a length of leader whilst hanging out. 4th to enter straight. Failed to keep pace and weakened final 200 M.
Good start. Kept behind midfield, 4Ls off lead on fence until straightening. Travelled well on turn but failed to sprint when pressured. Kept on evenly without improving position.

Broke well. Showed pace to take up forward position outside leader. Remained half length off pace until straight. Kept on well and took lead briefly upon straightening. Failed to match strides with top pair final 100 M.

Average to begin. Quickly into first few. Took up a 2 deep position before checking at 700 M. Continued to hang out mid stages. 1L back after straightening. Fought on to hold some chance but found winner too strong.
Last one out and was checked shortly after. Outpaced early despite being hard ridden. Last to enter straight. Never seemed likely.
Settled nicely around midfield until home straight. 5th to turn in. Responded well under pressure inside 250 M. Hit front 150 M out and held off challengers.
Jumped well. Raced handy, 2 off within 2Ls back early stages. Checked and hampered wide at 700 M. 3Ls off lead on straightening. Failed to quicken and faded gradually.
Broke with them. Raced comfortably around midfield. Forced 4 wide midway. Switched wider onto the track entering home. Same paced till finish.
Settled on fence in midfield position. Kept on fairly in the straight to make the frame.
Outpaced early but settled prominently on fence behind the pace. Stayed on fairly but unable to keep pace with top pair in the straight.
Off slowly and trailed field until the turn. Ridden along making home turn but remained towards the rear on straightening. Made no impression in the straight.
Jumped well but gradually dropped to rear section. Niggled along to keep pace rounding the turn and trailed field into home straight. Only ran past a beaten runner.
Off slowly and raced on fence in rear section. Made up ground saving trip around the turn. Caught in traffic for some distance near 200 M but finished the race off well and made up some late ground.
3-wide and was within 3Ls of the leader at 800 M. Kept similar position on straightening but unable to turn up a notch in the straight. Weakened steadily final stages.
Kept alongside winner in the lead most of the way. Continued to match strides with winner before losing touch inside final 100 M.
Ridden along out of the gates but was outpaced. Raced no worse than midfield until straightening. Kept on steadily in the straight.
Settled 3-wide at midfield. Lacked a response when placed under pressure in the straight and weakened closing stages.
Outpaced and raced in rear section. Made up some ground making the turn but only maintained same pace in the home straight.
Jumped only fairly and was niggled to take the lead. Held a 1/2L advantage most of the way before shaking off its pursuer inside final 100 M.
Wide and without cover in a forward position. Commenced to lose ground making the turn at 600 M and then weakened in the straight.
Better than midfield between 2Ls and 3Ls off pace in a 3-wide position with cover until final bend, struggling at the 200 M and weakened out tamely late.
Always worse than midfield and no better than 5Ls behind the speed at any stage.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls behind leader through to straightening for home, didn't have much room to manoeuvre from 300 M to 200 M when 3Ls down in 11th, always held by principals.
8Ls last at 1200 M, 6Ls back in 13th into stretch, good headway out wide to be 2Ls down in 7th at 200 M, kept on finding, swerved sharply right final 100 M arguably costing victory.
4-wide no cover with head up about 3Ls back in 6th at 1000 M, same turning for home, kept on stoutly for a place.
Slowest away, checked at 900 M when 3-back on fence about 4Ls off pace in 9th or so, marginally closer entering homestretch and 2Ls down in 6th at 200 M, found no more.
3-wide no cover and a neck down in 2nd at 1000 M, under pressure to lead off final bend, all out when headed 100 M out and lost out on a place final 10 M.
Slowly away, 8Ls off pace in rear at 1000 M, same margin behind and detached when straightening for the line, very poor effort.
3-wide with cover in mid-division about 3Ls off the pace until home straight, failed to quicken up and very weak inside final 200 M. (Lost plate.)
Well placed on fence about 2Ls off speed in 3rd or 4th until home straight, switched out to challenge at 250 M and led 100 M out, stayed on well.
Led by 1L on fence at 1200 M, a neck clear at 1000 M, headed at top of home straight, still a neck down in 2nd at the 200 M but soon swamped.
Checked at 900 M when 2-wide and 3Ls down in midfield, similar margin behind when tight for room from 400 M to 250 M, no extra late.
Towards rear 2-wide and no better than 5Ls off pace until home straight, improved to be 2Ls back in midfield with 200 M to race, never threatened to draw any closer.
Enjoyed a good trip 2-wide with cover and within 2Ls of the speed in 3rd or 4th until final bend, hard ridden to maintain this proximity at 200 M, rather one-paced overall. (Bled.)
Settled towards rear about 7Ls off the speed early, crept closer to be 5Ls off pace and 5-wide turning for home, ran on strongly to snatch place late on.
Keen when 3Ls back in 3rd, pressed on to be a neck down in 2nd at 800 M, led at top of homestretch, 1L clear at 200 M, stayed on for strong pressure, just clung on, good tactical ride.
3-back on fence about 3Ls behind lead in 6th or 7th through to entering home straight, stayed on pretty well but always just held from placing.
Towards rear about 5Ls or 6Ls off the pace through to final bend when hard ridden to improve, never likely to take a hand in the finish.
Led on fence at 1400 M, soon headed and gave up rails run at 1200 M, 2-wide and 2Ls back in 5th at the 800 M and same turning off final bend, one-paced thereafter.
Always on and off the bridle towards the rear, couldn't muster any early speed and was 7Ls off pace in 11th at 1200 M, made some minor late impression but never a serious candidate.
Slowest away, 3-wide no cover in rear 7Ls off pace at 1000 M, 4-wide no cover on the circle and 6-wide (widest of all) taking home turn when 6Ls off pace in rear, no impression.
8Ls last at 1000 M, 4-wide off home turn when 6Ls off the speed, stayed on fairly down centre of the track to be nearest at the finish.
4-back on fence about 4Ls or 5Ls behind leaders until midfield and same at 200 M, plugged away and nearest at finish without threatening.
Led by 2Ls on fence at 1200 M, a neck clear at 800 M, headed at top of home straight and emptied right out, eased down at 200 M. (Blowing heavily and mucopus.)
On fence 4Ls behind in 4th at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 4th entering homestretch when under the whip, very one-paced.
2-wide in or around midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls off the pace until home straight, still 3Ls down in 6th at the 200 M, uncorked very strong late dash to miss winning by a short-head.
3-wide no cover when 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1000 M, a neck down in 3rd when 3-wide entering homestretch, under 1L down in 2nd at 200 M but tired and swamped final 100 M.
2-wide about 3Ls off the speed in midfield at 1000 M, 2Ls back but posted 4-wide turning for home still in midfield, 2Ls down in 3rd at the 200 M, had every chance to place.
Soon led and proved difficult to settle at 1200 M. Kept on well in straight but got outsprinted by the first pair inside 50 M.
Got back after being crowded at start. Last from 700 M some 9Ls back. Kept on without threatening in straight.
2nd or 3rd within 2Ls behind the lead. Ran on determinedly in straight to snatch win final strides.
Never better than midfield. Not a threat in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield or a little worse despite being ridden along. Under pressure rounding the bend to be in midfield turning in. Found nothing in straight.
Towards rear. At least 8Ls back at 1000 M. Wide turning in. Made no impression in straight.
Midfield and on rail. Shifted out upon straightening but never got going.
Crowded at start. Towards rear. 7 to 8Ls back rounding the turn. Around midfield turning in by saving ground along rail. Ran on steadily without posing a threat in straight.
Always at rear. Never a factor.
Settled in 4th place. 4Ls back at 1000 M. Headway rounding bend on the outside to be 2Ls down turning in. Ran on gamely in straight to be nearest at finish.
Slowly away. At rear about 10Ls back rounding the turn. Widest turning in. Made up good late ground to be nearest at finish.
In 5th or 6th place. 4Ls back at 1000 M. Took closer order rounding the turn but got held up for a considerable distance after 400 M. Made up good ground final 200 M to just miss a place.
Jumped best before settling in midfield but trapped wide and without cover. Not a factor in straight.
Prominent 2nd or 3rd within 2Ls off the lead. Weakened quickly 200 M out.
Well there. Found no extra passing 200 M.
Never far off. Improved to hold some chance early in straight but found winner too strong inside final 200 M.
Never better than midfield. Kept on well in straight.
Wide in midfield to straight. No extra.
Settled towards rear. Ran on quite well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Jumped well. Settled just off the pace. Gradually weakened in straight.
Raced wide in midfield. Quickened well inside final 300 M to take charge shortly after 200 M. Easily.
Soon took up running and led to 200 M. Weakened under pressure.
Never far off to straight. Gradually weakened.
Always struggling at the back.
Did not jump well. Soon picked up to rear of midfield. Kept on well in straight.
Trailed field to straight. Produced good late impression inside final 250 M. Did best work at finish.
Settled behind midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Niggled along in prominent position early. Steadied to midfield coming out of back straight. Ran on steadily without threatening in the run home.
Average into stride, hard ridden to share lead on rails, pressured throughout at good clip, held narrow advantage into straight, early effort told and found little last 200 M.

Began with them, pushed along to hold position just behind leaders on rail 1L away, had run of race to turn, angled clear in straight but lacked another gear to figure and could only hold ground to line.
Away with field ridden up to hold prominent spot 1 out 1 back 1L away from leaders, eased 3 wide on turn, chased steadily in straight making ground without threatening winner.
Away well from wide alley, posted 3 wide when unable to cross to rails, raced 3 wide 3 to 4Ls away without cover, did plenty of work throughout, came 4 wide on turn but set too great a task.
Jumped with line, trapped wide from awkward alley. Settled 3 wide midfield 4 to 5Ls away with cover, kept coming in straight with run between horses to narrowly miss 3rd.
Average to begin, driven along to take up midfield position on rails 4 to 5Ls away, always chasing in run, followed paint into straight but unable to finish race off.
Jumped with them from outside alley, unable to cross and drifted back to midfield, 3 and 4 wide without cover throughout, always working, wide run took toll and plugged to line.
Jumped with them, restrained to sit just off speed, held spot 2 wide 3 to 4Ls away, had good run to turn, obtained split at 300 M and chased strongly but unable to match winner.
Broke well, showed good speed to challenge for early lead, held lead narrowly on outside, rolled along at good pace, took charge at 200 M and kept going to score an easy win.
Slow to begin, hard ridden early, checked at 1000 M and lost ground, raced in last position thereafter, 8Ls from leaders, under pressure entering straight, passed only tired runners in run home.
Began only fairly, hard ridden early, settled 2nd last 2 wide 7 to 8Ls away, always pushed along, unable to respond at business end and battled to line.

Average to begin, hard ridden to maintain position just worse than midfield, raced on rails 6 to 7Ls away in middle stages, made run between horses in straight closing strongly late to be closest at finish.
Never better than midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in last few. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Mainly in midfield far side. Gave ground steadily coming out of back straight. Made no show thereafter.
Quickly rushed up far side to chase behind leaders. Remained same into straight but soon weakened.
Mainly 3-wide in forward of midfield. Ran on early in straight to hold some chance 200 M out but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Ran on to challenge shortly after straightening but outsprinted close to home.
Settled behind midfield. Switched out for a run upon straightening. Made moderate progress under pressure early on before one-paced closing stages.
Settled mainly in midfield. Obtained split about 300 M out. Responded well under pressure to assert authority closing stages.
Well there to 200 M. Faded gradually.
Settled in rear. Commenced move approaching home turn. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Prominent to straight. Faded gradually.
Attempted to make all. Overhauled inside final 100 M.
Always well behind.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses in straight.

Broke with them, restrained from widest alley to obtain cover, raced 2 to 3 wide in last place 9 to 10Ls from leaders, made 4 wide run into straight, lacked the dash when required and coasted to line.
Began with them, unable to slot in and trapped 4 wide early, raced in rearward spot 7 to 8Ls away, 4 wide throughout, made run widest in straight making some late ground from impossible position.
Standard to begin, settled close to rear 2 wide 7 to 8Ls away, raced between runners throughout, made run along fence in straight, made up good ground giving too great a start.

Fastest to break, raced outside the leader but 4 horses wide early, pushed on to lead shade inside horse throughout. Kept going at even clip, in mix until 250 M but couldn't sustain effort and weakened out. Very wayward.

Broke only fairly, restrained to find cover, settled 3 back on rails 4 to 5Ls away, spent nothing in run, travelled well to turn easing clear on top of straight, didn't stop trying in straight making up good ground late.
OK to begin, pushed forward early to take up spot behind leader, had dream run 3Ls away on rails spending nothing to turn, followed paint in straight but raced very one paced over concluding stages.

Away well, showed good early speed to take up running, kept them going at even clip, pressured throughout but held inside running to turn, headed at 250 M and early work took toll, weakening out of it last 200 M.
Average to begin, lacked early toe, settled midfield on rails 7 to 8Ls away, niggled along from 600 M, hard ridden in straight, weakened right out of it.
Average into stride as usual, hard ridden to hold spot early, positioned midfield 2 wide 6Ls from leaders throughout, pushed along approaching turn, angled clear in straight and made steady ground.
Fast into stride, taken hold of to obtain trail 1 out 1 back just off pace, relaxed well 2Ls away throughout, gained split midway in straight and dashed well to score easy win. Still more to come.
Fair to begin, lacked early speed, drifted back to worse than midfield, raced 3 wide 6Ls away throughout, always working in middle stages, made some ground in straight but workload took its toll.
Average to begin, beaten for early speed, settled near last on rails 9 to 10Ls away, had field to beat on turn and under hard riding, lacked usual dash and only plugged home.
Broke well, pushed forward early to take close order, raced 2 wide 4Ls away throughout, trailed eventual winner in straight, stuck to task well making good ground without threatening.

Jumped only fairly, lacked early speed, settled midfield 3 wide 4 to 5Ls away from pace, relaxed well but covered extra ground to turn. Under pressure in straight and lacked a response when asked (lame morning after).
Improving on rails in midfield when badly checked 1400 M out dropping to rear. Remained same into straight when not clear run early on. Obtained split passing 200 M and made some impression late.
Settled towards rear. Snuck up to midfield on inside turning in. Sustained progress down inner of straight to reach 2nd late only to find winner too good on grandstand side of the track.
Prominent to 400 M. Weakened.
Mainly 3 wide in midfield. Forced wider but closer rounding home bend. Gradually faded from close-up 3rd into straight.
Disputed lead to 600 M. Weakened.
Settled at the back. Made up good ground inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Forward of midfield to straight. Weakened gradually.
Always prominent. Hit front briefly over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort close to home.
Travelled wide in rear of midfield. Taken to grandstand side of track upon straightening and cruised home for a comfortable victory.
Settled in last few. Ran on steadily inside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Mainly in midfield to straight. Faded.
Mainly in rear of midfield. Went wide into straight for clear run. Ran home one-paced.
Held narrow advantage to 300 M. Soon overhauled.
Midfield to straight. Faded under pressure.
Slow into stride. Towards rear about 6Ls off the pace at 1000 M. Midfield about 4Ls back turning in. Unable to quicken in straight and weakened 100 M out.
In touch early. Midfield or better from the first turn. Shifted out upon straightening and made up some ground final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Slowly away. Ridden forward to be 4th or 5th from 1200 M but always trapped wide and without cover. Had enough and soon packed up after 600 M.
2nd or 3rd from 1200 M. Commenced to give ground upon straightening.
Towards rear from 1000 M some 7 to 8Ls behind the lead. Failed to make any impression in straight.
Soon dropped towards rear from wide draw. Under pressure turning in. One-paced whilst hanging in and proving difficult to ride in straight.
Sat behind the leader in 2nd or 3rd position 2Ls down at 600 M. Kept on one-paced in straight without posing a threat to the first pair.
Soon dropped to the back from wide draw. Save ground along rail to be 5Ls down upon straightening. Made up some late ground but simply had too much to do.
Towards rear from the first turn. Not a threat in straight.
Led. Kept on in straight whilst hanging out and proving difficult to ride. Caught by the winner when already one-paced close home.
Never far off around 2 to 3Ls off the lead. Kept on without threatening in straight.
3 back on rail around 3 to 4Ls off the lead. Niggled along to maintain position along back straight. Ran on determinedly in straight to snatch win final strides.
Average begin. Ridden up to track leader on the outside. Under pressure on the bend to stay within 1L back rounding home. Battled hard to keep pace, but found no extra when asked.
Slowly away. Pushed hard to make ground on fence. 3Ls back approaching the turn. 5th to enter straight. Kicked home strongly final 200 M to capture the win by a narrow margin. Good effort.
Fairly away. Pushed to stay slightly behind midfield. Checked at 600 M whilst making ground. 5Ls behind leader on straightening. Shifted wide into straight and finished powerfully. Closest at finish.
Jumped well from the wide gate. Taken back to race 2 wide rear section. Amongst the last few rounding home. Produced fair effort when pressured in straight. Made some late ground.
Jumped well. Set good pace to straight on rail. Headed by 1L on straightening. Still 2Ls clear 200 M out. Worn down over final 100 M. Outpaced by first pair final stages and held on to 3rd.
Broke well. Outpaced by front runners early. Never better than midfield. Wide with no cover throughout the race. Switched wide on straightening. Very weak in straight.

Slow to break. Failed to keep pace. Rearward on rail until home turn. Made ground on the bend without effort. Closed strongly with winner final 200 M. Hit front briefly inside final 50 M, but lacked dash for the win.
Away only fairly. Ridden up to hold position on fence. 2Ls back at 600 M. Ridden along on the bend, but failed to keep pace with leader. Couldn't sustain effort and weakened gradually.

Away well. Raced behind pace in midfield spot. Checked at 600 M. 2 wide 3Ls away rounding the turn. Responded strongly down the middle of track. Improved steadily final 200 M. Made a late challenge for 3rd.
Slow to begin. Couldn't muster much speed under pressure. No response to riding throughout. Always far off pacesetter. Soon beaten and tailed off. (Heart irregularity.)
Broke with them. 3 wide midfield with no cover until midway. Yielded ground on turn and didn't respond under the whip. Unable to pick up and dropped out quickly. Never really competitive.
Average away. Settled in prime position 1 off 3Ls from leader. 4th entering straight. Did not show enough dash in straight. Still in front until closing stages but tired late.
Jumped well and led briefly at the start. Unable to match pace with leaders at 1000 M and settled behind the pace until home straight. Kept on fairly in the straight to make the frame.
Disputed lead before opening up a length's advantage making home turn. Unable to find extra on straightening and weakened inside final 200 M.
Outpaced at the start and lost further ground after crowding at 1000 M. Detached from main field until straightening. Ran past tired runners in the straight.
Dropped to rear section from wide draw. Swung wide turning in and ran on without threatening.
Disputed lead until 600 M. 2-wide and kept within a length of the pace making the turn but weakened shortly after straightening.
Raced wide and without cover behind midfield. Continued to be wide making home turn and only ran past a beaten runner in the straight.
Took a position on fence behind midfield. Saved ground making home turn and rallied nicely along the rails in the home straight to be closest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly and raced on fence at midfield. Hugged the rails making the turn and switched out on straightening for a run. Ran on well in the straight for a minor placing.
Jumped well but was allowed to drop to midfield. Pressured at 400 M and responded nicely on straightening. Charged to the front near 150 M and kept on well to finish.
Dropped to the rear from widest draw and raced in a rearward position until straightening. Made a strong rally before getting stuck in traffic for some distance final 100 M.
Tracked leaders in a 2-wide position. 2Ls off the pace on straightening, tightened at 250 M and only stayed on same pace thereafter.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. Niggled along making home turn and switched out to make a run on straightening. Closed the race off fairly.
3-wide no cover early on, got in 2-wide 1L off pace in 2nd at 1100 M, kept on to lead at top of home stretch, headed at 200 M and wilted quickly.
2-wide and 3Ls behind lead in 4th at 1100 M, came under pressure to hold position on the circle, 5Ls down in 7th on straightening, didn't trouble leaders.
Switched from widest gate to fence and 9Ls last at 1200 M, 8Ls last off the final corner, plugged on late past some tired rivals.
5Ls down in 9th at 1100 M when 2-wide, improved out wider from 700 M to be 4Ls down in 6th tackling final bend, retreated 250 M out.
Always one from rear and never better than 6Ls off the pace, never figured.
4Ls down in 7th when 2-wide at 1100 M, hard ridden when a little further back and 3-wide off home turn, posed little threat to principals.
Ideally placed on fence 2Ls off speed in 3rd until home turn, peeled out to lead at 200 M, always doing enough to win.
3-back on fence about 3Ls behind speed in 5th until straightening for home, over 1L down in 4th at 200 M, kept on quite well but winner had his measure.
5Ls back on fence in 8th from 1100 M to entering home stretch, 3Ls down in 6th at the 200 M, one-paced.
Best away and led by 1L 1400 M out, always tended to over-race and hang away from the fence, never appeared comfortable, headed at top of home straight, beaten when spooking at 200 M, eased down.
Slowest away, switched from wide gate to fence, 8Ls down in 11th at the 1200 M, 6Ls down in 10th off home turn, headway to be 4Ls back in midfield at 200 M, kept on fairly to reach the frame.
Mostly 3-wide without cover, about 4Ls down in 6th until home straight, picked up well to 1L down in 3rd at 200 M despite hanging out, weakened final 100 M.
Awkward break, 3-wide no cover so pressed on to be 1L down in 2nd out 2-wide from 1000 M to home stretch, found very little off the bridle and swamped 200 M out.
10Ls last at the 1200 M, under pressure and detached taking final turn, never a factor.
Away well and had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls off the speed through to final bend, 1L down in 2nd at the 200 M, one-paced when it mattered and lost a place inside final 50 M.
About 5Ls back in 8th and 2-wide from 1100 M to home stretch, 3Ls down at 200 M in 8th, didn't have much room and not fully tested inside closing stages, nearest at finish.
Didn't become fully involved, 7Ls down in 10th at 1100 M, 6Ls down in 10th at final bend, made some minor late ground without overtaking any rivals.
On fence 4Ls off the pace in 7th at the 1100 M, 5Ls down at the final bend in similar position, made some fair late ground but always held by more prominently placed rivals.
Best away and soon led on fence, always 1L clear until home straight, stayed on gamely for pressure to hang on.
3Ls down in 6th when 2-wide at 1100 M, 4Ls down at 800 M and same margin down in 6th when 3-wide off final bend, unbalanced when 2Ls down at 200 M, recovered well to snatch a place.
Always 3-wide no cover, 7Ls off the speed in 9th at 1100 M, under strong driving when 5Ls down in 7th tackling final turn, weakened quickly.
Switched from widest gate to fence, 8Ls down in 11th at the 1100 M, 7Ls down entering home straight, still had 5Ls to find at 200 M, ran on strongly along fence late to be nearest at the finish.
Keen when 3Ls off speed in 5th at 1100 M, similarly placed on the turn for home, went for an inside run at 250 M that did not eventuate, switched back out, ran on well but post came too soon.
