Awkward break and a bit sluggish early, 3Ls off pace in 4th and 2-wide from 1200 M to home bend, kept on fairly well for pressure despite never really threatening a victory.
Midfield. Proved difficult to settle and bumped the rail at 1800 M. Under pressure rounding home bend but found nothing in straight.
Towards rear. Dropped completely out of contention 500 M out. (Blood in trachea and irregular heart beat.)
4th or 5th from the 1st bend. Unable to quicken in straight before weakened 200 M out.
Midfield or worse. Towards rear from 800 M. 5Ls back upon straightening by saving ground along rail. Made up some ground final 200 M despite having to steady off heels 100 M out.
Slowly away and remained at rear. Improved quickly on the outside from 900 M to lead at 600 M. Got left behind by winner 200 M out but did enough to secure a distant 2nd.
Slowly away but soon in midfield or better. Swift headway from 1100 M to 3rd or 4th. Ran on well in straight and pulled away effortlessly final 200 M for a commanding victory.
Soon sat 1 out 1 back behind the leader. 2Ls down in 4th from 600 M and commenced to hang in. Very one-paced in straight.
Midfield early but trapped wide with no cover and steadied towards rear but still 3-wide from 1600 M. Headway to midfield or better from 1000 M. Dropped out tamely inside 200 M.
4th or 5th down the straight the 1st time but proved difficult to settle throughout the middle stages. Kept on in straight to just miss a distant 3rd.
Led until settling in 3rd place from 1600 M. Crowded and lost ground at 600 M. 2Ls down upon straightening. Kept on without threatening principals in straight.
Dropped from wide draw to the tail. Improved on the outside to be 5Ls back turning in. Ran on steadily to grab a distant 3rd in the closing stages.
Went forward to lead from 1600 M after being trapped wide with no cover and hampered in the early stages. Headed at 600 M when already under pressure. Tired badly inside 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Well back. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Began well and led early. Settled just off the pace approaching 1000 M bend. One-paced under pressure in the run home.
Midfield. Made moderate progress past beaten horses in straight.
Prominent to 200 M. Weakened.
Settled in last few. Never nearer.
Midfield to 400 M. Dropped out gradually.
Wide in midfield early. Took closer order approaching Rock. Weakened from 3L 5th into straight.
Mainly in forward of midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Midfield when steadied on rails passing winning post the first time. Remained towards rear for remainder of race. Plodded on under pressure in straight.
Settled at the back. Made up some late ground down inner of straight to be nearest at finish.
Took up running approaching 1000 M bend. Never headed.
Fair to begin, taken back to last to settle 10Ls from pace, lobbed along 2 wide at tail using nothing in run, swung 4 wide turning for home and made up some late ground down outside in straight.
Average to begin, ridden up to get closer early, settled midfield 5Ls off pace 2 wide, relaxed well, tracked 3 wide into race on turn, only battled away in home stretch. (See Racing Incidents.)
Fast to break, taken hold of to race with cover just behind speed, 2 wide 4Ls away throughout, hard ridden making 3 wide run entering straight, raced one-paced in straight and weakened out of it.
Awkward to begin, ridden up to obtain close spot, trapped wide from awkward alley, raced 3 wide without cover throughout, always working 4 to 5 wide into straight, workload took toll and dropped out.
Jumped well, used up in early stages to cross to lead, kept rolling 1L clear at a reasonable pace, 1L clear turning for home, quickly collared and weakened out of it. Worked too hard early.
Began only fairly, drove through to hold spot 3 back on fence, raced 4Ls away throughout, used nothing to turn, followed paint in straight but lacked another gear to get closer.
Broke with them, hard ridden early to take up spot outside leader 1L away, always chasing in middle section, lost touch a little entering straight but stuck to task well to hold 3rd.
Broke with field, settled just off midfield 6 to 7Ls away 2 wide, enjoyed good run throughout, swung 4 to 5 wide on turn, came with run widest in straight but couldn't make up required ground.
Jumped with field, allowed to relax just worse then midfield, raced 4 back on rails 6 to 7Ls away, still 5Ls away turning for home, made good ground late between runners.

Fastest into stride, crossed them easily from wide alley, relaxed well and handed up running, raced behind leader from 1000 M having run of race, shot to lead turning for home. Tired late but held on well. (Dropped whip.)

Slow to begin, settled in rearward positon 2 wide 8 to 9Ls away, travelled comfortably throughout, made strong run between horses in straight and closed strongly from impossible spot. (Lame after race.)
Broke with field, showed no early speed and drifted back to 2nd last, raced on rail 9 to 10Ls away throughout, gave large start into straight and made no impression to line.
Led to 700 M. Under pressure to stay behind leader turning in. Gave ground soon after straightening.
Niggled forward along rail to be 2 to 3Ls off the speed. Ran on well final 400 M to take charge 250 M out and held off 2nd horse final 100 M.
Soon found rail and travelled 1 to 2Ls off pace. Kept on in straight until weakened badly 100 M out.
Stood flat-footed and lost significant ground. Remained at back. Made up some ground final 200 M but simply had too much to do.
Jumped well and then proved difficult to settle when being steadied to race at the rear. Made up good ground final 250 M to grab 3rd in the closing stages.
Midfield or better. Found nothing in straight and had enough 100 M out.
Soon midfield or better. About 3 to 4Ls back from 800 M. Kept on but never looked likely to feature in straight.
Slowly away and steadied off heels. Always towards rear. Never a factor.
Prominent 3rd. Tired and dropped right out of contention 300 M out.
Went forward to be 2nd from 1200 M after failing to settle when attempting to find cover in the early stages. Led at 700 M. Tired badly and dropped out quickly inside 250 M.
Dropped towards rear from wide draw. Behind midfield about 5Ls back from 1200 M. Under the whip and trapped widest turning in. Ran on steadily in straight whilst shifting in to be nearest at finish.
At rear. Kept on without looking dangerous in straight. (Abnormal breathing noise reported by rider.)
Soon dropped to the rear from wide draw after beginning well. Ran on well final 300 M but lost 3rd when one-paced close home.
Slowly away. Moved up steadily to midfield from 1200 M. Kept on without threatening principals in straight.
Broke well. Kept in prominent position throughout. 2Ls behind lead in 6th place at 400 M. Hard ridden to pick up but unable to sustain effort to stay in contention.
Away fairly. Pressured to stay slightly behind midfield. Similar going into final 400 M. Kept pace under hard riding but failed to turn up a notch. Ran on evenly.
Awkward to break and shifted out abruptly. Around midfield halfway on the outside fence. No response when asked. Well beaten.
Broke with them. Outpaced from the off. Towards rear about 5Ls off lead at 600 M. Not able to pick up and failed to make impression. Never a factor.
On jumping, stumbled and dislodged its rider. Riderless crossing finish line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average away. Towards the rear on rail until final 400 M. 4Ls off pace and improved steadily. Ran past beaten runners final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Average away. Within 2Ls of lead on standside rail. Looked likely when pressured after 400 M. Lacked extra kick and finished one paced. Faded gradually.
Slowly away. Settled in rearward position around 4Ls off the lead at 700 M. Shifted out for better running at 400 M. Responded only fairly.
Broke well. Showed early speed to stay within 2Ls behind the lead. Unable to keep pace with field final 400 M. No answer under the whip and struggled latter half of race. Dropped out steadily.
Broke with them. Kept within 2Ls behind leader on fence. Closed gap between leader and looked likely at 400 M. Failed to make much impression and one-paced till the line. (Lame after race.)
Broke well. Tracked leader on rail. Shared lead at 400 M. Finished off race well inside final 200 M but failed to match strides. Battled on but found winner too good.
Average to begin. Settled midfield on fence. 3Ls back at 400 M. Charged home powerfully closing stages and took third on the line.
Broke well. Travelled comfortably 1L behind leader throughout. Responded strongly when placed under pressure inside 400 M. Motored home and kicked away from rivals.
Jumped well and disputed early lead. Attempted to make all. Headed 200 M out. Gradually weakened in latter stages and didn't have enough to hang on to 3rd.
Niggled along early stages but was outpaced and raced behind midfield. Pressured from 600 M out but lacked the needed response and remained on same pace final stages.
Stayed within 2Ls of the leader until 400 M. Failed to keep pace thereafter and steadily dropped out.
Kept within 2Ls of the leader. Responded nicely when asked final 300 M and ran down the leader final 50 M.
Attempted to make all. Headed by winner inside final 50 M.
Settled in midfield. 3Ls off the pace at midway point. Quickened nicely when asked and kept on well final stages for a minor placing.
Ridden to take up a forward position. Kept close to the pace before fading out of contention inside final 200 M.
Trailed field most of the race. Only ran past a beaten runner.
Steered to the outside fence and raced in a forward position until midway point. Tired in the final stretch.
Settled towards the back of the field. Kept on well under pressure in the final stages to make the frame.
Settled towards the end of the field. Pressured final 300 M and kept on fairly to the finish.
3-wide with cover down backstretch when about 3Ls off the speed in midfield, 4-wide no cover from 800 M to home straight when similar margin off pace, very weak inside final 200 M.
Crossed from midfield to lead on fence at 1000 M, under 1L clear on the circle and headed at top of home straight, soon faded out.
4-back on fence and worse than midfield between 4 and 5Ls off pace until final bend, always well held in home straight.
In rear group at least 6Ls behind leaders down the back, 6-wide (widest of all) on straightening for home when still well back in rear, moderate late headway past some beaten runners.
2Ls down in 5th when 2-wide at 900 M, 1L behind in 3rd when 3-wide taking home turn, all out when 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, weakened inside final 100 M.
3-wide no cover when 2Ls off the speed in 3rd at 1000 M, struggling to keep up when 4-wide entering home straight about 3Ls down in midfield, soon well outpaced.
Fractious in gates and didn't break well, never better than midfield at least 5Ls off pace in 11th or so, tame effort in home straight.
2-wide and 1L outside leader in 2nd at 1000 M, sent on to lead at top of home straight, 1L clear at 200 M, grabbed by winner 50 M out but had done enough to hang onto 2nd.
Slow, awkward break, 3-back on fence about 4Ls behind leader at 1000 M, 2-wide and 3Ls down in 5th at top of homestretch, nice turn of foot to lead 50 M out, won going away.
3-wide with cover in about 10th about 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, similar margin behind when 5-wide taking final bend, ran on quite well without troubling principals.
2-wide outside winner in midfield at 1000 M, threw head up and lost ground on the circle to be 4Ls back in 9th entering stretch, rallied again late to snatch 3rd on the line.
Head up at 1200 M in rear about 7Ls back, under pressure in rear off home turn about 6Ls off pace, made no impression.
About 4Ls off the pace in midfield through to homestretch, briefly threatened a place when over 2Ls down in 6th at 200 M, no extra and weakened late.
Had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls off speed in 4th from 1000 M to home straight, same position at the 200 M, kept on well without threatening quinella pair, lost 3rd on the line.

3-wide with cover 7Ls off pace in 11th at 1000 M, progress on bend to be 3-wide straightening when 3Ls down in mid-division, seemed certain of at least a place when 1L down in 3rd 150 M out, no extra.
Mostly without cover, 4-wide back in 5th when 3Ls down at 900 M, 2Ls down and 4-wide on straightening in 4th place, swamped approaching the 200 M, eased late.
Settled 9Ls last at 1000 M, crept closer to be 4Ls down in 12th off home turn, held up for a run from 300 M to 200 M when 3Ls down, ran on very strongly, post came just too soon, unlucky.
Head up and racing ungenerously at 900 M when covered up in midfield about 4Ls off speed, 3-wide on straightening when 3Ls off pace in midpack, never troubled leaders.
On fence about 5Ls off the pace in 9th at 1000 M, about 4Ls down in 10th off home bend, 4Ls last at the 200 M and never able to threaten when it mattered.
Crossed from widest gate to lead by 1L on fence at 1000 M, a neck clear tackling home turn, headed 300 M out and weakened inside final 200 M.
In 12th place about 8Ls off the speed 900 M out, niggled along when 5Ls down in 12th at top of homestretch, 3Ls worse than midfield at the 200 M, drew no closer.
4Ls off speed in 6th when 2-wide at 900 M, briefly held up when over 2Ls off pace taking final bend, bumped at 200 M when 1L off speed, kept on strongly again for a place.
Slowest away, about 8Ls behind in 13th at 1000 M, 3-wide and 6Ls last turning for home, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
Well placed on fence between 2 to 3Ls behind leader in 4th until home straight, didn't find much running room from 300 M to 100 M, may have finished a little closer.
Quietly ridden about 6Ls off pace in 10th through first half, closer but briefly held up entering homestretch, quickened up well to lead about 150 M out, just hung on.
Keen early on, 2Ls off pace when 2-wide in 3rd at 1000 M, sharing 2nd place a neck behind leader turning for home, all out to be a head 2nd at the 200 M, weakened thereafter.
On fence 1L behind leader in 2nd, disputing 2nd place a neck off the pace at home straight entrance, led by a neck 300 M out, headed by winner at 150 M, one-paced close home.
Always 4-wide no cover, 5Ls off the speed in 7th at 1000 M, 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home about 2Ls behind in 7th, outpaced by principals inside final 200 M.
Midfield or behind. Kept on without quickening in straight and was not ridden out after being tightened inside 50 M.
Towards rear. Widest turning in. Made up good ground final 200 M to secure a distant 4th.
At rear. On heels and proved difficult to settle for a considerable distance after 1000 M. Made up good late ground but simply set too big a task.

Forward of midfield about 3 to 4Ls off the lead but wide. Carried wider at 1500 M and again at 800 M when improving to 3rd about 1L back. Unable to quicken in straight and checked when already giving ground 100 M out.
Midfield or better. Hung in and proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Steadied and shifted in when crowded near 300 M. Kept on without looking dangerous thereafter.
Thereabout 2Ls off the lead in slow tempo. Kicked home strongly final 300 M to snatch victory inside 50 M.
Midfield or better but trapped 5-deep. Improved and to be 2Ls back at 1000 M. One-paced upon straightening before retreating quickly final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mainly forward of midfield. 3Ls or so back at 1200 M. 1L down turning in. Ran on until weakened badly 100 M out.
At rear. Only ran past beaten runners in straight.
Midfield or worse and on rail. 2Ls down upon straightening. Ran on gamely in straight but got outsprinted by the winner close home.
Took lead approaching 1400 M. Hung out from 800 M. Kept on well in straight but got caught by the first pair final 50 M.
Led early before settling in 2nd place with no early pace. Never ran on in straight and dropped out quickly 100 M out. (Abnormal breathing noise, mucopus and see Racing Incidents.)
At rear. Made up good late ground without threatening principals.
Broke well. Travelled 3-wide with leaders. Overhauled 200 M out. (Mucus in trachea.)
Wide in prominent position to straight. Dropped out.
Chased leader to straight. Weakened gradually.
Settled in last few. Improving when steadied for a run 200 M out. Kept on same pace in the run home.
Close up. Hit front briefly 150 M out. Unable to sustain effort and swamped nearing finish.
Raced wide towards rear. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Travelled mainly 3-wide in midfield. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening holding some chance over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Towards rear most of way.
Trailed field to straight. Finished off race well to reach joint 3rd final strides.
Mainly in midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Baulked for a run upon straightening then kept on steadily to the line.
Raced wide in midfield. Steadied early in straight. Ran home one-paced.
Settled behind midfield. Steadied for a run early in straight before quickening well to assert authority over 100 M out.
Ridden to lead from poor draw early. Led field until finding no extra 200 M out.
Soon picked up to midfield early. Did not find too much room over 200 M out. Kept on same pace closing stages.

Slow to begin, lacked early speed to settle near last 7 to 8Ls away, raced at least 3 wide with cover backstretch, checked badly at 700 M and lost position, had task ahead making 5 wide run on turn, lacked usual finishing burst.
Broke well, pushed along to settle 3 back on fence 3Ls from pace, had run of race using nothing in mid-section, followed paint into straight and lost some momentum at 250 M but only plugged to line.

Began fairly, ridden up to take closer order, settled in midfield spot 2 wide 5Ls away, tracked 3 wide from 1000 M without cover, came 4 wide on turn, tried hard in straight but lacked the dash to go with them (lost plate).

Average to begin, pushed along 3 and 4 wide early to take up prominent spot outside leader, raced 2 wide with cover from 1000 M, came with 3 wide run into straight but early effort told and weakened from 200 M.

Fast into stride, showed good speed to take up running early, handed up to race behind leader from 1400 M, enjoyed run of race thereafter, gained dream split entering straight but lacked sprint to be a factor.
Away with them, used early speed to push on 4 wide and took up running, backed off speed nicely, pressured from 1000 M and had to work to turn, spent force at 300 M and only battled home.

Broke well, allowed to relax just off pace, raced in 6th position throughout 1 out 1 back 2Ls away, travelled well on bit to turn, eased 4 wide and gathered them in easily at 300 M and showed good fight to hold on.

Average to begin, niggled along to be closer early, settled 4 back on fence 6Ls away, didn't settle well and veered out to be 3 wide with cover from 800 M, travelled well into straight, checked badly at 300 M and did well to finish 4th.

Average to begin, drifted back as usual to settle rear enough to last 2 wide 7Ls from pace, inconvenienced at 900 M with slow pace, tracked well to turn weaved through horses following eventual winner, just unable to peg back ground.

Taken in behind after start, settled at rear of field on rails 7 to 8Ls from pace, travelled well throughout spending little in run, made run between horses in straight, no clear run in straight and not fully tested as a result.

Broke with them, took up midfield position 2 wide 4 to 5Ls away, raced between horses through mid-section, tracked nicely into race on turn, received no racing room in straight and wasn't properly tested. Forget run.

Average to begin, restrained to tail from awkward alley, raced wide at real throughout 7 to 8Ls from leaders, always working throughout, made 6 wide run on turn, only passed tired runners in straight.

Away well, pressed forward early, trapped 3 wide without cover 3Ls off them in mid-section, allowed to slide forward to race outside leader at 1000 M, challenged leader on turn and lead into straight, compounded last 250 M.

Away with them, taken in to find cover early, settled 2 wide 6Ls away worse than midfield, forced 4 wide without cover from 900 M, travelled well to turn, kept giving in straight to go down narrowly. Big effort.
Disputed lead to straight. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Always well back. Made no impression in straight.
Always well behind.
Held slender lead to straight. Weakened.
Settled in rear of midfield. Quickened well shortly after straightening to take charge closing stages.
Niggling along in prominent position when steadied passing 1400 M. Forward of midfield turning in. Making moderate headway when hampered 200 M out. Kept on steadily to the line.
Raced wide in rear of midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in last few. Made up good ground between runners down straight to be nearest at finish.
Always in rear. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Settled towards rear. Steadied for a run early in straight. Ran home one-paced.
Close up. Hampered by weakening runner on rails early in straight. Kept on same pace under pressure.
Never far off. Within 2Ls of pace in 5th turning in. Soon hit front after straightening only to be headed closing stages.
Travelled in midfield. Quickened up upon straightening to hold some chance early on but unable to peg back first two the length of straight.
Well there to straight. Dropped out.
Fastest into stride, pushed on early to settle outside early leader, raced 1 out 1 back from 1400 M, made 3 wide run into straight, stuck to task well last 200 M. Good effort to make frame.

Jumped with field, lacked early speed and settled 3rd from rear in 2 wide position 9Ls from pace, made 3 wide run from 600 M, made steady ground late widest in straight but lacked dash to be a real factor.

Fast into stride, showed superior speed to cross to lead, tackled early and handed up to race behind leader (pace good) relaxed well and travelled well in middle stages, followed paint in straight, lacked required turn of foot.

Broke well, pushed on to race in forward division, settled 3 back on fence 4Ls away from leader, enjoyed run of race in middle stages, weaved between runners in straight hitting lead at 200 M. Fought strongly for 2nd.
Average to begin, allowed to settle at rear, raced 2 wide 10Ls off pace throughout, used little in run, had field in front on turn, made up some ground but set too great a task.
Jumped with field, lacked early dash and drifted back to settle 4th from tail on fence, raced 8 to 9Ls off speed using nothing to turn, eased out in straight and made good late ground to grab 3rd.
Average into stride, niggled along to keep touch early, settled 4 back on fence 7Ls off them, under pressure a long way out, showed no fight in straight and only battled away to line.

Jumped with them, ridden hard to go forward and challenge for early lead, worked hard to cross at 800 M, kept rolling at good clip and about 3 to 4Ls clear, held lead until 250 M but compounded badly and dropped right out.

Ducked at start and was slowly away, hard ridden wide early to take closer order, pushed on to race outside leader at 1400 M, always working and carted field up to leader, effort told and weakened late. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away with line, settled in midfield position 5Ls away in 2 wide position, enjoyed easy run thereafter, made run between horses in straight making good late ground to be closest at finish.
Broke with them, restrained for trailing position just off midfield, raced 2 to 3 wide throughout 7Ls from pace, under pressure approaching turn, only plugged home in straight.
Slow to begin, settled at rear of field on fence 10Ls away, used little in run, gave huge start turning for home, made up good late ground to be closest at finish.

Average into stride, allowed to relax early, settled closer than usual in midfield position 2 wide 5 to 6Ls away, travelled like winner throughout, made 4 wide run on turn, charged to them at 150 M and drew away for a strong win.
Around midfield about 4Ls or so back from 1400 M. Still 3Ls down turning in. Ran on well to miss narrowly whilst continuing to hang out in straight.
In touch early. About 3Ls back in 4th or 5th from 1200 M, 2Ls down turning in. Kept on in straight without looking dangerous.
Slowly away. Ridden forward vigorously to lead passing winning post the 1st time. Kept on well in straight and just hung on for victory.
Towards rear. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish but simply had too much to do.
In touch early. About 3Ls back in 4th or 5th from 1200 M. Kept on well in straight but got outsprinted by principals in the closing stages.
Led to passing the winning post 1st time. Tracked leader in 3rd place from 1200 M. Kept on well in straight but lost 3rd final strides.
Slowly away. At rear. 5Ls or so down turning in. Produced good late impression but simply set too great a task.
Towards rear. Under pressure rounding home bend to behind midfield but wide turning in. Failed to quicken in straight.
1 out 1 back behind the leader passing winning post 1st time. Gave ground rapidly 200 M out. (Mucopus and see Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away. At rear. Never seen with a chance.
Around midfield about 4 to 5Ls back from 1400 M. Awkward on heels from 400 M to 200 M. Made up good late ground to grab 3rd despite having to steady whilst hanging in 100 M out.
Slowly away. At back. Never in the race.
Away fairly. Failed to keep pace. 9Ls back at 800 M. 2nd last to enter straight. Switched out and finished powerfully in open ground. Outpaced rivals to capture victory on the line.
Only fair to begin from the outside barrier. 2 off midfield at 1000 M. 3 wide back after straightening. Ran on one-paced and didn't show any dash in straight. Only cruised past beaten runners.

Broke well. Kept 3Ls behind lead on fence at 1000 M. 1L further back passing the mid-way mark. 6th to turn straight. Improved steadily on the inside. Looked very likely final 200 M but not enough to stay in contention.
Jumped with them. Taken back across behind runners from the widest gate. Tailed, 10Ls off lead at 800 M. Switched widest on straightening. Made up good ground on the outside. Nearest at finish.
Average to begin. Pushed but failed to keep pace early on. Behind midfield on rail throughout. Amongst last few and 4Ls back turning home, did not get much closer. Never really competitive.

Broke with them. Ridden along into the first turn but failed to take fence. Raced keenly in a 2 wide spot in back straight. 4th to enter straight. Responded fairly and only kept on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped best. 3 wide making the first turn. Stalked leader in a 2 wide after 800 M. Ridden along to keep pace rounding home. Well beaten on straightening. Yeilded ground and tailed off. (Mucopus.)

Slow to begin. Never far off. Held 5th and 1 off 3 back at 800 M. Responded nicely after shifted to 3 wide on straightening. Fought on hard whilst hanging in. Failed to match strides with top pair but held on to a close 3rd.

Slowly away. Kept rearward 1 off with cover. 7Ls behind leader at 800 M. Improved effortlessly on the bend in a 3 wide spot. Headed 150 M out. Battled hard to stay on, but failed to hold on for the win. Got caught at the line.
Broke well. Set steady pace on rail throughout. Attempted to make all but failed to sustain effort final 300 M. Weakened gradually.
Jumped well. Held the fence and ran on comfortably. 2Ls back in a prominent spot at 600 M. Ridden along to save ground on rail. Briefly threatened at 200 M with any empty tank. Weakened thereafter.
Jumped well but took a sit behind the leader. 2-wide and kept within 3Ls of the pace until home turn. Matched strides with winner over last 200 M but came up short close to the post.
Raced in rear section. Remained in rear section in back straight, raced keenly near 700 M. Near last to enter home straight and unable to find extra thereafter.
Slowly away and then was crowded. Settled on fence behind midfield. Switched out on straightening and closed the race off well.

Jumped awkwardly. Steadied away from heels a few times and raced behind midfield. Dropped further back after steadying 900 M and raced in rear section. Wide making home turn and couldn't pick up in the straight.
Eased to the rear and trailed field in back straight. Near rear and swung out on straightening. Made up good ground in the straight.
Jumped well and ridden along early. Outpaced by leaders and settled on fence behind the pace. Kept in a prominent position making home turn but only managed to stay on same pace in the straight.
Led briefly before taking a sit behind the pace. Tracked leader in a 2-wide position in back straight. Failed to respond and weakened in the straight.
Settled on fence at midfield. Held up for some distance after straightening. Kept on fairly after finding clear run to make the frame.
Jumped awkwardly and dropped to the rear. Travelled along the fence and near last to enter home straight. Closed the race off strongly before being held up over last 100 M.
Wide and without cover at midfield. Kept on without quickening in the home straight.
2-wide and no better than midfield. Pressured before straightening and responded well. Duelled with a rival over last 200 M before shaking loose last few strides.
Jumped fairly and was ridden to take up the lead 1000 M. Took a length's advantage into home straight and kept the lead until final 100 M. Held on for a minor placing.
Never on terms, 8Ls last through to homestretch when under pressure, very weak effort.
Led early on, settled into box run on fence 2Ls off lead in 3rd from 1600 M to home turn when unbalanced, always outpaced by principals despite being a little short of room close home.
Lost some ground at start, worse than midfield about 5Ls behind leader until the 800 M, further back on straightening, posed little threat.
Led about 1600 M out, 1L clear from 1200 M to home straight, headed 300 M and weakened out.
2-wide between 2Ls and 3Ls behind leader in 4th or so until final bend, over 1L down in 3rd at the 200 M, stayed on strongly but grabbed by winner on the line.
Always close up about 2Ls off the pace and 3-wide without cover until 500 M out, led at top of home stretch, grabbed by quinella inside final 50 M but hung on gamely for a place.
2-wide in rear bunch at least 6Ls off the speed until final 400 M, didn't trouble leaders.
Prominent but 3-wide no cover early on, 1L off pace in 2nd when 2-wide at 1000 M, all out to stay within 2Ls of the leader entering homestretch, faded sharply inside final 200 M. (Lame.)
3-back on fence in midfield inside the winner about 4Ls off the speed until home turn, stayed on fairly well but never likely to place.
Slowly away, always towards rear at least 6Ls off the speed until home turn, made some moderate late headway.
Settled in midfield 2-wide and no worse than 4Ls off pace through to home turn, 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, kept on finding to lead on the line.
Slowest to begin, worse than midfield about 5Ls off speed at 1200 M, headway to be 3-wide with cover at 600 M, all out to be 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, no extra, narrowly missed a place.
2-wide and within 4Ls of the speed in 4th or so until taking final bend, same margin behind and hard ridden at 200 M, no extra inside final 100 M.
Awkwardly away and switched from wide gate closer to fence at rear of field, 8Ls last turning for home, never figured.
Coldly ridden 6Ls off pace in 10th early, made some progress on the circle, no chance with winner but still ran on strongly in stretch to take 2nd on the line.
5Ls off pace in 9th at 800 M, struggling to draw any closer taking home turn, soon beaten.
2Ls off pace in 3rd at 800 M, 4-wide on straightening when 3Ls back in 5th, very weak in concluding stages.
Disputed lead at a fairly strong tempo on fence until home straight, driven 1L at the 200 M, grabbed by winner 100 M and lost out on 2nd place on the line.
3-back on fence about 4Ls off pace in midfield early on, niggled along to take closer order at 600 M, 3Ls down in 6th entering home straight, stayed on well to lead 100 M out, readily.
Briefly 3-wide no cover at 700 M when 2Ls off pace in mid-division or better, gained cover on circle but lost position, 4Ls down in 7th turning for home, outpaced by principals in the finish.
Bumped at start, prominently placed about 2Ls off pace on fence in 4th or so until entering home stretch but short of room, hard ridden to improve at 200 M, one-paced close home.
Slowest away, in rear about 8Ls off the pace through first half of race, 5Ls down in 8th at the 200 M, never troubled principals.
Disputed lead out 4-wide no cover at 1000 M, 2-wide at 700 M and still sharing lead, all out to be 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, gave ground quickly thereafter. (Mucopus and displaced soft palete.)
2-wide in midfield but no better than 4Ls off the pace until the 600 M, hard ridden to improve taking final bend, never dangerous.
Ridden forward from wide draw and got to the front at 700 M. Kept on well in straight but was comprehensively outpaced by the winner 100 M out.
Mostly behind midfield and trapped wide and without cover throughout. Not a threat in straight.
Towards rear after getting unbalanced at 1000 M. Unable to find running upon straightening and steadied off heels at 100 M. Not tested.
Ridden forward and took lead approaching 1000 M. 2nd from 700 M. Kicked home strongly final 200 M to win easily going away.
Jumped best before settling in midfield or better. One-paced in straight.
Dropped to the rear from wide draw. Held up at the back rounding the home turn. Made up a lot of ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Slowly away. Behind midfield from 1000 M. Under pressure rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.
Towards rear. Never a factor.
Led briefly before settling in 3rd or 4th some 2 to 3Ls off the pace. Ran on steadily in straight to secure a distant 3rd.
Midfield or worse and on rail. About 3 to 4Ls behind the pace from 800 M. Hung out and could not find clear running in straight. Not tested.
Soon in touch. 3rd or 4th from 1000 M about 2Ls off the speed. Ran on without threatening first pair and always held by 3rd horse final 200 M.
At rear approaching 1000 M. Shifted out and made up good ground from last final 200 M but simply had too much to do.
Well there. Hit front over 150 M out but collared close to home.
Prominent early, then travelled in midfield. Made up good ground down straight to be nearest at finish.
Never seen with a chance at the back.
Settled in forward of midfield early. Improved around 1000 M bend to take up running turning into back straight. Soon weakened after home turn.
Soon took up running and led to 1000 M bend. Remained close-up 2nd on rails turning in. Unable to sustain effort passing 200 M.
Settled in rear of midfield. Made headway down back straight to hold forward of midfield position far side. Gave ground steadily after straightening.
Settled towards rear. Ran on well down straight to take charge close to home.
Always well behind. Wide rounding home bend. Never nearer.
Chased leaders early, then travelled mainly in forward of midfield. Made moderate progress down straight without threatening.
Settled behind midfeild. Forced to switch for a run over 200 M out. Ran on steadily late without threatening.
Wide towards rear most of way. Made no impression in the run home. (Mucus in trachea.)
Mainly in midfield. Did not find much room on inside of straight. Kept on steadily to the line.

Jumped with them, taken back from widest alley, settled 2nd last 6-7Ls away in a 2 wide position, travelled evenly in middle stages, in traffic entering straight angled clear at 200 M but showed little turn of foot to improve.

Fairly away, niggled along early to hold a prominent spot, raced 1 out 1 back 3-4Ls away, spent little in run, on bit to turn, made a reasonable challenge in straight but lacked real dash, just missed 3rd.

Jumped well, worked across to challenge for early lead, trapped 3 wide outside leader when unable to cross, kept working in middle stages, began to lose ground on turn to be well beaten. Didn't go trip.
Broke fairly, lacked early speed, caught wide from awkward alley, pressed on to race midfield with cover, always working in middle section, tracked 4 wide on turn and closed race off fairly.
Away well, settled in prominent spot outside leader 1L away, pressured by outside horse throughout (good speed), under pressure to challenge leader on straightening, weakened right out in straight.

Broke well, showed good early speed to challenge for forward spot, caught 3 wide when unable to get closer, raced 3 wide with cover through middle section, made 4 wide run on turn, gave little in straight.
Standard to begin, allowed time to relax just worse than midfield, enjoyed good run in 2 wide spot 5Ls from lead, tracked into race nicely on turn, made up good late ground in straight to snatch 3rd.

Broke with field, pushed along to hold spot behind leader, enjoyed run of race in middle section (speed good), travelled well to turn, got clear at 200 M but was one-paced to line only holding ground.

Slow to get going, restrained to rear from awkward alley, settled on fence 7-8Ls away, lobbed along at tail throughout, going well on turn, came with between horses in straight, made up good ground from well back.

Average to begin, restrained shortly after start to find cover, settled back on fence 4Ls from lead, enjoyed great run spending nothing in middle section, followed paint in straight and overcame inconvenience to score a solid win.

Broke with field, mustered speed to take up running leaving straight, didn't settle well and keep rolling at a good speed, held a length advantage entering straight, showed good fight but beaten by an easier run.
Slow to begin, settled in rearward spot on rails 6Ls from leader, used nothing in middle section, made run between horses in straight but lacked any clear room and not properly tested. Pay to forget.
1L or so behind the winner to 300 M. Kept on to just miss a distant 3rd.
Led or disputed lead with 2nd horse on the outside track and kept on quite well whilst being held by that horse inside 400 M.
1L off the pace. Struggled badly 300 M out.
2Ls off the speed. Gave ground quickly 250 M out.
Led pack on the inner track. Responded strongly final 300 M to record a commanding victory.
Hampered at start. Raced greenly at the rear about 3Ls off the lead and hung out throughout. Kept on final 400 M without threatening principals.
Slowly away but soon led or disputed lead with another runner on the outside track. Kept on well to the line for a distant 2nd.
Broke well. Never far off. Raced handy in 3rd throughout. 2 wide 2Ls back on straightening. Held some chances over 200 M out but unable to sustain. Great effort to make frame.

Jumped well. Ran forward without effort. 2 off and 3Ls behind lead at 1000 M. Improved position on the bend. Hard ridden just prior to straightening. Responded only fairly. Kept on evenly and one-paced till the line.
Broke with them. Midfield on fence, about 5Ls off lead at 1000 M. Made 2 wide run on bend after 600 M. 6th to enter straight. Hit traffic at 300 M and only one-paced thereafter.
Broke with them. Failed to keep pace under pressure. 4 wide behind midfield at 1000 M. Pressured on the bend. 5th last to enter straight. Switched wider on straightening. Tired badly inside 250 M.
Slow to begin. Pushed to make ground on fence early on. 5Ls back behind midfield at 800 M. Saved ground on rail rounding home. Kept on evenly on the run home. Lacked sprint to be a factor.

Broke well. Pushed on early to take rail. Settled closer than usual in forward spot. 3Ls back at 800 M. Travelled well into straight. Held up early straight. Made up late ground when clear final 150 M. Good effort.
Broke well. Used up in early stages to cross to lead. Set steady pace throughout. 1L clear at 800 M. Led field until 400 M. Held some chances for prize money until weakened out final 200 M.

Began well. Midfield in a 2 wide spot going onto back straight. Shifted to 3 wide and attempted to improve at 700 M. 2Ls back after straightening but lacked another gear to get closer. Worked too hard on the bend.
Clean jump from the widest gate. Around midfield 2 off after first turn. Under pressure and detached taking final turn. Very weak in straight. Dropped out rapidly. (Lame left front leg.)
Broke well. Pushed to get to the front. Relaxed well and travelled comfortably behind leader from 1000 M. Hit front at 400 M. Motored home powerfully after straightening. Easy win.

Began only fairly. Kept rear after start. 2nd last, 2 wide 7Ls behind lead at 800 M. Swung wide, 5Ls back on straightening. Responded strongly to riding. Late pick up inside final 150 M to capture 2nd at the line.
Bounced well. Checked entering the first turn. Last few throughout. 7Ls back on rail at 800 M. 2nd last turning in. Found very little off the bridle. One-paced in straight. Never looked likely.
Broke well. Stayed 3 wide 7Ls off speed at 1200 M. Made ground under pressure making the turn, 2 wide 4Ls back. Similar taking home, did not get any closer. (Mucopus.)
Jumped well. Settled behind midfield in a 2 wide spot on back straight. 4Ls back at 800 M. Travelled well into straight. Kept on giving in straight. No challenge to winner and lost 2nd at the line.
Jumped awkwardly and settled behind midfield. Ran on only fairly in the straight.
Wide and better than midfield early stages. Went forward and took over the lead at 800 M. Maintained a 2Ls advantage near 200 M but was headed by principals final stages.
4-wide behind midfield early stages. Improved to midfield and remained wide making the turn. Found nothing in the straight.
Niggled along to a forward position. 2-wide and 3Ls behind the pace making the turn. Weakened in the straight.
Raced in rear section until home straight. Held up in traffic near 200 M but finished well after finding clear running.
Best out from widest draw but was allowed to drift back to midfield. Made up ground in a 3-wide spot making home turn but unable to find extra in the straight.
On fence in midfield early stages. Unable to maintain its spot making the turn and dropped to rear section. Stayed on one-paced in the straight.
Began awkwardly and raced in a rearward position. Near last to enter home straight, checked near 250 M and only managed to run past a few beaten runners thereafter.
Settled in rear section. Widest making home turn but quickened well when asked on straightening. Kept on strongly over the final stages despite hanging in and denied rival at the line.

Slowly away but improved steadily to a forward position behind leader. Better than midfield making the turn and was 3Ls off pace on straightening. Matched strides with winner last 200 M but came up short at the line.
Settled in midfield until straightening. Quickened well when asked 300 M and finished with a minor placing.
Knuckled on jumping and failed to keep pace with leaders. Settled 2-wide in midfield until home straight. Unable to quicken thereafter.
Ridden to take the early lead. Headed near 800 M but tracked leader into home straight. Kept on fairly but found no extra to challenge.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground. Raced at the rear until home straight. Made up ground in the closing stages.
3-wide with cover slightly worse than midfield at least 3Ls behind leader through to home straight, 1L down in 4th at the 200 M, couldn't get any closer.
About 3Ls off pace in midfield at 1000 M, keen at 600 M, short of room when a little further back in 9th or so making home turn, about 2Ls down in 9th at 200 M, no further impression.
Close up in midfield 3-wide with cover, keen when 2Ls down in 7th at 800 M, same position taking home turn when short of room, clear at 300 M, ran on well but always held by winner.
2-wide and 1L in 2nd from 1000 M to homestretch, briefly led 300 M out, headed at 200 M, one-paced and done for a place inside final 50 M.
Slowly away, one from rear about 6Ls off pace at 800 M, didn't have much room entering home straight when 4Ls back in 11th on inside, never troubled leaders.
Always 3-wide no cover but very prominent about 1L off the speed in 3rd or so until straightening for home, swamped at 200 M.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off the pace until home straight, folded tamely.
4-wide no cover 2Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 3rd at final bend, led briefly at the 200 M, headed 100 M out, one-paced thereafter and lost out on a place.
3Ls off pace in midfield at 1000 M, similarly placed on final bend, bumped at 200 M out, outpaced by principals.
3-back on fence about 3Ls back in mid-pack until the 600 M, lost position from then on, over 4Ls back towards rear at 300 M, faded out. (Blood in trachea.)
Crossed from widest gate to lead on fence at 900 M by 1L, niggled along to maintain advantage entering home straight, very weak inside final 200 M.
Slowest away and soon at rear, 7Ls last 600 M out, a little close and 4-wide taking home turn, quickened up nicely to lead at 100 M, always doing enough to win.
No better than 4Ls off pace on fence in 10th or so until home straight, ran on fairly late without seriously threatening a place.
Mostly 3 and 4-wide with cover in rear about 5Ls off pace through first half of race, 5-wide (widest of all) taking home turn in 13th, made little impression down centre of track.
Slowly away, 3-back on fence 4Ls off the pace at 1000 M, closer in 6th place turning for home, had every chance to run a place but lacked the gears.
Awkward start and 8Ls last as early as 1400 M out, about 6Ls back in 12th at top of home straight, posed no danger.
Very keen and unruly in the run, always towards rear at least 5Ls off the speed, faded out sharply inside final 200 M.
4-wide no cover throughout, 4Ls down in midfield at the 800 M and much the same entering home stretch, weakened out passing the 200 M pole.
One from rear and 8Ls off the speed at 1000 M, 7Ls last taking home turn, no impression.
Prominent early 2-wide and 3Ls off pace, still just over 2Ls down in 5th off home turn but under pressure, dropped further back inside final 200 M.
Disputed lead out 2-wide at 1200 M, settled 1L off pace in 2nd from 1000 M to home straight, all out to remain within 1L of speed in 3rd at 200 M, faded late.
Awkward break, prominent but 3-wide no cover early on, got in 2-wide and 3Ls behind in 4th at 800 M, 2Ls down in 3rd on straightening, hit lead 150 M out, always in command.
Switched from widest gate to fence, hindered at 1000 M when 7Ls off speed towards rear, 4-wide off final bend when 5Ls back in 10th, didn't trouble leaders.
Slowly away, 6Ls back in 9th at 1000 M, 4Ls down in midfield on straightening, never looked like getting any closer.
Tended to over-race despite having the box run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or so until the 600 M, same margin behind when without a clear run on fence at 300 M, just did enough to secure 2nd place.
Led by 1L on fence at 1000 M, a neck clear at final bend and same 200 M out, headed at 150 M by winner, narrowly missed 3rd place.
Slowly away, 3-wide with cover about 5Ls back in 9th place at 1000 M, about 3Ls down in mid-division taking home bend, 2Ls down in 6th and with place prospects at 200 M, no extra.
4-back on fence about 6Ls off the pace at 1000 M, struggling to get any closer turning for home, soon beaten and eased down, subsequently found to have an irregular heartbeat.
Travelled nicely 1 to 2Ls behind the pace from the first turn. Blundered and almost fell near 700 M. Kept on in straight until no extra inside 200 M.
Stumbled at start. Towards rear. Severely checked near 700 M. Behind midfield turning in. Failed to quicken in straight.
Soon led. Sat 1 to 2Ls behind the leader along back straight. Hampered near 700 M. Tired badly 300 M from home.
Slowly away. At rear. Ran past beaten runners in straight.
Slow into stride. Never better than midfield whilst being trapped wide and without cover to 1200 M. Hung out and widest turning in. No extra 300 M out.
Towards rear. Made up some late ground but simply had too much to do.
Midfield early. Improved 1200 M out to be 2Ls off the pace. Challenged leader rounding home bend. Kept on strongly and drew clear final 200 M to win easily.
Midfield or better. About 4Ls back at 800 M. Severely checked near 700 M. Improved rounding home bend to be 1L down turning in. Ran on steadily without posing a real threat.
Towards rear and trapped wide the first turn. Steadied and shifted out near 700 M. One-paced in straight before tiring close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent but trapped wide the 1st turn. Headway from 1200 M to sit outside the leader at 1000 M. Disputed lead upon straightening but simply no match for winner final 200 M.
Behind midfield. About 5Ls back at 800 M. Severely checked near 700 M. Saved ground along rail to be just 2Ls or so down turning in. One-paced in straight.
In touch early. 2 to 3Ls behind the lead along back straight. Severely checked and lost position near 700 M. Around midfield turning in. Kept on one-paced to the line.
Took lead entering back straight. Hung out on both turns. Headed upon straightening but still kept on to secure a distant 3rd.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily inside final 300 M to reach 2nd late but without troubling winner.
Chased leader to straight. Soon weakened under pressure. (Mucus in trachea.)
Settled behind midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure down straight without threatening. (Mucus in trachea.)
Settled at the back. Commenced move turning in. Only produced moderate progress inside final 200 M.
Settled in 3rd just off the pace. Quickened well to take charge over 200 M out and soon drew clear.
Attempted to make all. Swamped over 200 M out.
Settled in rear. Did not find too much room behind runners early in straight. Produced some late impression inside final 200 M.
Settled in 4th some 2Ls off leader. Came to challenge upon straightening holding some chance early in straight. Unable to sustain effort over 200 M out and soon overhauled.
Settled towards rear. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Raced in rear of midfield to straight. Soon weakened.
Average to begin, settled at rear, 4 to 5Ls off them throughout, travelled well to 300 M but showed no turn of foot when placed under pressure.
Broke with them, settled 2 to 3Ls off them with cover, travelled well in run not working too hard, lacked 100% clear room in stretch and kept going well to line. Needs to dictate.
Began only fairly, raced in middle of track 4Ls from pace, responded well under hard riding to make frame.
Broke well, showed good speed to contest lead early, still in it to 200 M but under pressure, couldn't maintain speed and weakened out last 100 M.
Broke well, pushed along to be prominent early 3 off fence, 1 to 2Ls away, pushed along at 300 M, kept on at same speed without really threatening.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, raced at tail behind horses 4 to 5Ls away, finished race off well to be closest at finish but unable to peg back gap.
Average to begin, settled midfield 3Ls away with cover, travelled well to 200 M, came with strong run last furlong to narrowly go down.
Broke with them, settled 3Ls away without cover, began to struggle with speed from 300 M point, slowly weakened out of it, steadied when slightly crowded late but giving ground at that point.
Fair to begin, settled just behind leaders, enjoyed good run with cover throughout, burst through with well timed run to hit front last 100 M and score a narrow victory.
Fast to begin, raced in middle on track 3Ls away, under pressure from 300 M, gave plenty last 200 M to almost come away with victory. Improved effort.
Showed good speed, held early lead and kept running at solid speed, under pressure from 300 M, offered little over final furlong to drop right out.
Lacked dash from break, drifted back to be 5Ls away, always niggled along to hold position, under whip from 300 M, gave little from that point.
Attempted to make all. Tiring when headed passing 200 M.
Towards rear to straight. Ran past beaten horses without threatening.
Settled in last few. Ran past beaten horses in straight for distant 4th.
Chased leader to about 300 M. Weakened.
Settled in last few. Produced moderate late impression in straight.
Never far off. Joint 4th into straight. Ran home one-paced under pressure to claim distant 3rd.
Towards rear throughout. Ran home one-paced.
Settled at the back. Ran past beaten horses down centre of straight.
Midfield to straight. Faded under pressure. (Mildly lame.)
Raced wide in midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Disputed 4th into straight but soon found no extra.
Mainly in forward of midfield. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Never far off, holding 3rd position far side. Commenced run after straightening. Asserted authority passing 200 M.
Raced wide throughout after beginning from poor draw. Midfield to halfway. Gave ground rounding home bend.
Mainly in rear of midfield to straight. Weakened.

Broke with them, lacked early toe and drifted back to last, raced at rear 7Ls away in 2 wide trailing position, tracked 4 wide turning for home, made up some ground from well back but only passed tired runners.

Away well, showed good early speed to cross outside of leader, raced at leader's girth throughout with slow speed, relaxed well and travelled comfortably to turn, took charge at 300 M and went on for a strong win.

Average to begin, ridden hard early to hold midfield position, raced 2 wide 4Ls away between horses throughout, in traffic turning for home and didn't have a lot of room early in straight, only battled away when clear.

Awkward to begin, pushed hard to cross to lead, dictated pace early (overracing), began to roll along from 600 M, held a 2L advantage into straight, collared at 250 M mark and weakened last 100 M after early work.
Away with field, pushed along to hold spot behind leader 2Ls away, enjoyed good run but struggled to hold position turning for home, very one paced in straight and gradually lost touch.
Broke with them, lacked early pace, caught 3 wide without cover, didn't relax in run, moved up to be 2Ls away on straightening, workload took toll and weakened out last 200 M.

Fast into stride, pushed on but posted wide from awkward draw, restrained race 3 wide 3Ls away with cover (clipped heels), travelled well into straight, lacked the usual dash to threaten but kept going to make frame.
Began well, settled in a prominent position 1 out 1 back 2 to 3Ls away, had cover throughout and enjoyed a good run to turn, in traffic early in straight but offered little when asked. (Mucopus.)
Broke with them, allowed to settle early, raced 3 back on fence 3Ls away spent little in mid-section, followed paint in straight, doing best work late to be closest at finish.

Began only fairly, taken hold of from widest gate, trapped 4 wide without cover with slow speed, always working throughout 3Ls away, moved to be 2Ls away turning for home but workload took toll and weakened last 200 M.

Broke fairly, drifted back from awkward alley, raced 2 wide at rear 5 to 6Ls away, raced between horses throughout, tracked 3 wide on turn and made good ground down outside in straight passing all but winner.
Fair to begin, restrained from wide alley to settle in rearward division, raced 3 wide with cover 6Ls off speed, swung wide with field to beat on turn, offered little in straight.

Tardy to begin, settled in a rearward position on rails 5 to 6Ls from leaders, enjoyed a good run in mid-section, using nothing to turn, eased out and made run between runners in stretch. Good effort giving too great a start.

Jumped with them, lacked early speed and drifted back to settle just off midfield, travelled 3 wide with cover 5Ls away throughout, came with 4 wide run with 2nd horse and stuck to task well last 200 M.
3-wide no cover and 1L off pace in 3rd at 1000 M, disputed lead from 800 M to home straight entrance out 2-wide, swamped over 200 M out.
Slowest away, keen at 1000 M and 800 M when about 8Ls off the speed in 11th place, not much closer on straightening, very weak thereafter.
Couldn't muster any early speed, 10Ls last at 800 M, never competitive.
3-back on fence about 4Ls back in midfield at 800 M, over 2Ls back in 7th at top of home straight, 2Ls down and disputing 3rd at 200 M, weakened at little final 100 M.
Well placed on fence 3Ls off speed in 5th at 1000 M, closer in midfield taking home turn, found nothing off the bridle.
Led by 1L on fence at 1000 M, headed at top of home straight, 2Ls off pace disputing 3rd at 200 M, didn't drop out totally.
Awkward start, 2-wide and 1L off pace at 1000 M, box run from 800 M to home straight when travelling well, eased to the front with 200 M to race, comfortable win.
3Ls down and 2-wide in 5th or so until the 600 M, improved 1L back in 3rd making home turn, hard pressed to be a neck 2nd at 200 M, no chance with winner and lost out on a place final strides.
4Ls down in 6th until being left 3-wide no cover on the circle, 2Ls down in 5th taking home straight, gave ground inside final 200 M.
6Ls off the speed at 1000 M in 9th place, 5Ls down making home turn, tended to lay out in home straight but still wound up nearest at the finish.
Settled well off pace, 9Ls away in 13th at 1000 M, 6Ls down in 11th making home turn, stayed on very well late on fence to snare 2nd place inside final strides.
Awkward break, 2-wide and 5Ls down in 8th at the 800 M, closer turning for home and disputing 3rd over 2Ls behind winner at 200 M, managed to grab 3rd place in final strides.
Nearly 10Ls behind in 12th at 1000 M when hampered, over 7Ls down in 12th taking final bend, kept on only steadily down centre of track.
Worse than midfield at least 5Ls off the speed through to home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Around midfield from the first turn and continued to be trapped wide and without cover. Headway from 1200 M and disputed lead from 800 M. No extra 200 M from home.
2nd inside the leader from the first turn. Led or disputed lead from 1100 M. Kept on well in straight and held a 1/2L advantage from 300 M before being grabbed by the winner close home.

Ridden forward to be 2-back on the fence about 1 to 2Ls behind the pace. Given reminders from 700 M. Held up upon straightening until 200 M before running on well to snatch victory close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly before travelling prominently in 4th or 5th place. Under pressure turning in. Kept on in straight until not quickened final 100 M.
Midfield. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Towards rear. Held up near 200 M but never looked likely.
Led from the first turn. Headed at 1100 M but disputed lead again from 700 M. Kept on well in straight and held 2nd just 1/2L back from 300 M before getting swamped close home.
Travelled keenly in 3rd or 4th but 3-wide. Shifted 4-wide upon straightening. Kept on in straight until weakened 100 M out. (Abnormal breathing.)
Slowly away. At back after steadying at 1100 M. Failed to make any impression in straight.
Attempted to go forward from wide draw but only good enough to be in midfield or behind. Not a threat in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly. Midfield or worse. Ran on steadily without threatening and was steadied 50 M out. (Post race distress.)
Jumped well but soon got outpaced and settled towards rear from 1200 M. Still 4 to 5Ls back rounding home bend. Made up good ground along rail to be closest at finish final 300 M.
Towards rear from the first turn. 5-wide turning in. Made up good ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Tailed off upon straightening.
Fair to begin. Pushed to take up a forward position. 3Ls back on fence at 600 M. Same margin taking home turn. Responded only fairly early straight and kept on evenly to the line.
Broke with them. Midfield. 1 off within 4Ls back at 600 M. Pushed hard from 500 M. Ran on one paced and failed to show dash final 300 M. Fought hard but unable to find more to challenge.
Slow to begin. 5Ls off pace on rail at 800 M. Improved position under some pressure on the bend. Stayed on well early straight but lacked sprint to be a factor. One-paced till finish.
Broke well. Kept rearward. 2 off 6Ls back midway. Switched wider to obtain run on straightening. Lacked response in straight. Faded final 200 M. Never a threat.

Broke with them. Midfield most of the way. 3 wide at least 4Ls back halfway without cover. Went wider on straightening. Quickened nicely final 200 M but failed to keep pace with top pair. Good effort.

Broke with them. Ridden along to stay within 2Ls back on rail. 2nd after straightening in a handy position. Closed strongly final 200 M. Found plenty when challenged to capture a narrow margin victory.
Jumped well. Good early speed to set pace on rail. Held a 2L advantage after straightening. Attempted to make all but could find no extra under pressure and swamped closing stages.
Broke well. Travelled comfortably in a 2 wide spot within 2Ls from pace. Same after straightening. Kicked home strongly final 300 M. Battled hard final 100 M to just fail to get up on line.
Broke well. Stalked leader in the 2 wide spot. Pressured on the bend. 2nd on straightening. Over used early and well beaten in straight. Dropped out rapidly. (Lame right fore.)
Average away from the widest gate. Kept last on rail. At least 8Ls from leader. Save ground on rail under pressure rounding home. 2nd last turning in and never got much closer. Never a factor.
Began only fairly. Outpaced early. Ran in rear section throughout. Last one turning in. Hard ridden rounding home bend and found nothing off the bridle. Never seen competitive.
Broke well. Always slightly behind midfield. Pressured on the bend. 4th last to after straightening. Shifted out and charged home powerfully on the outside final 200 M. Late challenge for 3rd.
2-wide and stayed within a length of the pace until home straight. Kept pressure on the eventual winner over the final stages but couldn't find enough to run it down.
Settled in a rearward position and was last to enter home straight. Held up for a run until 250 M but finished the race strongly after finding daylight.
Jumped fairly and was outpaced by front runners. Steadily dropped back and was 4-wide behind midfield heading into the turn. Widest turning in and steadily made up ground in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and got back. Ridden along in a rearward position and got near midfield making the turn. Stayed on same pace in the straight.
Jumped well and raced among leaders early. Better than midfield heading into the turn and was 3 to 4Ls behind the pace. Hung out making home turn and weakened in the straight.
Took the lead shortly after start and held a length's advantage into home straight. Fought gamely over the concluding stages to deny challengers.
Hard ridden to keep pace with leaders early stages. Settled on fence behind the leader around the bend but unable to keep pace after straightening. Weakened final stages.
Settled last on fence until 500 M. Switched out to find clear runner and made a late rally to be closest at finish.

Jumped fairly and settled behind midfield. Steadied and lost ground near 600 M and was near the back on straightening. Lacked a response when asked and was crowded 350 M. Only ran past a beaten runner.
Raced behind the pace early. Dropped to midfield near 900 M and was wide making home turn. Lacked the needed response in the straight.
3-wide and kept within 3Ls of the leader. Continued to be 3-wide and was 2Ls down turning for home. Unable to turn up a notch in the straight and faded out of contention final stages.
Slowly away and got back. Improved steadily along the rails and was near midfield after 800 M. Kept on only fairly in the straight.
Soon led by 1L against stand's rail, headed 300 M out and well held inside final 200 M.
About 3Ls behind speed in mid-division until running short of room 300 M out, edged right into clear running and ran on only fairly late.
3Ls back in mid-pack early on, 1L down in 4th at the 400 M and all out to maintain this position with 200 M to go, petered out late.
Poor effort, 7Ls last and pressure at halfway, steadily lost further ground.
Always outpaced, towards rear and no better than 5Ls off the pace until the final 200 M, plugged on past a few tired ones close home.
Always around midfield between 3Ls and 4Ls behind the speed until the 200 M, lost further ground through concluding stages.
Tucked away in midfield between 3Ls and 4Ls off the pace until the 200 M, never came close to troubling leaders.
Awkward break, against stand's rail and always worse than midfield at least 5Ls off the pace.
Always in rear and never closer than 5Ls off the speed.
Slow start, towards rear about 6Ls off speed early, 3Ls back in midfield at 400 M, kept on fairly for a place without threatening quinella pair.
Slow to begin but soon recovered to be 1L off pace in 2nd early, eased to the front at the 300 M, joined by quinella pair 150 M out and soon emptied, very weak inside final 100 M.
Tracked winner about 2Ls off pace in 4th or 5th until the 400 M, every chance when a neck down with 150 M to go, soon grabbed by winner and outpaced final 50 M.
Close up on stand's side no worse than 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th through first 500 M, ridden along when 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, led inside final 100 M and asserted close home.
Prominent but raced down centre of track about 2Ls off pace early and hard ridden when 1L down with 300 M to go, one-paced thereafter.
Disputed early lead on fence, led by 1L at 1000 M, headed at 300 M, dropped out rapidly.
2-wide and about 4Ls off speed in midfield until home straight, much too one-paced to figure.
3-wide with cover about 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed in or around midfield until final bend, failed to quicken up.
Awkward break, 4-wide no cover early on, pressed on to be 2Ls off pace out 3-wide no cover at 1000 M, all out to be 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, very tired late.
Always towards rear at least 6Ls off the speed, hard ridden to be 4Ls down in 11th at the 200 M, no impression.
Worse than midfield 4-back on fence about 6Ls off pace at 1000 M, 5Ls off speed turning for home, posed no danger to leaders.
Had the box run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd until homestretch, switched out to lead 150 M out, ran on well to score comfortably.
Slow away, 3-back on fence between 3Ls and 4Ls off pace in midfield until home straight, short of room 250 M out, clear at 200 M, one-paced.
Checked at 1200 M when settled in rear, 5Ls back in 9th or so at 800 M and entering home straight, stayed on strongly when just over 1L down in 5th at 200 M, evened out late.
Disputed early lead but settled 2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at the 1000 M, led at top of home straight but headed about 150 M out, lost out on a place final 50 M.
One from rear about 7Ls behind leader at 1200 M, not much closer turning for home, never a factor.
Very poor effort, always off the bridle when at least 5Ls off pace and worse than midfield, beaten turning for home.
Slow start and over-raced early on, 2-wide and 3Ls back in 4th down backstretch, under pressure to maintain position at 600 M, kept on dourly for a place past tiring rivals.
Awkward break and over-raced early on in rear 8Ls off the leaders, always struggling.
Around midfield but trapped 4-wide. Kept on without threatening in straight. (Bled.)
Soon forward of midfield. Kept on in straight until one-paced inside 200 M.
Around midfield but trapped very wide and without cover. Beaten soon upon straightening.
Soon forward of midfield. Took closer order along rail turning in. Kept on in straight but lost all momentum after having to steady twice inside 200 M.
Pushed forward along rail. 4th or 5th from 1200 M. Steadied off heels at 700 M. Shifted out to find running in straight but got outsprinted for a minor placing final 100 M.
Towards rear. Made up good ground final 200 M to just miss a place.
Soon led. Headed 200 M and checked at 100 M when already well beaten.
Towards rear. At least 6Ls back upon straightening. Made up good ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish but simply had too much to do.
Went forward from wide draw and sat outside the leader from 1000 M. Unable to quicken in straight and weakened badly 200 M out.
Midfield or better. Soon dropped out of contention upon straightening.
Soon 2nd after disputing lead. Steadied at 1000 M as leader shifted to the fence when not clear. Ran on gamely in straight and held on to win comfortably after hitting front 200 M out.

Very slowly away. Ridden forward from 1200 M but was still 7 to 8Ls down at 800 M. Saved ground along rail turning in. Shifted ground twice to find running after 300 M and made up good late ground to grab 3rd.
At rear. Never seen with a chance.
Never far off whilst proving difficult to settle in the early stages. Midfield turning in. Soon no extra.
Waited with. Finished off race well inside final 200 M down centre of track. Did best work at finish.
Broke well. Restrained to 2nd just behind leader. Dropped to 3rd rounding home bend. Ran home one-paced in straight.
Soon took up running and led to 400 M. Dropped out.
Settled behind midfield. Commenced run about 300 M out. Ran home well under pressure to assert authority close to finish.
Settled mainly in forward of midfield. Quickened well to hit front passing 200 M only to be collared nearing finish.
Mainly in last few. Made up late ground down straight without threatening.
Raced freely in midfield far side. Remained same turning for home. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Broke well. Raced 3-wide in midfield far side. Took closer order rounding home bend. Gained 3rd into straight but soon became one-paced and swamped.
Close up. Improved to 2nd outside leader rounding home bend. Hit front early in straight before headed passing 200 M. One-paced closing stages.
Settled in last few. Commenced move rounding home bend but did not find much room behind horses on inner early in straight. Produced good late finish inside final 300 M.
Mainly in midfield. Baulked behind runners early in straight. Made no impression closing stages.
Shade tardy into stride, drove through to hold spot behind leader, had run of race to turn using little, bumped in straight and moved up to threaten at 250 M but faded last 100 M.

Broke with them, drove through early but unable to settle close to rail, caught 3 and 4 wide without cover 3Ls from pace, always working in run, under pressure entering straight and slowly gave ground.

Fair to begin, ridden along to push forward into prominent spot outside leader, pressured by outside horse throughout, loomed up to hit lead at 300 M, showed good fight last 100 M to hold off challengers to score narrowly.
Away with them, caught 3 wide midfield just off speed, travelled wide with cover 3Ls away throughout, got clear passing 300 M but lacked any turn of foot to be a factor.
Broke with rest, unable to muster early speed and settled in rearward division 2 wide 6Ls away, came with run 3 and 4 wide into straight, finished race off evenly from too far back.

Began well, kept with them in early stages to hold good position 1 out 1 back, enjoyed great run using nothing in mid-section, under hard riding early in straight but kept giving strongly to make frame.

Began fairly, restrained from awkward alley to settle near rear 3 wide 6Ls from lead, pushed on 4 wide from 600 M, always working and made some ground in straight but couldn't sustain effort. (Lost plate.)
Away with field, showed speed to cross and lead them after 200 M, raced keenly in front at good clip, held 1/2 length advantage on straightening, collared at 300 M and unable to offer anything.
Began well, pressed on from wide alley to race 3 wide without cover outside leaders, pressured throughout, only 1L away on turn, workload took toll and weakened right out in straight.
Average to begin, had no early toe, allowed to stride forward 3 wide midfield 4 to 5Ls away, always covering ground and swung to extreme outside in straight. Big effort to get so close.

Fastest to break, unable to cross and taken hold of to take up midfield position 2 wide 4 to 5Ls away, enjoyed easy run to turn, tracked 3 wide into straight, sprinted hard when in clear to narrowly fail.
Fair to begin, lacked early dash, drifted back to settle 4 back on rails 6Ls from pace, pushed along to follow paint into straight, one paced in run home and never looked likely.
Awkward to begin, steadied and lost position early, settled midfield on rails 4Ls from speed, had soft run in mid-section, offered little when placed under pressure and only battled to line.
Jumped with field, taken in behind from wide alley, raced at rear 8Ls off pace, lobbed along at tail to turn, held up slightly making run between horses in straight, finished race off solidly.
Settled behind midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Midfield to straight. Soon faded.
Travelled mainly in 5th. Finished off race well to grab 2nd late.
Travelled mainly in 4th some 4Ls back to straight. Found nothing in the run home.
Chased leader throughout. Gained on leader closing stages but the post came too soon.
Prominent to straight. Gradually weakened under pressure.
Travelled behind midfield. Made up some late ground past beaten horses in the run home.
Soon took up running and eventually crossed to rails over 1000 M out. Held one length break most of way until late. Just held on to the line.
Always struggling in rear. Dropped to tail-end approaching home turn.
Taken to rear early, then travelled in midfield on rails in strung-out field. Unable to quicken to challenge in straight.
Settled in last few. Made up good ground down straight to be nearest at finish.
Never seen with a chance.
Towards rear to straight. Never nearer.
In last few to straight. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Average start, drove along fence to race 3 back 5Ls from speed, used little in run, followed rails in straight but lacked usual turn of foot and was very one paced to line.
Fairly away, lacked early speed, drifted back to just off midfield, 3 wide 5Ls away throughout, made strong run from turn and made up good ground in straight dying on run last 100 M (shifted out).
Slow to get going in early stages, drifted back to close to rear 2 wifde 8Ls away, under pressure to turn and had field to beat in straight, only plugged home.
Fast into stride, pressed on to get closer early, trapped 3 and 4 wide midfield in middle stages, wide and 6Ls away, into straight, workload took effect and couldn't muster effort in straight.
OK to begin, restrained from wide alley to race 3 wide at rear 7Ls from speed, well back when entering straight, made up good ground late from impossible spot.
Bounced out well, showed early pace to take up running, pressured in middle stages to keeping going at good clip, held 1/2 length entering straight, quickly headed and weakened right out.

Fast into stride, worked hard early to cross outside leaders from widest alley, slotted in to 1x1 briefly at mid point, made 3 wide run from turn and kept finding to run down all but winner. Big run (bumped twice).
Average to begin, lacked early speed and dropped back to race in rear division 6 to 7Ls away on rails, angled wide on straightening and made up some ground late to be closest at finish.
Jumped fairly from wide alley, hard ridden early to take up forward spot, settled 3Ls away, 3 wide with cover in mid-section, very one paced in straight and only managed to hold ground to line.
Fair to jump, hard ridden to hold spot behind leader just off pace, had run of race, niggled along entering straight, gradually lost touch to be well beaten.

Standard to begin, taken hold of to settle in midfield spot 2 wide 4 to 5Ls from leaders, used little in run to turn, held up a little early in straight but lacked usual turn of foot and battled to line.
Slowly into stride, behind from start, raced at tail 9 to 10Ls away, caught up and made 3 wide run from 600 M coming widest in straight, set too great a task and plodded final furlong.

Broke cleanly, taken hold of to settle just behind speed, raced in 2 wide spot 3Ls away in mid-section, tracked well to turn, pushed into clear at 250 M and was solid in holding advantage over final stages.
Away well, had plenty of speed to be in battle for lead early, raced at leaders girth throughout putting pressure on, took control at 250 M but outpaced shortly after, kept on well to make frame.
Bumped shortly after start. Towards rear early before moving up to midfield but had to check off heels at 600 M. Weakened badly 200 M out. (Heart irregularity.)
Slowly away. At rear. Still 6Ls or so down upon straightening. Made up steady ground final 200 M but simply had too much to do.
Always at rear. Never in the hunt.
Midfield or better. Steadied off heels at 800 M and inconvenienced at 600 M. Shifted out turning in but only kept on one-paced to the line.
Began awkwardly but recovered to take up running at 800 M. Headed when no extra 250 M out.
Led briefly before sitting outside the leader about 1L back from 700 M. Kept on well in straight and hit front briefly 200 M out but unable to sprint home final 200 M.
Midfield or better but 4-wide. Under pressure but hung out rounding the turn at 600 M. 3Ls down turning in. Never looked dangerous in straight.
Jumped best before electing to sit 1L off the pace from 800 M. Ran on well in straight and took charge 200 M out to win going away.
Always in touch. 2Ls back after steadying off heels at 600 M. Ran on steadily in straight for a distant 3rd.
Towards rear. 4Ls or so back turning in. Never ran on in straight.
Soon forward of midfield about 2Ls off the speed. 4Ls down after checking off heels at 600 M. Kept on without threatening principals in straight. (Blood in trachea.)
Niggled along continuously to be in midfield or better from 800 M. Awkwardly placed approaching home turn when 2Ls off the pace. Ran on steadily in straight to just miss a distant 3rd.

Pushed to follow leader on rail in a handy spot. Within 2Ls back and pressured on the bend, 3rd after straightening. Held some chance early straight from the inside. Faded final 150 M. (Back pain and restricted hindlimb action.)

Began well. Restrained to shift across behind runners on rail. 6Ls back with 500 M to go. Saved ground on fence and responded strongly early in straight. Ran in restricted room final 200 M. Not fully tested.
Jumped well. Kept within 2Ls off pace in the 2-wide position. Ridden along from 600 M on, but made no improvement in running. Yielded ground turning home and finished with an empty tank final 200 M.

Broke well. Improved from a 3 wide position to race just outside leader at 600 M. Similar turning home. Kicked home strongly. Took charge soon after 300 M, but failed to sustain effort. Went down narrowly.

Average begin. Midfield or worse on fence first 600 M. Quickened when asked rounding home. Responded gamely to make good ground between runners. Late push to challenge for 3rd but closed the race off strongly.

Good early speed to stalk leader on the outside. Eased pressure to leader and settled 1 off 2 wide with cover after 600 M. 4th after straightening. Performed fairly in straight with no extra final 150 M.
Jumped best. Set good pace on fence to straight. Battled hard when challenged at 300 M out. Kept on evenly without extra gear when needed. Outpaced by top pair and managed to hold on to 3rd.
