Began well. 3 wide with no cover around midfield. 5th after straightening. Came with strong run in straight. Made great progress on the outside and rallied powerfully final 100 M to get up on line.
Broke with them. Outpaced early to be in the rear. 2 wide about 4-5Ls behind lead with cover halfway. Last turning into straight. Responded nicely and made up some late ground final 200 M.

Began fairly. Lacked usual early speed. Never better than midfield in a 2 wide position. 3rd last turning in. Responded nicely whilst hanging in. Made some late headway final 100 M. Nearest at finish.
Outpaced early and settled in rear section. Asked for an effort near 400 M and was widest turning for home. Rallied well and swept past rivals in the straight.
Jumped well and took the lead. Remained in front heading into home straight but weakened thereafter.
Trapped wide into 1st turn. Kept alongside the leader in back straight. A length off the leader on straightening and had the lead briefly near 200 M. Unable to sustain effort thereafter.

Niggled along to hold a forward position. Raced 2-wide behind the leaders in back straight. Switched 3-wide turning in and was within 2Ls off the leader on straightening. Unable to keep pace final stages.
Jumped awkwardly, then was crowded and lost further ground. Settled on fence in a rearward position until home straight. Only ran past a beaten runner.
Dropped to rear section and was last to enter home straight. Rallied well and made up ground in the straight.
Outpaced early. Raced on fence and no better than midfield. Switched out away from traffic at 200 M and got unbalanced after getting a heavy bump. Kept on fairly and was closest at finish.
Settled on fence and no worse than midfield. 2Ls off the lead on straightening. Contested lead at the 200 M but faded quickly thereafter.
Settled 2-wide and no better than midfield. Swung out turning in and kept on well in the straight despite hanging in.
Jumped awkwardly and trailed field. Remained at the rear until straightening. Made a strong rally and was closest at finish.

Pushed along out of the gates and settled 2-wide better than midfield. 4Ls off the pace on straightening and responded well under pressure. Took the lead inside final 200 M but unable to hold off winner last few strides.

Ridden along out of the gates and slotted in behind the leader at 1200 M. Remained in a prominent position behind the pace until home straight. Contested for the lead inside 200 M but unable to find extra to challenge principals.
No early dash and sat about 6Ls off pace in 11th at 1100 M, same turning for home, never threatened to place. (See Racing Incidents.)
3-wide no cover in 5th at 1100 M, gained cover 3-wide at 600 M when about 4Ls back in midfield, petered out tamely in home stretch.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 2nd or 3rd until final bend, plugged on at the one pace but did enough for 2nd.
Worse than midfield at least 4Ls off pace on fence until home stretch, scraped past a few tired rivals late on.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 4th at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 5th taking final bend, always outpaced.
8Ls last at 1100 M, further back detached down back stretch, never properly involved.
3-wide but with cover and 4Ls down in 8th at 1100 M, 5Ls down in 10th off final bend, no impression.
Lacked early pace, forced 4-wide no cover 4Ls off pace in 7th at 1200 M, hard ridden while pressing on to be 3Ls down in 4th out deep off home turn, soon beaten and eased final 200 M.
3-back on fence about 3Ls behind in 6th or so until final bend, over 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, one-paced and lost out on a place final 50 M.
Gained a soft lead on the fence, always about 2Ls clear before straightening for home, never looked like being headed.
Settled about 8th place 2-wide and roughly 4Ls off the speed from 1200 M to final bend, made fair late ground for a place.
2-wide and 1L down in 2nd at 1200 M, 2Ls down in 3rd and struggling to lie taking final bend, emptied.
2-wide between 3Ls and 4Ls off the speed in 6th or so until home straight, closer when vying for 4th place 200 M out, one-paced late.
6Ls down and 2-wide at 600 M, 5Ls down in 8th off home turn, rallied well out wide to lead on the line.
9Ls last 700 M out, not much closer turning for home, never a factor.
Box-seat run on fence no worse than 2Ls off speed until home stretch, kept on well to lead inside final 50 M, collared by the winner on the line.
Always towards rear, about 6Ls down in 10th at the 600 M, nearest at the finish without really threatening.
Disputed early lead, a neck down in 2nd on fence at 700 M, 1L down in 2nd taking final bend, weakened right out very quickly.
Always 3-wide no cover while prominent about 2Ls off lead in 5th, loomed like the winner to lead 150 M out but headed 50 M out and weakened to lose a place final strides.
Worse than midfield at least 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed on fence through to home straight, ran on fairly late, never nearer.
Led by a neck out 2-wide at 700 M, 1L to the good off final bend and at the 200 M, headed 150 M out and no extra late.
3 and 4-wide no cover in rear about 6Ls off the pace down the back, made some decent late headway out wide.
2-wide and 2Ls off the speed in 3rd at 700 M and similar at home straight entrance, very weak and disappointing thereafter.
Slowest away, 3-back on fence about 3Ls or 4Ls back in mid-division until home straight, over 2Ls down in mid-pack at 200 M, ran out of room late but always outpaced by principals.
Settled in 4th place just 2Ls off the pace. Made no impression in straight.
Switched off at the back. Some 10Ls down along back straight. Still 6 to 7Ls last turning in. Made up some ground in straight whilst hanging in but never looked dangerous.
Towards rear. Held up upon straightening when still 4 to 5Ls back. Kept on one-paced when in the clear.
Began awkwardly. Behind midfield some 6Ls off the speed. Made up good ground in straight whilst hanging in to grab a distant 2nd in the closing stages.
Led going into the 1st turn before sitting 1 out and 1 to 2Ls off the leader. Struggled soon after straightening.
Led rounding the 1st turn. Headed 250 M out and weakened badly inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Widest turning in when still 5Ls back. Ran on in straight to snatch a minor placing close home.
Midfield or worse. Unbalanced when awkward on heels at 1800 M. Never a threat in straight.
Dropped to the rear from wide draw. Midfield turning in by saving ground along rail. Very one-paced and was steadied off heels 150 M out.
Midfield about 5Ls off the pace. Improved under pressure approaching home bend to be 2Ls down but wide turning in. Ran out of gas 250 M out.
Tracked the leader on rail. Switched out turning in and hit front briefly 250 M out but soon got outsprinted by the winner and collared by placed runners close home.
Travelled nicely on rail about 3Ls off the pace. 3rd turning in. Responded strongly and took charge 250 M out to win unchallenged.
Settled towards rear. Not clear run early in straight. Produced moderate impression closing stages.
Midfield to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Settled at the back and never seen with a chance.
Settled towards rear. Improving under pressure but did not find much room passing 200 M. Kept on to finish.
Raced wide towards rear to straight. Made up good ground to do best work at finish.
Prominent to straight. Gradually faded.
Made all. Kept on well under pressure to finish.
Midfield to straight. Made moderate progress along rails to be nearest at finish.
Always thereabouts. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening but only kept on steadily without threatening.
Wide in midfield to straight. Made no impression in the run home.
Chased leader to straight. Gradually faded.
In last few. Kept on one pace under pressure in straight.

Fast into stride, pressed on early to take up 1 out 1 back spot 2Ls off lead, enjoyed good run mid-race, niggled along from 600 M when speed quickened, kept coming and hit line strongly without 100% racing room.

First away, taken straight to rail to find cover, settled behind the leader racing ungenerously early, enjoyed run of race in mid-section, on bridle to turn, came through split in straight but lacked dash to capitalise.
Began fairly, lacked early speed and drifted back to settle in rearward division on rail 6Ls away, shuffled back to near last on turn. Gave nothing over last 300 M. Poor.

Broke with field, pushed along to take up closer spot, trapped 3 wide without cover midfield, pressure on to sit outside leaders 1/2L away 3 wide, always working and still in mix to 200 M but couldn't sustain effort late.

Average to begin, ridden up to hold midfield spot 4-5Ls away, raced 2 wide with cover in mid-section, under pressure making run 3 and 4 wide from 400 M, raced one-paced in straight and didn't threaten.

Broke with field, restrained to rearward position, settled 4th from tail 5Ls away in 2 wide spot, restrained well and travelled comfortably to turn. Came with strong run widest in straight overhaulling all but winner.

Began well from widest gate, hard ridden and showed good speed to cross to lead, backed speed off nicely in mid-section, pressured from 200 M and kept giving until 200 M before workload took toll and dropped out.

Standard beginning, mustered speed to settle down 3 back on fence 3Ls from pace, had great trip spending nothing in run, followed fence in straight and made some ground but struggled to make impression late.

Slow to begin, taken in behind to obtain cover, drove through to take up spot 4 back on rails 4Ls away, used nothing in run, eased wide on turn and sprinted over the top of them in straight to score good win. Good ride.

Began awkwardly, drifted back to tail, settled on rails 7Ls from pace (didn't settle), made 3 wide run from 800 M, had cover from 600 M, came 4 wide on turn, in mix until 150 M but wide run took toll and faded out.

Slow to begin, drifted back to 2nd last spot 2 wide 7-8Ls from lead, raced at tail throughout, stoked up from 600 M, had field to beat on home turn, got going late and made good ground to be closest at finish.

Away well, showed speed to be prominent early, held spot at leaders girth (pace slow early), pressured leader throughout, speed quickened from 600 M, hit lead in straight and held on to 100 M but faded late.
Jumped best before sitting outside the leader about 1/2L back. Kept on well under pressure but always well held by the winner and lost 2nd close home.
Lost ground at start after being fractious and jumping awkwardly. Towards rear. About 5 lbs back at 800 M. 2Ls down turning in by saving ground along rails. Ran on without threatening principals.
Soon led. Kept on well under pressure final 300 M to win comfortably.
Midfield early before moving up on outside to 3rd from 900 M. Awkward on home turn. Kept on until no extra 100 M out.
Jumped well but soon outpaced to the rear from 1000 M. About 5Ls back after steadying at 800 M. Wide turning in. Never a threat.
Towards rear after having to steady shortly after the start. Niggled along to be in midfield or better from 900 M. Steadied at 800 M. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Towards rear from 1000 M having to steady shortly after the start. 5-wide turning in. Never a factor.
Slowly away. Ridden forward from rear to behind midfield from 1000 M. Steadied at 800 M. Ran on well in straight and looked every chance until not quickened and shifted ground final 100 M.
About 1L or so off the lead in 3rd or 4th place and on rail. Held up from 400 M to 100 M before shifting out and making a late dash to grab 2nd close home.

Jumped well. Settled around midfield, 2 wide with cover. Pressured to keep pace on the bend. 2Ls behind leader at 400 M. Responded fairly early straight but found plenty in open ground final 200 M. Closed race strongly to score.
Slow to begin. No speed early, pushed hard to keep pace. 2Ls back 3 wide with no cover midway. Pressured but yielded ground before straightening. Very weak in straight.

Jumped with the field. Kept 2 wide in the rear section at least 6Ls back until straightening. Last few turning in. Battled hard early straight to hold some chances. Couldn't sustain effort and weakened 200 M out.
Good early speed to set pace on rail. Edged by a neck at 800 M. Lost lead at 600 M and found nothing thereafter. Dropped out rapidly and finished far from field.
Good early speed to stalk leader early. Always within half length of lead in a 2 wide spot. Gained lead at 600 M. Still in front at 300 M. Lacked dash to sprint with them. Same paced till the line.
Broke with them. Soon midfield on rail. 4Ls off speed at 1200 M. Niggled along approaching turn at 800 M. Found little under riding on the bend. Lacked dash when needed. Faded final 250 M.

Average away. Midfield or better. 2 wide with cover at 800 M. Travelled well on the bend. Shifted 5 wide on straightening. Kept on giving inside 300 M. Outpaced by top pair inside final 100 M. Worked hard to hold on to 3rd.

Broke well. Settled behind midfield on rail. 5Ls off speed at 800 M. Saved ground along the fence rounding home. 8th entering straight searching for daylight early straight. Made some impression once in clear final 200 M.

Began well from the outside barrier. Midfield or worse, 3 wide with no cover on back straight. Ran very wide on track when pressured before straightening. No response when asked. Kept on evenly to the line.

Never far off. Settled in prime position on rail within 3Ls off pace. Niggled along to stay 1L back at 600 M. Shifted 3 wide after straightening. Took lead at 300 M. Still in front final 100 M. Fought hard but faded.

Broke with them. Raced last throughout. At least 8Ls back on fence at 1000 M. Shifted wide on straightening. Came with strong run. Made good ground outside but failed to match strides with winner closing stages.
Slow to begin. Settled 3rd last on fence. 7Ls behind lead at 800 M. Similar turning in. Responded nicely after straightening. Made good ground between runners final 300 M. Nearest at finish.

Outpaced early. 2 wide with cover, rearward with pressure. Finally picked up at 600 M but was forced widest turning in. Sprinted to make up good ground on the outside. Showed late impression but not enough for the rivals.
Broke well. Kept 2 wide 3Ls back before 1200 M. Improved from a 4 wide spot with no cover rounding home. Unable to pick up after straightening and tired badly final 250 M.
Raced alongside the leader until 1000 M. Kept within a length of the pace in a 2-wide spot before assuming the lead on straightening. Lacked a response when asked and tired in the straight.
Jumped fairly and raced 3-wide without cover at midfield. Improved and made up ground making the turn in a 3-wide position. Contested lead until 200 M. Unable to keep pace with top pair thereafter.

Jumped awkwardly and raced in rear section. Improved to be closer to midfield 1000 M out. Checked away from a weakening runner 400 M and had to switch away from traffic 300 M. Ran on fairly thereafter.
Settled in rear section until home straight. Blocked for a run at 400 M but never picked up after finding a clear path.
Settled in rear section. Rallied in the home straight and steadily made up ground. Fell just short in catching the winner.
Soon in front and led field into home straight. Weakened and finished tailed out. (Bled.)
Settled on fence behind the leader. Failed to quicken on straightening and weakened.
2-wide and kept within 3Ls of the leader until home straight. Stayed on same pace to the finish.
Jumped well and steadily dropped back to be racing behind midfield. Improved to be near midfield at the turn but was widest turning for home. Unable to keep pace thereafter.
Missed the jump and lost ground. Trailed field until home straight. Responded well when asked on straightening and closed the race off well despite hanging in.
Among leaders early but eased back to midfield. 3-wide making the turn and picked up well on straightening. Took the lead near 200 M and held off a late challenger.
3Ls off the pace when 2-wide at 800 M, 3-wide no cover when 1L down in 3rd entering home straight, 2Ls down in 3rd and one-paced at 200 M, plodded the remainder.
Slow away, 8Ls off pace in rear at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 10th turning for home, soon outpaced.
3-wide with cover about 8Ls behind at 1000 M near rear, closer entering homestretch when a little short of running, soon clear but didn't find anything.
Dreadful performance, led to first turn before travelling in 3rd spot but keen and got very unbalanced after colliding with rail at 1400 M and well beaten 800 M out.

Box-seat on fence at 1400 M, 3-back on fence 4Ls in 5th at 800 M, a little closer taking home turn and briefly held up for a run at 300 M, lacked pace of quinella pair but plugged on to take 3rd on line.
10Ls off pace in 2nd last at 1000 M, 5Ls down in 10th off final bend, kept on fairly, just missed out on a place, albeit a long way behind quinella pair.
Prominent but without cover very early, 2-wide and 2Ls down in 4th at 1000 M, sent on to lead at top of homestretch, 1L clear at 200 M, readily.
4-wide no cover early on, pressed on to lead at 1000 M, 2Ls clear at 800 M, headed at top of home straight, very one-paced.
Worse than midfield about 7Ls off the pace at 1200 M, 4Ls down in 8th taking home turn, didn't threaten to get much closer. (Bled.)
Always 3-wide no cover and worse than midfield at least 5Ls off the speed, never got involved.
Sluggish, awkward start losing 3Ls, 10Ls last at 1000 M, 6Ls back entering homestretch, made no ground on principals but stayed on past a few beaten rivals.
In midfield about 5Ls down in 7th at 1200 M, 3Ls back in 6th taking final corner, failed to kick.
Shared early lead but headed at 1000 M and 2Ls down in 2nd at 800 M, struggling to lie up off final bend, continued to struggle.
5Ls behind in 8th when 2-wide at 1000 M, closer turning for home and clear 2nd when 1L behind winner at 200 M, always held by winner.
6Ls off pace in rear at 800 M, a little more forward but without cover on the circle, very one-paced.
At least 6Ls off pace and niggled along in rear through to final bend, never nearer but did have difficulty in finding clear run 200 M out.
About midfield when keen at 1000 M, badly checked at 800 M but recovered to be 4Ls down in midfield off final bend, one-paced.
In midfield 3-back on fence about 4Ls off speed until home straight, didn't find much off the bridle.
In 2nd place 1L off speed out 2-wide at 1100 M, lost place on circle and only 2Ls down in 6th at top of stretch when short of running, out clear at 300 M but always well held.
Disputed lead at 1200 M, 1L down in 2nd off final bend, soon beaten.
Box-seat run on fence 2Ls in 3rd or so until final bend, a bit one-paced and never threatened quinella pair inside final 200 M.
Never better than midfield, 7Ls back in rear at 800 M, made a little ground on the circle on fence but never threatened further in home straight.
Settled 3-wide with cover about 3Ls off pace in 8th through to 600 M, a little closer entering homestretch, 2Ls down in 2nd at 200 M, no extra thereafter and lost out on place final 100 M.
Crossed from wide gate to lead by 1L on fence at 1100 M, still clear by 2Ls at the 200 M, headed about 80 M by winner but had done enough to hang on for 2nd.
Awkward break, on fence about 4Ls back in midfield at 800 M, no closer turning for home, posed little danger.
Worse than midfield at least 4Ls off the pace through to final bend, very weak in homestretch.
Raced too freely when 3-wide no cover when 2Ls off speed in 5th at 1000 M, just over 1L down in 3rd taking home straight, beaten by the 200 M.
Covered up in midfield within 3Ls off the pace until home straight, 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, led 80 M out, won going away.
Towards rear. At least 8Ls off the pace at 1000 M. Still 6Ls back turning in. Made up good ground final 250 M to just miss a place.
Slowly away but soon recovered to be 2 to 3Ls back from 1200 M. Ran on to grab 3rd in the closing stages.
Around midfield. 4 to 5Ls back at 1000 M. 3Ls back turning in. Ran on steadily to the nearest at finish without threatening principals.
Never far off about 2 to 3Ls behind the pace. Kept on in straight until not quickened inside 100 M.
Towards rear about 6Ls off the lead at 1000 M. Midfield about 3Ls back turning in but got held up until 200 M. Ran out of room again and steadied 100 M out when making some ground.
At rear. Shifted out abruptly off heels when improving at 800 M. Not a threat in straight.
2nd just 1L back. Responded well under pressure 250 M out and took lead at 200 M but got outsprinted by the winner final 100 M.
Led to 200 M. Swamped for a place when one-paced close home.
Midfield early before dropping back towards rear about 5 to 6Ls back from 1100 M. 5-wide turning in. Kept finding final 400 M to take charge 100 M out to win convincingly.
Midfield and hung in early. Headway out wide from 1000 M to just 1L back in 2nd or 3rd place at 800 M. Kept on in straight until finding no extra 200 M out.
Checked after start. At rear. Never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.)
3rd or 4th about 2Ls off the pace. Box-seated behind the leader turning in. Never found much room in straight and could not be ridden out after steadying inside 100 M.
Settled in midfield about 4Ls back. 2Ls back turning in but got held up early straight. Ran on a bit before finishing one-paced.
Bounded in air and lost ground at start. Towards rear. Steadied off heels at 1100 M. Never in the hunt.
Settled behind midfield. No clear run behind horses early in straight. Shifted out for a run about 200 M out and finished off race strongly.
Settled 4th 2-wide in midfield just over 2Ls off the lead. Ran on steadily down straight but found winner too strong.
Attempted to make all, only to be swamped nearing finish.
Settled in 3rd some 2Ls off the pace. Couldn't obtain clear passage on rails most of straight until very late.
Waited with. Commenced move upon straightening and responded well to jockey's asking. Asserted authority close to home.
Always well back. Never a danger.
Never better than midfield. Faded in straight.
Chased leader to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Showed great early speed to lead them and cross after 250 M, raced ungenerously in front at good speed, pressured to turn, kept fighting to 200 M but workload took toll and weakened late.
Best to begin, didn't have enough pace to cross, eventually took up spot outside leader, shaded leader throughout always working, still there to 250 M but compounded last 200 M. Worked too hard.

Average away, pushed along to take up forward position, held spot 1 out 1 back 2Ls away throughout, travelled well 1L away on turn, came with run with winner but lacked dash to threaten. Kept on to make frame.
Began well, showed good speed to hold prominent spot 2 wide in 5th position, 3 wide 3Ls away from 800 M, in mix at 300 M (hanging) but lacked turn of foot to threaten last bit.

Away with them, lacked early speed, drifted back to just off midfield 6Ls away in 2 wide spot, used little to turn but not travelling comfortably, raced very one paced in stretch making little ground. (See Racing Incidents.)
Lost ground when bumped early, drove through to settle just off midfield on rails 6Ls away, travelled well to turn, held up midway in straight and finished strongly when clear. Should be closer.

Broke well, taken hold of to settle off pace, settled midfield 5Ls away 3 wide with cover, ridden along to make ground on turn, swung wide in straight and responded well under pressure to hold off challengers late.
Began with them, taken back to tail from wide alley, raced at rear 2 wide 10Ls from pace, made 3 wide run on turn, gave huge start and made up good ground widest in straight to be closest at finish.

Crowded early, restrained to settle down in rearward division, raced 2 wide 8 to 9Ls from pace, using little in run, near to last on straightening, struggled to make ground in straight. Not knocked around.

Jumped with them, shuffled back from awkward alley, just worse than midfield 6Ls away 2 wide with trail, tracked eventual winner into straight, lost touch when they sprinted but stuck to task well to nearly grab win.

Jumped well, showed good early dash to contest lead, raced on leaders back 2Ls away throughout (good pace), pushed along into straight, held up slightly by tiring runners but unable to go on when clear.
Slow to begin from wide alley, settled in 2nd last spot, raced on rails 8Ls from frontrunners using little in run, angled wide in straight, finished race off fairly from well back.
Began only fairly, got going to hold midfield spot 5Ls away, raced 2 wide in mid-section using little to turn, in traffic early in straight but unable to make impression when clear.
Slow to begin, mustered some speed to be 3 back on fence 4Ls from leader, niggled along to hold ground throughout, couldn't keep up in straight to be beaten a long way.
Led field to 200 M then gradually weakened.
Raced wide in midfield. Ran home one-paced under pressure in straight.
Travelled mainly in rear of midfield. Jostled between runners early in straight. Kept on well closing stages.
Jumped in rear. Quickly settled in midfield. Not much room on rails early in straight. Made moderate impression under pressure late.
Settled at the back. Made up some ground under pressure past beaten horses in straight.
Ran wide in midfield. Gradually weakened inside final 200 M.
Raced very wide towards rear most of way. Made no impression in straight.
Settled at the back. Closer order around home bend. Ran past beaten horses along rails in straight.
Settled just behind leaders on rails. Did not find much racing room in straight and kept on steadily to the line.
Always well behind.
Not far off in 4th. Came to challenge upon straightening hitting front briefly closing stages before pipped at post.
Settled in midfield. Obtained split over 200 M out. Finished off race well to just get up on line.
Towards rear most of way. Produced moderate impression late.
Always thereabouts. Quickened under pressure to hit front just inside 200 M but caught close to home.

Awkward to begin, settled near rear as usual, raced 5 back on fence 7 to 8Ls from frontrunners, travelled kindly throughout, had field in front entering straight, made up good ground late to be closest at finish.
Away reasonably, drifted back when caught wide to race 3rd from rear. 2 wide 8 to 9Ls away, on bridle making 4 wide run on turn, made up some ground late from too far back.
Began with field, settled in midfield spot 4 to 5Ls away, used little in mid-section, tracked 3 wide from 500 M in traffic early in stretch, made good ground when clear to make frame.

Began fairly, drove through to hold position on leaders back, 1L away travelling well throughout, used nothing to turn, received dream rails run entering straight but unable to capitalise and only battled to line.
Average to begin, caught 3 wide worse than midfield 7 to 8Ls from pace, had cover to turn, switched out in stretch but showed nothing and only plodded to line.
Jumped with them, taken back to near rear from wide alley, raced 2 wide 11Ls from speed, had field in front turning for home, held up at 300 M but made little impression when clear.

Broke with them, taken back from wide alley to settle 2nd from tail on rail, lobbed along about 9Ls away throughout, made run between horses in straight weaved into clear at 300 M and did best work late.
Away well, pushed forward but unable to slot in, race 3 wide without cover outside leaders throughout, moved up to challenge on turn, workload took effect and weakened out late.

Slow to begin, niggled to press forward to 1 out 1 back spot 3Ls off pace, travelled comfortably throughout, angled 3 and 4 wide into straight, chased hard but found first two a shade better. Solid effort.

Away with field, showed good early speed to drive through and take up running, kept them going at a steady pace, pressured from 500 M, hung out in straight, compounded with lack of fitness after relatively easy run.

Average to begin, restrained to settle just off midfield on rails 6Ls away, used nothing in run, followed paint in straight and unable to improve early, made up some ground late when clear without threatening winner.
Jumped with field, pressed forward but trapped 3 wide midfield 5Ls from pace, had cover throughout, made 4 wide run from 500 M, wide run took its toll and only held ground in straight.

Broke well, got going early to take up position outside leader, relaxed well with leisurely mid-section pace, at leader's girth to turn, took control at 300 M putting gap on rivals, just held on late.

Slow to begin, ridden along to take up spot 3 back on fence 3 to 4Ls off pace, enjoyed run of race using little in middle stages, tracked nicely into straight, got clear at 250 M and chased hard to go down narrowly.
Soon midfield or better around 2 to 3Ls behind the pace. Awkward on heels when racing ungenerously at 600 M. Kept on in straight but looked 3rd all the way.
Awkwardly away. Hard ridden to lead or dispute lead from 800 M. Kept on well in straight but went down by the narrowest of margin on the post.
Awkwardly away and went forward from rear to 3rd just 1 to 2Ls off the lead from 750 M. Shifted in upon straightening and ran on determinedly to win by the narrowest of margin on the line.
Around midfield about 3Ls back and on rail. Awkward turning in. Shifted out at 200 M but remained one-paced in the run home.
Jumped well before dropping back slightly to forward of midfield 2 to 3Ls off the pace from 700 M but mostly wide and without cover. Not a threat in straight.
Went forward from wide draw to lead or dispute lead. 2nd from 750 M. Nothing left 200 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent early. Dropped back to midfield about 3Ls off the lead at 600 M. Beaten 200 M out. (Back pain and see Racing Incidents.)
Prominent in 3rd or 4th position just 1L behind the leaders. 2Ls or so back rounding the turn. Kept on without threatening placed horses.
Soon dropped towards rear from wide draw. About 6Ls down at 600 M. Still 5Ls back and widest turning in. Made up some ground whilst hanging in but simply set too big a task.
Outpaced at rear. 5Ls down turning in. Never quickened in straight.
Mostly behind midfield about 4Ls back. 5Ls or so turning in after steadying and shifting off heels to be 5 or 6 wide. Very one-paced in straight.
Always at rear. Never seen with a chance. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well. Pushed hard to go forward. Parked outside leader's girth throughout back straight. Fought hard to keep pace without quickening. Weakened final 100 M. Just failed to make the frame.
Broke well. Within 2Ls off pace. Trapped 3-wide throughout. Failed to slide in for cover on the bend. Forced wider on straightening. Kept on well in straight. Had every chance to place.

Broke with field. Lacked early speed and settled rearward. 2nd last 6Ls back in a 2 wide spot halfway. Same turning in. Switched to the middle of the track at 200 M. Left with too much to do and ran on only fairly.
Began fairly. Midfield and never far off. 3Ls behind on fence mid-way. Same margin entering straight in 7th. Fought hard in straight. Ran on evenly inside to snatch place late.
Fair start. Outpaced early on fence. 6Ls back at 800 M. 4th last after straightening. Responded fairly under hard riding. Unable to pick up and went on one-paced. Never a factor.
Slow to begin. Settled in prime position 1L behind leader on fence. Travelled well on fence rounding home. 4th turning in. Closed race one-paced whilst hanging in. Found winner too good.
Last one out. Made ground on the bridle early stages. Never far off. 2-wide 3Ls back approaching the turn. Niggled along on the bend. Battled hard to stay competitive early straight. Faded gradually.
Jumped well from the inside gate. Set pace till straight throughout. Held rail comfortably. Led by 1L turning home. Similar final 200 M. Responded strongly under the whip 150 M out and won readily.
Slow to begin. Kept last, 7Ls off lead at 800 M. Shifted to fence at 600 M. Last to enter straight. Kept on evenly in straight. Hit traffic final 100 M. Not fully tested.

Jumped well. Niggled along back straight to stay midfield in a 3-wide position. 3Ls back at 600 M. Pressure from 400 M. Shifted very wide on straightening. Failed to show dash when needed. One-paced till finish.
Slow to start. 1 off 4Ls back behind midfield at 700 M. Similar taking straight. Ran wide but unable to accelerate to sprint with them. Stayed on well but failed to turn up a notch.
Began well. Settled in the rear section. 3-wide no cover about 5Ls off speed. Pushed from 600 M on. Slightly improved position on the bend. Shifted wide on straightening. Very weak in straight.
Pressed forward and soon took the lead. Maintained a 1/2L advantage heading into the home straight. Headed by winner near 200 M and held off a late charging rival for 2nd place.
Raced wide and without cover at midfield. Weakened after straightening.
Quickest out but was allowed to drift back to midfield. Made a ground saving trip along the rails at the turn and only stayed on same pace in the straight.
On fence at midfield. Steadily drifted back after 800 M to travel behind midfield until home straight. Made up some ground in the final stages.
Dropped to the rear and trailed field into home straight. Ran on fairly in the straight.
Tagged alongside the leader until home straight. Kept on well and drew clear inside final 200 M.
Off slowly. Travelled 2-wide at midfield. Carried wider early part of the straight and made a late charge to be closest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly and settled in rear section. Steadied and switched in on straightening to make a run. Lacked the needed rally.
2-wide behind midfield. Lacked a response under the whip after 400 M and found nothing in the straight.
Jumped well and contended for the early lead. Took a sit off the leaders after 1000 M and was 2Ls off the pace on straightening. Kept on without threatening.

Ridden out of the gates but was outpaced by leaders. Better than midfield in 4th place in back straight. Hugged the rails and was 4Ls off the pace making home turn. Kept on well in the straight and just missed 2nd place.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground. Raced towards the rear until straightening. Kept on without threatening.
Led on fence by a neck at 1200 M, about 1L clear from 1000 M to the 200 M when treading water, weakened quickly.
Slow break, 3-back on fence in 7th when 4Ls off speed at 1100 M, tight for room from 600 M to homestretch when 3Ls off in 6th, gave chase fairly but never likely to catch winner.
Always on the pace, a neck down in 2nd out 2-wide at 1200 M, under pressure when 1L down in 2nd at final bend and same at 200 M, failed to quicken.
Head up at 1200 M when 5Ls back in 8th and 2-wide, marginally closer but 4-wide off final bend, picked up nicely to lead 150 M out, stayed on.
3-wide with cover when 3Ls behind lead in 6th at 1100 M, under pressure to maintain position at 600 M and slipping back on the turn for home, capitulated.
At least 6Ls or 7Ls last on fence through to home straight, made very minor late ground.
Always about one from rear about 5Ls or 6Ls off the speed and 2-wide, never remotely dangerous.
Awkward break, switched from wide gate to fence, 6Ls back in 9th at 1200 M, 5Ls back off home turn, ran past a few tired rivals to be nearest at finish.
Ideally placed on fence 2Ls off pace in 4th from 1200 M to home straight, all out to improve from similar spot at 200 M, very weak inside final 200 M.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 5th at 1100 M, hard ridden to lie up 700 M out and tended to hang in on circle, still 3Ls back in 5th on straightening, plugged on at home.
3-wide with cover in 10th when 6Ls off speed at 1100 M, not much better off taking final bend, no impression.
3-wide no cover disputing lead at 1200 M, 2Ls down in 3rd out wide at 800 M, struggling to hold this position off home turn, dropped out rapidly.
Ordinary start, tried to lead but couldn't at 1100 M, pressed on at breakneck tempo with CHINOOK down back stretch to be 5Ls clear into home turn, dropped out rapidly inside 200 M.
Checked at 1100 M when 5Ls down and 2-wide in 8th, steadied at 800 M and entering homestretch when about 9Ls behind, made some fair late ground, never nearer.
Slowly away, about 9Ls or 10Ls last from 1200 M to home straight, ran on very strongly late towards inside, not beaten far at all.
2-wide and 4Ls back in 6th at 1100 M, 6Ls down in 6th at 800 M, struggling when 8Ls back in 7th taking home turn, no impression.
Crowded at 1300 M and unbalanced on fence at 1100 M when 5Ls behind speed in 7th, 8Ls in 6th behind very fast pace taking final bend, ran on very strongly late, narrowly failed.
Slow start, 7Ls down in 11th at 1100 M, 10Ls down off final bend, made some moderate late ground, never nearer.
4-wide no cover at 1100 M when prominent, got in 2-wide but tended to hang in when about 6Ls behind in 4th at the 600 M, emptied out from top of home straight.
3Ls down in 5th on fence at 1100 M, about 7Ls behind strong pace in 4th taking home turn, rallied well and managed to join MUTUAL GAIN on line.
Disputed lead at 1200 M, tucked into the box seat at 1000 M behind two leaders, 5Ls down behind tearaway leaders in 3rd at home turn, picked up to lead 60 M out, joined by VINCERE on line.
6Ls down in 9th when 3-wide with cover at 1100 M, left 3-wide no cover down back stretch at least 8Ls off the lead, never a factor.
Slow to begin, 7Ls back in 10th at 1100 M, 8Ls behind at 600 M and with similar margin to find on leaders at 200 M, made some fair late ground, nearest at finish.
Head up when steadied while disputing lead at 1200 M, went too quickly along inside QI'S PET shooting at least 5Ls clear of 3rd place turning for home, very tired when grabbed 60 M out.
Taken back from wide draw. Hung in when at least 8Ls back at 1000 M. Widest turning in. Made up some late ground but simply had too much to do.
Around midfield about 4Ls off the pace. Under pressure rounding home turn. Dropped out tamely 200 M out.
Jumped well but soon outpaced to the rear some 7Ls back from 1000 M. Unbalanced after bumping rail at 600 M. About 4Ls down turning in but made no show in straight.
Recovered from sluggish start to be in midfield about 3 to 4Ls off the pace. Crowded at 600 M. Ran on steadily to get a distant 3rd.
Soon 2nd. 1 out and 1 back off the winner along back straight. Kept on in straight and looked 2nd all the way.
Checked shortly after start. Always at rear. Never featured.
Always thereabout about 3Ls off the speed. Kept on without threatening placed horses in straight.
Soon led and made all to win comfortably.
Soon behind midfield about 5Ls back at 1000 M. Unbalanced after being bumped rounding home turn. Made up some late ground.
Disputed lead before settling in 3rd about 2Ls back from 1000 M. Unable to quicken in straight and weakened final 100 M.
Prominent. 2 to 3Ls back from 1000 M. Kept on until swamped for a minor placing 50 M out.
Dropped to the rear from wide draw. Last from 1000 M at least 10Ls back. Never a threat.
Led or disputed lead on rails. Soon kicked clear after straightening to win easily.
Rear of midfield far side. Lost position rounding home bend and last into straight. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Settled at the back. Commenced run approaching home bend. Made up good ground down straight to be nearest at finish.
Amongst leaders early. Lost position coming out of back straight. Weakened from 1-1/2Ls 3rd into straight.
Mainly in midfield on rails. Closer order turning in. Ran home one-paced.
Mostly in midfield to straight. Weakened. (Lame morning after racing.)
Joint leaders most of way to straight. Unable to match pace of winner but kept on well to finish.
Settled in rear. Took closer order rounding home bend. Gained midfield into straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Raced wide in forward of midfield. Lost position rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
Wide in midfield until losing ground home turn. Made no impression in straight.
Always in last few.
Prominent to 500 M then gradually weakened.

Away fairly, lacked early dash and drifted back to 4 back on rails 5Ls from speed, used nothing in run and travelled kindly to turn, made run between runners in straight coming home strongly last 100 M.
Average to break, drifted back to 2nd last on rail 9Ls from leaders, not asked in middle stages, pushed along to improve on turn. Showed nothing and plugged home.

Away with field, pressed forward early to take up spot behind leader, enjoyed run of race in middle stages, always travelling to turn, gained rails run in straight and showed good turn of foot to hit lead 100 M out and held on.
Began with them, ridden along to hold position 3 back on fence 4Ls away, spent nothing in mid-section, eased out in straight but lacked the necessary dash to be a factor.
Jumped with rest, showed no early speed to settle down just worse than midfield 2 wide 7Ls away, came 3 wide from 400 M but could only manage to hold ground to line, well beaten.

Broke with rest, in traffic early, took up midfield spot 2 wide 5-6Ls off pace, used little in run, checked when making run entering straight and closed race off fairly without getting a real chance. Pay to forget.

Jumped out with them, had enough early speed to cross outside leader, raced at leaders girth throughout (speed average), moved up to challenge on turn and lead briefly at 100 M but couldn't match winner last bit. (Lost whip.)
Average to begin, taken back from wide alley to race last on rails 10Ls away, lobbed along at tail throughout, made 3 wide run from 500 M, came with strong run down outside in straight. Solid effort.
Away well, showed good early speed to cross to lead easily, dictated terms in front at moderate speed, held 1/2L advantage into straight. Kept fighting to 100 M but just faded last bit. Fair effort.

Jumped okay, crowded early, settled just behind speed in 1 out 1 back spot, raced 2 wide 4Ls away in mid-section, still 3Ls away on turn, lost touch when they sprinted but closed raced off strongly last 100 M.

Slow to begin, hard ridden to settle just worse than midfield 6Ls from front runners, enjoyed good run to turn, tracked between runners in straight, lacked usual dash but closed off well to be closest at finish.
Average to begin, taken back from widest alley to slot in at tail, raced 2 wide 8-9Ls away throughout, hard ridden on turn, only passed tired horses in straight.
Forward of midfield about 3Ls back at 1000 M. About 2Ls down rounding the turn. Never threatened in straight but did hang in early straight and was awkward on heels final 100 M.
Slowly away. Towards rear. Still 5 to 6Ls down rounding the turn. Ran on steadily in straight to get a very distant 3rd.
Awkwardly away. Niggled forward to 2nd at 800 M but always trapped wide and without cover. Weakened badly 250 M out.
Jumped best before settling 1L or so behind the pace. 3-wide turning in. Kept on until no extra 200 M out.
Always at rear. Never a factor.
Bounded at start. Always at rear. Proved difficult to shift out for run early home straight but never looked dangerous after obtaining clear run.
Slowly away. Soon recovered to be in midfield or better. Steadied off heels at 600 M before taking closer order rounding the turn. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Midfield at best. About 4Ls back at 1000 M. Shifted out off heels at 600 M. Made no impression in straight.
Soon led. Kept on well in straight and did enough to hold off the 2nd horse in the closing stages having secured a 2Ls advantage 200 M out.
Soon tracked leader on rail. Steadied off heels at 800 M and continued to be awkward on heels rounding the turn. Unable to quicken in straight and plugged home final 100 M.
Thereabout just 1L or so behind the pace. Steadied off heels at 800 M. Nothing left 250 M out.
Dropped back to rear from wide draw. Hung out at 800 M. Never looked dangerous.
Midfield or better. About 3Ls back at 1000 M. Shifted out for running upon straightening. Kicked home strongly final 250 M but the post just came too soon.
Towards rear. Very one-paced in straight.

Average to begin. Never far off. Checked 100 M after start 3 to 4Ls off lead on fence in 5th. Similar turning in. Held some chance early straight but failed to show sprint to go with them. Good effort to make frame.

Began well. Crowded and checked 100 M after start. 2 wide 3Ls back in 6th at 800 M. Similar till straight. Stayed on well early straight but lacked sprint to be a factor. One-paced till finish. (Mucopus.)
Began only fairly. Settled in rear on rail. Over 7Ls off speed approaching the turn. Last to enter straight and did not get much closer. No response when asked.
Broke well. Outpaced early. 1 off rearward 7Ls back at 800 M. 2nd last entered straight. Trapped very wide on straightening. Kept on evenly down the centre of track. Only past beaten runners.

Broke with field. Last on fence, 9Ls back at 1000 M. 3-wide and improved steadily on the bend. Switched wide on straightening in 11th. Closed home strongly down outside to make late challenge for 2nd.
Jumped well from outside barrier. Behind midfield throughout in a 2 wide spot. Got its head up a few times on the bend. Last few turning in. Unable to pick up. Never really competitive.

On term from the inside gate. Pushed hard early to gain lead on rail. Edged by 1L at 800 M. Attempted to make all. Got passed on straightening. Soon beaten and weakened badly final 300 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Jumped with field. Midfield. 2 off 4Ls back halfway. Shifted 4 wide and improved on the bridle rounding home. Looked likely early straight. Couldn't sustain effort. Dropped out rapidly inside 250 M.

Jumped very well. Amongst last few on back straight. 2 wide 8Ls back with cover at 800 M. Improved in a 5 wide spot on the bridle rounding home. Responded nicely on the outside. No extra gear to make frame final 100 M.

Clean start. Travelled in prime spot 2 wide 2Ls off pace with cover. Entered straight 3 wide in 4th. Found plenty when challenged. Went forward at 300 M. Charged home powerfully final 200 M. Won readily at 150 M. Easy win.
Broke with them. Midfield or worse on fence. Worked to keep pace until the turn. Battled hard to stay competitive but unable to find more to challenge final 200 M. Tired final 100 M.

Good start. Raced just outside pacesetter until 1000 M. Raced handy 2 wide 1L off speed until straightening. Briefly headed until 300 M. Kept on giving thereafter. No challenge to winner but managed to hold onto 2nd.
Started fairly. Behind midfield on rail. 5Ls off speed at 800 M. Saved ground along the inside turning in. Attempted to make run between runners final 300 M but failed to show dash to be a factor.

Jumped best. Good speed to race outside leader. Restrained to take rail behind speed at 1000 M. 3rd turning for home on the inside. Over used early and responded fairly under the whip. Faded gradually.

Outpaced early and settled 2-wide at midfield. 3Ls off the pace and 4-wide turning for home. Kept chasing in the straight and reached within 1/2L of the lead at 50 M. Unable to find extra to catch winner.

Pushed along from a wide draw and raced off pace early. Kept being niggled and assumed the lead at 1000 M. Maintained a length's advantage into home straight but was headed 300 M. Kept on but faded steadily final stages.

Hit the front after 1600 M. Handed up the lead near 1000 M but remained a length off the leader. Kept close to the pace and regained lead final 300 M. Stayed on well and held off a late challenge to score well.
Eased back from widest draw and raced 3-wide behind midfield. Widest making the turn and rallied in the straight to be closest at finish.
Settled in rear section and near last to enter home straight. Ran on well and steadily made up ground.
Missed the jump, bumped and lost ground. Raced along the rails towards the rear. Ran on without threatening in the straight.
Travelled 2-wide at midfield. Kept on briefly on straightening but dropped out final 300 M. (Bled.)

Raced close to pace early. Eased at 1400 M and stayed within 4Ls of the leader. 4-wide without cover and pulled its way forward near 800 M. Kept on same pace after straightening and found no extra closing stages.
Settled at the back and trailed field into home straight. Only ran past beaten runners.
Hard to settle in a forward position early. Stayed 2 to 3Ls off the pace until 800 M. 3-wide among leaders making home turn. Dropped out shortly after straightening. (Bled.)
Settled on fence at midfield. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Raced on fence and a length off the pace at 1400 M. 2Ls off the lead turning for home. Kept on fairly in the straight but posed no threat to top pair.
Outpaced and raced 3-wide at midfield. Lacked a response when asked in the straight and only ran past beaten runners.
Off slowly and trailed early stages. Niggled along to be racing behind midfield after 1400 M. Switched out on straightening and steadily made up ground in the straight.
Soon led on fence, always about 1L clear until home straight, joined by ALL CHANCES with about 200 M to race but dug in well to assert again inside final 100 M, well rated ride.
2-wide and about 2Ls or 3Ls off speed in 4th or 5th down backstretch, 2Ls down in 4th at home bend and all out to keep within same distance at 200 M, no extra.
Always towards rear at least 6Ls off the speed until the 800 M, out 4-wide about 5Ls off the speed in 10th taking final bend, never threatened.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls off the speed at 1000 M, minor place hopes when 3Ls down in midfield at 200 M but much too one-paced inside the distance.
3-wide with cover 4Ls behind leader at 1400 M, hung out at 800 M, 5-wide turning for home when 3Ls down in midfield, plugged on at one pace.
2-wide 1L off pace in 2nd at 1400 M, pressed on to be a neck down in 3rd at final bend, faded out steadily.
3-back on fence 5Ls back in 7th at 1400 M, 3Ls down in 6th taking final bend, tended to hang on out in stretch but still ran on well to snare quinella place close home.
3-wide no cover about 1L off the pace until straightening for home, every chance when upsides winner at 200 M, one-paced close home and lost out on a place on the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
2-wide and 5Ls behind speed in 8th at 1400 M, pressured to be 4Ls down in mid-pack taking home turn, didn't trouble leaders.
No early dash and 8Ls last at 1600 M, 5Ls down in 10th taking home turn, kept on well to take 3rd on the line.
3-wide with cover in rear at least 7Ls off the pace from 1400 M to home turn, made some minor late ground.
3-wide with cover and 6Ls down in 9th or so at 1200 M, not much closer off home turn, never figured.
More prominent than usual, between 2Ls and 3Ls off speed in 4th or so down backstretch, niggled along to improve on the turn out 4-wide, 2Ls down in 6th at 200 M, evened out late. (Blood in trachea.)
Wide in rear round first bend, 9Ls rear at 1400 M, 6Ls down in 13th taking final bend, posed little danger.
Driven along when 10Ls detached at 1000 M, 6Ls down in rear taking final bend, made some fair late ground, nearest at finish.
2Ls down in 4th at 1200 M, 3-back on fence 4Ls down in 6th on the circle, very weak in homestretch.
4 and 5-wide no cover within 2Ls off speed in 4th or so down the back, a little further back and struggling to lie up turning for home, soon well beaten.
On fence settled 5Ls off pace in 8th at 1000 M, driven closer on circle to be about 3Ls down in midfield entering stretch, quickened up well to lead over 200 M out, pushed out, stylishly.
6Ls off pace in 10th at 1000 M, 4-wide straightening when 4Ls down in 9th place, 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, kept on gamely for a place.
Slowest away, never travelled well when 3-wide with cover about 6Ls off the pace in 10th or so, 5-wide (widest of all) into homestretch, soon beaten and eased late. (See Racing Incidents.)
1L down in 2nd out 2-wide at 900 M, same turning for home, one-paced when 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, weakened further.
2nd last about 8Ls off the speed at 1000 M, still in rear and 6Ls down taking home turn, 4Ls down and held at 200 M, no further impression.
Between 3Ls and 4Ls off speed in midfield through to straightening for home, 2Ls down in 6th at 200 M, kept on well despite just missing out on a place.
Disputed early lead but only crossed to fence to lead by 1L at 800 M, a neck clear off home turn, headed by winner over 200 M out, only narrowly missed out on a place.
3Ls behind leader in 5th at 1000 M, a touch closer turning for home, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, no chance with winner but kept on to just earn 2nd place.
Disputed early speed on fence, 1L down in 3rd at 800 M and hard pressed to maintain this position taking final bend, faded out.
Soon outside the leader just 1L back. Hit front at 400 M. Kept on well but unable to match speed with first pair in the closing stages.
At rear. Last turning in. Never seen with a chance.
Blundered at start but soon settled in midfield. Unable to quicken in straight and eased down close home.
Travelled prominent just 1L off the lead. Ran out of gas 250 M out.
In touch about 2Ls off the pace. Failed to quicken in straight and gave ground steadily 200 M out.
Ridden forward early before settling 3Ls off the pace from 1400 M. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Bounded in air and lost ground. Behind midfield about 5Ls back from 1400 M. Ran on well final 300 M to snatch win final strides.
Soon towards rear. About 8Ls back at 1200 M. 2nd last turning in. Made up some ground final 200 M but simply had too much to do.
Thereabout 2 to 3Ls off the lead but trapped wide and without cover throughout. Kept on well in straight and hit front briefly before getting pipped by the winner close home.
Began awkwardly and lost ground. Towards rear. Awkward on heels turning in and again at 300 M. Never threatened whilst hanging in and proving difficult to ride thereafter.
Soon led. Headed at 400 M. Weakened badly final 200 M.
Midfield or better. About 3Ls back from 1400 M. Ran on well final 300 M to be nearest at finish despite being carried in over the concluding stages.
Slowly away. At rear. 4Ls back turning in by saving ground along rail. Made up some ground final 200 M without threatening principals.
Towards rear. Ran past well beaten runners in straight.
Never far off on rails in 4th position. Held good chance early in straight up to 200 M. Failed to quicken to challenge and inconvenienced about 50 M out.
Midfield early. In rear rounding home bend. Ran on past beaten horses in the run home.
Raced wide in rear of midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Settled behind leaders mainly 2 out 1 back. Commenced run upon straightening and quickened to lead over 200 M out only to be pipped at post. (Bled.)
Led early then restrained just off the pace far side. Re-gained advantage coming out of back straight and remained same to home turn. Gradually overhauled early in home straight.
Niggled along in midfield. Fought on steadily under pressure in straight without threatening.
Always struggling in last few.
Jumped fairly but soon rushed up to lead. Ceded advantage back to early leader coming out of back straight. Gradually weakened out of contention shortly after home turn.
Settled nicely in rear of midfield. Commenced move entering home straight hugging inside rails. Obtained clear passage over 250 M out and ran on dourly to just get up on line.
Settled at the back. Wide rounding home bend and into straight. Made up good ground down centre of straight without threatening.
In rear far side. Took closer order out wide rounding home bend. Ran home one-paced from midfield into straight.

Away well, showed good early speed to roll forward and take up lead, over raced slightly in front at even clip, held 1L advantage on turn, under pressure entering straight, still there until 200 M but weakened last bit.
Fair to begin, pushed along to hold midfield spot 2 wide 4 to 5Ls away, not asked in mid section and tracked nicely 3 wide 3Ls away into straight, offered little when asked and plugged to line.

Began with field, awkward into stride not far away early but drifted back to just off midfield 5 to 6Ls away, raced 3 wide with cover in mid-section, tracked 4 wide on turn, lacked class to be a factor last 200 M.

Began only fairly, niggled along to be close on rails early, settled 3 back on fence 3Ls away in middle stages, used no petrol in run, on bit in traffic entering straight, left flat footed when they sprinted and held ground to line.
Broke well, showed good toe to hold position outside leader, raced 1 length away pressured from outside throughout, under pressure on turn and compounded in straight.
Average to begin, drifted back to last 10Ls away on rails, not asked in mid section, made 4 and 5 wide run on turn, tried hard but unable to make up ground when widest in straight, not up to them.

Bounced out with them, taken straight back to settle 4 back on rails 5Ls from leader, angled 2 wide at 1000 M, enjoyed easy run to turn, in traffic when entering straight, pushed clear at 250 M and came with powerful sprint to win easily.

Fast into stride, held inside running early before settling behind leader, had run of race throughout using nothing to turn, inconvenienced when looking for clear running early in straight but lacked dash when clear, even effort.

Away with field, restrained from wide alley to settle 2nd from rear 8Ls from pace, relaxed well and enjoyed easy run mid race, had field in front on turn, made strong run down outside in straight passing all but winner, good effort.

OK to break, pressed forward to obtain prominent spot, caught 3 wide 3 to 4Ls away with cover in mid section, always working to turn, in mix until 250 M (bumped) but wide run took toll and weakened late.

Evenly away, lacked early toe and unable to get close to rails from awkward alley, raced 4 wide without cover for most of journey, closed 5 wide to be 3Ls away on turn but couldn't sustain effort and plugged to line.

Broke well, taken in behind to find cover early, settled just worse than midfield in 2 wide position 6Ls away, 3 wide in traffic making turn, got clear at 350 M and finished race off well to be closest at line.

Broke fairly, pushed on wide early, trapped 3 wide outside the leaders throughout without cover, always wondering and under pressure on turn, still there until 300 M but compounded late due to early workload.

Jumped with field, became unsettled when restrained early, took up spot 6 to 7Ls away on rails, didn't settle with slow tempo and raced ungenerously throughout, made run between runners in straight but one paced at finish when clear.
Settled behind midfield. Only produced moderate progress under pressure inside final 200 M.
Never a factor.
Never better than midfield. Faded inside final 200 M.
Soon took up running from wide draw and led to straight. Gradually weakened.
Travelled on rails in midfield. Only kept on at the one pace under pressure in straight.
Wide in midfield to straight. Gradually weakened.
Mainly in forward of midfield. Just kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Well back to straight. Made up ground down centre of track past beaten horses.
Settled mainly in forward of midfield. Came to tackle leaders upon straightening and ran on to hold every chance throughout closing stages but just failed to peg back first pair.
Wide in rear of midfield most of way. Ran home one-paced.

Raced keenly on heels of leaders far side. Came to challenge upon straightening and gained slender advantage momentarily over 200 M out. Unable to sustain effort closing stages and missed out on a placing late.
Waited with. Commenced run upon straightening and ran on well between runners to just fail to get up on line.
Settled in 4th within striking distance. Quickened up under pressure to hit front 200 M out. Hung on well under pressure to defy challengers close to home.
Broke well. Close up before losing touch over 200 M out.
Began with them, restrained to tail from widest alley, raced in 2 wide spot 20Ls away, made 3 wide run from 600 M, came back to inside making a little ground in stretch passing tired runners.

Broke only fairly, trapped a little wide early and drifted back to near rear, tracked 3 wide with cover throughout, still long way off them turning for home, made up some ground but was one paced last 200 M.

Reasonably away, hard ridden to take closer order, settled 2 wide in midfield, made 3 wide run from 600 M and under pressure on straightening, unable to offer anything in straight and compounded badly.

Jumped well, allowed to settle just behind pace on fence. Enjoyed good run on rails with leaders clearing out, eased 2 wide but still 10 off them on turn, showed good dash to chase them down and get up right on line.

Fair to begin, lacked early speed to settle near rear on rails, used little in run and still long way off on turn, followed rails in straight and kept coming late, even effort giving too great a start.
Began with field, drifted back to worse than midfield. 15Ls off lead, overraced when attempted to restrain, made 4 wide run on turn and stuck to task well in straight, doing best work late.
Average to begin, showed little early dash and took up rearward spot in rails well off frontrunners, had job in front on turn but offered little when asked and plodded to line.

Began with field, drifted back from widest gate when unable to get closer, raced 3 to 4 wide in rear section for most of journey, still giving large start turning for home, very one paced in straight.

Fast into stride, showed good speed to challenge for lead, overraced when unable to cross and engaged in speed duel 10Ls clear, under pressure on turn, compounded due to early workload and dropped out. (Rider questioned.)

Amongst the first to begin, outside leaders early, left to cart the field up with speed duel in front, followed rails 8Ls from lead entering straight, hit lead at 250 M and fought strongly only to be collared on line.
Evenly away, settled just worse than midfield, raced on rails throughout 15Ls from tearaway leaders, eased 3 wide on turn and made up good ground in middle of track to be closest at finish.
Slow to begin, drifted back to rear 2 wide 20Ls from leaders, lobbed along at tail throughout, long way off them turning for home, made run between runners in straight but only battled to line.

Fast into stride, overraced when attempting to restrain early, engaged in speed duel in mid section drawing 10Ls clear, still held lead to 300 M, collared at 200 M and couldn't go on last bit (rider questioned).
Began only fairly, niggled along to take up spot behind early leaders on fence, pushed along to chase on turn, stuck to paint in straight and kept to task well just lacking extra in final 200 M.
Prominent 2nd or 3rd just 1L behind the leader. Kept on in straight until weakened 200 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Forward of midfield about 3Ls off the pace. 2Ls down rounding home turn. Kept on in straight but got held up after 200 M. (Bled.)
Around midfield whilst being ridden along. Kept on in straight whilst hanging in to just miss a remote 3rd.
Slowly away and hampered at start but soon recovered to be forward of midfield. Kept on without threatening principals in straight.
Went forward from wide draw to lead. Kept on in straight and got headed when one-paced 200 M out. Just hung out for 3rd.
Towards rear. Made no impression in straight.
Jumped well before settling in 4th or 5th place about 2Ls off the lead. Ran on well final 250 M to a narrow victory after a ding-dong fight with the 2nd horse inside 200 M.
Slowly away. Well back. Still 7 to 8Ls back rounding the turn. Ran past beaten horses final 100 M.
Lost ground after awkward start. Always at rear. Never looked likely.
Towards rear. Steadied off heels and bumped rails rounding the turn at 700 M. Not a threat in straight.
Soon forward of midfield about 3Ls off the lead but trapped wide and without cover. One-paced in straight and had to be shifted out to avoid heels close home.
Soon 1L or so behind the leader. Steadied at 800 M. Kept on well in straight and went down narrowly after duelling with the winner inside 200 M.
Fair begin. Midfield or better. 3-wide without cover throughout. 5Ls behind at 800 M. 5-wide on turn. Slightly closer order making home but raced very one-paced in straight.
Began well. 3-wide with no cover in rear section at 1000 M. 4-wide on bridle rounding home. 3rd last turning in. Kept only evenly till line with so much to do. Never really competitive.
Began on terms. Pushed to go forward. 1 off 2Ls back at 1200 M in 3rd. Improved slightly making the turn. No response when asked after 500 M. Dropped out very quickly. Finished far from field.

Best out. Took up forward position within 2Ls from leader. Had easy time behind speed throughout. Shifted from rail on straightening in 2nd. Briefly headed early straight. Couldn't sustain effort over concluding stages.
Jumped with them from outside barrier. 3 deep and far from speed. Shifted out to avoid kick back entering back straight. Weakened from 700 M. Very far behind at finish.

Slow into stride. Ran on rail throughout. 7Ls back at 800 M. Pressured on the bend. Saved ground on fence rounding home in 10th. Lacked dash to be factor. Struggling at 200 M and well beaten thereafter.

Jumped fairly. Kept behind midfield on rail 6Ls from lead. Eased 2-wide on turn and shifted wider entering straight. Came with strong run between runners. Made good ground final 100 M. Found the line too soon.

Broke with field. Failed to keep pace and dropped behind midfield entering back straight. 5-6Ls off speed 2-wide with cover at 800 M. 5-wide turning for home. No response down centre of track on its first dirt try. Faded.
Jumped well. Showed good speed early from outside gate. Took up running and led at fair speed. Attempted to make all. Held 1L advantage on straightening but couldn't hold off rivals from 250 M.

Away fairly. Midfield on rails. 4Ls back at 700 M. Similar turning in. Initially shifted out on straightening, then shifted back inside. Responded fairly under whip and raced a little one-paced final 200 M.
Broke well. Slotted in midfield 2-wide in 7th from lead. Pressed forward on straightening in a 4-wide spot. Chased gamely early straight on the outside, but lacked extra gear to make show.
Began well. Kept in prime position, 3Ls back 2-wide with cover through back straight. Closer to lead at 400 M. Kicked strongly passing 300 M and kept going solidly to score.

Began with them. Settled 2 back on fence 3Ls from lead in 4th. Remained same on rail turning in. Made steady ground in straight. Fought hard to close race inside. No match for top pair, but great effort to take 3rd.

Began fairly. Settled in rearward section. 2-wide 8Ls off at 1000 M in last few. Pressured from 700 M on. Unable to pick up and yielded ground from 600 M. 2nd last turning home. Very weak in straight.
Outpaced and raced wide behind midfield. Swung widest making home turn and ran past tired runners in the straight.
Outpaced and raced at the rear. Trailed field into home straight and made no impression thereafter.
No better than 3-wide at midfield. Unable to quicken on straightening and weakened final stages.
Settled on fence in a rearward position. Made a nice rally along the inside rails in home straight despite being crowded at 200 M. Not enough to catch winner.
Outpaced by leaders despite being ridden along early stages. 3Ls off the pace at 800 M but gradually dropped further behind the pace at the turn. Lacked the needed rally in the straight.

Broke well from widest draw and contended for the early lead Took a sit behind the pace in 3rd position after 900 M and kept within 3Ls of the leader making the turn. Stayed on fairly in the straight to make the frame.
Raced in rear section until home turn. Steadily made up ground in the straight and was closest at finish.
Showed good early speed and took the lead. Opened up a clear advantage after straightening and was not threatened final stages.
Slowly away and was ridden along to be racing at midfield. Took some time to pick up in the straight and closed the race off strongly final 200 M.
Jumped only fairly and was ridden along to race outside the leader after 1000 M. Kept pace in front until home turn but weakened thereafter.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Raced ungenerously early on, 2-wide and 5Ls behind in 8th at 1200 M, hard pressed to make an impression on the circle, didn't succeed.
4-back on fence about 7Ls down in 10th at 1200 M, about 5Ls down in 9th taking final turn, made some minor late ground past beaten rivals.
Awkward break, hampered and forced wider at 900 M, 5-wide no cover down the back and 4Ls behind in 10th or so at 800 M, 6-wide off final bend and weakening, soon beaten.
3-wide with cover when 4Ls behind speed in 6th at 1200 M, marginally closer swinging for home, always outpaced.
Box-seat run on fence about 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, niggled along to stay interested down backstretch, still close up turning for home, kept on for pressure to lead 100 M out, ran on.
Soon led on fence, never clear by more than half a length until the 800 M, led by 1L at top of stretch, headed by winner at 100 M, no extra.
Lost ground at start, 7Ls behind speed in 11th at 1200 M, 6Ls down in 13th off home turn, no impression.
Bounded at start and lost at least 6Ls, detached and at least 9Ls off the speed through first half of race, never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.)
Half a length off pace in 2nd out 2-wide at 1200 M, 1L down in 2nd but under pressure taking final bend, soon gave ground.
9Ls down in 12th at 1200 M, pressed on to be 4Ls down in midfield at 800 M, gave ground at top of home straight.
4-wide no cover at 1st bend, 3-wide no cover when 1L off pace in 3rd at 1200 M, lost position on circle and struggling turning for home, dropped out.
On fence 5Ls down in 7th at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 4th taking final bend, comprehensively outpaced by quinella pair but plugged on fairly for a place.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 5th at 1200 M, hard pressed to lie up when same margin behind at final bend, faded out. (Soft palate displaced.)
Slowly away, 6Ls off pace when 3-wide with cover in 9th at 1200 M, switched out 4-wide on straightening when 4Ls down in midfield, one-paced thereafter.
3-back on fence about 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed in midfield through to home straight, over 2Ls down in 4th at the 200 M, one-paced late on.
2-wide and about 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed in midfield through to home straight, 3Ls down in 5th but all out at 200 M, made no further ground.
One from rear about 8Ls off the speed at 1200 M, always in the rear bunch.
Slow to begin, 2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 3rd at 1200 M, still prominent but hard ridden to keep up entering homestretch, gave ground over 300 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Over-raced early on, led by half a length at 1200 M out 2-wide, a neck in front off home turn but headed with over 200 M to race, no extra inside final 50 M.
In rear about 8Ls off the pace until homestretch, made some fair late ground down centre of track, never nearer.
On fence 7Ls off pace in 11th at 1000 M, never got much closer.
10Ls last at 1000 M, 5-wide (widest of all) taking home turn when 5Ls down in 10th, made some moderate late ground.
6Ls down in 10th and 2-wide at 1000 M, never threatened to advance from midfield.
4-wide no cover at 1000 M, pressed on to be 3Ls off pace in 4th but still wide at 800 M and entering home straight, soon weakened.
Always prominent, on fence half a length off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, a neck down in 2nd at final bend, a neck in front over 200 M out but headed by winner at 150 M, no extra.
3-wide with cover when 8Ls off pace in 11th at 1200 M, 5-wide no cover at 1000 M and very wide without cover on the circle and hard ridden in rear turning for home, faded out.
4Ls off pace in 4th on fence at 1200 M, 2Ls down in 3rd entering homestretch, picked up nicely to lead 150 M out, always doing enough to win.
3-wide with cover when 6Ls off pace in 9th at 1200 M, 5Ls down when held up in midfield entering homestretch, short of room again over 200 M out, failed to kick once clear.
Always at rear. Never in the race.
Midfield but trapped wide and without cover. Improved to 3rd taking the turn but hung out and soon weakened upon straightening.
Towards rear. Improved along rail to midfield rounding the turn. Unable to quicken in straight.
Led briefly before settling 2Ls off the pace. Kept on in straight until swamped for a minor placing inside 100 M.
Midfield early. Improved on the outside to be 2Ls back taking the turn. Kept on in straight but was simply no match for the winner.
Soon led and made all easily to record a most impressive victory.
Around midfield. Widest turning in and dropped towards rear. Steadied and shifted out upon straightening but failed to make any impression thereafter.
Outpaced at back. Hung out after 700 M. Made up some ground final 200 M to grab a remote 3rd in the closing stages.
Soon dropped to the rear from wide draw. Checked at 700 M. Not a factor in straight.
Prominent in a 1 out 1 back position off the leader. Soon weakened upon straightening.
Poor start but soon recovered to be around midfield whilst proving difficult to settle. One-paced in straight.
Soon around midfield. Steadied at 600 M. 5-wide turning in. Kept on steadily in straight and lost out on a remote 3rd close home.
Led early. Narrowly headed rounding home bend. Re-gained lead upon straightening but found winner too good when swamped close to home.
Never seen with a chance.
Towards rear. Made moderate progress under pressure in straight without threatening.
Never seen with a chance.
Began from poor draw. Raced wide in midfield early. Gradually improved to take up running rounding home bend. Headed upon straightening and faded out of placing inside final 200 M.
Midfield far side. Gave ground from rounding home bend.
Never better than midfield. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Close up in 3rd to straight. One-paced under pressure in the run home.
Settled on rails in midfield. Commenced move upon straightening and switched off rails for a run 200 M out. Ran on well to score convincingly.
Travelled in last few. Ran on past beaten horses down centre of straight.
Mostly in midfield to straight. Gradually faded.
Better than midfield. Weakened upon straightening.

Crowded early, mustered speed soon after the go forward and settle amongst leading division, caught 3 wide without cover 1L away for most of journey, under pressure entering straight and weakened right out after wide run.
Broke early fairly, pushed along to hold spot 3 back on rails 3-4Ls from lead, enjoyed soft run to turn, held up making run between horses at 200 M. Kept on fairly thereafter. Reasonable debut.
Jumped in air and lost considerable ground, unbalanced rider, always well off them early, finally tacked on at turn, lost touch to be well beaten in straight. (Lame morning after.)

Began well, showed good early speed to race outside leader, raced keenly early but enjoyed good trip with even clip in mid-section, under hard riding entering straight and weakened out after the early effort.
Lacked early speed, drifted back to near rear, raced on rails 8-9Ls from leaders, angled 3 wide on turn, came between horses in straight and made up good ground to be closest at finish.

Broke with them, hard ridden to go forward and settle behind leader, enjoyed run of race in middle stages, travelled well to turn, gained split at 250 M and quickly dashed to lead and drew away for authoritative win.

Began with rest, taken back from widest gate to settle 2nd last 10Ls off them, lobbed along at tail throughout on rails, followed paint in straight and closed race off well between runners only getting warm late.

Fast into stride, pressed on to take up running after 200 M, pressured early but controlled tempo nicely in mid-section, held 1L advantage into straight. Kept giving until 250 M but offered little under pressure. (Mucopus.)

Average to begin, lacked early speed, settled worse than midfield on the rails 6Ls from front runners, spent nothing in middle stages, made run between horses in straight and closed race off strongly doing best work late.

Fair to begin, restrained from wide alley to settle 3rd from rear 2 wide 9Ls off front runners, still well back on bend, made wide run entering stretch and finished off well giving too great a start. (Pharyngeal collapse.)

Fast to break, unable to go early speed and drifted back to race midfield with cover 5Ls away, pressed on 4 wide to be 2Ls away on straightening, loomed up but one-paced in straight and weakened late.

Okay into stride, lacked early speed and drifted back to be midfield 2 wide 5Ls off pace, enjoyed good run in middle section, tracked nicely 3 wide 3Ls off them straightening, showed good fight to keep coming for 3rd. (Blood in trachea)

Fair to jump, mustered speed to hold spot 1 out 1 back, raced 3Ls off them spending little in mid-section, eased 3 wide on turn and made strong challenge at 300 M. Ran out of puff last bit but did well to make frame. (Blood in trachea)

Away with rest, restrained to race in rearward division 6-7Ls off pace, just worse than midfield 2 wide throughout, made run 3 and 4 wide into straight and chased gamely to pass all but winner good effort.
Midfield from 1000 M. About 5Ls back at 800 M after becoming unbalanced when close to heels. Steadied again when 3Ls down at 500 M. One-paced in straight.
Always at back. Never a chance.
Midfield or better. Unbalanced and bumped rail when about 4Ls off pace at 800 M. Took closer order along rail turning in. Kept on until weakened 100 M out.
Jumped well but soon outpaced to rear. At least 6Ls back at 800 M. Steadied when 3Ls down at 500 M. Tried hard upon straightening but beaten 200 M out.
Soon 3rd just 1L behind the leaders. Disputed lead from 900 M. Unable to sprint home with principles final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent 2nd or 3rd. 1L behind the speed tackling the turn. Kept on well in straight and hit front 200 M out but got outsprinted by the winner inside 100 M.
Led or disputed lead. Kept on in straight but unable to dash home with placed horse after being headed 200 M out.

Soon midfield or worse. Looked unlikely after dropping from 4Ls back at 1000 M to 2nd last at 800 M. Improved from 3-wide position 600 M out to be 4Ls down turning in. Kept finding final 250 M to take charge final 100 M.
Lost ground at start. Niggled forward and improved steadily to be 2Ls or so back at 800 M. Kept on in straight without troubling the first pair.
Soon midfield. Trapped 3 wide without cover throughout back straight. Shifted 4 wide on straightening. Picked up well when asked. Dashed clear at 300 M and held good advantage to the post.

Jumped with field. Soon midfield on rail. 4Ls back in 7th midway. Saved ground on rail rounding home. Looked very likely after shifting into clear 300 M. Became unbalanced and eased out final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Went forward early. Found handy position 2Ls off speed on fence. Same margin till straight. Boxed for running from 350 M on. Unable to find daylight inside. Not tested.
Jumped well. Ridden vigorously to get to the front. Raced outside leader's girth at 1000 M. 2nd to turn for home. Found nothing under the whip. Ran on only fairly in straight. Steadied at 100 M.
Began only fairly from outside barrier. Shifted to rail in rear section. 6Ls back at 800 M. Improved on bend but no difference in position. 4th last after straightening. Ran on one paced in straight.
