Broke well from widest gate. 2 off 6Ls back behind midfield with cover at 1000 M. Lost ground entering the turn to be 3rd last turning in. Shifted out to only pass tired runners.

Broke with field. 3 wide rearward throughout. 6Ls back with cover at 800 M. Improved on bridle rounding home. Switched 6 wide entering stretch for strong run. Made steady ground in straight but not enough to challenge.

Began well. Midfield. 1 off 4Ls back halfway. Travelled comfortably on bend and 4 wide taking straight in 10th. Kept on evenly on the run home. Shifted wide final 150 M but lacked dash to be a factor.
Good early speed to lead on fence. Set good pace on the bridle till straight. Held 1L advantage after straightening. Attempted to make all but tired badly final 300 M. Not a factor.
Tailed out early. 8Ls behind speed at 1000 M on rail. Still 7Ls back after straightening. Switched wide for better running at 300 M. Closed race off well.
Good start. Never far off. 2 wide within 3Ls from leader throughout. Checked at 800 M. 7th to enter straight. Even paced in straight. Fought hard to make frame at the line. Great effort.

Began well. Settled in handy spot 1 off within 2Ls from leader. Had easy trip throughout. Shifted 3 wide on straightening in 3rd. Looked very likely early straight. Battled hard but failed to match strides with top pair.

Slow to begin. Kept 2 wide in rear section. Similar at 600 M in 2nd last. Came with strong run in straight. Switched very wide on straightening. No chance with winner but closed race off strongly final 200 M.

Jumped best from wide draw. Steadied to obtain cover behind midfield in a 3 wide spot. 5 wide to enter straight in 8th. Responded nicely early straight. Couldn't sustain effort and faded gradually. (Mucopus.)
Began well from wide draw and kept pace behind leaders. Continued well into the straight but couldn't find extra to overhaul winner final stages.
Kept within 2Ls of the leaders until home straight. Quickened well when asked after 400 M and ran down the early leader inside final 100 M.
Jumped awkwardly and raced along the rails at midfield. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Outpaced and raced near the back. Swung widest and trailed field turning for home. Rallied in the straight and was closest at finish.
Missed the jump and trailed field. Kept along the rails in a rearward position making home turn. Only ran past tired runners.
On fence and better than midfield. 3Ls off the leader making home turn. Switched out after straightening and took some time to find a clear path. Closed the race off fairly.
Niggled along to keep pace at midfield. 4-wide turning for home and only kept same pace to line.
Outpaced and raced in rear section. Ran past a few beaten runners in the straight.
Hard ridden from widest draw to be in a forward position without cover. 3-wide among leaders turning in and weakened in the straight.
Pressed forward and set the early pace. Disputed lead making home turn before shaking off co-leaders to regain sole lead on straightening. Remained in front before being headed inside final 100 M.
Best out and kept close to pace early stages. 2-wide among leaders making turn but tired final 300 M.
Midfield or worse. 4 to 5 wide turning for home. Took some time to get going on straightening. Ran on without threatening.
Settled behind midfield in a 2-wide spot. Slow to pick up after straightening but quickened and closed the race off well final 200 M.
Better than midfield. 3 to 4 wide turning in and was not pressured until final 300 M. Kept on well to make the frame.
Hard ridden from gates to race 2-wide about 3Ls off speed in 4th down backstretch, 2Ls down in 4th off final bend, led 200 M out but collared by winner close home.
Always tended to hang out and didn't look genuine, led on fence by half a length at 1300 M, headed at top of home straight and always held thereafter.
Niggled along in midfield about 3Ls off pace at halfway, under pressure about 5Ls off pace in midfield on straightening, found nothing off the bridle.
About 5Ls off pace in fence in 10th at 800 M, same margin behind when 4-wide turning for home, very one-paced.
Half a length off pace out 2-wide in 2nd at 1200 M, led at top of homestretch, headed over 200 M out, one-paced.
Box seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd through to homestretch, 1L down disputing 3rd place at 200 M, kept on well.
Worse than midfield about 4Ls off speed on fence until final bend, had every chance of a place but kept on only fairly.
3-back on fence about 3Ls off the speed in 6th place through to final bend, place prospects when 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, no extra.
Towards rear at least 5Ls behind leader on fence through first half of race, under pressure in rear entering straight, 3Ls down in 8th or so at 200 M, always held.
3-wide with cover about 3Ls or 4Ls off speed in midfield until home straight, 1L down in 4th at 200 M, stayed on well to lead final strides.
No better than 6Ls off pace in last until the 600 M, never dangerous. (Bled.)
Awkward break, keen and hung out early on, pressed on out 3-wide no cover to be 3Ls off pace in 6th at 800 M, 2Ls down in 3rd turning for home, never got any closer. (Pharyngeal collapse.)
Led on fence at 1200 M by 1L, clear by a neck at home turn and joined by winner 200 M out, no answer to winner's extra pace inside final 50 M.
3-back on fence in midfield about 4Ls off speed through to final bend, one-paced thereafter.
3-wide with cover in rear when keen early on at least 6Ls off the pace, headway to be 3Ls down in 5th or so at 200 M, no extra and lost out a place inside final 50 M.
Slowest away, at least 6Ls off pace in rear until homestretch, 4Ls behind in mid-division at 200 M, kept on quite well to secure 3rd place.
Crowded at start, 4-back on fence about at least 5Ls behind leader and towards rear until home straight, remained there.
2-wide and about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed in or around midfield through to final bend, never competitive.
Crowded at start, never travelled well, no better than 5Ls off pace towards rear at any stage, very weak in home straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent but always 3-wide no cover about 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th until home straight, failed to quicken up.
Slow away, keen early, 3Ls off pace in midfield at 800 M, 4-wide no cover on the circle, 4Ls down and struggling turning for home, weakened further.
Had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls off speed in 4th or so through to home straight, found nothing off the bridle.
3-wide with cover towards rear at least 5Ls off pace from 1200 M to home turn, never remotely dangerous.
3-wide with cover about 3Ls off speed in 6th through to home straight, one-paced.
Always travelling well about 1L off pace in 2nd out 2-wide, upsides runner-up at 200 M, asserted inside final 50 M.
Keen early but nicely placed 2-wide about 3Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, 2Ls down turning for home, no acceleration.
Behind midfield. About 6Ls back at 800 M. Kept on without threatening in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon led on fence but under constant pressure from outside horse. 2Ls advantage at 400 M. Headed 100 M out and got swamped for a minor placing when one-paced close home.
Soon recovered from poor jump to be 2Ls off the speed at 1000 M. Awkward on heels at 800 M. Unable to quicken in straight and weakened 200 M out.
Jumped well but trapped wide and without cover about 1L off the lead in the early stages. 2 to 3Ls back from 800 M. Kept on in straight until weakened 100 M out.
Disputed lead from 1000 M whilst hanging out most of the way. Soon beaten upon straightening.
Always at rear. Never seen with a chance.
At rear. At least 10Ls back at 800 M. Made up good ground to grab a very remote 3rd final 200 M.
Lost ground at start but recovered quickly to be in midfield about 4 to 5Ls off the pace. Ran on steadily final 250 M to a distant 2nd.
Steadied off heels after awkward start. About 2Ls behind the speed from 1000 M. Kept on in straight but could not sprint home with placed horses final 100 M.
Soon settled forward of midfield. About 3 to 4Ls back from 1000 M. Niggled along rounding the turn. Responded well final 300 M to win effortlessly 100 M out.
Ridden forward and disputed lead at 1000 M whilst being trapped wide and proved difficult to settle. 1L back in 3rd at 800 M. Weakened badly 200 M out.
Jumped best before settling 1 to 2Ls behind the speed. Unable to quicken in straight and tired 100 M out.
Towards rear. 5 to 6Ls back from 600 M. Ran past beaten runners in straight.
Slowly away. At rear. Still 10Ls back at 600 M. Made up some ground from 2nd last final 200 M.
Well there. Unable to sustain effort and lost touch passing 200 M.
Began slowly. Remained well back to straight. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Well there. Quickened well to hit front 200 M out. Soon careered away for a commanding victory.
Never better than midfield. Produced some impression late. (Lame.)
Midfield to 200 M. Weakened.
Settled just better than midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure in straight to reach 2nd inside final 200 M.
Always in last few.
Made running to straight. Dropped out under pressure.
Settled mainly 2-wide in midfield. Shifted out for a clear run upon straightening. Only produced moderate headway under pressure.
Settled just behind midfield to straight. Produced moderate late headway under pressure closing stages.
Always struggling at the back.
In last few most of way.
Raced mainly 3-wide in midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure without threatening.

Away with rest, allowed to settle just behind speed 3 back on fence 3Ls away, spent nothing in middle stages, 2Ls away on turn, followed winner in straight but lacked turn of foot to match. Stuck on well for 2nd.

Began well, pressed forward to settle behind leader 1L away, relaxed well and travelled kindly with slow speed in mid section, on bit to turn, received dream rails run in straight and dashed away for easy victory.

Bounced out, showed good early speed to cross easily and take up running, dictated terms in front at a slow speed, held 1L advantage on turn, tackled at 300 M, couldn't match winner but kept on fairly for 3rd.
Began only fairly, showed no early speed, settled in midfield position 2 wide 4Ls from pace made run between runners in straight but lacked turn of foot to be a factor.
Average to begin, unable to slot in and trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, always working and moved up to be 3Ls away on turn, wide run took toll and compounded in straight.
Broke with them, different tactics applied and ridden with cover, overraced in mid section, 3 wide and 5Ls away to turn, made 4 wide run in straight, compounded to be well beaten.
Average to begin, lacked early speed, settle worse than midfield on rails 5Ls away, used no petrol throughout, followed paint in straight, lacked usual finish and only plodded to line.
Broke with them, taken hold to settle behind pace, raced 1 out 1 back 2Ls away with run of race, travelled well to turn, showed no sprint when asked in straight and could only hold ground to finish.
Began awkwardly, couldn't go early, raced in last spot 7Ls from pace, lobbed along at tail throughout, not suited by slow speed, still had field to beat on turn, passed some tired runners late.

Fast into stride, rolled forward as usual to take up spot at leaders girth, enjoyed easy time with slow pace in mid section, moved up to be 1L away into straight, lacked a dash in stretch but kept on same pace to line.

Steadied when tightened early, drifted back to 2nd last 5 to 6Ls from leaders, raced on rails not suited by slow speed in middle stages, made 3 wide run on turn, gave huge start and finished hard late. Good effort.
Tracked leader. Came to challenge shortly after straightening and hit front inside 200 M. Just held on under pressure from runner-up's strong late challenge.
Began slowly. Raced in last few to straight. Ran on steadily past beaten horses without threatening.
Settled in 4th just over 2Ls off the pace. Came to tackle for lead upon straightening but only kept on at the same pace without threatening.
Settled in forward of midfield. Came to challenge upon straightening holding good chance but didn't help running all over the place in critical stages.
Raced mainly 3 or 4 wide in rear of midfield. Only produced moderate progress under pressure in straight.
Not far off in 3rd to straight, then soon weakened.
Always in last few and never seen with a chance.
Always in last few. Never nearer.
Towards rear to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Trailed field most of way to 200 M. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Towards rear most of way. Ran home one-paced.
Settled just better than midfield. Kept on early in straight before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Settled on rails in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight without ever threatening.
Soon took up running, racing awkwardly at times far side. Led until headed inside final 200 M.
Began reasonably, chased along to hold spot behind leader, raced 1L away with speed on, obtained split at 300 M but couldn't capitalise and gradually lost touch to be well beaten. (Mucopus.)

Fastest to begin, engaged in speed battle early, raced at leader's girth throughout at good pace, continued to apply pressure to turn, still in mix until 200 M but early effort told and weakened late.
Away well, outpaced early and drifted back to midfield, hard ridden to hold position 4 back on rails 6Ls from pace, checked in middle stages, followed rails in straight but only battled to line.
Began with them, hard ridden to go forward early, took up spot 3 back on fence 3Ls away, enjoyed easy run and travelled well to turn, unable to offer much at business end and was one paced to line.
Average to break, allowed to relax and settle in rearward division 3 wide 7 to 8Ls away, checked in middle stages, made run 4 wide into straight, lacked turn of foot to be a factor.
Bounced out well, restrained to take up midfield spot 5Ls away, checked at 700 M, made run between horses in straight and made up good ground late without threatening winner. Even effort.
Fast to begin, hard ridden to challenge for lead and take up running, kept them going at a good clip, pressured until turn, hard ridden early in stretch but was a spent force thereafter.
Slow to begin, niggled along to be closer, settled worse than midfield on rails 7 to 8Ls away, angled 2 wide from 600 M and came with run between horses in straight, doing best work late.

Average to begin, showed little early speed to settle worse than midfield 3 wide 7Ls from pace, 3 wide without cover and 4 wide on turn, stuck to task well widest in straight to snatch 3rd (lost whip).
Fast to begin, pressed forward but taken hold of when unable to get close, raced in 6th spot 3 wide 3Ls away, not used up to turn, angled out and gathered them in at 200 M, drew away to score easily.
Began fairly, drifted back to just off midfield 2 wide 6Ls away, made 3 wide run from 600 M, made run between runners on turn, kept on well in straight without looking likely to be closest at finish.
Began awkwardly, taken in behind runners to settle at rear 2 wide 10Ls from frontrunners, not asked in mid section, made run 4 to 5 wide on turn, didn't close race off as normally would.
Fair to begin, showed no early speed, settled 2nd last on rails 10Ls from front runners, followed paint into straight, came from well back to make up good ground late.

Away with them, worked hard early to come across from wide alley, slotted in 1 out 1 back 2Ls away, moved up to challenge 3 wide in straight, hit lead briefly at 250 M but found winner too good. Strong effort.
3Ls off pace on far side in midfield until halfway, all out to get within 2Ls of the pace at the 300 M, no extra and tired late.
Never worse than midfield between 2Ls and 3Ls off the speed, outpaced but still every chance of 3rd place inside final 50 M but lost out on the line.
Within 2Ls of the early pace, under pressure to hold this position at halfway, dropped out poorly.
Never landed a blow, towards rear about 5Ls off the leader at halfway, no danger.
Always towards rear in centre of track, 7Ls off the pace at 500 M, no competition.
Hampered at start, 5Ls last early on, 8Ls last at the 500 M, plugged on past a few tired rivals late on.
Shifted out from low gate towards centre of track, 2Ls off speed in midfield at the 400 M, one-paced.
3Ls off pace hugging far rail in midfield until halfway, all out to get within 2Ls of the pace at the 300 M, no extra.
In firing line within 2Ls of the speed until the 200 M, no chance with winner but best of the rest for 2nd.
Under pressure in rear early on, always held by at least 5Ls and thoroughly outpaced.
Led early on stands' rail by 1L, hard pressed when grabbed by winner at the 200 M, emptied out disappointingly late.
Close enough if good enough on stands' fence, 1L down in 2nd at 700 M, failed to quicken up at 400 M and retreated steadily despite strong pressure. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always travelled well and prominently near grandstand fence, eased to the front 200 M out, hand-ridden clear, nice debut.
Crowded at start and outpaced early on towards rear, still 5Ls behind in 10th or so at the 400 M, ran on fairly well late to nick 3rd on the line.
Good early speed to be in forward spot. 2 off 2Ls back with no cover in 3rd until 500 M. 4th to enter straight. Turned for home with an empty tank and tired badly from final 300 M.
Broke well. Never far off. Raced handy with cover within 3Ls of leader. On the bridle throughout. 5th after straightening. Fought hard to stay in contention but ran on only one-paced till the line.
Jumped with field. Positioned last 2 wide 10Ls from lead at 800 M. Last few to turn home. Switched out after straightening, extended well in clear. Made steady ground in straight. Nearest at finish.

Jumped well from outside gate. Set pace till straight on rail. Edged by 1L after straightening. Attempted to make all. Battled hard to stay on and regained momentum over closing stages to rally strongly for 2nd.
Began well. Lacked early speed. Raced rearward in a 2 wide spot. 9Ls behind leader at 600 M. Last to enter straight and switched very wide. Responded only fairly and never a threat.
Pushing hard to take up running around midfield or worse. 5Ls behind on fence halfway. Pressured just prior to straightening in 10th. No response to the whip and made no impression in straight.
Outpaced early. 6Ls behind leader at 800 M in 4th last on rail. Last few to turn in. Found nothing in straight. Not a factor.
Broke fairly. Settled rearward, 2 wide 6Ls back at 800 M. Same margin after straightening. Tracked wide in straight. Responded strongly final 200 M. Made up good ground closing stages.
Away well. Settled midfield on fence. Within 4Ls from lead before the turn. In 6th after straightening. Eased out at 250 M, showing good dash to score.
Missed the kick. Shifted to fence and remained in rear throughout. Pressured on bend. Saved ground along rail turning in. Left with too much to do and closed race only fairly.
Broke well. Pushed to go before midfield. Settled 1 off 4Ls behind in 7th midway mark. Similar after straightening. Lacked response when asked and faded final 200 M.

Jumped best. Midfield or worse. 8th in running 2 wide with cover, 6Ls from leader middle part of race. 4Ls back in 7th after straightening. Responded strongly whilst hanging in. Made steady ground without threatening winner.
Away well from the inside draw. Showed good speed to hold prominent spot behind leader on fence. Spent nothing in run. Moved up to threaten early straight but couldn't go with them last 200 M.

Broke with them. Hard to settle early stages and pulled its way forward to race at leader's heels. Off bridle approaching straight in 3rd. Fought strongly in straight only to be overhauled late. Lost 2nd late.
Ridden along to keep pace with frontrunners. 2-wide and 3Ls behind the leader making the turn. Lacked a quickening pace on straightening and remained on same pace.
Missed the jump and raced in a rearward position. Trailed field into home straight and ran past a few weakening runners.
On fence and better than midfield. Swung out on straightening and kept on fairly in the straight.
Dropped to a rearward position from widest draw. Improved in a wide spot making the turn to be near midfield on straightening. Chased on well in the straight to be closest at finish.
Raced at midfield early stages. Got carried out to be widest whilst improving around the turn. Outpaced and weakened after straightening.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground. Settled on fence in a rearward position. Switched out for a clear run after straightening and made up some late ground.
Hard ridden from outside draw but was outpaced by frontrunners early stages. Crept closer after 1000 M and tracked leader making the turn. Failed to keep pace on straightening and weakened.
2-wide behind midfield until home straight. Stayed on same pace to the finish.
Jumped awkwardly. Niggled along early for a spot on the fence behind midfield. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Contended for the early lead before taking a sit behind the leader. Remained prominent behind the pace turning for home. Stayed on well whilst hanging out closing stages for a minor placing.
Settled in rear section. Switched wide on straightening for a run. Made a strong rally and edged out rival despite hanging in at the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Hit the front shortly after start and held a length's advantage into home straight. Had a 2Ls lead final 100 M but failed to hold off a late charging rival and was caught at the line.
Raced close to pace early. Dropped to midfield near 1000 M and hung out from 800 M. Kept on only fairly in the straight.
Niggled along at midfield early stages. Remained in similar position making the turn but failed to rally in the straight.

Raced too freely early on when 2-wide in midfield about 3Ls off speed, lost position from 600 M to homestretch and without a clear run from 400 M to 200 M, ran on OK once clear but too late. (See Racing Incidents.)
8Ls last at 1200 M, never got much closer than that.
4-back on fence towards rear about 5Ls off speed at 1000 M, under pressure and still worse than midfield turning in homestretch, no impression.
4-wide with cover down backstretch when about 5Ls behind leader in rear, briefly 5-wide no cover on circle but headway to go 1L down in 4th at 200 M, stayed on well without wresting lead.
Always 4-wide no cover though within 3Ls of leader in midfield until final bend, kept on at same pace until line.
Always in the rear bunch, about 5Ls off pace but with cover at 1000 M, further back tackling home corner, never remotely dangerous.
5Ls off pace in 10th or so at 1000 M, similarly placed taking final turn, no clear passage at 200 M and near 100 M when about 3Ls off the pace, could draw no closer once clear.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 5th from 1000 M to home straight, 1L down in same position at 200 M, had every chance to get through but just outpaced by quinella pair inside final 50 M.
Had the box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 4th from 1200 M to home straight, held up from 400 M to about 100 M, ran on well once in the clear but too late, unlucky.
Led by 1L from 1300 M to top of home straight, headed 250 M out, swamped late.
Over-raced early 3-back on fence in midfield about 4Ls off pace, similar spot entering homestretch when short of room, made some minor late ground without troubling principals.
Best away, settled 3-wide no cover when 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 800 M to home turn, pressed on to be a narrow leader 300 M out, always just holding a short head margin to the line.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd from 1000 M to top of home straight, disputing the lead at 250 M marker, weakened close home.
Worse than midfield about 4Ls off the speed at 1000 M, 5-wide entering home straight when 7Ls down in 13th, weakened out. (Bled.)
Slowest to break and 12Ls last with 1400 M to race, 8Ls behind and one from rear taking home turn, no impression.
Awkward break, 9Ls behind leader in 11th at 1400 M, held up briefly at 600 M and about 4Ls back on fence in midfield off home bend, weakened inside final 200 M.
8Ls behind in 10th when 2-wide at 1400 M, fell back to 9Ls last and 6-wide (widest of all) turning for home, hung in and made only moderate late ground.
Awkward break, sent on to lead by 2Ls at 1600 M, headed 1000 M out but driven on again on circle to lead by a head at 400 M, passed by winner 300 M out and tired close home to miss out on a place.
Led from gates on fence but headed 1800 M out, box run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1400 M, hard pressed to maintain this position at 500 M and fell away from top of home straight.
10Ls off pace in 12th at 1400 M, looped field out 3-wide from 1200 M to lead by 2Ls on fence at 900 M, headed top of home straight, no chance with winner but hung onto 2nd spot.
Unbalanced at 1700 M, 2-wide and 3Ls down in 4th at 1400 M, advanced to 1L down in 3rd at home straight entrance, eased to the fore 300 M out, drew away for comfortable success.
Slow start, sent on to be 2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1400 M, left 3rd at 800 M and niggled along, gave ground from 600 M and very tame in stretch. (Blood.)
On fence 7Ls behind pacesetter in 9th at 1000 M, 6Ls down in 10th entering homestretch, made no significant headway.
Slow to begin, on fence 4Ls behind speed in 5th at 1400 M, 4Ls down in 6th swinging for home, bumped and unbalanced at 200 M when 3Ls down in 5th, evened out.
5Ls behind leader in 6th at 1400 M, pressed on out 4-wide no cover at 600 M to be 3Ls down in 5th off final bend, 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, kept on fairly for a place.
Briefly 3-wide no cover at 1400 M when 6Ls down in 7th place, driven along to be 4Ls down in mid-division taking final corner, never really threatened.
2-wide and 6Ls behind leader in 8th at 1400 M, caught 4-wide no cover at 1000 M, ridden along from 600 M to get closer, didn't succeed and very weak in closing stages.
Midfield or worse about 4 to 5Ls back but on rail. Unbalanced after being bumped at 1200 M. Steadied at 400 M. Ran on to be nearest at finish final 250 M.
Hampered at start and travelled towards rear. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Midfield but proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Steadied off heels at 800 M and dropped towards rear about 7Ls back. One-paced in straight.
Slowly away and dropped to the back from wide draw. Never a threat.
Led to 1400 M before sitting outside the leader about 1/2L back. Kept on in straight until weakened 100 M out.
Slowly away. At rear. Steadied off heels at 800 M. Shifted out for running upon straightening but bumped with another runner and became unbalanced. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Slowly away. Behind midfield. Some 6Ls back at 800 M. Took closer order but trapped wide rounding home turn. Ran on without threatening principals in straight.
Soon 2 to 3Ls off the pace. Steadied at 800 M. Ran on whilst threatening principals in straight.
Always thereabout in a 3 or 4 wide position. 3rd or 4th from 1200 M between 1 to 2Ls behind the lead. Hung out from 800 M but ran on determinedly in straight and took charge 100 M out.
Midfield or worse whilst being trapped wide and without cover. About 3 to 4Ls back from 1200 M. Ran on steadily in straight but looked 3rd all the way.
Prominent. Steadied at 1100 M and dropped to midfield. Hung out at 800 M. One-paced in straight until weakened badly 200 M out.
Took lead from 1400 M. Headed 250 M and soon ran completely out of gas.
Towards rear. 6-wide turning in and became unbalanced when bumped by another runner. Hung out from 300 M but made up a bit of ground final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
In touch about 2Ls behind the pace in 3rd or 4th from 1200 M. Shifted out for running upon straightening and responded well. Hit front 250 M out but got outsprinted by the winner final 100 M.

Settled 2-wide midfield in bunched field. Just about 2Ls behind leader turning in but did not find much room early in straight. Obtained run 200 M out and finished off race nicely without threatening.
Settled at the back. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide in midfield. Short-lived effort rounding home bend. Soon died on his run in home straight.
Soon took up running and led until finding no extra 100 M out.
Settled towards rear of bunched small field. Switched out for a run upon straightening. Ran on well to assert authority about 100 M out.
Broke well from wide draw. Settled just off the pace outside leader. Held some chance early in straight but unable to quicken to match speed of winner closing stages.
Settled just behind midfield in small field. No clear run on rails behind runners throughout home straight. Not tested.
Never far off leaders three off the rails. Came under pressure to challenge upon straightening but only kept on at the one pace.
Always struggling at the back.
Always within striking distance on rails. Caught behind runners on inside throughout home straight and never tested.
Broke well, showed good speed to be amongst first few, 1L away at midpoint travelling well, placed under pressure at 400 M and unable to find another gear. Plugged to line.
Broke only fairly, mustered speed to be 1L away on stand side, pressured to make ground from midpoint, weakened badly late and faded out of it.
Broke best, showed good speed to hold lead in middle of track, challenged from 400 M, showed some fight but was no match for winner, kept on well to make the frame.
Bumped on jumping, pushed along to hold midfield spot 3Ls off them, hard ridden from 400 M, continually hung in but unable to offer anything over concluding stages.
Broke fairly, mustered speed to be amongst leading division in middle of track closest to inside, 3Ls off at 400 M, gave plenty when pressured and showed good dash to claim victory in last 100 M.
Broke well, showed good early speed to challenge for lead early, kept up there until midway mark, hard ridden from that point, lost ground when they sprinted to be well beaten.
Bumped on jumping, drifted back to tail 4 to 5Ls away throughout, moved to middle of track, still 3Ls away at 300 M, made up good ground over concluding stages to be closest at finish.
Checked at start, ridden hard to hold midfield spot 3Ls from pace, never looked comfortable in run, weakened badly from 400 M point to be a long last (soft palate displacement and blood in trachea).
Average to jump, settled just off them in middle of track 2Ls away, steadily made ground from midpoint to take over at 300 M, showed good turn of foot to hold off all but winner.
Inconvenienced at start, drove through to settle in midfield 3Ls off lead, in traffic throughout, hard ridden from 500 M, lacked turn of foot to make impression and kept same pace to line.
Bounded in air and lost ground at start, settled near rear 5Ls off leaders, niggled along at midpoint, still well back at 300 M, failed to show customary dash and kept same pace to line. (Mucopus.)
Inconvenienced early, lost touch and settled in rearward spot 6Ls away, followed paint in mid section, kept going late passing some tired runners, never a real threat.
Began awkwardly, mustered speed to be just behind leaders, travelled well in mid-section, placed under pressure from 400 M and gradually faded out of it.
Average to jump, lacked early toe and drifted back to tail 8 to 10Ls away, always hard ridden in middle stages, made strong ground late to be closest at finish.
Mainly in rear of midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Began well and driven to lead, eventually crossed to rails 900 M out. Kicked clear around home bend and still holding 2Ls break turning for home but tired noticeably and overhauled over 200 M out.
Raced wide in last few to straight. Made moderate progress past beaten horses without threatening.
Settled in forward of midfield. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight without quickening.
Well back to straight. Made up good ground down straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield throughout. Kept on steadily in straight.
Never far off after beginning from wide draw. Stalked pacemaker rounding home bend. Fought on steadily under pressure to reach 4th late.
Never far off. Quickened to hit front over 200 M out only to be denied nearing home.
Settled in midfield. Not much room behind runners early in straight before running on under pressure to gain upper hand final strides.
Mainly in midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Settled at the back. Made significant progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Well there far side. Lost touch rounding home bend. Lost further ground after straightening.
Towards rear. Dropped out upon straightening.
Raced wide in midfield. Found nothing in straight.

Began well, pushed in early stages and used up to finally cross after 400 M, backed off speed in mid-section, held 1L advantage turning for home, fought strongly but unable to go with them 100 M. Solid effort.

Away fairly, restrained when unable to get in early, settled just off midfield 2 wide 6Ls away, used little mid-race, came 3 wide with cover from 700 M, eased 4 wide on turn and finished race off strongly doing best work late.

Awkward to begin, ridden along early to settle 3 back on fence 3Ls away, enjoyed dream run in mid-section, behind leader 1L away on turn, pushed into clear at 300 M and kept on strongly until overhauled late.

Fast into stride, hard ridden to challenge for lead early, eased off to take up 1 out 1 back spot 2 to 3Ls away, enjoyed good run throughout, pushed along entering straight, weakened out to be well beaten (used up early).

Broke only fairly, lacked early speed and drifted back to be 2nd last on rails 9Ls from frontrunners, enjoyed easy run throughout, made run between runners in straight and finished race off evenly. (Blood in trachea.)

Amongst the first to begin, pressed forward to challenge for lead, eventually handed up to race behind leader (good speed) raced at leaders' girth from 800 M, 1L away on turning, early effort took toll and weakened out late.
Best to begin, settled well just behind speed, raced amongst runners in 2 wide spot 4Ls away, did little in middle stages, shuffled back to near last on turn, only plugged to line to be well beaten.

Broke evenly, drifted back to rear as usual, raced 2 wide 3rd from tail 7 to 8Ls away from leaders, travelled comfortably throughout, made run 4 and 5 wide in straight making up good late ground to be closest at finish.

Bumped early, pressed forward but unable to get in, raced 3 wide midfield with cover 5Ls away throughout, tracked into race, nicely 3 wide on turn, inconvenienced in straight but unable to go up a gear when clear.
Average to begin, lacked early speed and settled in last spot 2 wide 9 to 10Ls away, angled out on turn, broke down entering straight and pulled up.
Jumped with them, pressed forward to take close order, trapped 3 wide without cover from awkward alley, always working to be 1L away on turn, wide run took its toll and weakened out in straight.

Bumped early, couldn't muster speed early, settled down in midfield position 4 back on rails 5Ls from pace, used no petrol in run, followed paint in stretch, no clear run until 250 M but lacked dash to capitalise when clear.

Slow to begin, lacked speed early and settled 5 back on rails 6 to 7Ls away, travelled well and suited by good early speed, on bit to turn, held up at 300 M but got clear at 200 M and showed good turn of foot to score well.
Always at rear. Never in the hunt.
Pushed forward to take 4th place near 900 M about 2 to 3Ls off the pace. 3rd turning in but failed to quicken when it mattered in straight.
Towards rear. Never seen with a chance.
Disputed lead before travelling kindly in 3rd within 2Ls off the lead. Improved from 700 M to sit outside the leader. Took lead 250 M out and held off late charge from 2nd horse.
Soon led. Headed 250 M out and dropped out tamely inside 100 M.
Soon forward of midfield but trapped 4-deep. 4Ls back at 800 M. Improved from Rock to be 1L or so behind the leaders. One-paced in straight.
Niggled forward to be in midfield or better 4Ls back at 800 M. About 2Ls down upon straightening. Kept on in straight for 3rd without troubling the first pair.
Midfield at best. Never a factor in straight.
Lost ground at start. Towards rear. Midfield about 3Ls off pace but wide taking home turn. Made no impression in straight.
Thereabout. 3 to 4Ls off the speed along back straight. Tired badly 200 M out.
Slowly away. At rear and some 10Ls back along back straight. Still 6Ls down at 400 M. Made up good ground whilst hanging in final 200 M but simply had too much to do.
2nd from 1000 M. Checked off heels at 750 M. Soon dropped out of contention after straightening. (Blood.)
Away well. Hard to settle early stages. Midfield or better with cover throughout back straight. Within 4Ls from lead entering straight. Switched wider for running, but closed race only one-paced.

Began slowly. Raced in the rear section throughout. 6Ls back 2-wide in 2nd last at 800 M. Last few on straightening. Responded strongly and made late ground final 200 M once in clear. Good effort to make frame.
Broke very well. Ran 2-wide around midfield. 5Ls behind lead at 600 M in 7th. Eased out to go forward and ended up very wide after straightening. Found nothing in straight.
Broke with field. Ridden vigorously to lead. Set good pace throughout. Held 1L advantage after straightening. Found plenty when asked. Charged home strongly and out-paced rivals for a convincing win.

Began fairly from outside barrier. Under the whip to go forward early stages. Settled 2Ls from leader on fence in prime spot. 3rd to enter straight. Kept on giving in straight, but no challenge to winner.

Slow to begin. Near tail on fence at 1200 M. Shifted 3-wide to improve after 1000 M. 7Ls from lead entering the turn. Last few and widest to enter straight. Picked up late and closed race nicely on the outside.

Jumped best from wide draw. Strode forward from a 3-wide spot entering back straight. Niggled to stay 4th without cover halfway. Pressured rounding home, but did very little in straight. Tired final 200 M.

Began awkwardly. Settled at rear on fence. At least 8Ls off speed after 1000 M mark. Shifted out to race 2-wide until shifting back to fence on straightening. Made ground steadily along inside. Nearest at finish.
Jumped well from deep draw. Good early speed to race outside leader's heels. 2nd after straightening. Chased gamely, but couldn't match strides with top pair. Worked hard to keep 3rd.
Began awkwardly, then quickly shifted to hold rail behind midfield. 5Ls back in 8th at 800 M. Same margin turning in. Kept on only fairly to the line.

Began very well. Kept 4Ls behind lead on fence. Had easy trip throughout. Niggled on the bend. Closed gap between leader to be 3Ls behind after straightening. Ran on fairly final 250 M. Lacked dash to be a factor.
Ridden to be 3-wide in a forward position. Hung out and started to lose ground making the turn after 600 M. Near the back on straightening and made no impression thereafter.
Jumped fairly from outside draw and raced in rear section. Hung out making home turn and trailed field into home straight. Lacked a response and cantered home.
Settled on fence at midfield. Ran on well in the straight but unable to gain ground on winner final stages.
Best out but was allowed to drop to rear section. Saved ground along the inside making home turn and rallied in the straight to make the frame.
No worse than midfield. Lost ground when steadied at 400 M and weakened in the straight.
2-wide better than midfield. Kept within 3Ls of the leader making the turn but weakened final 300 M.
Settled on fence behind the leader. Switched out on straightening and quickened well. Drew clear final 150 M.
Led shortly after start. Held a narrow advantage on straightening but was swamped final 200 M.
Tracked leader in a 2-wide position before taking the lead after straightening. Headed near 100 M and kept on only fairly thereafter.
Slowly away. Travelled in rear section until home straight and stayed on same pace to the finish.
Niggled along behind midfield. Kept being pressured at the bend and advanced to within 3Ls of the leader turning for home. Kept on fairly in the straight for a minor placing.
Dropped to the rear from widest draw and trailed field until 400 M. Ran past tired runners in the straight.
Soon led on fence, always a little over 1L clear through to home straight, similar margin to the good at 200 M, went further clear.
3-back on fence in midfield about 4Ls off speed through to homestretch, plugged on fairly for 3rd late.
Box run on fence 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1000 M, over 1L back in 2nd straightening for home, did enough for 2nd but never a credible challenger to winner.
Over-raced early on when 5Ls off the speed in 8th at 1100 M, similarly placed entering stretch, always held by principals. (See Racing Incidents.)
4Ls back in 6th when 2-wide at 1200 M, strung up in traffic off home turn and not clear until the 200 M when 6Ls back in 9th, much too late to retrieve any ground.
Always 3-wide no cover when about 2Ls off pace in 3rd or so until the 600 M, hard pressed to lie up turning for home, faded out.
3Ls back in 5th when 2-wide at 1100 M, dragged back by retreating KING OF WIN at 600 M and 6Ls down in 11th taking final bend, no impression thereafter.
2-wide and 1L down in 2nd at 1100 M, struggling to hold position at the 800 M, dropped back to 8Ls last off final bend, very weak effort.
One from rear 7Ls off the front at 1100 M, about 5Ls behind in 10th when without a clear passage at final bend, clear 200 M out but never dangerous.
With cover about 6Ls behind leader in 10th at 1100 M, 4-wide taking home turn when 4Ls back in mid-pack, one-paced.
Switched from wide gate to fence, 7Ls last at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 9th taking final bend, ran on quite well but just missed out on a place.
4-wide no cover 1200 M when 5Ls behind leader in 9th, looped field to go 1L down 2nd with 500 M to go, under pressure to keep up off final bend, soon wilted.
3-back on fence about 4Ls off the speed in 6th until home straight when hanging in, never threatened to advance any further.
Always in rear trio and never better than 6Ls off the speed at any stage.
Settled in 5th about 3Ls behind speed at 1200 M, crowded at 600 M, 3Ls down in 4th when straightening for home, kept on at same pace.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd from 1200 M to home turn, 2Ls down in 2nd at the 200 M, kept on only evenly and lost out on 2nd place on the line.
Sluggish break, caught 3-wide no cover when 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1100 M, tended to hang in on the circle, over 3Ls down in 5th off home turn, weakened out. (See Racing Incidents.)
2-wide and 5Ls back in 7th at 1100 M, 4Ls down in same position off final turn, finished off strongly to take 2nd on the line.
Checked at 1300 M and forced wider, 3-wide with cover when 6Ls behind in 8th at 1100 M, not much closer off home turn, made some minor late ground, never nearer.
Slow to begin, always at least 7Ls last right through to home straight, very tame in the finish.
Away well, gained soft lead to be 1L clear from 1400 M to home straight entrance, 2Ls ahead at 200 M, always doing enough to win.
Broke well, run of the race on fence 2Ls off speed in 3rd through to home bend, had every chance to place but failed to quicken up.
Slow start, worse than midfield 4-back on fence about 5Ls or 6Ls off the front until home turn, made some minor late ground but never really got into it.
Slow break, one from rear about 8Ls off pace at 1100 M, under pressure at 600 M and marginally closer taking home turn, made some good late ground, nearest at finish.
Led to 1100 M and then proved difficult settle when being steadied to travel in 2nd or 3rd spot. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Midfield early. Towards rear about 6Ls down entering back straight. Held up upon straightening before making up some late ground.
In touch early. 3 back on fence about 3 to 4Ls back final 1000 M. Held up approaching 200 M but only kept on steadily when in the clear.
Took lead from 1100 M. Headed 200 M out but hung on for 3rd.
Disputed early lead before travelling in midfield or better although wide and without cover the whole trip. Headway to 4th at 400 M. Outpaced by principals final 200 M and was checked 100 M out.
Midfield or behind. About 4Ls off the pace after checking at 1200 M. 3Ls back turning in. Ran on determinedly but the line just came a fraction too soon.
Soon 2nd or 3rd just 1L behind the pace. Ran on gamely in straight and hit front 200 M out. Just held off late charge from 2nd horse.
Slow into stride. Towards rear. Made up a little late ground.
Midfield. About 3Ls back from 1000 M. 2Ls down upon straightening. Ran on in straight to just miss a place.
Checked at start. Towards rear. Never seen with a chance.
Checked at start. Behind midfield or worse. About 5Ls down at 600 M. Made up some ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Slowly away. At rear. Never looked likely.
Behind midfield throughout. (Mucus in trachea.)
Waited with. Switched out for a clear run upon straightening and ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Contested lead early. Settled behind leaders rounding stable bend and in back straight. Found nothing inside final 400 M.
Settled in midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend disputing 3rd into straight. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Settled at the back. Ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Prominent. Hit front upon straightening going 1-1/2L clear under pressure 200 M out but unable to sustain effort and swamped close to home.
Led field until overhauled shortly after straightening.
Never far off 3 off the fence. Swung wider turning for home. Kept on steadily without quickening under pressure in the run home.
Settled in rear of midfield. Ran on well between runners down straight to assert authority closing stages.
Jumped fairly, racing in last few early. Improved steadily to midfield 3-wide down backstretch. Sustained progress inside final 300 M to claim 2nd late.
Jumped awkwardly losing ground. Quickly recovered to 3-wide midfield. Remained same until dropping out under pressure approaching home straight.
Raced mainly in midfield on rails to straight. Weakened.
Broke with them, pushed forward 4-wide early to race outside leader (good early speed), raced 1L away thereafter, under pressure approaching turn, lacked extra gear and kept on same pace to line.

Away with them, pushed forward to be amongst first few early, settled just off pace on rails 2Ls away in mid-section, followed rails into straight and didn't have much luck over final stages. Inconclusive run.
Began with them, taken hold of to settle worse than midfield 2-wide 7-8Ls away, shuffled back to tail on turn, held up when making run between runners in straight, made good ground late when clear.

Restrained from wide alley to settle in rearward division, 8-9Ls away in 2 wide spot in middle stages, made 3-wide run without cover from 600 M 2-3Ls away on turn, hit lead at 100 M and overhauled late. Solid effort.

Average to jump, slotted in to midfield position, closer than usual 2-wide 3-4Ls away, spent no petrol in run, made run between runners approaching straight, didn't get a lot of room but finished race off fairly.

Fast into stride, showed good pace to take up early lead, challenged in first half and eventually took sit at mid-way, raced on bit thereafter, slipped off fence and hit lead early in straight but workload told and weakened late.

Fast into stride, pressed on to challenge for lead early, worked very hard to eventually cross to lead at 800 M, backed off tempo after early speed, held 1L advantage turning, passed at 200 M, tightened near line when beaten.

Slow to begin, pushed along to hold midfield position 2-wide 6Ls away, had easy run using nothing in middle stages, shuffled back in traffic approaching turn, finished race off evenly not being fully ridden out last 100 M.

Began with field, niggled along to hold prominent spot eventually settled on rails 4Ls away, had run of race in mid-section, followed paint in straight and made up some late ground without threatening winner.
Bounced out early, pushed along to take up position midfield on rails, 5-6Ls away, raced ungenerously throughout, hard ridden entering straight and effort was one-paced to line.
Began awkwardly and restrained to last, raced at tail 11Ls from lead on rails, tracked 3-wide from 500 M, made run 4 and 5-wide in straight, did best work late to claim 3rd. Good run.

Began fairly, showed little early speed to settle near rear as usual, raced 2nd last 2-wide 10Ls from lead, made a 3-wide run from 600 M, 4Ls away on turn, sprinted home widest in straight to claim victory in shadow of post.
Prominent 2nd about 1/2L inside the winner until 400 M. No extra.
Slowly away and then got hampered but soon recovered to be within 1L off the lead. Under pressure 500 M out. Weakened badly from 300 M.
Awkward start. Towards rear. Improved from 600 M to be 2Ls down at 400 M. Kept on before running out of gas 200 M out.
Awkward break. Never better than midfield. Soon dropped out from 400 M.
Always in touch just 1L off the pace. 2nd from 400 M but always well held by the winner.
Around midfield. 2Ls back at 400 M. Nothing left inside 200 M.
At rear. About 3Ls off the speed at 400 M. Failed to draw closer and just plugged on inside 200 M.
Led from wire to wire. Drew clear easily inside 100 M.
Behind midfield or worse. Improved under pressure 500 M out to be in midfield just 2Ls or so off the speed. One-paced thereafter before finding no extra close home.
Dipped shortly after start. Always at rear. Never in the hunt.
In touch just 1L off the speed. Steadied off heels at 400 M. Kept on but looked 3rd from 300 M and shifted out under pressure at 200 M.
Jumped very well. Settled in behind within 2Ls of leader. margin into final 300 M in 6th. Tried hard to impress but lacked dash to sprint with them. Good effort to make frame.
Began slowly. Made ground on the bridle to stay 1L behind leader. Couldn't sprint from 400 M. Ran on only one-paced and overhauled final 150 M.
Jumped fairly from widest barrier. Midfield or worse throughout. Pushed hard to go with field at 400 M. Tired final 200 M.
Away well. Good speed to take up forward spot. Took lead from 600 M and held a neck advantage but surrended inside 300 M. Kept on same pace to line.
Jumped well but lacked early speed. Tailed the field throughout. Shifted out into clear after 300 M and found himself with too much to do.
Broke well. Kept in the rearward division. 5Ls behind lead with 400 M to go. Responded only fairly and didn't get any closer.
Jumped well. Led them early. Then settled just off pace and raced on the inside. Kept on giving final 250 M. Failed to match strides with top pair. Fair effort.
Broke with field. Raced on the inside rail in the rearward section. Still 5Ls behind inside 400 M. Lacked sprint to be a factor and only passed beaten runners late.

Away well. Settled 1 off behind midfield. 2Ls off lead in 5th at 400 M. Hit traffic and switched out across heels after 300 M. Quickened nicely once finding daylight. Chased gamely but never caught up.
Average away. Good speed to obtain prime position on fence. Failed to keep pace from 600 M on. No response to the whip and faded thereafter.
Began on terms. Raced in rear section throughout in middle of the track. Never competitive.
Began awkwardly. Niggled along to stay around midfield. 3Ls off speed final 400 M. Weakened noticeably after 300 M.
Began well. Raced off the speed. Went forward after 300 M. Cruised home nicely final 200 M. Found plenty when asked. Kept on strongly final stages to deny late challenge.
Broke well and contended for the early lead. Outpaced by leaders after 1000 M and was 2-wide in 4th position making home turn. Remained at same pace before fading closing stages.

Outpaced early and raced behind midfield. Switched to the fence before the turn and made a ground saving trip around the bend. Turned out and quickened nicely on straightening. Kept on gamely final stages to deny rivals.
Outpaced early and gradually dropped to midfield. Wide near the 600 M and dropped to rear section at the bend. Rallied and made up ground in the closing stages.
Lacked early speed and raced towards the rear. Near last on straightening and made up some late ground.
Raced among leaders early. 4Ls off the lead near 600 M but steadily gained ground making the turn. Kept on well in the straight but lost out in a duel in the final stages.
Among leaders early stages. 2-wide and tracked leader making home turn. Locked in a 3-way battle near 200 M but couldn't find more to stay in hunt final stages.
Disputed lead before drawing clear entering the bend. Held a slight advantage on straightening and kept on fairly closing stages for a minor placing.
Slowly away but was niggled along to improve to midfield. Lacked a response when asked near 400 M and weakened in the straight.
Raced in midfield or better. Pushed wide and raced tight turning for home. Steadily made up ground in the closing stages.
Never better than midfield. Hung out making the bend and found nothing in the straight.
Dropped to the rear from widest draw and trailed field until home straight. Only ran past a pair of beaten runners.
2-wide at midfield. Swung out to be 4-wide making the turn. Stayed on same pace in the straight.
Soon led on fence by 1L, clear by 2Ls taking home turn and same 200 M out, always in charge.
Raced prominently early out 3 and 4-wide but with cover, hung out at 700 M when under pressure to lie up, fell back to 7Ls behind off home turn, very weak late.
10Ls last 900 M out, detached in rear turning for home, never competitive.
Slow away, towards rear at least 5Ls off the pace until home straight, very one-paced.
Slowly away and stumbled at start, midfield or worse about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed through to final bend, lost further ground on run-in. (Bled.)
About 4Ls behind speed in midfield or better towards inner until home turn, always tended to hang in under pressure and never likely to overhaul winner.
Box run on fence between 2Ls and 3Ls behind leader from 800 M to home straight, went 3rd with 100 M to race but always outpaced by winner.
Raced in 2nd place about 1L or 2Ls off pace until final bend but opted not to hug rail, over 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M and one-paced when losing out on a place 100 M out.
Always very wide (4 and 5-wide without cover) down the back when about 2Ls off pace, 6-wide (widest of all) taking home turn, dropped out.
About 4Ls or 5Ls off pace when mostly 3-back on fence, driven along to take closer order at 600 M, didn't succeed.
3Ls behind speed in midfield at 800 M but lost position on circle and 6Ls behind on straightening, dropped out.
Slow to muster early speed and niggled along in 2nd last, about 8Ls down in 11th off home turn, plugged on past a few tired rivals late.
Sluggish start but recovered to be covered up within 2Ls of pace in 5th or so through to home straight, 3Ls behind in 3rd at the 200 M, found no extra.
Disputed lead out 3-wide with cover, 1L down in 3rd at 800 M, 3Ls back in mid-division taking home turn, dropped further back.
One from rear about 5Ls off speed at 1000 M, 3Ls down in midfield at home bend, went 2Ls down in 2nd at 200 M, no chance with winner but did enough for a comfortable 2nd.
4-wide with cover about 5Ls off speed in rear early on, 3-wide taking home turn when 6Ls down in rear, made some headway until being steadied 200 M out, failed to run on again.
Never better than midfield or 4Ls off pace until homestretch, hung out into centre of track in stretch while weakening right out. (Bled.)
Disputed early lead out 4-wide no cover, a neck down in 2nd when 3-wide no cover turning for home, soon faded out.
Prominently placed on rail about 1L off pace in 3rd or 4th until the 500 M, travelled smoothly to lead at top of home straight, pushed out for an easy win.
Fractious in gates and bounded at start, switched from wide gate to fence, 6Ls last at 800 M, 5Ls behind and towards rear entering homestretch, kept on only evenly.
4-wide with cover down the backstretch when about 4Ls behind lead in 8th, 4-wide no cover on the circle and forced wider into centre of track turning for home, never on terms.
Niggled along when 3-wide with cover early on, over 2Ls back in midfield at 800 M, further back taking home turn, weakened out. (Dropped whip.)
Hard pressed early to settle 3Ls off speed in midfield on fence at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 4th at home straight, one-paced inside final 200 M.
Disputed early lead out 2-wide, under pressure when a neck down in 3rd at top of home straight, soon emptied out. (Abnormal breathing noise and confirmed roarer.)
Towards rear. Some 8Ls down along back straight. Improved rounding home bend to be 4Ls back turning in. Made up good ground final 300 M and was doing best work near finish.
Well there. Led or disputed lead from 1100 M. Weakened badly inside 200 M.
Behind midfield from the first turn. About 6Ls down entering back straight. 3Ls back in midfield turning in. Ran on well final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
At rear. At least 12Ls back at 800 M. Ran past well beaten horses in straight.
Dropped towards rear after being hampered at start and caught wide the first turn. About 4Ls back turning in. Kept on without threatening principals.
Ridden forward to be 1 to 2Ls behind the leader. Ran on well in straight and held off late charge from placed horses inside 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never far off about 3Ls off the pace. 2Ls back turning in. Kept on until weakened 200 M out. (Mucopus.)
Slowly away. Advanced to midfield or better about 3Ls off the lead on the inside rounding the first turn. Kept finding inside final 300 M and only went down narrowly on the line.
Checked after awkward break. Trapped wide and without cover from the first turn. Ridden forward from 1400 M to 2nd at 1000 M. Hit front briefly at 300 M before weakened final 100 M.
2nd last entering back straight. Never seen with a chance.
Slowly away. Advanced to midfield along rail on the first turn. About 5Ls back at 1000 M. 3Ls down turning in. One-paced before weakened 200 M out.
Unbalanced at start. Midfield or worse after being trapped widest on the first turn. Nothing left upon straightening.
Soon led. Headed and sat in 3rd place just 1L back near 1000 M. Disputed lead turning in. Dropped quickly out of contention inside 200 M.
2 back on rail about 1 to 2Ls off the speed. Kept on in straight until no extra final 100 M. (Abnormal breathing noise and confirmed roarer.)
Broke well and attempted to make all. Every chance when 1L clear 200 M out but overhauled by fast-finishing winner nearing finish.
Slightly slow out. Settled one from last on rails. Made moderate progress inside final 300 M without threatening.
Settled mainly 3 wide behind midfield. Only produced moderate headway down straight without threatening.
Settled in 4th on rails some 2Ls back. Only kept on at the one pace in the run home.
Waited with. Switched out for a run shortly after straightening and responded well inside final 250 M to assert authority close to home.
Wide in midfield to straight. Soon dropped out.
Mostly in midfield of small field to 200 M. No extra.
Chased leader. Came to tackle upon straightening and nearly drew level briefly over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort closing stages.

Away with line, pushed along to contest early lead, finally settled 3 back on fence 3 to 4Ls away, enjoyed soft trip in mid-section, never really comfortable, hard ridden into straight and battled to line.

Broke with rest, pressed forward to be in prominent spot 1 out 1 back 2Ls off lead, had run of race thereafter, moved up to challenge 1L away on turn, hit lead 300 M out and fought on strongly, found winner too good.
Away with field, lost ground when checked early, raced in last spot 6Ls away, 3 wide off track in middle stages, made 4 wide run with cover from 800 M, closed race off evenly without threatening.

Began evenly, lacked early dash and drifted back to midfield 3 to 4Ls away, raced 3 wide with cover in mid-section, moved up to be 2Ls away on turn, kept giving but covering extra ground took toll and lacked usual finish.

Taken in behind from start, settled in 2nd last position, 2 wide 5Ls away, lobbed along at tail throughout, tracked 3 wide on turn, made run between horses in straight, closed strongly to be nearest at finish.

Fastest into stride, unable to slot in from wide alley, trapped 3 and 4 wide midfield 3Ls away, pushed along to be 1L away on turn (always working), moved up to challenge in straight but ran out of gas and plugged home.

Average to begin, ridden hard to go forward 4 wide early, caught 4 wide without cover outside leaders thereafter, always doing a power of work, began to lose touch entering straight and dropped right out.

Bounced out fairly, allowed to stride forward to take up useful position behind early leader, enjoyed run of race on rails 2Ls away, began to lose touch from 700 M, weakened right out in straight to be well beaten.

Amongst the best to begin, in mix early but couldn't match it for speed, eventually settled outside leader, rolled to front at mid-point, held 1/2L entering straight but offered little when asked and weakened out, used too much early.

Away with them, pushed along to hold position, just off midfield 3Ls away, 2 wide in traffic in mid-section, tracked nicely to turn 1 to 2Ls away, angled into clear at 300 M and sprinted hard to win with some authority.

Pushed along from start, used up early to cross to lead from wide alley, pressured throughout when trying to get breather, crossed at 800 M and never looked likely, lost touch to be well beaten in straight.
Well there. Took up running rounding home bend going 1L clear about 200 M out but unable to sustain effort and folded up quickly inside 100 M.
Settled in last few. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Led until headed rounding home bend. Plugged on in prominent position under pressure early in straight before fading 200 M out.
Not far off leaders to home bend. Dropped out. (Lame.)
Midfield. Given reminders rounding home bend. Kept on early in straight before fading closing stages.
Forward of midfield to home bend. Dropped out.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on quite well down inner of straight without threatening.
Settled at the back. Made significant progress between runners in straight to be nearest at finish. (Did not find much room close to home.)
Settled in midfield. Quickened upon straightening to hit front over 150 M out but caught close to home.
Waited with. Ran on well in straight to get up on line.
Well there. 3-wide with leaders rounding home bend. Weakened under pressure turning in.
Prominent to home bend. Gradually weakened after straightening.
Never better than midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Always struggling in last few.
Jumped fairly, pushed along to hold midfield position, 3 wide with cover 5Ls from speed throughout, made run coming to outside at top of straight, closed race off well to be closest at finish.
Amongst the first to get going, restrained to race just off speed in 1 out 1 back spot, raced 2 wide, 3Ls away to turn, kept giving until 100 M but unable to finish off in order to threaten.
Slow to begin, settled in rearward division, 3 wide 6Ls from leaders, always working in middle stages, kept on with a 4 wide run on turn but soon weakened to be well beaten.

Away well, pushed on from wide alley, raced keenly early and took up spot outside leader applying pressure, rolled to lead entering straight and held advantage until 200 M but couldn't keep going after early burn.
Awkward to begin, hard ridden to chase early, raced 4 back on fence 6 to 7Ls from speed, under pressure on turn, stuck to paint in straight but made no impact when rearward.

Average to begin, lacked early speed and drifted back to last on rail 8Ls away, ridden along to keep touch throughout, made run between horses in straight, made up good ground when clear to pass all but winner.
First to break, took up position 3 back on rails 3 to 4Ls off pace, never really happy in mid-section, off bit on turn, kept on at same pace in straight and lacked extra gear to be a factor.
Slow to begin, couldn't go early and drifted back to 2nd last, raced off track 7Ls from pace, swung 5 wide into straight, never likely in run home and only held ground to line.
Away with rest, driven hard to cross to lead, taken on and kept them going at good clip, under severe pressure turning for home, early effort took its toll and weakened right out in straight.

Jumped with them, niggled along to go forward, raced 3 wide midfield without cover 4Ls away, always working in run, moved up to be 2Ls away on turn, went on with the job in good style to score a solid win.

Bounced out well, pressed forward to cross to rails, raced behind leaders throughout 2Ls away, bumped when trying to angle clear on turn and became unbalanced, did well to get going again and hold on for 3rd.
Slowly away. 2nd last from 1200 M. Hung in and steadied off heels at 1000 M. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Behind midfield or worse about 5 to 6Ls off the speed from 1200 M. Ran on well final 300 M to snatch win in the closing stages.
Soon led. Headed at 200 M. Weakened thereafter.
At rear. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Went forward to 4th spot going into the first turn but continued to be trapped wide and without cover. Gone soon after straightening.
Slowly away. Checked passing winning post the first time and remained towards rear. Midfield turning in by saving ground along rail but got held up after 200 M and again close home.
Midfield about 4Ls back from 1200 M. Took closer order along rail to be 2Ls down turning in. Kept on well and hit front 150 M out but got outsprinted by the first pair close home.
Forward of midfield about 3Ls back from 1200 M. Responded well upon straightening and hit front briefly 200 M out whilst hanging in and lost out on a place close home.
Soon 2nd. 1L off the lead from the first turn. Challenged lead upon straightening but unable to match speed with principals inside 200 M.
Lost ground at start after bounding in air. Towards rear. Widest turning in. Made up good ground final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Went forward from wide draw. Continued to be trapped wide although with cover in midfield or worse from the first turn. Ran on well in straight but was outpaced by the winner in the closing stages.
Soon travelling in 3rd position 1 to 2Ls behind the leader. Under pressure rounding home bend. No extra inside 200 M.

Away with rest. Taken hold of to settle behind midfield 2-wide 5-6Ls away. Ran on well on bend. 4Ls back in 7th after straightening, but no response to riding. Weakened after 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)

Away well. Midfield or better and hard to settle early. Had easy trip throughout. Pressured from 600 M. 3Ls behind lead on fence on straightening. Kept on giving in straight. Showed good fight to finish 3rd.

Jumped very well. Pushed forward along rail, then allowed to settle amongst last few on fence. Checked at 600 M. 8Ls off after straightening in tail. Had too much to do and only past one tired runner.

Began well. Niggled along with bottom weight to go forward. Soon led on fence. Always about 1L clear until approaching the turn. Had easy trip throughout. Attempted to make all, but found no extra final 50 M to hold off rival.

Began fairly. Worked its way to the rail before the first turn and parked 3Ls behind lead. Checked and lost ground at 600 M. Hugged rail on bend. Had field to beat on turn. Made strong run down inside, just failed to finish in top 3.
Missed the jump. Settled around midfield. Travelled 3-wide with no cover major part of race. Improved to within 2Ls behind lead before dropping out quickly from 500 M on. Well beaten.
Began only fairly and was slow into stride. Raced 4 deep with no cover from 1200 M till straight. Hard ridden on bend and 7 to 8-wide turning in. Soon weakened.

Fast into stride. Took fence before first turn and settled prominently within 2Ls from leader. Travelled comfortably throughout. Pressured from 400 M in 3rd. Battled hard final 200 M and snatched win at the line. Great effort.
Bounded at start. Settled in rear. Over 6Ls off speed approaching the turn. Continued to improve on circle without pressure. 3rd last turning in. Made steady ground on the outside. Nearest at line.
Average to begin. Lacked early speed to keep near rear 6-7Ls away. Raced 2-wide with cover 6Ls back at 600 M. Pressured on bend. Made ground steadily in straight. Lacked dash to be a factor.
Broke with field. Settled behind midfield. Checked at 1300 M and steadied at 1000 M. 1 off 2Ls behind lead at 600 M. Drifted wide on straightening in 4th, but ran on only one-paced in straight.
Away well. Settled just behind speed. Raced outside leader's heels at 800 M. Stalked leader at its girth on turn. Lost ground from 400 M in 3rd. Unable to pick up in straight, overhauled final 200 M.
Better than midfield but was wide and without cover. Crept closer to the lead at the bend but was widest turning in. Ran on well in the straight despite drifting out.
Jumped well from wide draw but dropped back to race on fence in rear section. Kept on steadily on straightening and closed the race off well.
Raced along the rails at midfield. 2Ls off the lead turning for home and kept on fairly in the straight.
Dropped to the rear from widest draw. Near last on straightening and quickened nicely near 200 M. Finished strongly and was closest at the line.
Hard ridden to be among leaders early stages. Raced 1/2L off the pace until taking the lead at the rock. Took a length's advantage into home straight but was swamped final 150 M.
Botched the start and raced towards the rear. Trailed field turning for home and lacked the needed rally in the straight.
Raced 2-wide behind midfield. Ridden along to keep up at the bend. Only ran past a few beaten runners in the straight.
Off slowly. Raced on fence and never better than midfield. Failed to pick up on straightening and kept on same pace to line.
Jumped to an early lead. 2-wide and settled behind the leaders in the back straight. Kept within 3Ls of the pace making home turn and stayed on fairly over the closing stages.
Among leaders early before drifting to midfield upon entering back straight. Quickened at 200 M and was closest at finish.

Pressed hard from wide draw to take the early lead in a 3-wide spot. Lost the lead near the rock and was niggled along to keep pace alongside leader. Hung wide turning in and steadily faded after straightening.
Settled on fence in a prominent position behind the pace. Switched out behind the leader on straightening and rolled to the lead inside final 200 M.
Towards rear about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace until final bend, kept on only fairly but still nearest at finish.
4-wide no cover early on, got in 2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd from 700 M to home straight, one-paced thereafter.
3-back on fence 3Ls off pace in 5th or so through first half, switched off fence on circle and turned in 3-wide and 2Ls down in 4th, a neck 2nd at 200 M, stayed on to lead close home.
Never on terms, quite some way detached on straightening, unacceptable performance.
Led out 2-wide by 1L at 1000 M, on fence in front at 700 M and 1L clear off home turn, grabbed by winner inside final 50 M but gamely hung onto 2nd.
In a worse than midfield position 2 and 3-wide with cover between 4Ls and 5Ls off pace until home turn, made some decent late ground, never nearer.
Lacked any early pace, 8Ls behind in 2nd last at halfway, always well held despite running short of room late on.
2Ls down in 4th at 1000 M, 3-wide on straightening and struggling to lie up in 5th turning for home, faded out tamely. (See Racing Incidents.)
Box run on fence 2Ls behind lead in 3rd through to home straight, peeled out to have every chance when 1L 2nd at 200 M, kept on well but couldn't poke head in front.
Always stuck in midfield about 4Ls off the speed, one-paced.
On fence but never threatened to improve from mid-pack about 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed.
2-wide and about 3Ls or 4Ls off speed in midfield through to home straight, kept on fairly well despite being outpaced by front three.
A neck down in 2nd out 2-wide at 1100 M, steadily lost position and was under pressure when 4Ls down in midfield swinging for home, very weak in the finish.
Always towards rear at least 5Ls off the pace from 1100 M to home straight, found nothing off the bit.
Ideal position on fence 1L off pace in 3rd at 1100 M, shuffled back to 3Ls back in 5th taking home turn, 2Ls down at 200 M, kept on dourly to retrieve a little more ground.
3-wide with cover and 3Ls behind leader in 6th at 1100 M, left 4-wide no cover at 800 M in 7th, struggling to lie up turning for home and 4Ls behind, weakened out late.
2-wide and 3Ls off speed 3-back on fence in 7th at 1100 M, 4Ls down in 8th or so entering home straight, plugged on fairly, hung in and proved difficult to ride final 200 M, never nearer.
4Ls off pace in 8th at 1100 M when 2-wide, progress to be 2Ls down in 3rd taking final bend, led 100 M out, driven out.
Slowest away and soon 8Ls behind in rear, marginally closer taking home turn, made up some late ground but never troubled principals.
5Ls back in 9th on fence at 1100 M, not much closer taking home turn, ran on very strongly late but line came just too soon.
Pressed on from wide gate to lead by 1L on fence at 1100 M, headed at 700 M and 2Ls down in 4th off final bend, one-paced but still nearly found a place.
Hampered at 1000 M when 2nd last about 6Ls behind the speed, 7Ls last into homestretch, never got involved.
Over-raced when 2-wide and 2Ls down in 5th at 1100 M, a neck down in 2nd at home turn, led 300 M out, grabbed by winner at the 100 M and just hung on for 3rd.
Prominent but caught 3-wide no cover at 1200 M, sent on to lead out 2-wide by 1L at 700 M, a neck clear on fence taking final bend, one-paced.
Towards rear and proved difficult to settle in the middle stages. Made up some late ground without looking dangerous.
Soon 1 out and 1 back in 2nd place. Challenged lead upon straightening and just got collared by the first pair in the closing stages.
Soon took up running. Kept on well in straight but failed to dash home with principals final 50 M.
Always towards rear. Made up good ground whilst hanging in final 200 M until getting close to heels near the line.
Soon midfield but proved difficult to settle in the middle stages. Made up good ground final 200 M but the post just came a fraction too soon.
Towards rear. Severly checked after 600 M and dropped to 2nd last. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
At rear. Never in the hunt.
Soon 4th about 2Ls off the lead. Kept on well in straight to just miss a place in a very tight finish.
Soon midfield or better. 2Ls down turning in. Ran on determinedly final 250 M and just got up to snatch win final strides.
Midfield or worse. Found nothing in straight before dropping out tamely inside 200 M.
2 back on rail in 3rd place. Kept on in straight and failed to quicken after getting held up 200 M out.
Settled in midfield. Ran on under pressure upon straightening but found winner too good.
Prominent early. Dropped to midfield around Rock. Ran home one-paced.
Always well behind.
Never far off. Hit front briefly over 200 M out. Soon found no extra and swamped.
With leaders early, settling just behind leaders. Attempting to improve when jostled between runners over 200 M out. Faded under pressure closing stages.
Settled in last few. Commenced run turning in. Quickened well to take charge 200 M out. Won readily.
Jumped fairly. Lacked pace despite niggled along early. Raced towards rear to straight. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Settled in midfeild. Improving when inconvenienced for a run about 200 M out. Sustained headway afterwards without threatening.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on steadily down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Quickly improved from midfield early stages to dispute lead rounding home bend. Tended to lay in early in straight and died on its run over 200 M out.
Soon dropped to last few. Remained in rear to straight. Ran past between horses closing stages.
Led or disputed lead to 200 M. Dropped out. (Mucus.)

Standard to break, restrained to slot in for cover, positioned in rearward division on rails 8Ls away, raced ungenerously in middle stages, made run from well back on turn, made up good ground late between horses.

Slow to begin, settled 3rd from rear 2-wide 8Ls from pace, used nothing in mid-section, swung wide on turn but showed no turn of foot and could only keep on at same pace to line. Never able to get into it.

Fastest to break, showed good speed to go on and take up spot behind the leader, relaxed well and had run of race with even pace thereafter, eased out to tackle on turn, made good break at 200 M and kept on well tiring a little late.
Fast into stride, used up early working hard to cross to lead, overraced in mid-section keeping pace at even tempo, tackled on turn, headed at 150 M and weakened out late after early burn.

Standard to begin, lacked early toe, positioned around midfield 5-back on rails 6Ls from front runners, used no petrol in run, followed paint in straight, kept on at same pace and unable to make an impression.
Average to begin, niggled along to take up spot 2-wide but 2Ls away, raced first without cover in mid-section, hard pressed to make ground entering straight but stuck to task well to make frame.

Broke with field, pressed forward to settle in midfield spot 2-wide 4-5Ls from lead, 1 out 1 back with good run in mid-section, swung 3-wide with run entering straight and closed race off strongly to get very close late.
Broke well, pressed forward to take up prominent spot 3 back on fence, enjoyed good run therefter, travelled well to turn, found little when gap opened in straight and only plugged to line.

Showed no speed on jumping, assumed usual spot at rear, raced on rail 10Ls away from front runner, kept to rails and still well back on turn, unable to peg back huge start but still didn't finish off as normally would.
Average to begin, hard ridden early to keep midfield spot on rails, raced 4-5Ls away with run of race in middle stages, under hard riding turning for home and lacked another gear to make impression.

Jumped with field, unable to muster early speed, drifted back to settle just of midfield, raced 2-wide 6Ls away throughout, spent little in run, eased out and came from long way back on turn, made up good ground to take 3rd.

Shade tardy to begin, asumed position near tail as usual, raced 2-wide 9-10Ls from lead throughout, still well back on turn, made run 4-wide in straight but unable to make up any significant ground. Gave too great a start.
Dropped towards rear from wide draw. 6 to 7Ls back at 1200 M. Last 600 M out. Made up good ground without threatening placed horses in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Took up running from 1300 M. Disputed lead turning in. Dropped rapidly out of contention 300 M out.
Midfield or better from 1200 M. Headway rounding the turn to 4th turning in. Kept on until no extra final 100 M.
Slowly away. Outpaced at rear. 6 to 7Ls off the pace at 1000 M. About 4Ls down turning in. Ran on steadily without threatening principals in straight.
Soon towards rear after proving difficult to settle out wide with no cover in the early stages. Ran past beaten runners inside 200 M.
