Led early before settling in 2nd spot. Hit front briefly turning in. Weakened badly inside 200 M.
Soon towards rear. About 6Ls back from 1600 M. 4Ls down turning in. Ran on well final 300 M and held on to win after taking charge 200 M out.
Checked off heels at 1600 M before travelling 2 back on fence in 4th or 5th spot. Kept on in straight until weakened 250 M out.
Slowly away. Niggled forward to be in midfield or worse from 1400 M. About 3Ls back at 1200 M. Held up near 300 M before shifting out and making some ground to be closest at finish.
Unruly on jumping and became well detached from field. Tagged on to rear bunch at 1000 M. Never in the race.
Led or disputed lead out wide with no cover from 1500 M to 1400 M whilst proving difficult to settle before taking up 3rd spot. Hit front 400 M out but found no extra and was headed 200 M for home.
Behind midfield. Soon weakened upon straightening.
Behind midfield or worse. About 4 to 5Ls back at 1000 M. Improved a little to midfield from 600 M. Ran on steadily in straight but no match for winner inside 200 M and lost 2nd close home.
Never far off in 4th or 5th place. Kept on one-paced in straight before weakened badly inside 200 M.
Away with field. Midfield, 2 wide 3 to 4Ls back with cover. Enjoyed easy trip on bend. Followed leader in straight. Reluctant to shift out into clear final 200 M and was one-paced to line.
Slow to begin. Tailed until rounding the turn. Switched very wide on straightening, 2nd last 6Ls back, responded only fairly in straight. Did not get any closer.
Began well and driven to be forward. Crossed to rail 1100 M out, then kept handy within 2Ls behind lead. Attempted to make run on inside. Held some chance early straight but tired final 150 M out.
Broke well from outside barrier. Showed good speed to hold position outside leader's girth. Briefly headed after straightening. Kept to task well but just lacking extra final 200 M.

Began well. Kept around midfield on fence. About 4Ls back approaching the turn. Similar order but without clear passage. Clear 200 M out but never threatened top pair. Lost out on a place final stride. Good effort.

Average start. Travelled comfortably behind midfield on back stretch. Niggled to improve wide on bend. 4Ls behind lead in 9th after straightening. Chased gamely final 300 M but found winner too good. Strong effort.

Jumped well. Soon midfield with no cover. Niggled along to take closer order on the circle in a 3 wide spot without cover. Within 2Ls from leader after straightening in 5th. Dropped out quickly after 300 M.
Away well. Raced prominently, 2 wide with cover 2Ls off in 4th. Same margin taking final corner. Eased out into clear at 400 M but unable to offer much when asked. Kept on only one-paced.
Slow to begin. Pushed along to keep pace. Kept 3 wide behind midfield. Improved on bridle rounding home. Shifted out for strong finish after 400 M. Led 200 M out. Won going away.
Slow to begin. Outpaced and settled rear on rail. About 8Ls off speed at 800 M. Last to enter straight. Couldn't keep up and was beaten a long way.

Jumped fairly, settled near rear as usual. Raced 1 off over 7Ls from frontrunners, travelled kindly on the bend. Behind field entering straight. Switched wide and made good ground from middle of track. Nearest at line.

Jumped fairly from awkward alley. Pushed to go forward. Crossed to lead on rail at 900 M. Held half length edge on the circle. Fought hard to make all but gradually weakened and did not have enough to make frame.
Jumped best. Remained 3Ls off lead on fence in 5th. Saved ground along rail rounding home. Elected to hug rail and did not have free striding space final 200 M whilst hanging in. No chance to kick.

Began only fairly from inside alley. Kept behind midfield on fence. Hard to settle early stages and clipped heels at 1000 M. Turned into straight 4 wide in 3rd last 6Ls behind lead. Weakened soon after straightening.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Pressured on straightening but lacked the needed response. Stayed on same pace to the line.

Pressed forward out of the gates. Settled 2-wide and raced a length off the lead in the middle stages. Moved up to be alongside the leader at the bend and took over the lead on straightening. Headed near 200 M and steadily faded.
Settled on fence at midfield. No response when asked on straightening and finished tailed out.
Raced prominently behind the leader until home straight. Unable to quicken and weakened closing stages.
Trailed field until 800 M. Remained towards the rear and was widest turning for home. Kept on fairly and made up some ground in the straight.

2-wide and better than midfield. 2 to 3Ls off the pace at the bend and kept on nicely on straightening. Opened up a clear advantage at the 200 M but had to dig deep over the final stages to hold off a late challenger.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Switched out on straightening and rallied nicely. Kept chasing in the closing stages but ran out of ground to catch winner.
Settled on fence behind midfield. Hung out and lost a bit of ground at the turn. Mustered a late rally and was closest at finish.
Settled 3-wide behind midfield. Improved to midfield at the bend. Kept on fairly in the straight for a minor placing.
Ridden out of the gates and set the pace until home straight. Headed shortly after straightening and steadily weakened final 250 M.
Settled towards the rear. Trailed field at 800 M and was ridden along at the bend to keep pace with field. Last to enter home straight and ran past tired runners.
2-wide and 5Ls off speed in midfield at 800 M, 4Ls down in 6th turning for home and picked up well to be over 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, comfortable 2nd but always held by the winner.
6Ls off speed in midfield at 1000 M, struggling to pick up at top of stretch, very weak inside final 300 M.
Well placed in 4th when 2-wide and 3Ls behind speed at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 3rd at top of home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Disputed early lead before settling into box seat 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 900 M, still 2Ls down swinging for home but rather one-paced from then on.
Keen early on, 3-back on fence in 5th about 4Ls off pace at 900 M, struggling to lie up turning for home, faded out.
Slow break, always towards rear about 7Ls off pace until the 600 M, tended to hang out also, never threatened.
Settled midfield 2-wide about 5Ls off speed until turning for home, outpaced by principals.
Led out wide early, led by over 1L on fence 900 M out, under pressure when headed by winner 300 M out, just hung on for 3rd place.
Held up one from rear about 10Ls off pace down the back, 4-wide on straightening when 6Ls down in 12th, ran on well late to just miss a place when nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Carried head awkwardly early on, always worse than midfield at least 7Ls off the speed until home turn, made some minor late ground.
Travelled well in 2nd out 2-wide between 1L and 2Ls off pace until the 600 M, eased to the front 300 M out, shot over 1L clear with 200 M to race, always in command.
Got a long way back 12Ls last at 1000 M, 7Ls last turning for home, no impression.
2-wide in midfield about 4Ls off speed at 1000 M, pressed on to be a little closer in 5th at top of home stretch, couldn't quicken up any further.
Slowly away, 8Ls off pace in 12th at 1000 M, pressed on 3-wide no cover on circle to be over 4Ls down in midfield at home turn, faded right out.
Away well, box run on fence about 2Ls off pace in 4th from back to home straight, stayed on well for strong pressure but marginally outfought late.
Lost ground at start but recovered on fence to be 3Ls down in midfield at 800 M, hung out very badly on circle and totally lost position to be 7Ls down in 10th at top of stretch, unimpressive.
About 4Ls or 5Ls off pace on fence in 9th place or so through to final bend, plugged on at the same speed.
Always in rear bunch and at least 7Ls off the speed, never competitive.
Switched from wide gate to rear but on fence about 8Ls off pace until halfway, never on terms and eased a long way out.
Disputed early lead at 900 M out 3-wide no cover, still out wide when 2Ls down in 5th turning for home, soon weakened out.
Best away and disputed early lead on fence, clear on circle by a neck but headed at top of home straight, barely outpaced by others on the run-in but still stuck to task quite well.
3-wide with cover when 3Ls behind speed in 6th at the 800 M, lost position on the circle and 4Ls down in midfield off home turn, very weak thereafter. (Bled.)
Worse than midfield 3-wide with cover about 5Ls off speed until final turn, finished off very strongly down centre of track to lead on line.
Led by a neck at 900 M, close up in 2nd on circle before leading again 300 M out, headed by GOLDEN WIN at 200 M but fought back in tight finish for a place.
Always 2-wide and 3Ls behind in mid-division until home turn, 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, kept on finding but still couldn't place in very tight finish.
Disputed lead about 900 M out but settled 1L back in 3rd on circle, every chance when leading 200 M out, no extra inside final 50 M and just missed out on a place.

Raced inside winner in about 8th or 9th place and 5Ls behind leader until 800 M, moved closer 3Ls down in 6th turning for home, ran on well to lead 3 strides from line only to be headed just before the post.
Towards rear at least 6Ls off the speed until turn, stayed on best of the rest (all very well beaten) but comprehensively outpaced by first 7 home.
Soon forward of midfield about 3Ls off the speed. 4-wide turning in. Made up nice ground final 300 M to secure a distant 2nd near home.
Towards rear. Headway from 800 M to midfield or worse rounding the turn. 5Ls back turning in. One-paced in straight.

Soon pulled its way to the front with the eventual winner close-up on its inside after proving difficult to settle. Headed at 1000 M. Kept on in straight whilst hanging in and found no extra 100 M out.
Soon sat inside the leader. Took up running at 1000 M. Kept on strongly in straight to win unchallenged.
At rear. Shifted out for running upon straightening. Made up nice ground final 250 M but just lost 2nd close home. (Bled.)
In touch. 2Ls back rounding the bend. Dropped out tamely from 300 M.
Slowly away. Got on the rail and moved up steadily midfield or better from 1000 M. Unable to quicken in straight.
Slowly away but soon ridden forward to be in touch. 4th or 5th from 1200 M about 2Ls off the pace. Struggled badly 300 M out.
Always in touch in 3rd or 4th place within 2Ls off the speed. Kept on without ever looking dangerous in straight.
Soon dropped to the rear from wide draw. Made up some late ground. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear and trapped wide. Last turning in. Ran past beaten runners final 200 M.
Midfield early. Lost position at 1300 M and was some 6Ls back towards rear at 1000 M. Never a threat in straight.
Midfield. Unbalanced when placed close to heels rounding the turn at 800 M. Ketp on until finding no extra 200 M out.
Towards rear. At least 7Ls back at 1000 M. Made up good ground final 250 M to be nearest at finish but was set too big a task.
Settled behind midfield. Held up for a run early in straight. Looked quickening when clear over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort shortly passing 200 M.
Held up in forward of midfield, racing keenly early stages. Similar position turning in and ran home one-paced.
Made running to 200 M. Hung on well under pressure for minor placing closing stages.
Wide throughout. Rear early. Made rapid progress far side to be just off the pace approaching home bend. Dropped away quickly shortly after straightening.
Restrained to rear far side. Remained in rear into straight. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled on rails in midfield. Soon weakened out of contention after straightening.
Settled in rear. Produced only moderate progress past beaten horses down centre of straight.
Ridden for pace early. Mainly in midfield to straight. Kept on steadily under pressure before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Raced wide in midfield. Commenced run rounding home bend. Quickened well to hit front about 200 M out and hung on well to the line.
Settled in rear, hugging inside rails. Steadied for a stride and switched inside for clear run upon straightening but kept on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Never far off. Unable to quicken to threaten and died on its run passing 200 M.
Wide in midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Settled just off the pace. Held every chance when disputing lead 200 M out but unable to sustain effort in the run home.
Raced wide behind midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening in straight.
Slow to begin, bumped early, settled in 2nd last on rails 8Ls away, not asked in mid-section, hard ridden on turn, unable to show any turn of foot and only plodded to line, disappointing.

Broke well, unable to get closer from wide alley, posted 3 and 4 wide in middle stages without cover, always working 6 to 7Ls away, still wide turning to home. Stuck to task well but unable to threaten winners.

Away well, allowed to roll forward and take up spot outside leader, raced 2Ls away 2 wide without cover, niggled along to move up to challenge on turn, began to lose touch from 300 M and weakened right out.

Broke with rest, lacked early toe, drifted back to just off midfield, raced in 2 wide spot 6Ls away, eased 3 wide from 700 M but didn't get cart into race, still well back turning, showed great sprint to nearly get there.

Fastest into stride, went on with it to cross and lead easily, dictated terms gradually increasing tempo to turn, held 2Ls advantage on entering straight, allowed inside horse to join but kicked strongly at 200 M to defy rivals.

Average to jump, restrained from awkward alley to assume spot at tail, lobbed along at rear 8 to 9Ls away in mid-section, still last and well back turning, made up some ground passing tired runners in straight.

Began fairly, pressed forward to assume prominent spot 1 out 1 back 3Ls away, enjoyed charmed run in mid-section, made 3 wide run in straight, still 2Ls off at 200 M but showed good dash to only go down narrowly. Solid effort.

Fast into stride, quickly assumed position behind leader, raced on rails 2Ls away throughout, had run of race to turn, gained dream run turning for home and loomed up to challenge. Ran out of steam last 100 M.
Began fairly, looked up midfield position 2 wide 4 to 5Ls from pace, had easy time in middle stages, still in traffic with job to do on turning for home, closed race off only fairly when clear.

Average to jump, allowed to settle just worse than midfield, raced on rails 6Ls away throughout, used no petrol to turn, made run between horses in straight making good ground late but unable to bridge the gap.
Slow to begin, allowed to settle in rearward division 3 wide with cover 6Ls away, always working, hard ridden to make 4 wide run on turn, unable to go on with it and only battled to line.

Jumped with rest, didn't show any real speed, left 3 wide without cover in midfield 4Ls away always working throughout, not far away on turn, kept trying in straight but extra effort took toll and only held ground to line.
Slow to begin, pushed along to take up midfield spot, raced 3 back on fence 4Ls away throughout, had easy run to turn, pushed along on turning, unable to keep touch and gradually weakened out of it.
Always struggling at the back. Dropped out soon after straightening.
Prominent. Ran home one-paced and did not find much room closing stages.
Mainly 3-wide in prominent position. Kept on before finding no extra and swamped inside final 200 M.
Settled in last few. Made up late ground under pressure inside final 200 M running past beaten horses.
Settled behind midfield. Finished off race strongly to just fail to peg back winner.
Settled in rear. Made moderate progress past beaten runners down centre of straight without threatening.
Travelled in better than midfield to straight. Gradually weakened.
Settled mainly in forward of midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish without threatening.
In similar position throughout. One-paced in straight.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight and lost a placing late.
Mainly in midfield three off the rails. Weakened into straight.
Made all. Fought on dourly under pressure to just stave off fast-finishing runner-up final 200 M.
Began only fairly, proved difficult to settle, positioned just off midfield on rails 5Ls away, made run between horses in straight but closed race off only fairly when asked holding ground to line.

Broke with them, allowed to roll forward, unable to get in and race 3 wide without cover early, used up a little to eventually cross outside leader at midpoint, under pressure to keep touch into straight, lost ground when tiring late.

Away well, showed good early speed to take up running after 300 M, backed off pace nicely after working a little early, held 1L advantage turning and kicked away, collared at 200 M but kept on well to make the frame.
Fast into stride, took up position behind leader, overraced a little in mid-section, under hard riding approaching turn, weakened right out in straight to be well beaten uncharacteristically bad run.

Bumped early, pressed on but unable to get in, difficult to settle early but forced to be 3 wide without cover from midpoint, always working to turn, in mix until 250 M but just couldn't find extra gear. Much improved effort.

Began fairly, not pushed early and drifted back to near rear, 2 wide 6Ls away throughout, made searching 3 wide run from 600 M, still a bit to do at 400 M but stuck to task well closing strongly to take 2nd late.

Showed no early speed, niggled along to hold position 3 back on rails 3 to 4Ls off pace, enjoyed easy trip in mid-section, eased wider in straight and got clear at 250 M, closed race off evenly to be nearest at finish.

Slow to begin, lost further ground when checked, settled down at rear 8Ls from pace on rails, hard ridden to stay in touch at 800 M, made 5 wide run 5Ls away on turning, came with big run to swamp them in final 100 M. Big effort.

Crowded for room early, lost position and took up spot close to rear on rails 6Ls away, spent little in run to turn, made run between horses in stretch and stuck to task in straight to make up some ground. Even effort.

Broke with them, ridden along to settle in midfield position 4Ls away 2 wide, followed 3 wide with trail into race from 600 M, under pressure on turning but kept finding to finish on heels of placegetters.
Began well, amongst first few early, raced 1 out 1 back 2Ls away when crossed at midway mark, close enough on turning, unable to quicken when asked and only battled to line.

Began reasonably, allowed to settle just off midfield, 2 wide 5Ls away in mid-section, tracked 3 wide from 600 M and 4 wide on turn, loomed to hit lead at 200 M and fought strongly but unable to hold off rivals late.
Soon travelling kindly in 4th or 5th spot 2Ls or so behind the speed. Ran on steadily to grab 2nd near finish without troubling the winner.
Thereabout in 4th or 5th position about 2Ls off the leader. Hung in early home straight and ran home one-paced.
Towards rear. Took closer order along rail rounding the turn to be 4Ls down upon straightening. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Soon towards rear. Always outpaced.
Soon moved up along rail to be 1 to 2Ls behind the leader. Responded well final 200 M and took charge 200 M out to record an easy victory.
Led to 200 M. One-paced and lost out on a minor placing final 50 M.
Jumped well but soon outpaced to be 3-wide in midfield. Under pressure rounding the turn. Ran on a bit early straight but effort not sustained inside 200 M.

Dropped back to rear after jumping awkwardly. Improved along rail from Rock to midfield about 3Ls back turning in. Hung in upon straightening and reluctant to shift out before making up some late ground.
Slowly away. Soon midfield but raced greenly. Steadied off heels at 600 M. Never looked likely.
Slowly away and raced ungenerously at rear. Never in the hunt.
Midfield or worse after bounding in the air at start. Steadied off heels at 600 M and dropped towards rear. 5Ls back at 400 M. Never a threat in straight.
Prominent 2nd or 3rd just 1L off the pace. Kept on in straight without threatening the winner and lost 2nd close home.

Average to jump. Pushed to keep pace early stages and was checked entering back straight. Raced in the rear thereafter. Followed rails into straight and didn't have much luck final 100 M. Not fully tested.

Broke well. Kept around midfield within 4Ls off speed. Niggled along to stay interested down backstretch. Pushed hard on bend in the 3-wide spot without cover. Turned in very wide on straightening and ran home only one-paced.

Checked shortly after the start and raced towards the rear. Kept 3-wide until straight. Drifted very wide on straightening. Ran on steadily in straight. Made good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.

Away well. Good early speed to be forward. Became unbalanced behind and lost ground at 1000 M. Always there within 3Ls from lead in 5th. Same turning straight. Switched wide on straight and closed race only fairly.

Began well from outside gate. Showed good early speed to be in handy position. 1 out within 2Ls from the leader. 3rd to turn home. Joint leaders until 150 M. Unable to match pace of winner, but kept on well to finish 3rd.

Began with them. Pushed hard to take up midfield spot on fence. Niggled along on bend. 4Ls back in 6th on straightening. Kept giving in straight, but lacked extra gear to be a factor. Held up slightly last 100 M.
Average begin and was slow into stride. Improved on bridle to dispute lead mid-way. Held 1L advantage into straight 1 off the fence. Stayed on until 200 M but emptied out thereafter.

Began on terms. Checked shortly after start and again at 1000 M. Kept behind midfield on rail. Eased to 2-wide with cover at 400 M for better running. Obtained run 250 M out and finished off race nicely to be distant 2nd.

Away very well. Showed speed to take up prominent spot in 4th 2Ls off lead. Travelled comfortably throughout. Made straight 4-wide and responded strongly when asked. Pulled away to win unchallenged 150 M out. Solid effort.

Jumped best from awkward alley to take early lead on fence. Took hold and raced 1L behind leader from 600 M. Looked likely after the 300 M. Gradually weakened final stages and didn't have enough to hang on to 3rd.

Broke with field. Lacked early speed and settled in last. Over 9Ls behind leader on rail at 600 M. Last after straightening. Made run down middle of track final 200 M. Closed race well, but simply set too big a task.

Began fairly. Struck heels, blundered and almost fell at 1000 M. Then raced behind midfield in a 2-wide spot. Lost ground on the circle and dropped to 2nd last after straightening. Found nothing in straight.
Disputed lead early. Took a sit after 1200 M and raced prominent on fence behind the pace. Kept on well in the straight but unable to find extra to challenge winner.

Niggled along to keep pace behind the leaders early stages. Followed leader in a 2-wide position in back straight and drew even with leader on straightening. Opened up a clear lead final 100 M and kept advantage to the finish.
Settled at midfield early and middle stages. Lost ground when steadied at the home bend and was near the rear on straightening. Remained on same pace in the straight.
Dropped to rear section from a wide draw. Behind midfield and made up ground saving trip around home turn. Kept on fairly in the straight.
Settled on fence at midfield until home straight. Quickened at the 200 M and closed the race off well.

3-wide among leaders into 1st turn and took sole possession of the lead after 1200 M. Led field into home straight by a slim margin. Kept fighting for the lead until bowing out inside final 200 M. Stayed on fairly to make the frame.
Caught wide in a forward position. 3-wide outside the leader early part of back straight but struggled to kept pace from the Rock. Continued to lose ground at the bend and only cantered home.
Settled in rear section. Kept along the rails making home turn and switched out on straightening. Steadily made up ground in the straight.
Hard ridden out of the gate and raced close to the pace. Better than midfield and kept within 3Ls of the leader in back straight. Pressured turning for home but unable to find extra in the straight.
Slowly away and settled behind midfield. Pressured after 400 M but stayed on same pace in the straight.
Botched the start and raced at the rear. Trailed field and swung wide turning for home. Only ran past a beaten runner.
Jumped awkwardly and raced near the back. Remained in a rearward position making home turn and lacked the needed rally in the straight.
Keen early on, 3-back on fence when 3Ls off pace in 5th at 1200 M, under pressure to keep up at 600 M, dropped out tamely in home straight.
3Ls back in 6th when 2-wide at 1100 M, over 2Ls down in 3rd taking final bend when under pressure, failed to quicken up.
Carried head awkwardly early on, 7Ls back in 9th at 1100 M, no closer when steadied turning for home, moderate late headway.
Awkward break and lost ground at start, soon 8Ls last, 7Ls down in 10th turning for home, made some minor late ground past a few tired rivals.
2-wide at 1200 M when 5Ls back in midfield, forced out 3-wide with cover at 1000 M, 4Ls down in 5th or so off home turn, kept on at same speed and just missed out on a place.
Led on fence at 1500 M, headed at 1300 M and adopted box run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th, under pressure to lie up 600 M out, soon folded tamely.
2-wide and less than 1L off speed in 2nd from 1100 M to home straight, led 300 M out and looked the winner when over 1L clear at 200 M, bumped when headed about 50 M out, no extra.
Pressed on to lead by 1L on fence 1300 M out, a neck clear from 800 M to straightening for home, all out when headed at 300 M and dropped away.
4-back on fence about 4Ls off pace before moving out 2-wide at 1000 M, driven along when 4Ls down in 5th off final bend, 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, dug in to lead 50 M out, ran on.
Slowest away, always in rear group at least 8Ls off the speed until home turn, no impression.
Caught 3-wide no cover in 4th about 2.5Ls off pace at 1300 M, couldn't get in at any stage and lost position turning for home, emptied right out.
2-wide and 8Ls back in 10th at 1100 M, hard pressed to be 6Ls down in 8th turning for home, plugged on to take 3rd on line, nearest at finish.
Slow to muster early speed but soon 3-wide no cover within 2Ls off lead, 4-wide (widest of all) turning for home when 2Ls down in 5th, all out when 1L down in 4th at 200 M, no extra late.
Tracked leaders in midfield 2-wide and about 3Ls off speed until home turn, headway to be 1L down in 4th at 200 M, kept on well to lead on line.
Best away, 2-wide and within 2Ls of the speed in 3rd or so through to final bend, led by a neck over 200 M out, headed about 30 M out and lost out on quinella berth in final strides.
Soon detached in rear 8Ls off pace 700 M out, kept on past a few beaten horses in the home straight but never on terms with principals.
On fence a neck down in 3rd early on, pressed on to lead by 1L taking final bend, headed over 200 M out and very weak thereafter.
Box-seat run on fence 2Ls off speed in 4th or so from 800 M to home straight, a neck down in 2nd at 200 M, poked in front inside final 30 M only to be done in final bound.
Bumped at start and soon outpaced about 5Ls behind leader and towards rear, 7Ls down in 11th taking home turn, made some minor late ground.
Bumped at start, fairly placed in midfield about 3Ls off speed but lost place on circle and 6Ls down in 10th turning for home, no impression.
Slowly away, on fence about 3Ls off speed in midfield until straightening for home, over 1L down in 6th at 200 M when a little tight for room, lacked the finish of the first three home.
Slowest to begin, 6Ls off pace in 11th early on, over 4Ls back in 9th taking final turn, ran on well late to be nearest at the finish.
Disputed early lead out 2-wide, hung out at 600 M and in 2nd place 1L off speed when 3-wide on straightening, found zero off the bridle.
Always 3-wide but with cover about 4Ls off speed in 8th through to home straight, never threatened to improve.
Led briefly before settling in 4th or 5th spot about 3Ls behind the speed. 2Ls back turning in. Kept on in straight to grab a distant 2nd.
Slowly away. At rear about 5Ls down and widest turning in. Made up some late ground without threatening principals.
Ridden forward from widest draw to take up running despite being trapped 4-wide the first turn. Headed at 200 M. No extra. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield or better. About 4Ls back at 600 M. Wide turning in. Not a threat in straight.
Ridden forward but trapped wide and without cover. 3rd or 4th from 1000 M. Soon dropped out of contention upon straightening.
Towards rear. About 5Ls back at 1000 M. Improved rounding the turn to midfield turning in. Ran on in straight and lost a distant 2nd close home.
Dropped back to the rear from wide draw. Never a factor.
Towards rear. Never seen with a chance.
Jumped well. 2 back on fence from 1100 M. Held up for run approaching 200 M before running on but always held by placed horses final 100 M.
Midfield or better. About 4Ls back turning into back straight. Under pressure turning in. Made no impression in straight.
Towards rear. About 4Ls back turning in. One-paced in straight.
Tracked leader from 1100 M. Ran on well upon straightening and drew clear after taking control 200 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Wide in midfield throughout. Ran home one-paced.
Raced in rear. Made moderate progress under pressure past beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Ridden for pace early, then settled within 1L of leader one off the rails. Soon came to challenge upon straightening and gained upper hand close to home.
Slow out. Raced in rear early. Gradually improved to midfield on rails home bend. Soon weakened after straightening.
Well there. Took up running at around Rock. Still holding narrow advantage 200 M out. Fought on steadily under pressure but collared close to home.
Sluggish at start. Travelled towards rear. Soon faded after straightening. (Mucus.)
Always struggling well behind. Tailed off into straight.
Mainly in forward of midfield to straight. Soon found no extra.
Jumped fairly. Settled in 3rd on rails just off the pace. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Broke well from middle draw. Settled in forward of midfield mainly two off the rails. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.

Average to jump, settled down in midfield spot 2-wide 5Ls away, not really asked in middle stages and travelled well to turn, still in traffic on turning in, close off nicely to make frame. Did best work late.

Average to begin, lacked early toe, drifted back to 2nd last 12Ls away from pace, began 3-wide run from 600 M (with cover),4Ls away on turn, switched wide in straight and made up huge amount of ground to just miss. Solid effort.
Average to jump, lacked early dash and settled down at rear 12Ls from pace, chased along to make ground in mid-section, on rails 5Ls away on turn, stuck to rails and made up a little ground late.

Failed to muster speed early, drifted back to near rear 11Ls from pace, always niggled to hold spot and never really comfortable, still well back and swung wide into straight. Made no impression in run to line.
Slow to begin, soon mustered speed to cross and slot in 4 back on fence 4Ls away, spend nothing in mid-section, followed paint in straight and made up substantial ground to be closest at finish.

Bounced out well, taken straight to rails, crowded a little when taking position behind leader, enjoyed good trip thereafter (even speed) 3 back on fence, made run between runners in stretch showing good dash to just miss 2nd.

Away well, amongst first four early, received check on first turn, raced outside leader thereafter (even tempo), moved up to tackle on turn, hit lead briefly but early workload took toll and weakened late.

Began well, ridden along to cross to rails from wide alley, eventually handed up lead after early burn at 500 M mark, travelled fairly thereafter, 1L away on turn, gained split in straight, in mix to 100 M but found no extra late.

Standard to jump, lacked early speed and settled well back in rear division 10Ls from front, made up ground to come with 3-wide run (no cover) from 600 M, 4-wide turning and kept giving to line despite workload. Inconvenienced late.

Began with them, probed forward to hold forward spot early, 1 out 1 back 2Ls away in mid-section, relaxed well and enjoyed run of race to turn, angled out in straight, claimed them at 150 M and went on to score nice win.

Began with rest, hard ridden to take closer order, went right on with it to work hard to cross to lead at 800 M, backed speed off to Rock, pressured on turn, compounded badly from 200 M to be well back. Worked too hard.

Broke with field, taken hold of to settle just off midfield 6Ls away, 2-wide for mid-section, using little petrol, still well back on turning, got going late to pass a few tired runners. Got too far out of it.
Slowly away. At rear about 3Ls off the pace. Made up a little late ground.
Led or disputed lead. Kept on in straight but was no match for the winner final 200 M.
Midfield or better but trapped wide most of the way. Just 1L or so back at 800 M. Challenged leaders turning in but hung in and dropped out from 250 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Tracked leader on rail between 1 to 2Ls back. One-paced in straight.
At rear about 3Ls back and proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Never competitive.
Went forward to dispute lead. Sat 1/2L back outside the leader from 1100 M. Unable to quicken in straight but did enough to secure a distant 3rd.
Jumped well but proved difficult to settle and dropped towards rear about 3Ls off the speed from 1000 M. Ran on a bit early straight before hanging in and proving difficult to ride out.
Slowly away but soon in midfield or worse just 2Ls off the speed whilst proving difficult to settle. Responded well final 300 M despite hanging in and drew clear inside 200 M.
Started fairly. Failed to obtain cover in early stages, over-raced and rolled on to lead from 800 M till straight. Attempted to make all but got outsprinted by top pair inside final 100 M.

Broke with field. Showed early speed to be forward. Settled 2Ls away on fence. Steadied at 800 M and lost ground. 5Ls back in 9th after straightening. Kept giving in straight on the inside but never a threat.
Average begin. Never worse than midfield. Had easy trip throughout 1 to 2 off the rail till straight. Within 3Ls from lead on straightening. Battled hard in straight but went on very one-paced.

Began with them. Behind midfield. Steadied at 800 M when about 5Ls off pace on fence. Pressured from 500 M. Made good run between runners after 300 M and produced late impression final 150 M. Closest at line.

Bounded at start. Fast into stride to dispute for lead. Took fence at 900 M and took sit behind leader at 800 M for some cover. Only even paced in straight. Fought very hard to make frame. Good effort.
Outpaced early. Kept in rearward position. Over-raced, struck heels and blundered near 800 M. Last to turn in. Dropped out quickly and finished far from field.

Began well. Good speed to take up forward position. Settled in prime spot 2 wide 2Ls behind speed in 3rd. Went with winner from 300 M. Fought hard to hold some chances but failed to match strides final 50 M.

Average to begin and was allowed to drop towards the rear. Checked off heels at 1000 M. 7Ls from leader in last at 800 M. Switched wide on straightening. Made steady ground outside and closed race well but simply had too much to do.

Began well and drifted back to rear. Was checked off heels before 1000 M. Advanced from 3 wide position rounding home and took closer order in 2nd. Responded well under pressure final 200 M to hold off rivals. Solid effort.

Awkward to begin and lost ground. Slid to the fence and improved no better than behind midfield. Checked at 600 M. Turned in 5th wide 6Ls back in 2nd last after straightening. Ran on fairly in straight and only past tired runners.

Broke well. Restrained to be midfield or worse. Raced keenly at 1000 M. Improved position on bridle in a 4 wide spot rounding home 2Ls from lead in 5th. Unable to quicken in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)

Jumped well. Good early speed to take charge first 400 M. Then slotted into handy spot on fence 2Ls from lead in 4th. Worked hard to stay on from 500 M but found nothing under the whip. Very weak in straight.

Average to begin. Niggled along around midfield. About 4Ls behind leader in a 2 wide position with cover at 800 M. 4 wide on turning and made steady ground early straight but failed to turn up a notch after 200 M.
Slow to begin. Raced in rearward position. 2 wide with cover 5Ls back at 800 M. Under pressure and swung wide making home turn. Kept on only one-paced and did not get nearer.
Jumped awkwardly and niggled along to be at midfield. 3-wide making home turn and ran on only fairly in the straight.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Quickened on straightening and continued well in the final stages for a minor placing.
Off slowly and trailed field. Last on straightening but made a nice rally to be closest at finish.
Outpaced and raced on fence behind midfield. Unable to find a clear path near 300 M whilst trying to make a run. Only ran past beaten runners final stages.
3-wide better than midfield. Failed to pick up in the straight and weakened final stages.
Raced in a rearward position until home straight. Steadily improved after straightening but ran into slow traffic at 200 M. Ran on only fairly thereafter.
Among leaders early. Sat 2-wide and 5Ls off the pace in 3rd making the turn. Kept on in the straight but unable to find extra to contend.
Outpaced and settled in a rearward position. Wide and near last on straightening. Quickened nicely and made up good ground along the outside to be closest at finish.
Wide behind midfield. 4-wide towards the rear turning for home. Steadied near the 200 M and ran on only fairly thereafter.
4-wide at midfield until home straight. Kept on well and steadily made up ground. Not enough to run down winner.
Ridden along to keep pace at midfield. No improvement under the whip at the bend and tired in the straight.
Jumped fairly from widest draw and was pushed along to take the lead. Opened up a 4Ls advantage at the home turn. Continued well in the straight and was comfortably in front closing stages.
Quickest out but was outpaced by the leader. Raced 3 to 4Ls behind the pace in 2nd making home turn. Kept on fairly in the straight but unable to turn up a notch in the closing stages.
2-wide and no worse than midfield. Lacked a quickening pace on straightening and faded steadily closing stages.
With cover 4-wide down the back in midfield about 3Ls off pace until 800 M, 4-wide turning for home and 1L off speed and with place prospects at the 200 M, failed to follow through.
Fractious in gates and didn't break well, over-raced early, 2Ls off speed in 4th at 1200 M, same at top of home straight, 1L down and with place hopes at 200 M, no extra and tired late.
Niggled along in places 2-wide and about 3Ls or 4Ls down in midfield until home straight, vying for a place when 1L down at the 200 M, no chance with winner but did enough for 2nd place.
Worse than midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed until home straight when a little short of running room, over 2Ls down at 200 M, kept on fairly well late but just missed out on a place.
8Ls last at 1000 M, 6Ls down in rear off home turn, made some fair late ground without really threatening to place.
Disputed lead out 3-wide no cover through first half of race, 1L down in 2nd turning for home, all out to be within 1L off the speed at 200 M but faded rapidly thereafter.
Got back 3-wide with cover about 5Ls off pace in 10th at 1000 M, similarly placed entering home straight, stayed on fairly well but just held through final 150 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
3-back on fence but towards rear early on, on fence over 4Ls down in midfield taking home turn, always well outpaced.
Crossed from widest gate to take 2-wide position in rear about 6Ls off pace at 1200 M, still well behind in 13th turning for home, quickened up to lead 150 M out, stayed on strongly.
4-wide no cover early on when about 1L off speed in 4th or 5th, losing position and under pressure at 600 M when 2Ls behind in 6th, faded right out, unacceptable performance.
Well placed with cover within 2Ls off the lead in around 5th from backstretch to home turn, every chance when about 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, lacked that extra gear.
Over-raced when sharing early lead out 2-wide, 2Ls down in 3rd when struggling to lie up at top of home straight, faded right out, performance deemed unacceptable.
Box run on fence 2Ls off pace at 1200 M, gradually pressed on to lead at top of home straight, headed by winner 150 M out and weakened.
Slow break, soon recovered and quite well placed in midfield about 3Ls off speed from 800 M to home turn, soon left behind.
In rear at least 6Ls off pace through to final bend, always well held.
Disputed early lead on fence, a neck clear turning for home and same at 200 M, grabbed by winner just two strides out.
Over 2Ls down in 8th early on, 3Ls back in 4th at top of home straight, weakened inside final 200 M.
Awkward break, 4Ls off pace in 9th at 1000 M, same position at top of homestretch, stayed on well to take 3rd close home.
In rear bunch about 6Ls off the speed until the home straight, headway to be 2Ls down in midfield at 200 M but evened out from then on.
3-back on fence within 4Ls off the leader until home turn, eased out into the clear and 2Ls down in 6th at 200 M, ran on strongly to lead final strides.
Slowly away, no better than 6Ls off pace in rear and held up when straightening for home, ran on fairly into midfield.
Always 3-wide no cover, 1L off speed in 3rd at the 800 M, 2Ls down in 3rd at top of home straight, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, one-paced inside the distance.
Led narrowly or disputed lead until the 600 M, a neck down in 2nd at top of home straight and all out to maintain similar position 200 M out, lost out on a place final strides.
4-wide with cover in rear early on, 5Ls down in 10th at 800 M and same turning for home, failed to quicken up and very weak inside final 200 M.
Slow to begin, inside run worse than midfield about 5Ls off speed, always held by principals.
Always caught 4-wide no cover but within 3Ls off the speed until the home turn, dropped out rapidly and gave ground 200 M out.
In midfield about 4Ls off pace until the 600 M, a little further back at top of homestretch, weakened further.
Box run on fence 2Ls off pace from 1200 M to home straight, short of room from 350 M to 200 M, one-paced once in the clear.
Prominent just 1 to 2Ls behind the speed. Hung out rounding the turn. Weakened 250 M out. (Mucopus.)
Soon moved up along rail to be inside the leader. 1L or so back from 1000 M. No chance with winner in straight and got outsprinted by 2nd horse 100 M out. (Cut right hind.)
Away awkwardly. Towards rear about 5Ls back at 1200 M. Improved along rail to be in midfield taking the turn. Shifted out and ran on well final 300 M to be nearest at finish despite hanging in.
Midfield or worse from 1200 M. About 5Ls down towards rear and wide turning in. Made up some ground inside 200 M.
Knuckled and lost ground at start. Recovered to be in midfield or better from 1200 M. Hung in at 800 M. Held up in straight near 300 M and steadied off heels at 200 M. No further progress.
Always at rear. Never a factor. (Mucopus.)
Took lead approaching 1200 M. Kept on well in straight and held off late charge from placed horses inside 100 M.
Always thereabout. 3Ls back from 1000 M. Kept on in straight until no extra 100 M out.
Led to 1200 M before travelling in a 3-wide position about 1L off the lead. Dropped out quickly from 250 M.
Towards rear. Never in the race.
Midfield or better and trapped wide and without cover. About 4Ls down from 1200 M. Kept on in straight without troubling placed horses.
Niggled forward and moved up steadily along rail to midfield or better from 1200 M. 2Ls down rounding the turn. One-paced in straight.
Always at rear. Wide turning in. Made up good ground final 200 M but simply set too big a task.
Soon midfield or better despite jostling with another runner at start. 3Ls back at 600 M. Never a factor in straight.
Raced 4-wide in midfield. Effort around home bend to be close-up 3rd into straight. Gradually faded.
Never seen with a chance racing well behind. (Mucus.)
Broke well. Settled just off the pace. Not much room on rails early in straight. Only produced moderate impression closing stages.
Mainly 3-wide in forward of midfield. Weakened noticeably after straightening.
Rear early. Took closer order about 1000 M out. Remained just worse than midfield turning in. Plugged on under pressure at the one pace in the run home.
Settled in midfield on rails. Commenced run about 200 M out and ran on well to miss narrowly.
Settled at the back. Produced moderate headway under pressure past beaten horses inside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Raced 4-wide in midfield. Quickened to hold good chance 200 M out and just failed to peg back winner throughout closing stages.
Soon took up running and led until swamped over 200 M out. (Distressed.)
Not far off to straight. Dropped out.
Raced wide in midfield or worse. Towards rear turning for home. Made up good ground down centre of straight without threatening.
Raced wide towards rear. Widest runner turning in. Tailed off in straight.
Settled in last few on rails. Did not find much room early in straight. Ran home fairly under pressure inside final 200 M.
Always well there and settled just outside leader. Came to challenge upon straightening and hit front 200 M out. Just held off runner-up's strong late challenge inside final 200 M.

Began with them, lacked early toe and restrained to tail from wide alley, raced at rear 3 wide 8Ls from pace, made 4 wide run into race from 400 M, came between horses in straight, doing best work late but gave too great a start.

First to break, restrained when unable to get closer, overraced in middle stages when 3 wide with cover 2Ls away, came 4 wide into straight, kept giving to line but lacked gear change to really threaten.
Average to jump, restrained immediately to tail, raced 3 and 4 wide 8Ls away at rear, always working to turn, swung widest into straight, unable to make ground and never a factor.
Average to jump, pushed hard to work across from wide alley to cross to front, kept rolling in lead at a good clip pressured to turn, 1L clear turning, tackled at 200 M but kept on well for 3rd.

Jumped well, stuck with them early to be 3 back on fence 3 to 4Ls away, used no petrol in run, made up good ground along fence before steadied at 200 M, lost some momentum and only battled evenly thereafter.

Away well, showed good toe to take up spot outside leader, kept on to apply pressure at leaders girth with horse on outside, 1L away on turning, gradually lost touch over final 300 M. Early work took toll.
Fast into stride, went on with job to race outside of leaders, trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, always working to turn, 2Ls away on straightening, stuck to task well finding winner too good.

Broke with them, settled in midfield spot 4 to 5Ls away in 2 wide spot, had easy run thereafter using little to turn, tracked between runners in straight, unable to offer much when asked and was one paced to line.
Average to jump, mustered speed to take up spot 1 out 1 back 2Ls away, enjoyed good trip in mid section, eased out with run into straight, one paced when asked for effort. Unable to make impression.
Began awkwardly, hard ridden to drive through into spot 4 back on rails 6Ls from pace, well back on turning, followed paint into straight, offered nothing in run home dropping right out. (Mucopus.)

Broke well, showed good toe to take up prominent spot behind leader, had run of race throughout, travelled well on bit to turn, gained split at 300 M, took charge easily and kept on well for comfortable win.
Average to jump, lacked early speed, hard ridden to hold spot 5 back on fence, raced at rear 8 to 9Ls away on turn, came between horses in straight but passed only tired runners late.

Jumped with them, couldn't match them early, drifted back to just off midfield, 3 wide with cover in mid section 4 to 5Ls away, swung 5 wide on turn, kept giving in straight to make the frame. (Lost plate.)
Ordinary to begin, drifted back to race in rearward division, settled 2 wide 7Ls away, travelled fairly thereafter, pushed along turning for home, unable to quicken and gradually lost touch to line.
Began fairly. Gradually settled in forward of midfield before home bend. Remained similar turning in and only kept on at the one pace to finish.
Mainly in prominent position to straight. Gradually weakened.
Took up running coming out of back straight. Led until joined after straightening. Swamped for a placing when no extra under pressure inside final 200 M.
Settled behind midfield. Awkwardly placed behind runners approaching home turn. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M without threatening.
Prominent 3-wide to straight. Dropped out.
Broke well. Settled just off the pace. 1L 3rd turning in. Quickened under pressure to hold every chance throughout closing stages and just failed to peg back winner.
Mostly in midfield. One-paced in straight.
Settled well back. Made up good ground late inside final 300 M but baulked nearing finish.
From moderate draw, settled in close up position. Gained slender lead about 300 M out but swamped under pressure passing 100 M.
Settled at the back. Ran on well down centre of straight to just fail to get up on line.
Raced wide in rear of midfield. Commenced run approaching home turn. Sustained effort from midfield into straight to hit front about 100 M out and just held on to the line.
Always struggling at the back and never seen with a chance.
Raced wide in midfield. Produced only moderate headway in straight without threatening.
Always in last few and made no show.

Lost significant ground at start, pushed hard to catch up, settled down 5 to 6Ls away on rails, not asked in mid section, followed rails in straight giving big start. Made up a little ground but never a real factor.
Slow to begin, pushed along to hold spot, at tail 2 wide 8Ls away, tracked into race on turn, under pressure in straight and failed to make any impression. Plodded to line.

Broke with line, restrained to midfield trailing position, settled down 4 back on fence 4 to 5Ls away, not used to turn, gained split on turning and kept trying in straight to chase down all but winner. Strong effort.

Shifted out at start, proved difficult to settle when making up ground to settle 6Ls away near rear, raced 2 wide (still ungenerously) in same spot to turn, under pressure into straight and only plodded to line.

Average to begin, showed no dash early, raced rearward throughout 8Ls away on rails, still last turning with job to do, made run between horses in straight making up some late ground passing tired runners.
Jumped alongside field, drifted back to midfield, raced 2 wide 4Ls away in mid-section, pushed along approaching turn, kept to task in straight making a little ground last 200 M, OK first up effort.
Broke with rest, pushed along to take up running after 300 M, did some work from wide alley, dictated pace in front, tackled for lead on turning, gave in quickly and was one-paced to line.

Good jump, unable to cross early and was posted 3 wide outside leaders 1L away, always working to turn, hung out in straight, moved up to challenge at 200 M but couldn't match them last 100 M. Good run considering workload.

Away with them, mustered speed to take up position behind leader, enjoyed run of race, always travelling strongly to turn, made run between runners in straight, got clear at 200 M and sprinted away for a convincing win.

Began poorly, pushed along to stay in touch, raced 3 wide at tail, made ground to be 5Ls away at mid-point, always working and came with 4 wide run on turn, didn't finish show usual and was one-paced to line. (Mucopus.)

Began well, allowed to roll forward and take up spot outside leader, relaxed better at leaders girth, moved up to challenge on turning and took control at 300 M, headed at 200 M but fought on to hold 3rd.

Fastest to break, went forward but unable to slot in, finished up midfield 3 and 4 wide without cover, still 3Ls off them turning for home, moved up to challenge at 300 M and kept on well to just miss frame. Solid for wide run.
Jumped fairly, amongst first few early, settled in ideal spot 1 out 1 back with run of race, under pressure on turn 3Ls away, couldn't change gear when they sprinted and only battled to line.

Jumped with line, taken to fence to find cover, raced 3Ls back on fence, used no petrol to turn, made run between runners on turning, lacked clear room early in straight but showed no real dash when clear. (Crowded late.)
Went forward from wide draw to take 2nd position. 1L back outside the leader from the 1st turn. No chance with winner and lost 2nd when one-paced 100 M out.
At rear. 6Ls down turning into back straight. 3Ls down and 4-wide turning in. Made up steady ground final 250 M to just miss a remote 3rd.
Lost ground after being crowded at start. Remained at rear at least 8Ls down along back straight. Still 5Ls down turning in. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Midfield or better. Under strong riding to keep up 700 M out. One-paced in straight and had nothing to offer inside 100 M.
Midfield but trapped wide and without cover in the early and middle stages. Soon weakened upon straightening.
Behind midfield. Difficult to settle near 800 M and allowed to stride forward to be 2nd or 3rd. Dropped back quickly inside 100 M.
In touch in 3rd or 4th spot no more than 2Ls back going into the first turn. 1L down turning in. Kept on in straight to secure a distant 2nd 100 M out.
Behind midfield. Steadied off heels at 1300 M and 1200 M. One-paced in straight.
Led and made all easily.
Began well. Pressed hard to dispute early lead out 3-wide no cover. A length down in 3rd when turning for home 2 off the fence. Dropped out quickly after 300 M. (Lame right front leg.)

Jumped with field. Kept midfield or worse. About 4Ls off speed in 2-wide spot with cover before the turn. Niggled along on bend and under hard riding turning in, weakened right out in straight to be well beaten.
Fair to begin. Outpaced early in rear section. Over 8Ls off lead middle stages. Pushed along on bend and swung widest on straightening. Dropped away quickly after straightening. Never in the race.

Began only fairly. One from rear about 6Ls back at 800 M. Followed rail into straight with field ahead and no clear passage. Made strong run between runners final 250 M to grab a distant 2nd. Never troubled winner.
Began well. Stayed in prime position, 3Ls behind 2-wide with cover entering the turn. Turned in 4Ls back in 4th. Gradually shifted to fence final 250 M. Kept giving but ran on only one-paced.
Began on terms. Settled about 3-4Ls off pace midfield from 800 M till straight. Always 3-wide with no cover. Fought hard to stay on and took 3rd closing stages despite tough trip.
Slow to begin. 2-wide run around midfield about 4Ls off speed. Similar spot entering home. Made minor ground before fading closing stages.
Began with rest. Soon forward of midfield about 3Ls back on fence. Similar margin turning home in 5th and saved ground on rail. Found nothing off the bridle. Overhauled final 250 M. (Mucopus.)
Among the best to begin. Took hold and settled in rearward position. 4-wide taking home turn when 6Ls down in rear. Rallied and made ground early straight. Faded gradually.

Fast into stride. Prominent 2nd or 3rd 1L behind speed. 2Ls back in 2nd after straightening. Battled hard in straight. Found little when asked inside 200 M. Swamped final 100 M after early burn. Well beaten.
Started well. Set good pace on fence till straight. Broke clear 400 M with 2Ls advantage. Cruised home strongly to win by big margin. Unchallenged and effortless.
Pressed on and got into a forward position. 2-wide and stayed within 3Ls of the leader rounding the turn. Ran on steadily in the straight but unable to turn up a notch to contend final stages.
Niggled along to be midfield. Struggled to keep pace at the bend and dropped to rear section on straightening. Didn't show much thereafter.
Soon at the rear. Trailed field until 600 M and made up some ground along the rails rounding home turn. Ran on only fairly in the straight.
Jumped well and steadily dropped to a rearward position. Remained towards the rear on straightening and lacked a rally when asked in straight.

Showed good early speed and took the lead. Held a length's advantage into the home straight and remained in front until being headed by winner near 100 M. Kept on well final strides and held on for 2nd place.
Jumped fairly and raced wide and without cover at midfield. Commenced to lose touch entering the turn and was at the rear on straightening. Made no impression thereafter.

Jumped fairly and raced on fence in a prominent position. 3Ls behind the leader at the home turn and improved steadily after straightening. Switched out from behind the leader near 200 M and quickened nicely to clinch the win.
Checked to the rear shortly after start. Ridden and advanced to be near midfield. Swung out on straightening, ran on steadily and made up some late ground.
Checked shortly after start and raced in rear section early. Made up ground along the rails at the turn. Kept on fairly in the straight.
Settled 3-wide at midfield. Unable to keep pace when racing wide at the home turn. Ran on without threatening in the straight.
Outpaced early stages and raced at midfield. Switched out to look for a run at 500 M. Improved steadily in the straight and finished well for a minor placing.
Hard ridden out of the gates to keep up with leader. A length off the pace at the turn but failed to turn up a notch on straightening. Faded inside final 200 M.
Couldn't lead so settled 2Ls off pace until the 600 M, led at top of home straight, picked off by winner 100 M out but hung on well for 2nd.
Awkward break and checked at start, got back 10Ls off speed in 12th at 1000 M, 4-wide on straightening when 6Ls down in 10th, plugged on best of the rest, nearest at finish.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 4th early on, about 4Ls back in 4th or 5th from 800 M to home turn, dropped out very tamely.
8Ls down in 10th and 2-wide at 1000 M, unbalanced at 700 M and under pressure through to home straight, very one-paced.
Led on fence at 1400 M, clear by 2Ls until the 600 M, headed at top of home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Mostly 4-wide no cover, 6Ls behind lead in 8th at 1000 M, 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home when 8Ls back in rear bunch, no impression.
Checked at start, dropped 7Ls off pace in 9th at 1000 M, travelled well on circle and 4Ls back in 7th into stretch, picked up well and switched inside at 200 M to lead 100 M out, lengthened clear.
2-wide and 5Ls back in 5th at 1100 M, similarly placed but struggling to lie up turning for home, very weak inside final 200 M.
5Ls down in 6th at 1100 M on fence, 2-wide and 3Ls down in 4th taking home turn, over 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, had every chance of running 2nd but tired inside final 100 M.
10Ls back on fence in 11th at 1000 M, niggled along to improve 6Ls back in 9th, found nothing off the bit.
Slowest away by 2Ls, mostly 3-wide no cover, 5Ls back in 7th at 1100 M, lost position on circle and 3-wide on straightening when 6Ls back in 10th or so, soon eased down.
Checked at start, under pressure in rear early on, at least 9Ls down and one from rear into home turn, ran past a few very tired rivals.
Slow to muster any speed, always at least 10Ls off the pace, didn't figure.
Well placed early 2-wide and 3Ls off speed at 1200 M, over 2Ls down and still in 3rd but hard ridden turning for home, completely folded on the run-in.
Never really travelled, keen at 1400 M then niggled along when 4Ls back in 8th and 2-wide at 1000 M, hard pressed to improve from similar position off final bend, offered little response.
Slow break, 7Ls off pace when 2-wide in rear over 1000 M out, not much closer and 4-wide (widest of all) taking home turn, ran on past a few tired rivals without making much ground.
Box run on fence 2Ls off speed in 4th at 1200 M, soon struggling to maintain this position, 4Ls down in 6th turning for home, very one-paced.
Slowest away, 6Ls back in 10th at 1200 M, 8Ls last at 800 M, extremely one-paced.
Always 3-wide but with cover, 3Ls off speed in 6th or so from 1100 M to home turn, soon weakened out.
Slow break, over 2Ls back in 5th when 2-wide at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 4th swinging for home, outpaced inside by quinella pair inside final 200 M.
2-wide and 1L off speed in 2nd at 1000 M, over 1L back in 3rd from 800 M to home turn, every chance of winning when a neck down in 2nd at 200 M, didn't follow through, one-paced late.
3-back on fence when 4Ls down in 7th at 1000 M, lost position a little before home turn and under pressure, short of room very late but was only plugging on.
Caught 4-wide no cover at 1400 M, 3-wide no cover when 1L off pace at 1200 M, pressed on to lead by a neck out 2-wide at 800 M, headed again at top of stretch, faded out steadily.
Worked to lead on fence at 1400 M, 1L clear at 1000 M, headed at 800 M, a neck clear again turning for home, looked vulnerable 200 M out but kicked on again inside final 100 M for decisive win.
3-wide with cover when 5Ls down in 9th at 1000 M, pushed along to improve on the circle, about 4Ls off pace in midfield at final bend and at 200 M, no headway.
Jumped best out wide before settling in 4th or 5th place about 3Ls behind the pace. One-paced without threatening in straight.
Soon led. Headed 200 M out. Kept on for a distant 2nd.
Towards rear. Never a factor.
Soon found rail behind midfield or worse about 5Ls off the speed. Headway to midfield rounding home bend. Kept on for a very remote 3rd.
Soon moved up along rail to 4th or 5th place about 3Ls behind the pace. Took clear order to be 1L down turning in. Responded well final 300 M to win going away inside 200 M.
Lost considerable ground after blundering at start. Never in contention.
Began awkwardly. Mainly towards rear. Made no impression in straight.
Awkward start. Trapped wide and without cover at rear. Slight progress rounding home turn but very weak in straight.
Prominent 2nd inside the leader. Checked and lost ground at 700 M. Nothing left 250 M out.
Outpaced at rear. Hung out in the middle stages. Ran past beaten horses final 200 M.
Soon at rear. Never seen with a chance.
In touch just 1 to 2Ls off the speed. Kept on in straight before weakened 100 M out.
Chased leaders on rails to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Led until headed rounding home bend. Gradually faded after straightening.
Always struggling well behind.
Broke well. Disputed lead. Gained slender advantage rounding home bend. Drew clear after straightening. Pushed out.
Soon dropped to rear. Never seen with a chance.
Settled behind midfield. Made good headway early in straight but unable to sustain effort inside final 250 M.
Prominent 3rd until giving ground approaching home turn. Made no impression in straight.
Mainly better than midfield to straight. Weakened.
Raced in midfield. Finished off race well inside final 200 M.
Well back. Made up late ground past beaten horses inside final 300 M.

Out with them, allowed to drift back and settle near to rear on rails 7-8Ls from speed, always pushed along, steadied slightly 400 M but only closed race off fairly when clear. Again never really comfortable on AWT.

Even break, soon gathered pace and pressed forward, held spot midfield with cover 4Ls from lead, travelled kindly in middle stages, offered nothing when asked for effort on turning. One-paced to line. (Bled.)

Fairly from gates, slow to muster speed, hard ridden to keep improving, always working worse than midfield 3-wide 6Ls away, made run 4 and 5-wide from 500 M, never made impression and was beaten a long way.
Average to begin, showed no early toe, settled at tail 10Ls off them, lobbed along in same spot to turn, swung wider in straight but offered nothing when asked and only plodded home.

Bounced out with field, lacked early speed and drifted back to usual rearward trailing spot, raced 2-wide 8Ls away for most of journey, still well back on turn, finished race of well making some ground from impossible spot.

Away well, showed great speed to challenge for early lead, raced behind the leader thereafter having easy trip 2Ls away, hung out when making run in straight, kept up there to 200 M but place chance faded when tiring late.

Standard to begin, assumed usual spot near rear, pushed along to stay in position on rail 6Ls away, had good run thereafter, tracked into race well, followed rail in straight making good ground late to be closest at finish.
Didn't leave gates. Declared starter as did not receive unfair start.
Average to jump, hard ridden to make up ground to be 3 back on fence 4Ls from lead, enjoyed run of race in mid-section, tracked leader nicely to turn, tried hard in run home but couldn't bridge gap.
Broke well showed good dash to press on from wide alley to race outside leader 1L away, always working without cover, under hard riding to chase on turning, gradually faded out of it in straight.

Broke well, allowed to roll forward to be 3-wide without cover 3Ls from pace, always working in mid-section, began to weaken out of it from turn. Showed nothing in straight. Never comfortable and beaten a long way.
Jumped with rest, no early toe, trapped 3 or 4-wide in midfield early, always working 5Ls away wide without cover in mid-section, hard ridden on turning and only plodded to line after hard run.
Away evenly, mustered great speed to cross them easily from outside alley, kept them going at an even clip, dictated to turn, kicked clear with 2L advantage in straight, kept going to win in style.

Fair to begin, drove through to take up midfield spot, raced 2-wide 5-6Ls away throughout, well back and forced 4-wide on turn, finished race of well to make frame coming from too far away. Fair effort.
Ridden forward early to maintain position in midfield. Kept on in straight but could not be tested after getting held up 200 M out.
Midfield or better. One-paced in straight before weakened badly inside 200 M.
Soon led despite beginning awkwardly. Headed at 1100 M and sat 1L behind leader from 1000 M. Disputed lead turning in. Kicked home strongly final 300 M to win comfortably. (Cut tongue.)
Took lead near 1100 M. Kept on in straight when under constant pressure from the winner. Headed 300 M out and struggled home final 100 M.
Towards rear. Made up a bit of ground after shifting out near 300 M but never looked dangerous.
In touch and within 2Ls off the speed. Kept on evenly without posing any threat to placed horses in straight.
Bounded in air and hampered at start. At rear. Last turning in. Made up some ground final 200 M down centre of track but simply had too much to do.
Behind midfield or a little worse but trapped wide and without cover the whole trip. Dropped out soon after straightening. (Mucopus.)
Thereabout early. Dropped back to behind midfield 900 M out. 2 to 3Ls back rounding the turn. Wide turning in. Made up some late ground without posing any threat.
At rear. Never looked likely.
Niggled forward early but proved difficult to settle and had to be steadied off heels at 1200 M. 2Ls back from 1000 M. Very one-paced in straight.
In touch early. About 2 to 3Ls in midfield or better approaching the turn. Ran on final 300 M but the winner was much too good.
Slowly away. At rear. Never seen with a chance.
Jumped best before dropping steadily from wide alley to the rear but on rail near 1000 M. About 4Ls back at 600 M. Steadied at 300 M before finishing well to grab 3rd inside 100 M.

Away well. Allowed to roll forward to be 1L away outside leader. No change till straight. Fought hard to stay on. Outpaced by top pair inside final 200 M. Couldn't find extra gear and lost 3rd at the line.

Broke well. Kept on fence slightly behind midfield. Around 5Ls back at 800 M. Similar order after straightening. Made good ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish. Produced moderate late impression but never troubled principals.

Awkward to begin. Kept in rearward section on rail. Eased to 1 off when difficult to settle on back straight. About 6Ls back at 800 M. Similar turning straight in 2nd last. Lacked needed response and stayed on only one-paced to line.

Average to begin from mid draw. Grabbed fence and settled around midfield. 3Ls back in 5th taking final bend. Saved ground on fence turning in. Kept giving in straight but lacked turn of foot to be a factor.

Bounded at start. Lost ground and taken across behind runners. 5 to 6Ls off speed on rail midway. Similar turning straight in 3rd last. Picked up late and closed race nicely on the outside. Simply set too big a task.
Began awkwardly. Never far off. 2 wide 2Ls behind lead at 800 M with cover. 3rd after straightening. Hard ridden to pick up but unable to sustain effort final 200 M. Closed race fairly.
Bounced out well. Settled 1 off midfield. 3Ls back in 6th at 600 M. Same margin turning in. Turned home 4 wide on bridle in 4th. Battled hard final 200 M. Chased gamely but never caught up.

Average to jump. Settled just worse than midfield. Got its head up when steadied at 1400 M. 2 wide 5Ls away at 800 M. Took closer order on straightening. Quickened nicely closing stages and captured 3rd at line.

Among the best to start. Fast into stride, took up position behind leader. Had easy trip throughout and always within 2Ls from pace on fence. Nothing left upon straightening. Dropped out rapidly. (Mucopus.)

Began very well. Pushed hard early to set pace on rail. Travelled comfortably throughout and always had at least 1L advantage. Shot over 2Ls clear final 200 M, stayed on strongly for an uncontested victory.

Began with rest. Settled in rear. Always ran at least 1 off the fence. Over 7Ls behind speed halfway. Pressured in 3 wide spot on bend. Swung widest on straightening in tail. Failed to kick when asked.
Raced on fence behind midfield. Checked and lost ground at 800 M. Soon recovered and continued well in the straight to be closest at finish.
Raced in a prominent position behind the pace until home straight. Kept on well but unable to find more to run down the winner.
Ridden out of the gates to be among frontrunners. Tracked leader in a 2-wide position making the turn. Lacked a quickening pace on straightening and steadily faded closing stages.
Crowded shortly after start and was ridden along in a rearward position. Remained near the back on straightening and only ran past a beaten runner.
Trailed field from 1000 M onwards. Made up ground in a 4-wide position at the bend. Continued fairly in the straight and made up ground.
Jumped well but was outpaced by leaders. Travelled no worse than midfield but lost a bit of ground when steadied at the 800 M turn. Continued on same pace in the straight.
Quickest out but was allowed to drop to midfield. Ridden to keep pace making the turn and unable to find extra in the straight.
Raced behind midfield early and middle stages. Made a late run and was closest at finish.

Niggled along from the start and raced wide and without cover. Steadily improved and reached within 2Ls of the leader at 600 M but hung out badly making the turn. Weakened shortly after straightening.
Hard ridden early to be wide among leaders early stages. 3-wide and was 2 to 3Ls off the lead making the turn. Stayed on same pace in the straight.
Steadily improved to be among leaders early. Took a sit at 900 M and kept within 3Ls of the leader making home turn. Continued fairly in the straight to grab a minor placing.
Settled at midfield. Commenced to lose ground after 800 M and was pulled up on entering home straight.
Soon took the lead. Held a length's advantage into the straight and extended to a 2Ls at 200 M. Kept on well final stages to hold off challenger.
Dropped to the rear from widest draw. Checked after 800 M and remained near the back on straightening. Made up some late ground.
Outpaced and in rear bunch 700 M out, always struggling. Not suited by trip.
Disputed early speed, 1L down in 3rd at halfway, over 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, one-paced late.
Always towards rear at least 4Ls off speed, no danger inside latter half. Found trip too short.
Slow start, 3Ls down in 8th at halfway towards far rail, very one-paced.
Niggled along to be 2Ls down in 6th at 500 M on far rail, one-paced and steadily drifted back.
Well placed early about a neck off pace, over 1L down in 5th at halfway, outpaced inside final 200 M.
Close enough early about 1L off pace in 4th, about 2Ls down in 4th at 300 M, failed to quicken.
Broke well, over 3Ls behind and worse than midfield until 500 M, flat finish.
Held a marginal lead towards stands' rail at 800 M, still right there 400 M out, duelled with SAND DANCE inside final 300 M while always holding a very slender margin.
Under pressure very early to lie up with pacesetters, within 2Ls of the pace at 400 M in 6th, couldn't go with quinella pair.
Bumped and lost ground at start at least 4Ls or 5Ls off speed, never really threatened.
8Ls last at 600 M, always in trouble.
Awkward break jumping right but soon in the firing line, always well there down centre of track and duelled with BULB KING inside final 300 M, only just failed.
Bounded at start, lacked early pace to go with leading bunch and always driven along, about 3Ls back in midfield at halfway, stayed on best of the rest but a fair way behind quinella pair.
2-wide and worse than midfield about 8Ls off lead at 1400 M, 5Ls down in 4th at top of home straight, ran on well for a place, never nearer.
Best away, 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1400 M, 2Ls down in 2nd at final bend, led 150 M out, ran on well.
No better than 8Ls off pace in rear group until home turn, made some fair late ground, never nearer.
5Ls down in 5th at 1000 M, slipping further back at home turn, very one-paced.
Settled in midfield about 6Ls off the pace from 1400 M to final bend, didn't find much off the bit.
In rear bunch about 8Ls off speed until home turn, one-paced and never likely to place.
Dropped out at least 10Ls off speed until home turn, ran on fairly well, nearest at finish.
Keen early on, pressed on out 3-wide no cover to lead at 1400 M by 2Ls, same margin clear turning for home, headed by winner 150 M out, one-paced late.
Over 6Ls behind speed on fence at 1200 M, soon niggled along to keep up, very weak in homestretch.
Under pressure about 10Ls last at 1200 M, soon well beaten, unacceptable performance.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1600 M, headed at 1400 M, struggling to lie up when 5Ls down in 3rd at home turn, faded out.
Led at 1800 M, headed a mile out, 4Ls down in 4th at 800 M, struggling to keep up at top of home straight, jockey dropped whip at 300 M but beaten anyway.
Midfield about 3Ls off the pace. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Towards rear. Never a factor.
Midfield early. Dropped to the rear about 5Ls back from 1000 M. Made up good ground final 300 M despite hanging in to be closest at finish.
Very slowly away after bad jump. Towards rear about 4 to 5Ls back from 1000 M. Took closer order along rail rounding the turn despite steadying at 500 M. Ran on final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Inconvenienced at start. Mainly towards rear whilst being trapped wide and without cover. Never looked likely.
Jumped best but soon outpaced to 4th or 5th spot about 2Ls off the pace near 1000 M. Unable to quicken in straight and was steadied when crowded 100 M out.
Away awkwardly. At rear. 6Ls or so back at 1000 M. Ran on steadily in straight and was not far off a minor placing.
Thereabout around 2Ls behind the speed. Kept on in straight until finding no extra inside 100 M.
Soon moved up from wide alley to 2nd spot just 1L off the lead. Took charge 300 M out and stayed on well to hold off late challenge from placed horses.
In touch just 1 to 2Ls off the speed. Dropped right out of contention 300 M from home.
Midfield or worse from 1100 M. About 4Ls back rounding the turn. Made up a little late ground after being held up for some distance upon straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon led. Headed 300 M out. Weakened badly final 200 M.
Dropped from wide alley to last from 1200 M. Ran past well beaten horses final 300 M.
Midfield or behind and trapped wide. Kept on in straight without looking dangerous at any stage.
Broke well. Gradually settled in front. Led field until finding no extra under pressure over 200 M out.
Settled in rear. Always struggling.
Well there to straight. Gradually weakened.
Settled outside leader. Hit front shortly passing 300 M but had no answer to winner's late burst of speed close to home.
Settled in 5th on rails within striking distance. Just kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Settled in midfield to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Settled behind midfield. Loomed up down centre of track after straightening to take charge about 100 M out.
Mainly in midfield to straight. Made no impression thereafter.
Settled in last few. No clear run behind runners early in straight. Produced good late impression inside final 300 M. Did best work at finish.
Settled mainly in forward of midfield. Kept on steadily under pressure without quickening closing stages.
Settled wide towards rear. Unable to quicken under pressure in straight.
Always in rear. Never seen with a chance.
Well placed in 4th one off the rails. Slightly inconvenienced shortly after straightening. Fought on steadily when jostled between runners inside final 200 M. Lost a placing late.

Fast into stride, showed good pace to cross to rails in early lead, raced behind leader after 200 M, enjoyed run of race in mid-section with slow speed, received dream split in straight but unable to capitalise. One-paced to line.

Standard to begin, caught 3 and 4 wide at rear early, dropped to tail 2 wide 6Ls away, niggled along to make ground with job to do on turn, closed race off strongly to be closest at finish giving too great a start.

Taken straight in behind, allowed to take up position on rails 6Ls away, never really looked comfortable, still rearward on turning, under hard riding in straight but made no real impression. Plodded to line.

Broke with them, drove through to hold prime position 1 out 1 back, had easy run in mid-section 2Ls away from pace, similar on turn, held up until 200 M and picked up well late when clear to take 3rd place.

Slow to begin, niggled along to keep spot 4 back on rails 4 to 5Ls away, used nothing in run, pushed along on turn, followed rails in straight but lacked usual finishing burst. Passed only tired horse late.

Broke with rest, mustered speed to press on to challenge for front, took control after 200 M, set slow tempo in front, dictated terms to turn, held 1L advantage into straight, pressured at 250 M and gave in easily. Same pace to line.
