Awkward to begin, pushed along to move up to spot just off midfield, raced 2 wide 4Ls away in mid-section, not suited inside runners with slow speed, eased out in straight and closed steadily to be closest at finish.

Bounced out, unable to slot in early and allowed to roll forward to race, 3 wide outside leaders, always working facing breeze 1L away, moved up with strong run and hit lead at 200 M. Unable to keep on last 100 M after hard run.

Average to begin, assumed usual spot near rear, raced 3 wide 4 to 5Ls away between horses, steadied when they slowed, tracked eventual winner on turn, lost touch when they sprinted but stuck to task well to run down all but winner.

First to jump, allowed to stride forward to contest lead early, raced outside leader when unable to cross, not working hard 1L away with slow tempo, made challenge at 300 M but lacked turn of foot to be a factor.
Broke well, pressed forward to be amongst forward division, settled 3 back on fence 3Ls away, travelled fairly on turn, followed rails and held up badly at 200 M. Not fully tested thereafter.

Broke only fairly, allowed to relax and settle down in midfield, raced 3 wide with cover 3Ls away throughout, not really asked with average speed, eased out at 300 M and went to them easily at 200 M. Kept on for strong win.
Settled in forward of midfield. Ran on steadily to hold every chance passing 200 M before the late surge of the winner close to home.
Wide behind midfield most of way to straight. Soon weakened.
Sluggish at start. Ridden early. Remained in rear to straight. Did not find much room early on. Finished off race well inside final 200 M.
Settled behind midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. No clear running on rails early in straight. Obtained split passing 200 M and quickened well to grab victory close to home.
Well there. Gained slender advantage rounding home bend. Kept on before finding no extra and headed 200 M out.
Well there. Came to tackle leader and gained upper hand 200 M out only to be swamped close to home.
Mainly in rear of midfield. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Midfield to home bend. Gradually weakened.
Broke well. Well there early. Midfield rounding home bend. Ran home one-paced.
Just behind midfield early. Dropped to rear coming out of back straight. Made up good late ground passing beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Raced wide in midfield throughout after beginning from worst draw. Ran home one-paced.
Never far off. 3rd when 1L back turning in. Ran on to hold some chance passing 200 M but had no more to give nearing finish.
Rear far side. Snuck up on rails turning in. Kept on at the one pace from midfield into straight.
Ridden to contest lead early. Settled 3 wide just off the pace rounding home bend. Dropped out in straight.
Even break, drove through to take up prime position 1 out 1 back, enjoyed good trip 2Ls away in mid-section, pushed along on turning, gradually lost touch in straight to be well beaten.

Broke well, showed customary speed to challenge for early lead, took control after 200 M, dictated speed in front, 1L clear approaching turn, hung out in straight, showed good fight to be swamped late, did well to hold on to make frame.

Fast into stride, amongst first few early, allowed to roll on and sit at leaders girth, always working to cart up without cover, laid down gauntlet at 300 M. Ran out of energy at 200 M and was one-paced to line.
Awkward to begin, restrained to tail, pushed along to stay 9Ls away on rails, used nothing and travelled strongly to turn, gave nothing when asked in straight and battled to line at same pace.

Began only fairly, lacked early toe and drifted back to rear, raced 3 wide with cover 8Ls away from leaders, pushed along to make 4 wide run into straight, lacked another gear when asked and plodded to line.

Away well, showed great early pace to be in challenge for lead, raced behind leader after 200 M, had cosy trip in mid-section using little to turn, received rails run in straight but was one-paced and lost touch last 200 M.

Average to begin, showed no early dash, took up running near rear, raced 2 wide in mid-section 8Ls away, had job to do with field to beat on turn, closed race off nicely between horses to be nearest at line.

Jumped well from outside alley, caught 3 wide in midfield, slotted in 5Ls away wide with cover, always covering ground to turn, came with 4 wide run in straight, loomed up at 200 M with strong run, took lead and scored comfortably.

Jumped with them, allowed to settle in midfield, raced 2 wide 6Ls away, enjoyed easy trip to turn, still well back on straightening (steadied 400 M), eased out and came with strong run to be closest at finish. Better effort.

Standard to begin, pushed along to be up there early, trapped wide when unable to slot in, raced 3 wide without cover 2 to 3Ls away, always working to turn, pushed along into straight but gradually weakened from 200 M.
Began with rest, restrained from awkward alley to race rear enough to last, always 9Ls away in 2 wide spot, made run 3 and 4 wide from 500 M, closed race off well down outside to be nearest on line.

Average to begin, lacked early speed and settled worse than midfield, 4 back on rails 5 to 6Ls away throughout, travelled nicely to turn, weaved between horses in straight (checked 300 M), closed off nicely late.
Broke with them, pressed forward to take up spot 3 back on fence 4Ls away, travelled well to turn, searching for run at 300 M, only kept on at same pace when received room at 200 M.

Stumbled out and bumped early, restrained to angle into midfield trailing position, 2 wide 4 to 5Ls away thereafter, pushed into clear at 300 M but lacked real dash when asked. Closed race off evenly.
Sat in 5th spot going into the first turn. 3 to 4Ls off the speed from 1000 M. 2Ls back turning in. Kicked home strongly final 200 M and took charge 100 M out.
Slowly away. Always at rear. Raced greenly from 1100 M and hung out rounding home turn. Never likely.
Led to 100 M before getting outsprinted by the first pair but did enough to hang on to 3rd.
Soon 1 out and 1 back off the leader. Kept on well in straight but unable to dash home with winner final 100 M.
Soon dropped to the back. Never in the hunt. (See Racing Incidents and lame next day.)
Tracked leader. Held up in straight until after 200 M. Shifted out near 150 M for running and made up a little late ground.
Towards rear from the 1st turn. Behind midfield about 3Ls back rounding home turn. Steadied and shifted out upon straightening. Kept on without troubling principals.
Awkwardly away but soon in midfield. 2Ls back turning in. Made up some ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon 4th about 2Ls off the speed. One-paced in straight before dropping quickly out of contention 100 M out.
Slowly away. Towards rear. Never a factor.
Towards rear. About 6Ls back at 600 M. Midfield turning in by saving ground along rail. Kept on one-paced without posing any threat in straight.
Slowly away. At rear. Never looked dangerous.
Began fairly. Kept towards the rear on rail. Was difficult to settle early stages. Over 8Ls off speed halfway. Took closer order on straightening, but lacked turn of foot to challenge.

Awkward to begin. At tail. Over 10Ls back after first turn. Enjoy easy trip throughout. Improved on bridle in a 3-wide spot rounding home. Still last after turning. Responded final 300 M and took charge at 100 M for good win.
Broke well. Set decent pace on fence throughout. Led by 5Ls at 1400 M. Held good lead till 600 M. Edged by a neck on straightening. Tackled at 200 M and couldn't sustain effort thereafter.

Average to begin. Forward in 3rd. 2-wide no cover in a prominent spot. 5Ls behind lead on back stretch. Pressured on bend to race outside leader's girth. Briefly lead after 200 M and couldn't match strides with top pair final 100 M.

Began slowly then checked. Settled 2-wide with cover in 3rd last. 8-9Ls back at 1000 M. Pressured from 600 M and improved 3-wide on bend. 3rd after straightening. Had all chances to claim place but lacked sprint to go with them.
Away very well. Sat behind leader on rail in a distant 2nd. Followed leader to straight. Hit traffic soon after straightening until 200 M. Ran on fairly once in clear. Very one-paced.

Began only fairly. Never far off. Midfield on fence till easing 1 off at 800 M. Turned home 2Ls behind in 5th. Didn't find much room until 200 M. Late impression when clear, but was no threat to winner.
Broke well. Disputed lead before taking over at 800 M. Opened up a 2Ls advantage on straightening. Kept on gamely final stages but was caught near the line.
Disputed lead before taking a sit behind the leader near 800 M. Kept pace and remained in a similar spot after straightening. Stayed on fairly but unable to turn up a notch in closing stages.

Among leaders before taking a sit at midfield after 1000 M turn. Wide and without cover at midfield back straight. Improved in a 3-wide position at the bend and reached within 2Ls of the lead 400 M. Weakened final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly and trailed field until straightening. Kept on fairly and made up ground in the home straight.
Jumped only fairly. Raced on fence and no worse than midfield. 4Ls off the pace at the bend and quickened on straightening. Continued well in the final stages for a minor placing.
Hard ridden to contest for the early lead. Checked at the 1000 M turn and lost ground. Better than midfield back straight. Struggled to keep up at home turn and found nothing in the straight.

Bumped and lost ground at the start and raced towards the rear early. Niggled along to improve after 800 M and was near midfield making home turn. Switched out for a rally in the straight and ran down the leader near the post.
Dropped to rear section from widest draw. Saved ground along the rails making home turn. Steadily made up ground in the straight and was closest at finish.
Off slowly. Travelled 2-wide at midfield. Lacked a response when pressured making home turn. Steadily dropped out in the straight.
Among leaders early. Travelled 2-wide behind the pace after 800 M. Unable to keep pace at home turn and weakened in the straight.
Outpaced and raced 2-wide behind midfield. Switched out on straightening and made up some late ground.
Jumped well from wide draw and was out-paced. Steadily dropped to rear section. Last on straightening and only ran past a few beaten runners.
Slow to begin, lacked tactical pace to take up box-seat position, 4Ls back in 5th on fence at 1000 M, shuffled back further to be 9Ls down turning into home straight, poor effort.
No worse than 2Ls down in 2nd from 1200 M to 500 M, 1L back in 2nd and dangerous taking home turn, very weak thereafter.
6Ls behind lead in 7th on fence at 1100 M, shuffled back from 800 M to 600 M to 9Ls down in 10th at 500 M, headway turning for home, ran on strongly for a place but too late, unlucky.
Led early on, clear by up to 1L from 1100 M to home straight, headed by winner 200 M out, all out to hang on for 3rd.
Slipped into box run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1200 M, about 3Ls down at 800 M, closer turning for home, led 200 M out, always doing enough to hang on.
Stumbled at start, 3-wide no cover early on, got in 2-wide at 1100 M to be 3Ls down in 4th, on fence and treading water 800 M out, still struggling towards rear into home straight, poor effort.
Switched from widest gate to fence after beginning slowly, keen over 1200 M out, 9Ls down in 11th at 1100 M, 8Ls down in 8th entering home stretch, always well outpaced by principals.
Nicely placed 4Ls off speed in 6th when 2-wide at 1100 M, unbalanced when 4Ls down in 4th turning for home, faded out very rapidly and tamely.
On fence 8Ls off speed in 10th at 1100 M, 6Ls down in 7th taking home turn, ran on well to just miss out on a place.
Unbalanced at 1200 M when 2-wide and 6Ls off speed in 8th, 5Ls back in 5th and niggled along to pick up more ground turning for home, one-paced.
Lost ground at start, 8Ls back in 9th at 1200 M, 6Ls down in 6th entering homestretch, stayed on fairly down centre of track before tiring inside final 100 M.
Slowly away, 10Ls last at 1200 M, 9Ls down in 11th off home bend, made some minor late ground.

Fractious and bounded at start with jockey unbalanced after losing a stirrup iron, about 3Ls or 4Ls off speed in 5th on fence until home straight, stayed on well late, nearest at finish. (Dropped whip.)
Steadied at start and at 1000 M, one from rear about 9Ls behind leader at 700 M, never got much closer.
Best away, box run on fence in 3rd about 2Ls off speed through to home turn, switched out to challenge near 250 M, ran on strongly once clear, only just failed. (Blood and Inquiry.)
Head up at start, a neck down in 2nd out 2-wide at 1000 M, 1L down in 2nd entering home straight, half a length 2nd at 200 M, lost out on quinella place final strides.
Awkward to begin, mostly 3-wide no cover in midfield about 5Ls off the speed until the 500 M, 4-wide (widest of all) until straightening, moderate late headway.
Slow to begin and always struggling at rear at least 7Ls behind leader, never a factor.
Fractious in gates, 4-back on fence about 5Ls or 6Ls off speed in 8th from 800 M to home turn, made up some minor late ground without really threatening.
Always at rear and at least 8Ls off the pace, poor effort.
Good early dash to lead by a neck on fence 1000 M, 1L clear at top of home straight, picked up well enough to always hold a decisive break.
Awkward break, 6Ls back in 9th out 2-wide at 800 M, 7Ls down in 9th taking final corner, always thoroughly outpaced.
Over-raced and hanging out at 1000 M when 3Ls down in 6th, 5Ls down in 6th taking final turn, flat in the finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
2-wide and 2Ls behind pace in 4th at 1000 M, 3Ls back in 4th into home turn, stayed on okay but outpaced by principals.
Midfield and on rail. Showed nothing in straight. (Irregular heart.)
In touch about 2Ls off the speed from 1200 M. Every chance turning in but just kept on evenly before weakened close home.
Towards rear. Ran past tiring horses final 200 M.
Led going into the first turn. Kept on in straight and got collared by the first pair when already one-paced close home.
Dropped to the back from wide draw. 9Ls or so off pace along back straight. Shifted out for running upon straightening. Made up good ground final 200 M but simply set too big a task.
2nd from 1100 M after being trapped wide and without cover in the early stages. Kept on in straight but lacked an extra gear in the run home.
Led briefly before settling in 5th spot just 2Ls behind the pace. One-paced in straight and found no extra 100 M out.
Towards rear. About 5Ls down turning in. Ran on well final 200 M but was always held by the winner.
In touch early. Steadied passing winning post the 1st time and travelled around midfield but wide. Unable to quicken in straight and weakened 100 M out.
Soon 2nd last. At least 8Ls back along back straight. Widest turning in. Kicked home strongly final 300 M to win close home.
Midfield. Made no impression in straight.
In touch early. Steadied off heels at 1300 M and tracked leader on rail just 2Ls back. Dropped quickly out of contention final 100 M.
Broke well. Settled outside leader. Carried very wide entering home straight losing ground. Finished off race well making good progress late near stands side.
Always in last few. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Settled towards rear. Produced only moderate headway under pressure in straight and ran home to be nearest at finish.
Raced not far off in 5th. Gained 3rd entering home straight. Gradually weakened passing 200 M.
Waited with. Ran home well to snatch victory near line.
Settled in last few. No clear passage early in straight. Found tight split passing 200 M and produced late impression between runners closing stages.
Settled on rails in midfield. Gained closer turning for home. Hit front inside 100 M but collared close home.
Raced 3-wide in 4th place most of way before drifted out wide home turn. Never recovered.
Settled on rails in 3rd. Gained lead entering straight when leader drifted out wide. Kept on same pace before finding no extra and swamped nearing finish.
Behind midfield early. Commenced run coming out of back straight. Ran home fairly despite tightened about 150 M out. Never nearer.
Soon took up running and led until hung out wide entering home straight, losing ground. Ran home one-paced.
Raced 2-wide in midfield most of way. Ran home one-paced.

Fastest into stride, taken straight to rails and took sit behind leader after 100 M, enjoyed easy time in mid-section, pushed along on turning, kept on at even pace to be close at finish without threatening winner.
Fast into stride, pressed forward to challenge for early lead, raced outside leader with no cover, kept working at leader's girth to turn, tried hard in fight for finish but overhauled near line.

Out with them, driven hard to muster speed and cross to lead, kept them rolling at solid clip in mid-section, held 1L advantage turning and kicked strongly in straight. Tired late but did well to make the frame.

Awkward to begin, lost further ground when bumped, revved up to drive through into prominent spot, raced 1 out 1 back in mid-section, hung at 600 M, under pressure on straightening, unable to find and kept on at same pace to line.

Average to jump, niggled along to hold midfield position, raced 2-wide 3-4Ls away in middle stages, pushed along on turning, lacked another gear when asked and was one-paced over last 200 M. (Lost plate.)
Broke well, settled in closer position 3Ls away on rails, enjoyed easy run thereafter using nothing to turn, eased into clear 2Ls away on turning, closed race off well to secure 3rd placing.
Began fairly, lacked needed speed to contest early lead, caught 3 and 4-wide without cover thereafter, always working to turn, well back entering straight and unable to make any ground thereafter.

Broke fairly, allowed to drift back to tail, raced 6-7Ls away on rails, still had field in front on turning, followed rails in straight and made up good deal of ground late to be on heels of placegetters. Better effort.

Average to jump, lacked early speed and settled just off midfield on rails, used nothing in run, travelled well to turn, under pressure and made steady ground before being badly held up late. Not fully tested.

Broke with rest, caught wide early when unable to go forward and cross to closer spot, taken back to race at rear after 300 M, raced 2-wide 6-7Ls away, well back on turn, closed race off evenly passing some tired runners late.

Jumped with them, soon dropped back to near rear, raced 2-wide 5Ls away between horses, travelled strongly without a clear run on turn, eased clear at 200 M and showed great pickup to sprint over the top of them for strong win.

Broke with them, outpaced early, caught 3-wide without cover in midfield, always working 3-4Ls away, under hard riding and made no impression when asked. Had hard run but didn't seen comfortable at valley.
Prominent 3rd or 4th just 1L off the speed. Tackled leader whilst hanging out in a 3-wide position rounding the turn. Nothing left 250 M out.
Sat 1L behind the speed after jumping well. Steadied off heels near 800 M. Kept on in straight until finding no extra inside 100 M.
Hung in early but remained in touch about 1 to 2Ls behind the speed. Steadied off heels at 900 M. Held up early home straight. Kept on without troubling first pair when in the clear.
Slowly away. Raced greenly at rear and hung out most of the way. About 5Ls back at 1000 M. Still 3Ls down turning in. Responded well final 250 M to win going away.
Never far off about 2Ls or so behind the pace. Forced out a bit near 800 M. Kept on without threatening principals in straight.
Soon outpaced to be behind midfield or worse. Not a factor in straight.
Led or disputed lead. Kept on in straight but simply no match for winner final 100 M.
Slowly away and steadied off heels after start. Towards rear. Shifted out when racing greenly rounding the turn at 800 M. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Soon midfield or worse whilst being niggled along. Kept on in straight and was steadied near 200 M. Ran past beaten runners whilst hanging out after finding clear run.
At rear. Still 5Ls back rounding the turn. Made up some ground final 250 M but simply had too much to do.
Well there and disputed lead from 900 M. Hung out rounding the turn. Dropped out of contention 250 M out.
Raced wide throughout, niggled along after the 500 M.
Box seated throughout, briefly held up until the 300 M, picked up well once in the clear and ran away from rivals.
Slow to begin and lost considerable ground. Travelled along the fence towards the back of the field, showed little in the straight.
Raced 1 off, towards the rear of the field, faded in the run home.
Back in the field, about 4Ls from leaders, made up some late ground.
Last throughout, made little impression despite being pressured from after the 700 M.
Settled outside the leader, hit the lead in the straight but couldn't sustain the effort.
Settled midfield along the rails. Ran on gamely over the concluding stages.
Raced back in the field, 2 deep, rounded the home turn wide and worked home well.
Tailed out in the run home, adverse vet report. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced outside the leader, headed at the 400 M but never likely.
Settled just worse than midfield, along the fence, steadied at the 200 M, made up fair ground to the winning post.
Parked just off pace, 1 off 3 back, off the bit turning for home, one-paced over latter stages.
Led on the fence until after turning for home, weakened inside last 100 M.
Led or disputed lead. Shook loose its pursuer and opened up a clear lead at 300 M. Kept on well to hold off late challenger.
Travelled at midfield. Hard ridden but failed to keep pace after 500 M. Kept on without threatening closing stages.
Kept pace behind the leaders until halfway mark. Weakened steadily thereafter.
Awkward jump and lost ground. Niggled along and improved to midfield. Kept pace before dropping out final 300 M.
Midfield or behind. Lacked a response when asked after 500 M and ran on same pace to the finish.
Jumped up at the start and raced towards the rear. Didn't find much running room in the final 400 M and couldn't do much in the final stages.
Steadily moved to middle of the track and raced at midfield or better. Kept up when pressured at 400 M and steadily faded final stages.
Led or disputed lead until 400 M. Unable to keep pace with leader and headed by placegetters final stages.
Midfield or better. Gained ground steadily over the final 200 M but unable to muster enough to run down winner.
In front of midfield. Kept on well final stages to land a minor placing.
Jumped awkwardly and then was checked to rear section. Niggled along and steadily improved to midfield. Continued fairly in the closing stages.
Lacked speed and trailed field until final 200 M. Closed the race off well making up some late ground.
Outpaced and raced towards the rear. Only ran past tired runners in the final stages.
Kept pace behind the leader until 400 M. Steadily faded thereafter.
Slowly away, in 9th place 5Ls off the pace and 2-wide at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 10th and 3-wide taking home turn, made no headway. (Blood in trachea.)
3-wide with cover and 3Ls back in 6th at 1200 M, same margin down in 5th when straightening up 3-wide, kept on fairly for a place without seriously threatening quinella pair.
Always in 2nd place about 1L off pace out 2-wide until the 600 M, a neck down in 2nd when hanging out in stretch, led at 200 M pole despite hanging in under pressure, collared by winner on the line.

Caught 4-wide no cover until the 900 M when 5Ls off speed in 9th or so, got in 3-wide on circle and still 5Ls down in same position taking home turn, soon weakened. (Irregular heart and blood in trachea.)
Over-raced a little and always 3-wide no cover about 2Ls off leader in 3rd until home turn, had every chance to place but failed to quicken and weakened out of money final 100 M.
2-wide and 6Ls off speed in 11th at 1200 M, niggled along one from rear 700 M out, 8Ls down and struggling at top of homestretch, very one-paced.
Slowly away, got back 6Ls down in 12th on fence at 1200 M, 4Ls down in mid-pack off final bend, stayed on only evenly.
Very slowly away, 8Ls off speed in rear at 1200 M, made some slight improvement at 800 M before really struggling on the circle and dropping out quickly, unacceptable performance.
About 3Ls or 4Ls off pace 3-back on fence in midfield from 1200 M to home turn, plugged on at the same pace thereafter.
Box run travelling well on fence 2Ls off speed in 3rd or 4th until home turn, failed to quicken up.
Best away, led on fence by 1L or a little less until 600 M out, a neck clear turning for home, headed by FREEBIRD 200 M out but fought back late to win on the nod.
Well placed 2-wide and 3Ls off speed in 5th at 1200 M, under pressure to maintain prominent position at 600 M, faded out steadily from top of home straight.
6Ls off speed in 10th when 3-wide with cover at 1200 M, about 7Ls behind in 11th taking home turn, ran on well down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Dropped from wide gate to the rear, 8Ls last at 1000 M and no closer turning for home, never a factor.
Couldn't lead and soon left 3-wide no cover about 2Ls off speed in 3rd until home straight, over 2Ls down in 2nd at 200 M but petered out late.
Crowded at start, 2-wide in 2nd or 3rd place between 1L and 2Ls off pace until home turn, extremely one-paced from then on, dropped out tamely.
3-wide with cover 5Ls off speed in midfield down the back, 4Ls down and a little short of running room from top of stretch to 200 M, might have finished closer with a clearer late passage.
Bounded at start, at least 9Ls off pace in rear until the home turn, found zero, very poor effort.
Soon led on fence by 1L, skipped 2Ls clear at 600 M, always holding a similar break in homestretch.
2-wide and 3Ls down in 5th at 1000 M, similarly placed entering home straight, rather one-paced on the run-in.
3-back on fence about 3Ls or 4Ls off speed in midfield through to home straight entrance when briefly without clear running, kept on at same pace once clear.
Steadied at 1100 M when about 8Ls off pace in rear bunch, headway to be 5Ls back still worse than midfield off home bend when 4-wide (widest of all), kept on fairly late, nearest at the finish.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off speed in 3rd or 4th until the 600 M when niggled along to lie up, under strong pressure thereafter and just lost out on place inside final 50 M.
Slow break, niggled along at 800 M when 6Ls down in 8th place, always outpaced by leading bunch.
Towards rear 7Ls off speed at 1000 M, 5Ls down in 9th at top of home straight, vying for a place when over 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, no chance with winner but stayed on best of the rest.
Niggled along early but soon outpaced and was over 8Ls down in rear at 800 M, always struggling but still made minor late ground past a few very weak rivals.
Failed to muster any dash from the start, about 9Ls off pace at 800 M, always in rear and never dangerous.
Flat-footed at start losing at least 6Ls on main bunch, 10Ls last 1200 M, still well behind in rear taking home turn, made some very minor late ground.
Behind midfield or worse. Some 8Ls back despite being niggled along 1200 M out. 4Ls back turning in. Made up some ground to be nearest at finish inside 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Went forward from wide alley to take up running from 1300 M. Headed 250 M. Nothing left inside 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
At rear. Kept on without ever looking dangerous in straight.

Disputed early lead before dropping steadily towards rear. 6Ls back at 1000 M. Still 4Ls back and widest turning in. Ran on well final 300 M and hit front 100 M out but just got outpaced by first pair close home.
Soon led. Headed 1300 M. Weakened and hung in badly inside 300 M.

Mainly towards rear but on rail. Behind midfield about 6Ls back at 800 M. Took closer order rounding the turn to be 2Ls or so down turning in. Not a factor after checking and steadying at 300 M and 200 M respectively.
Towards rear. Made up some ground final 300 M until finding no extra close home.
Slowly away. Remained at rear. Made up some ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon 1 to 2Ls off the speed. Hampered after 1200 M. Ran on steadily in straight but unable to find an extra gear inside 100 M.
Midfield or better about 3Ls off the speed. 2Ls back turning in. Quickened well inside 200 M to snatch win final strides.
Moved up along rail to be 2Ls back at 1200 M. Followed leader turning in. Hit front briefly 250 M out before getting swamped by principals final 100 M.
Dropped to the back from wide draw. Made up good ground down centre of track final 250 M to be nearest at finish despite hanging out in the closing stages.
Soon 2Ls or so off the pace but trapped wide and without cover throughout. Disputed lead 700 M out. Dropped out tamely inside 200 M.
Hard ridden at start but got outpaced to midfield or worse about 3 to 4Ls back from 1200 M. Kept finding final 300 M and just got outsprinted by the winner final strides.
Settled in 5th some 2Ls off the pace. Kept on steadily in the run home without quickening.
Always in last few. Made no impression in straight.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Settled just better than midfield. Quickened well upon straightening to assert authority close to home.
Raced wide in rear of midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in rear. Made moderate progress down centre of straight without threatening.
Mainly in forward of midfield to straight. Soon weakened.
Settled on heels of leader with rails run. In box seat early in straight but had nothing to give when asked over 200 M out. (Mucus.)
Settled in rear of midfield. Shifted out for a clear run about 250 M out. Finished off race well to just fail to get up on line.
Well there. Yielded ground gradually from over 200 M out.
Midfield briefly. Soon dropped towards rear approaching home bend. Kept on at the one pace under pressure in straight.
Close up 3-wide. Came to challenge upon straightening. Hit front 200 M out. Swamped when no extra close to home.
Mainly in midfield to straight. Gradually weakened.
Soon took up running and led to 200 M. Kept on under pressure and lost minor placing late.

Standard to jump, gathered speed to take up spot in midfield 1 out 2 back 3 to 4Ls away, tracked well in mid-section, eased 3 wide with trail into race on turn, kept trying in straight to battle out finish. Better effort.

Only fairly away, drifted back from wide alley when unable to get in, posted 3 and 4 wide without cover in mid-section, always working to turn, came with 4 wide run into straight, couldn't find in straight after hard run.

Broke well, showed great speed to cross from wide alley, raced outside leader 1L away, enjoyed good run with even speed in middle stages, moved to be on terms turning, hit lead at 300 M, dashed at 200 M and just held on.

Broke with line, trapped wide from awkward alley, always 3 wide with no cover 4Ls away in mid-section, kept working into race with run 3 to 4 wide on turn, flat out at 300 M and couldn't go on last 100 M after hard run.

Fast into stride, showed good speed to take up early lead, backed speed off nicely and dictated in mid-section (overracing a little), held neck lead on turn, headed from 300 M, didn't find and weakened out badly last 200 M.

Average into stride, took up position just off midfield 5 to 6Ls off pace, raced 2 wide between horses throughout, pushed along 4Ls away on turn, in traffic for best part of straight, only kept on same pace when clear.
Bounced out, lacked early speed and settled just off midfield, always wide with cover 5 to 6Ls away, made run 5 wide on turn, unable to produce finish at business end and was one-paced to line.

Fast into stride, showed good speed to cross from outside alley, raced 3 wide early, slotted in to 1 out 1 back spot by midpoint, had fair run thereafter, angled clear 2Ls away on turn, gave all in straight but no dash last bit.

Average to begin, lacked early dash and drifted back to rear, raced at tail 8Ls away, used no petrol to turn, stuck to rails in straight making good ground late between horses to be closest at finish.

Slow to begin, hard ridden to drive through into position on rails near rear, raced ungenerously 7 to 8Ls away, kept saving ground and eased between horses on turn, no real room in straight and stopped for run at 200 M. No luck.

Began fairly, ridden along to take up spot behind leader, had run of race 2Ls away on rails, used nothing and travelled well to turn, plenty to offer when held up to 200 M. Sprinted hard when clear. Unlucky.

Standard to begin, lacked early toe, drove through into midfield position on rails 4Ls away, had good run to turn, in traffic and hard ridden early straight, checked badly 200 M and only kept on same clip thereafter.

Awkward to begin, lost ground shortly after start, positioned in rearward division 2 wide 8Ls from pace, not asked in middle stages, tracked 4 wide on turn, failed to go up a notch and kept on same pace last 200 M.
Settled on rails just behind leaders. No clear passage the length of the straight and not fully tested.
Never far off. Hit front briefly passing 200 M before collared. Fought on well for 2nd placing.
Raced wide mainly in forward of midfield. Quickened well in straight to take charge 150 M out. Won well.
Always struggling at the back.
Held slender lead before joined early in straight, eventually headed 200 M out. Weakened gradually.
Raced prominently mainly 3 off the rails. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Mainly wide in midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Settled mainly in forward of midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
In last trio to straight. Ran on without threatening. Never nearer.
Towards rear. Produced moderate impression in straight.
Midfield, racing keenly far side. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Jumped in the air losing ground at the start. Remained well back throughout and never seen with a chance.
Well there. Disputed lead early in straight. Swamped when unable to sustain effort 200 M out.
Always towards rear. Made no impression in straight.
Took lead approaching 800 M. Unbalanced and lost footing turning in. Headed 200 M out and got swamped for a minor placing in the closing stages.
Behind midfield but trapped wide early. Dropped back a bit to be about 4Ls off the speed from 900 M. Ran on well in straight despite hanging in to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Never seen with a chance.
Led or disputed lead before sitting outisde the leader just 1L back from 800 M. Took lead briefly 200 M out before getting outsprinted for a place inside 100 M.
Towards rear early. Moved up along rail to be in midfield or worse from 800 M. Just 2Ls back turning in. Kept on without threatening principals and was steadied inside 200 M.
Disputed lead at 1000 M before sitting 1L off the speed but 3-wide. One-paced in straight before weakened 100 M from home.
Well there early but always trapped wide. 2Ls back from 800 M. One-paced in straight before finding no extra 100 M out.
Checked at start. At rear. Never a factor.
In touch early. Midfield or better turning into back straight. Hung in at 800 M. Unable to hold ground rounding the turn and soon beaten upon straightening.
Hampered at start. At rear. 8Ls last rounding the turn. Made up good ground down the centre of track final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Midfield or better turning into back straight about 2Ls off the speed. Raced tight inside another runner at 800 M. Ran on well final 300 M and held on to win after taking control 100 M out.
In touch about 1 to 2Ls behind the leaders. Checked at 600 M. Held up upon straightening and not properly tested. (See Racing Incidents.)
Almost last throughout, passed tiring horses over the last 300 M.
Tracked on the bit, box seated, one-paced in the run home.
Positioned 1 off, midfield 3Ls back, offered nothing at the business end.
Made every post a winner, tired over latter stages but held on gamely.
Slow to begin and settled at the tail of the field after being steadied near the 1500 M. Came to the outside in the straight and motored home.
Raced slightly worse than midfield, 1 off, 4Ls back, made up some ground whilst hanging in over the concluding stages.
Enjoyed an easy run on the fence, midfield, shifted out in the straight, given every chance.
Raced keenly outside the winner, raced 1L back, had his opportunity but failed to go on.
Midfield along the fence, about 3Ls back, dour in the straight.
Handy, 1 off, struggling turning for home.
Settled back in the field and was never likely.
Hampered early in the race, pushed on to be midfield, weakened after covering ground. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced in rear section and trailed field at home turn. Rallied and made up good ground in the straight.
Outpaced and trailed field. Made up good ground along the rails at the bend to be in striking position on straightening. Switched out at 300 M and ran on strongly to clinch the win inside final 50 M.

Raced in a forward position and kept alongside the leader after 1000 M. Stayed with the leader on straightening and took over the lead inside final 200 M. Kept on but failed to hold off top pair closing stages.
Best out and took the lead. Held a length's advantage into the home straight but was headed at 200 M. Faded steadily in the closing stages.
Checked shortly after start and then raced 3-wide behind midfield. Wide and steadily lost ground making home turn. Trailed field into home straight and only ran past beaten runners.

Settled prominently behind the leader until home straight. Continued well on straightening and had to make a run through a tight gap after 200 M. Kept on gamely but lost whip after 100 M and was gunned down last few strides.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. Had trouble keeping pace after the Rock. Lacked a response under the whip and finished tailed out.
3-wide at midfield. Pressured to keep pace at 700 M but lacked a response. Found nothing in the straight.
2-wide behind midfield. Dropped to rear section after the Rock. Swung wide turning for home and only ran past beaten runners.
Crowded to the rear on jumping. Improved along the rails to be racing near midfield after 1200 M. Switched out on straightening and continued fairly to make the frame.
Wide and without cover at midfield. Pressed forward after 900 M and was a length off the lead at the Rock. 3-wide making home turn and failed to keep pace. Weakened in the straight.

Ridden out to a forward position. Raced 2-wide behind the leader after 1200 M. Niggled along to keep pace 800 M out and was hard ridden at midfield making home turn. Only remained on same pace in the straight.
Soon driven along in rear about 9Ls behind leader, still well behind taking home corner, made some minor late progress.
Towards rear about 8Ls off the pace until homestretch, kept on okay to be nearest at finish. (Lame next day.)
Best away, soon 2Ls clear on fence, 3Ls ahead and going well off home turn, tired a little close home but always looked the winner.
About 8Ls off speed in rear early on, niggled along at 800 M, still 8Ls down in rear turning for home, switched out at 200 M to improve, ran on strongly late to take 2nd on line.
Always 3-wide no cover in 4th or 5th place about 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed through to home straight, made some fair late ground.
Awkward break, 4-back on fence in midfield about 6Ls or 7Ls off the speed through to home turn, made a little late ground without threatening to place.
Well placed in 3rd out 2-wide and 3Ls off speed down backstretch, a little further behind in 3rd entering home straight, one-paced thereafter.
In 6th place or so 3-back on fence and about 6Ls behind leader until final bend, made some minor late ground.
Awkward break, in 2nd place about 1L off speed early, ridden along when about 3Ls down in 2nd taking home turn, kept on quite well but lost out on 2nd place on the line.
2-wide and worse than midfield about 7Ls or 8Ls off speed through to home turn, failed to quicken up.
Slowest away, never on terms and always at least 9Ls off the pace in rear until home turn, plugged on evenly late.
2-wide and 4Ls behind speed in 4th early on, struggling to lie up at 600 M, fading off home turn and very weak, eased down inside final 200 M.
Soon led on fence by 1L, always tended to hang out and keen in places, a neck clear taking final turn, headed 200 M out and swamped.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls off the speed and 2-wide until home turn, no impression.
Raced 2-wide in 6th place about 4Ls off the lead until the 500 M, ran on strongly down centre of track to lead 50 M out, kept on.
8Ls behind leader in 9th at 1200 M, marginally closer turning into home straight, always outpaced.
Raced in 4th place between 2Ls and 4Ls off speed until home turn, every chance of a least a place when 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, just a little one-paced close home.
Box run on fence in 3rd and 2Ls off speed until home turn, led inside final 200 M briefly before being collared by winner with 50 M to race.
Got back 10Ls off speed in rear early on, 8Ls down in 11th turning for home, made some good late ground to be nearest at finish.
2-wide and 1L off speed in 2nd early on, a neck down in 2nd taking final bend, led with every chance over 200 M out, tired close home.
5Ls down on fence in 5th at 1100 M, 3Ls down in 5th off the home turn, rather one-paced on the run-in.
On fence about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed in midfield until home turn, 3Ls down in 7th entering home straight, failed to find any extra.
Reared at start and lost at least 10Ls on the field, tagged on to be 12Ls last 800 M out, struggling before home turn, never a factor.
Settled about 8Ls or 9Ls back in 10th at 1200 M, 7Ls down in 10th taking home turn, ran on strongly late for a place.
Midfield or better. Unbalanced when awkward on heels at 600 M. One-paced in straight.
Slowly away. Towards rear. Made up some late ground in straight whilst hanging in.
2nd from 1200 M. Under pressure rounding the bend. Found nothing in straight and very weak inside 200 M.
Always at rear. Never seen with a chance.
Sat behind leader from 1200 M. About 2Ls back at 1000 M. 1L down rounding the turn. Ran on determinedly in straight and held on to win after taking charge inside 200 M.
Midfield or behind. Wide turning in. One-paced in straight before weakened inside 100 M. (Bled.)
Towards rear. Some 7Ls back at 800 M. About 5Ls down turning in. Made up a little late ground. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led to 200 M. Unable to match speed with winner but already did enough to secure 2nd.
Behind midfield or worse. About 6Ls back at 800 M. Kept on without threatening placed horses in straight.
Soon 4th. About 3Ls back from 1100 M. Headway rounding the turn to be 2Ls back turning in. Kept on until finding no extra final 100 M.
Towards rear. At least 7Ls back entering back straight. Saved ground along rail turning in. Made up good ground but without troubling the first pair final 200 M.
Slowly away. At rear. Never in the hunt.
Well there. Took up running around 1000 M bend. Hung on well under pressure to score.
Settled in rear. Commenced run rounding home bend. Ran on well down straight to just fail to get up on line.
Well back. Raced wide turning in. Only ran past beaten horses.
Close up early. Lost touch rounding home bend and was 5th some 3Ls back turning in. Kept on steadily without threatening in straight.
Midfield to halfway. Dropped towards rear off Rock. Produced moderate late impression closing stages.
Quickly crossed to rails and raced towards rear. Dropped to tail-end approaching home turn and never seen with a chance in the straight.
Wide in midfield. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield early. Moved closer to 4th off Rock. Fought on steadily under pressure in straight to be nearest at finish.
Always well behind and never seen with a chance.
Around midfield most of way. Ran home one-paced.
Chased leader to straight. No extra when swamped for 2nd closing stages.
Led early, then settled just off the pace. Swamped for minor placing inside final 200 M.

Jumped with them, hard ridden to muster speed, settled further back than usual in midfield, raced 2-wide 4Ls away in mid-section, tracked nicely 3-wide into straight, closed race off well to make frame.

Broke evenly, lacked early speed and settled down in rearward spot, raced 2-wide 6-7L away in middle stages, used little to turn, well back and hard ridden in straight, lacked turn of foot and only plugged to line.

Bounded in air and lost ground, made use of to hold position, raced on rails at rear 8-9Ls from leaders, pushed along to make ground when well back on turn, came between them in straight making a little ground at same pace.

Fast into stride, mustered good speed to take up running, kept rolling in front at good speed, held 1L advantage on turn, rallied well to be 2Ls clear in straight, kept giving last 200 M to narrowly go down.
Average to begin, niggled to hold spot, raced worse than midfield on rails 6-7Ls from pace, still well back on turn, followed rails in straight and made up some late ground from impossible position.

Out well, matched speed to be prominent early, had run of race behind leader thereafter (bumped rail 600 M), travelled well to turn, gained good split and challenged strongly to fight out finish. Better effort.

Broke with them, settled just behind early pace, 2-wide 2-3Ls away in mid-section, allowed to stride forward from 500 M, came with good run 3-wide rounding home turn, sprinted hard down centre of track to claim them.

Broke with them, taken back from outside alley, raced 2-wide at tail 10Ls away, pushed along to hold spot in mid-section, still well back on turning, motored home last 200 M to just miss frame. Big run. (See Racing Incidents.)

Jumped fairly, allowed to relax, settled down 4Ls away on rails, enjoyed soft run in mid-section, travelled evenly on turn, forced to shift when asked to pick up in straight, stuck to task to be not beaten far. (Saddle shifted early.)

Began awkwardly, urged along to go forward, unable to slot in, trapped 3 and 4-wide with no cover 4-5Ls away early, always working and continued on with 4-wide run on turn, couldn't mount challenge and was one-paced in straight.

Jumped well, showed speed to press on wide to eventually sit outside leader (did some work), niggled along at leaders girth approaching turn, flat out into straight, didn't finish off and dropped out. (Never comfortable.)

Fastest into stride, pushed forward from awkward alley to be outside leader early, restrained to race 1 out 1 back in mid-section, 2Ls away in traffic on turning, gained split and closed race off reasonably without threatening winner.
Midfield at best. Dropped out of contention 300 M out.
Soon outpaced to the rear, raced greenly and shifted ground on a few occasions. Last rounding home turn. Ran past well beaten horses final 200 M.
Fractious and lost ground at start. Ridden forward to take up running at 1100 M. Kept on well in straight before being headed by winner when one-paced 100 M out.
Jumped best before travelling 1 to 2Ls behind the pace. Challenged leader briefly turning in before finishing one-paced without threatening placed horses final 200 M.
Soon led. Headed 1100 M and sat 1 to 2Ls behind the lead from 1000 M. Ran on well final 200 M and took control 100 M from home despite hanging out.
In touch early before travelling in midfield about 2Ls behind the speed. Dropped towards rear rounding the turn. Never a threat in straight.
Slowly away. At back. Carried wide when improving on the outside 600 M out. About 2Ls back turning in. Made up good ground upon straightening until not quickened and hung in final 100 M.
Slow to begin, immediately taken in along the fence, 3 back, saved ground around the home turn, went to the lead early in straight, held off late challenge.
Near the rear of the field, didn't act in the conditions.
Tracked the leader on the fence, commenced to give ground after 300 M. (Bled.)
Positioned 4Ls away on the rails, finished off smartly.
Raced 3Ls back, 1 off, battled on whilst one paced.
Positioned midfield 3 wide about 5Ls away. Tailed out. (Bled.)
Last position for the better part of the race, passed tired horses in the straight.
Midfield, 1 off, about 4 back, found wanting in the final stages.
Slowly away, raced worse than midfield, saved ground along the inside but never threatened. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led until the final bend, stayed on solidly.
Raced 1 out 1 back, weakened in the straight.
Began awkwardly, faced wide 2Ls back, struggled in the conditions.
Travelled wide for the majority of the race worse than midfield, prior to straightening gave ground and tailed out.
Faded over the last 250 M. After being parked outside the leader.
Led or disputed lead until home straight. Kept on strongly in the straight and out-lasted co-leader in a duel over the final stages.
Ridden along early and settled towards midfield. Steadied and lost ground after 700 M and was in rear section on straightening. Made no impression thereafter.
No early speed and detached until home straight. Only ran past a beaten runner.
Ridden along but was outpaced by leaders. Settled towards midfield but steadily lost ground at the bend and found nothing in the straight.

A bit slow out of the gates and was pushed along to make up ground. Settled prominently behind the leaders after 800 M and remained in same position until home straight. Kept on well but unable to gain ground on top pair.
Ridden along from wide draw and was outpaced early. Raced behind midfield and was widest making the turn. Stayed on same pace in the straight.
Led or disputed lead in a 2-wide position until home straight. Fought gamely and went stride for stride with winner before being edged out in closing stages.
Raced 3-wide in a forward position until home straight. Dropped out quickly thereafter. (Blood in trachea.)
Slow out of the gates and raced in a rearward position. Improved along the rails at the bend and kept on fairly in the straight.
Niggled along behind midfield. Made up some ground at the bend but only kept on at one pace thereafter.
Steadily dropped back from widest draw and raced in rear section until home straight. Only ran past a few beaten runners.
Stumbled out of the gates and raced on fence at midfield. Shifted out to be 3-wide making home turn. Ran on same pace to the finish.
Slow to muster early pace, about 7Ls down in 9th or 10th at 1000 M, hard pressed to get any closer at final bend, didn't succeed.
8Ls off pace towards rear early on, 6Ls down in 8th taking home turn, didn't pose much of a threat thereafter.
Awkward break, in midfield about 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, lost position on circle and well behind at top of home straight, soon eased down.
Always struggling to lie up, under pressure when 3Ls down in midfield at 1000 M, dropped back rapidly on circle, eased down after losing footing 700 M out.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 3rd at 1000 M, a neck down in 2nd at top of homestretch, led briefly over 200 M out but soon overhauled by winner 100 M out, no extra close home.
Worse than midfield 3-wide with cover in rear when 6Ls off pace at 800 M, 10Ls down and struggling into home straight, found nothing and soon beaten.
Awkward break and no early speed, 3Ls off pace and 3-back on fence in 6th at 800 M, 2Ls down in 4th at top of home straight, every chance when 1L in 3rd at 300 M, no extra.
Slowest away, 8Ls behind in rear bunch at 1000 M, even further behind and really struggling turning for home, soon eased down.
Disputed early lead out wide, led by 1L at 1000 M when 2-wide, a neck clear turning for home but briefly headed 200 M out, dug in again to regain lead 100 M out, ran on well.
Disputed early lead, on fence 1L down in 2nd when 2-wide at 1000 M, 2Ls back in 3rd at top of stretch, always just outpaced by front trio.
4-back on fence in midfield at 1000 M 4Ls behind leader, edged out 3-wide at 600 M and 4-wide off final bend when over 3Ls down in 5th, one-paced on the run-in.
Always in rear at least 7Ls off pace until home straight, very one-paced.
3-wide no cover when 2Ls back in 4th at 800 M, 6Ls down in 7th when seeming to slip at top of homestretch, dropped out rapidly.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls off speed and on fence 1000 M out, 4Ls down in midfield turning for home, failed to quicken up.
Best away and led 1L on fence at 1000 M, headed at top of home straight and dropped out very quickly.
Always prominent and within 2Ls off the pace in 3rd or 4th, led at top of home straight, jockey lost whip and an iron with 100 M to race, always did just enough to hang on.
Settled 2-wide in midfield about 3Ls off pace through to home straight, very one-paced thereafter.
3-wide with cover in midfield about 3Ls off speed until home straight, found very little under pressure.
6Ls off pace at back of main bunch at 1000 M, 5Ls down in 9th at top of home straight, stayed on strongly to take 2nd inside final 50 M but winner had done enough.
Detached in rear early on, at least 10Ls off speed taking home turn, never on terms.
Slowly away. Caught 4-wide no cover when 3Ls off pace in midfield at 900 M, lost position on the circle and 8Ls down in 11th taking home turn, soon faded out further.
On fence roughly 2Ls off pace in 4th or 5th until final bend, 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, rather one-paced inside final stages.
Slowly away, always 3-wide no cover but prominent and within 2Ls off speed in 3rd or 4th until home straight, grabbed for 2nd with 50 M to race, good effort.
Slowly away. Detached in rear early on, at least 10Ls off speed taking home turn, always struggling.
Detached in rear early on, at least 10Ls off speed taking home turn, made some very minor late ground past some very tired rivals.
Never travelling well, 4Ls down in 9th at 800 M, struggling further behind at top of home straight, soon eased down. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away well, raced about 1L off pace in 2nd until the 600 M, over 2Ls down in 5th taking final bend, weakened out very quickly.
About 4Ls off pace in 8th or 9th until home turn, always outpaced by principals.
Jumped best before settling 1 to 2Ls behind the speed. One-paced in straight before weakened badly final 200 M.
Dropped to the rear from wide draw. Ran on steadily in straight until finding no extra close home.
In touch early. Lost ground and dropped towards rear after getting unbalanced at 1000 M and 800 M. Some 8Ls back rounding the turn. Found nothing in straight.
Midfield or better. Dropped behind midfield after steadying off heels 800 M out. Not a factor in straight.
Soon well there. 2 to 3Ls behind the pace in 4th 1000 M out. No chance with winner in straight but kept on steadily to secure 2nd inside 200 M.
Soon towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Led to 1000 M. 1 to 2Ls behind the leader rounding the turn. Unable to quicken in straight and very weak inside 200 M.
Midfield early. Amongst rear bunch from 1000 M. Widest turning in. Never a threat in straight.
In touch early. Midfield or worse about 3 to 4Ls off the pace from 1000 M. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Midfield or better. Under pressure when 3 to 4Ls back 900 M out. Never a threat in straight.
Prominent after jumping from widest gate. Hit front at 1000 M. Kept on well in straight to win comfortably.
Midfield early. Dropped to 2nd last at 1000 M. Checked at 700 M. Made up steady ground in straight to grab a remote 3rd final 100 M.
Midfield or worse out wide whilst being ridden along in the early stages. Dropped back continuously from 1000 M to last 700 M out. Ran past very tired horses final 200 M.
Checked shortly after start. Always at rear. Never in the hunt.
Broke well. Chased leader to straight. Dropped out.
Raced wide in rear. Made moderate headway under pressure down stands' side.
Slow out. Ridden and soon picked up to join rear of field. Made modest headway in straight for distant 4th.
Midfield early stages. Lost position rounding home bend. Made no impression in straight. (Mildly lame morning after racing.)
Made all. Went clear upon straightening to win unchallenged.
Around midfield to straight. Dropped out. (Lame.)
Raced in last few to straight. Kept on same pace for remote 6th.
Settled in midfield. Shifted off the rails upon straightening. Made moderate headway without threatening.
Raced wide in forward of midfield to straight. Weakened.
Never far off to straight. Kept on one pace before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Always wide in last few to straight. No further impression.

Fast to break, showed pace to be part of speed battle early, held lead and dictated terms in front, kept going to be 1L clear on turning, tried to dash but collared at 200 M and weakened badly from that point.

Broke with them, ridden hard to hold spot on rail in early stages, eventually drove through to settle behind leader, had run of race to turn, angled into clear 300 M and took over at 200 M and held on for hard fought win.

Fair to break, lacked early speed, assumed usual rearward position, raced on rails 6 to 7Ls from pace, tracked into race nicely on turn, came with good run (hanging) between horses in straight making up many lengths late.

Broke well, showed great pace to challenge for early lead (good clip) applied pressure at leader's girth, travelled well on turn, laid down challenge and hit lead briefly at 200 M but early workload told and couldn't sustain effort.

Fast into stride, pressed forward to hold prime position 1 out 1 back 2 to 3Ls away, niggled along on turn, gained clear run at 300 M but couldn't find when pressured and kept same pace to line. Not fully comfortable.

Average to jump, unable to muster pace from inside alley, raced on rails 5Ls away just worse than midfield, always niggled along to turn, stuck to rails in straight, kept to task well without threatening winner.

Bounced out, unable to match them early, drifted back to midfield 5 to 6Ls away, always 3 wide and doing plenty of work, forced 4 wide and began to lose touch on turn, only battled to line making no headway.

Began with rest, pushed along to hold midfield spot, settled 3 to 4Ls away 2 wide in mid-section, eased 3 wide from 600 M, made 4 wide run on turn, closed strongly under hands and heels only to run down all but winner.
Awkward to jump, unable to get going early, positioned at rear 3 wide 7 to 8Ls away, began to lose touch on turn, offered nothing in run home. Never comfortable in going. Pay? to ignore.

Blundered at start, quickly got going thereafter to be prominent early, unable to slot in and raced 3 wide without cover in mid section, did plenty of work to turn, unable to find when asked at 300 M and dropped right out last 200 M.

Average to begin, settled down worse than midfield, always 3 wide 6 to 7Ls away with cover, pushed along to track into race on turn, not a lot of free room in straight but closed race off nicely late to narrowly miss 2nd.

Slow to begin, pushed along to go forward, raced near tail 7Ls away in 2 wide spot, always niggled along in mid section, still well back on turn, made run between horses but never really comfortable, made no impression.
Mainly in midfield to straight. Faded.
Badly hampered shortly after start and dropped to rear. Remained well behind throughout.
Settled in midfield to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Raced in better than midfield. Took closer order turning for home. Fought on steadily to gain 3rd place inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Badly hampered by faller rounding home bend. Never recovered.
Tracked leaders. Quickened to hit front over 200 M out. Hung on well to finish.
Settled in rear. Made no impression in straight.
Raced wide behind midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced without quickening.
Chased leader to 200 M. Weakened.
Soon took up running and led until narrowly headed over 200 M out. Fought on under pressure but unable to peg back winner throughout closing stages.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Always well behind and never seen with a chance.
Just behind midfield when fell rounding home bend.
Raced mainly in better than midfield in 5th. Kept on one pace in the run home.

Jumped with them, no real speed, took up midfield position, raced 2 wide 5 to 6Ls from pace, well back in traffic on turning, got clear entering straight but was one paced in run home making no real impression.

Broke only fairly, drifted back to midfield, raced 3 back on rails 4 to 5Ls away, enjoyed a good trip using little in mid section, hard ridden to make ground turning, angled out to middle and closed race off best to score slogging win.

Broke well, showed good dash to take up running, pressured in middle stages and shaded throughout (maintained rails), drove through to hold lead on turning, kicked strongly at 200 M and fought off challengers to 100 M just tiring late.

Slow to begin, niggled along when couldn't go with them early, raced detached from field some 12+Ls away, hard ridden with field to beat on turn, switched to outside and passed some weakening runners late.
Average to break, hard ridden to go forward wide early, trapped 3 wide outside leaders without cover whilst applying pressure in mid section, began to struggle on turning for home, dropped right out.

Average to begin, unable to go in early stages, settled in last position 12 or more lengths off pace, lobbed along at tail throughout, well back and not travelling on turn, passed only tired runners in run to line.

Away with them, pressed forward to take up forward spot, raced 1 out 1 back in middle stages, had run of race to turn, gained split on turning and loomed strongly at 200 M just unable to go on with it last bit. Fair effort.
Average to jump, pushed along from outset, settled down 7 to 8Ls away 2 wide near rear in mid section, still well back on turn, found nothing when asked to come wide on turning and battled to line.

Jumped with them, pushed on to seek closer order early, unable to get to rail, always working 3 to 4Ls away 4 wide without cover, hard ridden at midpoint, went backwards thereafter. Beaten a long way (never comfortable).

Slow to begin, settled near rear as usual, raced on rails 7 to 8Ls away, niggled along to keep in touch, made wide run on turn, not a lot of room entering straight but showed nothing when clear, kept on same clip against outside rail.

Standard to begin, hard ridden to drive through to settle down behind leader, used little thereafter 2 to 3Ls away, followed rails in straight and looked likely with inside run at 200 M but lacked dash to capture place.

Broke well, ridden with stick to cross from wide alley and challenge for front, raced outside leader applying pressure throughout, had 1/2L advantage to turn, couldn't go on when asked at 300 M and weakened right out. (Mucopus.)

Standard to begin, drifted back to worse than midfield, covered ground in mid section 3 wide 6 to 7Ls from pace, bumped at 600 M, tracked 5 wide with run into straight and came to extreme outside but had nothing left last 300 M.

Fastest into stride, allowed to roll forward, unable to get close and raced in midfield 3 to 4Ls away 3 wide with cover to turn, came with run 5 wide into straight, made some ground down centre of track without threatening.
Midfield. Steady headway rounding the turn to be 2Ls back in 3rd turning in. Very one-paced in straight.
Moved forward from wide alley to take up running. Kept on well in straight but unable to peg back winner after being headed 100 M out.
Towards rear but on rail after steadying at 1500 M. Made steady ground along rail from 600 M to be 3Ls down turning in. Kept on to be nearest at finish.
Behind midfield or worse from 1200 M. Not a factor in straight. (Blood in trachea.)

Travelled kindly in 3rd or 4th place from the first turn, about 1 to 2Ls behind the leader. 1L back in 2nd place rounding home bend. Kept finding in straight and held on to win after hitting front 100 M out.
Slowly away. Midfield or behind. Kept on evenly without threatening principals in straight.
Dropped to the rear from wide draw. Shifted out upon straightening and made up good ground final 250 M but never troubled placed horses.
At back despite being niggled along. Ran past well beaten horses in straight.
Thereabout in 5th place just 2Ls off the pace. Under the whip when at least 3-wide turning in. Found nothing in straight.
Midfield or better from 1200 M after showing early speed. Soon tailed off after steadying at 600 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent. 1 out 1 back off the leader from the first turn. Unable to hold position rounding home bend and soon dropped out of contention upon straightening.
Ridden forward whilst being trapped wide and without cover. 3rd at 1100 M but struggled badly from Rock. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced outside the leader, setting brisk tempo, spent too much petrol to finish off.
Raced handy off the speed, stayed on one-paced.
Settled back along the rails, 4Ls off principals, saved ground on the home turn and closed off well.
Camped behind the leader on the fence, shifted out in the straight for decisive win.
Didn't have easiest of leads, stuck on gamely.
Midfield and wide throughout.
Travelled near the back of the field, shifted out in the straight, battled away.
4-wide, no cover, outside the principals, commenced to give ground after the 500 M.
Last for the entire trip.
In a rearward position throughout the trip, 1 off, made no impression.
Wide for the major part of the trip, raced ungenerously throughout at the back. (See Racing Incidents.)
Pressed forward, 3-wide no cover, sharing lead, good effort.
Raced among leaders. 3-wide and held a narrow advantage in the middle stages. Commenced to lose touch making home turn and then weakened in the straight.
Lead or disputed lead until home straight. Opened up a clear advantage on straightening and kept on well over the concluding stages to deny challenger.

Botched the start but soon recovered. On fence and better than midfield. Travelled well and was in a prominent position behind the pacesetter making home turn. Kept on before fading inside final 200 M.
Steadily dropped to the rear and trailed field. Remained in a rearward position turning for home and only ran past a beaten runner.
Just behind the pace early but was checked to midfield after 1100 M. Niggled along to keep pace at midfield in middle stages. 3-wide turning for home but lacked the needed rally in the straight.
Botched the start and was ridden along to be better than midfield. Kept on steadily in the straight for a minor placing.

Crowded early and was near the back. Switched to the fence at 1000 M and was ridden along to make up ground. Improved to midfield at the Rock and saved ground at the bend. Kept on well but not enough to chase down winner.
Jumped fairly and steadily dropped behind midfield. Kept on fairly in the straight.
Checked on jumping and raced in a rearward position. Niggled along in the back straight and advanced to be closer to midfield entering the 600 M turn. Only stayed on same pace in the straight.
Outpaced and steadily dropped to a rearward position. Trailed field into home straight and made up some ground.
Best out but raced wide among leaders. Remained wide in a forward position until home straight. Unable to turn up a notch and only kept same pace to finish.
2-wide among leaders. Took a sit to race behind the pace after 800 M. Swung out on straightening and kept on fairly in the closing stages.
On fence 8Ls back in 8th over 1000 M out, 5Ls down and 3-wide turning for home, ran on quite well down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Slow to begin, one from rear about 10Ls off speed at 1000 M, soon ridden along to become more competitive, didn't succeed.
Travelled well 3-back on fence from 3Ls to 4Ls behind from 1000 M to home straight, 2Ls down vying for 3rd at 200 M, led 50 M out and just held the upper hand to line.
7Ls back in 7th when 2-wide at 1000 M, niggled along down backstretch but less than 4Ls down in 6th taking home turn, kept on at same pace.
3-wide no cover early on before racing about 1L off speed in 2nd out 2-wide from 1000 M to home turn when hard pressed to lie up, faded out after being bumped 250 M out.
Asleep at the start, soon about 12Ls last, 8Ls down turning for home, made some very minor late ground.
Slow away, never travelled well in rear bunch about 10Ls off speed, struggling turning for home, soon eased down, performance deemed unacceptable. (Lame next day.)
4-back on fence between 4Ls and 6Ls off speed in midfield until home turn, always very one-paced.
Managed to slide from wide gate to box-seat on fence 2Ls off pace from 1100 M to final bend, 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, had every chance but just outpaced close home.
Soon led on fence, never clear by much more than 1L until home turn, folded quite tamely once headed 100 M out.
Well placed 2-wide and about 2Ls or 3Ls off speed in 4th or 5th through to home turn, finished flatly.
About 9Ls down in 9th over 1000 M out when 2-wide, 6Ls back in same position off final bend, never really threatened. (See Racing Incidents.)
In firing line early racing 3-wide within 1L off the speed, dropped out from top of homestretch.
Lost ground at start and got back 7Ls last turning for home, made some fair late ground, nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced 3-wide with cover in midfield between 2Ls and 3Ls behind speed until home turn, very one-paced. (Lame and blood.)
Soon led but always tended to hang out into a 2-wide position, headed at top of home straight, lost out on runners-up spot close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Box run on fence 2Ls off pace in 5th or so until 500 M, led at top of home straight, drew clear, comfortably.
Always towards rear at least 4Ls off pace until home turn, made no late impression down centre of track.
Never better than midfield and always at least 3Ls back, gave further ground in homestretch.
Always caught deep on track 4 and 5-wide without cover but about 2Ls off speed in midfield until home turn, ceded ground late on.
A little over 2Ls off speed in midfield until homestretch, stayed on fairly well thereafter, solid debut.
Towards rear about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed until home turn, always held by principals.
No worse than 1L off speed in 3rd or so through to home straight, had every chance of a place but one-paced in final 50 M and ran 4th.
Steadied at 800 M when close up, never worse than 2Ls off speed until home turn, over 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, no chance with winner but stayed on best of the rest to take 2nd close home.
Prominent 2nd just 1L off the lead. Kept on in straight until effort not sustained final 100 M.
In touch early. 2 to 3Ls back from 1300 M. Kept on in straight to be nearest at finish.
Slowly away. Never competitive at the rear.
Towards rear. About 4 to 5Ls back from 600 M. Kept on without threatening principals in straight.
Around midfield about 3Ls behind the pace in 6th or 7th place. Shifted out to avoid heels at 1000 M. Ran on well final 200 M to grab 3rd in a tight finish.
Travelled nicely in 4th or 5th position. 2 to 3Ls back from 1300 M. Ran on determinedly in straight and got up in the closing stages.
Reared and lost considerable ground at start. At rear. Widest turning in. Failed to quicken in straight.
Midfield at best. Hampered and carried wide at 1000 M. Not a factor in straight.
Led to passing winning post first time before sitting behind the leader 1300 M out. Shifted out for running 200 M out and ran on well but the post came a fraction too soon.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily without threatening in straight.
Prominent but trapped wide. Took up running from 1300 M. Kept on in straight but unable to match speed with placed horses final 50 M.
Proved very difficult to settle at the rear in an attempt to be ridden quietly. Checked at 1600 M. Last 800 M out and not a factor thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began fairly. Ridden to lead approaching Rock. Went more than 2Ls clear rounding home bend. Hung on well to the line. (Lame.)
Mainly in forward of midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Travelled mainly in better than midfield position. Found no extra under pressure inside final 200 M.
Always struggling at the back before running past beaten horses in straight.
In last few to straight. Made up good ground in straight past beaten horses.
Towards rear throughout. Made no show in straight.
Always in last few and never a danger.
Settled in midfield to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.

Broke well and in front early. Unable to cross to rails and had to settle for 2nd position, some 2Ls off the lead rounding home bend. Switched off rails to challenge over 200 M out but unable to peg back winner.
Raced wide behind midfield throughout. Kept on well without quickening down of straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Not far off to straight. Dropped out after straightening.
Slightly sluggish at start. Soon picked up under pressure to rear of midfield. Sustained progress down straight to do best work at finish.

Broke with them, showed good dash from widest alley to snag across behind leader, had run of race on leaders back in mid-section 1L away, gained split at mid-point of straight and darted through to snatch win.

Average to begin, settled worse than midfield 2-wide 7Ls away, had easy run to turn, still well back entering straight, made run between runners in straight, no run last 150 M and was unable to be properly tested.

Standard to break, drifted back to rear from wide alley, raced 2-wide 8Ls from leaders in middle part, had field to beat on turning, failed to finish race off with normal dash and only plugged to line.

Average to jump, faded back to worse than midfield on rails 6Ls away, used nothing in mid-section, still had job to do on turning, came with run between horses in straight to close race off fairly without threatening winner.

Broke well, amongst speed battle early but restrained to settle just off pace, raced 1 out 1 back 3Ls away in middle stages, enjoyed good trip to turn, pushed along into straight, lacked dash but closed race evenly to make frame.

Fast into stride, drove through to take up running, raced 1L clear dictating terms in mid-race, still held 1L advantage on turning for home with rest chasing off bit, led until 150 M but unable to go on thereafter.

First to break from wide alley, unable to go on with it and drifted back to midfield, raced 2 and 3-wide 5Ls away for most of journey (hanging), hard ridden with 4-wide run into race on turn, closed fairly after hard run.

Fast into stride, held position on rails early, allowed to relax and finished up midfield 2-wide 4-5Ls away, raced a little tight to turn, swung 3-wide and came with run in straight but lacked dash to figure.

Away with them, showed more speed than usual to be prominent early, raced 3Ls back on rails in mid-section, had easy run to turn, gained split when they turned and improved steadily last 200 M to be right there on line.

Average to begin, showed no early speed and dropped to rear as usual, lobbed along at tail 9-10Ls from pace, still well back on turn, angled to outside and closed swiftly over the top of them to narrowly miss victory.

Jumped with rest, pushed on early to take closer order, assumed spot outside leader (average tempo), relaxed well and had good trip, 1L away on turning, chased hard to be on terms at 200 M but weakened last 100 M.

Slowly into stride, showed no early toe, allowed to relax near enough to last 8Ls from lead, spent no petrol in run, still 8Ls away on turning, followed rails and did best work late to be closest at finish (trip too short).
Towards rear after being trapped wide the first turn. Improved along back straight to be 3Ls down at 1000 M. Found nothing in straight.
Midfield or worse. Ridden along back straight to maintain position. Dropped to the rear rounding home bend and faded away upon straightening.
Towards rear. About 4Ls down turning in. Steadied and shifted out for running 300 M out. Made up some ground final 200 M to secure a distant 2nd.
Led to 400 M. Weakened badly final 300 M. (Lame next day.)
Soon 2 to 3Ls off the pace. Hung out and unbalanced throughout. Hard ridden to hold position in midfield rounding the turn. Soon eased down upon straightening. (Distressed.)
5th or 6th from the first turn but trapped wide. About 3Ls down in 4th from 1200 M. Found nothing in straight and very weak final 200 M.
Very slowly away. At rear. Checked at 800 M. Widest turning in. Made up steady ground without threatening principals in straight.
In touch about 2Ls off the lead. No chance with winner 200 M out and lost 2nd when just plugging on final 100 M.
At rear. About 4Ls back and 4-wide turning in. Ran on stoutly final 300 M to win going away after taking control 200 M out.
Around midfield. Steadied at 600 M and 300 M. Made no impression when in the clear.
At back. Ran past well beaten horses final 200 M.
Midfield or worse. Never a threat in straight and hung in over the closing stages.
Soon 1 out 1 back off the leader. Took lead upon straightening and kept on until effort not sustained inside 200 M.
Ridden forward but trapped wide rounding the first bend and settled 2 to 3Ls off the lead. Steadied at 300 M and remained one-paced thereafter.
Weakened in the run home after being trapped wide, without cover midfield. (Mucopus.)
Handy position on the rails, 2 back, stayed on soundly.
Postponed 2nd last for the trip, ran on satisfactorily.
Tailed out after being in a rearward position for the major part of the race.
Midfield, 1 off, 4 back, worked home well.
Failed to muster speed at the start, last throughout, made some late headway along the inside rail.
Pressured in the lead for the major part of the race, stuck on well.
Settled 3 wide, had cover, midfield struggled over the latter stages.
Wide throughout, midfield no cover, faded in the straight.
Raced outside the leader, lost ground after the 300 M.
Travelled outside the leader, three deep no cover after 600 M, finished off gamely.
Raced behind the leaders along the fence, shifted out on straightening and worked home solidly over the concluding stages.
Fractious in the barriers, missed the start and lost considerable ground. Worked up to be midfield on the fence, steadied at 200 M whilst closing off nicely. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled nicely behind the principals, 1 off, made little headway.
Raced no better than 3-wide at midfield. Switched out prior to straightening and rallied to be closest at finish.
No worse than midfield. Saved ground along the rails at the bend before swinging out on straightening. Quickened nicely and swept past rivals to clinch win final 50 M.
Niggled along at midfield. Checked near 800 M and dropped to rear section. Made no impression in the straight.
Settled at midfield. Lacked a response when asked on straightening and weakened thereafter.
Ridden along to race behind the pace in the early stages. Checked to midfield after 900 M. Never picked up in the straight and weakened closing stages.
Hard pressed to take the lead at 1000 M. Took a length's advantage into the straight. Fought hard to maintain lead but was headed by principals inside final 100 M.
Slowly away and raced in rear section until straightening. Checked at 400 M when attempting to make a run. Made up some late ground.
Jumped awkwardly but soon recovered to midfield. Checked and dropped to rear section at 800 M. Near the back on straightening. Made up ground in the straight and was closest at finish.
