Contended for the early lead. 3-wide behind the pace making home turn. Kept on fairly but unable to turn up a notch in the closing stages.
Jumped well from a wide draw and raced better than midfield. Improved gradually at the home turn and ran on well in the straight for a minor placing.
Among leaders early. Settled 2-wide behind the pace at the bend. Kept on well in the straight and ran down the early leader near 150 M. Unable to hold off a late charging rival near the finish.
Ridden along to be in a forward position. Settled prominently behind leader making the turn. Failed to keep pace on straightening and steadily dropped out.
Off slowly and trailed field until home straight. Only ran past tired runners.
Jumped only fairly from widest draw and steadily dropped to rear section. Niggled along to improve at the bend and kept on fairly to make up ground in the straight.
Soon switched from wide gate to take 4-back on fence position worse than midfield about 5Ls off speed until home turn, stayed on only evenly.
Prominent but 3-wide no cover early, soon got cover and 2Ls down in 3rd at 800 M, 1L down in 2nd at top of homestretch and 200 M out, kept on dourly to lead inside final strides.
Raced 3-deep and 8Ls last down the backstretch, still well behind and 4-wide turning for home, made up a little ground past tired rivals. (See Racing Incidents.)
3-back on fence about 3Ls or 4Ls off speed in midfield through to home turn when driven along, stayed on fairly well for a place.
2-wide and no better than midfield about 5Ls from the lead from 1200 M to home turn, made some minor late ground without really threatening.
Slowly away, pressed on out 3-wide no cover to lead at 900 M, 1L clear turning for home and at 200 M, grabbed by winner a few strides from post.
Always prominent but left 3-wide no cover when 2Ls off speed in 5th at 800 M, similarly placed turning for home and at 200 M, tired through concluding stages.
3-wide with cover and 5Ls off speed in 10th at 1000 M, 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home and same margin behind, plugged on slowly.
Slowly away, always behind at least 7Ls off pace until the 100 M, tailed off in home straight. (Heart irregularity.)
Always in rear bunch and never better than 5Ls or 6Ls off pace at any stage.
Didn't break fluently, keen at 1000 M when 3-wide with cover in midfield about 4Ls off speed, no closer turning for home, always held by principals.
Soon led by 1L on fence, headed at 900 M, 1L down in 3rd and toiling at top of homestretch, dropped out very quickly.
Well placed but keen early 2-wide and 3Ls back in 6th, niggled along at 600 M and 4Ls down and struggling taking home turn, faded out.
Stumbled at start, recovered to take box run on fence about 2Ls off speed through to home turn in 4th or 5th, plugged on at same pace.
Mostly 3-wide with cover in mid-division about 4Ls off speed until the 600 M, 5Ls down taking home turn, stayed on only evenly.
1L off pace on fence in 2nd at 800 M, soon began to over-race a little, 3Ls down and vying for 2nd place off home turn, one-paced and lost out on a place inside final 50 M.
Slow to begin, 3-wide with cover and no closer than 6Ls off pace towards rear until home turn, stayed on very modestly.
Slowest away by about 3Ls, on fence 7Ls back in 12th at 800 M, struggling to lie up into homestretch, faded out sharply and eased down, performance deemed unacceptable.
4-wide no cover in rear and at least 8Ls off pace through to home straight entrance, never a factor.
Unbalanced at start, always towards rear at least 7Ls behind through to 600 M mark, faded out rapidly in home straight.
Never travelled well, pushed along to stay within 5Ls off the pace in 10th at 800 M, always struggling to hold position thereafter.
Led out wide at 1000 M, crossed to fence at 800 M to be 2Ls clear, skipped 3Ls clear off final bend, tired a little close home but never looked like being caught.
3-wide no cover at 800 M when over 2Ls behind in 4th, driven along to keep at 600 M, 4Ls down in 4th at top of homestretch, made some nice late ground but never threatened winner.
Midfield early about 5Ls off pace, further back turning for home, stayed on best (bar quinella pair) for a distant 3rd.
Slowly away, 8Ls last early on, further behind taking final bend, made some minor late ground past a few very tired rivals.
Best away, shared early lead but headed at 900 M and over 3Ls down in 2nd taking final bend, had every chance of filling a place but faded inside final 100 M.
Settled 2-wide in midfield about 4Ls off speed in midfield through to 600 M out when pushed along to keep up, dropped out tamely in homestretch.
3-back on fence about 4Ls behind leader in midfield at 800 M, slightly further back entering home straight, failed to quicken up.
Forward of midfield but trapped wide. One-paced in straight.
Ridden forward along rail to take up running from 1200 M. Hung in and rider dropped rein 300 M out. No extra final 200 M.
In touch early. Midfield or better after steadying at 1200 M. Already struggling rounding home bend. Eased down a long way out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped best despite awkward break. 2Ls back at 1400 M. Improved swiftly 1100 M out to be within 1L off the lead from 1000 M. Weakened badly 200 M out.
Unbalanced at start but soon in midfield or better. 1 to 2Ls back from 1200 M. Ran on 300 M out and looked a real chance until effort not sustained 100 M out.
Always in touch just 1 to 2Ls off the pace. Ran on determinedly final 300 M but always held by the winner inside 200 M.
Ridden forward to lead. Headed at 1200 M. Re-gained lead 250 M out but unable to dash home with the top pair final 200 M and lost 3rd close home.
Crowded at start. Towards rear. About 4Ls back at 1000 M. Improved along rail 800 M out to be 2Ls down turning in. Ran on well final 300 M and held off rivals after hitting front 200 M out.
Knuckled on jumping. Midfield or worse from 1400 M. Made up steady ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Last turning in. Ran past very tired horses in straight.
At back. Never looked likely. (Blood and see Racing Incidents.)
Disputed early lead before settling 1L off the pace from 1200 M. Gave ground on the turn and well beaten 400 M out.
Towards rear. Checked off heels at 1100 M. Never looked likely. (Displaced soft palate.)
Lost ground at start after bounding in air. Proved difficult to settle when behind midfield at 1100 M. Dropped out tamely soon upon straightening.
Settled mainly in 5th some 2Ls off the pace. Did not find much room early in straight. Finished off race well inside final 250 M but winner too good. (Sore suspensory ligament.)
Settled just worse than midfield. Quickened to hit front over 200 M out only to be swamped close to home.
Always struggling in last few and never seen with a chance.
Settled in last few. Commenced move turning in and switched out for a clear run upon straightening. Fought on under pressure to gain upper hand over 100 M out.
Waited with. Came with a strong late run inside final 400 M to snatch 3rd place close to home.
Soon took up running. Led until joined into straight. Unable to sustain effort and swamped over 200 M out.
Never far of before improving to close-up 4th rounding home bend. Gradually weakened after straightening.
Broke well. Settled in 2nd just off the pace. Disputed lead briefly turning in. Soon dropped out.
Never far off before joining leaders briefly approaching home turn. Dropped out into straight.

Good speed from gates, hard ridden to assume spot outside leader, raced 1 to 2Ls away without cover to turn, under pressure to keep touch on straightening, gradually weakened right out in straight. Ground may have been a factor.

Broke fairly, showed no speed and allowed to settle rearward from wide alley, raced next to last on rails 8Ls away, began to make run on turn, came between horses in straight but could only pass tired runners in run home.

Began fairly, restrained and allowed to relax in 2 wide spot just off midfield, raced 6Ls away between horses throughout (over-racing), pushed along to make ground into straight, made a little ground without threatening. Fair debut.

Bounced out first, pressed forward from outside alley to cross to lead (did some work), kept them rolling at a good speed in mid-section, kicked 2Ls clear at 400 M, kept fighting and defied all until the shadows of the post.
Began well, amongst them early, drifted back to midfield, raced 2 wide 5Ls away between horses, pushed along to make ground on turn, unable to find another gear in straight and only plugged to line.
Broke with rest, drove through from inside draw to hold spot 3 back on fence, had good trip 2Ls away and travelled well on turn, got clear at 300 M and chased solidly to score right on line.
Average to begin, unable to go with them early, settled down 6Ls away, 3 wide with cover for most of journey, still well back on straightening, kept trying making some ground but never a real factor.

Fast into stride, led them early before taking a sit behind leader 1L away, enjoyed run of race in mid-section, flat out chasing at 400 M when clear run presented, kept giving to 100 M but couldn't match them last bit.
Slow to begin, gave them 5Ls early, raced in last spot 12Ls away, always hard ridden to keep in touch, made no impression in straight remaining at rear to be well beaten.

Broke with line, pressed forward to take up prominent spot 1 out 1 back 3Ls away, had dream run in mid-section, travelled well to turn, eased out at 400 M but lacked usual dash and simply kept on at same clip to line.

Jumped with them, caught wide from awkward alley, raced 3 wide without cover in midfield 5Ls away, always working in run, flat out to hold spot on turn, unable to show anything in straight and plodded to line.

Jumped with them, lacked early speed, settled down on rails worse than midfield 5Ls away, kept improving on rails throughout, still 5 to 6Ls back on turning, made up considerable ground late on rails to narrowly miss.

Bumped shortly after start and lost momentum, settled at rear 9Ls away, raced 3 wide from 800 M mark, improved on turn and came widest into straight, made up large amount of ground from impossible spot to be closest at finish.

Slow to begin, settled down near rear on rails 8Ls off pace, never really comfortable in going and niggled along on turn, followed paint in straight but dropped out at 250 M. (Mucopus, see Racing Incidents.)
In rear to straight. Switched out for a run upon straightening and made moderate progress under pressure down centre of track.
Settled on rails in midfield. Soon faded after straightening.
Never seen with a chance.
Prominent early. Took up running before home bend and led until finding no extra under pressure passing 200 M.

Ridden for pace early from poor draw. Settled 3-wide in 5th some 2-1/2Ls off the lead. Commenced move turning in and quickened well to hold some chance passing 200 M but unable to peg winner throughout closing stages.
Tracked leaders in 3rd place on rails. Switched out for a run upon straightening and hit front passing 200 M. Fought on well to deny runner-up's strong late challenge and just prevailed.
Settled in midfield. Lost position rounding home bend and was in last few into straight. Produced good late impression running past beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening.
Prominent before losing some ground rounding home bend. Kept on same pace into straight but weakened 200 M out.
Raced wide at around midfield. Only kept on steadily without quickening under pressure in straight.
Well back. Kept on same pace under pressure in straight without quickening.
Led early. Settled in 2nd outside leader. Gradually weakened inside final 300 M.

Broke with rest, didn't show enough dash to slot in, posted 3 wide without cover 4Ls away, always working in mid-section, came 4 wide at 500 M, handled turn awkwardly, cruised passed them when balanced up to score easily.

Jumped with field, pushed hard to be closer than usual, 1 out 1 back 3Ls away from pace, closed with 4 wide run on turn tackling leaders, failed to go on with it from 300 M and only kept same pace to line. (See Racing Incidents.)

Awkward to begin but quickly got going to hold midfield spot, raced 2 wide 5Ls from lead, raced fiercely in middle stages, tracked well to turn, came with run between horses in straight but failed to keep on last bit.

Jumped in air and lost ground, niggled along to hold closer position 4 back on rails 6Ls away, not asked in middle stages, under pressure on turning, stuck to rails but made hard work of it last 200 M and unable to close race off.

Fair to begin, allowed to relax and settle worse than midfield, raced 2 wide 6 to 7Ls away a little further back than usual, still had job to do on turn, switched to outside and closed race off fairly doing best work late.

Jumped with them, raced a little closer than usual 3 back on fence 4Ls from lead, had soft run in mid-section, used nothing to turn, gained dream split at 300 M, tried hard but was unable to make an impression.
Standard to begin, drifted back to assume usual role near rear, raced on rails 8Ls away for most of journey, used nothing to turn, held up early in straight, closed race off well when clear.

Away with field, niggled along to drive through to share lead on inside, made use of to keep 1/2L advantage on turning, was unable to offer any resistance at business end and weakened right out late. (Mucopus.)
Broke with them, allowed to drift back from wide alley to settle at rear, raced 3 wide with cover 8Ls away, still had field to beat on turn, closed race off evenly passing a few tired runners late.
Jumped well, unable to slot in for cover early, trapped 4 wide facing the breeze 4Ls away, always wide and working to turn, hard ridden in straight and gradually lost touch after hard run.

Awkward to begin, soon mustered speed to hold spot behind leader 2Ls away, had fair trip in mid-section, angled 3 wide into clear on turning and claimed them at 250 M, kept on strongly but was no match for winner.

Away with rest, unable to slot in close to rails, raced 3 wide with cover worse than midfield (over-racing), struggling on turn, swung wide into straight but never comfortable in going and not ridden out last 200 M.

Fast into stride, unable to go on with it early, settled down 3 wide with cover in midfield 4 to 5Ls from pace, always working to turn, tracked nicely in straight and closed race off well to narrowly miss 3rd place.

Fastest to leave gates, made use of the race to lead (didn't fully cross), raced off rails with 1/2L advantage in mid-section, began to struggle on turning for home, offered nothing when asked and stopped quickly to be well beaten.
Behind midfield despite being ridden along early. Towards rear some 10Ls back at 800 M. Not a factor in straight.
Jumped best but soon outpaced to midfield at 1000 M. About 4Ls back and wide turning in. Hung in and found nothing in straight.
Lost considerable ground after jumping awkwardly. At least 10Ls back at 1000 M. Still 8Ls down turning in. Made up a lot of ground final 250 M but simply had too much to do.
Soon dropped to the rear from wide draw. Never travelled and got well detached rounding the bend. (Lame next day.)
Soon midfield despite being ridden along. Checked at 800 M. Tailed off rounding the turn.
Led or disputed lead early before sitting 2 to 3Ls off the speed from 900 M. Made up good ground 300 M out to secure a distant 2nd final 100 M.
Prominent early. Dropped back to midfield or worse from 900 M and hung out. Widest turning in. Very weak in straight.
Slow into stride. Towards rear throughout. Hung out at 800 M. Never looked likely.
Soon led on rail. Headed 900 M out but maintained position just 1/2L back. Every chance turning in but unable to find an extra gear final 250 M and lost 2nd inside 100 M.
Prominent. 2Ls off the pace rounding home bend. Kept on without threatening in straight before weakened inside 200 M.
Prominent. 2 to 3Ls off the speed from 800 M. Took closer order along rail turning in. Found nothing in straight before weakened final 200 M.
Went forward from wide alley and took lead 900 M out. Kept on well in straight and drew clear to win easily final 250 M.

Lost ground at start. Recovered to be around midfield at 1000 M. Checked at 800 M. Improved along rail rounding home bend to be 3Ls down turning in. Kept on steadily in straight despite having to steady 300 M out.
Slowly away. Ridden forward along rail to be 3Ls back at 900 M. Dropped to midfield after checking at 800 M. Soon faded after straightening.
Began awkwardly, no early pace, worked to the line well although incurred to lay out under pressure.
Ridden in forward division, struggled after the 500 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced with leaders early along the inside, tired noticeably after the 400 M. (Mucopus.)
Last throughout, passed tired horses over the concluding stages.
Showed some early pace but was beaten passing 300 M.
Never likely after racing off the speed.
Raced just off the speed, ridden along inside the 300 M, maintained in same position to line.
Checked at the start and settled midfield. Worked home soundly.
Led along the outside fence, looked like the winner but commenced to drift inward the last 50 M when tiring.
Positioned with the leaders but faded over the final stages.
Displayed good early speed from gates but weakened in the run home.
Was in a handy position, checked near the 300 M and hung out for the remainder of the race.
Settled off the speed, did little.
Began awkwardly and was bumped at the start. Recovered well, maintained a prominent position and ran to the line strongly. Raced greenly and indicated good potential.
Settled behind midfield. Quickened only fairly on straightening before getting held up in traffic and was not tested over the final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in a rearward position until 700 M. Switched out and improved to midfield in a 4-wide position. Only kept on same pace in the straight.
Behind midfield. Steadily lost ground after 700 M and trailed field into home straight. Only ran past a few beaten runners.
Wide into first turn and travelled no worse than midfield. Checked to the rear near 400 M and never recovered.
Ridden out of the gates and took the lead after 1400 M mark. Maintained a 2Ls advantage into home straight. Lead diminishing over the final 200 M and was caught at the line.
Settled prominently behind the pace. Continued to hound leader in the home straight before running it down close to the wire.
Settled near the back before switching out wide to improve after 500 M. Made up some ground on straightening but unable to sustain effort over the final stages.
Raced wide and without cover in a forward spot. Ridden along and was 3Ls off the pace at home bend. Weakened steadily in the home straight.

Slightly slow out of the gates. Raced along the rails at midfield. Shuffled back at the bend and was behind midfield on straightening. Held up for some distance after 300 M but finished strongly after finding daylight.

Ridden along out of the gates and was checked going into first turn. Kept within 3Ls of the leader in back straight. Responded only fairly when pressured after 500 M and did not find much in the straight.
Raced on fence at midfield. Continued well despite hanging in the straight and made the frame.
Botched the start and trailed field. Remained towards the rear on straightening and only ran past tired runners in the straight.
Caught wide in midfield going into first turn. 3-wide along back straight and was hard ridden to keep pace at home turn. Made no impression in the straight.
Pressed forward and raced close to the leader. Struggled to keep up making home turn and dropped out quickly in the straight. (Heart irregularity.)
Always close up and not much worse than 1L off pace in 2nd or 3rd through to home straight, had every chance to win but lacked the dash.
Niggled along to hold 5th place 3Ls off speed at 1100 M, 5Ls down in midfield and hard ridden off final bend, weakened out tamely.
Switched from wide gate closer to fence, 8Ls off pace in rear at 1000 M, always well behind.
Slowest away, driven along in 12th about 8Ls off speed at 1200 M, marginally closer turning for home, plugged on and never dangerous.
Niggled along when 4Ls back in 6th at 1200 M, 5Ls down and hard pressed in midfield taking home turn, fell back very quickly and beaten a long way, unacceptable performance.
Led on fence 1400 M out, headed at 1000 M and settled into box-seat position 2Ls off pace in 3rd or so until home turn, given every hope to at least place, didn't fire.
3-wide no cover when 6Ls back in 9th with 1100 M to go, further back and struggling turning for home, soon eased down, unacceptable performance.
Bumped at start, always about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in midfield, kept on dourly in homestretch without really threatening to place.
Dropped out last on fence between 7Ls and 9Ls behind pace until home turn, made some fair late ground on the fence, nearest at finish.
Disputed lead out 3-wide no cover at 1200 M, led at 1000 M, 1L clear on fence from 800 M to home turn, still 1L clear and looked like hanging on before being grabbed final 20 M.
Mostly 4th about 2Ls or 3Ls off speed until home turn when had ridden, had every chance to place but just too one-paced.
2-wide and 5Ls down in 8th at 1100 M, further back and struggling turning for home, soon eased down, unacceptable performance.
2-wide and 6Ls back in 10th at 1000 M, no closer taking final turn, very weak.
Always travelled well but 6Ls back towards rear at 1100 M, 5Ls back in midfield swinging for home, ran on well to hit lead in last few bounds.
3 and 4-wide sometimes without cover down backstretch in midfield or better about 2Ls or 3Ls behind leaders, 2Ls down in 4th but under pressure taking home turn, one-paced.
Awkward break and soon one from rear about 5Ls off the lead, still in 13th taking home turn, kept on fairly inside final 200 M, nearest at finish without really threatening to place.
Driven early to take good position 2-wide and about 2Ls off pace in 3rd, still well there taking home turn, faded out quickly.
Keen early on and without cover about 4Ls off speed in mid-pack, hung out on the circle and 5-wide (widest of all) off home turn when over 2Ls back, kept on at same pace.
3-wide with cover worse than midfield through first half, 4Ls back in 10th taking home turn out 4-wide, 2Ls down in mid-division at 200 M and chances of placing, one-paced thereafter.
Soon in last place about 6Ls off speed, 5Ls last taking home turn, a little short of room close home but always outpaced.
Soon led and crossed to fence to lead by 1L at 1000 M, headed at 800 M but disputing lead again at top of homestretch, led 300 M by 1L, always doing enough to win.
Box run on fence about 2Ls off speed in 3rd or 4th until tackling home corner, stayed on fairly well and just edged out of the money.
Lost some ground at start, 4-back on fence and towards rear no closer than 4Ls off speed until home turn, one-paced finish on the fence but never really got a clear crack at them.
Disputed lead out 3-wide no cover early on, led at 800 M out 2-wide, joined by winner at top of home straight, beaten over 200 M out.
3-wide with cover in midfield or slightly worse about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace until home turn, finished off well but winner was too strong.
3 to 4Ls back on fence and a little keen early on about 4Ls of pace in midfield, closer but short of room turning for home, held up from 300 M to 200 M, never got a proper crack at them.
2-wide and always worse than midfield between 4Ls and 5Ls behind lead, hard pressed on home turn, always well held.
2-wide about 3Ls off pace in midfield until home turn, close enough to win if good enough but only did just enough for a place.
Soon led. Headed 200 M out. No extra.
Jumped best before dropping back to behind midfield or a little worse from 1200 M. Made up some ground final 200 M to just miss a distant 3rd.
Bounded at start. Niggled along and improved steadily from rear to midfield at 1000 M. 2Ls or so down turning in. Kept on steadily in straight and was not far from a remote 3rd.
Soon dropped towards rear from wide draw. Never a factor in straight.
Dropped to the rear from wide draw. Made up some ground down the centre of track in straight without looking dangerous.
Midfield or better. One-paced in straight.
In touch between 1 to 2Ls off the lead to home straight. Faded away quickly final 300 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield or a little worse. Kept on in straight until effort not sustained final 100 M.
Midfield early. Swift headway from 1100 M to park outside the leader 1000 M out. Every chance turning in but dropped quickly out of contention final 200 M.
Jumped well. Soon settled in midfield or better. About 3Ls back at 600 M. Responded well in straight and took control despite hanging in final 100 M.
Towards rear. One-paced in straight.
Niggled along early to be 1 to 2Ls behind the speed. Ran on final 400 M and hit front 200 M out before getting outsprinted by the winner final 100 M.
Soon 2-back on rail around 2Ls off the pace. Kept on in straight until effort not sustained 100 M out but just managed to hold on to a remote 3rd.
Lost ground after awkward jump. Raced greenly at rear whilst proving difficult to settle. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Broke well. Chased leaders. Unable to sustain effort over 200 M out. Kept on steadily from there without threatening.
Made all to win unchallenged.
Well back. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Soon dropped to the back and always struggling.
Prominent to straight. Soon weakened.
Settled towards rear. Kept on steadily down inside of straight running past beaten horses.
Did not jump well. Niggled along in rear of midfield early. Gained closer order on rails turning in. Fought on steadily to reach 2nd without threatening passing 200 M.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Soon dropped to last few and never seen with a chance.
Mainly in forward of midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Sluggish at start. Ridden to midfield before home bend. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Midfield. Improved around home bend to be 3rd into straight. Kept on without quickening.
Out fairly from gate, raced behind speed in middle of track 3Ls back, began to finish off well at 300 M, weaved between horses and came strongly to grab 2nd on line.
Began fairly, unable to go speed early and settled 4Ls off pace, raced behind speed in outer mid section, couldn't find at business end and made no impression.
Awkward to begin, hard ridden to assume spot close to stand side 3 to 4Ls away, under pressure from 400 M, gradually lost touch and faded out of it.
Fast into stride, showed pace to be leading early in outer mid-section, flat out to make a challenge at 200 M 1/2L down, rallied strongly under hard riding to hit lead at 100 M and score solid win.
Broke with rest, showed good dash to settle behind speed 2Ls away, nursed along to 300 M, unable to find another gear in run home but stuck on gamely all the same.
Slow to begin, hard pressed to go with them early, raced 4 to 5Ls away at tail, began to close off fairly, last 400 M making up some good ground. Did best work late.

Average to jump, raced in middle of track from inside draw, 2 to 3Ls away throughout, struggling at 400 M, began to work home solidly and made good ground from 200 M. Did best work late finding trip a bit short.
Broke evenly, showed some speed to be 3Ls away on stand side, began to struggle 300 M from home, weakened right out of it late. (Soft palate displacement.)
Away well, kept up early to be 1L away on stand side, shared lead at midpoint, unable to keep on when asked and only battled to line at same pace. (Cut Hock and lost plate.)
Bounced out well, up contending lead early 1L away, in middle of track, kept on giving but flat out at 300 M, unable to go on and weakened out of it late.
Jumped fairly, raced on rails side in worst going, kept in touch early, kept finding in the last 300 M, did a good job to finish not far back given run.
Awkward to break, mustered speed to lead near outside rail at mid-point, held 1/2L advantage at 300 M, kept fighting and stuck on solidly to make frame.
Even beginning, allowed to race on rail side from inside draw, struggling at mid-point in worst going, got another go on last 200 M and made ground to not be beaten too far.
Out with rest, pushed along to keep with the 2Ls away, crowded at 600 M, began to struggle thereafter, offered little when asked and dropped right out to be beaten a long way.
Prominent far side. Dropped out steadily from around home bend.
Settled at the back. Did not find room behind runners early in straight. Only produced moderate impression late.
Well back. Produced some late impression past beaten horses down centre of track in closing stages.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Led to 200 M. Found no extra under pressure and quickly overhauled.
Chased leaders to straight. Dropped away quickly after straightening.
Mainly in midfield to straight when forced to steady early. Obtained run on inside of track but only kept on at the same pace under pressure.
Midfield early. Took closer order rounding home bend. Gained 3rd just behind leaders turning in. Switched off rails to challenge holding good chance closing stages but winner too good.
Raced wide throughout. Settled in last few to straight. Ran on steadily down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Close up 4-wide early. Disputed lead rounding home bend. Hit front passing 200 M gaining half a length advantage only to be pipped at post.
Raced behind midfield most of way. Kept on same pace in straight. (Bled.)
Settled towards rear. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish when slightly baulked.
Settled in midfield on rails. Angled off rails for a run upon straightening and ran on well to gain upper hand final strides.

(Lost rider in Prelim), broke only fairly, unable to go with them early, raced 2 wide 8Ls away at tail, made 3 wide run but still next to last turning, made a little ground down outside in straight to be closest at finish.

Average to begin, drifted back to settle just worse than midfield, raced 3 wide with cover 6Ls away, struggling to make run on turn, unable to find another gear on turn and closed off fairly without threatening.
Broke with them, pressed on early to take up spot 3 to 4Ls away on fence, used nothing in run, had dream run present on turning, unable to capitalise and only managed to keep same pace to line.

Average to jump away, allowed to drift back to midfield, trapped 4 wide and overracing, allowed to slide forward to race 3 wide without cover 3Ls away, began to struggle on turn, weakened right out after hard run.

Slow to begin, lacked early toe and settled at rear on rails 9Ls away, lobbed along at tail throughout, followed rails in straight, didn't have to go round a horse, made solid ground to be closest at finish.

Broke well, showed good dash to cross and lead them easily, dictated terms and set slow speed in front, held 1L advantage on turning, showed some kick but was a spent force when tackled at the 250 M. Lost touch thereafter.
Jumped only fairly, allowed to settle closer with slow speed, raced 1 out 1 back for most of journey 3 to 4Ls away, angled into clear but didn't close race off as usually would. (Rider questioned.)

Average to begin, hard ridden to drive through to midfield spot on rails 5Ls away, overraced under slow speed, followed rails and made run between horses at 300 M, closed fairly but was no match for winner.
Began with rest, hard ridden to assume role outside leader, had easy run with slow speed 2Ls away without cover, under hard riding on turning, gradually faded out from 300 M to be well beaten.
Standard break, lacked early toe, raced in midfield 2 wide 5Ls away from pace, never really comfortable and was hard ridden on turning, made no ground in straight and only plodded to line.

Awkward to begin, mustered some toe to slide forward without cover, unable to get in and raced 3 wide with cover from 1200 M, had even run thereafter, asked for effort on turning and didn't show usual dash. (Lame morning after).
Only average to jump, showed no early pace, raced worse than midfield 7 to 8Ls from speed, made run between horses in straight, made up good ground down middle of track to make frame.

Bounced out from gates, showed more speed than usual to assume role behind leader, enjoyed run of race in mid-section, angled clear on turning, surged to lead when balanced and drew away under hard riding for an easy win.
Slowly away. Behind midfield from 1200 M. Checked at 400 M. Ran past very tired horses final 200 M.
Prominent. Steadied off heels and then proved difficult to settle behind the leader from 1300 M. Unable to quicken in straight and weakened close home.
In touch early. 2 to 3Ls off the pace in midfield from 1200 M. Ran on determinedly in straight to take charge 50 M out despite hanging in.
Led until collared by the winner 50 M out but did enough to secure 2nd. (See Racing Incidents.)
2nd from 1200 M after getting trapped wide the 1st turn. Just a neck down along back straight. Nothing left 100 M out.
Lost ground at start. Behind midfield about 4Ls back after steadying off heels 1200 M out. Held up at 400 M and again turning in. Made up some ground final 200 M for a distant 3rd.
Slow into stride. At rear. Steadied at 400 M. Never a factor in straight.
At rear. Widest turning in. Made up a little late ground.
Travelled prominently just 1L off the pace from 1200 M. Kept on one-paced in straight and lost out on a remote 3rd close home.
Midfield or better. Shifted off rail for running in straight and kept on without posing any major threat to principals.
Mainly in touch whilst being trapped wide and without cover throughout. 1L back in 3rd from 1000 M. Dropped quickly out of contention soon after straightening.
Towards rear. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Never relaxed when racing outside the leader, inclined to lay in over the last 250 M and had to be checked near the 200 M when tiring.
Raced on the rails, 6L back, found nothing in the straight.
Pressured in the lead throughout, held on gamely.
Raced off the speed, 2 deep with cover, failed to finish off.
Stalked the leaders, 3 deep with cover from the 800 M. Dour in the straight.
Settled midfield 1 off, made wide run from the 500 M and finished off well.
Followed the eventual winner, raced on the rails, midfield 4 back, finished off with strong late rally after being held up until the 200 M.
Positioned 3 back along the fence, shifted around the leader near the 300 M, held on for narrow win.
Travelled 1 off with cover in rear division, 6Ls from leaders, worked home without ever threatening.
Raced at the rear of the field, never a factor.
Raced 3 deep, no cover with the front runners, commenced to weaken passing the 300 M.
Raced at the tail of the field for most of the trip. Ran home solidly after being slowly away.
3-wide at midfield before striding forward to race 2-wide behind the leaders. Kept on fairly in the straight despite hanging in over the final 200 M.
Led briefly early stages. Settled behind the leader after 1300 M and remained in that position until home straight. Remained boxed-in over the final 200 M and was not properly tested.
Settled behind midfield. Made up ground in a 4-wide position making the turn. Continued well on straightening and swept to the lead at 200 M.
No better than midfield. 3-wide at midfield making home turn. Steadied and had to alter course near 200 M and then closed the race off well.
Steadily moved into a forward position. Raced alongside the leader from 1200 M until final 200 M. Swamped thereafter.
Dropped to a rearward position from wide draw and trailed field. Remained near the back and swung out on straightening. Rallied strongly and made up good ground in the straight.
Off slowly and settled in a rearward position. Trailed field into home straight and only ran past a beaten runner.
Ridden along and took the lead at 1400 M. Held a narrow advantage heading into home straight and kept the lead until 200 M. Steadily faded out of contention thereafter.
Better than midfield but was wide and without cover. 3-wide outside the leader making home turn and only one-paced in the straight.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Struggled to keep pace at the bend and found nothing in the straight.
Crossed to the fence and settled behind midfield. Gradually switched out after straightening and made up some ground closing stages.
Settled on fence at midfield. Caught in heavy traffic over the final 200 M and was never tested.
Best away and soon settled into box-seat position on fence 2Ls off pace, niggled along turning into home straight, had every possible chance to at least place but failed.
3-back on fence in midfield about 3Ls off pace until straightening for the line, stayed on reasonably for a place but never looked like winning.
2-wide in midfield early on, slipped further back to 5Ls down in 9th until home turn, made some minor late ground but never dangerous.
3-wide with cover in rear early on, always in rear group no closer than 5Ls off pace from 800 M to home turn, weakened thereafter.
Slow to begin, much too keen early and threw head about with 700 M to go when about 4Ls in rear group, offered nothing in homestretch.
Close up early on within 2Ls off pace , checked 600 M out and left 3-wide no cover at 500 M, hampered turning for home, one-paced in the finish.
Right on pace but trapped 5-wide no cover from bad draw early, pressed on to dispute the front out 2-wide at 600 M, over 1L down in 2nd at home turn, nothing left in homestretch.
Crossed to fence to lead marginally 800 M out, 1L clear taking home turn and skipped 2Ls in front at 200 M, caught 50 M out by winner and hung on for 2nd.
Slow to begin, worse than midfield no better than 4Ls off pace until home turn, picked up very well to lead 50 M out despite hanging in, nice win.
Fractious in gates, slowest to start, about 5Ls or 6Ls last or one from last until home turn, stayed on only fairly along the fence in the stretch.
3-wide with cover early in front rank, 2-wide and about 3Ls down in 4th taking final bend, found nothing off the bridle.
3-wide with cover in midfield or so and no closer than 3Ls to the lead down the back, pushed wider and under pressure at 500 M, 4-wide into home straight, no gears.
3-wide no cover at 1100 M in 2nd place, 2-wide and 2Ls down in 2nd at 800 M, a neck back at home turn and all out to be a head down with 200 M to go, no extra and missed a place.
About 7Ls back in 10th at 1100 M, marginally closer but still in rear bunch tackling final bend, made some fair late ground but always held.
5Ls down in 7th at 1200 M, a little closer but still in 7th off home turn, had enough room on fence to quicken up if good enough before the gap closed 100 M out, not ridden out from then on.
4Ls back in 6th at 1100 M, much the same position until home turn, kept on fairly well for a place.
Slowest away, 7Ls down in 9th at 1000 M, under pressure to improve from the back when hitting the homestretch, didn't manage it.
About 9Ls last and 2-wide early, sent on 3-wide no cover at 700 M, 3-wide turning for home when about 5Ls down in 9th, stayed on well out wide for a place but too late to win.
2-wide and 2Ls down in 4th at 1100 M, under pressure rounding the turn, unable to dash home with principals final 100 M.
6Ls down in 8th at 1100 M, 5Ls back in 8th off final bend, one-paced.
Away well and crossed from wide gate to lead on fence 1300 M out, only a neck to the good into home straight, headed over 100 M out and swamped in closing stages.
Began slowest, soon 8Ls off speed in rear, not much closer on straightening, never dangerous.
3Ls down on fence in 5th at 1100 M, similarly placed taking home turn, ordinary finish and just a bit one-paced.
Box run on fence from 1200 M about 2Ls off pace in 3rd, ideally placed throughout, switched out at top of home straight to lead 100 M out, held on.
Soon at rear. Kept on without posing any threat in straight and tired close home.
Tracked leader on rail from 1200 M. Kept on in straight until effort not sustained 100 M out.
Towards rear. Checked at 600 M when the tank was already empty.
Virtually made all after going forward from wide alley to take up running about 1400 M out.
Soon forward of midfield about 3Ls off the speed despite stumbling after start. 2Ls down from 400 M. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Slow into stride. Mainly towards rear. 6Ls or so back at 1000 M. 4Ls down turning in. Made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon 2nd just 1L outside the leader. Hung in upon straightening. Kept on without threatening the winner and lost 2nd after being bumped by the 2nd horse close home.
Soon dropped to the rear from wide alley. Held up when 4Ls back and wide after straightening. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Midfield or better about 3Ls off the lead. 2Ls down rounding the bend. Kept finding in straight to grab 2nd after bumping the 3rd horse close home.
Towards rear and checked passing winning post the 1st time. Unbalanced when close to heels 700 M out. Improved out wide to midfield rounding the turn. One-paced in straight.
Thereabout whilst being trapped wide and without cover. Faded quickly 200 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon behind midfield and trapped wide the 1st turn. About 5Ls back at 1000 M. Took closer order rounding the turn. Unable to quicken in straight.
Slowly away. Settled at the back. Ran on under pressure down centre of straight to do best work at finish.
Jumped fairly. Took up running passing winning post the first time, crossing to rails rounding stable bend. Held 1L advantage turning in and held on under pressure to the line.

Speed early. Joint leader when steadied pace on rails approaching winning post the first time. Raced keenly some 2Ls off leader rounding stable bend. Gave ground gradually from around Rock. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled just off the pace on rails. Came to challenge upon straightening and only produced moderate progress in the run home.
Wide in midfield early. Circled field around 1000 M bend to hit front briefly early in back straight. Still disputing lead entering home straight but ran home one-paced.
Wide throughout. Towards rear early. Took closer order coming off Rock gaining prominent position into straight. Soon faded.
Settled in last few to straight. Did not find much room behind runners early on. Produced late impression closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Joint leader when steadied pace approaching winning post the first time. Raced wide around midfield far side and remained similar into straight. Ran home one-paced. (See Racing Incidents.)
Steadied approaching winning post the first time. Remained mainly in midfield to straight. No extra.
Checked on rails passing winning post the first time. Remained largely in midfield on rails most of way. One-paced in straight.
Wide in midfield early. Improved to prominent position turning into back straight. Held 5th some 2-1/2Ls back entering home straight. Kept on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Behind midfield when checked and lost position rounding stable bend. Remained in rear to straight and ran home one-paced.

Broke with rest, allowed to stride forward in search of closer position, unable to slot in and trapped 3-wide without cover for most of race, always working to turn 1L down, challenged final 200 M and stuck neck out on line.

Jumped with line, allowed to take sit behind leader without working early, enjoyed run of race in mid-section, used nothing to turn, pushed along into straight, couldn't dash with them and only kept going same clip to line.

Broke with rest, unable to match them early and allowed to drift back into midfield, raced 3-wide with cover 5Ls away, always working and made 4 to 5-wide run on turn, unable to make impression in straight and kept on at same pace.

Crowded early, settled at tail of field on rails 7-8Ls from front runners, not asked in middle stages, still had job to do turning for home, followed rails in straight, unable to find another gear and plodded to line.

Began only fairly, allowed to drift back to worse than midfield, raced 3 back on rails 3-4Ls away throughout, bumped rail at 1200 M, had good run to turn, angled into clear at 250 M and chased hard but unable to get closer.

Lost ground on jumping, unable to muster early speed, settled just of midfield 2-wide 4-5Ls away, angled wider on turn and swung 4-wide in straight, finished race off hard in centre of track to make frame.

First into stride, allowed to press forward early, slotted in to 1 out 1 back spot, raced 1-2Ls away in mid-section, eased 3-wide with run on turn, didn't responded to pressure in straight and gradually weakened out of it.

Away well, showed good early speed to cross from outside alley to lead them, controlled tempo in mid-race, rolled along 1L clear on turning, kicked strongly at 200 M and fought hard to just go down. Improved run.

Okay to begin, allowed to settle just off speed (steadied early), raced in 1 out 2 back spot 2Ls away in mid-section, enjoyed fair run to turn, gained 3-wide split in straight but was one-paced last 200 M and didn't close off.
Average to break, faded back from awkward draw, raced rear enough to last 2-wide 6Ls away, still well back on turn, made run between horses in straight but didn't finish off as normally would.

Average to jump, restrained from wide alley to assume spot at rear, lobbed along at tail 2-wide 7-8Ls away, not suited by slow speed and made 3 or 4-wide run passing Rock, finished off steadily but set too big a task.

Out with rest, showed good speed to be amongst leaders early, raced outside leader 1L away thereafter, had good trip to turn with slow speed, hard pressed on turning, didn't have the dash to match them last 200 M.
Towards rear. Hung out from the middle stages. Never seen with a chance.
Took up running approaching 1000 M. Kept on well in straight but no match for winner final 100 M.
Midfield or behind. About 2Ls back rounding the turn. Held up for running near 300 M. Responded well when clear run came and took charge 100 M out to score an easy victory.
Outpaced at back. Never in the hunt.
Always at rear. Never a factor.
Prominent early before being outpaced to behind midfield. Made the turn at 800 M awkwardly and hung out. Ran on final 250 M to a distant 4th.
Led to 1000 M before sitting 1 out and 1 back off the leader. 3rd rounding the turn. Weakened badly final 250 M.
2-back on rail from 1000 M. Tracked leader turning in. Tried hard in straight but always well held by the first pair final 200 M.
Ridden early to stay in touch. 2 to 3Ls back from 900 M. Looked a chance upon straightening before finding no extra inside 200 M.
Weakened noticeably after being 3 wide without cover.
Raced near the rear of the field, shifted to the outside fence turning for home, battled away at one speed.
Raced handy 3 wide without cover for the trip, always working to turn, weakened in the run home.
Raced slightly worse than midfield, 1 off with cover, steadied near the 200 M whilst closing off fairly.
On the fence, made some late ground after settling back in the field.
Settled midfield, 2 deep with cover, finished off soundly.
Positioned 1 off behind the leaders, after being slow to muster early speed. One-paced in the straight.
Began awkwardly, last for most of the journey, unable to make any impression.
Settled midfield on the rail, made little impression in the run home.
Sat outside the leader, under heavy pressure after the 400 M, weakened out of it in straight to be well beaten.
Raced on the back of the speed, shifted off the fence in the straight, held rivals at bay.
Led along the fence, opened up break after the 400 M, overhauled close to the post.
2-wide and raced behind the pace early stages. Kept within 2Ls of the leader at the bend. Stayed on fairly but unable to turn up a notch in the straight.
Ridden along to a forward position. Settled alongside the leader making home turn and took the lead near 200 M. Kept on well over the final stretch to hold off rival.
Settled 2-wide in rear section. Only ran past beaten runners in the straight.
Settled prominently behind the pace. Battled for the lead on straightening and was 1/2L down at 200 M. Kept on well over the final stages but was whip shy and unable to overturn the deficit.
Outpaced and raced towards the rear. Wide making home turn and only ran past tired runners in the straight.
Jumped well but was outpaced by leaders. Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Gradually shifted out after straightening and kept on fairly to the post.
Off slowly and trailed field. Quickened on straightening but was crowded at 200 M whilst making ground. Continued to close the race off well.
Ridden out of the gates and took the lead at 1000 M. Continued to hold a narrow advantage on straightening but soon weakened.
Raced along the rails in rear section. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and raced wide at midfield. Found nothing in the straight.
Settled on fence at midfield. Pressured rounding home turn and only remained on same pace in the straight.
3-wide and better than midfield. Kept on well in the straight but couldn't muster enough to challenge top pair.
4-wide with cover in rear group early about 6Ls off pace, niggled along to maintain an interest from 700 M out, very weak from a long way, performance deemed unacceptable.
Slowest away but soon recovered along fence to race in 3rd, about 2Ls down in box-seat at 800 M, a little further back turning for home, never had any hope of grabbing winner.
2-wide at 800 M when close up 3Ls behind speed in 4th, ridden along to hold this position turning for home, faded right out in final 200 M.
Worse than midfield and at least 5Ls or 6Ls off speed until home turn when 3-wide, dropped out rapidly from then on.
Disputed early lead, 2-wide and 1L down in 2nd at 900 M, about 2Ls down in 2nd at home turn, ideally situated for a place, very tired late and lost out on 4th when rider eased down near the post.
Soon niggled along when 3-back on fence in 4th when about 4Ls back in 5th place until home turn, much too one-paced but plugged on for place.
Soon disputing lead on fence, 1L clear 800 M out, shot 2Ls ahead at top of home straight, ran away with it, easily.
Caught 5-wide no cover for most of backstretch when about 4Ls back in midfield, lost a lot of ground on the circle and struggling on straightening, eased down late.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls off speed down the back, unbalanced when bumping rail 700 M out, soon outpaced but ran past a tired horse into 4th place late.
Midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed until the 800 M, under pressure to stay involved at 600 M, petered out tamely from top of home turn.
Unbalanced and lost ground at start, soon 7Ls last, checked at 700 M and knocked further back, never on terms.
Awkward break and quickly got back about 6Ls off pace in rear bunch, checked at 700 M, further off the pace taking final turn, never a factor.
Fractious in gates, broke through stalls beforehand, passed by vet, 3Ls down in 3rd at 900 M out 2-wide, a little closer but under pressure taking home turn, swamped and eased late.
4-wide no cover down the back early on about 8Ls off pace, always a long way behind and never competitive.
Nicely covered up on fence in midfield about 5Ls off speed until 600 M out, 4Ls down in 5th taking home turn, kept on at same pace to line.
On fence in 8th or 9th place and about 7Ls off the speed until home turn, made no great ground in the home straight.
A neck 2nd and on fence at 1200 M, 2Ls back in 2nd at 800 M, 1L down in 2nd at top of homestretch, one-paced and always comfortably held by quinella pair and just hung on for 3rd.
Always travelled well 3-back on fence between 2Ls and 4Ls off speed in 4th through to home turn, picked up quite well to lead narrowly at 200 M, always doing just enough to win.
Awkward break, always in rear bunch at least 8Ls off speed until home straight entrance, moderate late headway past beaten rivals.
Steadied 1000 M out when 2-wide and 4Ls behind speed in 5th, about 5Ls down in midfield and hanging out taking home turn, found nothing off the bridle. (Lame, distressed and displaced soft palate.)
8Ls back in 10th when 2-wide at 1000 M, all out to get closer when taking home turn, very one-paced.
Led by neck out 2-wide at 1200 M, crossed to fence 800 M out to lead by 2Ls, headed by winner 200 M out, battled back bravely but always just held by the winner.
Caught 3-wide no cover when 5Ls back in midfield at 1000 M, similarly placed when 4-wide (widest of all) taking home turn, finished off at same pace down centre of track.
2-wide and 6Ls down in 8th at 1000 M, under strong pressure entering homestretch when about 5Ls back in midfield, no acceleration.
10Ls last and under pressure 1000 M out, didn't get any closer than that and very weak in homestretch.
Slowest away and always in rear bunch about 8Ls or 9Ls off pace, never remotely dangerous.
Led briefly before making the first turn in 2nd or 3rd spot. Niggled a bit in 4th approaching 1000 M to maintain position about 3Ls back. Soon struggled upon straightening.
Towards rear and trapped wide and without cover most of the way. Improved steadily along back straight to be in midfield at 600 M. Found nothing in straight.
In touch early. Midfield going into the first turn. Improved steadily 800 M out to be 2Ls back whilst hanging out rounding home turn. Soon faded upon straightening.
Soon at rear. Widest turning in. Never in the hunt. (See Racing Incidents.)
At rear. Still 5Ls back but on rail turning in. Ran on steadily to snatch a remote 3rd close home.
In touch. Midfield or better after checking on first turn and steadying off heels at 1200 M. Made no impression in straight.
2-back on rail from the first turn. 2Ls off the speed along back straight. 1L down rounding home bend. One-paced without ever looking dangerous in straight.
In touch early. Midfield or worse about 4 to 5Ls back from 1000 M. Dropped towards rear 600 M out and well beaten upon straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Last turning in. Ran past well beaten horses in straight.
Slowly away and then got hampered. Remained towards rear and checked at 1200 M. About 5Ls back at 800 M. Made up some ground final 250 M to grab a distant 2nd.

Slowly away. Ridden hard early and before settling in midfield and on rail. Dropped towards rear about 5Ls back after checking at 1200 M. Kept on steadily in straight and lost out on a remote 3rd when one-paced close home.
Soon led and made all to win decisively.
In touch early. Caught wide rounding the first turn but improved swiftly from 1200 M to be 1L off the lead at 1000 M. Soon dropped right out of contention upon straightening. (Blood.)
Never better than midfield. Kept on one pace without quickening.
Tailed-off from halfway. (Bled.)
Midfield early. Gradually weakened from halfway out.
Chased leader to 400 M. Weakened.
Showed speed early. Gradually weakened onto course proper.
Broke well. Soon dropped to rear before course proper. Produced impression late.
Began well and quickly crossed to stands side, settling just off the pace. Came to challenge inside final 200 M. Ran on well but always safely held by the winner.
Rear early. Made up some late ground down centre of track to do best work at finish.
Settled mainly some 2Ls off the lead. Kept on same pace without quickening closing stages.
Made all. Held 1L advantage passing 200 M. Hung on well to the line to win readily.
Settled in midfield. Finished off race nicely to grab 3rd late.
Always struggling in last few. Never seen with a chance.
Never better than midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Broke well. Not far off early stages. Soon weakened after halfway mark.

Jumped with field, pressed forward but unable to slot in early, raced 3 wide without cover in midfield 5 to 6Ls away, always working to turn, made a short-lived run in straight but couldn't go on with it from 200 M.

Fastest to break, drove forward to challenge for early lead, raced outside leader 2Ls away without cover, began to struggle from turn, weakened noticeably in straight to be beaten a long way (didn't handle going).
Even beginning, ridden up to hold midfield position, raced 2 wide 5 to 6Ls from leader, never really comfortable, still well back on turning, gradually lost touch in straight to be well beaten.

Slow to begin, hard ridden early to keep touch, raced in rearward division on rails 9 to 10Ls away, still well back on turn, followed rails in straight and made good late ground to be closest at finish.

Broke with rest, hard ridden to hold lead early, kept them going at good clip 2Ls clear throughout, kicked clear at 400 M forcing field to chase, kept on strongly under hard riding to score deserved win.
Bounced out with rest, restrained to find cover, drifted back to near rear 10Ls away, raced 2 wide throughout not really working, switched to outside in straight passing a few tired horses late.

Average to begin, lacked early toe and settled in midfield on rails, raced 6Ls from pace niggled along throughout, followed rails into straight, drove between horses at 300 M and closed race off well to grab 2nd.

Bumped slightly on jumping, ridden along to take up prominent spot 1 out 1 back, enjoyed good trip 3Ls away throughout, challenged strongly at 200 M, fought hard just running out of condition last bit.

Slow to begin, settled down in last position, raced 2 to 3 wide 12Ls from front runners, had fair trip in middle stages, unable to go up a notch when turning for home, always well back and well beaten.

Fast into stride, hard ridden to go forward, slotted in nicely on rails behind leader, raced just off speed 3Ls away (unbalanced 500 M), had chance in straight but couldn't find extra gear. Kept on same pace to make frame.

Jumped with them, unable to match early speed, relaxed well in midfield spot on rails 5Ls away, awkward on turning, made some ground but was unable to go on with it last 200 M and only held spot to line.
Slow to begin, settled rear enough to last, raced 2nd 11Ls away, always struggling in conditions, still had field to beat on turn, offered nothing in straight. (Bled from both nostrils.)
Prominent 3 wide far side. Took closer order rounding home bend gaining 2nd into straight. Gradually faded under pressure.
Settled just behind midfield. Ran on steadily down inner of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in forward of midfield. Only kept on at the one pace under pressure in straight.
Settled in rear. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Slightly slow out. Ridden on rails to quickly recover to midfield before home bend. Shifted out for a run over 200 M out and ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Broke well and attempted to make all. Kicked 1.5Ls clear under pressure over 200 M out only to be collared in final few strides.
Always in rear. Never seen with a chance.
Jumped fairly. Soon settled towards the rear racing wide. Faded into straight.
Settled just behind leaders. Came to challenge upon straightening. Fought on well under pressure to gain upper hand close to home.
Very sluggish at start. Trailed the field to straight. Made moderate progress in straight without threatening.
Jumped best from wide draw. Gradually crossed to inside and settled just off the pace. Weakened out of contention turning in.
Raced 4-wide in midfield to straight. Kept on before finding no extra passing 200 M.
Settled 2-wide in rear of midfield. Came under pressure to challenge turning in. Made moderate headway closing stages despite carried wide over 200 M out.
Began evenly, pushed along to hold spot 3 back on fence 4Ls from pace, enjoyed good run in mid-section, stuck to rails in straight but didn't show any turn of foot and only plodded to line.
Away well, restrained when unable to slot in, settled 7Ls away 3 and 4 wide without cover, always working to turn, made run 4 and 5 wide in straight, made no impression and battled home.

Out with field, allowed to stride forward and assume spot behind leader, had run of race 1 to 2Ls away on rails, gained split at 350 M, drove through to overhaul leader late to score narrowly in slugging finish.

Began fairly, unable to muster early speed and posted wide early, angled into 1 out 1 back spot 2Ls away by mid-point, travelled well on turn, came with strong challenge in straight but just lacked dash to take prize.

Average to leave gates, assumed usual rearward role, raced 6Ls away from pace on rail throughout, not asked in middle stages, in traffic on turning angled out and made up steady ground without threatening winner.
Standard beginning, pushed along to hold position, raced in rearward division 2 wide 7 to 8Ls away, angled out with job to do entering straight, finished race off well to be closest at finish.

Only fair to begin, allowed to drift back to tail, raced 3 wide 8 to 9Ls away, travelled comfortably covering extra ground to turn, swung very wide in straight, made good late ground from impossible spot.

Average to break, drifted back to just off midfield, 2 wide 6Ls away, never comfortable and always pushed along, attempted 3 wide run from 600 M, never travelled in run home and not ridden out. (See Racing Incidents.)

Began only fairly, hard ridden to drive through into 1 out 1 back spot, had run of race 4Ls away thereafter, always seemed to be struggling and was losing ground on turn, dropped right out of it in straight.

First to begin, pushed forward from wide alley to race outside leader, travelled easily 1L away without cover, niggled to take closer order on turn, couldn't go up a notch when they sprinted and gradually weakened.

Average to jump, restrained from widest alley, raced near rear 8Ls away on rails, not used up in mid-section, tracked nicely to turn, made good ground in straight getting clear at 150 M and charging late. Narrowly missed.

Away well, went forward to take closer position, trapped 3 to 4 wide in midfield 4 to 5Ls away, always working to be 3Ls down on turning, under pressure to keep going and tried hard to challenge but weakened late due to workload.

Fast into stride, crossed to lead easily, dictated terms in front, held 1L advantage throughout, travelled strongly on turn, increased speed but couldn't shake them at 200 M, just overhauled late to miss place.
Lost ground after awkward jump. Remained at back whilst racing ungenerously. Never a factor.
Prominent. Led briefly 900 M out before tracking the leaders from 700 M. Hung in and soon weakened upon straightening.
Prominent. 2 to 3Ls back 900 M out. Unable to quicken in straight and nothing left 200 M out.
Jumped well but soon outpaced to midfield or worse. At least 6Ls back turning in. Made no impression in straight.
Slowly away. Towards rear despite being niggled along. Made up a little late ground without threatening placed horses.
Towards rear before advancing to midfield or worse 1000 M out. 5 to 6Ls back rounding the turn and struggled to maintain position. Nothing left upon straightening. (Irregular heart.)
Soon led. Headed 900 M out but re-gained lead despite hanging out from 800 M. Kept on well to win easily having established a 2Ls advantage upon straightening.
Outpaced towards rear from 1000 M. Never seen with a chance.
Soon 1 to 2Ls off the pace. Kept on steadily in straight for a distant 2nd.
Prominent early. Forward of midfield about 3Ls back after making the turn awkwardly and checking off heels at 800 M. Ran on steadily to a very remote 3rd in straight. (Cut right fore.)
Midfield early before improving to sit 1 to 2Ls off the speed in 3rd from 1000 M. 3Ls back in 5th at 600 M. Weakened badly after straightening.
Midfield or behind in the early stages. Some 5 to 6Ls back rounding the bend. Took closer order to be 4Ls down turning in. One-paced in straight before weakened close home.
Began awkwardly, positioned 3 wide, just behind the principals. One paced over the concluding stages.
Settled in midfield, raced 3 wide throughout without cover, faded in the run home.
Raced outside the leaders hind-quarters. Had every chance but unable to offer.
Raced at the rear of the field along the fence, held up early in the straight, motored home.
Hampered at the door whilst back in the field. Found nothing at the business end.
Settled at the tail of the field. Ran home smartly after coming wide in the straight.
Crowded on jumping, stalked the leader, shifted out on straightening, fought on well over the latter stages.
Settled in midfield, 1 off with cover, had even run throughout, disappointed in run home.
Checked at the start. Midfield early on the fence, held up entering the straight, reasonable effort.
Began well, drifted back early, raced 3 wide, closed off satisfactorily.
Positioned 1 off, followed front division, struggled inside the 400 M.
From inside draw, made every post a winner, did well to hold on and score soundly.
Raced midfield along the rails, commenced to tire noticeably after the 500 M.
Lacked early speed and raced behind midfield. Hampered at 800 M and lost ground. Recovered to midfield at 600 M but was wide turning for home. Showed nothing in the straight.
Ridden along from a wide draw and took the lead at 1000 M. Held a length's advantage into home straight before being headed at 200 M. Steadily faded thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly and raced in rear section. Hampered and carried wider at 800 M. Improved to midfield but was widest making home turn. Only ran past tired runners in the straight.

Jumped well and took the early lead. Settled behind the pace after 1000 M and remained in a prominent spot behind the leader. Trapped for some distance after straightening but closed the race off strongly once finding daylight.
Raced towards the back. 4Ls off the pace on straightening but lacked the needed rally.
Settled at midfield before making ground after 800 M. 3-wide and a length down turning for home. Never picked up and weakened in the straight. (Roarer.)
Settled at midfield. Kept on steadily in the straight for a minor placing.

Better than midfield in early stages. Advanced to race alongside the leader at the bend. Responded well in the straight and took the lead at 200 M. Kept on well but failed to hold off winner closing stages.
Settled on fence at midfield. Checked at 800 M and lost ground. 3 to 4Ls off the leader on straightening and kept on fairly to the finish.

Soon in a rearward position. Checked and lost ground at 700 M. Trailed field into home straight. Quickened nicely but was caught in traffic for some time after 300 M. Continued to stride home well once finding clear run.
Wide but with cover about 4Ls off pace in 10th until being left 3-wide no cover from 800 M to home turn, found nothing under pressure, another poor effort.
Travelled well towards rear on the fence about 5Ls off the pace, good headway from top of stretch while stuck to fence, switched out to challenge 200 M out, led at 100 M, soon clear.
2-wide and a neck back in 2nd at 1400 M, disputed advantage from 800 M to home turn, kicked over 1L clear 200 M out, headed by winner at 100 M and missed out on a place final strides.
2-wide and about 3Ls behind in 6th or so until home straight, failed to quicken up.
Ideally placed on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 1200 M to home straight entrance, petered out tamely, very disappointing.
Very slow away losing about 3Ls on field, soon detached in rear, 8Ls last turning for home, plugged on past a few tired rivals.
Niggled along and worse than midfield about 4Ls off pace until the 600 M, one-paced in the finish and never dangerous.
Best away and soon led by a neck, disputed lead from 1000 M to home turn, faded out sharply thereafter and eased down final 100 M.
Caught 4-wide but with cover for much of backstretch when about 6Ls off pace in 13th, not much closer turning for home, made no real headway.
3Ls off pace in midfield and with cover until the 600 M, slipped further back taking final turn, very weak.
Settled worse than midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed, held up turning for home, stayed on well for 2nd place but had little hope with the winner.
Within 2Ls off the lead but always caught about 4 and 5-wide without cover, 3-wide no cover in 5th or so at 800 M, over 1L down in 2nd with 200 M to race, weakened late after tough trip.
Couldn't muster early speed, always under pressure in or around midfield on fence about 3Ls or 4Ls off speed, over 2Ls down in 5th at the 200 M, one-paced but did enough to run 3rd.
Always in the firing line in 4th or 5th and within 2Ls off the speed until the 200 M, one-paced in closing stages.
Stumbled at start, 2-wide and a neck down in 2nd at 1400 M, 1L down in 3rd at 800 M, 3-wide when over 1L down in 3rd at home bend, finished off only evenly.
Disputed early lead, always in front or a head back in 2nd until straightening, all out when headed by winner 150 M out and slowed inside final stages.
Well placed 3-back on fence in midfield about 3Ls from the lead until home straight, 2Ls down and with place prospects when unbalanced at 200 M, kept on at same tempo.
Disputed early lead, eased into box seat position on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1200 M to home turn, every chance when vying for the lead at 200 M, couldn't follow through.
Always caught very wide from early stages, pressed on from midfield to dispute lead at 1000 M, a neck down in 2nd and 2-wide taking home turn, gave ground from 300 M out.
Patiently handled in 11th place about 7Ls off speed through first half, about 4Ls down in 10th taking final corner, picked up nicely out wide to lead 150 M out, stayed on well.
One from rear about 8Ls off pace at 1400 M, wider and about 5Ls from front taking home turn, every chance when 1L down in 5th or so out wide at 200 M, no extra late.
In midfield with cover about 4Ls off the speed until the home straight, very flat in the finish.
Slow to begin, always on and off the bridle in midfield about 4Ls behind leader until home turn, swished tail repeatedly when finishing off at the one pace.
Fractious in gates and switched to rail from widest gate, always in last place and never better than 7Ls from the front at any stage.
Mostly 5th about 3Ls off pace through to home turn, held up for a run until about 300 M out, stayed on well enough for 2nd but never likely to keep up with winner.
3-wide with cover in midfield or slightly worse and about 4Ls off speed until home turn when 4-wide, always held by principals and weakened further inside final 200 M.
4-back on fence from 1200 M and about 5Ls off speed in 10th or so, similarly placed taking home bend, making some fair late ground when checked at 200 M, one-paced thereafter.
Dropped out in 12th or 13th between 5Ls and 8Ls off speed until final bend when hard pressed to improve, plugged on only fairly down centre of track.
Midfield or better after proving difficult to settle in early stages. Wide turning in. Kept on without threatening in straight.
In touch. 2nd turning in. Weakened badly final 250 M.
Always at rear. Never a factor.
Went forward from widest draw to take lead from 1100 M. Kept on strongly in straight to record a very impressive victory.
At rear. Checked near 1200 M and made swift headway 1000 M out to 2nd at 800 M. Hung out badly rounding the turn and was eased down in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Around midfield. About 4Ls back at 800 M. Ran on steadily in straight to snatch a distant 2nd close home.
Led to 1100 M. 2Ls off the leaders in 3rd rounding the turn. Distant 2nd from 250 M and lost out on a remote placing when effort not sustained final 100 M.
Behind midfield or worse. About 5Ls back at 600 M. One-paced in straight.
Dropped to the back from wide draw. Ran past well beaten horses in straight.
Soon towards rear. 6Ls down at 600 M. Never quickened in straight.
Prominent early. 2 to 3Ls back from 1200 M. Kept on steadily in straight and lost out on a remote 2nd when plugging on close home.
Soon towards rear. About 7Ls back after checking at 900 M. Not a factor in straight.
Soon midfield or worse. About 6Ls back towards rear at 800 M. Found nothing in straight.
Midfield or better. 3Ls back rounding the turn. Kept on without threatening in straight and found no extra after steadying 200 M out.
Raced on rails in midfield. Faded over 200 M out.
Settled in rear. Ran on upon straightening producing good late impression to grab 3rd place near line.
Close up early, dropping towards rear rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.
Slightly slow into stride. Quickly picked up to prominent position but raced very wide. Remained same into straight then soon weakened.
Mainly 3-wide in midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Sluggish jumping out. Picked up to rear of field 200 M after start. Remained same into straight. Made up some late ground inside final 250 M.
Always struggling at the back.
Attempted to make all, holding narrow advantage most of way to over 200 M out. Kept on under pressure for 2nd spot home.
Settled in rear of midfield early. Commenced run rounding home bend, joining 3rd into straight. Quickened up well to take charge over 100 M out. Won convincingly.
Ridden to share pace early. Settled on inside of leader on rails rounding home bend. Gained narrow advantage under pressure over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Always prominent to straight. Yielded ground from 200 M out.

Only average to begin, kicked up to take closer order, raced in midfield 5 to 6Ls away 3 wide without cover, always working to turn, struggling on straightening, kept giving to 200 M but weakened after hard run.

Fast into stride, went on with job to race outside leader applied pressure in mid-section using plenty to turn, shared lead early in straight, still there until 250 M but workload took toll and weakened last bit.

Fastest into stride, held lead after 200 M, pressured throughout and rolled along at a solid clip, hard ridden to hold advantage on turning, spent force at 250 M point, checked late but already weakening.
Average to begin and bumped early, raced at tail 8 to 9Ls away on rails, not asked to turn, followed rails into straight, finished race off best late finding distance far too short.

Broke with field from widest alley, restrained to rearward position 3 wide 8 to 9Ls away, covered ground with trail throughout, still had field to beat on turn, did little in straight, plugging away to line.

Only fair to begin, unable to match them early, raced worse than midfield on rails 5 to 6Ls away, followed rails into straight (bumping rail on turning), made up significant ground late to secure 3rd place.
Jumped with field, unable to slot in from awkward alley, forced to cover ground 3 wide 5 to 6Ls away, always working to turn, closed race off well widest in straight to be closest at finish.

Began fairly, drifted back to worse than midfield, raced 2 wide 5 to 6Ls away, not aksed in mid-section, made run between horses on turning, angled clear at 250 M, closed off well without threatening winner. Better effort.
Slow to begin, settled down at rear of field, raced 2 wide 8 to 9Ls away, not asked but never really travelling at rear of field, hung in early in straight, closed race off fairly once balanced.

Away well, allowed to go forward and hold leaders back, had run of race on rails 3Ls away, gained dream run on turning to drive to lead at 300 M, kept on strongly but no match for winner last 200 M. (Raced greenly.)

Jumped with them, dropped in for trail early, raced midfield 4 to 5Ls away with cover, pushed along to make ground on turning, made run between runners in straight getting clear at 200 M, dashed well to score. Still improving.

Away well, pressed forward to take up prominent spot 1 out 1 back 3Ls away, always niggled in mid-section, responded well on turning, moved up to threaten briefly at 250 M but couldn't go on with it late.
Broke well and led, crossing gradually to rails before home bend. Went 1-1/2Ls clear early in straight and just held off unlucky runner-up's strong late challenge close to home.
Towards rear most of way. Made no show in straight.
Midfield early, dropping to last few coming out of back straight. Ran past beaten horses in the run home.
Settled in midfield on rails. Unable to obtain a clear run early in straight. Finished off race strongly inside final 250 M to just fail to get up on line.
With leaders early, dropping to midfield approaching home bend. Remained same into straight and produced late impression closing stages.
Always struggling at the back.
Settled in last few on rails. Switched out for a run upon straightening. Ran on steadily down centre of straight without threatening.
Raced mainly in midfield and 3-wide to straight. Only kept on steadily at the one pace without quickening under pressure.
Always well back and never seen with a chance.
Held up in 3rd on rails just behind leader. Came to challenge upon straightening but only kept on same pace without quickening under pressure throughout straight.
Midfield far side. Took closer order rounding home bend. Soon faded after straightening.
Raced wide in last few. Made no impression in straight.
Chased leader to straight then gradually weakened. Hampered when beaten about 200 M out.
Prominent, 4th rounding home bend and into straight. Soon dropped out.

Away with rest, allowed to roll forward to assume spot at leaders girth, relaxed well and had good run with easy speed, 1/2L away on turning, kept giving until 200 M (bumped) but lacked turn of foot to figure late.
Fair to break, outpaced early and drifted back to settle just off midfield, 2 wide 6Ls away throughout, not travelling on turn, raced very one paced in straight and only held ground to line.
Poor to break, pushed along to hold midfield spot, raced 4 to 5Ls away on rails, used no petrol in mid-section, struggled when pace increased at 300 M, showed nothing and plugged to line.

Crowded on jumping and lost position, niggled along to hold midfield spot, raced 2 wide 5Ls away in middle stages, not asked to do a lot until turn, eased out and closed race off well without really threatening.

Average to leave gates, assumed usual rearward role, raced 2 wide 7 to 8Ls from frontrunners, not asked in mid-section, angled widest on turning, didn't offer much in run home and was one paced to line.

Jumped with rest, allowed to take sit off speed, slotted into 1 out 1 back spot 2Ls away, had run of race in mid-section, travelled well to turn, pushed clear at 250 M and charged home to be in 3 way finish.

Average to begin, hard ridden to take up spot behind the leader, enjoyed run of the race thereafter travelled well on turn, held up until 200 M, surged to lead when clear and held on gamely to score narrow win. (Lost plate.)
Even break from widest alley, pushed forward to take closer order, forced to race 3 and 4 wide without cover in midfield, always working to turn, dropped right out in straight after hard run.
Standard to begin, hard ridden to take close order, settled into 3 wide spot 5Ls away in midfield, eased 4 wide with a run on turn, made some ground late from well back.

Fast into stride, showed usual speed to take up running, dictated terms in front with even sections, held 1/2L on turning, fought on strongly in straight and only claimed at 100 M. Stuck on well to make frame.
