Standard to break, restrained to tail from wide alley, raced well back on rails 6Ls from pace, not asked in mid-section, in traffic on turning, weaved clear passage at 100 M and flew late to narrowly miss.

Began best, unable to cross early and settled just off leaders, raced 3 wide without cover 2Ls away, always working to turn, still in mix until 200 M but hard run took effect and weakened out late. (Blood in trachea.)

Bounced out well, taken back from awkward alley to race at rear, made a little ground to race 6Ls away but always wide in middle stages, had field to beat on turn, made up good late ground from too far back.
Awkward to begin, settled at rear in 2 wide spot 9 to 10Ls away, lobbed along at tail throughout, tracked rails and had job to do on turning, unable to make any real impression in straight.
Eased out of the race after breaking down after 800 M.
Towards rear. About 4Ls back at 400 M. Unable to quicken in straight and not ridden out when close to heels in the closing stages. (Lame.)
Midfield early. Towards rear about 4Ls back rounding the bend. Midfield but 4-wide turning in. Kept on without threatening in straight before weakened close home.
Soon at rear. Checked when 4Ls down at 600 M. Ran past well beaten horses in straight.
In touch between 1 to 2Ls off the speed. Kept on steadily in straight whilst hanging in for a distant 2nd.
Made all to win very easily.
Travelled prominently along wide alley just 1L or so off the speed. Kept on in straight and just hung on to a very remote 3rd.
Jumped well before dropping back steadily to behind midfield about 3Ls off the lead at 800 M. Made up some late ground after steadying 200 M out to share a remote 3rd place.
2nd from 1000 M. Just 1/2L back rounding the turn. Kept on in straight until running out of gas 250 M out.
Outpaced towards rear despite being ridden along in the early stages. Made up some ground final 300 M but simply had too much to do.
In touch just 1L behind the pace to 900 M. Under pressure to maintain position in midfield rounding the turn. Nothing left 300 M out.
Disappointing after leading on the fence, first horse beaten.
Settled well back, inconvenienced near 1200 M. Worked home well.
Raced behind the speed 3 deep, with cover, never looked a chance.
Fell near the 1200 M.
Settled midfield, 1 off with cover, held up for a short distance after 300 M, did little afterwards.
Raced at leaders girth, shot to the lead after 400 M, looked like the winner but tired over later stages.
Midfield, 3 wide with cover, one paced in the straight.
Enjoyed a nice run on the back of the speed along the rails, couldn't sustain effort although held up briefly early in the straight.
Midfield along the fence, struggled in the run home.
Stayed on strongly after parking 1 out 1 back.
Ridden along vigorously to muster speed, settled 3 wide no cover outside the leaders, commenced to tire turning for home.
Slow to begin, badly hampered when hurdled fallen rider and horses, never recovered.
Fell near the 1200 M.
Positioned back to the field, made long sustained run in the straight, weaved a passage through, got clear running after 300 M to take advantage close to home.
Dropped to a rearward position. Caught in traffic whilst attempting to improve at 500 M. Switched out and rallied nicely after straightening. Closest at finish.
Raced on fence at midfield. Kept on well in the straight to finish a distant 2nd.
Caught wide into first turn. Continued to be wide at midfield in back straight. Struggled to keep pace at home bend and finished tailed out.
Raced 3-wide at midfield. Started to lose touch at 700 M and lacked a response when pressured at home turn. Continued to weaken in the straight.
Settled on fence and kept within 3Ls of the leader back straight. Ridden along to keep pace making the turn. Unable to pick up on straightening and gradually dropped out.
Caught wide into first turn before improving into a forward position. 3-wide and kept within 3Ls of the pace in back straight and home turn. Stayed on same pace to the finish.
Soon led. Held a 2Ls advantage on straightening and continued to widen its lead in the home straight. Won easily.
Outpaced and raced in rear section. Showed a bit of improvement after 700 M but was widest at home bend. Towards the rear on straightening and found nothing in the straight.
Dropped to a rearward position. 4-wide making home turn and trailed field into home straight. Made a nice rally and was closest at finish.
Hard ridden to a forward position. Gradually dropped to midfield in back straight. Continued to weaken in the straight.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. Ran on only fairly in the straight.
Pushed along early to improve into a forward spot. Tracked leader in back straight and home turn. Kept on fairly on straightening to make the frame.
On fence behind midfield. Made a ground saving trip along the rails at home bend and ran on same pace to the line.
Blundered on jumping and raced towards the rear. Near last on straightening and only ran past a few beaten runners.
About 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in 9th or so until the home straight when under pressure, always struggling from then on.
Tracked winner in midfield about 4Ls off pace and 2-wide at 1000 M, 3-wide taking home turn, every chance when vying for lead 250 M out, no chance with winner and just held onto 2nd.
One from rear about 8Ls off pace at 1200 M, 6Ls back in 13th at top of home straight, same position but 4Ls back at 200 M, kept on past rivals late without threatening to place.
Stumbled at start, 3-wide with cover and unbalanced at 1100 M, 4Ls back in 8th at 800 M, forced 4-wide into stretch, 2Ls down in 4th with place prospects at 200 M, no extra late.
Bounded at start, box seat position 2Ls off pace in 3rd until the 600 M, niggled along to keep up taking final turn, soon well beaten.
Slightly worse than midfield over 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, looked outpaced when hanging out taking final bend about 4Ls down in 10th, rallied well inside final 200 M to stay on for a place.
3-back on fence about 4Ls from the front in mid-pack at 1000 M, closer but still midfield at top of homestretch, squeezed through tight gap to lead 200 M out, soon in charge.
Led on fence by half a length at 1200 M, headed at top of home straight, hung out final 200 M when swamped.
Nicely placed 2-wide and about 2Ls or 3Ls off speed in 4th through first half, under pressure taking final bend, failed to show any acceleration.
Awkward break, driven along to race in 2nd when 2-wide at 1200 M, led at top of home straight, weakened once headed about 250 M out.
No better than 12th between 5Ls and 6Ls from the front until home straight, switched to inside run when 3Ls down in midfield taking home turn, always held and hung in badly final 200 M.
Bounded at start, towards rear about 6Ls off speed at 1200 M and 4-wide with cover, a little closer turning for home, one-paced and never threatened to place.
Sluggish break and soon well behind in rear, detached turning for home, unacceptable performance.
Prominent but keen early out 4-wide no cover, 3-wide still no cover on circle and 1L down in 3rd, half a length down in 3rd at 200 M, one-paced thereafter.
Fractious in gates and slowest away, 6Ls back in 12th at 800 M, headway to be 3Ls back in midfield off final bend, had every chance to at least place but lacked the dash. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always in front rank and on fence until turning for home, failed to quicken up and well held final 200 M.
Covered up 3Ls off pace in mid-division at 800 M, over 1L down and vying for 4th place taking home turn, led 250 M out, always doing just enough to win.
Held up towards rear, 7Ls down at 800 M, over 4Ls behind in 12th taking home turn, found nothing off the bit.
Awkward break, about 5Ls off pace worse than midfield early on, same margin behind in rear taking home turn, no impression.
In midfield or better and no worse than 2Ls or 3Ls off speed until the 600 M, closer at top of home straight, held up until the 300 M, couldn't quicken once clear.
Worse than midfield and 5Ls behind at the 800 M, 3Ls down in midfield taking home turn, no clear running at 300 M, always held by principals.
Switched from wide gate to fence to 8Ls behind in rear at 800 M, 5Ls down in rear taking home turn, made some fair late ground, never nearer.
Worse than midfield 4Ls off pace and 5-wide no cover until getting in 2-wide at 800 M, 3Ls down in mid-division on straightening, every chance when half a length off in 3rd at 100 M, no extra.
Mostly midfield about 3Ls off pace but always caught racing 4-wide no cover, dropped out tamely in home straight.
Box seat position on fence 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 4th or so until home straight, a neck down in 2nd at 200 M with strong place prospects, failed to sustain effort.
Bumped at start but soon recovered to dispute lead out 2-wide from 800 M to home turn, very weak in home straight and eased down final 200 M.
Always worse than midfield about 5Ls off pace and mostly without cover, 5-wide (widest of all) off home striaght, never dangerous.
Best away, always prominent but 3-wide no cover about 1L off pace in 3rd until 600 M, disputing the lead at top of home straight, always held by a neck in 2nd from 200 M to line.
Jumped best from wide draw before travelling 1 to 2Ls off the lead. One-paced in straight before weakened 250 M out.
Ridden early to be in midfield or worse. Dropped back towards rear some 4 to 5Ls down from 1000 M. Made up good ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish despite steadying inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Steadied turning in. Never looked comfortable in the straight. (Lame next day.)
Jumped well from wide alley before dropping back to the rear and hanging out from 800 M. Soon tailed off after straightening.
Prominent. 2Ls or so off speed from 1200 M. Ran on well final 200 M but the post just came too soon.
Bounded at start. Midfield or better. Steadied off heels near 800 M. About 4Ls back rounding the turn. Unable to quicken in straight.
Led from 1200 M. Headed turning in. One-paced in straight and faded inside 100 M.
Jostled with another runner shortly after start. Moved up along rail from rear to midfield at 1100 M. Hung out in the middle stages. Soon weakened upon straightening.
At rear. Made up a little late ground final 200 M without looking dangerous.
At rear after jumping awkwardly. Still 5Ls back turning in. Made up good ground final 250 M to grab 3rd without threatening the first pair.
At rear after jostling with another runner shortly after start. 2nd last some 8Ls back turning in. Made up good late ground final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Blundered at start but soon moved up along rail to be 1L off the pace from 1200 M. Hit front turning in and just held off late challenge from 2nd horse.
Around midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
In first few to straight. Dropped out upon straightening.
Settled behind leaders. Fought on well and snuck up on rails inside final 200 M to take charge close to home.
Attempted to make all. Broke 2Ls clear over 200 M out only to be caught when tiring nearing finish.
Raced wide towards rear. Kept on at the one pace in straight.
Close up. Dropped away quickly upon straightening.
Raced in midfield on rails. Kept on early in straight before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Raced 3-wide in midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Always struggling in last few.
Prominent to home bend. Soon weakened. (Lame next day.)
Never seen with a chance.

Bounced out with them, allowed to roll forward, raced 3 wide without cover in a prominent spot (good speed), had to work hard to hold position, began to feel pressure turning for home, weakened noticeably in straight to be well beaten.

Jumped with field, hard ridden to take up spot outside leader, proved difficult to settle and pressured leader throughout, still challenging with good speed set to turn, stuck there until 200 M but workload took toll late.

Broke with them, hard ridden to take up running, pressured throughout and ran them along at a good clip, still battling out lead on turn, stuck to task well in straight just tiring to be overhauled late.

Jumped in air and lost valuable ground, detached from field early, always 10Ls away on rails, still at rear with job to do on turning, swung to outside and made up many lengths to be closest at finish. Solid effort.

Out with them, lacked early toe and drifted back to worse than midfield 6 to 7Ls away, enjoyed good trip 2 wide with cover, made up some good ground between horses in straight to be closest at finish without threatening. (Lost plate.)

Bounced out with rest, niggled along to hold prominent spot, raced behind leaders 3Ls away throughout, under pressure on turning to chase leaders, stuck to task well to make frame just couldn't find extra last 200 M. (Blood in trachea.)

Even beginning, allowed to drift back and settle at rear, 2 wide 7 to 8Ls away in mid-section, appreciated speed in front and tracked nicely to turn, gained split at 300 M and powered through to grab lead and score strong win.

Away fairly, faded back to worse than midfield, on rails 7Ls away, spent nothing to turn, lacked a clear run early in straight, weaved between horses and finished well under hands and heels riding. (Mucus, see Racing Incidents.)

Broke fairly, assumed position near rear of field on rails 8 to 9Ls away, didn't use much in middle stages, gave them a start on turning, lacked the sprint to be a factor just making steady ground to line.

Began with line, unable to slot in from widest alley, forced to cover ground 3 wide in mid-section, 4 to 5Ls away with cover to turn, made a strong run on balanced up but could match them last bit after doing extra work.

Amongst first to begin, allowed to settle behind speed, raced midfield 5Ls away on rails, had easy run to turn, couldn't go with them when they dashed but stuck on evenly to make up some ground in latter stages.

Began well, unable to cross from awkward alley, posted 3 and 4 wide without cover throughout, always doing plenty of work to turn, under hard riding entering straight, made no impression when placed under pressure.
Mainly in rear of midfield before giving ground around home bend.
Chased leaders to straight. Found no extra and overhauled passing 200 M.
Not far off to halfway. Folded up quickly coming out of back straight. (Distressed.)
Raced in rear and wide. Carried wider turning in. Made no show in straight.
Broke well. Raced wide in forward of midfield before dropping out quickly rounding home bend.
Settled in midfield. Ran on well down straight to reach 2nd over 150 M out, only to be caught near line.
Settled at the back. Made only moderate progress down straight running past beaten horses.
Raced wide in rear of midfield. Gave ground from around home bend.
Nearly made all. Kicked about 3Ls clear inside final 300 M only to be pipped at post by fast-finishing winner.
Raced in forward of midfield. Held distant 4th rounding home bend. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in midfield. Fought on steadily under pressure and ran on steadily on rails without threatening.
Settled towards rear. Finished off race strongly to snatch victory on line.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out under pressure.
Settled in rear. Saved ground turning in hugging inside rails. Made up good ground down straight to be nearest at finish.

Jumped fairly, niggled along to hold position behind pace 4Ls away, raced 1 out 1 back to turn, tracked into race nicely easing 4 wide on turning, kept giving but just lacked dash to go with them last 100 M. (Dropped whip 350 M.)

Away well, showed good speed to press on from wide alley and lead early, took trail at 1100 M and had run of race behind leader, eased 2 wide to challenge on turn, on level terms at 200 M but just couldn't match them last bit.

Awkward to begin, settled down at rear of field, raced on rails 9Ls away throughout, not asked to do much in middle stages, still at rear between horses on turning, kept plugging away at one speed to line.

Broke with rest, drifted back to settle just off midfield, raced 3 wide with cover 7Ls away, made wide run on turn, made up good ground down outside (proving difficult to ride) to be closest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly into stride, raced at rear of field 10Ls away, pushed along early, still had field to beat on turn, swung wide into straight, got clear at 300 M and passed a few tired runners in run to line.

Average to break, lacked early speed, settled just off midfield 7Ls away on rails, used nothing in run, followed rails in straight, left a little flat footed when they quickened, only kept on at same pace to line.
Standard to begin, assumed usual position towards tail, raced 2 wide 6Ls away in mid-section, improved between horses on turn, hampered slightly at 300 M but lacked turn of foot to be a factor.

Best to begin, showed pace but not enough to lead, assumed role outside of leader 2Ls away, pushed 3 wide when challenging on turn, kept on strongly until 200 M under 1/2L down, weakened out of it after working a bit too hard.

Fast out from outside alley, trapped wide in midfield early, allowed to slide forward when over racing to take up running, rolled along at good clip, held 1/2L on turn, showed great fight to hold them off until last 100 M.
Began reasonably, ridden along to hold prominent position, raced 3Ls away on rails, enjoyed good trip to turn, hard ridden on turn, couldn't go with them when they sprinted, raced one paced to line.

Average to begin, raced between runners worse than midfield 2 wide 5 to 6Ls away, made some ground approaching turn, angled into clear in straight and closed race off evenly just lacking extra gear to be a factor.

Broke evenly, unable to slot in early, trapped 4 and 5 wide throughout without cover 7Ls from leaders always working and flat out on turn, 6 to 7 wide into straight, couldn't sustain effort and dropped out thereafter.

Bounced out well, allowed to relax just off speed, raced 4 to 5Ls away with run of race, travelled on bridle to turn, made run between horses in straight, charged through gap at 200 M and went on for soft win. (Dropped whip.)

Began with them, took up midfield position, posted 3 wide 5 to 6Ls away in mid-section without cover, came 4 wide into straight, offered nothing when asked and gradually weakened out of it in straight.
Slow into stride after jumping but managed to improve to be 2Ls or so off the speed from 800 M. Ran on final 200 M but no match for the winner inside 100 M.
Always prominent out wide and kept within 2Ls or so off the lead. Widest turning in. Kicked home strongly 200 M out and took control inside 100 M.
Soon 3Ls or so behind the pace despite being ridden along. Steadied and shifted out for running near 200 M and then made up good late ground to be nearest at finish.
At the rear of the main bunch about 4Ls off the lead. Awkward and unbalanced rounding the turn. Kept finding final 200 M to just miss 2nd when closest at finish.
Prominent 3rd just 1L or so behind the pace. 2nd turning in. Weakened badly final 200 M.
In touch just 2Ls off the pace. 4Ls down after checking at 600 M. Took closer order along rail turning in. Steadied and shifted out for run near 250 M. One-paced thereafter.
Moved up gradually to take lead from 700 M. Swamped by principals when effort not sustained inside 100 M.
Led to 700 M. Stayed within 1L of the leader to 400 M. Wide turning in. Kept on in straight without looking dangerous.
Hampered at start. Well detached at rear about 8Ls down at 800 M. Ran past well beaten runners in straight.
Soon last and got well detached from main field. Never in the race.
Behind midfield in the main bunch about 3Ls off the speed. Dropped to the rear some 5Ls back after checking at 600 M. Found nothing in straight. (Restricted action next day.)
Soon dropped towards rear from wide draw. 4Ls back and wide rounding the turn. Never looked likely.
Raced 2-wide at the rear of the field, never looked likely.
Slow to begin, settled in a rearward position, worked to the line well, not able to obtain clear running over the last 150 M and was not tested.
Raced 1 out 1 back, finished off dourly without threatening winner.
Tracked the winner, midfield along the fence, worked home soundly.
Tracked the leader on the fence throughout, took advantage of the rails when the leader rolled out on home turn, drew away to score well.
Led along the rails, stayed on soundly, inclined to shift ground over the latter stages.
Position midfield 1 off with cover finished off well.
Settled slightly worse than midfield, on the fence, disappointed in the run home.
Settled back along the rails, shifted out to improve 3 deep after the 500 M, worked home respectfully.
Parked in second spot, 1 off under pressure turning for home, didn't stay.
On jumping from a middle draw, was steadied and shifted in behind runners. Never advanced from last position.
Ridden along from widest draw and settled 2-wide behind the leaders. Kept on well in the final stages for a minor placing.
Pushed along from a wide alley to race in the lead or disputed lead. Drew clear after straightening and stayed on well final stages to hold advantage to the line.
Outpaced and raced behind midfield. Kept along the rails at the bend and swung out on straightening. Ran on without threatening.
2-wide behind midfield. Ran on without threatening in the straight.
Trailed field until home straight and ran past a beaten runner.
Jumped awkwardly. Lead or disputed lead. 1/2L down on straightening. Stayed on well in the final stages but unable to match winner's pace.
Settled on fence behind the leaders until home straight. Unable to keep pace after straightening and steadily dropped out of contention.
Ridden along in a 3-wide position midfield. Kept on only fairly in the straight and faded final stages.
Jumped well and raced in a forward spot. Steadied at 800 M and was 3Ls off the lead at the turn. Failed to keep pace in the straight.
Hard ridden and raced on fence behind midfield. Switched out on straightening and ran on same pace to the line.
Away slowly and then was crowded to the rear. Near the back on straightening and closed the race off nicely.
No worse than midfield. Hugged the rails making home turn and kept on steadily in the straight.
Caught 3-wide no cover when 2Ls down in 3rd or so at 1200 M, no cover throughout but still close up turning for home, faded out in the straight.
Squeezed at start, in rear bunch between 5Ls and 7Ls off speed until home turn, made some minor late ground past tiring rivals.
Always struggling in rear, 10Ls last at 1200 M, never a factor.
No speed early on, 5Ls back in 8th on fence at 1100 M, 3Ls down and struggling to make an impact with 300 M to go, one-paced.
3Ls down in 7th at 1100 M when 2-wide, closer taking home turn, very one-paced inside final 200 M.
Ideally placed on fence 2Ls back in 3rd until homestretch, a neck down in 3rd at 200 M, effort petered out tamely inside final 100 M.
Soon led on fence, always about 1L clear until home turn, headed by winner 150 M out and lost out on 2nd place final 50 M.
6Ls behind leader when 2-wide in 9th at 1100 M, 4Ls down in 8th taking home turn, always looked held.
Did well to cross to fence from wide gate at 1400 M, always travelled kindly 3-back in 6th about 3Ls off speed, picked up nicely to lead 150 M out, drew clear.
Crossed from wide gate to be 1L down in 2nd out 2-wide, same position taking final turn, dropped out very sharply. (See Racing Incidents.)
Niggled along early on in 11th when 8Ls off pace, some headway to be 4Ls back in 9th turning for home, no chance with winner but stayed on best of the rest to take 2nd inside final 50 M.
Tended to over-race early, mostly close up in or around 5th about 2Ls off speed and 2-wide, had every hope to place but was too one-paced. (See Racing Incidents.)
Worse than midfield about 7Ls off speed until 1000 M, 5Ls down in 9th taking home turn, stayed on fairly but never very likely to place.
Mostly midfield, about 5Ls or 6Ls back in middle stages, closer turning for home, stayed on fairly without really threatening.
2-wide and 6Ls back in 4th at 1400 M mark, over 4Ls down in 8th taking home turn, 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, kept on well enough for 2nd but never likely to grab winner.
Slowest away and always in rear about 8Ls off pace early, 5Ls down in 10th taking final bend, made some modest late ground.
3-wide no cover until the 1400 M, 2-wide and 2Ls down in 2nd from then until the 600 M, 1L down in 2nd on home turn, soon faded.
Raced in snatches about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in 5th or so, 3-wide and 4Ls down in 5th off home turn, always held by principals.
Soon led on fence, 2Ls clear 800 M out, 1L up taking home turn, faded out once headed over 200 M out.
Travelled well 3-back on fence in 4th about 4Ls off speed through first half, wider on final bend and 2Ls back in 4th, nice turn of foot to lead over 200 M out, ran on well.
Soon struggling in rear, 3-wide no cover and under pressure and well behind at 1000 M, 7Ls down in 11th entering home straight, never troubled leaders.
Box-seat position about 2Ls off pace in 2nd or 3rd and on fence until home turn, every chance when 1L down in 2nd but always a shade one-paced.
Never travelled well in rear, 3-wide no cover and well behind 1300 M out, fell back to 9Ls last at 600 M, very weak in homestretch.
Caught 4-wide no cover early, got in 2-wide at 1400 M in midfield, 6Ls behind at 800 M, 4Ls down in 6th taking final turn, no impression.
Soon 4th or 5th about 3Ls back. Improved from 1000 M to sit 1 out 1 back off the leader. Hit front 250 M out but unable to match speed with winner final 100 M.
Slowly away. Always at rear. Never seen with a chance.
Behind midfield or worse. About 7Ls back at 1000 M. Made no impression in straight.
Led or disputed lead before settling 1 to 2Ls behind the pace from 1100 M. Kept on in straight but always held by the first pair inside 100 M.
Dropped to the rear from wide draw. Raced ungenerously and steadied off heels at 800 M. Made up good ground final 200 M to be closest at finish but without threatening principals.
Around midfield around 4 to 5Ls back. Kept on one-paced in straight.
At rear. Some 7Ls back at 800 M. Improved steadily from Rock to midfield about 3Ls back at 400 M but widest turning in. Found nothing in straight.
Awkward start. Midfield or worse. Some 5Ls back at 800 M. Unbalanced after hitting rail turning in. One-paced in straight.
Disputed early lead before settling in 3rd or 4th place 2 to 3Ls back. Under pressure rounding home turn. Kept on without threatening to place in straight.
Soon disputed lead after knuckling at start. Took up running at 1100 M. Headed 250 M and faded away 100 M out.
Mainly towards rear. Never looked likely.
Niggled forward and found rail passing winning post the 1st time to race 3 to 4Ls behind the pace. Ran on determinedly in straight and took charge 100 M out.
Settled at the back. Made steady headway down straight without threatening.
Did not jump well. Travelled 3-wide in last few to straight. Made up good ground to be nearest at finish.
Jumped moderately. Gradually picked up to close-up position in back straight. Had no more to give after home turn and soon weakened.
Held rails position in midfield. Came to challenge and looked a good chance with rails run in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Settled towards rear. Ran on well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Began from high draw. Soon took up running turning into back straight. Held narrow advantage until finding no extra and overhauled over 150 M out.
Settled in midfield. Came under pressure to challenge turning in. Hit front passing 200 M gaining narrow advantage only to be pipped at post.
Never seen with a chance despite some late progress in straight.
Settled mainly 3-wide in forward of midfield. Came to challenge down centre of track after straightening. Fought on dourly to just get up on line.
Not far off travelling mainly just 2Ls off the pace in rails. Remained same into straight but soon weakened.
Broke well. Ridden for pace. Settled just behind leader after 1000 M bend. Came to challenge under strong pressure upon straightening but could only keep on at the same pace without quickening.

Average to begin, taken back from wide alley, raced at rear 8Ls away in 2-wide spot, overraced in middle stages, well back making wide run on turning, didn't finish off as normally would. (See Racing Incidents.)

Began well, rolled forward to be prominent early, settled 4Ls away in 1 out 1 back spot, had easy time in mid-section slotting in on rails, followed paint in straight, unable to go up a notch and closed at same pace to line.

Broke with field, lacked early speed, settled down worse than midfield on the rails 7Ls away, not asked in middle stages, well back on turn, followed rails in straight and closed off evenly to be closest at finish.

Began fairly, ridden along from wide alley to take up lead leaving straight, backed off tempo nicely after working a little early, made them chase from 500 M, 2Ls clear and kicked strongly in straight to be denied in shadows of post.

Bounced out well, taken straight to fence to settle behind pace, enjoyed good trip behind leader 3Ls away, under pressure on turning, run opened up and stuck to task well grinding away to fight out finish.
Standard to begin, restrained to rear shortly after start, raced on rails 10Ls away throughout, lobbed along at tail to turn, swung wide and disappointed for run at 200 M. Set too bit a task.

Away with rest, faded back to take up usual position in rearward division, raced 8Ls away on rails, angled 2-wide from 800 M, still well back on turn, gained split and closed race off hard to make the frame.

Broke with them, pushed along to hold midfield position on rails, had easy run 5Ls away in mid-section, niggled along on turn, eased into gap in straight, chased hard in middle of track to claim leader in final strides.
Bounded in air and lost ground, raced detached at rear 15Ls off front runners, never willing to stretch out, lost more ground as race went on. Very weak effort. (See Racing Incidents.)
Broke well, showed good early speed to contest for lead, made use of to race outside of lead 3Ls away, raced on bridle throughout, began to struggle on turning, gradually faded out of it.

Began well, unable at slot in early, posted 3-wide in midfield 6Ls away, always working without cover in middle section, flat out making run on turn, failed to close off as normally would offering nothing. (See Racing Incidents.)

Fair to begin, stayed with them early to settle in midfield position, raced 2-wide 6Ls away throughout, made a little ground to be 4Ls down on turn, hard ridden into straight and gave ground weakly last 200 M.
Around midfield. About 5Ls back at 800 M. 3Ls down turning in. Made up some late ground to be nearest at finish after being held up until 200 M.
Prominent 2nd or 3rd behind the leader but proved difficult to settle. Kept on in straight until weakened badly final 200 M.
Slowly away. At rear. At least 10Ls back at 800 M. Swift headway on the outside 600 M out to be in midfield but widest turning in. Kept finding in straight but the post just came too soon.
Ridden forward from outside barrier to contest early lead before settling 1 to 2Ls off the pace. Ran on well final 200 M and just did enough to hold off late charge from 2nd horse final 100 M.
Jumped well before dropping steadily to midfield or worse. Towards rear around 4 to 5Ls back rounding the turn. Made up some ground inside 200 M until not quickened close home.
Took lead from 1500 M. Headed 200 M out and weakened.
Always at rear. Never a factor.
Never far off about 3Ls off the pace. One-paced to straight.
Hard ridden early to be 2Ls behind the pace. 3 to 4Ls back from 1200 M. Kept on without looking dangerous in straight.
Slowly away. Never better than midfield. Very weak in straight.
Towards rear despite being niggled along. 7 or 8Ls back at 800 M. Made up good ground final 250 M but always held by placed horse.
Ridden along and improved steadily from rear to 2nd just 1L off the leader from 1000 M. Weakened final 200 M.
At rear. 9Ls or so back at 800 M. Ran on well final 400 M until one-paced close home but did enough to secure 3rd.
Forward of midfield about 3 to 4Ls off the speed. 2Ls back from 400 M. Held up and unable to improve until the end of the straight.
Led on the fence, couldn't match winner's sprint turning for home, stayed on moderately.
Raced at the back of the field 1 off, rails came to the outside in the straight, failed to run on.
Checked at the 900 M whilst at the tail of the field, never recovered.
Settled in handy position on the fence, had cover throughout, found little off the bridle and was disappointing.
Made late impression after racing back in the field, 1 off with cover.
Wide and back in the field for most of the trip, struggled in the latter stages.
Raced outside the leader, extended smartly in the straight for a decisive win.
Settled just off the speed 2 wide, finished gamely.
Positioned 1 off, midfield, stayed on well despite having to cover ground mid race. (Rider dropped whip near 300 M.)
Slow to begin, checked soon after the start. Took up a position on the rail at the back of the field, never a factor.
Began awkwardly, was then able to track the leader along the fence, gave ground quickly after the 300 M.
Settled back on the fence after having drawn wide, switched to the outside in the straight, rallied for sound effort.
Struggled over the concluding stages after racing 1 out 1 back.
Midfield throughout, 1 off, made good ground in the run home despite chequered passage.
Settled prominently behind the pace. Kept on well over the final stages but unable to gain ground on eventual winner.
Behind leaders early. Steadied at 1100 M and then settled on fence in midfield until straightening. Failed to quicken thereafter.
Moved into the lead after 1100 M. Took a length's advantage into the straight and stayed on well over the concluding stages to hold off rivals.
Jumped fairly and steadily dropped behind midfield. In rear section on straightening. Steadied to avoid traffic at 300 M and only ran past tired runners.
Raced wide in midfield. 3-wide turning for home. Stayed on same pace in the straight.
Slowly away and trailed field until home straight. Only ran past beaten runners.
Dropped back from widest draw and raced in a rearward spot until home straight. Remained on same pace thereafter. (Blood in trachea.)
Contended for the early lead before settling 2-wide behind the leader. Kept on fairly but unable to turn up a notch in the straight.
Settled towards the rear. Saved ground along the rails making home turn. Picked up nicely after 300 M and stormed home for a minor placing.
Best out but outpaced by frontrunners. Crowded and shuffled back to midfield after 1100 M. Never quickened and made no impression in the straight.
Kept along the rails in midfield. Made up a bit of late ground over the final 200 M.
In front briefly at the start. Steadied at 1100 M and settled in front of midfield. 2-wide and kept within 4Ls of the pace making home turn. Ran on only fairly in the straight.
Hard ridden and raced 3-wide in a forward position. Kept within a length of the leader making home turn but weakened badly in the straight. (Irregular heartbeat.)
Raced 3-wide in midfield. Ran on fairly in the straight.
3-wide with cover one from rear and about 7Ls from the front through to home turn, made only very minor late ground.
Slowly away, settled around midfield on fence about 5Ls off pace early, niggled along to take closer order at 1000 M, 4Ls down in 6th at top of homestretch, one-paced.
Always struggling in rear group, never much better than 6Ls off pace at any stage, under pressure when wide turning for home, soon well beaten.
Slowly away, settled towards rear about 6Ls off speed early on and similarly placed taking final bend, ran on strongly from off pace but post came too soon.
Soon disputing early lead, 1L clear at 1000 M and 2Ls to the good at top of home straight, grabbed by winner 150 M out, tired and barely hung onto 3rd place.
Always caught 3 and 4-wide no cover in midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed, dropped out from top of home straight.
Sent on out 5-wide no cover early, 2-wide and 1L down in 2nd at 800 M, faded out from top of home straight and eased down final 200 M.
Always midfield about 5Ls off pace, never really threatened to draw closer after final bend.
Slowly away and always last about 8Ls off pace until home turn, made some decent late ground, never nearer.
Box-seated in 3rd position about 2Ls off speed, had every chance to at least place but lacked the gears. (Epiglottic entrapment.)
Always near rear about 6Ls from the front, never on terms and eased down a long way out.
Raced prominently in 5th or so and about 3Ls off speed until home turn, picked up well to lead 150 M out, driven out to hang on.
Always midfield about 4Ls off pace, never threatened to get much closer in homestretch.
3-wide with cover when prominent at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 4th at 1000 M and same turning for home, had every chance to place if good enough.
Steadied at start, worse than midfield about 6Ls behind leader early on, not much better off taking home turn, ran on well inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
In midfield about 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, lost place on home turn, soon pulled up. (Bled.)
Soon led on fence, 2Ls clear at 800 M and 1L in front at 400 M, headed over 200 M out and faded markedly late.
Dropped in midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed from 1000 M to home turn when 4-wide and under pressure, soon faded out.
Settled in rear early about 9Ls off pace, made up some decent late headway, nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Held up towards rear about 7Ls off pace early on and no closer taking home turn, never dangerous.
Didn't lead as usual, raced in 2nd or 3rd about 2Ls off pace from 1200 M to home turn, tired from 300 M and very weak late.
Checked at the start, about 6Ls behind speed in 10th until the final bend, headway to be 3Ls down in 4th at 200 M, ran around a little late but still stayed on strongly for 2nd.
Towards rear about 7Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover until the home straight, ran on fairly well in the finish without threatening a place, never nearer.
Best away, took up box seat position on fence 2Ls off pace in 2nd or 3rd through to home straight, led over 200 M out, always in command.
Slowly away, always about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in midfield until home turn, always well held by principals. (Lame next day.)
Blundered the start and raced greenly throughout, about 9Ls rear until home turn, made up some good late ground to be nearest at the finish.
Raced greenly, 3Ls down in 4th but left 3-wide no cover on the circle, fly-leapt 700 M out, one-paced in home straight.
3-back on fence about 4Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, closer turning for home, 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, no extra late but did enough for a place.
At rear. About 7Ls down at 1000 M. 5Ls back turning in but got held up for some distance near 350 M. Made up good ground final 250 M when in the clear.
Led approaching 1400 M. Headed 1200 M and tracked the leader from 1000 M. Kept on well in straight and hit front 100 M out before getting pipped by the winner close home.
In 5th spot about 3Ls back. One-paced in straight and was steadied off heels in the run to the line.
Towards rear. Steadied when unable to improve at 300 M and again at 200 M. Not a threat thereafter.
Towards rear. About 5Ls down turning in. Unable to quicken in straight.
Soon in midfield but trapped wide and without cover from 1200 M. Towards rear turning in and soon dropped to last.
Soon in 6th or 7th spot about 3 to 4Ls behind the pace. About 5Ls down in midfield at 1000 M. Ran on gamely 200 M out to snatch win final stride.
Slowly away but soon recovered to be in midfield or worse. About 6Ls back at 1000 M. One-paced in straight before weakened final 200 M.
Towards rear. Some 5Ls back at 1200 M. 4Ls back turning in. Ran on steadily without threatening to place.
Slowly away. Soon midfield or worse. About 6Ls down at 1000 M. Never a threat in straight.
Jumped best before settling in 3rd spot just 1L or so off the pace. Kept on in straight and was very one-paced inside 100 M.
Prominent. 4th from 1400 M about 2Ls off the speed. Dropped quickly out of contention inside 300 M.
At rear. Last turning in. Ran past tired rivals final 300 M.
Prominent and hung out for the major part of the race. Took up running at 1200 M. Kept on in straight but was no match for the first pair final 100 M.
Raced wide in rear of field to straight. Ran on past beaten runners closing stages.
Prominent to straight. Gradually weakened.
Towards rear throughout. Ran home one-paced.
Raced mainly 3-wide in midfield to straight. Soon came to challenge after straightening and ran on to be nearest at finish without threatening.
Broke well and led to straight. Gradually faded.
Settled in forward of midfield within 3Ls of pace on rails. Only produced moderate progress under pressure in straight without threatening.
Close up. Disputed lead coming out of back straight. Gained narrow advantage briefly after home turn before overhauled over 200 M out.
Not far off, just off heels of leaders on rails. Did not find much room behind weakening runners in straight. Produced some impression late.
Never seen with a chance racing in last few throughout.
Raced wide in last few to straight. Never nearer.
Held up in midfield on rails. Shifted out for a run after straightening and ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Slightly slow out. Quickly picked up to midfield. Quickened well upon straightening to take charge over 200 M out. Won readily.
In last few to straight. Soon weakened after straightening.
Well back to straight. Kept on well for good late impression in the run home.

Awkward to begin and lost ground, settled down in unfamiliar role near rear, raced 2 wide 9Ls away, eased 3 wide from 600 M, unable to quicken when making run between horses on turning, only plodded to line.

Away with rest, settled down in midfield, raced 2-wide 6Ls away, had easy run in middle stages, trailed 3 wide on turning, kept improving between horses in straight, raced a little one paced and could only hold ground last 200 M.

Slowly into stride, assumed usual role near enough to rear, raced 3 wide 12Ls away in mid section, kept on with 4 wide run from 500 M, stuck on at same pace widest in straight, failed to threaten winner.

Fair to begin, held position on rails in midfield, raced 6Ls from pace throughout, not asked to turn, began to struggle early in straight, failed to show any turn of foot and only kept on at same pace to line.
Average to begin, pressed forward when trapped wide early to race 2 wide without cover 3Ls off lead, always struggling with good speed, under pressure on turn, compounded badly in straight.

Fast to break from wide alley, crossed to lead easily in first 200 M, handed up to race behind leader when challenged, hard ridden on turn after good speed in mid section, gradually faded out in straight.

Fast into stride, allowed to roll forward from outside alley, did plenty of work to take up running, kept them chasing 4Ls clear in mid section, still had good break to 300 M, tired last furlong but did well to hold 3rd.

Broke well, restrained to near rear from awkward alley, raced 2 wide 10Ls away, made 3 wide run from 700 M, tracked into race nicely to be 5Ls down on turning, came with solid run in straight to overhaul all but winner.

Away well, pushed on to take up midfield spot 6Ls from pace, forced to race 3 wide from midpoint without cover, came with 4 wide run from 500 M. Still there until 250 M but weakened late after doing extra work. (Lost plate.)

Away well, pressed forward to hold prominent spot 3 back on fence 4Ls from leader, had run of race in mid section, gained clear passage on turning, challenged strongly at 200 M but just couldn't match them last bit.

Average to begin, urged along to settle just worse than midfield on rails, 6 to 7Ls away in mid section, used nothing to turn, followed rails and closed hard without rounding a horse to score solid win.

Broke with them, lacked early speed and faded back, raced in rearward division as usual 10Ls away on rails, spent little in run appreciating fast pace, stuck to fence in straight and closed race off nicely.

Slowly into stride, settled at rear of field 10 to 12Ls away, lobbed along at tail throughout, still well back on turn, tracked nicely early in straight, weaved between runners and finished well to be closest at finish.

Jumped with line, niggled to take closer order, slotted in to box seat 2 wide with cover 5Ls away, angled 3 wide from 600 M, outpaced at top of straight, lacked usual finish and kept on at one clip to line. Crowded late.
Never better than midfield. Slightly hampered early in straight. Kept on same pace under pressure without threatening.
Not far off sitting just 2Ls behind pace on rails to straight. Soon weakened.
Soon took up running and led to 200 M. Weakened.
Raced 3-wide in midfield to straight. Quickened well to hold every chance inside final 200 M but unable to sustain effort close to home.
Settled mainly 2-wide in midfield. Quickened well alongside winner to hold every chance inside final 200 M only to be pipped at post.
Soon in rear. Ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Broke well settling 3 wide towards rear. Ran on down centre of straight without threatening.
Soon dropped to last few and never seen with a chance.

Settled on rails in forward of midfield. Came to challenge upon straightening and obtained split 300 M out. Drew level passing 200 M and fought on dourly throughout closing stages to prevail by the narrowest of margins.
Settled towards rear. Did not find too much room behind runners early in straight. Made moderate progress closing stages without threatening.
Broke well, settling outside leader. Found no extra and overhauled over 200 M out.
Slow out. Raced in rear. Tailed off into straight.
Raced in forward of midfield. Similar position turning in. Slightly hampered 300 M out. Kept on same pace without threatening.
Midfield ealry. Took closer order 3-wide coming out of back straight. With leaders turning for home but soon weakened. (Lame next morning.)

Reasonable to begin, niggled along but couldn't slot in, raced further back than expected 3 wide without cover 6Ls off them, closed to be 4Ls away on turn, kept on at same clip in straight without threatening winner.

Fast into stride, showed good speed to take up usual spot in front, kept them rolling at even clip in mid section, held 1/2L advantage on turning, kicked strongly to 200 M but couldn't keep on and faded last bit.

Checked on jumping, faded back to last from wide alley, raced 9 to 10Ls away 2 wide at rear throughout, began 3 wide run from 600 M, swung widest in straight, closed race off solidly to take 3rd giving far too great a start.

Away well, rolled forward to take up prime spot behind leader, had great run 2Ls away throughout, still travelling on turning, showed no turn of foot when asked and gradually weakened to be well beaten.

Began with them, used up a little to cross from wide alley, raced at leaders girth throughout at even speed, still there to 300 M, didn't find anything when pressure was applied and weakened out tamely.

First to break, allowed to settle in prominent spot 1 out 1 back, had run of race in middle stages, still travelling well on turning for home, unable to go up a gear in straight and weakened out late.

Standard break, ridden up to take up midfield spot 2 wide 5Ls off pace, difficult to settle and bumped at 700 M, began to struggle on turn, checked when weakening out at 200 M and didn't offer thereafter.

Fair to begin, lacked early speed, settled in rearward division on rails 6 to 7Ls away, didn't use a lot in the middle stages, still well back on turning, came between horses with run and did best work late to make the frmae.

Bounded in air and lost ground, positioned worse than midfield 8Ls off pace, raced 3 wide with cover in mid section, tracked nicely 4 wide on turn, closed steadily in straight but lacked turn of foot to be a factor.

Slow to begin and lost 3Ls, raced at tail of field 8 to 9Ls away on rails, didn't spend any petrol in run, travelled well to turn, had field in front on straightening, closed race off well from impossible spot.

Average to begin, faded back to rear from awkward alley, raced 2 wide 8 to 9Ls from front runners, niggled along on turn, in traffic for most of straight but never a real factor and only closed off at one pace.

Fast into stride from inside alley, allowed to relax and settle just off speed raced 4Ls away on rails, had easy time in run, held up significantly on turning, into clear at 250 M and charged late but rival had already pinched break.

Jumped with them, niggled along to take close order, settled in midfield 2 wide 4Ls away, held main rival in pocket when easing 3 wide into straight, cruised to them at 300 M. Accelerated nicely to score another strong win.

Hampered slightly on jumping, lacked early toe and settled in midfield 5Ls away on rails, enjoyed easy run to turn, blocked for a run to 250 M, only kept on at same pace when clear but race was over by that point.

Began reasonably, kept with them early to settle down 4Ls away 3 horses back on rail, enjoyed easy trip in mid-section and not asked to turn, couldn't go with them when they quickened and showed nothing to line.

Broke with rest, lacked early speed and drifted right back to tail 7 to 8Ls away, raced 2 wide throughout spending little in run, eased widest on turning, lacked turn of foot to make impression and closed off race at same pace.

Average to break but soon gathered speed to drive to lead, rolled along at decent clip (overracing) had no advantage on turning, didn't respond when pressure was applied and weakened badly late (mouth abcess morning after).

Standard to begin, lacked early dash, assumed rearward spot 3 wide 6Ls off pace, spent little in run (checked at 1000 M), still well back between horses on turn, offered nothing in straight and was well beaten.

Even break, pressed hard to take closer order, eventually settled 3 wide outside leader, had tough run without cover, tackled for lead on turning, kept going for best part of straight before tiring late to be overhauled by winner.

Average to begin, hard ridden to take closer order, settled in nice spot 2 wide 4Ls away, had cover and enjoyed nice run to turn, in traffic early in straight and stuck to task at same pace when clear, even effort.

Away only fairly, niggled along to keep track, trapped 3 to 4 wide without cover in midfield 3Ls away, steadily made ground to be 2Ls down on turn, kept giving in straight to hit lead at 100 M and score a deserved win.

Broke with line, restrained from wide alley to settle worse than midfield, raced 3 and 4 wide without cover 6Ls away in mid-section, made 5 wide run on turn, closed steadily without really threatening.
Fast into stride, kept driving to cross to leaders girth, pressured between runners to turn, 1L down on turning in, unable to show any real dash at business end and gradually weakened out of it late.

Crowded shortly after start, pressured to hold ground, raced 6Ls away near rear on rails, not really comfortable inside horses, began to make some ground on turn, still in traffic on straightening and finished off fairly when clear.
Broke with rest, kept in touch early and ended up in midfield spot 3 wide 4 to 5Ls away, overraced in middle stages, progressed 4 wide on turn, workload took its toll and made no impression late.

Broke with rest, pushed up to be amongst them early, unable to slot in and travelled 3 wide between horses in midfield, 3Ls away, had cover throughout but lost position approaching turn, got going again in straight to make good late ground.

Showed good turn of foot to be prominent early, slotted in to get run of race behind the leader, travelled well to turn, angled into clear at 300 M but failed to find another gear and only plodded to the line.

Awkward to begin and lost 3Ls, raced at rear on rails 7 to 8Ls off pace, raced well back in 2 wide spot in mid section, still last on turning for home, kept on at same speed to pass weakening runners late.
Midfield, raced on the rail, one paced in the straight.
Settled midfield 2 deep, had cover, stayed on well.
Travelled wide without cover, whilst in a handy position, didn't offer anything in the straight.
Equal 2nd last position throughout, made some late ground in the straight.
Positioned towards the rear of the final, 3 wide with cover, came wide in the straight and ran home strongly.
Weakened considerably in the run home after sharing the lead in the early and middle stages.
Disappointing after sharing the lead, compounded in the straight.
Raced midfield, 3 wide with cover, stayed on strongly.
Tracked the leaders 1 off, kicked clear in the straight, collared on the line.
Equal 2nd last position throughout, made some late ground in the straight.
Travelled near the rear of the field, on the rail, made good ground in the straight continuing along the fence. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced off pace along the fence, failed to impress in the run home.
Settled back in the field, 2 wide with cover, finished off strongly.
Began awkwardly and lost considerable ground, never a factor from then on.
Settled at the rear and trailed field into home straight. Made a strong rally between runners to be closest at finish.
Outpaced early and raced behind midfield. Towards the rear on straightening and only ran past a beaten runner.
Crowded shortly after jumping and trailed field early stages. 3-wide and remained in rear section turning for home. Quickened and closed the race off well.
Pressed forward early. Kept alongside leader making the turn and remained in contention until final 300 M. Faded steadily thereafter.
Better than midfield. Kept along the rails making home turn. Ran on without threatening in the straight. (Saddle shifted.)
2-wide at midfield. Steadied and lost a bit of ground at 800 M. Stayed on same pace in the straight.

Hard ridden from wide draw but was outpaced early. Kept being pressured and improved to be within a length of the leader at the turn. Stayed on fairly early part of straight but unable to find extra closing stages.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Switched out for a rally on straightening and swept to the lead final 100 M.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Failed to quicken on straightening and dropped out.
Settled 3-wide behind midfield. Improved a bit making the turn. Kept on well in the straight and claimed a minor placing.
Raced keenly in the lead early stages. Disputed lead on straightening and was headed near 200 M. Unable to find extra to remain in contention.

Settled in a prominent position behind the leader before switching out on straightening. Quickened well and took the lead near 200 M. Unable to keep momentum and was headed by principals final stages.
Jumped fairly and steadily dropped to rear section. Widest making home turn and made up some ground in the straight.
2-wide and no worse than 3Ls or 4Ls back in mid-division until home straight, soon weakened.
3-wide with cover and worse than midfield about 6Ls off speed at 700 M, 3Ls down but forced widest (5-wide) entering stretch, vying for 3rd when 2Ls back at 200 M but no extra thereafter.
Always prominent, 3-wide with cover over 2Ls back in 4th at 800 M, closer and disputing 3rd off final bend, had every hope but no match for winner's late dash.
Settled about 7Ls off pace towards rear through first half, 3-wide and 5Ls down in 10th taking home turn, finished off very strongly out wide to lead over 50 M out, plenty to spare.
Prominent early within 2Ls of pace, forced out 4-wide no cover on circle and struggling over 3Ls back in 6th or so turning for home, soon left behind, eased down late.
Sent on out wide for clear lead at 900 M, 2Ls ahead on fence at 800 M, 1L to the good at top of stretch, headed about 150 M and faded to miss a place.
Soon restrained in rear about 8Ls off pace, 6Ls down in 11th at top of homestretch, staying on well when tight for room and switched out 150 M out, hit the line well.
Very fractious in gates, steadied at start and soon about 5Ls back around midfield, effort when 3Ls off pace in 7th taking home turn, petered out before the 100 M.
Midfield or so about 4Ls off speed until the 700 M, forced deeper 4-wide into home straight when 3Ls back still in mid-division, 2Ls down in 3rd passing 200 M, failed to find any more.
On fence 2Ls back in 2nd at 800 M, moved out 2-wide on circle to edge closer at top of home straight, found very little under pressure and soon beaten.
Never on terms, about 8Ls back in rear 1000 M out, similar margin and well detached in rear on straightening, no chance.
Always well positioned, 3-back on fence 4Ls back in 5th at 800 M, box-run on the circle to be 2Ls down in 4th at 400 M, had every chance but lacked the pick-up to challenge.
Very keen early in front and saddle slipped forward giving jockey minimal control, swamped at top of home straight, eased down inside final 200 M.
Always caught 4-wide no cover, dropped in 6Ls back in 11th or so at 1000 M, trapped 5-wide off home bend when trying to challenge, effort soon faded.
6Ls back in 6th on fence at 1200 M, 3Ls down in same position taking home turn, ran on well to grab 2nd late.
Never travelled well and mostly in last place at least 7Ls behind early on, never on terms.
Mostly in 2nd place throughout, 2Ls back in 2nd at 1200 M, brief lead at top of stretch before being headed by winner at 250 M, lost out on 2nd place final 50 M.
2-wide and worse than midfield and roughly 5Ls of speed through to home turn, always one-paced and never looked likely to finish better than mid-division.
Nicely placed early when 3Ls back in 3rd and with cover, took closer order turning for home, found zero off the bridle and eased final 100 M.
On fence 6Ls behind towards rear early on, 4Ls back in 9th or so taking home turn, fell away very tamely.
2-wide and 5Ls back in 4th at 1200 M, steadied off heels at 800 M when same margin back, poised to challenge at top of straight, led over 250 M out, ridden out.
Caught 3-wide no cover when 6Ls back in 8th at 1200 M, 4-wide taking final bend when closer and momentarily threatening, one-paced and eased down close to line.
Soon about 8Ls off pace and one from rear, about 6Ls back in rear when 4-wide cornering for home, made some fair late ground through tired rivals.
Covered up in midfield 6Ls back at 1200 M, lost ground when hindered slightly at 800 M, over 4Ls back in midfield swinging for home, always well held.
6Ls back worse than midfield at 1200 M when 3-wide but with cover, forced 5-wide on straightening when 4Ls behind, always toiling from then on.
Always prominent and well placed, 3Ls back in 4th at 1300 M, box run 2Ls back in 3rd on fence at 800 M, closer on straightening, had every possible hope but lacked the gears.
Mostly in joint 4th and never far off racing 2 or 3 wide. Similar turning in but one-paced before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Settled towards rear. Did not have much room early in straight. Obtained run late passing 200 M and only kept on at the same pace.
Soon dropped to rear, reaching tail-end rounding home bend. Went widest into the straight and quickened well down centre to reach 3rd passing 200 M but unable to sustain effort close to home.
Jumped fairly. Soon ridden to prominent position on rails chasing in 3rd. Began to yield ground on top of home bend and weakened in straight.
Settled at the back. Made headway 4 wide rounding home bend. Kept on from midfield into straight before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Disputed 4th far side. Still prominent rounding home bend. Forced to steady about 500 M out and soon weakened.
Raced on rails in midfield. Switched one off the rail for a run entering straight. Ran on steadily under pressure down inner to reach 3rd late.
Raced wide throughout and never better than midfield. Faded under pressure in straight.
Sluggish at start. Gradually picked up to rear of field. Virtually last into straight when not much room early. Made up good ground inside final 200 M.
Tracked leader. Commenced move upon straightening and ran on to take charge over 150 M out. Hung on well under pressure.
Settled wide towards rear far side. Made swift headway rounding home bend to dispute lead briefly entering straight. Soon weakened.
Attempted to make all. Unable to sustain effort and swamped inside final 200 M.
Held up in rear of midfield. Raced 3-wide rounding home bend and into straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Travelled mainly in midfield three off the fence. Only kept on at the same pace without quickening in straight. (Significant back pain following day.)
Trailed the field most of the way and never seen with a chance.
In last few to straight. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Settled mainly in midfield on rails. Looked good place chance when reaching 2nd over 150 M out but swamped close to home.
Travelled mainly in midfield. Forced to steady for a run early in straight. Finished off race quite well inside final 250 M.
Well there, settling comfortably behind tear-away leader rounding home bend. Commenced run turning in drawing clear of rest of field while running past tiring pacemaker over 200 M out. Won readily.
Slightly slow into stride. Travelled mainly one off the rails amongst the front of main group. Gradually weakened passing the 200 M mark.
Soon led, setting fast pace rounding home bend going about 6Ls clear of field. Unable to maintain advantage in straight and headed when tiring badly over 200 M out.
Travelled in rear of field throughout and never a danger. (See Racing Incidents.)
Close up early, settling about 2Ls off the front of the main group. Caught behind heels of runner early in straight only to run on when clear run inside final 250 M.
Travelled mostly 3 or 4 wide in rear of midfield to straight. Ran on quite well under pressure.
Never far off the front of main group most of way to straight, then only kept on at the one pace.

Started fairly, ridden up to hold midfield spot 4Ls back on rails, had easy time in middle stages, had something to offer on turning, unable to go with them when sprint was on and couldn't keep touch last furlong.

Fast to leave stalls, rolled to front easily, kept them going at a solid clip, held a 1/2L to turn, tried to kick but unable to hold off challenge from 250 M point. Dropped right out thereafter (fence not place to be).

Average to begin, drifted back to worse than midfield 6Ls from speed on rails, used little in run, travelled kindly to turn, gained room at 250 M and closed race off fairly without threatening winner.

Broke well, showed good early speed to cross outside leader, raced at leaders girth throughout (hanging) was 1/2 length down on turning, kept giving to 250 M but ran out of fitness and was one paced to line.
Lacked speed from the jump, settled down near rear on rails 8 to 9Ls from frontrunners, under pressure to keep in touch on turn, offered little thereafter and gradually became detached in run home.

Away with rest, drifted back from wide alley, caught 3 and 4 wide worse than midfield, still 5Ls back on turning, hard ridden making 4 wide run into straight. Couldn't sustain effort and lost touch late.

Broke well, restrained from widest alley, settled at tail 7 to 8Ls away, covered some ground 3 wide with cover in mid-section, followed strongly 4 wide on bend still giving a big start, came with big run to overhaul all but winner.

Fair to begin, pushed along to hold spot behind leader, enjoyed run of race spending nothing in mid-section, travelled on bit into straight, received dream split at 300 M to hit lead, ran out of condition and overhauled late.

Began with them, allowed to settle in rearward division from wide alley, raced 2 wide 6 to 7Ls away from pace, not asked in mid-section, hard ridden on turning only got going at 200 M to do best work late.

Jumped well, unable to cross to rails, restrained to find cover in midfield, raced 2 wide 5Ls away in mid-section, slightly unbalanced at 800 M, between horses on turning, obtained clear run from 250 M and closed steadily.
Away well, assumed prominent role in 1 out 1 back spot behind speed, had good run 2Ls away to turn, in traffic early in straight, stuck to task well when clear but could only hold ground to line.

Fast into stride, pressed on to cross but posted 3 wide without cover, always working 1L away covering ground, niggled to keep going into straight battled away to 200 M but hard run took effect and tired out of it late.

Jumped with them, restrained to settle in midfield 4Ls from pace, raced 3 wide with cover in mid-section, tracked nicely to turn, came with strong run at 300 M to overhaul them in the last furlong for a strong win.

Slow to begin, settled slightly detached at rear, raced 9 to 10Ls away at tail in 2 wide spot, still well back with plenty to do on turning, came down outside with long run, made up good ground without threatening winner.
Disputed lead early stages. Became 2nd one out one back home bend. Came to tackle leader upon straightening and hit front just inside 200 M to win convincingly.
Behind midfield when hampered and lost ground approaching home bend. Towards rear into straight and made no show.
Broke well, disputing lead on rails far side. Became 3rd rail just behind leader home bend. Quickened to hold good chance 200 M out but unable to see it out at the finish.
Well there. Took up running 3-wide approaching home bend eventually crossing to rails. Still in front turning in only to be swamped inside final 200 M.
Slightly slow out. Settled towards rear. Gained some ground rounding home bend reaching midfield into straight. Ran home one-paced.
Mainly 3 wide in rear of midfield. Went wider turning in. One-paced in the run home.
Well back far side. Took closer order on rails rounding home bend. Made significant progress down home straight to be nearest at finish.
Never nearer.
Towards rear 3-wide when checked and lost position approaching home bend. Remained in last few around home bend and into straight. Did make some impression late.
Midfield early. Took closer order home bend before dropping out of contention under pressure turning in.
Settled in midfield on rails. Came to challenge under pressure after straightening but only one-paced without quickening.
Settled mainly just better than midfield. Gained 2L 4th into straight. Produced only moderate headway without threatening in closing stages.
Lost many lengths at start. Trailed the field most of way.

Jumped evenly, lacked early speed as usual and settled 6Ls away, caught 3 and 4 wide without cover in mid-section, circled them from 700 M, still well back on turn, stuck to task well making good ground to snatch 3rd (lost plate).
Fastest to leave gates, slotted into 1 out 1 back spot when unable to cross to lead, travelled well in mid-section, battling to go up a notch on turning, gradually faded out of it in straight.
Standard to begin, lacked early toe and settled in rearward division 7Ls of pace, pushed on 3 wide with cover on turn, didn't have a lot of clear running but closed race off only modestly.
Average to begin, settled just worse than midfield, raced 2 wide 6Ls away throughout, travelled well in traffic behind them on turning, steadied when closing at 300 M, finished evenly thereafter.

Showed good speed from gates, took up role outside leader applying pressure, overraced in mid-section, still challenging on turning for home, couldn't match them from 250 M and weakened noticeably late.

Broke with line, settled down in midfield position on rails, raced 5 to 6Ls away throughout, not asked to turn, began to struggle when sprint went on, only held ground on inside which was not place to be.

Began with rest, drifted back to midfield, caught 3 wide from awkward alley, had cover and travelled fairly 5Ls away in mid-section, in traffic early in straight but only kept on at same clip when clear.

Away well, pushed up to hold forward spot, raced behind speed 3Ls away on rails, enjoyed nice run to turn, gained split in straight but unable to go on with it, fitness gave out after thereafter long spell.

Began reasonably, allowed to slot in nicely behind speed, raced in 2 wide spot 4Ls away, enjoyed nice run with cover to turn, in traffic and not clear until 250 M, motored home late making up good ground.

Reasonable break, positioned in midfield when unable to get in, raced 3 wide 4 lengths away without cover, always working to turn, kept giving to 300 M but workload told and gave ground to be well beaten.
Lacked speed from gates, positioned up last on rails 9Ls away, lobbed along at tail throughout, tracked well on turn and swung 6 wide into straight, closed race off fairly doing best work late.

Slowly into stride, allowed to drift back to near tail, raced 2 wide 8Ls from pace, well back to turn, swung 5 wide into straight, closed race off nicely last 200 M making good ground without threatening winner.

Jumped only fairly, soon gathered speed to settle amongst first few, raced 1L away behind leader with run of race to turn, angled clear into straight and loomed up easily, went on to score in good fashion easing off a little late.

Only standard to break, soon gathered momentum to take up running after 400 M, kept rolling along on bit at even clip, challenged on turning, couldn't go with winner at 250 M but fought solidly to make the frame (in worst part of track).

Broke with them, hard ridden early to eventually cross to race outside of leader, pressured leader thereafter, still challenging on turning, lead briefly but couldn't rally final furlong and ran out of gas late.

Even break, slotted in to ideal spot 1 out 1 back 2Ls away, enjoyed run of race in mid-section, urged along between runners on turning, angled to outside passing 250 M mark and closed off nicely without threatening winner.

Out with rest, showed good toe to take up running, pressured in mid-section and kept them going at an even clip, held narrow advantage on turning, unable to go up a notch when sprint went on and faded out late.
Average jump, hard ridden to hold spot early, raced 3 wide 3Ls away, made turn awkwardly, followed eventual winner on turning, couldn't maintain effort and weakened noticably late.

Broke with line, unable to match them early, trapped 3 wide without cover midfield, rolled forward to be outside leaders on turn, hit lead passing 250 M mark, kept on to score a solid win after doing plenty of work.

Average to jump away, settled 2 wide 3Ls away in 2nd half of field, enjoyed easy run, still back between horses on turning, didn't find extra gear in straight and could only manage to hold ground to line.
Fast to leave gates, soon lost ground to be back near tail, raced 2 wide 4Ls away, gradually lost touch from 600 M when unable to go the speed, showed nothing in run home to be beaten a long way.

Began well, restrained to take trail, raced behind leader throughout, enjoyed easy run to turn, held up in traffic early in straight, still not clear until 200 M, closed race off fairly when run presented.

Fair to break, settled in rear half on field on rails but only 3Ls away, not asked in mid-section, still amongst horses on turning, saw daylight at 200 M and charged home late hitting the line strongly.
Slow to begin and lost considerable ground, was 8 to 10Ls away detached early, kept chasing in mid-section, still well back on turn, made good ground in straight passing some beaten runners late.
Raced midfield, wide without cover, extra ground main factor in weakening to be well beaten.
Midfield along the rails, lack of fitness took toll in the straight.
Settled last throughout, found little when placed under pressure at the entrance to the straight.
Just off the speed, 1 off with cover, held its ground in the run home.
Raced near the tail of the field, had cover, offered little at the business end of the race.
3 deep without cover. Stayed on dourly after racing just off the speed.
Hampered at the start and was slow to muster speed. Never a threat from then on. (Mucopus.)
From wide barrier, made every post a winner to score running away.
Parked 3 wide with cover, slightly worse than midfield, made some ground in the straight.
Settled midfield along the fence, ran on gamely.
Travelled in second position from wide gate, one paced in the straight.
Travelled in a rearward position on the fence, struggled over the last 200 M.
Positioned back in the field, 2 deep with cover, finished off soundly.
Tracked the leader for most of the trip, commenced to tire turning for home.
Jumped to an early lead. Continued to be in front going into home straight. Headed by winner near 100 M and was just beaten out for 2nd place near the line.
Niggled along early stages and tagged alongside the leader back straight. Unable to keep pace entering home straight and was swamped closing stages.
Trailed field until straightening. Steadily made up ground in the straight.
Ridden along from a wide draw to race among leaders early. Held 3-wide at midfield back straight. Kept on same pace in the home straight.
Settled on fence behind midfield. Trailed field into home straight and made a rally between runners to be closest at finish.
Settled behind midfield. Switched wide making home turn. Lacked a quickening pace and made no impression in the straight.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Switched out after straightening and quickened nicely. Took the lead for good near 100 M.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Lacked a response when asked on straightening. Weakened.
Settled in a prominent spot behind the leader until straightening. Continued well in the closing stages to pick up 2nd place near the line.
2-wide better than midfield. Kept within 3Ls of the pace in the back straight. Stayed on fairly in the straight.
Outpaced early stages. Widest making home turn and only ran past a beaten runner in the straight.
Worse than midfield leading far side bunch about 5Ls behind the pace through first half, never dangerous.
Away well and crossed to lead by stand's rail by 1L at 800 M, headed over 400 M out and petered out inside final 200 M.
Always prominent and no worse than 2Ls back in 3rd until the 400 M, ran on for pressure close home for a place, finished lame.
Always struggling in rear at least 7Ls off the speed, made some very minor late ground but never really on terms.
Awkward break with rider losing an iron for about 100 M, about 7Ls behind in rear at halfway on far side, made some nice late ground, nearest at finish.
Always in firing line, disputing lead at halfway, skipped over 2Ls clear with 200 M to go, ridden out.
Always off the bit and near the rear on far side of track, weakened further inside final 300 M.
Best away and soon crossed to stand's rail, steadied once headed at 800 M, close enough until the 300 M but always looked held in final stages despite not having the greatest deal of room.
Towards rear on the far side and always toiling, weakened further in final stages.
Always niggled in about 8th place and 4Ls off speed until the 400 M, never threatened to get much closer.
Slow to begin, over 2Ls back in 5th or so through early stages, soon driven along to keep tabs with principals and stayed on at same pace.
Settled about 3Ls back in midfield until halfway, headway to go 2Ls back in 2nd passing 200 M pole, never likely to reel in winner.
Best away, soon led by 1L on fence before settling at 900 M into box-run position until stretch, no clear room until 300 M out, ran on fairly but compromised winning chances by hanging in.
Only about 1L off pace when caught 4-wide no cover early on, 3-wide no cover from 800 M but back-pedalling before home straight entrance, eased down final 200 M when well beaten.
Struggled to muster early speed, 2-wide and 5Ls back in 10th or so at 1000 M, checked at 800 M and hard pressed to keep up turning for home, soon well beaten.
Awkward start, darted from wide gate to fence, 4-back and worse than midfield about 5Ls from the front until being checked badly at 600 M, posed little threat in home straight.
3-wide with cover in rear about 6Ls off pace at 1000 M, headway to be 4Ls down in 7th taking home turn, same margin in 6th at 200 M, tired late.
Marginal lead on fence at 900 M, a neck clear at top of homestretch, headed 200 M out, failed to kick with quinella pair but did enough for a place.
3Ls back in midfield through to the homestretch, had every chance of at least a place but failed to quicken.
Always caught very wide (4-wide no cover) but in midfield about 3Ls off pace until the 600 M, forced wider and struggling turning for home, dropped out.
Disputed lead at 900 M out 2-wide, a neck back in 2nd at top of home straight, narrow lead 200 M out, did just enough to hang on.
3-back on fence 3Ls off speed in midfield until the 600 M when taking a bad check, fell 6Ls behind leaders taking home turn, dropped out rapidly.
Slowly away, 8Ls behind in last at 1000 M, still well behind turning for home, made scant impression down centre of track.
4-wide but cover near rear about 6Ls off speed at 1000 M, not much closer taking final bend, finished off quite well in final 200 M, nearest at the finish.
Nicely positioned 2-wide and close-up 2Ls off speed through first half of race, struggling to keep up turning for home and faded out.
Covered up and within 2Ls of pace in 4th or so until home turn, had his opportunity to figure in the money but didn't have the kick.
Always at the back and never in contention.
Began well vying for lead outside leader. Gained slender advantage rounding home bend. Came under pressure to hold position when narrowly headed into straight. Kept on before no extra near finish.
Settled in last few mainly three off the rails. Commenced run approaching home turn and ran on quite well down centre of straight to assert authority close to home.
Prominent early, gradually settling in midfield on rails. Lost ground approaching home turn and hampered and dropped further back 600 M out. Just kept on steadily in the run home.
Never far off 2-wide in 4th or 5th. Remained similar into straight and kept on same pace to the line.
Waited with. Commenced move entering straight. Improving well between runners when forced to steady inside 300 M. Soon recovered and showed a great turn of foot closing stages to miss narrowly.
Led early, settling just off the pace on rails. Behind leaders in 3rd rail turning in. Kept on same pace under pressure without quickening.
Raced wide towards rear. Failed to hold place turnig in and further detached in straight.

Didn't jump well. Quickly recovered to midfield racing keenly. Remained 3-wide in midfield rounding bend and failed to quicken under pressure early in straight. Dropped out tamely closing stages. (Mucus.) (Lame on Monday.)
Wide in midfield early. Took closer order rounding home bend. Disputed 3rd into straight but soon dropped out of contention.
Niggled along in midfield early. Improved wide far side to join leaders passing 1000 M. Disputed lead turning in gaining brief advantage about 200 M out before swamped close to home.
Midfield when steadied and lost some ground early. Recovered to mid-division into straight but not much room early on. Only obtained run late about 200 M out and finished off race quite nicely.
