Sluggish at start. Quickly recovered to forward of midfield. Remained same into straight when came under pressure. Kept on before finding no extra inside final 200 M.

Began well from wide draw, settling 2-wide in midfield not very far off the lead. Lost position slightly turning in but soon picked up ground, however, only produced moderate impression in the run home. (Mucus.)
Soon took up running and attempted to make all. Broke over 1L clear over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort and soon overhauled.
Always well behind and never seen with a chance.
Settled well back. Remained in last few into straight. Responded well under pressure after straightening to grab 2nd closing stages without threatening winner.
Broke well. Settled in 5th in midfield on rails. Switched out for a run upon straightening and quickened up to take charge 200 M out. Won convincingly.
Settled towards rear. Made up good ground down centre of track inside final 300 M without threatening.
Settled in 4th 2-wide within 2Ls of pace. Lost position turning in and never recover.
Settled behind midfield on rails. Kept on steadily at the one pace in straight.
Ridden to muster speed early, settling just outside leader. Similar turning in but unable to quicken under pressure and soon dropped out.
Settled in 2L 3rd on rails to straight. Gradually lost touch after straightening.

Began with them, unable to show enough speed to slot across, raced 3 wide 2Ls away without cover, allowed to slide forward to be 1L away on turn, hit front at 250 M and was overhauled late. Solid effort after tough run.

Standard beginning, drifted back to near last, raced 3 wide with cover 5 to 6Ls from speed (average pace) tracked nicely on turn, 3Ls down into straight, came with well timed run to hit lead at 200 M and win with some authority.

Average start, positioned in midfield, had run of race in 1 out 1 back position 3Ls away, improved between horses to be 2Ls down on turn, kept on evenly in traffic for most of straight, closed off fairly without threatening winner.

Fast into stride, crossed to rails first, raced behind leader throughout, had nice run to turn, angled out into clear at 400 M, went with them but just lacked turn of foot to keep up, did well to hold on and make the frame.

Slowly into stride, drifted back to tail 6Ls away on rail, lobbed along at rear throughout, tracked 2 wide on turn, still last on turning in traffic, gained run at 300 M but lacked turn of foot to factor and was one paced to line.

Jumped fairly, lacked speed as usual, settled worse than midfield 5Ls away on rails, not asked in middle stages, well back in traffic on turn, unable to find a way out until 250 M, closed race off strongly when clear to snatch 2nd.

Average break, had enough speed to be prominent early, raced first outside the leader 1L away, raced on bridle between horses to turn, couldn't muster when sprint went on, only held ground in straight. (Reported abnormal breathing.)

No speed early, urged along to hold spot 3 back on rails, had easy time 2 to 3Ls away in mid-section, niggled along on turning for home, unable to dash and gradually lost touch in straight to be well beaten.

Jumped with them, restrained to rear, overraced 3 and 4 wide 5Ls off pace in middle stages, allowed to slide forward 5 wide without cover on bend, hard ridden and workload began to take toll at 300 M, made no headway last furlong.

Fast into stride, used up some petrol to cross to front, bowled along at even speed 1L clear in front, still held advantage when increasing the tempo into straight, began to feel the pinch at 300 M and weakened out late.
Well back early. Gradually improved to just behind midfield before home bend. Not much room in critical stages in straight. Not properly tested. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced mainly 2-wide in rear of midfield. Went wider for a run turning in but only kept on steadily at the one pace without quickening.
Settled on rails in midfield. Commenced move upon straightening. Ran on well between runners to grab lead close to home. Readily.
Always well back, racing mainly one out one back to straight. Came to challenge after straightening but only produced moderate impression in the finish.
Never far off in 3rd on rails. Came home strongly but did not find too much room 150 M out. Fought on steadily to the line.
Attempted to make all. Narrowly headed on rails early in straight. Came under pressure to hold place before finding no extra final 200 M.
Disputed lead early. Moved up to hit front passing 200 M but unable to resist winner's strong late challenge.
Settled wide in midfield from poor draw. Hampered and lost position 1400 M. Sustained progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled at the back. Raced wide rounding home bend. Became last into straight. Produced nothing under pressure.
Mainly 2-wide in midfield. Came 3-wide entering home straight. Made no impression after straightening.
Towards rear when steadied early dropping to last. Remained well back on rails rounding home bend. Snuck up to midfield entering home straight. One-paced.

Fast into stride, held forward position 3 back on fence 4Ls away, angled into 2 wide spot at 800 M, 3Ls down on turning and came with strong run at 350 M, battled to finish race off over latter stages.

Began with them, lacked early speed and eased back to last, raced on rails 12Ls off pace, niggled to keep touch at rear, virtually last on turning, weaved between horses in straight, came with surging run at 200 M to get up on line.

Standard beginning, pressed forward to take closer order, raced 5Ls off pace in 2 wide spot, unbalanced at 1200 M, had easy run throughout, amongst horses on turning, kept steadily making ground but unable to make real impression.

Fastest to begin, crossed easily from wide alley to take spot on rails, restrained to race behind leader, had good run following speed 2Ls away, angled out on turning, chased gamely in straight to fight out 3 way finish.

Bounced out well, restrained to find cover, planted 3/4 wide in midfield 7Ls from speed, always working hard, began to make ground on turn, kept coming in straight to be closest at finish. Big run. (Inquiry into riding tactics.)

Not quickly away, niggled to push through into midfield trail, raced 5Ls away on fence, began to struggle on turning, kept giving to hold ground to 200 M but was a spent force last furlong. Weakened out late.

Slow to begin, lost ground when steadied, settled towards rear 9 to 10Ls from leaders, raced on rails not spending much to turn, again inconvenienced in straight at 200 M, closed off evenly thereafter. (Lost plate.)
Standard beginning, drifted to rear from widest alley, raced 10Ls away in 2 wide spot, not asked in middle stages, well back on turning, never really got going and only passed tired runners late.

Began well, prominent early and slotted into prime 1 out 1 back position, forced to race 3 wide without cover, from 800 M, 3 to 4Ls away, swung a little wide into straight, stuck on well in straight without threatening winner.

Average to break, urged along to take up spot, settled just off midfield 7 to 8Ls away on rail, in traffic on turn, hampered severely when going for run on rails at 200 M, had little chance thereafter.

Began awkwardly, ridden with urgency and used up to cross to leaders girth, race 1 length away, always chasing in mid-section, moved up to challenge on turn, couldn't go on at 250 M and stopped quickly after early burn.

Amongst them early, lost position when tightened at 1200 M, raced 3 wide in midfield 5 to 6Ls away, niggled along on bend, back and amongst horses on turning, lacked usual turn of foot and only plodded to line.

Jumped with them, unable to hold forward spot and settled worse than midfield, raced 2 wide 8Ls away in middle stages, made 3 wide run on turn, closed off fairly without looking likely before being checked at 100 M. (Lost plate.)

Away well, pushed along to eventually take up running after 300 M, strode along in front at solid clip, held 1L advantage on turning, pinched break in straight, held off challengers until shadows of post. Solid effort.
Broke with them, unable to slot in and posted 3-wide without cover, always working 4Ls away wide in middle section, pressed on to be 2Ls away on turn, was one-paced in run home and faded last bit.

Showed no speed from gate, ridden along at tail, raced on rails 10Ls from front runners, again pushed along approaching turn, made some ground to 200 M when held up but doubtful would have been a factor.

Not impressive to leave gates, urged along to hold position just off midfield, raced 5Ls away on rails, not asked in middle section, angled out on turn, weaved between horses in straight but lacked extra gear to be a factor.
Awkward to begin, drifted back to worse than midfield, raced in 2-wide spot 6-7Ls from pace, eased out into straight, closed race off fairly down outside.
Broke with field, caught a little wide early and pressed forward to slot in 1 out 1 back, raced 2-wide 3-4Ls away in middle section, urged along from 500 M, offered nothing in run home.
Fastest to begin, pushed along to hold spot behind the leader, had good run 2Ls away trailing speed, reigned up on turn, gained dream split entering straight, accelerated nicely to score an easy win.

Crowded and steadied early, settled down near enough to last on rails 8-9Ls away, didn't use much in middle section, hard ridden approaching turn, couldn't find much at all in straight. (Jockey advised reluctant to stride out.)

Standard start, ridden up to hold better spot 3 back on rails 3 to 4 lengths away, had easy time thereafter, crowded slightly at 600 M, in traffic on turn, hard ridden in straight and got going late to grab 2nd on line.

Fast to begin, hard ridden to take up running passing post first time, overraced a touch and kept rolling at even clip 1L clear, tackled at 400 M, 1/2L clear into straight but unable to go on with it and slowly faded last 200 M.

Jumped nicely, allowed to slide across into midfield running line position, raced 2-wide 4-5Ls away throughout, gained 3-wide trail into race at 400 M, steadily made ground down outside to snatch 3rd late. Even effort.

Broke well, showed good early speed to challenge for lead, applied pressure before sitting 1L away outside leader in middle section. Challenged on turning and was in it until 200 M but couldn't sustain run last bit.
Fair to begin and lacked early toe, raced near enough to last 8-9Ls from leaders in 2-wide spot, still well back on turn, made run between horses and made up some good ground late.
Shared lead at solid clip, gave in quickly after entering the straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Tracked the leader for the trip but failed to capitalise after turning for home.
Raced off the speed, came wide in the straight but was out of gas over the concluding stages.
Worked hard early to race in equal lead. Couldn't maintain the effort in the run home.
Positioned well back early and finished off strongly while having a checked passage in the run home.
Settled back in the field, 1 off never likely.
Settled 1 out 1 back, stuck to task well.
Settled towards the rear on the fence made reasonable ground in the straight.
Settled midfield along the fence, stayed to the inside in the straight and improved to take the lead over the latter stages.
Raced in the rear division, struggled under pressure after coming wide in the run home.
Last and never improved for the trip.
Shared last place honours throughout, never threatened.

Outpaced and settled behind the leaders early stages. Better than midfield back straight but was niggled along to keep pace at the Rock. Checked at 600 M and was hard ridden to keep position at the turn. Found nothing in the straight

Ridden along out of the gates and had the early lead. Settled prominently behind the leader after 1000 M and remained in similar spot until straightening. Kept on fairly but unable to turn up a notch.
2-wide behind the pace early stages. Raced at midfield in back straight and was hampered at 600 M. Only remained at same pace in the straight.
Botched the start and trailed field. Raced along the rails and was near last on straightening. Steadily made up ground in the straight.
Settled towards the rear and was last on straightening. Switched out and rallied nicely in the straight.
Settled 2-wide at midfield or worse. Wide and made up some ground home turn. Unable to find much final 250 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled on fence at midfield. Checked severely and dropped to rear section at 600 M. Switched out for a run on straightening and closed the race off nicely.
Settled behind midfield. Steadily improved position after 800 M and was within a length of the leader turning for home. Continued well and drew clear final 200 M.
Niggled to hold a forward position. Disputed lead until 1000 M. Kept within 3Ls of the leader until home turn. No response when pressured and tired after straightening.
Outpaced and settled in a rearward position. 3-wide making home turn and swung out on straightening. Made up ground in the straight.
Wide without cover in a forward position. Near the 1000 M was allowed to go forward and took the lead. Remained in a disputed lead heading into home straight but steadily dropped out thereafter.

Outpaced by leaders and raced 3-wide at midfield early. Steadily made up ground after 900 M and was alongside the leader turning for home. Took the lead on straightening before being headed at 200 M. Stayed on fairly thereafter.
Shoved out very deep (5-wide) at 1300 M and dragged back to last 8Ls off pace 1100 M out, 4-wide (widest) turning for home when 6Ls down in 9th, ran on, never nearer.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 4th and 3Ls off speed at 1000 M, under pressure to lie up when circling for home, rather one-paced in the finish.
Crossed from wide gate to be 4-back on fence in 8th about 6Ls from the lead, 5Ls back in 8th entering stretch, stayed on fairly well late for a place.
Fairly well placed 2-wide and 5Ls back in mid-division at 1000 M, began to lose position from 600 M to 400 M and petered out quite feebly in the homestretch.
Pressed on to sit 1L off leader out 2-wide at 1100 M, moved upsides turning for home and clear lead briefly 300 M out, headed over 200 M out and dropped out tamely.
Tardy break, always 3-back on fence about 4Ls off speed in 5th or so through to home straight, challenging and 1L down 200 M out with every hope to at least place, one-paced final stages.
Awkward break losing ground, shared last place 8Ls off pace throughout, never competitive.
Mostly 3-wide with cover around midfield about 6Ls from front until 600 M, 4Ls down in 7th taking home turn, picked up well to lead while bumping runner-up 150 M out, scraped in.
Never travelled well despite box-seat run throughout on fence 2Ls back in 3rd, always under pressure but still hit the front 200 M out, bumped when headed by winner 150 M out, kept on.
Always 3-wide no cover, 3Ls back in 5th at 1100 M, 3Ls down in 4th into home straight, kept on quite well despite the tough trip, fairly commendable effort.
Best away and soon by 1L on the fence, joined at top of home straight and folded right out once headed at top of home straight, finished lame.
Crowded early on, 7Ls back in 10th when 2-wide at 1000 M, about 8Ls back in rear off home turn, made up some fair late ground without troubling principals.
Deepest on track 4-wide no cover about 3Ls down in midfield down backstretch, pressed on to challenge from 600 M to home turn, every chance when vying for lead 200 M out, one-paced close home.
Had the run of the race in 4th about 2Ls off pace on fence until home turn, had every opportunity to at least place when left with clear run and 1L off speed at 200 M, failed to pick up.
Mostly covered up about 3Ls back in mid-pack until home straight, plugged on thereafter and never really looked like figuring in the money.
Always prominent about 1L off the speed in 3rd but posted 3-wide no cover, kept on to be a head back in 3rd with 200 M to go, poked head in front soon after and just held on.
Always towards rear about 4Ls off the pace and over-raced in places, a little closer when 4-wide turning for home, tired close home.
Always 2-wide and about 1L down in 2nd until home straight, nosed into a narrow lead at the 200 M but marginally headed soon after and kept on at same pace.
Checked and lost prominent position at 1100 M, 4Ls back in midfield at 800 M, no better off taking final bend, pretty weak in the homestretch and never dangerous.
Dropped out 7Ls last down the backstretch, about 5Ls down in 11th entering home straight, swooped very strongly down centre of track but the line came a stride too soon.
Always in rear, 6Ls back in 11th at 700 M, slightly closer entering straight but never looked like beating more than one home.
Broke well and handily placed 2-wide and 2Ls off speed in 5th early on, came under pressure from 600 M and slipped further back turning for home, one-paced from then on.
Very awkward break and lost ground at start, recovered to be 3-back on fence about 4Ls back in 9th or so until home turn, stayed on fairly, nearest at finish.
Away well and soon led on fence, a little less than 1L clear until home turn, marginally headed about 200 M out, battled on but tired a little close home.
Travelled mainly 2-wide in 2L 3rd to straight. Gradually faded.
Niggled at early, settling in forward of midfield. Remained similar into straight. Ran on steadily to claim 2nd late.
Raced around midfield to straight. Gradually weakened.
6ell back. Checked and lost ground coming out of back straight. Made no impression in the run home.
Towards rear throughout. Weakened after straightening.
Raced 3-wide in midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Raced in rear of midfield to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Settled on rails in 4th some 2Ls off the pace to straight. Gradually faded under pressure.
Chased leader. Came under pressure approaching home turn. Failed to quicken to challenge and lost 2nd late.
Always in last few and never seen with a chance.
Well back to straight. Made up good ground down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Made all. Drew clear under pressure after straightening to win unchallenged.
Not far off to straight. Lost touch over 300 M out.
Close up but wide far side. Lost position coming out of back straight. Made no impression thereafter.
Slow into stride. Gradually picked up to rear of midfield around home bend. Kept on steadily from midfield into straight.
Niggled along in rear of midfield. Ran on well down centre of straight to do best work at finish.
Travelled mainly 2-wide in midfield. Kept on quite well early in straight before fading gradually inside final 250 M.
Settled towards rear. Ran on steadily under pressure despite slightly tightened early in straight. Did best work at finish.
Jumped fairly. Raced on rails just off the lead. Gained slender advantage rounding home bend. Shifted ground after home turn and had to be straightened. Hung on well to win readily.
Niggled along in on rails. Took closer order rounding home bend and within midfield 2Ls of pace turning in. Tightened on rails by winner early in straight and only kept on at the one pace to finish.
Raced wide in midfield far side. Lost position steadily approaching home bend. Made no impression in straight.

Held early lead but unable to cross to rails. Lost advantage coming out of back straight and went wider rounding home bend dropping to midfield into straight. Recovered some late ground inside final 250 M.
Trailed field most of way and never seen with a chance.
Broke well. Amongst leaders to straight. Unable to sustain effort under pressure and swamped close to home.
Away with rest, angled into midfield position, raced 2-wide 4Ls off pace, amongst horses on turn, hard ridden on turning in 3Ls down, couldn't find another gear and only held ground to line.

Began awkwardly and lost ground, settled at rear on rails 8Ls from front runners, lobbed along at tail throughout, still had field to beat on turn, came with run widest in straight but never a real factor.

Standard to begin, lacked early speed, positioned 2-wide behind midfield 6Ls from speed, still well back on turn, angled out and made some ground before being crowded at 200 M but race over by that point.

Jumped with them, slotted into prime position 1 out 1 back 2Ls back, had easy time in middle stages, tracked nicely on turn, angled out with well timed turn but struggled last 200 M and weakened late.

Away well, slotted in nicely behind speed, raced 3Ls away on rails spending little in run, tightened a little on turn, re-gathered and on bridle on turning, drove into clear at 150 M and ridden out to take lead late and score strongly.

Broke nicely, rolled across to assume position outside lead travelled well at leaders girth with no real speed on. Challenged on turn, hit lead into straight, fought strongly to hold off all but winner late.

Jumped with rest, allowed to settle in midfield, raced on rails 4-5Ls away, used little in middle stages, last position a little on turn, stuck to rails in straight, closed race off nicely making good ground to make the frame.

Fastest to break, used up a little to find front leaving straight, dictated terms 1L clear in middle section, still travelling well on turn, tackled on entering straight, tried hard not giving up but found top two a shade better.

Left gates well, ridden up to hold prominent spot, raced behind leader with run of race throughout, travelled on bridle to turn, gained split on rails in straight but couldn't capitalise and kept same pace to line.

A little awkward at start and settled near to last, raced 2-wide 7Ls away in middle section, not asked until 600 M, began to circle with 3-wide run (had cover), 4 and 5-wide into straight, closed steadily but set too great a task.

Average to break and lost some ground when steadied, raced worse than midfield on rails 6-7Ls away, lobbed along near enough to last on turn, shifted out from behind runners but made no impression after giving big start.

Jumped fairly, restrained to slot in to running line, unable to find cover, forced to race wide without cover 6-7Ls away, allowed to slide forward to be 3Ls down on turn. Hard run took toll and lost touch in straight.

Left gates well, driven forward to take up running, kept them going at a reasonable speed, pressured on turn, 1/2L clear on straightening, lead until 200 M but couldn't sustain effort and weakened late.

Broke well, unable to match them early and drifted into midfield spot, had good run following eventual winner, 4Ls off pace, amongst traffic early in straight, came to outside last 200 M and closed off nicely. (Rider questioned.)
Lost 5Ls at start, slowly into stride thereafter, ridden up to be 12Ls down on turn, still last on straightening, hard ridden but made no impression in straight. Beaten a long way. (Bled.)

Average to begin, hard ridden to circle field and challenge outside leaders, 4 wide without cover throughout, always working to turn, unable to find when asked for effort and weakened after tough run. (Rider questioned.)
Standard break, showed no speed early, hard ridden 10Ls away detached from main body, began to steadily make ground to turn, closed gap in straight but only managed to pass tired runners late.

First to leave barrier, didn't have speed to lead, forced to race 3 wide without cover, always working in mid-section, still there on turn, didn't find much when asked and failed to finish off after hard run.
Began with them, lacked early speed, settled down 7Ls away, gradually lost touch to turn under hard riding, faded out of it gradually in straight. Inexperienced and definitely needed run.

Slowly into stride, assumed rearward role 6Ls from leaders, made good ground in mid-section, came with 3 wide run 2 to 3Ls down on turn, 4 wide into straight, challenged for most of straight but weakened last bit.

Jumped with them, ridden up to hold spot 3 to 4Ls away on rails, travelled kindly in mid-section, crowded and still in traffic on turn, held up until 200 M, finished off evenly when clear to make frame.

Fast into stride, settled in prime spot behind leader, had easy time in mid-section, travelled well in behind them on turn, had no clear run for most of straight, got clear only after 200 M when it was over.

Away with rest, positioned nicely off speed in 1 out 1 back spot, had run of race 2 to 3Ls away, travelled well behind horses on turning, gained split at 250 M and surged to lead, held on well for deserved win.

Began with them, rolled forward to sit outside leader 1L away, pressured to hold spot by outside horses, unable to relax and niggled on turn, challenged until 200 M but offered nothing when asked and was one paced to line.
Sat outside the leader, gave in quickly after the 400 M.
Failed to jump. (See Racing Incidents.)
Very slow to begin, pushed forward to sit 3 deep outside the leader, no cover, weakened in the straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Tracked the leader on the fence, first horse beaten turning for home.
Settled in last position, pressured after the 500 M. Came around the field with long sustained run, to score close to the post.
Parked midfield, 1 off with cover, run ended after the 100 M.
1 off midfield with cover, close in the straight.
Took up the running throughout, kicked away early in the straight only to be claimed close to the line.
Positioned back in the field. 3 wide made run around the pack and went to the line one paced.
Settled midfield, along the fence, never threatened.
Jumped awkwardly. Settled on fence at midfield. Ridden along to keep pace near 600 M. Remained on same pace before picking up speed over final 250 M. Closest at finish.
Jumped well but was taken back. Near last to enter home straight and made up some ground.
Better than midfield. Moved to within 2Ls of the leaders turning for home. Quickened nicely and charged to the lead at 200 M to win convincingly.
Never better than midfield. Only stayed on same pace in the straight.
Jumped well from a wide draw and took the lead. Held a slight advantage heading into home straight. Headed by winner at 200 M and held on for a minor placing.
Among leaders early. Eased back to keep within 3Ls of the pace. 3-wide at midfield making home turn. Kept on fairly in the straight.
Settled in rear section. Switched out to make a run on straightening but ran on without threatening. (Lame morning after.)
Lost ground after jumping and was hard ridden to be at midfield. Kept along the rails making the turn and continued fairly in the straight to make the frame.
Behind midfield early stages. Unable to keep pace making the turn and near last on straightening. Only ran past a tired runner.
Raced just off the pace until home turn. Lacked a response when asked and weakened in the straight.
Jumped well from widest draw and was taken back to a rearward spot. Trailed field into home straight. Switched out after straightening and closed the race off strongly over last 200 M.
Ridden along to race behind the leader. Moved into a disputed lead making the turn. Unable to turn up a notch after straightening and faded steadily final 250 M.
3-wide at midfield. Lacked a quickening pace in the straight.
Settled on fence behind midfield. Switched out after straightening and closed the race off with a strong rally.
Worse than midfield and on fence no closer than 8Ls to the speed from 1000 M to 500 M when niggled along, retrieved some late ground without threatening.
Slowest away, always in rear bunch at least 8Ls back, poor effort.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 2nd at 1000 M, about 3Ls back in 3rd from 800 M to home turn, one-paced and unlikely to place when badly checked inside about 100 M out, eased late.
Raced in midfield (closer than usual) and about 7Ls behind at 800 M, 6Ls down turning for home, headway when 3Ls down in 5th at 200 M, kept on finding but post came too soon.
Bumped at start, keen in places in 4th between 3Ls and 5Ls behind leader from 1000 M to home straight, looked held when checked at 150 M, didn't recover.
Box run on fence, about 5Ls back in 3rd at 800 M, picked up sufficiently in homestretch to lead 150 M out and did just enough to hang on.
Soon led on fence, 3Ls clear at 1000 M, went too quickly in front, 3Ls to the good entering straight, cuddled along until the 250 M, found nothing off the bit and swamped once headed at 150 M.
Always 2-wide in midfield about 6Ls or 7Ls off pace from 1000 M to top of home straight, 3Ls down in 6th at the 200 M, had every chance of running 3rd but no extra late.
Went back about 10Ls off pace until home straight when 3-wide, made some good late ground out widest but given a fraction too much to do.
Lost a little ground at start, on fence about 6Ls back in midfield at 1000 M and at home turn, hard ridden to edge a little closer at 200 M, had every opportunity to place if good enough.
Settled in 5th place out 2-wide about 5Ls or 6Ls behind leader at 1000 M, very one-paced in the home straight and beaten over 200 M out.
Got well back about 10Ls off pace in rear until home turn, made some fair late ground out wide to be nearest at the finish.
Never properly on terms, about 9Ls off pace in rear early, not much closer entering home straight, no danger.
Rear and 4-wide no cover early on, with cover and about 8Ls back in 10th at 800 M and similar at top of homestretch, stayed on well down centre of track to snatch 3rd late.
In 7th about 6Ls off speed at 1200 M when 2-wide, 8Ls back in 6th swinging for home, briefly loomed a place chance when 5Ls back in 5th at 200 M, found no extra.
Settled about 4Ls back in 5th at 1200 M, still in 5th turning for home further behind bolting leader, dug in well to move to the front 150 M out and kept on convincingly.
Always prominent, wide without cover early, 3Ls back in 4th at 1200 M, 6Ls back in 2nd behind runaway leader at top of home straight, kept on same pace and lost 2nd close home.
About 12Ls last in rear at 1000 M, 3-wide taking home turn, made some decent late ground through the field, nearest at the finish.
Always in midfield or slightly worse, not closer than 8Ls to the front from 1000 M to home straight, kept on at same pace with stragglers.
Always in rear, hard ridden when over 10Ls back in rear taking home turn, weak effort.
Never better than midfield or closer than 7Ls to the pace at any stage, always well held.
Dropped out in rear, about 11Ls back at 1000 M, still well behind and widest (5-wide) turning for home, stayed on evenly, set a very difficult task.
Slowest to start, recovered to race in 8th but about 7Ls off pace at 1200 M, much further behind taking home corner, plugged on fairly late but never threatened a place.
Dropped in rear and about 10Ls behind at 1200 M, not any closer turning for home, never a factor.
Led by 1L on fence at 1200 M, went much too fast in front from 1000 M and shot 6Ls clear taking home bend, headed at 150 M out, tired late but just hung on for 4th.
Bumped at start, disputed early lead, about 5Ls back in 2nd at 800 M, struggling and back-pedalling at top of home straight, dropped right out, performance deemed unacceptable.
Keen early on and disputing lead out 3-wide no cover, left about 6Ls behind runaway leader in 3rd on the circle, very tame in the home straight, performance deemed unacceptable.
5Ls back in 6th on fence at 1200 M, in 7th at top of home straight, finished off well to secure 2nd place inside final 50 M but never likely to grab the winner.
Settled in midfield. Shifted off rails for a run over 350 M out. Ran on well without threatening.
Soon dropped to rear. Kept on at the same pace in the run home.
Raced wide towards rear. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Travelled on rails behind midfield. Ran home one pace under pressure.

Broke well from poor draw. Settled in midfield before taking closer order rounding home bend. Gained close-up 4th into straight, holding every chance 200 M out but unable to sustain effort nearing finish.
Very sluggish at start. Trailed the field to straight. Made up late ground past beaten horses closing stages.

Jumped slightly awkwardly. Raced keenly not far off the lead in 5th some 2Ls behind. Took closer order rounding home bend disputing lead into straight. Unable to sustain effort and swamped inside final 200 M.
Made running to 200 M. Weakened badly.
Settled in last few. Finished off race strongly inside final 250 M. Best work at finish.
Jumped fairly. Soon came under pressure on rails to be just off the pace rounding home bend. Did not find much room early in straight before making late impression inside final 200 M.
Never far off before home turn. Raced tightly between runners turning for home. Soon weakened. (Blood in trachea.)
Raced in 6th on rails just better than midfield. Gradually shifted off the fence approaching home turn. Ran on well to assert authority passing 200 M.
Prominent to 600 M. Dropped out.
Travelkled mainly 3-wide in rear of midfield. Kept on well in straight.
Jumped fairly, settling in 5th just better than mid-division. Kept on steadily under pressure early in straight before no extra inside final 200 M.
Raced 3-wide in midfield to halfway. Gradually weakened.
Settled on rails in midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure without threatening winner.
Broke well. Disputed lead far side. Gained slender advantage rounding home bend. Gradually overhauled passing 200 M.
Settled in last few. Closed off race strongly down centre of straight to grab 3rd late.
Settled wide in 3rd within 2Ls of pace after beginning from post draw. Lost position entering home straight and soon weakened.
Driven along on rails in midfield far side. Failed to keep up and gradually weakened rounding home bend.
Settled within striking distance on rails. Came to challenging upon straightening angling off the rails turning in 3rd. Sustained effort to take charge over 200 M out.
Always well behind and never seen with a chance.
Very sluggish at start. Soon came under pressure to muster pace. Remained in last few to straight. Never dangerous.
Had rails run throughout, sharing pace until finding no extra 200 M out.
Towards rear to straight. Never nearer.

Even break, hard ridden to hold prominent spot behind early leader, raced 3Ls back on rails in mid-section, had run of race but still urged along on turn, switched out but offered nothing in straight weakening out late.

A little tardy to begin, rushed up to lead into first bend, held lead until crossed at midpoint, had easy run behind leader thereafter, niggled along on turn, kept to task well but found winner too good.

Began nicely, ridden up but checked badly on first turn, lost spot and settled down worse than midfield 7 to 8Ls away, always pressured to stick to task, angled out on turn but made no impression, weakened noticably late.
Away with rest, niggled along from outset, held midfield position on rails 6 to 7Ls from pace, never really comfortable in going, commenced to weaken from 500 M, well beaten in straight.

Fastest to jump, didn't have speed to cross them early (crowded), raced in 1 out 1 back spot 3 to 4Ls away in mid-section, ridden along to take close order on turn, didn't go up a gear and kept on at some pace in straight.
Jumped with them, soon mustered speed to make challenge on first turn, finished up outside leader by midpoint, travelled well 1L away at 400 M, urged to step up a gear but run ended at 200 M.

Away well, quickly showed pace to be prominent, eventually work across to lead by 1000 M, controlled tempo from that point, held 1L advantage with others off bit and chasing on turn. Stuck to task well to score nicely at finish.

Slowly into stride and lost further ground when crowded, raced well back at rear 10 to 12Ls off pace, stuck to rails and steadily made ground on turn, still last into straight and passed tired runners late.
Standard to begin, held midfield position 2 wide 4 to 5Ls away throughout, hanging from 700 M, switched out on entering straight, lacked another gear in last 400 M and only battled to line.

Broke with rest, unable to show enough speed to hold spot, raced in rearward position 7 to 8Ls from lead on rails, well back in traffic approaching turn, came to outside and made good late ground from impossible spot. Best of rest.
Began with them, pressed on to settle behind speed 4Ls away on rails, not asked in mid-section, began to improve on turn, angled into clear at 350 M, closed race off nicely to make good ground late.

Began fairly, showed no early toe and allowed to drift back to tail, raced 2 wide 10Ls away throughout, swung wide with field still to beat on turn, didn't show usual dash and failed to go up a notch in straight.
Settled in rear and quickly shifted out onto grandstand side. Did not find much room passing 400 M. No further impression closing stages.
Trailed the field most of the way until making good late progress inside final 200 M.
Well there early. Gradually weakened coming onto course proper.
Raced alone in centre of track and soon dropped to rear.
Settled in midfield. No clear passage behind runners onto course proper. Shifted away from grandstand side for a run down centre of track. Did best work at finish.
Led or disputed lead to 200 M. Gradually weakened.
Never better than midfield. No cover in centre of track from halfway out. Weakened closing stages.
Settled just off the pace. Came to tackle leaders passing 200 M and soon asserted authority to win readily.
Broke well. With leaders early, dropping to midfield onto course proper. Soon lost further ground under pressure. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Settled close up just behind leaders. Failed to obtain run throughout critical stages of race.
Not far off, racing within 2Ls of pace onto course proper. Gradually weakened passing 200 M.
Led or disputed lead. Headed by winner passing 200 M. Fought on under pressure to hold place only to lose 2nd late.
With leaders to 400 M. Unable to sustain effort inside final 150 M.
Close up, only to lose touch under pressure inside final 150 M.

Fastest into stride, pressed on to cross to front after 200 M, settled tempo nicely and dictated terms to turn, 1L clear into straight, kicked strongly passing 250 M and proved too hard for rivals to catch. Nice win.

Began awkwardly and lost ground, gathered speed to position at rear 7Ls away on rails, difficult to settle and raced awkwardly in mid-section, swung wide on turn, in traffic for most of straight, closed evenly late.

Broke with rest, faded back from widest alley, assumed spot at tail, raced 2 wide 7 to 8Ls off leaders, had field to beat on turning, eased 6 wide into straight, closed race off evenly from impossible spot.
Began with them, faded back when unable to go early speed, raced 3 wide at tail 6 to 7Ls and well back and came wide into straight, lacked a finishing sprint and same clip to line.

Average to begin, mustered speed to take up position 3 back on fence 3Ls down, amongst horses and awkwardly placed at 600 M, drove up behind them on turning, stuck to task evenly in straight without threatening to snare 3rd.

Not the best to begin, ridden up to hold prominent spot 1 out 1 back, proved difficult to settle in mid-section, travelled well 2Ls away on turn, angled out and looked a threat to 200 M but lacked fitness to figure.
Showed usual lack of speed to be rearward easily, drove through to midfield 5Ls away, tracked nicely 2 wide behind horses on turn, made steady ground between horses in straight doing best work late.
Jumped fairly but showed great dash to be first to rail, accepted trail and had nice run behind leader thereafter, still on leaders heels on turn, gained inside run and kept on nicely to make frame.

Began well, unable to slot in to running line, forced to race 3 wide without cover 2Ls away, always working in mid-section, same distance down on turn, couldn't sustain effort last 300 M and was one paced to line.

Not special to begin, drifted back to find cover, forced to race 3 wide in midfield 5Ls away, had cover and tracked nicely in mid-section, came 5 wide into straight, lacked fitness to be a factor and battled to line.
Amongst first few early, unable to slot in to running line, posted 3 wide without cover for journey, always working 3Ls away, under pressure on turning in, tough run took toll and weakened right out.

Jumped well, unable to muster early, settled off speed in midfield role, raced 2 wide 4Ls from pace, tracked nicely on turn and eased into dream run in straight, tried hard but condition give out last bit.

Average to leave gates, soon gathered speed, used up a little from alley to cross outside leader, raced at leaders girth thereafter, niggled along 1L down on turn, couldn't keep going when sprint went on and weakened out.

Standard break, hard ridden to hold spot on rails 4Ls away, had easy time in mid-section, still back in traffic on turning, eventually worked into clear passing 200 M and closed race off well to grab 2nd.

Average to break, ridden hard to improve, settled down 4-back on rails 5Ls away (checked 800 M), still well back on turning, followed rails in straight, in traffic until 150 M but surged late when clear to snatch 3rd.

Out well, pressed on to hold prominent spot, sat just off speed 2-wide 1L away in 1 out 1 back spot, tracked nicely on turn, came with run alongside winner on fence, battled hard in straight to go down narrowly.

Began fast, took trail behind leader, had run of race in mid-section, 1L down on turn travelling well, angled out on turning, hung in and held up until 150 M, made steady ground when clear to make frame.

Began with field, slotted into midfield role on rails, raced 3 back on fence, was difficult to settle in mid-section, angled 2-wide on turn, gained split in straight but was unable to go up a gear and only held ground to line.

Broke with them, settled just off speed, raced 2-wide 3Ls away in mid-section, eased 3-wide from mid-point to lead 3-wide line, 1L down on turning, came with good run to hit lead at 200 M, fought on well to score.

Average to leave gates, ridden up to settle just off midfield, 2-wide 4-5Ls back, not comfortable in middle stages racing further back than normal, still well back on turn, eased into clear 3-4 wide, unable to wear down margin.
Fairly away, drifted back to midfield, raced 3-wide without cover 3-4Ls back, began to lose ground on turn, couldn't find anything in straight and gradually weakened right out of it.

Slow to begin, hard ridden early raced 3-wide at rear 5Ls away, always working in mid-section, still had big task at tail on turning, swung wide into straight but failed to run on over concluding stages.

First to leave gates, shared lead holding rails throughout, pressured in mid-section, 1/2L down and ridden along on turn, unable to find another gear when asked and gradually weakened out in straight.
Shade tardy to begin, couldn't go early speed and settled at rear 8Ls back on rails, still had field to beat on turn, made some ground from well back but passing only tired runners late.

Fast to leave gates, worked hard to eventually cross to sit outside leader, shaded inside horse throughout, 1/2L clear still applying pressure on turn, kept giving until 150 M but ran out of gas and faded out of it late.
From wide gate, sat outside the leader but found the winner too strong.
Raced back in the field, closed the race off well close to the rails.
Slow to begin, 3-deep had cover with the back markers, looked out on the hit, struggled in the run home.
Handy position, along the fence, had every chance once in the clear.
Wide throughout, never a factor.
Settled back on the fence, never travelled, under pressure after the 500 M.
Settled 1 off with cover, back in the field past tired horses over the latter stages.
Raced off the speed 2-wide with cover, did go on with it after looming after 300 M.
Led, under pressure turning for home, failed to respond.
Tracked the leader on the fence. Stayed on the inside in the run home to score well.
Settled midfield 1 off with cover, shifted out on straightening. One-paced in the straight.
Midfield, 3-wide, compounded after turning into the straight.
Hard ridden from a wide draw to a forward position. 2-wide behind the pacesetters back straight. Pressured to keep pace turning for home and tired final 200 M.
Taken back from widest draw. Raced in rear section and trailed field into home straight. Only ran past tired runners.
Jumped well and raced in the lead. Held a narrow advantage heading into home straight but tired inside final 200 M.
On fence and no better than midfield. Switched out for a clear run after straightening. Quickened nicely but unable to gain ground on winner over the final stages.
Bumped on jumping and raced 2-wide in rear section. Hampered at 200 M during its rallying run. Continued well over the final stages and was closest at finish.
Raced towards the rear until home straight. Steadily picked up but needed to shift away from traffic 200 M. Continued to close the race off well and was nearest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly. Niggled along to get into a position behind the leader. Remained in similar position heading into home straight but failed to quicken and faded out of contention.
3-wide without cover at midfield early stages. Strode forward after 1200 M to race alongside leader in back straight. Had the lead briefly near 200 M but unable to find extra to stay in contention.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Swung out turning for home and rallied briefly. Unable to sustain effort final stages.
Ridden along early and raced 2-wide at midfield. Swung out on straightening and picked up pace. Opened up a clear lead after 200 M and was unthreatened final stages.
Raced on fence and no worse than midfield. Kept on fairly in the straight.
Raced on fence in rear section. Steadied from traffic at 200 M whilst making a run. Ran on without threatening.
Didn't break well, very keen early on when disputing the lead out 2-wide, settled 1L back in 3rd at 800 M, 4Ls down in 4th and slipping back at home turn, weakened.
On fence 7Ls back in 10th early, not much closer taking final bend, ran on pretty well through a tired bunch to take 2nd place in final 50 M.
Box run on fence in 4th about 2Ls off pace early, same margin behind in 2nd at home turn, wayward and about 4Ls down in 2nd at 200 M, very weak late.
Bumped at start, checked passing post at 1400 M, 5Ls back in 8th at 1100 M, fell further back turning for home, very one-paced.
Didn't muster usual early speed and crowded 1400 M out, 6Ls back in 9th at 1100 M, 5Ls down in midfield taking home turn stayed on fairly late but only likely to fill a minor placing.
Always in midfield, 2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 5th at 1100 M, a little further back taking home turn, always held.
Slowly away and squeezed at start, 10Ls behind in last at 1200 M, 8Ls last taking final bend, never at all dangerous.
Driven from gates to share early lead on fence, skipped over 2Ls clear and headed for home 500 M out, 4Ls to the good at 200 M, always in charge.
Switched from wide gate towards inside, 9Ls back in 11th place at 1200 M, still towards rear when 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home, ran on fairly well late, nearest at finish.
4Ls back in 7th when 2-wide at 1100 M, 6Ls down in midfield when steadied at 500 M, switched out 4-wide turning for home, checked 250 M out, never troubled principals.
3-back on fence 4Ls down in 6th at 1100 M, travelled well turning for home in similar position, one-paced thereafter.
Caught 3-wide no cover and disputing lead at 1000 M, began to lose ground from 500 M out and 3Ls down in 3rd at final turn, dropped right out.

Slowly away but quickly recovered on fence to have the run of the race, 2Ls down in 3rd entering stretch, disappointed for running at 250 M and switched back inside to lead over 100 M out, driven out.
Driven along from gates but could only manage a position towards the rear about 6Ls from the front, never threatened in home straight.
Awkward break, worse than midfield at least 5Ls from lead until home straight, made some good late ground, never nearer.
3-wide no cover down the backstretch about 4Ls off speed in mid-pack, gained cover on the circle in midfield, never dangerous from then on.
On fence about 1L back in 2nd from 800 M to home turn, led very briefly about 200 M out, swamped late.
Soon led out 2-wide by 1L, same margin to the fore at final turn, headed about 200 M out and very weak in final 100 M.
Caught 4-wide very early on, about 5Ls back at 800 M and with cover 3-wide, always towards rear and a most unlikely challenger.
3-back on fence in midfield about 4Ls from the lead until home straight, one-paced and never likely to finish better than mid-division.
Always prominent about 2Ls off speed in 3rd or 4th until home turn, every chance when under 1L down in 4th at 200 M, stayed on well but could not match winner's acceleration.
Keen at 800 M when about 3Ls back in 5th and similarly positioned entering home straight, had every opportunity to place down centre of track but lost out in final strides.
Soon struggling in rear and never better than 6Ls off pace at any stage, lacks any kind of pace.
Crowded at start, about 8Ls behind in rear early, 6Ls down in 11th turning for home, finished off well on the fence to nick 3rd in final strides.
Settled mainly in rear of midfield. Ran home one pace down inner of straight.
Settled in rear. Made up late ground under pressure past beaten horses.
Settled mainly 2-wide in midfield. Held similar position into straight, then soon weakened.
Quickly crossed from widest draw to dispute lead before stables bend. Remained same into straight but unable to sustain effort and overhauled 200 M out.
Settled in rear. Effort wide rounding home bend taking closer order into straight. Sustained progress in the run home down centre of track.
Settled in forward of midfield. Improved to 4th some 3Ls back rounding home bend. Remained same into straight and kept on steadily without quickening.
Tracked leaders in 3rd some 2Ls back. Came to challenge upon straightening and quickened well to take charge inside 200 M.
Well behind. Shifted out for a run after straightening. Made up late ground inside final 200 M.
Attempted to make all. Weakened under pressure over 200 M out.
Settled in last few. Making good ground down straight when forced to steady and switch for a run inside 200 M. Quickly recovered to do best work at finish.
Settled in midfield. Kept on steadily at the same pace without quickening.
Settled mainly 3 to 4Ls behind pace in 4th or 5th. Ran on steadily down inner of straight to claim 2nd closing stages.
Jumped fairly. Travelled in midfield or further back. Hampered about 600 M out. Remained behind midfield entering straight and ran home one-paced.
Always in last few. Never seen with a chance.
Settled mainly 2-wide in midfield. Lost position entering home straight. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Well there, one out one back rounding home bend. Unable to sustain effort and gradually weakened after straightening.
Never far off. Quickened well upon straightening to hit front briefly inside 200 M but found winner too strong.
Settled just behind midfield on rails. Produced good impression early in straight.
Settled at the back. Ran on well upon straightening. Steadied over 150 M out. Quickly recovered and sustained progress to the line.
Settled in midfield on rails. Shifted out for a run turning in and fought on well under pressure to assert authority closing stages.
Prominent to 200 M. No extra under pressure.
Mainly 3-wide towards rear. Went wider turning in. Kept on well down centre of straight.
Attempted to make all. Led field until overhauled over 150 M out.
Raced wide in rear. Found nothing under pressure in straight.

Broke nicely from inside alley, easily lead them early, kept rolling at a solid clip 1L clear in front, still held advantage on turn and had rest chasing, rallied strongly to hold off challengers to score in equal record time.

Slow to begin and crowded shortly after, had to settle for spot 3 back on fence, not asked to do much work thereafter, on bit to turn, eased out into clear into straight, lacked fitness and finished off at same pace last 200 M.

Began with rest pushed on but unable to find spot in 2-wide line, raced 3-wide with cover 5Ls away, covered ground throughout, still had task on turn, tracked wide but showed nothing in straight to be easily beaten.

Jumped with field, didn't display any early toe, held midfield spot 2-wide 4Ls from front runners, travelled fairly in mid-section, 3Ls down on turn, switched out and tried hard in straight but didn't show dash to get closer.

Moderate to begin didn't show any early speed, occupied spot 2nd last 6-7Ls away 2-wide at tail, niggled along to improve from Rock, couldn't muster when run presented in straight and battled to line.

Slow to begin, taken straight to rails, raced 4 back on fence 5Ls off pace, not asked to do a lot in mid-section, began to make ground to turn, stuck to fence and closed hard late without a lot of room to just miss.

Standard to leave gates, soon mustered speed to drive forward and assume role outside the leader, did work facing breeze 1L away throughout, moved up to challenge on turn. Couldn't sustain effort and dropped out from 200 M.

Began well, taken to rails to hold spot behind leader, enjoyed charmed run thereafter, tracked nicely on turn, still 1L down but gained dream split into straight, finished race off well but couldn't find extra gear to threaten.
Began fairly, lacked early speed and drifted back to last, lobbed along at tail 7-8Ls away, still had field to beat on turn, switched out widest in straight and closed evenly from an impossible spot.

Jumped with line, lacked speed as usual and settled down worse than midfield, 2-wide 5-6Ls away in middle stages, still well back in traffic approaching turn, closed steadily between horses in straight without threatening.
Bounced out, slotted into sweet seat 1 out 1 back 2Ls away, had easy run 2-wide thereafter, eased 3-wide approaching turn, loomed to them easily but run ended at 150 M and only held ground to line.

Jumped nicely, restrained in order to take trail, unable to slot in and raced midfield 3-wide without cover 4Ls away, always working to turn, under pressure coming 4-wide into straight, dropped out after hard run.

Began only fairly, chased along to battle for early lead, held lead on rails but pressured throughout at fast speed, still being challenged on turn clear of rest, didn't give up in straight and did great job to nearly snatch it.

Showed little speed from gates, settled in rearward division on rails 8Ls off pace, not asked in mid-section, still well back on circle, angled into clear at 350 M, made up good ground but lacked extra gear to be a factor.

out with rest, hard ridden to be amongst them early, positioned well behind leader (speed fast), had run of race and was 3Ls down on turning, found nothing when asked and dropped right out to be well beaten.

Fastest to leave gates, lacked speed to cross, engaged in speed battle and then pressured leader in mid-section, challenged again on turn and shared lead at 200 M, workload just took toll last 50 M. Solid.

Bounced out, settled into nice spot just off speed 1 out 1 back, enjoyed easy trip 3Ls away 2 wide, ridden up approaching turn, had job chasing tearaway leaders down. Stuck to task well closing hard to hit lead late.

Broke evenly, immediately restrained to find cover from widest alley, posted 3 wide without cover at rear, always working 10 to 11Ls away wide at rear, still well back on turn, found nothing when asked and plodded to line.

Began with rest, showed enough to settle in midfield position, raced 2 wide 5Ls away, not asked in mid-section, crept forward on circle, shifted out on turn, finished race off evenly at same speed just lacking extra gear.

Unable to go the early speed, faded right back from wide alley, raced 11Ls away near tail in 2 wide line, always a long way off, last into straight, made a little late ground towards inside passing tired runners only.

Began with rest, posted wide from awkward alley early, taken back to slot into running line, raced 2 wide 8Ls away, still well back on turn, came to middle of track in straight but finished at one speed battling to line.

Jumped with them, positioned nicely in midfield 5 to 6Ls from leaders, had easy time throughout, began to struggle on circle, gradually faded out of it on turning in, failed to run on. (Blood in trachea and irregular heart beat.)

Standard break, rushed forward to be amongst them early, raced 3 back on rails 4Ls away, enjoyed run of race off speed, pushed along to improve on turning, angled into clear and made some late ground without looking likely.

Steadied shortly after start, forced to race near enough to last on rails 11Ls from front, always rearward amongst horses to turn, got clear of traffic at 300 M and made some ground but was generally one paced.

Average to leave gates, ridden up to hold a midfield spot, raced 5 to 6Ls away on rail in middle stages, pushed along into straight, found plenty of clear running and closed off reasonably without looking a threat.

Slow to begin, ridden along in early stages, raced 2 wide at tail 10 to 12Ls from pace, still well back on turn, came 4 wide into straight, made up many lengths down outside from impossible spot. Big finish.
Knuckled over at the start, settled midfield along the fence, struggled in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Awkwardly placed in leading division, 3 wide no cover, weakened inside the 200 M.
Crowded for room at the start. Settled near the rear on the fence. Made up fair ground in the straight, inconvenienced near the 200 M.
Raced in last position, 1 off with cover, ran past tired horses in the straight.
Settled midfield, 1 off with cover, gained inside runs, finished off well.
Parked behind the leader, ranged up and looked likely winner after the 300 M. Run ended over the concluding stages.
Positioned outside the leaders hindquarters, had every chance but failed to go on with it in the straight.
At the rear, 3 to 4 wide, never likely.
Raced 3 wide with cover, just off the speed, one paced in the straight.
Handy position, 1 off with cover, shifted around leader early in the straight but never went on with the task.
Led throughout, held off challengers in the straight to score a solid win.
Slightly worse than midfield, 3 wide with cover, came to the extreme outside in the straight but gave in quickly.
Wide and without cover at midfield. Reached within a length of the pace turning for home. Took the lead near 200 M but had no answer after being headed. One paced thereafter.
Raced on fence at midfield. Saved ground making the turn. Continued well in the home straight but unable to threaten winner.
Off slowly and was detached early stages. Trailed field into home straight and made up some ground closing stages.
Gradually moved into a forward position and was alongside the leader making the turn. Took a slim lead after straightening but was swamped final 200 M.
4-wide behind midfield. Niggled along rounding the turn but lacked response. In last place after straightening and only ran past a tired runner.
Ridden along early and was better than midfield. Improved position and was 3-wide among leaders turning for home. Kept on only fairly in the straight.
Outpaced from a wide draw and raced wide towards the rear. Crept up rounding the turn and was 5-wide among leaders turning for home. Unable to keep pace and tired final stages.
Soon had the lead. Remained disputing lead on straightening but dropped out quickly thereafter. (Heart irregularity.)
Raced behind the pace until home straight. No clear run at the 300 M and found nothing once cleared.
Eased to a rearward position. Ran into a bit of traffic at 400 M but closed the race off strongly and was nearest at finish.
Dropped to a rearward position. Made a ground saving trip rounding the turn. Quickened on straightening and charged through rivals to assert authority final 200 M.
Outpaced from a wide draw and raced towards the rear. Made up ground in the straight but only ran past tired runners.
In a forward position early. Outpaced and dropped to midfield after 1000 M. Ridden along to keep pace at the turn and found nothing in the straight.
3-wide at midfield. Niggled along making the turn. Switched out after straightening and was closest at finish.
4-back on fence about 6Ls behind speed in 8th at 1200 M, no better off when under pressure taking home turn, very weak in final 200 M.
6Ls back in 9th when 2-wide at 1200 M, 5Ls down in mid-division off final bend, ran on well late to nick 3rd on the line.
Led on fence by 1L at 1400 M, headed by winner about 300 M out and weakened steadily.
4Ls back in 6th when 2-wide at 1200 M, 5th and 3-wide taking home turn, good acceleration to go 2nd over 2Ls back at 100 M but winner already out of reach.
Slowly away and didn't muster any early dash, 10Ls last at 1200 M, always well behind, poor effort.
3-back on fence in 5th about 4Ls off speed at 1200 M, 3Ls back in 4th entering homestretch, one-paced from then on.
9Ls off pace in rear at 1200 M, 8Ls back in 12th and 3-wide on straightening for home, made some minor late ground.
Never on terms, 7Ls back in 10th at 1200 M on fence, niggled at 800 M, always a respectful distance off them.
2-wide and 1L down in 2nd at 1200 M, a neck down in 2nd at top of home straight, plugged on fairly well in closing stages but lost 3rd on the line.
Travelled well with the run of the race in 3rd about 2Ls off speed from 1200 M to home turn, picked up nicely to lead at 300 M, always in command.
Close enough if good enough, 3Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, struggling to maintain this prominent position off final bend, tired through final 200 M.
8Ls off speed in 11th at 1200 M, 7Ls down and still worse than midfield taking home turn, never dangerous.
Always 3-wide no cover, in 7th place about 5Ls behind at 1200 M, hard pressed to keep up when 4-wide (widest of all) taking home turn, dropped right out.
Pressed onto 2nd place out 2-wide and 1L down at 1000 M, led 350 M out and a neck clear at 200 M, grabbed by winner about 20 M out.
Slow break losing 2Ls on the field, recovered to move 4Ls from the pace in midfield in 2-wide position from 800 M to home turn, one-paced thereafter.
Nicely placed until home straight about 3Ls off pace and 2-wide in 5th position, about 1L down in 3rd and every hope of a place at 200 M, didn't follow through.
Settled about 9th place on fence until home straight about 4Ls or 5Ls behind pace, switched out wider to run on well in straight, nearest at finish.
Never far away in midfield in a 3-wide position (had cover), 3Ls down in 6th turning for home outside winner, ran on fairly well but never likely to place.
Terrible start quickly left him 10Ls off the pace, tacked on to rear of field at 600 M, never looked like drawing any closer and laboured in straight.
Restrained one from rear on fence about 8Ls from speed at 1000 M, under pressure taking final bend, always well held.
3-back on fence travelling well about 3Ls or 4Ls from the lead until home turn, held up and switched out to clear running at 200 M, quickened well to lead inside final 20 M.
In 2nd place 1L off speed at 1200 M, 2Ls down in 3rd or 4th from 800 M to home straight entrance, not the clearest passage until 200 M out, rallied quite well for a place.
No speed early, always worse than midfield at least 5Ls from the lead, niggled along turning for home, never dangerous.
Always in the rear bunch and no closer than 5Ls or so from the speed, struggling off final bend, no impression.
Caught 3-wide no cover throughout but prominent mostly in 4th and about 2Ls off speed, still well there at top of home straight and 200 M but tired late.
Never travelled so well in a worse than midfield position and always at least 6Ls from the front, left behind from top of homestretch.
Led out 2-wide by 1L at 1200 M, on fence and 1L in front from 1000 M to 500 M out, headed 350 M out, still just a neck 2nd at 200 M but faded late.
Raced on rails in midfield. Kept on same pace behind runners down inner of straight. Did not find much room closing stages.
Settled in 3rd last to straight. Ran on steadily under pressure down centre of track without threatening.

Waited with. Commenced move upon straightening and obtained a run over 300 M out. Improving between runners when met slight traffic problem passing 200 M. Sustained progress to the line to be nearest at finish.
Always well back and never seen with a chance.
Raced mainly 2-wide in forward of midfield. Commenced move shifting wider approaching home turn. Failed to quicken under pressure in straight.
Not far off in 4th. Became 5th turning in. Did not find much room behind runners in straight and forced to steady over 100 M out.
Raced in midfield most of way. Steadied slightly about 200 M out. No further impression.
Niggled along early settling within 2Ls of pace on rails in 3rd. Remained same into straight and only kept on at the one pace in the run home.
Settled towards rear mainly 2-wide before home bend. Shifted off rails entering straight but no clear run until late inside 200 M. Close off race nicely. Not fully tested.
Chased leader one out one back. Kept on in straight before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Held up towards rear 2-wide. Quickened well inside final 250 M to assert authority over 50 M out despite shifting ground.

Broke well but settled wide in midfield without cover. Remained same in 4-wide rounding home bend and into straight. Produced moderate progress under pressure early in straight before coming one-paced close to home.
Jumped best from widest draw and soon crossed to rails. Made most of the running going some 2Ls clear early in straight only to be caught near finish.
Amongst first to leave gates, shared lead on outside fence, held lead until 200 M, fought strongly when tackled, lost 3rd in shadows of post.

Average break, soon mustered speed to hold midfield spot, not as prominent as usual, lost touch a little in mid-section, got going again and finished run off fairly without threatening (rider questioned.)
Began fairly, came across to race in midfield in middle of track, raced 4Ls away throughout, challenged strongly from 300 M mark, fought hard but found winner too good.
Not fast into stride, raced at rear on outside rail, 4Ls down at midpoint, responded to hard riding and made up good ground late to snatch 3rd.
Average jump, raced on outside rail 5 to 6Ls away, always struggling to keep up, began to lose touch last 300 M, only struggled to line.

Slow to begin, raced on outside rail, at tail 6Ls away throughout, inconvenienced when making ground at 400 M, had clear galloping room from 200 M point and closed the race off strongly giving too much start.
Fast into stride, amongst first few on outside rail, settled just in behind them 2Ls away to 300 M, angled into clear and driven to lead at 200 M, kept going to score another comfortable win.
Fair to start, amongst first four in middle of track, always struggling to match horses on outside, began to struggle from 300 M and didn't finish race off as normally would.
Broke nicely, settled handy to leaders challenging for front on outside rail, ridden along at 300 M and kept giving, still there until 200 M, faded out of it late after working throughout.
Awkward to begin, matched them in midfield 4 to 5Ls down in middle of course, began to make hard work of it at 400 M point, bumped late but was finishing only fairly at same pace by that stage.
Began nicely, remained handy 3Ls away in middle of course, travelled reasonably at midpoint, unable to respond when placed under pressure and condition gave out final furlong.
Only average to break, in midfield between runners, 4Ls down at midpoint, began to hang when placed under pressure and was one paced in run home when shifting ground.
Amongst first four into stride, shared lead on outside rail, 1L down at 400 M, began to weaken when asked at 350 M, slowly faded out of it, unusually poor performance.
Even beginning, struggled in behind them early, raced 5Ls off them in midfield, responded from 300 M and made some good ground when doing best work late.
Settled towards rear on rails. Shifted out for a run turning in. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Settled at the back. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M to do best work at finish.
Settled mainly in mid-division. Switched out for a run after straightening. Finished off race well to assert authority close to home.
Not far off far side and around home bend. Dropped out upon straightening.
Settled in last few racing 3-wide most of way before shifting wide onto grandstand rails upon straightening. Ran home one-paced.
Towards rear jumping out. Soon picked up along rails to share 5th approaching home bend. Remained similar into straight and ran home one-paced.
Broke well from poor draw holding advantage out wide far side eventually crossing to rails passing 1000 M. Easily kicked 2Ls clear early in straight only to be worn down final strides.
Chased leaders 3-wide most of way to straight. Weakened under pressure.
Settled at the back. Switched out for a clear run upon straightening obtaining split about 200 M out. Finished off race well.
Raced 3-wide sharing 5th to straight. Kept on same pace before finding no extra inisde final 200 M.
Chased leaders to straight. Dropped out quickly after straightening.
Slightly slow into stride. Soon picked up to close up position on rails chasing leader to straight. Found no response under pressure inside final 200 M.

Awkward to break and steadied early, settled down at tail 8Ls away on rails, made some ground on fence in mid-section to be 5Ls down in traffic on turn, not much room but did best work last 200 M when clear run presented.

Lacked speed from gates, quickly ridden up to hold spot 3Ls back on fence, had easy time in mid-section, pushed along approaching turn, run presented at 300 M but couldn't capitalise and only battled to line.

First to leave gates, lacked the speed to lead, raced outside leader 1L away throughout, relaxed nicely and had good trip to turn, ridden along to challenge in straight, couldn't match them when fitness gave out at 200 M.

Began with them, slotted in to sweet seat 1 out 1 back, raced 2Ls away 2 wide throughout, urged along on turn, run presented but clearly struggling, condition gave out and gradually weakened thereafter.

Away with them, showed good early speed to take up running, dictated the pace at even clip, held 1L advantage on circle, stole a break on turning, kept kicking strongly and defied all until last 50 M.

Standard to leave gates, soon gathered speed to hold spot behind leader, had dream trail in mid-section, travelled nicely to turn, obtained clear run at 200 M, knuckled down to task and score a strong win despite hanging.

Standard to begin, driven up to settle into midfield role, posted 3 wide with cover 4 to 5Ls off pace, always working covering ground to turn, hard ridden coming 4 wide into straight, didn't pick up in run home and struggled to line.

Began well, pushed on but couldn't slot in, forced to race 3 wide without cover 2Ls away, always working in mid-section, pushed along on turning, couldn't find extra gear and fitness gave out last 200 M.
Left gates with rest, posted 4 wide from outside alley, 4 to 5Ls away always working in midfield, had done plenty and under hard riding on turn, weakened out in straight when workload took toll.

Jumped with field, lacked early toe and settled worse than midfield, raced 2 wide 6Ls away throughout, still well back on turn, in traffic early in straight until 250 M, made up plenty of ground late when clear. (Rider questioned.)

Awkward to jump, bumped early and lost ground, positioned just worse than midfield, raced 2 wide 4 to 5Ls from pace, ridden along in traffic on turn, held up for most of straight and was never really properly tested.
Bounced out, soon faded back from awkward alley, raced 7Ls away 3 wide at tail, always working wide and improved under pressure on turn, had clear running from 300 M and closed nicely to make frame.

Broke with field, settled down towards rear, raced 8Ls off them lobbing along at tail throughout, still last with job to do on turn, in traffic and had no run until 200 M, closed off well when race was over.
Midfield. Kept on early in straight before no extra inside final 200 M.
Settled in 2nd just off the pace. Chased leader into straight and kept on before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
One off the rail in joint 3rd about 2Ls off the lead to straight. Gradually weakened.
Raced 3-wide towards rear to straight. Made modest progress down centre of straight without threatening.
Ridden for pace early. Soon took up running going almost 2Ls clear early in straight. Came under strong pressure to hold place closing stages only to be caught final strides.
Always towards rear. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Trailed the field most of way only to run past beaten horses closing stages.
Raced wide in midfield or worse. Soon dropped out of contention after straightening.
Raced in rear of midfield 3-wide. Weakened soon after straightening.
Settled at the back. Made significant progress in home straight to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never far off on rails in 3rd. Shaken up upon straightening and ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Settled 2-wide in midfield. Commenced run shortly after straightening and ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Held up in 5th mainly 2-wide in forward of midfield. Remained same into straight. Responded well inside final 250 M to take charge close to home.
Towards rear on rails. Made modest headway down inner of straight without threatening.

Bounded in air and lost ground, settled next to last, raced 2-wide 6Ls from front runners, switched 3-wide with cover, always well back there to turn, came 3-wide in straight, didn't find when asked and battled to line.

Only fair to break, settled in usual spot towards rear, raced 5Ls away on rails throughout, not suited by slow speed, still well back on turning, closed race off well, but set too great a task in straight.
Amongst first few to begin, settled in prominent spot outside leader 1L away, not asked with slow speed in mid-section, travelled comfortably on turn, tried hard but was one-paced in straight.

Slowly into stride, lacked speed early and hard ridden to hold spot 4 back on rails, had easy time in mid-section, still back on rails on turn, made good ground between runners in straight to make good ground for 3rd.

Standard beginning, ridden up to take close order, posted 3-wide without cover 2Ls from leaders, always working in mid-section, under pressure and weakening on turn, gradually lost touch after hard run.

Began well, challenged for early lead, settled for spot behind leader leaving straight, enjoyed run of race with pedestrian speed, in traffic behind them on turning in, not going well enough to split and kept same clip to line.

Jumped with them, nice ride to slot in from outside gate into 2-wide line in midfield, raced 4Ls away in mid-section, had easy time to turn, eased clear 3-wide on turning, closed hard to chase down leader in shadows of post.
Broke with line, taken to rails to hold midfield position, enjoyed quiet trail 3Ls down in mid-section, not asked until turn, in traffic but never going well enough turning in, gradually weakened.

Fastest to leave gates, went on with job to take up running, backed of speed nicely in mid-section, set very slow pace and held 1L advantage on turning, worked strongly in straight and just run down on line.

Average break, had enough speed to hold midfield spot early, raced 1 out 1 back 3Ls away in middle stages, enjoyed nice run thereafter, niggled along coming 3-wide on turning, lacked a sprint and battled home.

Slowly into stride, showed no early toe and assumed rearward role, raced on rails 6-7Ls off leaders, lobbed along at tail with slow speed in front, still last on turning, passed some tired runners in the straight.
Pushed along rail to settle midfield. Shifted out on straightening to gain run through the field, once in the clear, lengthened nicely to take charge in the run to the post.
Settled at the tail of the field after being checked at the start, worked to the line nicely.
Was caught wide throughout, no cover whilst in a handy position, same pace to line.
Raced midfield, 2-wide with cover, held one-paced in the straight.
Ridden along rail to take up a position just behind the leader. Ran out of gas inside the 150 M.
Covered lots of ground, no cover and was trapped wide throughout, weakened after hard run.
Led throughout at even clip, overhauled close to the line.
Had the box seat throughout, taken in the towel after the 200 M.
Didn't enjoy the best of runs, wide for a lot of the trip, around midfield failed to finish the race off.
Settled back in the field, behind the winner, came with a solid burst in the straight.
Raced in last position on the fence, commenced to slowly improve after the 800 M, stuck to the inside over the last 300 M. Ran on solidly.
Camped just off the speed, closed in the straight.
Niggled along to a forward position. Settled on fence at midfield after 1200 M. Steadied and dropped to a rearward position after 1200 M. Last on straightening and only ran past a beaten runner.
Best out and led briefly. Settled behind the pace after 1200 M. Steadied to midfield near 1000 M. Remained racing on fence at midfield until home straight. Ran on without threatening.
Slow into stride and raced at the rear. Remained towards the rear entering home straight. Rallied in the straight and was closest at finish.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. Crept closer making home turn. 3-wide and a length down turning for home. Only managed to keep same pace in the straight.
Ridden along from widest draw and took the lead after 1400 M. Steadied to ease pace near 1000 M and was overtaken. Settle behind the leader in back straight. Ran on same pace in the straight.
2-wide better than midfield early stages. Took the lead when pace slackened near 1000 M. Continued to hold a 1-1/2L advantage at 200 M but unable to hold off the principals final stages.
Settled towards the rear. Improved steadily in a 3-wide position making home turn. Quickened nicely on straightening and was closest at finish.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Responded very well when asked near 200 M and charged through rivals to take the race close to the line.

Raced 3-wide behind midfield. Made up ground in a 4-wide position making home turn and within 2Ls of leader on straightening. Kept on well and battled for the lead final 100 M. Just failed to hold off winner close to the line.
3-wide and without cover in a rearward position early stages. Pressed forward after 1200 M and was racing behind the leader in back straight. A length off on straightening but weakened thereafter.
Always laboured in rear at least 6Ls from the front, never dangerous.
Sent on to lead by 2Ls on fence at 1100 M, led until being headed at top of home straight, weakened out tamely.
Tended to hang in places, worse than midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls behind through to final turn, stayed on only fairly, never really threatened.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 5th at 1200 M, similarly placed off final bend, had every hope to place but just battled on.
Worse than midfield 3-wide but with cover early, about 3Ls or 4Ls from pace from 800 M to home turn when hard ridden, found nothing off the bridle.
