Niggled along early but settled 3-back on fence about 3Ls off pace in 4th or 5th until home straight, dug in well to lead over 50 M out, kept on.
Always in rear, 6Ls back in 10th early on and same through to final turn, very weak.
2 and 3-wide in rear with cover at least 6Ls or 7Ls off pace until 500 M, pushed out 6-wide (widest of all) off home straight, finished off well late, never nearer.
Left 3-wide no cover throughout, 4Ls back in 6th at 1100 M, 2Ls down in 4th at 800 M, hard pressed to lie up entering homestretch, fizzled out.
Had the run of the race about 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1200 M to homestretch, tight for running briefly but lacked the decisive kick once clear, did just enough for 3rd.
Disputed early lead, settled 2Ls back and 2-wide in 3rd at 1100 M, 1L down in 2nd turning for home, briefly led over 200 M out but grabbed winner over final 50 M.
Slowly away, 4-back on fence about 5Ls off speed at 1200 M, marginally closer and under pressure on straightening for home, always well held.
Box seat run on fence 2Ls off lead in 3rd until home straight, plugged on just the same speed.
Sent on out wide to go 1L off pace in 2nd from 1100 M to home straight, dropped out feebly in final 200 M.
6Ls back in 7th on fence at 1100 M, under pressure to maintain this proximity at 600 M, very one-paced and harmless.
Keen early, 2-wide and about 3Ls back in 4th through to final bend when under pressure, stayed on quite well late for a place.
4Ls back in 6th when 2-wide at 1100 M, not much closer taking home turn, always held by principals.
Dropped out in rear 9Ls off speed at 1200 M, still well behind at top of home straight when under the stick, moderate late headway.
Never on terms, 7Ls back in 9th at 1200 M, similarly placed off final bend, weak.
6Ls back in 8th at 1100 M, in 7th but same margin behind entering home straight, made up some fair late ground, nearest at finish.
3-back on fence about 3Ls off pace in 5th from 1200 M to home straight, ran on strongly late but post came a fraction too soon.
Made all, always about 1L clear on fence until home straight, kicked 2Ls ahead at 200 M, had just enough in reserve to last home.
Checked at start and soon got 8Ls from pace in rear, struggling turning for home, kept struggling.
Settled on rails in midfield. Came under pressure from 5th into straight and only kept on steadily at the one pace.
Settled in midfield 2-wide most of way to straight. Found nothing under pressure.
Settled not far off in 4th within 2Ls of pace. Raced 3-wide rounding home bend and into straight. Quickened well to take charge 200 M out.
Attempted to make all. Unable to sustain effort under pressure and headed 200 M out.
Settled in last few. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Chased leader to straight. Gradually weakened under pressure.
Slowly away settling at the back. Commenced run rounding home bend running on from towards rear into straight. Did best work at finish.
Settled towards rear. Snuck up on rails turning in but only one-paced under pressure.
Chased leaders in 3rd on rails. Fought on determinedly under pressure down straight. Nearest at finish but found winner too strong.
Began awkwardly travelling at the back throughout.
Settled in rear of midfield. Kept on well in straight.
Settled in 3rd just off the pace. Switched out to challenge upon straightening but could only keep on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Settled in midfield. Lost position coming off Rock. Found nothing from behind midfield into straight.
Made running to 400 M. Gradually dropped out of contention.
Always well behind and never seen with a chance.

Settled in 5th on rails in forward of midfield. Gradually shifted off the rails approaching home bend and went wider for a clear run turning in. Ran on quite well under pressure to just fail to get 2nd.
Settled towards rear. Only produced moderate impression in straight.
Raced in 4th 2-wide within 2Ls of pace. Came to challenge upon straightening and could only produce moderate impression in the run home.
Settled outside leader, gaining slender lead far side. Conceded advantage rounding home bend before regaining lead under pressure turning in and soon went clear.
Settled in rear of midfield on rails. Came under pressure rounding home bend and made up good ground down inner of straight despite forced to switch over 200 M out.
Settled in rear. Finished off race strongly inside final 200 M. Did best work at finish.

Began well, ridden along to challenge for lead, kept applying pressure and eventually took up running at mid-point. Kept working when pressured to turn, held 1/2L into straight but couldn't go on from 200 M after hard run.
Bounced out, headed them early, took trail after 400 M when continually pressured, always niggled behind leader, travelled fairly on turn, couldn't find extra gear and was one-paced in straight.
Began evenly, ridden up to take closer order, raced 5-wide without cover 1L away, always working in mid-section, still 4-wide and struggling on turn, weakened right out in straight after tough run.
Broke with field, outpaced a little early and had to settle 2Ls away 3-wide, continued to race 3-wide without cover gradually creeping closer, hard ridden and didn't respond in straight.
First to leave gates, faded back shortly after from wide alley, raced 3-wide in midfield with cover, in traffic 2-3Ls down at Rock, swung 5-wide on turn, made good ground down outside to make frame.

Out with them, restrained to settle in midfield, raced 2-wide 3-4Ls away, a little unbalanced at 800 M but otherwise trouble free to turn, gained dream split into straight to hit lead, defied all until last 50 M.

Began with rest, lacked speed and drifted back, in rearward division 5-6Ls away on rails, hampered at mid-point by retiring horse, made solid ground on rails into straight, found gap at 150 M and accelerated nicely to score.

Broke well, looked uneasy after 300 M, clearly not travelling and began to fade out of it, restrained to be pulled up from 600 M. (No significant findings but jockey reported reluctance to stride out.)
Jumped in line, hard ridden to be forward early, raced 4-wide outside leaders 1L away, began to struggle at mid-point, swung wide in straight but unable to muster anything in run home. (Lame.)
Slow to begin, settled at tail 7Ls from front runners, always struggling to make ground, still well back to turn, hard ridden and responded in straight to pass some weakening runners late.

Broke in line, showed enough dash to be 1-2Ls away with cover early, raced 2-wide just off leader from mid-point, drew up level on turn to make challenge, hit lead briefly but couldn't come with first two last bit.

Slowly into stride, settled down near last, raced 2-wide 6-7Ls away, niggled along and slowly improved in mid-section, tracked nicely 3Ls away on turning, in traffic to 200 M and closed steadily when clear.

Out with rest, settled just off midfield 3 wide 6Ls away, had cover but always working in mid-section, well back with job to do on turn, made up some ground until checked at 200 M. Never really likely. (Lame morning after.)

Average to leave gates, settled worse than midfield ridden along, raced 2 wide 6 to 7Ls away, well back and hard ridden on turn, made run between horses in straight, closed race off well giving too great a start.
Began fairly, hard ridden to drive through into spot behind leader, raced on bit 1L away with run of race, still there but pushed along on turn, weakened right out in straight.
Average to begin, never comfortable and soon lost considerable ground, raced at rear more than 10Ls away, still well back on turn, made no impression in straight (jockey reported abnormal breathing).

OK to leave gates, ridden up to take closer order, posted 3 wide in midfield (with cover) 5Ls away, tracked nicely and swung 4 wide into straight, closed race off well making good ground down outside.
Broke nicely and showed good early dash to take early lead, kept them rolling at an even clip, held 1/2L on turning, battled hard for most of straight but run ended at the 100 M.

Began awkwardly, rider unbalanced and lost considerable ground, chased hard to settle at rear on rails 6 to 7Ls away, kept making ground to be 3 to 4Ls down on turn, still giving to 200 M but fitness gave out last bit.

Broke with rest, ridden along to hold midfield spot, raced 2 wide 3 to 4Ls away pushed along, began to travel better on turn, made ground into straight, bumped into clear at 250 M, surged to lead at 150 M to score.

Broke with line, pressed on to race in more forward spot, raced 3 wide without cover 2Ls away, always working in mid-section, pushed 4 wide on turn, gradually weakened in straight when workload took toll.

Broke with rest, showed enough dash to hold prominent spot, raced 1 out 1 back with run of race to turn, 2Ls down on straightening, had bumping duel with winner at 300 M, closed off only fairly thereafter. Rider knocked off late.

Began fastest from outside alley, showed speed to cross to sit outside leader, raced at leader's girth throughout, had fair run to turn with even speed, challenged leader all of straight, hit lead at 100 M and overhauled late.
Raced 1 off with cover, midfield, never a factor.
Began awkwardly, crossed shortly after the start and raced back in the field. Never likely.
Settled midfield along the fence, stayed in the inside, held up approaching and passing the 200 M, grabbed victory in the shadows of the post.
Sat outside the leader, punctured at the 200 M.
From wide gate taken in behind runners. Settled towards the back of the field. Made some ground in the straight after switching to the outside.
Hampered near the 800 M, raced wide near the rear of the race.
Led, held on until about the 200 M, gas ran out late.
Parked slightly worse than midfield, raced two wide with cover, peeled out on straightening, one paced in the straight.
Made some late ground after settling well back in the run.
Raced about 3Ls off the fence, 1 off, came wider in the straight, fought on in the run home, nailed close to the wire.
Raced at the rear, never travelled.
Tracked leading division, settled along the fence, worked home soundly.
Slow to begin, never threatened after being a long way back in the field.
Given every chance just off the speed, battled away over the concluding stages.
Settled towards the rear and was last to enter home straight. Closed the race off with a strong rally.
Settled 3-wide behind midfield. Widest turning for home and stayed on same pace in the straight.
2-wide behind midfield. Made a strong rally in the straight but fell short of catching winner.
Better than midfield but was 3-wide without cover. No more than 3Ls off the leader at the turn. Remained on same pace in the straight.
Soon travelled into a forward position. Raced 2-wide and a length off the leader. Took the lead shortly after straightening and stayed on well to hold off late charging rivals.
Settled towards the rear until home straight. Closed the race off nicely.
Botched the start and then settled behind the leader. Made up a bit ground in the closing stages.
On fence near midfield and kept within 3Ls of the leader. Kept on same pace in the straight and unable to gain ground.
2-wide at midfield. Stayed within 3Ls of the pace making the turn. Switched out on straightening, ran on fairly but unable to gain much ground.
Ridden to take the lead. Took a narrow advantage into the straight. Kept on fairly after being headed near 350 M.
Fractious in gates, soon settled one from rear about 6Ls off speed, 7Ls behind in last taking home turn, faded out.
Slow away but raced freely to soon sit in midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls from the lead, made no impression from top of home straight.
4-back on fence and with head up early on, 5Ls back in 11th at 800 M, further back taking final bend, made no impact.
Covered up in 9th or 10th about 4Ls from the pace until homestretch, ran on fairly without seriously threatening a place.
3-back on fence about 4Ls from the front in mid-division through to home straight, kept on at same pace.
3-wide no cover at 800 M when 2Ls behind in 3rd, similarly placed on straightening, given every possible chance but weakened late. (Bled.)
Had every chance with a 2-wide position and 3Ls back in 5th until home straight, weakened out disappointingly late.
Raced freely early on when about 5Ls off speed in rear bunch, soon well behind in straight, finished lame.
Over-racing and keen when 4-wide no cover at 800 M and 3Ls back in 6th, never likely to take closer order from top of homestretch.
Always close up, 1L back in 2nd at 800 M, disputing lead at top of home straight and went a neck up at 200 M, wandered a little under pressure but did just enough to hang on.
Best away and 2Ls clear on fence as early as the 1000 M, joined by winner at top of homestretch, weakened in final 200 M but did enough to place.
Dropped in 3-wide with cover in midfield through first half, niggled along 5Ls off pace when 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home, dropped out.
Ideally placed on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th until home straight, 1L down in 3rd at the 200 M, had every chance to overhaul the winner but fell just short.
Slowest away, sharing last place about 6Ls off speed until the 800 M, no closer turning for home, always well held and could only run past a few stragglers.
Caught 3-wide no cover early but steadily eased into 2nd place about 2Ls back and on fence at 600 M, led comfortably over 300 M out and always in charge.
Slowly away, about 8Ls off pace in rear early, still well behind when 4-wide turning for home, raced tightly to the line when held by principals.
Fractious in preliminaries, steadily crossed to 2-wide position about 9Ls off pace in rear, 7Ls down turning for home, ran on very strongly late, never nearer.
Always in rear and about 9Ls off pace, hampered and forced wider turning for home, soon left with no chance.
Never better than midfield, 6Ls back and 2-wide at 800 M and 4Ls down off final turn, never dangerous thereafter.
Always prominent, 3Ls back in 4th at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 3rd taking home turn, kept on quite well to repel quite a few rivals for a place.
On fence 6Ls off speed in 8th at 800 M, took closer order turning for home, over 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, kept on finding to take 2nd inside final 100 M.
Box-seat position in 3rd on fence 3Ls off pace at 900 M, 2Ls back in 4th taking home turn, had every hope to place but was a bit too one-paced.
3-back on fence about 4Ls off pace in 5th early, a little closer when held up from top of home straight to the 200 M, probably had enough opportunity to place however.
Worse than midfield about 7Ls from the front early, a little closer turning for home, unbalanced at 350 M and raced tightly through latter stages without posing a serious threat.
Snagged back to rear about 10Ls off pace, always well behind and finished down centre of track.
Slowly away, worse than midfield on fence about 7Ls off pace at 1000 M, a little closer taking home turn but well and truly outpaced from then on.
Held 5th place about 4Ls from the front until home straight, tight for room and faded late.
Led by 1L to 2Ls on fence until home turn, faded out tamely once headed at top of home straight.
Settled in last few. Switched out to centre of track early in straight and ran on strongly inside final 300 M to snatch victory final strides.
Broke well settling in 2nd just outside leader. Disputed lead early in straight gaining slender advantage momentarily. Looked a winner 200 M out before failed to respond inside final 150 M.
Always in last few. Raced wide into home straight and made no show.
Slightly slow out but quickly picked up to forward of midfield. In 7th on rails turning in. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Mainly in midfield on rails. Kept on steadily before forced to steady 200 M out. No extra under pressure closing stages.
Ridden to midfield early. Produced short-lived effort when wide rounding home bend. Found nothing in straight.
In rear to straight. Made up some late ground past beaten runners inside final 300 M.
Well back. Made up good ground down inner of straight running past beaten runners inside final 200 M.
Never far off. Some 2L 5th rounding home bend. Gained 3rd some 1L back upon straightening but unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.

Wide throughout. Towards rear early before making swift headway far side to be prominent rounding home bend joining leaders into straight. Gradually weakened after straightening and badly squeezed about 200 M out.
Took up running 1000 M out. Led field until joined into straight. Fought on under pressure to hold place early in straight but unable to match speed of fast finishers and faded closing stages.

Settled mainly 3-wide in midfield. Commenced move upon straightening and finished off race well inside 250 M to hit front briefly about 100 M out only to be worn down by fast-finishing winner close to home.
Led early settling just off the pace on rails. Not much room behind leaders early in straight. Obtained clear run 200 M out but only kept on same pace without quickening.
Never far off in 5th some 2Ls off the pace. Became 3rd over 4Ls back turning in. Kept on one pace without threatening.
Made all. Went clear under pressure in straight to win unchallenged.
Not far off to home bend, then dropped out of contention.
Mainly 3-wide towards rear to straight. Gradually faded.
Settled in last few. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Broke well and ridden for pace but caught wide around stables bend. Chased leader down far side and around home bend. Kept on steadily from 2nd into straight.
Prominent early. Steadied and lost a little ground about 1200 M out. Midfield rounding home bend and one-paced from similar position into straight.
Settled in midfield one off the rails. In similar position turning in but could only keep on steadily without quickening under pressure.
Always well behind and never seen with a chance.
Settled towards rear. Made some late impression running past beaten runners down centre of straight.
Wide in midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Raced wide in prominent position before fading into straight.

Fast to leave gates, bumped shortly after, re-gathered to hold spot behind leader on stand side, 1 to 2Ls away with nice trail, challenged at 300 M, drove to lead and kept giving until badly checked at 50 M.
Out with rest, raced 5Ls away in middle of track, didn't look to be comfortable at mid-point, gradually lost touch from then on to be well beaten.
Fast into stride, took up clear lead on stand side, made all 2Ls clear in front, challenged from 300 M, stuck to task but condition gave out late, checked at 50 M when race was over.
Reasonable break, stuck to near side rail, lead inside division, held 3Ls advantage to 300 M, kept kicking and still lead until 100 M but was overhauled late, solid effort.
Average to leave gates, checked shortly after, always struggling at rear of field, hard ridden from mid-point, offered nothing in run home. Found trip too short.
Jumped with them, held midfield spot on stand side, raced 3 to 4Ls away, lost ground when bumped at 300 M, hard ridden to make run from that point but could only hold ground to line.
Began with line, raced on inside 3 to 4Ls from leader, level with eventual winner but urged along at mid-point, didn't respond and was 1 paced last furlong.

Began nicely, raced behind them in midfield on stand side, raced 2 to 3Ls from them drifting close to rails, threatened at 300 M but couldn't go up a gear, inconvenienced late but race was over by that point.
Slow to begin, remained hard against stand side rail, raced 4 to 5Ls from them in mid-section, hard ridden passing 400 M, kept there but unable to go up a notch to threaten.
Broke with rest, stayed on near side 5 horses off rail, raced 3Ls off leader in middle stages, chased hard and made run with winner but couldn't match them last bit.
Standard to leave gates, raced 4Ls away on inside, stuck to rails in mid-section, under pressure when sprint went on at 400 M, couldn't find last furlong and held ground to line.
Began with rest, settled in behind them on stand side, raced 3 to 4Ls away in mid-section, began to make good ground late despite hanging to be denied in photo.
Began with them, settled behind them on stand side, 3Ls down to 300 M, began to make strong ground until hampered at 300 M, lost momentum and just held ground to line.
Away only fairly, stayed on inside, raced with cover, was 4 to 5Ls from leaders on inside, came with strong run from 200 M to overhaul them and score narrowly.
Settled behind midfield. Improving in straight when baulked for a run around 200 M. Closed off race nicely.
Close up early then travelled in forward of midfield around home bend. Did not find much room between 200 M and 100 M. Kept on well to finish.
Raced in midfield on rails. Weakened upon straightening.
Raced in last few to straight. Made up good ground down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide in last few. Made no show in straight.
Attempted to make all. Unable to sustain effort and overhauled inside final 200 M.
Raced 3-wide down far side in close-up position. Took closer order rounding home bend joining leaders into straight. Weakened passing 200 M. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Jumped fairly from wide draw. Gradually improved at least 4-wide down far side disputing lead around home bend. Unable to sustain effort under pressure in straight.
Raced wide towards rear. Kept on from similar position into straight before finding no extra closing stages.
Soon dropped to the rear. Trailed the field into straight. Making good progress down inner of straight when running into horses passing 200 M. Not fully tested.
Always well there. Hit front passing 200 M and hung on well under pressure to the line.
Broke well in last few early, gradually settling in midfield. 3-wide rounding home bend and remained same into straight. Produced good late run inside final 200 M to just fail to get up on line.
Settled mainly one back on rails. In box seat early in straight. Obtained split 200 M out and fought on well to miss narrowly.
Always in last few and never seen with a chance.
Began with rest, urged along to maintain 3 back on rails, had soft run in mid-section, travelled well turning in, in traffic but not doing enough to threaten, kept same pace to line.

Fastest into stride, crossed easily to race at leaders girth, had reasonable run with even speed, moved up to challenge into straight, kept giving for most of straight but just couldn't match first two last bit.

Average to break, showed no speed as usual to settle at rear of field 8Ls off pace, lobbed along a tail to turn, still had field to beat, hooked to extreme outside, finished over the top of them last 200 M to score big win.

Broke nicely, couldn't show enough dash to get close to lead, finished up in midfield 2 wide 3 to 4Ls away, had good to turn, hard ridden and responded making good ground but just lacked dash to be a factor.

Began fairly, soon drifted back from wide alley, raced near tail 2 wide 6 to 7Ls away, tracked well on bend, came with run between horses in straight, making late ground before severely checked at 100 M.

Fair to break, drifted back to assume usual role near rear, raced 3 wide with cover 6 to 7Ls away, steadily made ground to be 4Ls away on turn, chased gamely in straight and made good ground to make frame.

Jumped with line, ridden up to hold prominent position behind leader, not asked in mid-section, tracked well to turn, in behind them for most of straight and finally clear at 200 M but only finished at same pace.

Began a shade slower than usual, soon mustered speed to take up running, dictated terms at an even clip, held 1L advantage on turning, turned up a notch and kicked strongly last 200 M, had race won everywhere but line.
Slow to begin, pushed along to hold midfield position, raced 2 wide 6Ls off pace, pushed along to make 3 wide run turning in, came to outside in straight and closed race off nicely. Fair debut.
Away with field, soon restrained to race in rearward division on rails, raced 6Ls away using little to turn, followed paint into straight and closed off nicely before severe check at 100 M mark.

Reasonable beginning, lacked early speed and settled just off midfield, raced on rails 4 to 5Ls away, still in traffic on turning, steadily made ground but ran out of room at 200 M and was not properly tested.

Began nicely, faded back to midfield when unable to cross, forced to race 3 wide without cover 3Ls away, steadily made ground and came with 4 wide run on turn. Threatened until 200 M when hard run took toll.
Began with rest, showed enough speed to settle in forward role, slotted in to 1 out 1 back spot with run of race, came 3 wide into straight, stuck to task well but fitness gave out close to home.

Awkward to begin, raced ungenerously and lost spot early, raced 7 to 8Ls away on rails, always well back, still had job to do on turn, offered little in straight finishing at same pace. Lame morning after.

Began with them, lacked early toe and forced to race wide in midfield, parked 3 wide without cover 3 to 4Ls away, improved slightly to turn, unable to quicken but kept giving and stuck to task well to make frame.

Began with rest, taken straight back, dug up to be 2 wide 4Ls away in midfield, had good run and closer than usual on turn, angled into clear at 300 M, came with strong sprint to hit lead at 200 M and go on for deserved win.
Average to leave gates, occupied midfield role on rails 4Ls off pace, had easy time not used in middle stages, stuck to fence in straight, kept on but run didn't eventuate. No clear run last 200 M.

Away reasonably, pushed on to take closer order, forced to cover ground 3 wide without cover 1L away, always working and moved up to challenge on turn, kept giving but lacked dash to figure last 200 M.
Standard beginning, lacked speed and settled worse than midfield, raced 3 wide 4 to 5Ls away with cover, pushed along on circle, struggled in straight, only plodded at same pace to line.
Slow to begin, ridden up to race just worse than midfield, stuck to rails and was 5Ls away at midpoint, struggling and niggled along on turn, offered nothing in straight and drifted right out of it.
Standard to begin, instantly restrained to tail, lobbed along at rear 10Ls off pace, caught 2nd last horse on circle, swung 3 wide on turn, made up great amount of ground down outside to snare 2nd.

Bounced with them, allowed to drift back when posted from wide alley, raced 2 to 3 wide with cover, 7Ls away at tail, still well back on turning, came between runners and made fair ground before run closed at 200 M.

Fastest to leave gates, crossed easily to race outside leader, raced ungenerously early, travelled well at leader's girth on turn, challenged and took lead into straight, couldn't dash last 200 M and held of a wall off for 3rd.

Standard to break, ridden up to hold spot behind leader, had run of race in mid-section, hard ridden and struggling on turn, in traffic for most of straight but not doing well enough, not tested last 200 M.
Broke nicely, soon gathered enough speed to take up running, had fair run setting even speed in front, upped temp from midpoint, tackled on turn, fought on until 200 M but found little thereafter.

Broke with line, pressed on in attempt to slot in, posted 3 wide 3Ls away with cover in mid-section, tracked nicely to turn, eased 4 wide in straight, threatened to 200 M but didn't go on with it last bit.
Average to begin, ridden up to hold 1 out 1 back spot, enjoyed nice trip in mid-section, in traffic but ridden along on turn, found nothing under hard riding in straight, weakened to be well beaten.
Quickly into stride, settled behind them on the stand side but tired over the final stages.
Began with line, held midfield position, shifted towards the outside, in the run home, failed to go on and challenge seriously.
Raced on the outside in 2nd place, had every chance but failed to go on with the task.
Raced along the inside, tracked the leaders, stuck to task without threatening.
Out with the rest of the field, settled a long way back, was never likely on the stand side.
Stuck to the inside, 3Ls off the early leader, did little over final furlong.
Jumped with them, held midfield spot along the inside, never likely.
Travelled well in the lead but found little when asked for an effort after the 300 M.
Average to begin, always struggled near the rear of the field, did nothing in the run home.
Began well, took up off pace position, lost touch with leaders mid race, positioned mid track, shifted towards the outside, ran home solidly despite racing greenly.
Took up midfield position, in the inside, 3Ls away, gradually lost touch to be well beaten.
Began awkwardly, tailed the field for most of the trip, disappointing. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced along the inside of the straight course, settled just off the leader, accelerated well to score decisively.
Couldn't match the early speed, closed off satisfactorily over the concluding stages. Found trip too short.
Raced wide without cover at midfield. Widest making the turn and lacked a quickening pace when asked on straightening.
Settled in rear section. Made a ground saving trip around the turn and made up ground in the straight to be closest at finish.

Settled on fence behind the pace. Continued to race along the rails making the turn and was 3Ls off the leader turning in. Quickened nicely and challenged for the lead at 200 M. Kept on gamely and drew clear final 100 M.
Settled behind midfield. Only maintained same pace in the straight.
Settled towards the rear. Improved to midfield rounding the turn. Ran on without threatening in the straight.
Settled at the rear and trailed field into home straight. Ran on nicely and was closest at finish.
Took the lead at 1600 M. Headed at 800 M and raced behind the leader turning for home. Kept on well and regained lead at 200 M. Failed to match strides with winner over the final stages.
Dropped back to race in a rearward position. Made up some ground in the home straight by running past tired runners.

Wide without cover in midfield in early stages. Steadily moved into a forward position after 1200 M. Took the lead after 800 M and held a 2Ls advantage into home straight. Unable to find extra after being headed final 200 M.
Raced keenly behind the pace in early stages. Continued to prove difficult to settle and steadied to midfield after 1000 M. Lacked a response in the straight.
Settled 2-wide and no worse than midfield. 3-wide making the turn. Kept on fairly in the straight.
Travelled alongside the leader. Ridden along but unable to hold position making home turn. Tired in the straight.
Settled behind midfield. 4-wide making home turn and only ran past a beaten runner in the straight.
Raced on fence at midfield. Continued well in the straight to claim a minor placing.
Best away and led by 1L on fence at 1000 M, a neck clear off final bend, soon headed and weakened gradually.
Ideally placed on fence 2Ls off speed in 3rd or 4th until home straight, petered out feebly despite the soft passage.
Settled towards rear about 6Ls from pace at 1000 M, edged closer turning for home, over 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, dug in well to lead inside final 50 M.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1000 M, hard pressed to maintain this prominent role at final bend, faded out.
Keen at halfway when about 5Ls behind in midfield, kept on at same pace in homestretch. (Bled.)
3Ls back in 5th when 2-wide at 1000 M, 1L down in 3rd taking home bend, looked the winner forging over 1L clear passing 200 M, one-paced late and caught inside final 50 M.
Towards rear early, left 4-wide no cover at 800 M, about 5Ls down in 11th at final bend, plugged on at same pace to line.
A little worse than midfield about 4Ls from the front until home straight, could do no better.
On fence 4Ls behind lead in 7th at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 6th turning for home and with every chance of a place, failed to quicken.
Lost ground at start, over 4Ls back in midfield at 1000 M, slipped further back turning for home, soon well beaten.
Always behind, 7Ls off pace at 800 M, didn't get much closer.
Restrained one from rear about 6Ls from the speed to home turn when 5-wide (widest of all), ran on past a few tired rivals late.
Travelled in midfield with cover and about 4Ls from the front until home turn, sluggish in the finish. (Blood in trachea.)
4-wide no cover early, sent on to dispute lead at 900 M out 2-wide, under pressure when 1L down in 2nd at top of homestretch, tired late but did enough to hang on for 3rd.
One from rear about 7Ls or 8Ls off pace until home straight when under pressure, no impression.
4-wide with cover early on about 7Ls from the lead, a little closer when 5-wide turning for home, 3Ls down in midfield when turning for home, no extra.
Away well, on fence about 2Ls off speed in 5th at 1200 M, began to lose ground on the circle appearing quite field-shy and about 7Ls behind turning for home, no impression.
Didn't break well, pressed on keenly to be 1L 2nd from 1000 M to home turn, raced greenly throughout, switched inside to be tight for room at 300 M while hanging in, always held.
Settled in last place about 8Ls from the front, 6Ls back in 12th and 5-wide turning for home, stayed on only at an even tempo.
Led by a neck a mile out, led on fence by 1L at 1200 M, 2Ls in front at top of homestretch, headed inside final 100 M and missed a place.
Patiently ridden towards rear at least 5Ls or 6Ls from pace, cut through the field to lead about 100 M out, went nicely clear.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1600 M, still 2Ls down in 3rd at final bend, always looked held from a place even if he was very badly checked on fence inside final 50 M.
Covered up in midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls from lead until home straight, every chance to win when 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, couldn't match winner's kick.
Raced in 10th or so about 6Ls from the speed until home turn, no impression.
4-wide no cover at 900 M when prominent, 2Ls down in 3rd at final bend, all out to be a neck down in 2nd at 200 M, no extra late.
4-back on fence in midfield about 4Ls off pace at 1000 M, under pressure to maintain this position at final bend, dropped out very tamely in closing stages.
3-wide with cover but close enough if good enough about 3Ls off speed in midfield until home straight, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, no extra in latter stages.
Awkwardly away, settled about 3Ls off pace in 6th or so from 1000 M to home straight, 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, disappointed for running at 100 M, didn't recover.

Raced wide in midfield around stables bend from poor draw. Rapid progress down far side to dispute lead. Remained one out one back rounding home bend. Hit front briefly about 200 M out but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Settled well back. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled towards rear on rails. Ran home steadily without threatening.
Settled on rails in midfield. Shifted off rails halfway out. Went 4-wide turning in and quickened up well early in straight to take charge inside final 200 M.
Raced wide in prominent position to straight. Gradually weakened.
Attempted to make all. Made most of the running until overhauled under pressure over 200 M out.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. Kept on steadily to finish.
Chased leader to halfway, then settled mainly in 5th within 2Ls of pace to straight. Soon weakened under pressure.
Settled towards rear. Did not find too much room early in straight. Obtained clear run over 200 M out. Finished off race nicely.
Raced in rear. Made up good ground past beaten runners in straight.
Mainly in midfield. Kept on well under pressure in straight without quickening.
Better than midfield early. Midfield rounding home bend. Found nothing in straight.
Always thereabouts. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Raced wide in last few. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.

Began fairly. Soon picked up to 4th some 3Ls back. Commenced move upon straightening hitting front over 250 M out before headed by runner-up marginally. Fought on dourly to regain advantage close to home.
Travelled behind midfield. Made no impression in straight.
In last few to straight. Making good progress down inner of straight when forced to check 200 M out. Sustained headway to the line.
Made running to 300 M. Overhauled under pressure.
Settled on rails in midfield. Gradually shifted off rails for a run early in straight. Obtained split over 200 M out but could only keep on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Prominent to 300 M. Gradually faded.
Settled in rear. Did not find much room in straight until 200 M. Finished off race strongly.
Chased leader to straight. Weakened out of contention 200 M out.
Raced wide and never better than midfield. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Mainly in similar position throughout in forward of midfield. Kept on same pace in straight without making any serious impression.
Close up early, settling in midfield before home bend. One-paced under pressure in the run home.
Settled at the back. Circled field rounding home bend. Quickened well from towards rear inside final 300 M to hit front over 150 M out only to be worn down close to home.
Settled at the back and trailed the field into straight. Made modest progress without threatening.
Settled behind midfield. Hampered and forced to race behind runners early in straight. Only produced moderate impression in the finish.

Began evenly, restrained to assume usual role at tail, raced on rails at rear 8 to 9Ls away, allowed to follow field to turn, swung 4 and 5 wide into straight, made no real impression and lacked fitness to figure.

Fastest into stride, unable to slot in early, snagged back to midfield, raced 4 wide without cover, 5Ls away in mid-section, forced to roll forward to turn, under pressure into straight and weakened late after hard run.

Began with rest, allowed to roll forward, couldn't slot in and posted 3 wide without cover 5Ls away in mid-section, had cover from midpoint pushed along on turning, finished race off steadily after hard run to be closest at finish.

Jumped with line, showed dash to hold forward position 2 wide first without cover 4Ls away, faced breeze throughout, still 3Ls down turning in, couldn't find another gear when asked and battled steadily to line.

Began well, showed plenty of speed to assume lead, kept them rolling at solid clip 2Ls clear in middle stages, dashed for home with same advantage, held them off to 200 M but ran out of puff late. Solid effort after doing work.

Standard to begin, restrained to back (fighting rider) raced 2 to 3 wide 7 to 8Ls away, travelled well to turn, still well back and held up turning in, in traffic to 200 M, closed solidly when clear. (See Racing Incidents.)

Began awkwardly, re-gathered to settle worse than midfield, raced on rails 6Ls away, used little to turn, in traffic entering straight, disappointed for a run at 350 M, never really saw daylight until race was over.

Broke with them, soon drifted back to worse than midfield, raced 2 wide 6Ls away, came 3 wide on circle, made run 4 wide on turn, lacked usual finishing burst and didn't make any real impression to line.
Began with them, pushed up to hold spot 3 back on fence 4Ls from leader, enjoyed nice trip not working hard to turn, angled out on turning in, sprinted hard to hit lead at 200 M, caught last 100 M.

Slow into stride, taken back from wide alley to assume usual spot near tail, raced on rails 8Ls away, spent nothing to turn, well back in traffic early in straight, weaved between horses and dashed hard to fight out finish. Solid effort.

Slow to begin, urged along to hold midfield position, raced 2 wide 5Ls away, appreciated pace in front, tracked nicely to turn, hit plenty of dead ends in straight, lost momentum and never really got a crack at them.

Bounced in air, lacked early toe, settled in midfield on rails 4 to 5Ls from pace, had easy time in mid-section with speed on, followed rails into straight, dream run presented at 200 M, dashed through to score nice win.

Began reasonably, mustered speed to hold leaders back, raced 2Ls away trailing leader at good clip throughout, niggled along on turn, came to outside and tried hard but lacked dash to be a factor last 200 M. Better effort.
Raced mainly 2 wide in forward of midfield. Gained 4th into straight and 3rd shortly afterwards. Swamped over 250 M out.
Chased leader. Unable to sustain effort passing 200 M and swamped for 2nd late.
Settled at the back. Finished off race well inside final 200 M.
Raced 3-wide in midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Towards rear to straight. Kept on one pace.
Settled at the back. Kept on past beaten runners closing stages.
Travelled in midfield. Made modest headway under pressure in straight without threatening.
Raced 3-wide towards rear. Ran on quite well under pressure inside final 300 M. Did best work at finish.
Raced 3-wide in better than midfield position to straight. Weakened.
Settled on rails in midfield. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide in midfield. Faded into straight.
Prominent to straight. Weakened. (Irregular heart beat.)
Soon took up running and made all. Hung on well under pressure.
In last few to straight. Made up good ground in straight despite the difficulty in obtaining clear running.

Standard to break, gathered speed to settle behind them in midfield, raced on rails 5Ls away to turn, tracked well on bit but held up in traffic early in straight, made up significant ground when clear at 250 M to make frame.

Jumped nicely, prominent early, took up running after 300 M, dictated terms in front at even clip, held 1L advantage on turning, kicked strongly when challenged at 250 M, drew away towards line to score a strong win.

Began with rest, drove through to hold position 1 out 1 back, had good run 2Ls away in mid-section, in between horses leaving turn, couldn't match them when they sprinted and gradually weakened out of it.

Steady break, showed enough toe to hold midfield spot, raced 2 wide 4Ls away, on bit not racing generously in mid-section, still amongst horses on turning in, didn't find another gear and weakened out in straight.

Began with rest, faded out of speed battle to settle in midfield, raced 2 wide 5Ls away throughout, tracked 3 and 4 wide with cover on turn, into clear with strong run at 250 M closed well to be nearest at finish.

Fast to begin, lacked speed to match them early, posted 3 wide 3 to 4Ls away between horses, rolled forward without cover on turn, 2Ls down on turning in, stuck to task well in straight chasing winner right to line.

Broke fairly, soon back in usual position towards rear, settled on rails 7Ls off pace, not asked in mid-section angled 2 wide approaching turn, still in traffic turning for home, finished well when clear giving too great a start.

Broke fairly, soon mustered speed to contest early lead, raced on rail behind leader thereafter, had good run to turn, held up on turning, didn't find usual turn of foot and gradually lost touch (rider reported not comfortable).

Began awkwardly and lost ground, settled down in rearward division, raced 2 wide 7Ls off leaders, made 3 wide run on circle, swung 4 wide and came down outside in straight making steady ground to line.

Slow to begin, settled towards tail, raced on rails 8Ls from frontrunners, not asked in mid-section, made ground on fence to be 5Ls down on turning, steadily closed on fence without really looking likely.

Out with field, allowed to slide forward to hold closer spot, raced at leader's girth on bit in mid-section, 1L down on turning, threatened until 250 M but failed to show another gear last 200 M and was one paced to line.
Average break, lacked early toe, drifted back to last, raced slightly detached 10Ls off front, caught up and came 4 and 5 wide on turn, closed evenly down outside passing a few tired runners late.
Standard to begin, rushed up to be amongst them early, raced 3 back on rails, had good run to turn, still in traffic only in straight, weakened and dropped right out from 200 M. (Roarer.)

Fast into stride, unable to get close to rails from widest gate, posted 4 wide 4Ls away in midfield without cover, pressed on wide to be 2Ls down into straight, stuck to task but couldn't quicken after hard run.
Standard to break, lacked speed to be prominent, raced 2-3Ls away on rails, had easy time in mid-section, tracked rails on turn, made up plenty of ground charging late to narrowly go down.
Sprung from gates, showed good dash to take up running leaving straight, set moderate tempo in front, held 1L advantage on bend, had them chasing in straight, kicked hard and just held on late.

Began awkwardly and became unbalanced, faded back to tail, raced ungenerously at rear 6-7Ls off pace, never really relaxed, still had field to beat on turn, saved ground on rails and passed a few tired horses late.

Standard break, soon positioned at rear, forced to race 3-wide at tail 6Ls away, always working covering ground, took off 4-wide at mid-point, 3Ls off them at Rock, run ended turning for home and weakened out.
Away with rear, ridden up to press forward to leaders girth, relaxed after early work and had good run in mid-section, pushed along to challenge at Rock, faded out after 200 M when they sprinted.
Left gates well, showed speed to hold 1 out 1 back spot, had good run 2Ls away thereafter, urged along between horses on turn, gained split in straight but lacked turn of foot to be a factor.

Slow to begin, hard ridden to hold spot 4-5Ls away on fence, tightened on first turn, had even trip thereafter, still well back on turning, stuck to rails in straight, closed steadily without threatening.

Began with rest, urged along to hold midfield position, raced 2-wide between horses 4-5Ls away, not really asked in mid-section, ridden along at Rock, came between horses in straight but lacked a gear change to threaten.

Standard to break, assumed usual position near last, checked leaving straight, raced 2-wide 6Ls off pace, still well back on turn, came with 3-wide into straight, finished well down outside making up many lengths.
Began nicely, pressed forward but unable to slot in, posted 3-wide 2Ls away without cover throughout, always working to turn, there until 200 M but couldn't find extra late after hard run.

Fair to begin, unable to show enough dash to cross them, caught 3-wide with cover in midfield 4-5Ls away, never really travelling, under pressure at mid-point gradually weakened out to be well beaten.
Broke with rest, pushed up to hold prominent spot on fence, raced behind leader with run of race, stalked leader on turn, angled out in straight, kept finding to fight out 3 way finish.
Slowly away and hampered near the 1300 M. Settled at the tail of the field, ran on smartly while securing runs through the field over the last 250 M.
Couldn't go the early speed, and never seemed comfortable in the run while racing on the fence at the back of the field. Failed to run on at any stage.
Tracked the leader, battled on dourly in the run home, steadied and shifted in near the 100 M to continue its run.
Raced wide without cover whilst in a prominent position throughout. Never likely.
Covered ground back in the field, came wider in the straight, struggled over the final stages.
Parked outside the leader, in contention turning for home, ran out of gas over the last 200 M.
Settled near the rear of the field, 1 off with cover, made some headway in the run home.
Handy position, 1 off with good trail, failed to take advantage and run on at the business end.
Raced midfield, 1 off with cover, peeled out entering the straight, worked to the post soundly.
Settled slightly worse than midfield, one off, with cover, never threatened.
Went forward and led from wide gate, overhauled inside the 200 M.
Settled 2-wide midfield early, shifted to the rail passing the 1100 M. Remained along the fence in the straight to draw away for decisive win.
Outpaced early. Raced in a rearward position and remained near the back on straightening. Rallied strongly in the straight. Slightly crowded at 200 M and just missed catching the winner.
Pressed to a forward position. Shuffled back to midfield after being crowded at 800 M. Midfield on the rails making the turn. Kept on steadily in the straight.
Jumped fairly. Raced 2-wide at midfield after crowding at 800 M. Kept on fairly in the straight but unable to gain much ground final stages.
Just behind the pace early. Checked at 800 M and dropped behind midfield. 3-wide making the turn and weakened final stages.

Missed the jump but was hard ridden to get to a forward position. On fence in a disputed lead making the turn and opened up a clear advantage in the straight. Dug deep final stages to hold off a late charging rival.
Pushed along from a wide draw and soon took the lead. Disputed lead around the turn and was headed by eventual winner on entering home straight. Kept on fairly for a minor placing.
Outpaced and raced in rear section. Last few to enter home straight and displayed a strong closing run final 200 M.
3-wide without cover in a forward position at 800 M. Remained wide and was a length off the pace making home turn Faded steadily in the straight.
Jumped fairly and raced among leaders early. Crowded at 800 M and shuffled back to behind midfield. Raced along the fence at the turn and only remained on same pace in the straight.
Crowded out of the gates and was hard ridden to recover to midfield. Niggled along at the Rock and improved to be within 2Ls of the leader making the turn. Lacked a quickening pace in the straight.
Slowly away and then got crowded and lost further ground. Trailed field throughout and only ran past a weakening runner.
On fence back in 4th about 4Ls behind lead at 1100 M, became unbalanced when steadied at 600 M and lost momentum, 5Ls back in 11th taking home turn, finished tamely.
Box run on fence 2Ls back in 2nd at 1100 M, same margin back in 3rd taking home turn, dug in well to lead 150 M out, all out to scrape in.
Well placed on fence from 3rd to 5th place between 2Ls and 3Ls from the speed until home turn, lacked acceleration and still 1L down in 5th at 200 M, plugged on for a place.
Always prominent, 4Ls down in 6th at 1200 M, niggled along from 500 M to go over 2Ls down in 4th taking home turn, outpaced thereafter.
3-wide with cover in 8th when 5Ls off pace at 1200 M, 3Ls back in midfield entering homestretch when 4-wide, found zero under pressure.
Slow to muster early pace, 5Ls from the lead in 9th at 1200 M when 2-wide, unbalanced at 600 M but slightly closer taking home turn, one-paced in the finish.
Poor performance, always struggling detached in rear about 10Ls off pace, never a factor. (Jockey Injured.)
Led by 1L on fence passing winning post for first time, 2Ls clear at 1000 M, a neck in front taking final bend, grabbed over 200 M out and quickly folded.
Failed to muster much early speed, 8Ls back in 11th at 1200 M, 5Ls back in about 8th or 9th taking home turn, stayed on well late, nearest at finish.
Went from gate 12 to fence, 6Ls off pace in 10th at 1100 M, moved 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home over 4Ls down in mid-division, every chance to score but no extra late, just failed.
5Ls off pace in midfield on fence at 1100 M, head up and tight for room turning for home when 5Ls back in 10th, only into clear running at 200 M, finished strongly, never nearer.
Caught 3-wide no cover 4Ls off pace in 5th at 1100 M, pressed on to go a neck down in 2nd on straightening, disputing the lead at 200 M but flagged late and missed a place.
3-wide with cover in rear no better than 5Ls from the front until 600 M out, 5-wide (widest of all) taking final bend, ran on very strongly down the centre but post came too soon.
Broke fairly, on fence about 2.5Ls back in midfield down the back, 3Ls down in 7th turning for home out 2-wide, picked up well to lead 50 M out, stayed on well.
Prominent early on, 2.5Ls back on fence in 4th taking home turn, outpaced and always booked for a midfield finish through final 200 M.
Away well and soon led, joined for the lead by BEAUTY PLUS at halfway, headed at 200 M by that horse but fought back, grabbed by winner at 50 M, tired late and just missed a place.
3-wide with cover early on when 3Ls back in midfield, left without cover from 600 M and struggling in midfield 4-wide on straightening, dropped out quickly.
4Ls or 5Ls off pace in 9th through to home straight, never troubled leaders.
Never on terms, always on fence in rear bunch about 5Ls off pace, no threat.
Very well placed through to home turn on fence and 2Ls back in 3rd, slightly disappointing in his one-paced finish considering the run he had.
Close up but caught 3-wide no cover early, pressed on to dispute lead out 2-wide at 600 M, went a head in front at 200 M, caught by winner 50 M out and faded slightly in final stages.
Crowded at start, settled about 6Ls last until home straight, ran on well through final stages to nick a place in final strides.
Keen early in front trio, lost position from 600 M and 4Ls back in midfield and under pressure turning for home, never dangerous thereafter.
2-wide and mostly midfield or better no worse than 2-1/2Ls from the pace until home turn when driven along, always just held by principals.
Raced wide in rear of midfield and in similar position throughout.
Never far off on rails behind lead. Quickened to hit front over 200 M out but outsprinted by winner nearing finish.
Settled in rear. Commenced run turning in. Made steady progress in straight to be nearest at finish.
Always well there. Held every chance over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort nearing finish.
Slightly slow out. Towards rear early. Made steady ground around stable bend and early in back straight to be just off the pace up Rock. Weakened 400 M out.
Never better than midfield and towards rear early. Steadied and lost some ground home bend. Kept on steadily in closing stages.
Settled on rails in midfield. Took closer order turning in gaining 4th some 2Ls back. Unable to sustain inside final 200 M.
Attempted to make all. Overhauled over 200 M out.
Raced 2-wide in midfield to straight. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Wide in midfield early. Dropped towards rear coming into back straight. Never nearer.
Prominent to Rock. Dropped out. (Irregular heart beat.)
Midfield on rails early. Shifted 2-wide far side. Steadied going up Rock. Went widest in midfield turning in. Finished off race well to snatch victory close to home.
Raced mainly 3-wide within 2Ls of pace to straight, gaining 3rd rounding home bend. Fought on steadily under pressure to reach 2nd late.
Attempted to make all. Only swamped under pressure final few strides.
Raced 2-wide in midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Chased leader. Weakened under pressure over 200 M out.
Raced in rear of midfield. Steadied and lost some ground coming off Rock. Found nothing from towards rear into straight.
Raced on rails in midfield. Shifted 2-wide to avoid weakening runner approaching home turn. Badly baulked when going for a gap on rails 200 M out. Kept on steadily to finish.
Trailed the field to straight. Made up good ground down centre of straight past beaten runners.
Raced mainly 2 to 3-wide towards rear of straight. Produced good late impression under pressure inside final 200 M.
Travelled in last few to straight. Made up good ground inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Never far off in 4th to 200 M. Weakened under pressure.
Chased leader on rails in 3rd before dropped out coming out of back straight.
Tightened shortly after start. Settled at the back. Circled field around home bend. Finished off race strongly from rear of midfield into straight to snatch victory closing stages.

Began awkwardly, drifted back to settle in rearward division, raced 2-wide worse than midfield 6Ls off pace, travelled well in run, still had job to do on turn, came 4 and 5-wide and closed hard to be closest at finish.

Began fairly, gathered speed to assume usual prominent role at leaders girth, on steel throughout and had easy time when speed backed off, challenged on circle, hit lead and fought on to 150 M just tiring last bit.

Hit ground evenly, showed enough dash to cross into 1 out 1 back spot from wide alley, had no problems in run, relaxed well and came with 3-wide run into straight, there until 200 M but faded out late.
Average to break, ridden along early, posted 3-wide without cover 6Ls off pacemakers, never really travelling, began to struggle from Rock, weakened out to be well beaten in straight.
Steady to begin, settled just worse than midfield when unable to get close, raced 2-wide 5-6Ls from them, circled 4-wide and made some ground but found no extra last 200 M and was one-paced to line.
Unbalanced and lost ground at break, forced to race further back than usual 7Ls away on rail, always rearward to turn, came to outside, made little impression from well back in run home.
Poor to begin as usual and taken straight to tail, ridden cold 2-wide 8Ls off leaders, still had field to beat on bend, stuck to rails and closed hard last 200 M coming between horses to grab 2nd.
Fast into stride, took up lead leaving straight, backed off speed well in mid-section after early burn, challenged on circle, lost advantage on turning in, fought on but couldn't find last 200 M.

Began with rest, took hold to settle behind pace in midfield, raced 3-4Ls away on rails, had cosy run and not asked in mid-section, gained split between horses at 150 M, sprinted hard and drew clear for easy win.

Fair to break, showed turn of foot early to hold position on leaders back, relaxed well and travelled nicely, pursued inside run on turning and had plenty to offer before severely checked at 200 M and not tested to line.
Began with field, settled closer than usual in midfield 3Ls down at mid-point, travelled well passing Rock, came with 3-wide run on turn, threatened at 200 M but only kept same pace to line.

Standard break, lacked enough speed to be better than midfield, raced on rails 6Ls away, had easy time thereafter, pushed up to be 4Ls down on turn, came between horses and closed well when clear at 150 M.
Broke with line, pushed up but couldn't cross them, drifted back to midfield 4Ls away, raced 3 wide with cover throughout, back in the ruck on turn, into clear and charged home for clear 2nd.

Jumped with them, showed good dash to contest early lead, posted 3 wide outside leaders without cover, 2 wide on bend still working hard to chase leader, didn't quicken in straight and was one-paced to line.

Away with them, pressed forward to be in early speed battle, slotted in behind leader, 2Ls away, began to lost ground on turn, weakened right out in straight to be well beaten. (Stiff behind, tied up morning after.)

Broke evenly, soon mustered speed to drive through and hold lead, kept them running at solid clip, held 2Ls advantage on bend, kicked strongly until 250 M before early burn took toll and weakened right out.

Amongst first to begin, pressed on to be 3-wide without cover in midfield, raced 3Ls down on turn, kept giving under hard riding, came with strong sprint, hit lead at 250 M and fought on for solid win.

Lacked speed from outside, hard ridden to hold rearward spot, made ground to be 4 to 5Ls down at mid-point, held up in behind them on turn, pushed into gap at 300 M and closed at same pace to make frame.

Average to begin, ridden up to take up spot on rails in midfield, 4 to 5Ls down in mid-section, inconvenienced on bend, held up for best part of straight, ran into dead end at 150 M and was not tested late.

Even break and ridden hard to stay with them, raced in midfield 4 and 5 wide without cover, had hard run in mid-section, 4 to 5Ls away on circle, made wide run to be 3Ls back on turn, faded after tough run.

Fast to leave gates, amongst them early, dropped in for trail behind leader, 3Ls down at mid-point, couldn't keep up on bend and lost ground when horse behind leader stopped, showed nothing when in clear thereafter.
Slow to begin, scrubbed along to keep touch in rearward division, raced at tail 6 to 7Ls down, angled wide on under coming 5 wide into straight, closed only fairly without making any real impression.

Began awkwardly and lost ground, ridden up to drive into midfield role, raced 1 out 1 back in mid-section, still 3Ls down in traffic on turn, in clear with plenty of time and made a little ground to line.
Began with rest, lacked early toe, raced near rear 3 wide, always struggling to get into it, swung very wide on turn, still had field to pass in straight, closed off at same pace to line.
Settled 3rd last 1 off, struggled in the straight whilst hanging in.
Behind midfield on the fence. Passed tiring runners in the straight.
Made every post a winner, skipped clear approaching the 400 M for decisive win.
Inconvenienced at the start, failed to muster early speed, carried wide mid race, settled near the back of the field. Disappointing in the straight.
Ridden along early to settle just off the speed, chased leaders throughout, stuck to task dourly.
Settled midfield, 1 off with cover, steadied and shifted in near 250 M whilst running on well between runners.
Raced near the rear, on the fence, found little in the straight.
Raced in midfield on the fence, never likely when under pressure.
Last for the majority of the race, performed uncompetitively.
Positioned 3 wide around midfield, had hard run, beaten before home turn.
Tracked the leading pair 3 wide for most of the trip. Battled away, 1 paced in the run home.
Chased the leader throughout, punctured after the 400 M.
Bounced well and took the lead. Had a length's advantage making the turn and opened up a clear lead on straightening. Kept on well over the final stages and held off a late challenge.
Settled at midfield and was 3-wide turning for home. Responded well when asked on straightening. Kept gaining ground on leader over the final stages but came up a neck short.
Outpaced and raced towards the rear. Trailed field and was widest turning for home. Only ran past tired runners.
Crowded shortly after jumping. Raced at the back and was near last on straightening. Rallied over the final stretch and finished a distant 3rd.
Outpaced from widest draw despite being hard ridden out of the gates. Settled behind midfield and only kept on same pace in the straight.
Ridden along early to keep pace behind the leaders. 2-wide and 3Ls off the leader in 4th place making the turn. Kept on fairly in the straight.
Pushed hard and raced behind the pace. On fence and 3Ls off the leader in 3rd making home turn. Unable to keep pace after straightening and steadily weakened.
Hard ridden but was outpaced by leaders. Raced along the rails at midfield after 800 M. Unable to pick up speed after straightening and weakened final stages.
Raced wide and without cover at midfield throughout and then weakened on straightening.
Crowded and lost ground at the start. Raced along the rails behind midfield. Last few to enter home straight and ran on without threatening.
Tagged alongside the leader. Unable to keep pace after straightening and remained on same pace to the post.
4Ls back in midfield with cover until halfway, sucked back through field very quickly from 700 M, finished in his own time, unacceptable effort.
No speed early and soon raced one from rear, 6Ls down in 13th at 800 M, further behind taking final turn, weakened out.
More prominent than usual early on in midfield, 3-wide with cover and 4Ls down at halfway, struggling to remain in touch taking home turn, continued to lose ground.
Never travelled very well in 11th a good margin from the speed, still 7Ls down turning for home, ran on past a few very laboured rivals late but still the same margin from leaders.
Pressed on out 2-wide for a narrow lead at 1200 M, began to retreat about 700 M out and very quickly beaten, unacceptable effort.
Totally blew the start by about 10Ls having been fractious and getting head on wrong side of partition, never on meaningful terms.
Always caught 3-wide no cover and pressed on to dispute lead at about halfway, soon lost position and 3Ls down and fading fast entering homestretch, dropped out.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls off speed early, niggled along at halfway, 6Ls down and still toiling entering home straight, flattered by finishing position.
5-wide no cover on first bend, gained cover 3-wide at 1000 M when about 3Ls back in mid-division, 4Ls down in 5th and pressured turning for home, plugged on like a very one-paced stayer.
Soon led on fence but keen, headed at 1200 M but a neck clear at 800 M and skipped 2Ls ahead entering home straight, tired inside final 200 M but did just enough to hang on.
2Ls down in 4th when 2-wide at 1000 M, lost position on the circle and was a hard ridden 6Ls back in midfield entering home straight, didn't find much off the bit.
Always handily placed on fence about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 4th until halfway, 2Ls down in 2nd taking home turn, rallied well late but post came a few strides too soon.
Always towards rear but caught 4-wide no cover at halfway when 6Ls off pace, further back entering home straight and dropped out.
Slow break, switched from wide to race 3-back on fence in midfield about 3Ls behind speed at 800 M, one-paced in stretch losing lengths on quinella pair but enough for 3rd in a weak race.
Soon 9Ls off the pace in last, 7Ls down in 11th entering homestretch, ran on past a few tired rivals.
Checked over 1400 M out when close to pace, always tended to hang in, 3Ls down in 4th at 800 M and same margin back in field at 400 M, steadied when beaten at 300 M.
Always wide and in rear, 3-wide no cover at halfway about 8Ls from the speed in 12th, never a factor.
Led by 1L on fence at 1400 M, briefly joined at 1000 M but 1L clear again from 800 M to home turn, found zero under pressure and folded very tamely.
Checked at start, under pressure at halfway when about 5Ls back in midfield, over 2Ls down in 4th at top of home straight, tight for room on fence at 200 M, stayed on at same pace.
Soon crossed to fence, about 6Ls back in 10th at halfway, headway to be 3-wide and 4Ls down in mid-pack taking home turn, quickly wrested the lead at 300 M and drew clear convincingly.
Never travelled very well and under pressure 800 M out when 6Ls back in midfield, similarly placed on straightening, faded fast.
In 5th or 6th throughout, 4Ls back on fence at 1000 M, 3-wide and over 2Ls behind pace swinging for home, found nothing extra and weakened late.
Caught 3-wide no cover early on, sent on to dispute lead briefly at 1000 M, 1L down in 2nd from 800 M to home turn, weakened sharply through final 200 M.
One from rear about 8Ls off the speed at halfway, improved to 5Ls back in 9th entering homestretch, ran on fairly well for 2nd but had little hope of catching the winner.
Always in rear bunch at least 6Ls off the pace from the 1200 M, 3-wide no cover at 600 M when struggling, very weak thereafter, unacceptable effort.
Got well back, 8Ls down in 12th at halfway, progressed to 4Ls down in 8th on straightening, without clear running from 300 M to 200 M, may have run 2nd with an unimpeded run.
Always close-up, 2-wide back in 3rd on fence at 1200 M, closer turning for home in 2nd, energy-sapped and one-paced thereafter.
Settled at the back. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced 3-wide in rear. Keeping on at the one pace when steadied 200 M out. Produced some impression late.
Prominent in 4th on rails. Failed to hold place approaching home turn. Soon weakened in straight.
Slightly sluggish at start. Ridden to just behind midfield briefly approaching home turn. Trailed field into straight. Produced some impression late.
Raced mainly 3-wide in forward of midfield to straight. Made good late progress inside final 200 M.
Never better than midfield. Weakened in straight. (Bled.)
Settled in 3rd 3 wide one back. Came to challenge upon straightening and asserted authority inside final 200 M.
Raced 3-wide in rear of midfield to straight. Only kept on steadily at the one-pace.
Forward of midfield to straight. Weakened.
Led briefly early. Held 2nd on rails inside leader rounding home bend. Still having every chance 200 M out but unable to sustain effort nearing finish.
Soon took up running and held slender lead before fading over 200 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Did not jump well. Raced in last few to straight. Never looked like getting any closer.
Chased leader. Found nothing under pressure upon straightening and swamped for 2nd over 200 M out.
In last few early. Improved steadily to midfield far side. Gained 4th some 2Ls back turning in and took command easily about 100 M out.
Soon dropped to rear and never seen with a chance.
Raced widest in midfield throughout. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Niggled along for pace and soon took up running and led until finding no extra under pressure about 100 M out.
Well back. Tailed off into straight.
Raced wide behind midfield. Gave ground from halfway out. (Lame next morning.)
Midfield to home bend. Gradually weakened.
Always thereabouts racing 3-wide most of way. Kept on before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Given reminders to muster speed early. Travelled mainly in worse than midfield. Took closer order on rails turning for home. Kept on steadily from midfield into straight without threatening.

Broke with them, pressed on from wide alley, ended up in midfield 2 wide 5 to 6Ls away, appreciated solid speed, made 3 wide run on turn, chased hard to hit lead at 100 M and hold margin to line for good win.

Bounced out well, hard ridden to battle for early lead, kept pressure on outside leader, 3 to 4Ls clear of rest on turn shading lead, took over at top of straight, kicked strongly to 200 M but unable to go on last bit.

Standard to begin, hard ridden to hold spot, settled worse than midfield 8Ls away, raced ungenerously hanging on circle, came with 3 wide run on bend, made a little ground to 200 M but made no impression from then on.
Fastest to begin, crossed to rails, raced 3 to 4Ls away on rails, struggling at midpoint, began to lose ground on turn, didn't really fire in straight and only plodded to line.

Amongst first few to jump, settled nicely on rails 5 to 6Ls away, enjoyed good trip in mid-section, angled out on turn, in traffic early in straight, rallied strongly last 200 M chasing right to line.

Average to begin, rushed up to midfield, on bit 6 to 7Ls off them not racing comfortably, unbalanced at 700 M, still well down on turning in, closed hard down outside in straight making up many lengths.
Began with them, went on with it from wide alley, slotted into spot behind leaders 3 to 4Ls away, under pressure on turning, didn't find when asked and gradually faded in straight.
Slowly away and lost further ground when checked, settled 2 wide rear to last and hard ridden to hold position, still 10Ls down at midpoint, showed nothing in run home and was beaten a long way.

Began nicely, restrained for trail behind speed, raced 2 wide with cover 4Ls away early, travelled well in mid-section, came with good run on turning but fitness gave out and was one paced to line. (Mucopus.)
Out with rest, mustered speed to lead after 200 M, challenged and kept them going at fast clip, was in speed battle 4Ls clear on turn, hit wall at 300 M and faded out quickly to be well beaten.

Lacked dash from outset, pushed along to stay in touch, raced more than 12Ls away at tail, still a clear last on circle, came wide on turn, made considerable ground in straight finding trip too short.

Showed no speed from break, allowed to settle towards tail, 10Ls off them on rails in middle stages, still gave big star on bend, came to outside and steadily made ground to line to be closest at finish.
Not far off on rails to straight. Some 3Ls 4th turning in. Made no show thereafter.
Raced wide in midfield. Dropped out rounding home bend.
Travelled in last few to straight. Ran past beaten horses without quickening.
Midfield with rails run to straight. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Made all. Just held off runner-up's strong late challenge under pressure by the narrowest of margins.
Broke well, settling 3-wide in midfield. Fought on steadily in straight closing on first two final stages without threatening.
Never seen with any chance behind midfield. Ran past well beaten horses closing stages.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Trailed the field to straight and never seen with a chance.
Always well behind. Ran past well beaten horses closing stages. (Mucus.)

Raced wide in prominent positions after beginning from poor draw. Took closer order rounding home bend gaining 2nd into straight. Continued to make ground towards winner only to be denied in the bobbing of heads.
Raced in better than midfield positions to straight. Soon weakened.
Prominent to straight. Folded up quickly shortly after straightening.
Fairly away, taken straight to rails to be 3 back on fence, enjoyed nice run in mid-section, spent nothing to turn, angled wide following winner into straight, tried hard and got close on line.

Steady jump, hard ridden to hold lead into first turn, engaged in speed battle early drawing well clear of others, tried to back off in lead, tackled again and under pressure turning, workload took toll and dropped out.

Broke nicely, hard ridden early, engaged in speed battle into first turn, used plenty but unable to cross, raced at leaders' girth thereafter, under pressure on turning, couldn't find extra after hard run.

Away with line, faded back to near last from outside alley, raced some 15Ls from leaders 2 wide early, began 3 wide run on circle, came 6 wide on turn, challenged strongly and stuck on gamely to make frame.

Broke well, didn't have speed to match them and drifted back to near rear, 12Ls down early, pushed up 3 wide and came 5 wide turning, kept giving to 200 M but didn't offer a sprint to match them thereafter.

Slow to begin and crowded shortly after, raced at tail well off leaders, still 12Ls off leaders at midpoint, last on turn, finished race off strongly between horses, not fully ridden out. (See Racing Incidents.)

Standard to leave gates, assumed usual position towards rear on rails 15Ls away, steadily made ground on circle, in traffic on turn, weaved between horses in straight closing off nicely to be closest at finish.
Began with them, pressed on 3 wide but unable to slot in, raced 3 wide with cover throughout, 4 to 5Ls off them on circle, 5 wide but struggling on turn, lost touch in straight after hard run.

Began well, trapped wide early, slotted in to midfield role, raced 2 wide 6Ls down at midpoint, amongst horses on bend, angled out 4 wide and challenged for lead on straightening, ran out of gas late.

Began with them, pressed on 3 wide to slot into 1 out 1 back spot, well off tearaway leaders early, enjoyed easy trip on circle, angled 3 wide and dashed to lead at 300 M, stuck on well to hold off challengers late.

Began awkwardly and lost ground, positioned in midfield on rails, had even run thereafter, not asked to turn 4 to 5Ls down, in traffic but never really going well enough, only battled away last 200 M when in clear.

Only fair to begin, raced worse than midfield 10Ls away early, 2 wide 8Ls off them at midpoint, tracked evenly on bend, in traffic until 200 M but was one paced when run presented and struggled to line.

Jumped fairly, assumed position on rails worse than midfield, 10Ls away at one point, stuck to rails on bend, under pressure to make ground behind runners in straight, showed no dash and was one paced to line.

Jumped well, showed good speed to go forward to slot in behind leaders, tracked leaders carting field up to them, had nice run to turn, badly held up into straight to 200 M, dashed hard when clear late, unlucky.

Quick to leave gates, worked hard to get across from outside alley, eventually worked to lead at mid-point, kept rolling to turn, headed into straight, fought on and stuck to task well given amount of work in run.

Average to break, ridden up to hold midfield spot on rails 3Ls away, received severe check at 600 M and lost ground, 2-wide and switched out to middle on turning, unable to make an impression in straight.
Average to jump, couldn't go the early pace, soon became detached, 8Ls off leaders at mid-point, last turning in, made run between runners making significant ground late. Trip obviously too short.
Broke with field, unable to keep with them and posted 3-wide in midfield, raced 3Ls away with cover, hampered at 600 M, pressed on with wide run on turn, was one-paced in run home.
Slow to begin, settled down at tail, raced on rail 6Ls off them, well back but travelling well on turn, stuck to rails and closed off nicely before being steadied late. Not ridden out last bit.

Began awkwardly, drifted back to near rear on rails, raced 5Ls away, received check at mid-point, still well back on turn, followed rails in straight, made good ground before being held up at 100 M. Should have been closer.

Began with rest, didn't show enough dash to cross, camped off speed in midfield 2-wide 3Ls away, hampered at 600 M, under pressure in traffic on turn, swung wide into clear in straight but only finished off at same pace.

Jumped with them, lacked usual speed but mustered enough to cross to rails, raced behind leader from mid-point, received check when pace slowed, began to struggle to pick up on turn, lacked extra gear and was one-paced to line.

Broke with them, pressed on to be amongst them 3-wide early, eventually worked across to sit outside the leader, at leaders girth on turn, took control in straight, held them until last 50 M. Solid effort.

Began well, drove through on rails to be behind leader early, checked and shifted back to 3Ls down on fence, travelled well on bit on turn, eased into gap in straight, took time to pick up but closed hard last 100 M to score.
Fast into stride, pushed on to take prominent role 1 out 1 back, raced 2-3Ls away with good run throughout, swung 3-wide to challenge into straight, kept chasing right to line to take 3rd.
Unbalanced early, took time to get going and drifted back to worse than midfield, raced 2 and 3-wide 5Ls away, angled wide on bend, made no impact down outside in straight.
Settled 2nd last on the fence, remained along the paint in the straight to close off well.
Positioned towards the rear of the field. Never likely.
Missed the start badly and settled at the tail of the field. Made some ground in the run home.
Took up the lead in a slowly run early section. Increased tempo mid-race. However its run ended inside the 50 M.
Positioned just behind midfield, shifted out on straightening to be collared close to the line.
Settled 1 out 1 back, struggled inside the 200 M.
Travelled wide without cover in a midfield position. Raced uncompetitive to trail.
Settled slightly worse than midfield, 2-wide with cover. Ran on satisfactorily without threatening.
Tracked the leader on the fence. Took the lead after the 200 M. Run ended over the concluding stages.
Raced outside the leader and commenced to give ground in the straight.
Raced back along the fence, ridden vigorously in the straight, secured a passage through the field and won narrowly.
Midfield along the fence, weakened appreciably near the 200 M.
Eased back to raced towards the rear. Remained near the back on straightening and steadily made up ground in the straight.
