Soon racing in front. Continued to lead field into home straight. Headed final 200 M and stayed on fairly for a minor placing.
2-wide and better than midfield. Kept within 3Ls of the leader back straight. Only managed to stay on same pace in the home straight.
Dropped back and raced at the rear. 4-wide and trailed field turning for home. Unable to make up any ground in the straight.
Settled towards the rear. 3-wide turning for home. Ran on without gaining much ground.
Raced 2-wide near midfield and was 5Ls off the lead at the Rock. Pressured at the 400 M and kept on same pace in the straight.
Settled in a prominent position behind the leader most of the way. Kept on after straightening but steadily faded final 200 M.
Ridden to a forward position early stages. Tagged alongside the leader until home straight. Kept on well and took over the lead for good at 200 M.
Settled on fence at midfield. 3Ls off the lead at 600 M and saved ground making home turn. Closed the race off strongly.
Tame effort having raced within 2Ls of the speed in 3rd through to home straight, found nothing under pressure.
Slowly away, one from rear about 8Ls off the speed until straightening for home, ran on past a few tired rivals late.
Zipped from wide gate to lead early on fence, headed 1100 M out and 2Ls down until 500 M out, dug in well to still be with a winning chance 100 M out, no extra late.
7Ls down in 9th at 1200 M, marginally closer in 10th taking final turn, kept on at same pace.
Fractious in gates and slowly away, 6Ls behind in 8th early on, raced keenly down backstretch, 5Ls down in 9th into home straight, made some decent late ground but did it too late.
3Ls down in 6th at 1200 M, 4Ls down at 800 M, short-lived effort out 3-wide from 500 M to dispute lead at top of homestretch, headed by winner 100 M out, just about hung on for 3rd.
Midfield on fence about 4Ls from the lead through to final turn, kept on at same pace and never seriously threatened a place.
Disappointing effort having been well placed on fence about 3Ls from the speed in 4th until home turn, very one-paced on fence through final stages.
3-wide no cover and worse than midfield throughout, managed to get within 4Ls of the lead taking home turn, soon retreated.
4Ls back in midfield at 1200 M, ridden to get a little closer taking home turn, picked up steadily to lead over 100 M out, stayed on.
Soon detached in last about 10Ls off the pace, never got into the contest.
Caught 3-wide no cover early and pressed on to lead at 1100 M, 2Ls clear from 800 M to 500 M, folded steadily once headed at top of home straight.
Awkwardly away, caught 4-wide no cover until halfway when about 4Ls back in midfield, losing touch when taking home turn, dropped out.
2-wide and about 4Ls off the speed around mid-division until home turn, plugged on at same pace in the finish.
Best away but let LUCKY WINNER lead and settled into a 2Ls trail in 3rd on the fence until home turn, picked up well to lead 100 M out, driven out.
7Ls last at 1000 M on fence, about 6Ls down in 10th turning for home, never dangerous.
Left 3-back on fence about 3Ls off speed in 5th or so until home turn, switched off fence into clear running at 100 M, ran on strongly but post came too soon.
Led by 1L on fence at 1000 M and maintained a similar break until being overhauled by the winner at 100 M, lost out on quinella spot in final strides.
Pressed on from wide gate to race 2-wide and a neck back in 2nd at 800 M, 1L down in 2nd taking final bend, weakened from top of home straight.
Mostly 4-back on fence about 4Ls from the front in 8th or so until bumping rail and becoming unbalanced entering home straight, too one-paced thereafter.
3Ls off pace in 6th at 1000 M, left 3-wide no cover at 600 M, 4Ls down in 6th on straightening, faded out.
Always handily placed around 5th about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace and 2-wide until home turn, failed to quicken up in the home straight.
3-wide with cover in rear bunch about 6Ls off the pace, always ridden along, very wide turning for home and well back, posed no threat.
Messy start, always in rear bunch at least 6Ls off the pace, never got involved.
Settled behind midfield, travelling 3-wide far side and around home bend. Faded before home turn.
Prominent to straight. Weakened under pressure over 200 M out.
Travelled one out one back. Came under pressure turning in. One-paced when slightly hampered closing stages.
Settled on rails in midfield. Improving when bumped over 200 M out. Recovered late under pressure to do best work at finish.
Settled in midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Settled in 4th in forward of midfield. Was making modest headway disputing 2nd when badly tightened by winner closing stages.
Settled towards rear. Went wide into straight. Found nothing under pressure in the run home.
Began awkwardly. Always well behind. Tailed-off into straight.
Attempted to make all. Unable to sustain effort and swamped in final stages.
Settled on rails in rear of midfield. Awkwardly placed behind runners home bend. Shifted out wide for a run turning in. Quickened to take charge about 100 M out.
Settled in rear on rails. Baulked for a run and had to shift out over 200 M out. Finished off race well to be nearest at finish.
Never seen with a chance in last few.
Towards rear. Steadied turning in. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish despite tight between runners close to home.
Midfield to straight. Kept on at the same pace under pressure.
Settled on rails in midfield. Obtained split 200 M out. Showed a great turn of foot to win convincingly.
Settled in rear. Kept on early in straight before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Nearly made all. Caught only in last few strides.
Always thereabouts. Kept on one pace without quickening.
Travelled at the back. Hampered and badly blundered on top of straight. Never recovered.
Soon moved up to settle outside leader after beginning from widest draw. Drew level briefly early in straight. Tired under pressure inside 200 M.
Race wide throughout. Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Raced very wide alone in centre of back straight in midfield. Took closer order coming off Rock. Weakened under pressure approaching home turn.
Prominent to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Pulled up passing winning post the first time. (Fracture to pelvis.)
Slow to begin, unable to find a position and raced 3-wide towards rear, progressed to be 4Ls away wide with cover, hung throughout, under pressure and gave ground in straight to be well beaten.
Fair to begin, gathered speed to take up forward role, posted 3-wide without cover 2Ls away, had hard run working wide, challenged 1L down on turn, stuck on well given workload to not be far away.

Fastest to break, pressed on to assume spot outside leader, travelled comfortably 1L away, put pressure on turning in, engaged in battle with leader through out length of a straight drawing a narrow advantage late.
Showed no speed from break, drifted back towards tail, raced on rails 5Ls away, used nothing in mid-section, followed rails into straight, wound up late coming between horses to snatch pace late.
Began with them, ridden up to hold spot behind leader, had run of race 2Ls away, niggled along on turn, run presented in straight but quickly tired and dropped right out of it late.

Out with them, slotted in nicely behind speed, held prime spot 1 out 1 back 2Ls away in run, relaxed nicely and travelled well to turn, amongst traffic but got clear into straight. Closed off steadily.
Broke with them, mustered speed to take up lead leaving straight, dictated terms in front 1L clear, had good run to turn, kicked strongly under pressure, dug deep only going down narrowly on line.

Standard to break, lacked speed and settled near to last as usual, raced 6-7Ls back on rails overracing in mid-section, still had job to do on turn, angled to outside and made up plenty of ground late.
Average to break, taken straight in behind, raced at rear 1Ls away, lobbed along 2-wide 5Ls off leaders, in behind horses on turn, hit clear running at 150 M and finished off nicely to make frame.
Broke with rest, ridden along to hold midfield position on rails, raced 3-4Ls away with easy run in mid-section, not asked to turn, followed rails in straight finishing soundly without threatening.

Began fairly, dropped in nicely off pace in midfield, raced 2-wide 4Ls off front runners, angled 3-wide on circle, came 4-wide into straight, closed off fairly to be closest at finish. Reasonable debut.
Standard break, assumed position in rearward division, raced 2-wide 6-7Ls off pace, still near last easing 3-wide past Rock, finished off moderately only beating tired runners to line.

Standard break, niggled along to take up forward spot, couldn't get to front and forced to race 3Ls back on rails, in traffic and hanging in straight, had chance to follow winner but couldn't find when clear.
Out with them, lacked early speed and soon faded to midfield, raced 2 wide 4 to 5Ls away, back in pack on turning in, had clear running from 250 M and closed off well without threatening winner.
Average break, ridden up to find closer spot, posted 4 wide without cover in run, always working wide 3Ls away, not far off them on turn, capitulated badly in straight to be well beaten.

Slow to begin, urged along to hold rearward spot, raced on rails 6 to 7Ls off them throughout, still had field in front on turn, made ground in behind horses and didn't get crack until 200 M. Closed steadily thereafter.
Began with line, lacked early dash, drifted back to worse than midfield, raced 3 wide 6Ls off them in middle stages, swung 5 wide into straight, made no impression over the concluding stages.
Swift to hit ground, pressed on to eventually work to front, allowed stride at good clip, 2Ls clear to bend, held advantage to 250 M, couldn't find when the pressure went on and weakened out tamely.

Began well, gathered more speed than usual to cross to rails, raced behind leader with run of race, travelled nicely and angled 2 wide in straight, hit lead passing 200 M putting break on rivals, went on for comfortable win.
Useful beginning, settled with trail just off speed, raced 1 out 1 back in mid section 2Ls away, held up between horses to 200 M, closed nicely when in clear to easily hold second, promising debut.

Broke nicely, went on with job from wide alley, posted 3 and 4 wide just off leaders, always working and was 2Ls down on turning in, couldn't pick up with first few but stuck on nicely to make frame given hard run.

Fast to begin, pressed on to assume role outside leaders, travelled well 1 to 2Ls away, still prominent rounding turn, made run with winner at 200 M but fitness gave out and couldn't match them over concluding stages.

Slow to begin, soon settled towards rear, raced 2 wide 6 to 7Ls off front runners, had wall of horses in front on turn, angled 3 and 4 wide into clear at 350 M, only finished moderately when clear running presented.
Slow to begin, raced at tail from outset, on rails 10Ls from front runners, struggling to keep up on bend, was one paced in straight only passing a tired runner in run to line.

Average jump, attempted to take closer order, finished up 3 wide 4Ls away in midfield, always wide with trail to turn, tracked nicely at 400 M, was one paced when let down and finished off at same speed.

Fair to leave gates, urged along to assume position 4 to 5Ls down on rails off midfield, followed rails into straight, made up some ground before steadied when ran closed at 200 M, offered nothing thereafter.
Ridden along early to take up a forward spot. Settled in 4th position 1 off with cover, didn't go on with it.
Raced to leaders outside, over-raced after 400 M, gave ground over the concluding stages. (Blood in trachea.)
Travelled wide without cover in a forward position, didn't finish off in straight.
Last throughout.
Positioned on the fence in midfield. Finished the race off soundly.
Settled 2nd last along the rails, made good ground taking inside runs in the run home.
Raced slightly worse than midfield on the fence, worked home well.
Just behind midfield, one off with cover. Shifted out wide turning for home, ran on strongly, caught on the winning post.
Proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Travelled 3 wide with cover. Shifted out in the straight and ran on well.
Settled midfield, two wide with cover, took the lead near the 400 M, stuck to task gamely.
Raced more forward than previous starts, tracked the leader on the rails, weakened inside the 100 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced in midfield along the fence, shifted out soon after straightening however was disappointed for running, switched in, found run through the field, picked up well to score narrow win.
Raced at the rear of the field 2 deep, worked home nicely out wide.
Led from inside draw but was a spent force entering the straight.
Niggled along around midfield. Made a brief dash at 400 M but unable to sustain effort in the final stages.
Led or disputed lead until final 200 M. Kept on fairly over the final stages and hung on for a minor placing.
Jumped awkwardly and raced at midfield. 2Ls off the leader at 400 M continued fairly over the concluding stages.
Travelled in a rearward position. Remained at same pace final stages and only ran past tired runners.
Raced in a rearward position. Only ran past tired runners in the final stages.
Ridden along and kept within a length of the leaders. Lacked the needed response to keep up after 400 M. Ran on same pace to the finish.
Raced towards midfield. Caught in an awkward position for some distance after the 600 M. Crept to within 2Ls of the leader at 400 M and closed the race off well.
Jumped well and raced among leaders. Disputed lead at halfway mark. Failed to keep pace final 400 M and weakened out late.
Off slowly and raced towards the rear. Lacked a response when asked and finished tailed out.
Kept within a length of the leader. Responded well when asked inside final 300 M and drew clear in the final stages.
Pushed along and took the early lead. Remained among leaders at 400 M but faded steadily thereafter.
Raced all by itself towards the inner rails in a rearward position. Unable to quicken final stages.
Among leaders early. A length off the pace at halfway point and then faded steadily thereafter.
Off slowly and raced behind midfield. Unable to quicken at 400 M and only remained on same pace.
Disputed early tempo on fence at 1600 M, 1L in the clear at 800 M, headed by winner 350 M out and soon faded out tamely.
Slow away but quickly recovered to race 3Ls off pace in 4th at 1400 M, similarly placed turning for home, lacked the gears to tackle the winner and grabbed for 2nd close home.
Always in rear trio and never much better than 6Ls off the speed at any stage, disappointing effort after a promising finish over a sprint trip four days earlier. (Blood in trachea.)
Wide early but eased in decent position at 1400 M when 3Ls back in 5th and 2-wide, hard pressed to maintain this proximity turning for home, weakened sharply inside final 200 M.
Settled 6Ls off pace in midfield with cover at 1400 M, similar position taking home turn when steadied out into clear running, finished off only evenly.
Yet another weak effort, well placed when 5Ls back in 6th at 1400 M, similarly placed but hanging in taking home turn, found zero off the bridle and eased close home.
4-back on fence 5Ls off pace in midfield at 1400 M, 4Ls down in 7th taking final turn, no chance with winner but stayed on well to take 2nd in final strides.
Always 3-wide no cover from the 1400 M, 7Ls back in 9th at 1200 M, under pressure at 600 M, 6Ls down in 9th turning for home, retreated.
Slowest away, 7Ls down on fence in 10th at 1300 M, marginally closer but still in 10th or so entering home straight, retrieved some minor late ground but never likely to place.
Nicely placed throughout, 2Ls from lead in 3rd at 1600 M, pressed on from top of home straight to lead 350 M out, soon kicked clear to settle the issue.
Switched from widest gate to race in last on fence 10Ls off pace until the 800 M, wide and 8Ls last on straightening for home, flattered by running on past half the field.
Sent on to dispute the lead out 2-wide at 1600 M, 1L down in 2nd at 800 M, niggled along under pressure at 600 M, 2Ls down in 3rd and struggling at top of home straight, folded.
Quietly handled in rear bunch about 9Ls off pace until the 800 M, tight for room when 7Ls down in rear turning for home, kept on at same pace once clear.
Mostly 3-wide with cover but worse than midfield and about 7Ls off the speed until home turn, very weak thereafter.
Switched from widest gate to fence about 8Ls off pace at 1000 M, still well back about 5Ls down turning for home, improving when checked 200 M out, ran on again late, never nearer.
Settled worse than midfield about 5Ls from the speed and with cover until the 800 M, 4Ls down in midfield at home turn, kept on finding only to lead in final strides.
Travelled well throughout and didn't hang this time from his inside gate, over 1L down in 2nd at 800 M, picked up nicely to lead 250 M out, grabbed in final strides by the winner.
2-wide and racing prominently 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1000 M, hard pressed to maintain this position taking home turn, quickly faded.
Travelled well 3-back on fence about 3Ls off pace in 4th or so at 800 M, closer turning for home, 1L down and every chance in 3rd 150 M out, lost out on a place late, much improved.
Did lots of things wrong, raced too freely when 3-wide no cover when 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1000 M, headed up at 800 M when still wide, entitled to fade inside final 200 M.
3-wide with cover when 4Ls down in 6th at 800 M, a little closer but 4-wide turning for home, ran at same pace down the centre of the track. (Lame next day.)
4-back on fence in midfield at halfway about 4Ls off speed, 3Ls back in 5th taking home turn, short of room at 200 M and again at 100 M so did well to get up for 3rd.
Switched from wide gate to be 2-wide in rear early on and about 7Ls off pace, 6Ls back in 13th at final turn, ran on without any menace down the centre of the track.
Slowest away, on fence about 5Ls back in 10th at 1000 M, in same position taking home turn, squeezed for room on fence at 200 M and eased late.
5Ls back in midfield at 1000 M, over 3Ls down in 6th at home turn when hard ridden to keep up, one-paced thereafter.
Didn't break well, recovered to lead by 2Ls at 1000 M, 1L to the good turning for home, headed 250 M out and swamped late.
3-wide with cover in 9th place and 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, much the same position turning for home, plugged on and never threatened to place.
Fractious in gates, 10Ls last at 800 M, widest in rear turning for home, never on terms.
Settled 3-wide towards rear. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled 2-wide within 2Ls of pace mainly in 4th. Came to challenge upon straightening gaining 1.5Ls advantage passing 200 M only to be pipped at post.
Raced 3-wide in forward of midfield in 5th. In similar position into straight but gradually faded out.
Chased leader to straight. Found no extra to sustain effort over 200 M out.
In rear of midfield when tightened and lost position coming out of back straight. In last few turning for home. Made up ground late. Never nearer.
Towards rear on rails. Gained midfield position into straight. Just kept on steadily down inner without quickening.

Broke well. Close up on rails early. Shuffled back to midfield coming out of back straight. Took closer order turning in and shifted out for a clear run early in straight. Fought on dourly to just get up on line.
Settled in prominent 3rd mainly one back on the rails. Shaken up upon straightening but unable to quicken under pressure and overhauled inside final 200 M.
Soon took up running and led until overhauled over 200 M out.
Travelled in midfield. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in rear on rails. Switched off rails for a run upon straightening but could only finish his race off well late.
Behind midfield to straight. Dropped out noticeably after straightening. (Irregular heart beat.)
Held up in rear. Raced wide into straight. Ran home one-paced.
Always well behind and never seen with a chance.
Settled in last few. Ran home one-paced.
Settled behind midfield. Kept on one-pace without quickening in straight.
Waited with. Ran home well down centre of straight to do best work at finish.
Raced in 4th 3-wide within 2Ls of pace far side. Took closer order rounding home bend, disputing lead into straight, however, quickly dropped out after straightening.
Settled just outside leader. Gradually dropped out after straightening.
Travelled 2-wide in 5th and never far off. Quickened well upon straightening to take command inside 200 M.
Settled just off the pace on rails. Came under pressure to tackle leaders upon straightening but could only produce modest headway without threatening.
Ridden to lead from widest draw. Made running to 200 M. Plugged on for 2nd.
Raced mostly 3-wide in midfield. Made moderate progress in straight without threatening.
Settled wide in last few. Made up good ground inside final 250 M to do best work at finish.
Settled on rails in midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.

Jumped well, unable to show enough dash to cross, faded back to midfield, slotted in 2 wide 6Ls off them, had nice trip thereafter, made run at 300 M but couldn't go up a notch making average headway to line.

Fastest into stride, showed plenty of dash to take up running and speed 3Ls clear, kept fast pace on, still rolling on turn on 2Ls clear into straight, run ended at 100 M but solid effort given speed set.

Standard beginning, took up usual role at rear, race on rails 12 to 14Ls away appreciating fast pace, still last behind horses to turn, angled into gap 8Ls back at 300 M, flew late making up many lengths last furlong.

Began with rest, didn't have early pace to match them, raced 2 wide 8Ls down in midfield, enjoyed fast pace in front, angled 3 wide on turn, steadily closed making good ground late to be closest at finish.
Standard beginning, bustled to hold midfield role, raced 5Ls down 2 wide throughout, steadily closed on turn, made run with winner, lacked turn of foot but kept to task well to make frame.
Well enough to begin, settled on rails 5Ls away, didn't settle and over-raced in mid-section, niggled along on turn, followed rails in straight, closed steadily but lacked turn of foot to threaten.

Broke well, strode forward to take trail behind leader, raced 2Ls away on rails with solid clip, tracked well bringing field along to turn, under pressure on straightening. Weakened out badly in straight. (Bled.)

A little slower out than usual hence didn't assume lead, raced 2 wide first without cover throughout, 4Ls down carting field up to turn, chased strongly from 300 M, passed leader at 100 M and went on to score comfortable victory.

Lacked speed from barriers, allowed to take up midfield position on rails, 7 to 8Ls away in run, spent little to turn, followed paint in straight, didn't find usual sprint last 200 M and closed only at same pace.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, raced just off midfield in 3 wide position, always working without cover, progressed to be 7Ls down on turn, gave up at 250 M and only plodded to line.
Average beginning, outpaced early and positioned towards rear, raced 2 wide 9Ls off them, travelled fairly to turn, came between horses in straight making some ground to be closest at finish.

Standard break, assumed usual position towards rear, raced on rails 9 to 10Ls from them, moved 2 wide from mid-point, pushed along on turning, flat out making ground, closed steadily late without looking likely.
Trailed the field to straight. Produced good impression inside final 300 M.
Settled on rails in forward of midfield. Baulked for a run early in straight. Quickened well on rails to hit front about 100 M out and just staved off runner-up's late challenge.
Raced wide towards rear. Kept on steadily down centre of straight without quickening.
Soon took up running and held narrow lead to 100 M, then soon overhauled.
Raced in forward of midfield to straight. Gradually weakened.
Prominent to straight. Kept on under pressure before swamped close to home.
Raced wide in close-up position. Some 1L 3rd turning in. Gradually dropped out.
Did not jump well. Travelled in rear of midfield to straight. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Jumped well and in front briefly. Gradually settled to 4th on rails within 2Ls of pace. In similar position turning in and kept on same pace to the line.
Settled in rear. Shifted off rails upon straightening and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Settled on rails in midfield. Ran on well in straight to just fail to get up on line.
Always well there until finding no extra inside final 100 M.
Settled in last few. Finished off race strongly inside final 300 M down centre of straight.
Raced wide in midfield. Finished off well to just miss 3rd place.

Bounced with them, restrained to be ridden quietly, raced in last trio throughout 2 wide 6Ls off them, travelled well on bend, still last to 300 M, closed race off doing best work to be nearest at finish. (Rider questioned.)

Standard break, raced in usual position at tail, lobbed along at rear 7Ls away from leaders, still rearward angling 5 wide on turn, made some ground to 200 M but didn't go on with job and one paced in finish.

Began nicely, didn't have speed to slot in, posted 3 wide in midfield 3 to 4Ls away, forced 4 wide at mid-point, kept creeping closer to challenge strongly at 200 M, found well under pressure to overhaul them late for big win.

Average to begin, ridden hard to muster speed, finished up with nice trail behind leader, had run of race with moderate speed, tracked nicely to turn, gained split at 300 M, finished race off strongly fighting out finish last furlong.

Jumped nicely, showed customary speed to press on from wide alley, eventually crossed to race outside leader, challenged leader throughout (pace only average), still there on turning, didn't respond and weakened right out last 300 M.

Amongst first few to begin, pressed forward from awkward alley, crossed to race outside leader and assumed 1 out 1 back at midpoint, travelled strongly on turn, challenged at 250 M and in mix until fitness gave out late.

Standard break, drifted back as expected to race in rearward division, raced 3 wide 4 to 5Ls away, had trail behind eventual winner on turn, under pressure to push up, closed off evenly picking up some late ground.

Slow to begin, settled at tail soon after start, held position on rails 6 to 7Ls away, didn't spend anything thereafter, well back on turn, held up early in straight, only got going last 200 M and closed off well.
OK to jump, drifted back to midfield, posted 3 wide 4Ls away with cover in middle stages, back in pack on circle, had chance to make ground but struggling at 250 M, finished off at same pace to line.

Began with them, didn't have early toe and raced in midfield on rails 4Ls away, had cosy run in mid-section, spent nothing to turn, held up until 200 M, finished off evenly on their heels without really seeing daylight.
Fastest to hit ground, eventually took up running, dictated terms in front, set slow speed to turn, held slim advantage into straight, kicked strongly and kept them out until last 100 M.
Broke fairly, soon mustered speed to be amongst them early, shuffled back to be 3Ls down in 2 wide spot, enjoyed good trip to turn. Couldn't find when they sprinted and closed off only moderately.

Only moderate to begin, drove up to take closer order, settled 3 wide without cover 3Ls away in front of midfield, travelled well despite wide run to turn, sprinted with winner and kept giving to make frame.

Jumped in line, took up midfield position early, raced 2 wide 4Ls down in mid-section, back in traffic on turning in, went back to rails in straight, stuck to task but lacked extra gear to be a factor.

Shade slower to break than usual, pressed on wide to race outside leader, applied pressure throughout heading leader, still there under pressure into straight, soon gave in and weakened right out of it.

Broke with line, slotted nicely into 1 out 1 back spot, enjoyed run of race 2Ls away with cover, tracked well to turn, angled into clear on straightening, steadily closed over the top of them last 100 M to score narrowly.

Bumped early, didn't possess early pace, raced 3-back on rails 4Ls away, not asked thereafter, still midfield on turn, in traffic for most of straight bumping at 250 M. Kept steadily closing to make frame late.
Slow to begin, assumed rearward role, raced on rails 6Ls off pace, had fair run in mid-section, still well back on turn, stuck to rails in straight, made up some ground but was never really a factor.

Jumped with rest, settled off speed in midfield 4Ls from them, raced 2-wide between horses throughout, back in pack on turn, lacked turn of foot but steadily finished off when in clear to be nearest at finish.

Began nicely, took up trail behind leader, had easy time thereafter using nothing to turn, stoked up into straight, run closed at 250 M but got into clear at 150 M, made good ground late despite hanging.
Broke nicely, pressured on from widest alley, trapped 4-wide outside leaders, always doing a power of work, under pressure 1L down on bend, couldn't sustain run and dropped well back in straight.

Fair to leave stalls, settled near to last 2-wide 6Ls away, always struggling and had field to beat on turn, began to make some ground but hanging in made it difficult and was checked. Never really looked likely.
Began evenly, didn't have early toe and drifted back to worse than midfield, posted 3-wide with cover 4Ls away, circled 5-wide on bend, began to close nicely down outside but only plugged last 200 M.
Broke reasonably, up amongst them early, couldn't slot in and posted 3-wide 3Ls away with cover, still midfield on bend, came 4-wide into straight couldn't offer a sprint and plugged to line.

Out with rest, showed good dash to take up running, challenged in lead throughout, no real speed on to bend, just held advantage kicking back on turning, fought strongly for length of straight only to be denied in the shadows.

Average break, pressed forward from wide alley to take closer order, raced 3-wide outside the leaders without cover, challenged on turn and threatened until 100 M but fitness gave out after working hard. (Checked late.)
Ran on well although hanging in over the last 200 M, after being well back along the fence.
Settled just off midfield, 2-wide with cover, had every chance.
Behind midfield, 3-wide no cover for the major paint of the race, never threatened.
Raced along the fence, near the tail of the field, never made ground in the run home.
Led from outside draw, set solid pace in front. Hung on well.
Raced near the back of the field, wide and without cover for the entire trip.
Raced off the speed, 2-wide with cover. Ran on nicely.
Settled near last, 1 off, made the home turn awkwardly. Raced greenly over the last 500 M.
Quickly away and tracked the leader until turning for home. Drew away in the straight to score well.
Parked on the fence in a handy position, one-paced in the straight.
Sat just off the leader, 2-wide, struggled turning for home.
Began awkwardly and settled slightly worse than midfield along the fence. Struck interference on the home turn but was disappointing.
Shifted in gradually early stages and found a position to race on fence at midfield. Ran on same pace in the straight.
Jumped well and was 2-wide in a disputed lead. 2-wide and kept alongside leader back straight. Unable to keep pace after straightening and faded out of contention.
Missed the jump and raced at the rear. Trailed field into home straight. Rallied late but was held behind traffic over the final 100 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Raced along the rails behind midfield. Pushed along to keep pace making the turn. Closed the race off fairly.
Disputed lead before settling 2-wide behind the frontrunners 3Ls off the pace in 4th making the home turn. Kept on steadily in the straight.
Settled in a rearward position. Steadied and switched out on straightening and made up some ground in the straight.
Settled in a prominent position behind the pace until home straight. Kept on well over the concluding stages and just failed to run down the winner.
Wide and without cover behind midfield early stages. Niggled along and improved to be 2-wide at midfield after 1200 M. Failed to quicken in the straight.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Rallied in the straight and was closest at finish.
Failed to show early speed from widest draw and raced in a rearward position. 3-wide without cover back straight and remained wide turning for home. Made no impression in the straight.
Niggled along out of the gates and led. Took a length's advantage into home straight and kept on gamely over the final stages to deny rival.
Tended to hang in when 2-wide and 1L back in 3rd at 1000 M, over 2Ls back in 5th taking home turn, gave chase to winner but never looked like getting past.
Settled in 8th place 5Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover at 1000 M, midfield and 4-wide on straightening, place hopes at 200 M but flattened out late. (Bled.)
3-wide at 1200 M in 2nd, sent on to race 2-wide a neck off pace down the back and niggled turning for home and weakened rapidly.
Slowest away, soon 7Ls back in rear, still 6Ls last turning in, staying on when badly checked 150 M out, didn't recover.
Slow start, 6Ls back in 9th at 1000 M, marginally closer turning into stretch, chopped out on fence at 100 M and not fully tested.
Very wide at 1400 M, slipped back to 10th at 1000 M when 2-wide and 7Ls off pace, still towards rear when 4-wide and 4Ls from the lead, ran on well down centre of track, never nearer.
3Ls back in 6th with cover at 1200 M, 8th and similar margin from the lead turning for home, ran on at same pace.
Led by about a neck on fence from 1200 M to homestretch, headed over 200 M out and folded meekly.
4-wide no cover early, 3-wide with cover at 1100 M when 3Ls back in 5th at 1000 M, left without cover again down backstretch, still just 1L down in 5th at 200 M but weakened late.
One from rear and 8Ls behind pace at 1000 M, unbalanced at 600 M, 5Ls back in 11th taking final turn, hung in under pressure in stretch but still finished well out wide.
Ideally placed in box-seat on fence 2Ls from lead on fence through to home straight, quickened up on inside to lead over 200 M out, driven out.
4Ls back in 7th on fence at 1100 M, 3Ls down in midfield turning for home, hung in under pressure at 200 M, did just enough for 3rd place.
Soon led on fence by 1L, tested down the back straight and went a little too quickly, lost position and under pressure from the 500 M, faded out.
Always worse than midfield, 8Ls back and one from rear early, 5Ls down in 10th taking home turn out 4-deep, never troubled leaders.
Very poor effort, caught wide early but soon 2-wide and 4Ls back in 4th at 1100 M, struggling from 600 M, dropped out in home straight.
6Ls back in 8th on fence at 1100 M, over 4Ls down in 9th or so taking home turn, ran on well in stretch despite hanging out, would have won in another few strides.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1100 M, a neck down in 2nd at 800 M and went a shade too quickly to lead by 1L at final bend, stayed on at same pace to line.
Caught 3-wide no cover when 5Ls back in 7th at 1100 M, sent on 4-wide no cover at 700 M to be 1L down in 3rd entering straight, dropped out very quickly.
No early pace, soon 10Ls last on fence, 8Ls in 11th taking home turn, ran on past two weary rivals late.
Failed to muster early pace, 4Ls back in 5th at 1100 M, 3Ls down in 6th entering home straight, ran on without troubling principals.
Enjoyed the run of the race on fence 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 3rd through to home turn, led 250 M out, hard ridden and all out to hang on.
5Ls back in midfield with cover at 1200 M, head up at 800 M and sent on 3-wide no cover to be 2Ls back in 4th turning for home, kept on fairly well but lost out on 2nd close home.
8Ls back in 10th at 1100 M, 6Ls back in 11th taking home turn, ran on well late, nearest at finish.
Didn't break well, 6Ls back in 9th at 1200 M, pushed 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home when 4Ls off pace, stayed on well to line out wide.
Prominent to straight. Gradually faded under pressure.
Settled on rails mainly in rear of midfield. Came to challenge upon straightening and responded well to hit front over 100 M out. Won convincingly.
Raced wide in midfield. Widest runner turning in. Made up some ground down centre of straight.
Travelled in last few. Snuck up to rear of midfield on rails turning in. Kept on steadily before coming one-paced passing 200 M.
Broke well to lead, holding slender advantage before narrowly headed going up Rock. Regained lead rounding home bend. Unable to sustain effort when swamped over 100 M out.
Settled just off the pace behind leader. Kept on early in straight before finding no extra in the run home.
Began slightly slowly. Trailed field early, then travelled in last few to straight. Ran on dourly under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Travelled mainly 2-wide in 5th or 6th. Switched wider turning in. Only kept on steadily at the one pace under pressure in the run home.
Travelled mainly in last few. Similar into straight and ran on quite well to be nearest at finish.
Not far off on rails in 2L 5th. Remained same but baulked for a run early in straight. Finished off race well under hard driving inside final 200 M to snatch 2nd close to home.
Raced 2-wide in midfield or just worse than that. Went wide turning in. Made no impression in straight.
Disputed lead until finding no extra turning for home.
Settled just worse than midfield. Took closer order turning in. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Towards rear, making some late progress in closing stages. Never nearer.
Always in last few. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Raced wide behind midfield. Gave ground gradually from coming off Rock.
Midfield throughout. Kept on well in straight.
Settled on rails in 5th in midfield. Moved closer turning in. Fought on steadily without quickening.
Led to straight. Gradually weakened.
Raced mainly in 3rd on rails within 2Ls of pace. Fought on steadily under pressure closing on leader late nearing finish but the post came too soon.
Broke well and travelled well there. Raced in 2nd one out one back far side. Came to challenge turning in and took lead from tiring leader upon straightening. Just held on to the home.
Well there early. Dropped to 4th some 2.5Ls back after Rock. Fought on steadily under pressure but unlikely to catch winner.

Average to begin, ridden up to take closer order, posted 3 and 4 wide without cover throughout, always working and closed to be 2Ls down on circle, under pressure on turning, weakened right out after hard run.

Began well, pressed on to hold prime position 1 out 1 back early, finished up 2-3Ls back 2-wide by mid-point, ideal run presented on turning, couldn't find an extra gear in straight and was one-paced to line.

Began in line, showed good dash to press on and challenge for lead, did some work before taking over at mid-point, raced 1L clear on circle, challenged on turning in, kicked strongly until 100 M but run ended late.

Awkwardly away, rider unbalanced and lost considerable ground, raced at tail 6Ls from leaders, still last on rails turning in pushed along to make ground, finished off between horses until steadied late. Best work last 100 M.
Away in line, soon faded back from wide alley, raced 5Ls away near to last, had even run 2-wide throughout, eased wide on turn, made up good ground down outside from impossible spot on turn.

Slow into stride and lost 4Ls, taken to rails settling near rear, raced 5Ls from them not using anything to turn, had field to beat at top of straight, made solid ground between horses to be nearest on line. (Rider questioned.)

Jumped fairly from middle of line, pushed along to hold midfield position, raced 2-wide 4Ls away, checked at 800 M, back in traffic on turn, closed off nicely from 200 M when clear running presented to snatch 3rd.

Amongst first few to jump, held prominent spot behind early leader, shuffled back to be 3Ls down on rails by mid-point (didn't settle), had easy time to turn, awkwardly placed into straight, switched to inside and finished off well.

Restrained from wide alley, proved difficult to settle, posted 3-wide 4Ls away with cover, checked and didn't handle bend at 500 M, 3Ls down on turning, swung wide and closed off well to be closest on line. Found too much trouble.

Bounced out of gates, held early lead on rails, pressured and eventually handed up by mid-point, enjoyed easy trip behind leader thereafter, run presented at top of straight, couldn't find and gradually dropped out.

Broke with rest, unable to cross, keep this and posted 3-wide without cover, worked to spot outside leader 1L away, applied pressure on turn, fought battle with leader for most of straight. Asserted authority late to score easily.

Standard break, lacked early pace, raced 4Ls away just off midfield on rails, had easy time not spending much to turn, inconvenienced turning in, stuck to rails and finished race off steadily without threatening.

Jumped with line, drifted back from wide alley, raced 3 wide 5 to 6Ls from them with cover, urged along to be 4Ls down on turning, steadily closed when in clear, run ended at 200 M and plugged to line.
Even break, showed no speed, drifted back to near tail, raced 6Ls away 2 wide, hard pressed to keep touch on turning in, found nothing in straight and plodded to line.

Jumped with line, unable to slot in early, received bad check on first bend, posted 4 wide without cover thereafter 5Ls away, came wide on turning, closed race off nicely down centre of track to be closest at finish.

Standard break, hard ridden to hold midfield position, drove up to be 3Ls away on rails, stalked leaders on turn, angled out nicely with run, charged home late only be nosed out on line. Improved effort.
Average break, lacked early speed, settled at rear on rails, raced 6 to 7Ls away throughout, still last on turn, stuck to rails in stretch, made solid ground between runners late to make frame.

First to hit ground, unable to cross but obtained run of race in 1 out 1 back spot, tracked nicely 1L away to turn, made run entering straight, took a while to hit lead and had to fight right to line to hold on.
Bounced out fairly, pressed on in search of front, worked to take up lead, pressured throughout, shaded on turning in, stuck on until 200 M, fitness gave out and weakened quickly last furlong.

Slow to begin, settled in rearward division on rails, 5Ls down throughout, didn't use a lot to turn, kept to rails in straight, unable to find another gear when asked and finished at same pace to line.

Began with rest, hard ridden early, eventually worked across to race outside leader, applied pressure on the circle, headed up entering straight, fought out battle with winner until 100 M, just outpaced last bit.

Began awkwardly and steadied early, settled in midfield, shifted out badly passing the 1000 M point, 3 wide without cover then on, circled wide into straight, couldn't sustain effort and dropped out in straight. Very green.
Broke well enough, shuffled back to rearward division, raced 2 wide 5Ls, under pressure on turn, couldn't find an extra gear when they sprinted, only passed a few tired runners late.

Began nicely, urged along to hold prominent spot, had dream trail behind leader 1L away, tracked nicely on turn, badly held up until 200 M, kept with them last furlong but never really had a clear crack.
Parked outside the leader, had every chance, disappointing the run home.
Tracked the leader, faded in the last 300 M.
Slow to begin and settled 1 off near the rear. Came wide on straightening and worked to the line well.
Bounded in the air at the start and lost ground then tailed out. Unacceptable performance, to trial.
Took up handy spot on the fence, struggled in the straight.
Travelled midfield 3 deep, no cover after the 800 M. Checked at the 300 M.
Just behind midfield along the fence, angled out in the straight, after being held up, closed off nicely.
Travelled along the rails in 2nd last spot, never likely.
In the early stages, travelled wide and without cover. Got to 1 off mid race but found little in the straight.
Raced handy, 1 off with cover, made up fair ground in the straight.
Settled midfield, 2 deep with cover, worked home late.
Pressed forward early, took up leading position and was never headed to score easily.
Travelled wide without cover after the 800 M, slightly worse than midfield. Made good ground in the straight out wide, whilst hanging in.
Began well but was allowed to slide to midfield. Travelled keenly until home turn. Ran on well in the straight for a minor placing.
Hard pressed from a wide draw into a forward position. Raced 2-wide and a length off the lead until straightening. Only kept same pace in the final stages.
Botched the start and soon trailed field. Remained towards the rear on straightening. Only ran past a tired runner.
Raced 3-wide among last few until straightening. Quickened and closed the race off well.
Settled towards the rear and trailed field into home straight. Remained at one pace in the straight and made up ground by running past tired runners.
Wide without cover behind midfield. Closed the race off with a nice rally.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Made a strong rally and kept on gamely final stages to deny rival.
Soon led. Took a length's advantage into home straight and opened up a clear advantage final 300 M. Kept on fairly over the final stages but unable to turn up a notch to hold off rivals.
Settled behind the leader in 3rd until home straight. Lacked a response and steadily weakened.
Raced along the rails behind midfield. Quickened nicely when asked at 300 M. Came up just short in a duel with winner over the final stages.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Made up some ground at the turn and was within 2Ls of the leader turning for home. Failed to quicken and gradually dropped out.
Mostly midfield with cover about 4Ls off pace through to home straight, ran on fairly well late for a place but never nearer.
Slowly away, 4-back on fence from the 1000 M and 5Ls from the lead in 8th or so, edged a little closer into final bend, didn't trouble leaders any further.
Caught wide in midfield early, led on fence 1000 M out, head up at 800 M, 1L clear heading into homestretch, looked vulnerable 250 M out but soon forged clear again.
Soon led or disputing pace on fence, headed at 1000 M and tracked by winner by about 1L until home straight, had every chance 250 M out but one-paced and lost out on 2nd late.
Dropped out 8Ls last at 1200 M, in 13th taking final turn, briefly without clear running at 300 M, ran on quite well down centre of track, never nearer.
Settled in rear bunch on fence and no closer than 6Ls to the pace until home straight, made some moderate late ground on fence.
2-wide around mid-division and 3Ls from the front until the 1000 M, lost position on the circle and faded out in home straight.
Awkwardly away, towards rear about 6Ls behind at 1000 M, similarly placed at home turn, short of room at 200 M and went inside, stayed on, nearest at finish.
Disputed early pace, about 2Ls back in 2nd at 800 M, struggling to lie up on circle and gone at top of homestretch, poor effort.
3-wide with cover and worse than midfield about 5Ls from the front until the 600 M, 4-wide on straightening, had every chance to place but kept on at same tempo.
Never better than midfield and always a good 5Ls or 6Ls from the pace, posed little danger in homestretch.
Better than midfield 3-back on fence about 3Ls from speed at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 3rd taking home turn, ran on only fairly and just missed a place.
Mostly caught 3-wide without cover, disputing lead at 1200 M, wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th at 800 M, struggling to maintain this proximity at final turn, dropped away.
Always in rear at least 7Ls off pace, never a factor. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
3-wide with cover in midfield about 4Ls behind at halfway, closer on straightening and led over 200 M out, collared by winner at 50 M, no extra.
Bounded at start, raced 2 and 3-wide but always had cover in midfield or better, 2Ls down in 4th taking home turn, faded out.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls from the pace at 1000 M, 3Ls back and 4-wide taking home turn, place prospects when 1L down at 200 M but failed to follow through.
Always in rear, 9Ls last 1000 M, 5Ls last entering homestretch, never competitive.
Coldly ridden 7Ls off pace in 13th early, improved on circle but turned for home 5-wide (widest of all), picked up nicely to lead 50 M out, ran on.
Broke best and pressed on out wide to lead on fence at 800 M, headed at the 200 M and weakened to miss a place.
4-back on fence in midfield about 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, ridden to take closer order on straightening, always comfortably held.
Went forward early, 2-wide and 1L down in 2nd at 900 M, 2Ls down in 4th entering home straight, dropped right out.
Nicely placed 3-back on fence at 1000 M over 2Ls off pace, niggled along to keep up on circle, folded tamely from top of home straight.
Slow to start but soon recovered to be 2Ls off pace in the box-seat position, 1L down in 3rd turning for home, faded steadily.
Awkward break, with cover and 5Ls off pace at halfway, 4Ls down turning for home, one-paced and always booked for a mid-division finish.
Settled on fence towards rear about 6Ls behind early speed, 4Ls off pace and 3-wide entering home straight, tended to hang in under pressure and lacked the kick of principals.
Travelled well 2-wide and 3Ls off pace at 1000 M in 6th or so, 2Ls down in 5th off final bend, had every chance but failed to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Prominent early and caught 3-wide no-cover when 2Ls back in 4th at 800 M, pressed forward to be 1L back in 2nd entering homestretch, soon petered out.
Made good late ground after settling a long way back at the tail. Had difficulty obtaining clear running in the straight.
Parked outside the leader, never went on with the task.
Led, however was overhauled near the 400 M, faded noticeably in the run to the line.
Raced 3rd last on the fence, made some late headway over the concluding stages.
Settled midfield, shifted 3 deep no cover, after the 800 M, weakened considerably in the straight.
Struck interference early and settled behind midfield. 1 off worked home one-paced.
Settled midfield, 1 off with cover, improved turning for home to gather in the leaders, stretched out in the straight to score decisive victory.
Slow to begin, crossed to be midfield from a wide gate, on the fence. Stayed on dourly in the straight.
Settled with the tailenders, came wide in the straight and finished off well.
Couldn't muster early pace, positioned 2 wide slightly worse than midfield, never a factor.
Raced 1 off not far from the pace, struggled in the straight.
Settled behind the leading division, beaten horse turning for home.
Didn't enjoy the best of trips, carried wide near the 800 M. Whilst in a midfield spot. Vet exam revealed thumps compounded in the straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfeild far side. Lost position coming out of back straight. Produced moderate impression under pressure in the run home.
Travelled in behind midfield. Produced moderate late headway down centre inside final 200 M.
Tracked leader. Came to challenge upon straightening and hit front 200 M out. Hung on well under pressure to the line.
Trailed the field to straight. Produced good late finish inside final 200 M.
Midfield to straight. Gradually faded.
Settled in 3rd on rails some 3Ls off the pace. Came to tackle leader upon straightening and fought on steadily without threatening.
Gradually took up running and crossed to rails from wide draw and led until finding no extra passing 200 M.
Settled at the back. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in last few towards the rear. Made up good ground down inside to be nearest at finish.
3-wide in prominent position early. Gave ground rounding home bend.
Travelled mainly in forward of midfield. Kept on steadily at the same pace in straight without quickening.
Raced wide in behind midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Travelled wide in last few. Made no impression in straight.
Settled on rails in forward of midfield. Disputed remote 4th turning in. Weakened shortly after straightening.

Began only fairly, assumed expected role near to last, raced 7Ls away 2 wide, began to circle 3 wide with trail from midpoint, angled 5 wide on turning in, closed race off steadily without threatening winner.
OK to begin, up amongst them early, had run of race in 1 out 1 back slot 2 to 3Ls away, eased out 3 wide on turn, there until 300 M, weakened noticably and dropped right out late.

Fastest into stride, hard ridden to challenge for front, posted 3 wide before crossing outside leader, raced at leaders' girth, applied pressure on turning in and lead them to 250 M, run ended and battled to line. (Dropped whip.)

Average to leave gates, hard ridden to hold midfield position, steadily drove through to be only 3Ls back on rails at midpoint, tracked well to turn, didn't have clear run to 300 M, closed off nicely when clear.
Awkward to begin, soon re-gathered to challenge for early lead, eventually worked to lead passing 1000 M, didn't have much peace in front, under siege on turning, weakened out last 100 M.

Began nicely, proved difficult to settle early, pulled way forward to lead, raced behind leader from 1000 M, enjoyed nice run to turn, obtained dream split to challenge at 250 M, outsprinted last furlong but did well to make frame.
Began with rest, pressed on to take closer order, posted 3 wide without cover 3Ls away, always working in mid-section, not far away, 4 wide on turning, hard run took its toll and weakened out.

Average to leave gates, unable to slot in and posted 3 wide just off midfield, had long run despite having cover 4 to 5Ls away, 3Ls down on turning, lacked a turn of foot when they sprinted, passed only tired runners late.

Average break, drifted back as usual, raced at rear on rails 7Ls from them, lobbed along at tail to turn, swung 6 wide on turning, in contention at 250 M, swept passed them last 150 M to secure strong victory.

Average to leave gates, displayed little early dash, raced on rails 6Ls away worse than midfield, on bridle behind them on turn, held up until 200 M, couldn't sprint with them when clear and just held ground to line.

Jumped only fairly, settled worse than midfield 2nd 6Ls away in between runners on circle, tracked nicely behind them on circle, dream run presented and came with strong run with winner but found him a shade too good.

Broke with them, pushed along into midfield spot, relaxed nicely 4Ls away in 2 wide spot, had easy trip to turn, amongst horses entering straight, showed a little at 250 M but lacked dash over concluding stages.
Raced wide throughout. Close up early, restraining to forward of midfield approaching home bend. One-paced under pressure in the run home.
Disputed lead early. Gained slender advantage approaching home bend. Led until collared in final few strides.
Travelled towards rear. Snuck up on rails to midfield turning in. Kept on before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Never far off on rails. Close up 5th turning in gaining to 2nd over 200 M out. Unable to sustain effort closing stages and swamped.
Raced wide in midfield early. Improved to close up position approaching home turn. Disputed 2nd rounding home bend. Kept on one pace early in straight before finding no extra closing stages.
Prominent far side. Lost position rounding home bend dropping to midfield into straight. Continued to give ground under pressure after straightening.
Well behind to 200 M. Finished off race well down centre of track to narrowly miss a placing.
Settled in rear. Made steady headway in straight to be nearest at finish.
Prominent to 200 M only to be overhauled closing stages.
Began awkwardly, losing many lengths at start. Awkwardly placed on rails rounding home bend. Weakened into straight.
Settled on rails in midfield. Obtained a clear run over 350 M out and ran on determinedly under pressure to hit front close to home.
Broke well, settling 3-wide in midfield. Shifted wide turning in and finished off race well down centre of track to just fail to get up on line.
Brief lead on rails early, settling for 2nd inside leader rounding home bend. Found nothing under pressure soon after straightening.

Average to leave gates, assumed usual position near to last, raced on rails 8Ls off pace, used little in run, on bridle with job to do on turn, made huge amount of ground flying late to go down in 3 way finish (dropped whip).
Began better than usual and raced much close, positioned 1 out 1 back 1 length away, had run of race to turn, couldn't offer when sprint went on gradually lost touch last 100 M to be well beaten.

Began in line, faded back from outside draw, raced 3 wide 6Ls away, tracked eventual winner throughout, travelled well on turn, angled 4 wide and let down with strong run, shifted in but kept giving to just go down.

Bounced out, restrained to rear division from wide gate, eventually settled 2 wide 8Ls off pace, on bridle on circle, came with 5 wide run widest on turn, kept slowly breaking down margin to be closest on line.

Slow to begin, made good ground to position 6Ls away on rails, raced on bit travelling strongly in mid-section, still towards rear on rails to turn, unable to make impression in straight and battled to line.

Quick to leave gates, pressed on but unable to slot in, forced to race 3 wide without cover 2Ls away, kept working throughout, moved up to challenge on turn, still giving until 200 M but workload told and weakened late.
Began in line, pressed forward to take close order, took on leader using a bit before travelling at leaders girth, 1L down on turning, didn't respond when they sprinted, faded out after working.
Began awkwardly, kept there to slot in nicely 3Ls off speed, 2 wide between horses with good run throughout, in traffic on turning, didn't really get going in straight but ran on a bit last 100 M.

Broke nicely, displayed plenty of speed to take up running, overraced a touch in front but controlled tempo nicely to turn, kicked strongly on turning, held advantage to 200 M but couldn't match finish of first 3.

Standard beginning, soon drifted back towards rear of field, raced 6Ls back in 2 wide position, travelled steadily to turn, tracked 4 and 5 wide into straight, closed evenly without threatening down outside.

Broke with rest, unable to slot in from awkward alley, posted 3 wide in midfield 4 to 5Ls away, tracked nicely with cover, 3Ls down on turning, came with strong sprint and held them off bravely last 100 M.

Bounced nicely, showed toe to hold leaders back early, had easy time thereafter with even clip, tracked well to turn, run opened at top of straight, unable to find when they sprinted and only held ground to line.

Standard beginning, urged along to drive through on rails to be 4Ls from frontrunners, had easy time thereafter, stuck to rails in straight, had plenty of clear running but only kept on at same pace to line.

Average jump, raced just worse than midfield 2 wide 5 to 6Ls away, travelled well throughout between horses hanging and caught in behind them to 200 M, didn't go up a notch when clear and was one paced to line.

Amongst first few to begin, pressed on in an effort to lead, forced to race 3-wide without cover, continued to work hard applying pressure to leaders to turn, began to struggle on entering straight, run ended and weakened out.
Standard break, lacked early speed and drifted back to near rear, still outpaced 8-9Ls off them at mid-point, kept to inside in straight, made up a little ground late from an impossible spot.
Only fair to begin, lacked speed and settled worse than midfield on rails, raced 5Ls from them to turn, followed between horses into straight, closed race off nicely late to be closest at finish.

Began with them, restrained from wide alley to camp just off midfield, angled down to rail 3Ls away at mid-point, came between horses on turn, split presented at 150 M, pushed up nicely to dash over the top of them.
Slow to begin, checked shortly after start, couldn't go early speed and became further detached, raced 5Ls from second last horse, never in it and beaten a very long way.

Fastest to hit ground, took up prominent spot outside leader, applied pressure throughout, still at leaders girth to turn, challenged strongly for length of straight, held on well despite hanging to make the frame.
Began awkwardly, gathered speed to drive through behind leader, had easy trip thereafter, 2Ls down but under pressure on turning in, didn't offer a sprint in straight and steadily faded out.

Quick to leave gates, unable to cross them from outside alley, posted 4-wide without cover in mid-section, always working to turn, couldn't find extra gear in straight, only maintained same pace after hard run.
Slow to begin, lacked turn of foot early, raced in rearward few, well back 9Ls away on turn, ridden along on turning but made no impression in run to line merely holding ground.

Slow to begin, soon mustered speed to be just in behind leaders, raced 1 out 1 back 2Ls away, crowded at 600 M on bit, had plenty to offer on turning, angled out in straight, closed well briefly hitting lead before collared last 50 M.

Began with them, ridden along to hold midfield position, raced 3-wide with cover in mid-section, under pressure and lost spot to be 3Ls back approaching turn, came wide and got going again to do best work late.
Broke nicely, showed good speed to hold rails, pressured throughout by outside horses, travelling nicely 1/2L clear on turn, kicked strongly in straight, raced tight last 200 M, held on well for 3rd.
Raced midfield on the rails, worked to the line without threatening.
Midfield, 3-wide with cover, closed off satisfactorily.
Travelled outside the leader, dour in the straight. Not ridden out fully to the post.
Settled in the last position, made some ground when taking inside runs in the straight.
Ridden back in the field, 2 off with cover, came wide in the straight, ran on well.
Rated well in front from outside draw, given every possible chance.
Travelled wide, 3 to 4 deep, no cover, never likely.
Just behind the speed, 1 off with cover, one-paced in the run home.
Camped behind the leader, railed up in the straight to hold off challengers and win effectively.
Slow to begin, made late ground after racing along the fence near the rear. Not ridden out fully to the post.
Began awkwardly and settled near the rear of the field, 1 off with cover. Weakened right out in the straight.
Sat 1 off with cover, midfield, struggled in the straight.

In front briefly after the start but unable to muster speed to stay in front. Raced along the fence at midfield. Lacked a response when asked at home turn and gradually dropped out after straightening.
Raced wide and without cover at midfield. Continued to be wide making home turn and only remained on at same pace in the straight.
Raced 2-wide better than midfield. Kept within 3Ls of the leader in back straight. Quickened when asked turning for home and assumed the lead on straightening. Drew clear final 200 M and won easily.
Niggled along and took the lead at 1600 M. Disputed lead until after straightening but found nothing thereafter.
Jumped well and settled in a prominent position behind the leader. Only remained on same pace in the straight.
Raced 3-wide in rear section. Swung widest turning for home and rallied past tired runners.
Raced 2-wide in rear section. Ridden along at home turn and steadily made up ground. Continued well in the straight but was no threat to winner.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Switched out turning for home but failed to quicken on straightening.
Steadily improved to a forward position. Tracked leader in a 2-wide spot. Commenced to drop out at the home turn and weakened steadily in run to line.
Blundered on jumping and raced at the rear. Trailed field into home straight and closed the race off with a nice rally.
Settled on fence behind midfield. Pressured and quickened at 400 M but was checked on straightening. Continued fairly but lost 3rd place at the line when rider stopped pressing.
Slowly away and raced towards the rear until home straight. Ran on fairly and made up some ground.
Sat in 2nd place out 2-wide within 1L of the speed from 1200 M to home turn, briefly led at 200 M but soon headed and lost a place.
Soon led on fence, always under 1L clear until home turn, faded out once headed over 200 M out.
Always 3-wide no cover, 4Ls down in 5th at 1000 M, pressed on to be 1L down in 3rd at final turn, still every chance at 200 M but tired close home.
Box-run on fence in 4th 2Ls off pace until home turn, led over 100 M and looked the winner before being grabbed inside final strides.
4Ls back in 6th when 2-wide at 1000 M, headway to be 2Ls back turning for home, bumped when finishing strongly but couldn't match winner's momentum.
4-wide no cover early, towards rear about 5Ls off pace and 3-wide but with cover at 1000 M, 4-wide no cover at 600 M and struggling entering straight, well beaten.
Settled 8Ls last on fence early, improved inside to be 4Ls down in 10th entering straight, stayed on strongly out wide to lead final strides.
Much too keen early with head up when restrained in rear about 7Ls off pace, ridden to be 4Ls down in 9th turning for home, outpaced.
2-wide and worse than midfield about 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, opted to remain 2-wide and slipped back to 6Ls last turning for home, made some minor late ground.
In midfield and 2-wide about 4Ls off speed until home turn, hemmed in from a run at 250 M and again at 100 M, not fully tested late.
3-back on fence about 4Ls down in mid-pack until home turn, failed to quicken up.
Awkward break, 2-wide and 2Ls back in 5th at 1000 M, same margin back on straightening, held up from 300 M to 100 M, not fully tested.
Lacked any early dash out wide, 7Ls down in 10th taking home turn, always well outpaced.
Slowly away, soon under pressure in rear, 10Ls last at 600 M never on terms.
Disputed early speed out wide, got in 2-wide at 600 M, still vying for the lead at home turn and at 200 M, weakened late.
Disputed early pace, settled 2-wide and about 3Ls down in 4th from 600 M to home turn, kept on well but lacked pace of principals.
Always prominent, box-seat on fence 2Ls off pace from 600 M to home turn, looked the winner when leading 150 M out, caught close home.
Slowly away, always struggling in rear about 8Ls off pace, made some minor late ground but never remotely dangerous.
Got a bit too far back, still 7Ls down in 10th taking home turn, ran on strongly late, never nearer.
Slow to begin, in about 8th place about 5Ls off pace until home turn, finished off very strongly out wide but post came a shade too soon.
Disputed early speed on fence, still right there taking home turn and all out at 200 M, weakened late.
Tracked leaders from fence in midfield, about 4Ls off pace taking final turn, dug in well to lead inside final strides.
Mostly 5th place about 2Ls or so off pace until home turn, ran on quite well but a little short of room at 100 M, not far away.
Soon outpaced and worse than midfield, 4-wide and hard ridden about 6Ls back entering home straight, no danger.
Gradually took up running from widest draw. Attempted to make all but swamped when no extra inside final 200 M.
Settled in midfield 2-wide. Briefly baulked upon straightening and obtain split over 200 M out. Finished off race nicely to just fail to get up on line.
Travelled mainly behind midfield to straight. Kept on well without threatening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in forward of midfield. Came to challenge upon straightening and took charge about 200 M out. Just held off runner-up's strong late challenge.
Raced mainly 2-wide behind midfield to straight. Gradually weakened.
Settled in 3rd some 2Ls off the pace on rails. Still held box-seat in similar distance from leader turning in. Failed to obtain clear running on inside of straight until late inside final 150 M.
Settled just behind midfield. Commenced run rounding home bend. Fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Chased leader on rails to straight. Shifted out for a run to challenge upon straightening but could find nothing under pressure.
Raced mainly 3-wide in rear of field. Commenced move turning in and ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Raced 3-wide midfield early. Took closer order out wide early in back straight. Still prominent but 3-wide rounding home bend before dropped out into straight.
Raced in better than midfield position early. Improved to be one out one back coming off Rock. Remained same into straight but dropped out over 200 M out.
Very sluggish at start losing many lengths. Trailed the field most of way until making some late impression to beat one home.
Raced 3-wide in prominent position to straight, then gradually faded.
Not far off till 200 M, then dropped out tamely.
Raced 3-wide in rear of field. Widest runner tuning in. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled 2-wide in midfield to straight. Did not find much room until late inside 100 M.
Raced wide in midfield. Ran on well from towards rear into straight to assert authority final stages.
Settled at the back. Briefly held up 200 M out before producing good late finish final stages.
Attempted to make all, but unable to sustain effort and swamped passing 200 M.
Settled on rails in midfield. Ran home steadily inside final 200 M. Did best work at finish.
Settled in 3rd on rails within 2Ls of pace. Obtained run on inside briefly passing 200 M before forced to ease over 100 M out.
Tracked leader to straight. Gained upper hand about 200 M out only to be collared close to home.
Always well behind to straight. Made up some late ground passing beaten horses inside final 200 M.

Steady to break, held midfield position 2-wide 3-4Ls away, overraced when paced slowed, tracked nicely between horses turning in, had chance in straight but didn't pick up, only held ground and tightened near line.

Began awkwardly and lost ground, settled 3-wide 5Ls away behind midfield, raced ungenerously between horses throughout, checked at 500 M, well back on turning, offered little in run home to be well beaten.

Began with first few, dropped in for trail early, drove through to race behind leader 2Ls back, had easy time to turn, didn't have much clear running until 150 M, unable to find turn of foot and only held ground to line.
Jumped with line, rolled forward in search of lead, caught 3-wide without cover 1L away, always working in run, began to struggle approaching turn, gave in at 200 M when workload took toll.
Bounced out, showed customary speed to hold lead, kept striding at even clip, dictated terms to turn, narrowly held advantage into straight, kicked to 150 M but was a spent force and faded late.

Amongst first few to begin, took nice trail in 1 out 1 back early, overraced a touch in mid-section, still camped in nice position on turning, clear run presented at 200 M, kept steadily closing to make frame.

Failed to muster speed from break, unable to slot in and forced to race 3 and 4-wide at rear 5Ls away, always covering ground without cover to turn, last entering straight and made no impression in run home.

Average jump, allowed to drift back from awkward alley, raced 2 and 3-wide at tail 6Ls away, well back between horses on turning, came to middle of track and closed off nicely giving too great a start.

Fast into stride, unable to go with them early and faded back from wide alley, posted 3-wide with cover in midfield 3Ls away, ridden up to make 4-wide run into straight, finished off evenly at same clip.

Began with them, restrained to assume usual role in rearward division, raced 4-5Ls away on rails, travelled nicely to turn, angled into clear between horses in straight, finished hard last furlong to be right there on line.

Average to begin, content to settle at rear on rails 5Ls away, raced on bridle throughout, came 2nd 3-wide with run passing Rock, eased to middle of track in straight, really motored late making up many lengths to go down narrowly.

Began with them, accelerated to hold spot outside leader, relaxed nicely at leaders girth, 1/2L down to turn, challenged strongly into straight, took control at 150 M and kept break to line to score another solid win.

Slow to begin, crowded early before setting towards rear, raced 4 to 5Ls from them pushed along in early stages, began to respond at 400 M, closed nicely between horses last 200 M to be nearest at finish.

Average to leave stalls, soon settled in midfield on inside rail raced in behind them 2Ls away throughout, crowded at 400 M when travelling well, recovered but couldn't find anything extra and was 1 paced in run to line.
Fair to jump, raced on inside rail behind speed, was 2 to 3Ls down to midpoint, hard pressed to keep touch at 400 M, gradually weakened out over concluding stages. Never looked likely.
Out well, showed some speed to race 1L off them in middle of track, moved up to share lead at 400 M, began to struggle when they sprinted, run ended at 200 M and battled to line.
Began reasonably, raced well off rails in midfield, positioned 4Ls back throughout, began to struggle at 400 M, didn't find over concluding stages plugging away to line.

Amongst them early, took up spot just off pace on inside rail, raced 1 to 2Ls away travelling well throughout, responded well when asked at 200 M, closed hard late to go down narrowly. Good for longer.
Began well, showed enough pace to race prominently, took lead at midpoint racing off fence, travelled well past 300 M, unable to find extra gear when sprint when on, finished off at same speed.
Bounced with rest, raced just behind them 2Ls away amongst horses, drifted to midfield when inconvenienced at 400 M, didn't really find and weakened out of it last furlong. Inexperienced.
Awkward to break, regathered to be up with leaders in middle of course, 1 to 2Ls down at midpoint, responded steadily last 200 M to make frame without looking likely.
Began nicely, showed good speed to be amongst first few off inside rail, contested lead throughout, fought strongly with length advantage at 200 M, kept on in good fashion to hold off late challenge.
Tardy to leave gates, ridden along at rear 4 to 5Ls away in early stages, shifted out to centre of track, awkward in action but got going last 200 M finishing off nicely to be closest at finish.
Standard to begin, lacked early speed and settled in midfield, raced 2 to 3Ls away with cover off rails, tracked winner and closed steadily but wasn't able to threaten first two.
Fast to begin, lead them early on inside, held narrow advantage at midpoint, began to feel pressure at 400 M, weakened soon after and gave ground quickly to be well beaten. (Mucopus.)
Overraced early, clipped heels and blundered near the 1000 M while racing 1 off in a handy position behind the speed. Ranged up and still in contention near the 200 M before tiring.
Raced near the rear of the field along the fence. Weakened right out after the 400 M. (To Trial.)
Ridden with cover although slightly worse than midfield, 3 deep. Struggled in the run home.
Began awkwardly, then took up a midfield position along the fence. Finished off soundly.
Positioned 2 deep with cover, towards the back of the field, made some headway in the straight.
Faded passing the 200 M after leading at an even tempo.
Settled 2nd last, had cover, did little in the latter stages.
Parked just off the speed along the fence, came wider mid race, stayed on one paced over the final 100 M.
Raced just off the speed, 3 wide, no cover, never a factor.
3 wide with cover, midfield, was in trouble a long way out.
Camped outside the leader, 1 length back. Punctured before entering the straight.
Settled midfield 1 off with cover, loomed up near the 200 M, held on without being able to pass the winner.
Jumped awkwardly, bounded in the air losing considerable ground and settled at long last. Came wide in the straight for eye catching run. To Trial.
Box seated and travelled nicely on the bridle, shifted around the leader on straightening. Fought off challengers to score narrowly.
Raced 2-wide behind midfield. 5Ls off the pace at 1200 M. 3-wide and 4Ls behind the leader at the home turn and only rallied for a distant 3rd.
No worse than midfield. Kept within 4Ls of the pace in back straight. Quickened nicely when asked on straightening and cruised past the early leader at 200 M for an easy win.
Soon led. Made the pace until being headed at 800 M. 2Ls off the lead in 2nd place turning for home. Unable to turn up a notch and gradually faded in the straight.
Eased back to race in a rearward position. Near last on straightening. Rallied past some tired runners in the early part of the straight but unable to sustain effort in the closing stages.
Tagged alongside the leader before taking the lead after 800 M. Held a 2Ls advantage into the home straight. Had no answer when challenged by winner at 200 M. Kept on fairly thereafter for 2nd place.
Raced along the rails in a position no better than midfield. Stayed within 5Ls of the leader in back straight. Pushed along turning for home but only remained on same pace to the line.
Dropped to the rear. Raced in a rearward position and trailed field heading into home straight. Ran on same pace to the finish and unable to make up ground.
Box seat run 2Ls off pace in 4th from 1000 M to home turn, failed to quicken.
Crossed from widest gate to race just outside leader in 2nd at 800 M, eased to the front at 300 M, soon pulled well clear, easily.
Always 3-back on fence in midfield no worse than 4Ls from the front until home turn, soon petered out.
Slowly away, always towards rear at least 6Ls from the front, not going anywhere fast when hampered 350 M out, weakened.
8Ls last at 1000 M, still over 6Ls back turning for home, made some fair late ground through beaten rivals.
Slowest away, 3-wide but with cover in rear group about 6Ls off speed early, 4-wide and 5Ls off pace turning for home, never a factor.
Nicely placed 2-wide and 3Ls back in 5th or so from 1000 M to home turn, didn't find much off the bridle.
Always 3-wide no cover, pressed on to race 1L off pace in 3rd from 800 M to home straight, faded inside final 300 M to midfield.
Driven to lead by 1L on fence at 1000 M, maintained a break until being headed 300 M out, soon folded.
Midfield early, pressed on 3-wide with cover at 800 M and 3Ls off pace, losing ground turning for home, eased final 100 M.
Covered up in midfield about 4Ls from pace through to home straight, headway to go 2Ls back in 2nd at 200 M, grabbed for quinella spot in final strides.
Mostly 3-wide with cover and a little worse than midfield 4Ls from front until halfway, hung in on straightening when 3Ls off pace, always outpaced, needs further.
Didn't break well, 6Ls off pace in rear bunch early, beginning a run from rear when hampered 350 M out, ran on well again for 2nd close home.
Mostly 4-wide with cover, in rear early but pressed on to be 3Ls down in midfield at halfway, 6-wide and struggling turning for home, beaten a long way out.
Led early on, 2-wide and about a neck down in 2nd from 1000 M to home straight, led again briefly over 300 M out but one-paced and swamped final 50 M.
