3-wide with cover in midfield about 3Ls or so off pace at 800 M, 4-wide turning for home but beaten by the 200 M.
Messy start, very keen in rear early so allowed to stride on out wide without cover to dispute lead out 4-wide at 600 M, capitulated from top of home straight.
Led on fence at 1100 M, clear by about a neck until home turn, gamely fended off a host of late challenges.
8Ls last at 1000 M, 7Ls down and 5-wide turning for home in rear, ran on well down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Unbalanced at 1000 M when 3Ls down and 2-wide around midfield, lost position on the circle and struggling turning for home, one-paced.
Over-raced a little in rear early, 6Ls down in 13th at 800 M, forced 7-wide (widest of all) turning for home, always held.
Nicely placed on fence in box seat throughout but raced too keenly and wanted to lay out, never worse than 2Ls off pace at any stage, finished well despite bad habits.
Missed the break but recovered on inside to race 3-back on fence in midfield over 3Ls off pace at halfway, much the same margin from the front despite pressure in homestretch.
Raced prominently 2-wide and within 2Ls of the pace in 5th or so until home turn, 1.5Ls down and with excellent place prospects at 150 M, one-paced in closing stages.
Awkwardly away, with cover in midfield through first half, 4Ls off pace and losing ground turning for home, plugged on at same pace.
Restrained towards rear as usual about 5Ls off speed early, same margin back when 5-wide turning for home, stayed on well without reaching leaders (pace not strong enough).
4-wide no cover early, 3-wide no cover and 1L down in 3rd at 800 M, 2Ls down in 4th at home turn, stayed on well despite wide trip throughout for good 2nd.
Pushed forward, 2.5Ls behind the leader, raced wide, flattened 250 M.
Awkward away, across the rail behind field, about 7.5Ls off the pace, not suited by the slow pace, lacked room in straight, still has a little dash and made ground.
Eased to sit about 6.5Ls off the pace, not suited by the slow running tempo, not much dash in straight but kept running on well to the line.
Pushed early to get across the rail and led by 1L at slow pace, started receiving pressure from 600 M, hung on until 200 M, weakened.
Eased to sit just behind the leader, raced keenly, started pressuing the leader from 600 M, no turn of foot, flattened 200 M.
Hard ridden to occupy a forward spot, 2Ls behind the leader in the box seat, dashed well 300 M to finish 2nd.
Settled nicely about midfield, 4Ls off the pace, shifted out 500 M for clear running, dashed strongly 250 M to win despite the slow pace.
Slow away, across the rail behind midfield, 6Ls behind the leader, not suited by the slow pace, lacked room 400 M, dashed strongly when clear.
Raced at the back as usual, 7.5Ls off the pace, not suited by the slow pace, picked up slowly, dashed well after 200 M.
Eased to sit just behind the front runners, 3.5Ls off pace, never accelerated, flattened in straight.
Eased to the rear, not suited by the slow pace, never competitive.
Eased to the rear, 8.5Ls behind the leader, travelled wide, not suited by the slow pace, ran on OK despite racing against the negative racing situation.
Occupied a midfield spot, 5Ls off the pace, not suited by the pace, blocked 400 M to 200 M, dashed strongly when cleared, finished a strong 3rd.
Travelled wide and no cover throughout the race, about 4.5Ls behind the leader, however kept dashing well in straight despite the negative situation.
Broke best. Held up 3-wide no cover just off the speed. Remained same home turn and gradually faded under pressure in straight.
Settled towards rear. Switched out for a clear run early in straight. Quickened well down centre of straight to take command inside 200 M.
Raced in midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Led or disputed lead one off the rail to straight. Gradually faded shortly after straightening.
Well there. Joint leaders turning in. Kicked 1.5Ls clear early in straight and flattered. Faded under pressure inside final 200 M.
Settled in 5th on rails just 2Ls off the pace. Came under pressure upon straightening but could only keep on at the same pace without quickening.
Raced wide in midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Settled at the back. Failed to quicken in straight.
In last few early. Gradually made headway along rails to reach midfield before home bend. Remained same into straight. One-paced.
Raced mainly 3-wide behind midfield. Slightly inconvenienced early in straight. Finished off race nicely.
Never far off to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Settled well behind. Made up good ground down centre of straight past beaten runners.

Bounced out well, didn't have enough speed to cross, slotted in to 1 out 1 back spot by midpoint, had easy time thereafter, eased out on turning, steadied at 350 M, recovered but couldn't find extra gear and faded out.
Out well, raced prominently early, drifted back to midfield on bend 2 wide 3Ls away, in between horses on turning, kept finding in straight and closed off evenly without threatening winner.

Broke nicely, pushed up to challenge for early lead, took trail behind leader and had run of race to turn, angled into clear passing 400 M, chased hard but run ended at 150 M, fought on well for place.

Tardy to begin, ridden up but finished up no better than midfield, 2 wide 5Ls away racing greenly throughout, not comfortable between horses on bend, well back on turning in and failed to run on. (Mucopus, see Racing Incidents.)

Average to break, raced on rails 5Ls away behind midfield, had easy time in mid-section, still back between horses on turning, hung in and proved difficult to ride in straight but never really going well enough and battled away.
Jumped only fairly, drifted back to tail 7Ls off pace, raced 2 wide travelling well to bend, angled 3 wide and came 5 wid into straight, closed race off hard down centre of track to make frame.

Broke only fairly, restrained to race at rear, settled on rails 8Ls off pace, travelled well enough at tail to turn, came wide with field to beat into straight, made good ground down outside before run ended at 100 M.
Average to break, didn't show much early speed, raced worse than midfield 3 wide 5Ls away, tracked wide with cover on bend, angled out and closed steadily last furlong to be nearest on line.

Bounced out well, couldn't go early speed but did enough to hold spot on rails in midfield, raced 3 to 4Ls away, travelled well to bend, stuck to rails but couldn't go with them when they sprinted closing off at same speed.

Began with them, showed good speed to press on in search of lead, applied plenty of pressure outside of leader, shared front to turn, began to struggle at 300 M, unable to respond at business end and faded out late.

Standard beginning, raced ungenerously early and settled next to last on rails 7 to 8Ls away, still well back on turning, stuck to rails in straight, only held ground making little impression in run to line.

Began well, unable to slot in from wide alley, posted 3 wide in midfield 4Ls away, always working wide with cover, rolled forward on bend, came with big run but workload told last bit and unable to overhaul leader.

Fast to begin, lead them easily, did some work when pressured, rolled along at good clip to bend, kicked 1L clear on turning, showed good dash to set rivals a task and fought off late challenge for solid win.
Began fairly and gradually took up running. Crossed to rails coming out of back straight, holding half a length around home bend. Had no more to give when swamped passing 200 M.
Began awkwardly and lost many lengths at start. Picked up to rear of field before home bend. Continued to make ground steadily down straight.
Towards rear to straight. Produced some late impression inside final 200 M.
Settled on rails in midfield. Lost position slightly coming out of back straight. Switched out from behind runners over 300 M out and ran on steadily to the line.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. Gradually weakened.
Raced wide behind midfield to straight. Soon faded.
Settled just worse than midfield. Did not have too much room early in straight. Finished off race well after obtaining split over 200 M out.
Raced wide in midfield throughout. Found nothing in the run home.
Settled in 5th within striking distance. Quickened up well once into the clear about 300 M out. Hit front passing 200 M and held on well to the line.
Raced in similar position in better than mid-divsion throughout. Finished off race nicely.
With leaders far side. Still close up around home bend. Folded up quickly after straightening.
Chased leader to straight. Came under pressure to challenge but failed to quicken to threaten.
Settled at the back. Trailed the field into straight. Made up good ground past beaten horses in the run home.
Raced wide in midfield. Took closer order coming out of back straight running 3rd around home bend. Soon weakened after straightening.

Broke with them, displayed customary speed to slide forward and take up running, kept them rolling with pressure on at solid clip, held 1/2L on turning, kicked hard to 200 M but run ended and lost touch late.

First to hit ground, went on in search of lead, unable to cross and posted 3 wide without cover, challenged 1L away working throughout, still there on the bend, found nothing when asked and tired after hard run.

Jumped only fairly, ridden up to hold midfield position, raced 2 wide 4 to 5Ls away in midfield, tracked well between horses on bend, clear running presented at 350 M but lacked usual turn of foot, steadily closed to line.

Out with line, faded back to next to last, raced on rails 8Ls off pace, not asked in mid-section, had field to beat on turn, angled 5 wide into straight, came with big run down middle of track making significant ground to take 3rd.

Began with them, restrained from wide alley to settle worse than midfield, raced 2 wide 5Ls away, travelled strongly to turn, in traffic turning in, found clear running at 350 M, came with big sprint over the top of them for solid win.

Average to break, didn't share early speed, drove through to race in midfield on rails 5Ls away in traffic searching for run on turning in finally got into clear at 200 M and closed off nicely to make frame.

Jumped with rest, lost advantage and settled in rearward division, raced 3 wide 6Ls away, angled 4 and 5 wide on bend, didn't offer a sprint but finished off stoutly at same pace to be nearest on line.

Bounced out well, allowed to relax in prominent role 1 out 1 back trailing speed, had good run 2Ls back, amongst horses on turning, run closed at 300 M, regathered but finished only at same pace to line.

Even break, restrained from wide alley to race at tail, further back than usual 2 wide 8Ls away from lead, tracked 4 wide with field to beat on turn, made no real impression giving huge start in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)

Began nicely, rolled forward from awkward gate, raced 3 wide 2Ls away with cover, tracked well to turn, angled 4 wide into straight, came with strong finish hitting lead at 200 M, overhauled by winner last furlong.

Out well, checked when attempting to go forward, forced to race 3 wide in midfield 4Ls back, had cover on bend and travelled strongly turning in, unable to go up a gear when they sprinted and battled away to line.

Began awkwardly and crowded early, ridden hard to drive up to be 4Ls back on rails, had easy trip thereafter, on bridle to turn, stuck to paint in straight, closed off well before steadied at 200 M, same pace to line.

Reasonable break, showed usual speed to be up challenging early, raced outside leader 1L away, pressured with horse on outside there to turn, kept chasing in straight, didn't go up a gear and finished evenly at same pace.
Jumped with rest, held forward spot behind leader 2Ls away, had run of race in mid-section, niggled along approaching turn, didn't have turn of foot when they sprinted and steadily faded out.
Soon took up running and led until overhauled inside final 300 M.
Well back. Produced some moderate impression early in straight before baulked about 100 M out.
Settled just off the pace. Chased leader into straight. Gave ground gradually under pressure.
Sluggish at start. Ridden to muster speed to join rear of field shortly. Detached again coming out of back straight. No further impression.
Raced wide towards rear. Given reminders turning in. Produced some late impression inside final 200 M.

Niggled along for speed after beginning from poor draw. Raced wide in midfield far side. Took closer order coming out of back straight. Remained wide turning in. Kept on steadily to reach 3rd placing late.
Midfield on rails far side. Lost position when awkwardly placed behind runner approaching home bend. Kept on only at the one pace under pressure from behind midfield into straight.
Midfield far side. Gave ground gradually from approaching home bend.
Niggled along only. Raced wide in prominent position far side. In 4th some 2Ls back turning for home. Fought on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Prominent on rails briefly, settling in around mid-division. Found nothing from similar position into straight.
Raced mainly 2-wide in midfield. Made moderate headway in straight though without threatening.
Never far off in 3rd or 4th. Snuck up to 2nd still about 2Ls off turning in. Switched off race after straightening and showed a great turn of foot to take charge over 200 M out.
Raced in last spot for most of the trip, hard ridden to stay in touch from the 900 M, found wanting in the straight. (Blood in left nostril.) (See Racing Incidents.)
For the major part of the race travelled 3-wide, no cover, just off the speed.
Raced midfield, 1 off, came wider on the bend, didn't go on and was disappointing.
Led early before being overtaken near the 1000 M, got good cart into the race, disappointing in run home.
Raced back in the field, raced 3-wide with cover, never in the hunt.
Enjoyed a good run mid-race, just off the speed, 1 off, couldn't capitalize.
Raced 3-wide in midfield with cover, dour in the straight.
Severely checked near the 1400 M and settled well back. Made good ground around the field to close off nicely.
Just behind midfield, on the rails, made up satisfactory ground in the run home.
From wide gate, settled near the tail of the field, along the fence, shifted off the fence rounding the turn, lengthened well to draw a large winning margin.
Settled slightly worse than midfield, 1 off with cover, struggled in the straight.
Positioned on the fence, slipped well out of contention after the 400 M, to finish a long last.
Caught wide early in a midfield position, went forward near the 1200 M, opened up big break, despite travelling wide. Commenced to tire after 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slightly more prominent, 1 off with cover in a handy position, weakened noticeably in the straight.
Steadily dropped back to race behind midfield. Travelled along the fence at the turn before swinging out turning for home. Quickened well and swept past rivals near 200 M.
Off slowly and was unable to muster speed. Continued to be hard ridden in a rearward position until 600 M. Towards the rear on straightening and made up ground by running past tired runners.
Raced prominently behind the leader. Disputed lead at 300 M but unable to find extra to stay in contention.
Failed to keep pace with leaders. Raced behind midfield and was 4 to 5Ls off the leader heading into the turn. Remained on same pace in the straight.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. 3Ls behind leader making home turn. Caught in traffic for some distance after straightening. Closed well after finding daylight.
Soon in the lead. Maintained a slight advantage on straightening but weakened thereafter.
Gradually dropped back from wide draw. Raced behind midfield and was in rear section on straightening. Only ran past tired runners.
Outpaced and trailed field early stages. Widest and in last place turning for home. Closed the race off with an impressive finish.

A bit slow out of the gates and raced along the fence at midfield. Saved ground making home turn and improved to within a length of the leader on straightening. Checked severely near 300 M and never recovered.
Better than midfield and was wide without cover. Raced 3-wide and kept within 2Ls of the leader making the turn. Disputed lead 300 M but unable to turn up a notch final stages.
Never far off the pace. Raced alongside the leader at the turn but weakened after straightening.
Off slowly. Raced along the rails behind midfield. Struggled to keep pace making the turn. Made no impression in the straight.
Bounded at start and failed to muster speed, always niggled along worse than midfield about 5Ls off the pace, flat effort.
Soon outpaced in rear and 8Ls back, 6Ls down off speed turning for home, made some moderate late ground.
Slowly away and always sharing last place about 6Ls or 7Ls from the front until home turn, kept on at same pace.
Always well there about 1L back in 2nd and 2-wide until straightening, outpaced quinella pair thereafter.
Raced in 3rd about 2Ls off pace through to final turn when 3-wide and under pressure to pick up, plugged on at same pace.
Never far away in 6th or so with cover about 3Ls off pace until home turn, ran on well in straight despite hanging right at 200 M and then left, led final strides.
Always 3 and 4-wide without cover in midfield within 3Ls of the speed until the 600 M, no surprise that he couldn't quicken in homestretch.
Slowly away, about 4Ls or 5Ls back in 7th until home turn, never looked like getting to the leaders.
Led by 1L early on, crossed to fence at 800 M, still 1L to the good at 200 M, nabbed by winner in final strides.
Nicely placed on fence about 2Ls off speed in 4th or 5th until home turn, dropped out very tamely from then on.
5Ls off pace in about 8th at 800 M but soon struggling and well detached turning for home, weakened further.
Slowly away, checked in rear at 1400 M, niggled along from 800 M to straightening when 4Ls back in mid-division, didn't threaten.
Very wide in rear at 1st bend, always well behind and without cover in rear, eased out even before home turn.
Slowest away, ridden along towards rear 6Ls off speed on fence at 800 M, one-paced in home straight and didn't bother principals.
Always rear about 7Ls off the pace, close to heels at 800 M and steadied, same at 600 M with head up, still 7Ls last off final bend, ran on well to lead 50 M out, gamely.
Well placed about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace and 2-wide in 3rd or so until home turn, failed to follow through.
Disputed early speed on fence but gradually began struggling and hard pressed to lie up at 800 M, eased over 300 M out.
2-wide in midfield about 4Ls off pace at halfway, forced wide on the circle and struggling to make an impression at top of homestretch, faded out.
Mostly midfield or better on fence about 4Ls off speed until home turn, stayed on pretty well to grab 2nd on the line.
Led on fence at 1200 M but headed at 800 M and 1L off pace in 2nd until home turn, had every chance to pick up and win but one-paced and swamped for a place close home.
Hung out badly at 1200 M and veered off to far side of track, soon pulled up. (Bled.) (Lame next morning.)
Never travelled very well in rear, 6Ls down in 10th at 800 M posed no danger at all in home straight. (Sore suspensory next morning.)
Prominent early, sent on to lead out 2-wide by 1L from 800 M to home turn, only grabbed by winner 50 M out and lost the quinella on the line, creditable effort.
In rear bunch 6Ls off pace and 3-wide no cover down backstretch, made steady headway in home straight but just missed out on a place.
Prominent far side. Dropped to 5th home bend. Plugged on for 3rd in home straight.
Made all. Hung on well to win unchallenged.
Towards rear throughout. Made no show in straight.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. Gradually faded.
Raced wide in prominent positions down far side after beginning from poor draw. 4th some 2Ls back rounding home bend. Gradually weakened after straightening.
Midfield to straight. Kept on steadily under pressure for remote 5th. (Bled.)
Raced wide towards rear. Made moderate headway down centre of straight past beaten horses.
Chased leader throughout. Unable to quicken to threaten winner the length of straight.
Raced in rear of field hugging inside rails throughout. Made no impression in straight.
Raced in rear of midfield on rails. Ran home one-paced.
Chased leader to straight. Dropped out soon after straightening.
Struggling at the back before running off the track home bend. Never recovered.
Held slender advantage far side. Kicked one length clear upon straightening but unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Disputed lead most of way to straight. Fought on steadily early on before swamped closing stages.
Always well behind. Never a factor.
Raced wide towards rear. Ran on well under pressure down centre of straight. Did best work at finish.
Behind midfield early. Broke down early in back straight.
Raced prominently in 4th on rails. Kept on steadily under pressure without quickening in straight.
Settled on rails in midfield. Gave ground from around home bend.
Raced wide in midfield. Failed to quicken under pressure in straight. (Dorsal displacement.)
Settled in forward of midfield on rails. Did not find much room early in straight and only kept on steadily in the run home in closing stages.
Jumped in air at start losing many lengths. Tailed-off throughout and never seen with a chance.
In last few throughout. Weakened into straight.
Settled in 5th within 2Ls of pace. Remained same turning in but could only keep on at the same pace in the run home.
Chased leaders mostly one or two off the rail. Quickened upon straightening to assert authority over 100 M out and hung on well to the line.
Settled behind midfield. Quickened up well inside final 200 M to just fail to get up on line.

Began well, showed plenty on speed to engage in battle for front, took trail behind leader after working early, not travelling and began to weaken at mid-point, dropped right out in run home to be well beaten.

Average to begin, hard ridden to hold spot early, raced 10Ls away at rear, began to circle 3-wide from mid-point, still well back on turning in, came to middle of track, made up many lengths late to be closest at finish.

Fist to hit ground, showed customary speed to take up running early, eventually worked to fence at mid-point, kept rolling 1L clear on bend, hung but held advantage on turning in, there until 200 M but tired late.

Began with them, positioned behind speed but lost ground into back straight, raced 8-9Ls away 2-wide in mid-section, came 3-wide on bend, swung wide in straight into middle of track, did best work late making good ground.
Tardy to begin, pushed along to hold spot on rails, raced rear to last on rails 8-9Ls from them, hard pressed on bend, kept to rails in straight but made little impression plugging away to line.

Began with them, ridden along to take up a position, settled closer than usual 2-3Ls away in 2-wide spot, travelled nicely in run, stalked leaders on turn, gained split on turning, closed over the top of them for nice win.

Fast into stride, rolled forward to assume role outside leader (worked to get there), had even run thereafter 1L away, moved up to challenge and carried wide turning in, fitness gave out last 200 M and one-paced to line.

Average to begin, hard ridden to take closer order, took up midfield position 3-4Ls away, improved 3-wide from mid-point, within striking distance coming 4-wide into straight, stuck to task well but beaten by better horse.

Amongst first to begin, posted wide early working across from awkward alley, forced to race 3-wide without cover 1L back, always working to turn, struggling turning in and couldn't go on last 200 M after hard run.

Fair to begin, showed early toe to challenge for forward position, positioned 3 back on rail 4Ls away, carried back by tiring horse at mid-point, lost touch to be 6Ls off them on bend, made little ground along inside in straight.

Slow to begin and checked early, regathered to drive up into midfield spot, raced 3-wide 4Ls away with cover, always covering ground to bend, hard ridden to make ground turning in, battled away in straight.

Broke with them, lacked early speed and drifted back to settle in rearward division, posted 3-wide 6Ls from leaders with trail in mid-section, began to make ground on circle, didn't find extra gear in straight.

Standard to leave gates, allowed to slide back towards rear, raced 6Ls away in 2-wide spot, travelled kindly in mid-section, gradually made ground to turn, came wide into straight, ground away to line.
Began with line, faded back to last from awkward draw, raced 2 wide 10Ls away at rear, had job to do on bend, came wide into straight but showed nothing in run to line. (Blood in trachea.)
Slow to begin, settled towards tail from awkward alley, made ground to be 2 wide 5 to 6Ls away in mid-section, ridden along on turn, made some ground in middle of track but couldn't go on last 200 M.

Standard to begin, mustered speed to roll up outside leader, raced 1 to 2Ls away in mid-section (did some work), close enough on turn and travelling fairly, challenged at 300 M but didn't let down, same pace to line.

Jumped with rest, lacked early toe and faded back to rear division, steadied on first turn, raced 2 wide 3Ls away in mid-section, hard ridden on bend, closed steadily in straight without ever looking like a place chance.

Ok to jump, urged along to go forward from a wide alley, forced to race 3 and 4 wide throughout, always working 2Ls away on bend, close enough on turning into straight, weakened right out after hard run.

Began nicely, showed enough dash to be prominent early, raced behind leader, had run of race thereafter, travelled strongly on bend, under pressure in straight, lacked turn of foot to improve on rails and only held ground to line.

Average break, soon re-gathered to drive through and take over running, had mind on job this week and kept them rolling 1L clear to turn, kicked strongly passing 250 M, stuck on well but no match for winner late.

Well enough to break, outpaced and drifted back to be behind midfield, crowded at 1000 M, raced 2 wide 5 to 6Ls from them, followed rail on bend, kept to inside in straight but only had one speed in run home making moderate headway.

Average to leave gates, reluctant to hold spot early, raced ungenerously on rail 10Ls off leaders, angled wider on bend, under pressure early in straight, inexperience showed and made no impact in straight.

Average break, rushed along to take closer order, always working 3 wide 3Ls away without cover, not far away on turn, began to struggle entering straight, workload and inexperience took toll and didn't find late.
Standard jump, pushed along to hold midfield spot, 5Ls back on first bend, couldn't hold position at midpoint and began to weaken, gave significant ground on bend and was well beaten in straight.

First to leave gates, taken hold of to take trail 3Ls off leaders on rails, angled 2 wide on bend, travelling well and eased out into straight, took some time but wound up strongly last 100 M to win readily.

Began with rest, allowed to settle in midfield role, raced 2 wide 3 to 4Ls away, on bridle in traffic on turning, bumped into clear at 250 M, closed steadily but was very green over concluding stages.
Raced 1 out 1 back, gave ground after the 400 M.
Began awkwardly, then failed to muster early speed. Caught wide without cover, midfield for the remainder of the trip. Weakened right out in the straight.
Rated well in front making every post a winner, won by a big margin effortlessly.
Midfield, 3 wide, some cover, dour in the run home.
Positioned second last, on the fence, steadily made ground through the field, ran to the line well.
Tracked leading division, 1 off with cover, one paced in the straight.
Positioned just off midfield, 3 deep with cover, was a beaten horse turning for home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled last, 1 off with cover, came to the outside after the 300 M and made a late impression without threatening.
Settled midfield along the fence, responded well in the straight and finished off nicely.
Raced at the back of the field, had cover, 1 off, tired noticeably in the straight. To Trial.
Settled near last, struggled in the run home.
Raced behind midfield, 1 off with cover, made some ground along the rail in the straight.
Took some time to muster speed before being able to go forward and race outside the leader after 100 M. Commenced to tire before 400 M and was disappointing.
Enjoyed the run of the race behind the leader, however was overhauled after the 400 M.
Hard pressed out of the gates and raced 2-wide behind the frontrunners. 3Ls off the pace making the turn and only managed same pace in the straight.
Raced 2-wide and was never better than midfield. Switched out to the clear after straightening and swept to the lead near 100 M. Kept on well to deny a late challenger.
Off slowly and trailed field until final 300 M. Closed the race off with a strong rally and just missed catching the winner.
Settled in midfield. Only remained on same pace in the straight.
Raced along the rails behind midfield. Spent most of the home straight looking for daylight and was not in the clear until the final 50 M.
Off slowly and was ridden along to be 3-wide in a forward spot. Disputed lead and remained wide making the turn. Tired in the final 300 M.
Dropped to rear section. 3-wide making home turn and quickened after straightening. Steadily made up ground but unable to sustain effort in the final stages.
Jumped well and raced on or near the pace until straightening. Opened up a clear advantage after 400 M. Headed final 100 M and stayed on only fairly.
Outpaced by frontrunners. Raced 3-wide and kept within 3Ls of leader. Continued well in the straight for a minor placing.
3-wide behind midfield. Took some time to pick up after straightening and made up some late ground.
Settled at midfield. Kept along the rails making the turn. Had trouble getting through heavy traffic after 300 M. Closed the race off well once clear and was nearest at finish.
Taken back from wide draw and raced in a rearward position until home straight. Rallied well down the stretch and made the frame.

Jumped awkwardly but was niggled forward to race in a prominent spot behind the leader. Held up briefly after straightening and only kept on after finding daylight near 300 M. Weakened gradually in the final 200 M.
Lead or disputed lead until home straight. Weakened final 300 M.
Without cover worse than midfield early, 3-wide with cover from 900 M about 6Ls off pace, kept on at the same tempo in the straight.
Awkward break, carried head awkwardly while disputing lead out 2-wide, a neck to the good on straightening, headed over 200 M out and weakened late. (Blood in trachea.)
Switched from wide gate for cover, soon very unruly and shifted out 1100 M out to press on 3-wide no cover, 4Ls back in midfield struggling turning for home, dropped out.
4-back on fence down backstretch about 4Ls off pace in 9th or so until home turn, found nothing off the bit.
3-back on fence in midfield about 4Ls off speed until home straight, failed to quicken up.
Never better than midfield nor closer than 6Ls to the pace.
Well placed 2-wide and 2Ls off speed in 4th or 5th down the back, 1L down in 3rd at top of home stretch, shifted out over 200 M out, bumped runner-up at over 50 M but always on top.
Enjoyed box run on fence 2Ls off pace in 4th or so until home turn, soon outpaced.
Always in rear bunch, shoved out wider at 1100 M, 8Ls last turning for home, never a factor.
Sent on to lead on fence at 1200 M, disputing pace from 1000 M to home turn, soon faded out.
Nice position 3Ls off speed and 2-wide in 6th or so until halfway, loomed closer at home turn, had every chance to go past winner before being knocked unbalanced over 50 M out.
Fractious in gates, keen early on, 5Ls back in midfield at 800 M, travelled well entering stretch, finished fairly for a place without threatening quinella pair.
Slow to begin, always in rear at least 6Ls behind leaders, very weak in homestretch.
3-back on fence when checked 1100 M, head up in place, 4Ls off pace in midfield at 800 M, held up from 400 M to 300 M, every chance of quinella, lacked the zip.
4-back on fence about 5Ls off speed in 8th or so until 600 M, closer turning for home, badly held up until 100 M out, ran on again, very unlucky not to at least place.
Awkwardly away, midfield about 3Ls off speed until 700 M when hanging out, 1L down at 300 M with place prospects, outpaced final 200 M.
Always 3-wide no cover, 3Ls off pace in 6th at 1000 M, a little closer turning for home but soon emptied out under pressure.
Midfield with cover about 4Ls off pace through first half, same margin behind when 4-wide (widest of all) turning for home, always held.
Slowly away, niggled along early in rear, short of room when 5Ls off pace in 12th taking final bend, dashed through the field to take 2nd inside final strides.
Led by 1L on fence at 1000 M, a neck clear turning for home, faded out once headed 300 M out.
Well placed 2Ls and 3Ls off pace in 5th or until home turn, led by a neck at 200 M but hung in under pressure and lost on a place late.
Broke badly and lost about 6Ls on field, recovered to be 5Ls back in 10th at 800 M, 4Ls back entering straight and steadied in midfield at 200 M, one-paced.
Settled in rear group about 6Ls or 7Ls off speed, 3-wide turning for home and 5Ls down, switched out to centre of track and quickened well to lead 50 M out, ran on.
Fractious in gates, in rear about 7Ls off pace and tracking winner through first half, 6Ls last turning for home, made some fair late ground past tired rivals.
Run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 2nd at 1000 M, same into home straight, stayed on dourly and didn't drop away as usual, improved.
2-wide and 2Ls down in 3rd at 1000 M, a neck back in 2nd from home turn to 200 M, very tired late.
Head up at 1000 M in midfield about 4Ls off speed, still fairly well placed at home turn but very one-paced in the finish. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Eased 3Ls off pace, no cover early and raced very keenly, not suited by the slow pace and continued to overrace, lack of room about 400 M, little dash when clear.
3Ls behind the leader close to the inside fence, little dash 300 M despite the slow pace.
Awkwardly away and bumped, pushed to sit 2Ls behind the leader, no progress in final stages.
Eased 4Ls off pace on the outside part of the track, not suited by the slow speed, dashed strongly 250 M and made up lost of ground, just beaten by a narrow margin and ran 2nd.
Slow away, eased to sit at the back, not suited by the slow tempo, continue to shift towards the outside part of the track in final stages, ran on fairly.
Eased to sit behind leader for cover, travelled well, but no turn of foot in final stages.
Led easily by 1.5Ls with very slow pace, hung on until 200 M when overhauled, maintained position and ran on for 3rd.
Eased back for cover as usual, 4.5Ls behind the leader, waited until 200 M to pick up, dashed strongly despite the slow pace.
Settled 1.5Ls behind the leader, no trouble throughout the trip in the middle of the track, however just held its ground in concluding stages.
Pushed early to keep up with the main bunch, 2Ls behind the leader on the outside fence, ran on only fairly.
Never competitive at the rear.
Settled 1.5Ls off pace along the inside fence, travelled nicely, quickened up 300 M and ran on strongly to win by narrow margin.
Eased to sit about midfield in the middle of the track, not suited by the slow tempo, dashed well 200 M.
Remained in last few virtually throughout. Making progress when forced to steady 200 M out.
Never far off on rails. Obtained split over 200 M out and quickened well to take command shortly afterwards.
Raced in midfield or just worse than midfield to straight. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Raced wide up far side to prominent position. Similarly placed around home bend and into straight. Gradually weakened.
Always well behind to straight and made up some late ground.
Raced 3-wide mainly in prominent position. Not far off in 6th turning in but soon faded.
Raced wide in midfield. Made modest headway in centre of straight to finish off race nicely. (Blood in trachea.)
Always there. Failed to quicken to threaten early in straight and could only keep on steadily at the same pace under pressure.
Mainly in midfield before weakened out of contention inside final 200 M.
Trailed the field to 200 M before produced for a run to do best work at finish.
Broke well. Held slender lead early. Raced close up on rails rounding home bend and early in straight. Unable to sustain effort passing 200 M.
Raced wide towards rear. Made up some late ground past beaten horses in the centre of the straight.
Well there. Gained slender advantage rounding home bend. Fought on under pressure to retain lead early in straight but easily overhauled by winner inside 200 M.

Tardy to begin, assumed usual role just worse than midfield, on rails 7Ls away in middle stages, not asked in run, travelled well turning in, left flat footed when they sprinted but closed off evenly to be closest on line.
Fast into stride, held early lead with ease, pressured and eventually took trail behind the leader, angled 2 wide on bend, came with strong run briefly hitting lead at 200 M, fought solidly to line.

Began well, relaxed move readily than usual, stalked first two 3Ls away, closed on bend to be outside leader, challenged strongly into straight, fought battle for length of straight doing well to make frame (restricted room late).

Even break, slotted into midfield role 5Ls back on rails, enjoyed easy run in mid-section, travelled well tracking 3 wide behind them into straight, within striking distance but just lacked dash to match them last 200 M. Sound effort.

Jumped with them, restrained from awkward alley, shared position at the tail 9 to 10Ls away, pushed along to make ground on circle, gave big start on turning in, couldn't make impression but closed off respectably.
Bounced out with them, allowed to settle off speed in midfield, raced 2 wide 5Ls away, came 3 wide on circle, switched out but couldn't go up a gear and fitness gave out last 200 M.

Jumped well, allowed to slide forward to challenge for front, applied pressure and eventually took up front, 2Ls clear on bend, shaded by outside horse turning in, kicked strongly in straight holding them for 2nd.
Standard break, steadied when crowded early, raced 2 wide in last trio 8Ls away, ridden along to make ground on bend, didn't possess usual finishing burst and only kept on at same pace to line.

Average to leave gates, drifted back to worse than midfield, raced 2 wide 7Ls from front runners, had to be niggled along at 600 M, switched out in straight, closed off fairly making ground late but couldn't break down margin.
Slowly into stride, raced at tail 9 to 10Ls from leader's lobbed along at rear throughout, had job to do on turning for home, stuck to rails but was one paced to line.

Began with rest, not rushed early, camped behind speed 4Ls back on rails, travelled well in mid-section, angled 2 wide on circle, 2Ls down on turning, challenged at 250 M cruising past them to score with something in hand.
Settled in last few. Produced moderate late impression inside final 200 M.
Soon took up running and attempted to make all. Headed when no extra under pressure over 200 M out.
Settled on rails in midfield. Did not find much room behind runners early in straight. Produced some late impression inside final 200 M.
Mainly 3 wide in straight. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Settled on rails in 4th about 3Ls off the leader. Moved closer turning in but did not have clear running behind leaders in straight.
Very slowly away. Trailed the field to straight. Produced some late effort down centre to beat one home.
Raced wide throughout. Towards rear early. Made swift progress around field coming out of back straight. Just better than midfield rounding home bend. Gradually weakened after straightening.
Settled in forward of midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Tracked leader. Hit front under pressure over 200 M out. Hung on well to the line.
Raced in last few. Produced good late finish inside final 200 M.
Began slowly. Remainly in last few throughout. Made no impression in straight.
Settled on rails just worse than midfield. Snuck up to midfield turning in. Fought on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in 3rd within 3Ls of pace. Fought on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Around midfield to straight. Faded.

Slowly away, settled towards rear, raced on rails 10Ls off front, appreciated solid pace in mid-section, well back behind horses turning, angled out in straight, accelerated sharply last 200 M to close over the top for big win.
Tardy to begin, ridden up to hold rearward spot, raced 2 wide 11 to 12Ls away, appreciated fast pace in front, swung 4 wide on bend, steadily made good ground to be in picture but run ended at 100 M.

Began nicely, rolled forward to challenge for early lead, worked hard but eventually took trail at midpoint, raced 3Ls away on rails, angled 3 wide on bend, challenged turning in but offered little when they sprinted and weakened out.

Well enough to begin, amongst first division early, raced 2 wide 3Ls back, didn't settle and hung badly in mid-section, hung out 5 wide on turn, gave nothing and weakened out in straight. (Blood in trachea.)

Average break, failed to show usual speed, ridden hard to hold midfield position 5 to 6Ls away on rails, had easy run to bend, tracked nicely behind them into straight, stuck to inside but couldn't find anything last 200 M.

Fast to begin, showed plenty of speed to battle for lead, continued to apply pressure and worked hard to take up running by midpoint, kept rolling and held narrow advantage on bend, under siege and was a spent force by 200 M.

Steady break, showed enough to take up midfield role, raced on rails 8Ls off front, switched 2 wide on circle, travelled comfortably on bend, closed steadily between horses in straight without threatening winner.

Fast into stride, showed usual dash to take up running, pressured in front at a solid speed, lost lead on circle, raced outside leader on bend, took control again at 300 M, fought strongly but couldn't go on late after hard run.

First to hit ground, amongst first few early, took trail behind speed, raced 4Ls away on rials, had easy time to turn, tracked up behind leader into straight, not a lot of clear room to 200 M, only plugged on when clear.

Began with rest, restrained from wide alley to settle worse than midfield, raced 2 wide 9Ls from leaders, steadily improved on bend, travelled between horses into straight, finished off soundly when clear but unable to hold winner.

Fair to begin, restrained when unable to go forward, raced 2 wide 8Ls of pace in midfield, forced 3 wide without cover from midpoint, began to struggle on bend, came wide into straight but made no impression to line.

Lacked speed as usual, assumed rearward role, raced on rails 12Ls from frontrunners, not asked in mid-section, had field to beat on turning, stuck to rails and made up plenty of ground to 200 M but then only held ground to line.

Slow to begin, hard ridden to hold spot early, raced in last spot detached 15Ls off pace, never seen to be travelling and still well off 2nd last horse on turning, only passed tired horses in the straight. (Mucopus.)

Standard to leave gates, settled in midfield 5 to 6Ls away, raced 2 wide enjoying even trip with speed on, trailed nicely 3 wide on bend, loomed up at 300 M, briefly hit lead at 200 M but run ended late.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure down straight to reach 2nd late.
Amongst leaders early. Kicked about 1L clear rounding home bend. Drew further away in the run home.
Broke fairly but soon dropped to tail-end when awkward. Picked up to join rear of field rounding home bend but made no show in straight.
Always struggling at the back and never seen with a chance.
Travelled on rails towards rear. Similar position turning in. Finished off race nicely.
Settled just better than midfield. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight.
With leaders on rails far side. Just behind leader around home bend. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Raced 3-wide no cover within 2Ls of pace to straight. Dropped out.
Broke well and with leaders early, dropping to mid-division approaching home bend. One-paced from similar position into straight.
Raced wide towards rear. Made up some late ground under pressure down centre of track closing stages.
With leaders early, dropping back to share 2nd one out one back rounding home bend. Lost further ground under pressure in straight.
Overraced early, took up midfield position along the fence, never threatened.
Never in the hunt after racing wide throughout at the back of the field.
Led at an even clip, pressured near the 400 M and folded soon after.
Came with a strong finish in the straight after racing at the tail of the field.
Ridden prominently from a wide gate to park behind the leader on the fence. Switched out on straightening, extended nicely to win well.
Settled back in the race, 1 off with cover, made steady ground over the last furlong.
Raced midfield along the rail, dour in the run home.
Raced in a handy position 1 off with cover, was carried 3-wide after the 500 M. Left without cover thereafter however was a beaten horse prior to straightening.
Settled back early, 3-wide no cover, was allowed to stride forward after the 1200 M to race outside the leader. Stayed on well in the straight.
Midfield, 1 off with cover, stayed on without threatening.
Despite being ridden along early, failed to muster speed and raced near the rear of the field on the fence, struggled under pressure in the straight.
Was able to take up a good spot from an inside barrier just behind the speed, came 3-wide after the 500 M, battled on over the concluding stages.
Settled in a prominent position behind the pace. Continued well after straightening and was in a disputed lead inside final 200 M. Shifted out but unable to match strides with winner closing stages.
2-wide and no better than midfield. Only able to keep same pace in the straight and was caught in traffic closing stages.
Missed the jump and then was crowded to the back. Checked after 1400 M and trailed field. Remained at the rear going into home turn but closed the race off well.
Settled in rear section. Swung out on straightening and closed the race off with a strong run.
Raced 3-wide without cover at midfield. Ran on without quickening in the straight.
Niggled along from wide draw to a forward position. Tagged alongside the leader in back straight and home turn. Failed to keep pace after straightening and weakened.
Raced on fence in a rearward position. Made a late rally and finished in a distant 3rd.
Raced along the fence behind midfield. Made a ground saving run around home turn but lacked the needed rally in the home straight.
Hard ridden to take the lead. Held a length's advantage heading into home straight. Headed near 100 M and gradually faded thereafter.
2-wide better than midfield. Kept within 3Ls of the leader back straight. Only stayed on same pace in the straight.
Slowly away and then raced 3-wide behind midfield. Weakened after straightening.
Settled on fence at midfield. Launched a rally on straightening and charged to the front inside final 100 M.
Led by a neck on fence at 1000 M, maintained similar margin until being headed about 250 M out, stayed on fairly well and regained a place on the line.
Close-up when hindered at 1100 M and keen at early on, about 2Ls back in 4th out 2-wide until home turn, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, stayed on well but lost out on bob of heads.
Slowly away but recovered on fence to be 2Ls off pace when steadied at 900 M, 3Ls back in 5th at top of homestretch, always held by principals.
In rear bunch about 6Ls off speed at halfway, 5Ls down in 9th turning for home, ran on fairly well late, nearest at finish.
Slowest away, in rear group but with cover at least 5Ls from the front until home turn, posed not the slightest danger.
Always in rear group 4-wide no cover and at least 5Ls from the front until home turn, soon lost further ground.
Head up in rear at 1000 M, detached in rear about 8Ls behind turning for home, never on terms.
2-wide and 1L down in 2nd at 800 M, sent on to lead 250 M out but headed about 50 M out, just missed out on a place.
Hampered early on, hanging out at 1000 M when holding the box run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd, still just 1L back in 3rd at the 200 M but one-paced late.
Always 3-wide no cover in midfield roughly 3Ls off speed until home turn, found nothing under pressure.
Slow to begin, worse than midfield about 5Ls back early, about 4Ls down in 8th off home turn, picked up well to just lead 50 M out, won on bob of heads.
3Ls back in midfield early on (more prominent than normal), 4Ls back in 7th off final bend, one-paced on the run-in.
Never travelled very well, about 6Ls off pace in 8th or so until home turn when hard ridden, no impression.
Prominent early on, 4Ls back in 3rd on fence from 800 M to home turn, very one-paced from then on.
Midfield between 4Ls and 6Ls off speed from 1200 M to home turn, stayed on fairly for a moderate 3rd.
Checked at start, in rear throughout and never better than 8Ls off speed at any stage.
Dipped exiting gates, sent on to lead by 2Ls on fence at 1000 M, kicked 3Ls clear before turning for home, soon well in command.
Settled about 5th place about 5Ls off pace until home turn, had every chance of a place but faded inside final 150 M.
Midfield about 6Ls off pace at 1000 M, pushed out 3-wide no cover at 700 M, 4-wide turning for home, made some minor late ground but not enough to place.
Slowly away, bumped at 1200 M, sent on to race in 3rd at 600 M when over 3Ls back in 6th, plugged on at same pace in home straight.
Got well back near rear about 8Ls off speed at 1000 M, 6Ls down in 8th or so taking home turn, ran on best of the rest but had no chance with winner.
Kicked on from wide gate to lead on fence at 1300 M but soon headed and a clear 2nd until home turn, totally capitulated in homestretch.
Always worse than midfield at least 7Ls off pace and pretty tepid overall.
Always caught 3-wide no cover in rear group at least 6Ls from the speed, very tired inside final 400 M and eased late.
Eased back as usual, 5 lengths off pace, not suited by the slow pace, trapped 3-4 wide, made some ground from 700 M, but no dash in straight.
Awkwardly away, hard ridden to keep up with the field but on heels when passing the winning post for the first time, 4 lengths behind the leader, two wide throughout the race, closed well last 200 M.
Pushed to get across the field and lead by 1 length along the rail, overhauled 600 M, ran on until 150 M but produced flat finish.
Hard ridden early but failed to get across, about 2 lengths behind the leader, trapped 3 wide throughout the race, weakened quickly 400 M.
Hard ridden throughout the race, trapped 3 wide about midfield in the first half mile, moved up 800 M, took lead 600 M then moved towards the rail, hung on to win.
Settled nicely 2 lengths behind the leader in box seat, helped by the rail-run but no turn of foot in straight.
Eased 5 lengths off pace along the rail, swept towards the middle of the track in straight, dashed strongly at 200 M for 3rd.
Eased towards the rear, about 6-1/2Ls off pace, travelled 2-wide at the home bend, little dash along the rail in straight, lack of room at 100 M.
Travelled just behind the leader and two wide throughout the race, ran on strongly for 2nd.
Pushed early to sit just in front of midfield, travelled one wide throughout the race, finished well last 200 M
Pushed forward to get across the rail, then eased 3-1/2 lengths off pace, lack room 300 M, little dash.
Very slow away, at rear more than 9 lengths off pace along the rail, not suited by the slow pace, ran on ok in final stages.
Squeezed out to rear early. Trailed the field to 500 M. Went widest turning for home. Made moderate progress under pressure down centre of straight.
Soon took up running and attempted to make all. Swamped when finding no extra passing 200 M.
In rear of straight. Kept on same pace past beaten horses in the run home.
Chased leader to straight. Gradually weakened.
Never far off in 4th place to straight. Kept on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Broke well but trapped racing wide from poor draw in 6th in better than midfield. Dropped out around home bend.
Mostly around midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend gaining 4th into straight. Fought on steadily under pressure to narrowly miss a placing.
Broke well. Gradually settled wide in 5th in better than midfield. Lost position turning in and folded up quickly. (Mucus.)
Towards rear. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Settled on rails in 3rd not far off the leader. Came to challenge upon straightening and hit front 200 M out. Hung on well to finish.
Around midfield most of way. Kept on well in straight.
Settled towards rear on rails. Gradually shifted out for clear running early in straight and finished off race well down centre of track.

Standard to begin, assumed position worse than midfield on rails 4-5Ls from leaders, not asked in mid-section, trailed eventual winner on bend, in traffic turning in and closed well until checked badly at 100 M. Unlucky.

Began well, pressed forward to take up spot outside leader, had cover from mid-point but tended to overrace a touch, eased 3-wide on bend, run ended at 200 M and only battled to line. (Blood in trachea.)

Broke with them, lacked speed and drifted back to midfield, raced 2-wide 4Ls from front runners, no work to do to bend, in traffic turning in, closed race off steadily towards inside to be closest on line.

Average to begin, rushed along to take closer order, raced closer than usual in 1 out 1 back slot, shuffled back to be 3Ls down on bend, switched out in straight and closed steadily without threatening.

Awkward to begin and was hampered shortly after taken back to rear, raced 2-wide 6Ls from pace, lobbed along at tail throughout, still well back on bend, made run between horses and closed off hard making many lengths late.
Fast into stride, pushed along to assume expected role as front runner, dictated terms to mid-point, pressured and upped tempo to turn, kicked strongly 2Ls clear to 100 M but was overhauled late.

Began with rest, ridden along to hold spot 3Ls back on rails closer than usual, enjoyed easy trip in mid-section, tracked well to turn, stuck to rails and came with strong run to hit lead at 100 M and score overdue win.

Fair beginning, used up a bit to press forward, eventually crossed to race outside leaders girth at mid-point, continued to apply pressure thereafter, struggling on bend, workload took toll and weakened out late.

Standard to leave gates, restrained early to slot in worse than midfield raced 2 to 3-wide 5Ls away with cover, always working wide throughout, kept improving and came 4-wide into straight, one-paced to line.
Jumped with line, pressed on from wide gate but unable to slot in, posted 3-wide without cover 3Ls away, always working wide to bend, struggling turning in and weakened out after hard run.

Tardy to begin, took up usual spot near rear, raced on rails 6-7Ls, little required in middle stages, well back with field to beat on bend, made run between runners, didn't see a lot of daylight but closed only fairly regardless.
First to hit ground, pressed on to secure a position behind leader, enjoyed run of race thereafter, urged along on circle, run presented on turning but only laboured at same pace in run to line.
Tardy to begin, niggled along and regathered to take up spot 3Ls back on rails, on bit in mid-section, saved ground on bend and kept to inside in straight, made little impression in straight.

Jumped well enough, drifted back towards rear from wide alley, raced 2 wide 7Ls off pace in mid-section, tracked 3 wide on bend, still well back turning in, closed off only moderately down centre of track.

Jumped with line, faded back to tail from awkward draw, race 7Ls from pace on rails, improved 2 wide between horses, clear run presented at 300 M but unable to find another gear and struggled away to finish.

Average to begin, slotted in to midfield role 5Ls away on rails, proved difficult to settle and angled 2 wide on bend, in traffic on straightening and made some headway when clear but never really threatened.

Fair to begin, showed good early toe to hold prominent spot, raced 1 out 1 back having good run, travelled well on turn, struggled to find dash when run presented and simply closed at same pace to line.

Showed speed from gates, pressed on to take up position outside of leader, pressured leader with slow pace set, niggled along turning in, gave ground quickly in straight and weakened right out to be well beaten.

Slow to begin, lost ground when crowded, settled wide further back than usual near last 8Ls away, lobbed along at tail to bend, angled wide turning in, sprinted hard down middle to gather them in from the 200 M for solid win.
Broke nicely from wide alley, unable to slot in and restrained to midfield to find cover, raced 3 wide 3Ls down, enjoyed nice trail to straight, there to 200 M but weakened out late. (Bled.)

Standard break, mustered speed to hold leaders back, had run of race using nothing in trail, on bridle approaching turn, stuck to rails in straight and stuck to task well just lacking turn of foot to threaten.

Standard to begin, hard ridden to drive up and take lead, pressured in front but dictated terms to turn, 1/2L clear on turning, booted strongly at 300 M and looked the winner until last 50 M when overhauled.

Began well, urged along to press forward, posted 3 wide without cover, always working in mid-section and moved up to challenge turning in, threatened leader to 200 M but run ended late when workload took toll.

Began with them, faded back to settle worse than midfield, raced 2 wide 5Ls away, unbalanced and came 3 wide out 700 M, back between horses turning in, held up to 250 M, closed off well when clear to be nearest on line.
Began with them, took trail behind early speed, raced 2 wide 3Ls away between horses, not asked in mid-section, in traffic to 300 M, did nothing when clear running presented and plugged to line.

Fast into stride, couldn't go on and drifted back behind midfield from a wide alley, posted 3 wide with cover 5Ls down, forced 4 wide without cover on bend, close enough on turning in but showed only a one-paced effort to line.
Settled on the back of the front markers. Shifted out abruptly after straightening but once rebalanced picked up well to win.
Tracked the leader throughout but overhauled near the 300 M.
Raced just behind midfield along the rail, found little in the straight.
Settled near the rear of the field, on the fence, struggled in the straight.
Severely checked whilst in a rearward position, never recovered.
Settled just behind midfield, 1 off with cover, shifted out after the 500 M to improve but failed to capitalise and was disappointing.
Also parked just off the speed, 2 deep without cover, found the lead after the 400 M, hung in over the last 200 M, which didn't help its cause.
Raced handy, along the fence, stayed on one speed in the run home.
Ran on gamely after also settling near last. Green when under pressure over the latter stages.
Ran on well in the straight whilst hanging in, after settling near last.
Sat around midfield, 1 off with cover, under pressure after the 600 M to stay in touch, didn't close off.
Set a solid tempo in front while racing keenly. But faded close to home.
Midfield early stages. Crept closer to the lead after midway point but found no extra to contend with principals in the closing stages.
Jumped sideways, lost considerable amount of ground and trailed field. Remained in rear section and was blocked for a run at the 200 M. Kept on without threatening thereafter.
Led until being headed final 200 M. Stayed on fairly and held on for a minor placing.
Kept within 2Ls of leader. Tired and dropped out final 300 M.
Pushed along to keep pace at midfield. Remained running on same pace over the concluding stages.
Niggled along to stay behind the pace early stages. Had trouble keeping up halfway through and weakened closing stages.
Raced along the outside rails and was no more than 2Ls off the pace. Responded well when asked at 300 M and swept past the leaders at 200 M.
Raced in rear section. Only ran past beaten runners in the final stages.
Off slowly and raced towards the rear. Became unbalanced and was eased down at the 400 M. (Lame.)
Kept pace behind the leader. Had the lead briefly final 200 M but unable to hold off the winner final stages.
Settled at midfield and kept within 3Ls of the leader. Lacked the needed response when asked at 400 M and ran on same pace to the line.
Raced in rear section. Kept same pace and ran past a few tiring runners closing stages.
Always well placed, 2-wide and 2Ls back in 3rd at halfway, 1L down in 3rd at top of homestretch and led at 300 M, soon headed by winner and did just enough to hang onto 2nd.
Nudged along at halfway 3-back on fence when 4Ls down in mid-division, a little closer taking home turn, stayed on fairly well for a place.
Always in rear, 3-wide with cover early on at least 10Ls off pace, never got involved.
Awkward break, always 3-wide no cover, 3Ls off speed in 6th at 1200 M, off the bridle and losing ground taking home turn, weakened right out.
Led early on fence, shared the lead going a good clip from 1200 M to home turn, headed 300 M out and dropped out rapidly.
Disputed early speed out wide, 2-wide and still right there from 800 M to home turn when hard ridden to lie up, faded out gradually.
8Ls down in 11th at 1000 M, 6Ls back in same position when 4-wide turning for home, minor late headway past some tired rivals.
10Ls behind speed in rear bunch through first half, not much closer and struggling at 600 M, never on terms. (Lame.)
6Ls back in 10th when 2-wide at 1000 M, driven along and not making much impression off home turn, battled on at same pace for a remote 4th.
2-wide and 4Ls back in midfield at 1200 M, niggled along on the circle but slipped back 5Ls off pace taking home turn, never dangerous thereafter.
A little keen early on when 3Ls back in 6th, struggling to lie up at top of homestretch and soon beaten.
Slowly away, one from rear about 10Ls off pace at 1200 M, 8Ls behind at home turn, never looked like finishing better than midfield.
Had the box-seat run on fence 2Ls off speed in 3rd from 1200 M to home straight entrance, petered out very tamely given his soft passage.
Settled 6Ls off pace in 9th on fence at 1000 M, edged a little closer off final bend, driven along to lead 200 M out, ran on well for comfortable win.
Eased to the rear, raced 4 wide 8Ls behind the leader, not suited by the speed, little dash in straight.
Eased to get across the rail at the rear, 8Ls off pace, blocked most straight, dashed strongly late, improving but still green.
Raced 5 to 6Ls behind the leader along the rail, checked 800 M, little dash in straight.
Eased at back for cover, 6 to 7Ls off pace, 3 wide, dashed home strongly last 250 M despite pace being against.

Prominent early, checked badly at 800 M and lost approximately 2Ls, 4Ls off pace along the rail when entering the home straight, blocked 400 M, dashed well to the line when clear for 2nd, just missed win.
Hard ridden to get across in front of the main bunch, 2 to 3Ls off the pace racing keenly 2 wide, weakened quickly 300 M.
Hard ridden early but soon eased behind the leaders for cover, however still raced very keenly and checked at 800 M, 2 to 3Ls off pace when entering the home straight, flattened out at 300 M.
Eased to sit about midfield, checked badly 800 M and approximately lost 3Ls, 6Ls behind the leader when entering the home straight, ran on OK.
Eased to sit 3 to 4Ls behind the leader, 3 to 4 wide and no cover throughout the race but travelled quite well, dashed well 250 M to finish 3rd, improving.
Bumped after start, 5 to 6Ls off pace, 4 wide throughout the race, ran on OK in straight.
Hard ridden to lead by 1/2L along the rail, ran on until 250 M, flat finish.
Eased back, 5 to 6Ls behind the leaders, raced keenly as usual, 3 wide at the home bend, dashed strongly 300 M.
Eased to sit outside the leader, no cover, led 300 M, ran on until 150 M, overhauled late.
Very slow away, pushed to sit 4Ls behind the leader, 2 wide at the home bend, blocked 400 M to 200 M, dashed well to win by a very narrow margin.
Raced 3-wide in prominent position to straight. Gradually weakened under pressure.
Raced wide towards rear. Weakened upon straightening.
Disputing 5th some 2Ls off the pace when badly checked passing 1100 M. Remained 2-wide in 6th rounding home bend. Fought on steadily in straight without threatening.
Settled in worse than midfield on rails. Shaken up early in straight and produced good late impression after shifting off rails for clear run over 100 M out.
Waited with. Obtained clear passage about 300 M out and ran on well down centre of track to hit front 100 M out only to be pipped at post.
Raced around midfield. Baulked for a run 200 M out. Kept on well to the line.
Well there on rails and soon took up running. Narrowly headed into straight but quickly regained advantage. Held 1L break before weakened abruptly over 150 M out. (Blood in trachea.)
Settled at the back. Given reminders turning in. Finished off race strongly nearer outside rails to snatch victory final strides.
Midfield on rails early. Gradually improved to just off the pace coming out of back straight. Just kept on steadily at the one pace in the run home.
Raced wide towards rear. Ran on steadily down centre of straight without threatening.
Raced 3-wide with cover in forward of midfield to straight. Dropped out.
Settled on rails in forward of midfield. Some 3Ls 7th turning in and soon obtained run upon straightening. Fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Travelled one out one back to straight. Found nothing under pressure and overhauled 200 M out.
Ridden along. Mostly disputed lead outside leader far side and early part of home bend. Hit front approaching straight but had no more to give 200 M out. Soon swamped.

Average to leave gates, regathered to be prominent early, raced first outside leader 2Ls back, improved to be 1L down on turn, came with strong run to briefly hit lead at 200 M, couldn't match first two late.

Began with rest, went on in search of lead, forced to race 3 wide without cover when unable to cross, set task 3 wide throughout 2Ls away without cover, there turning in but faded from 300 M after a hard run.

Tardy to begin, took up usual position towards rear, raced on rails 7 to 8Ls from pace, not asked in mid-section, had field to beat on turn, stuck to inside and shifted between horses at 200 M, closed hard when clear to just miss.

Even break, showed speed to challenge for lead, handed up front to race behind leader, proved difficult to settle in mid-section, close enough on turning in but offered nothing when pressure was applied. (Respiratory noise.)

Slow to break, assumed usual role behind midfield, raced 2 wide 6 to 7Ls from front runners, peeled 3 wide on bend, well back turning in, closed race off fairly down middle of track to be closest at finish.

Average to begin, drifted back to last, raced 2 wide 8Ls back in mid-section, made run 3 wide on circle, came 4 wide awkwardly on turning in, lacked usual finishing burst closing race off only moderately down middle.

Slowly into stride, settled worse than midfield on rails 6Ls off pace, had easy time spending little to bend, made run between horses on straightening, steadily made ground in straight without threatening to make frame.

Began well, prominent early before taking a trail in midfield, shuffled back to be 2 wide 5Ls away at midpoint, shifted wider on bend, came to middle of track and closed steadily at the same pace to finish.
First to hit ground, pressed on from wide alley using plenty to find front, kept rolling 1L clear on bend, kicked strongly to 250 M but folded when pressured and weakened from that point.

Began with line, drifted back to midfield, raced on rails 4 to 5Ls down in middle stages, saved ground on bend, kept to inside in straight, closed off evenly but lacked usual finishing burst to make impression.

Standard break, pushed on early taking trail behind speed, raced 3Ls back on rails, enjoyed soft run to bend, angled wide turning and in traffic to 250 M, sprinted sharply when clear doing too well to hold off late challenge.

Showed good speed from break, eased when unable to cross to running line, posted 3 wide 3Ls back in midfield, always working with cover, eased 4 wide into straight but didn't go on with it in straight.
Settled wide towards rear. Trailed the field turning in. Made up good ground down centre of straight to do best work at finish.
Raced 3-wide in midfield to straight. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Disputed lead on rails to straight. Found no extra inside final 200 M and soon swamped.
Never far off in 4th. Behind leaders turning in and slightly baulked early on. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Mainly in midfield. Faded under pressure inside final 200 M.
Settled in last few. Made steady headway down centre of straight without threatening.
Travelled on rails in midfield. Gained closer on rails turning in. Found nothing inside final 300 M.
Settled in last few. Ran on well under pressure down outside of straight to claim victory by the narrowest of margins.
Settled mainly 3-wide in 3rd to straight. One-paced before folded up quickly inside final 200 M.
Trailed the field into straight. Made steady headway past beaten horses.
Never far off, in 5th within 2Ls of pace turning in. Responded well under pressure and hit front over 250 M out only to be pipped at post.
Held slender lead one off the rail. Headed when one-paced over 200 M out and gradually weakened under pressure.
Settled behind midfield. Did not have a clear run early in straight. Ran on well inside final 200 M to miss narrowly.
Raced wide just better than midfield in 6th. Gave ground steadily under pressure from midfield into straight.

Jumped with rest, drifted back to settle just off midfield, raced 2 wide 6Ls away in mid-section, came 3 wide on bend, gave a start on turning in but stuck on gamely down middle of track to make frame.

Got head up on jumping and soon towards rear 7Ls away on rails, not asked in mid-section, well back but travelling on bend, closed steadily along rails in straight before obtaining gap at 200 M, quickly accelerated to score nicely.

Fast into stride, pressed on from wide alley, used plenty to find top end, kept rolling 1L clear on bend, challenged on turning in, kept giving in straight and there until 100 M but couldn't sustain effort late.

Broke in line, allowed to slot in behind pace, raced 2 wide 3Ls back in 1 out 1 back position, enjoyed nice trail throughout, came 3 wide turning in, threatened to 200 M but run ended and kept on same pace to line.
Even jump, allowed to relax in midfield, raced 2 wide 5Ls from frontrunners, not asked in mid-section, came 4 wide on bend, lacked a finishing sprint in straight and simply plugged away to line.

Average jump, restrained towards rear from wide gate, raced 9Ls away at back of pack, came 3 wide on circle, had job to do on turning in, made plenty of ground from impossible spot to be nearest on line.

Lost ground when bumped shortly after start, raced at tail thereafter 9Ls back on rails, had easy time in mid-section, saved ground on bend and kept to rails in straight, did best work late before steadied near line. Fair debut.

Improved break, allowed to stride forward to hold leaders back early, 3Ls back on fence thereafter, travelled strongly on turn, angled out but run never really presented and only into clear when race was over.

Average to begin, lacked early speed and settled worse than midfield, raced 2 wide 8Ls off pace, not asked in middle stages, back in traffic turning in, only really got going late and made up plenty of ground last 200 M.

Even break, drifted back from awkward alley, forced to race 3 wide without cover 7Ls away in rear section, always well back to turn, angled 4 wide and made run down centre steadily closing to be nearest on line.

Standard to leave gates, didn't display early speed took up position in midfield on rails 6Ls away, had quiet trip to turn, came 2 wide between horses at 400 M, amongst horses throughout straight but never really went up a gear.

Began with line, allowed to stride forward to take up prominent position, raced first outside leader 2Ls away, at leader's girth on bend and challenged strongly turning in, kicked hard and lead until overhauled at 100 M.

First to hit ground, showed natural speed to cross to rail, took trail when challenged and raced behind leader from midpoint, on bridle to turn, angled into clear running but couldn't make impression and battled last 200 M.
Well enough to begin, camped behind speed 4Ls back on rails, not asked in mid-section, angled 2 wide on bend, into clear at 400 M, steadily closed down centre of track but found winner too good.
Always close-up in 2nd place 2-wide about 1L off pace until the 600 M, sent on to lead at top of homestretch, 1L clear at 200 M, stayed on gamely for pressure to just hold a break.
Anchored about 6Ls off pace in rear bunch on fence through to home straight, always well held.
2-wide and 3Ls back in midfield at 1200 M, moved 2Ls back in 5th turning for home and same margin behind at 200 M, dug in well late but always just held by DISGUISE.
Prominent early on, left 3-wide no cover from 1000 M when about 2Ls back in 4th, 1L down in 3rd entering straight, failed to quicken and beaten 200 M out.
Slowly away, switched from widest gate to fence and settled 8Ls off speed at halfwaym, ran on quite well in stretch to be nearest at finish.
Fractious in gates, bumped at start, soon 7Ls off pace in rear, same margin behind and 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home, well beaten.
Led out 3-wide no cover at 1300 M to lead on fence at 1200 M, headed at 1000 M into box-seat position 2Ls back in 3rd, under pressure entering home straight, faded out.
Slowly away, 6Ls off pace in 10th on fence at 1200 M, moved out 3-wide on straightening 4Ls off pace, just over 1L down in 3rd and distinct quinella hopes at 200 M, no extra.
3-back on fence early, 4-back on fence about 4Ls off speed in midfield at halfway, not going too well swinging for home, well outpaced.
4Ls back in 8th and 2-wide at 1200 M, 3Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover from 800 M to home turn, one-paced thereafter.
Led early on, opted to hand up at 1200 M and shuffled back to 3-back on fence 4Ls off pace in midfield from 1000 M to home turn, shifted left to clear running 250 M out.
6Ls back in 9th when 3-wide with cover, forced 4-wide (widest) without cover on the circle, 6Ls behind and towards rear turning for home, no impression.
4-wide no cover at 1200 M, pressed on to lead on fence by 1L from 1000 M to 600 M, headed at top of home straight and faded inside final 200 M.
Settled just off the pace in 2nd one out one back. Came to challenge upon straightening hitting front under pressure just inside 200 M. Just held on to the line.
Raced in 5th on rails just better than midfield before forced to steady 600 M out. About midfield turning in but could only keep on at the one pace under pressure.
Crowded at start. Quickly recovered from rear to be 4th within 2Ls of pace coming out of back straight, however, made home bend awkwardly and found nothing in straight.
Jumped with field but squeezed and unbalanced, dropping to tail-end. Trailed the field into straight and ran on past beaten horses near finish.
Raced wide behind midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend gaining 5th into straight. Ran home one-paced.
Settled mainly just off the pace in 3rd on rails. Moved as close as half a length of leader passing 200 M but unable to sustain effort nearing finish.
Soon took up running and led field until narrowly headed inside 200 M. Fought on gamely to just fail to peg back winner.

Niggled along to keep with pace in 4th after beginning from poor draw, racing 3-wide before home bend. Held similar position turning in despite dropped to 5th rounding home bend. Fought on steadily at the one pace in home straight.
Just in rear of midfield before hampered and lost position approaching home bend. Found nothing under pressure from towards rear into straight.
Around midfield before lost position in scrimmaging approaching home bend. Towards rear turning in and made up some late ground inside final 200 M.
Raced in last few. Shifted widest into home turn. Made some late impression down centre of straight closing stages.
Crowded at start. Raced wide in rear to straight. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Parked outside the leader, gave in after the 300 M.
Settled near the rear of the field, along the fence, struggled in the straight.
Raced near the rear of the field, along the fence, made some impression in the run home.
Slow to begin, settled slightly worse than midfield, one-paced in the closing stages.
Slow to begin. Settled just behind midfield, 1 off with cover, ran into traffic problems near the 200 M when making a late surge.
Raced 1 out 1 back, stayed on dourly.
From an outside barrier, was taken across behind runners. Settled in last position, never passed another runner.
Made every post a winner, drew away close to home, won easily.
Settled 3 back along the fence, shifted around the front runners on straightening, ran on modestly.
Raced midfield, 1 off had cover. Faded in the run to the post.
Camped behind the leader, one-paced in the straight when under pressure.
Slow to begin, settled in second last place, 1 off with cover, ran on solidly.

Best out and led early stages. Handed up the lead at 800 M and settled behind the leader. Responded well when asked on straightening and steadily closed in on the early leader in the straight. Missed by a short-head.
Settled behind midfield. Steadily made up ground in the straight and was closest at finish.
Settled behind midfield. Hugged the rails rounding the turn and only kept same pace in the straight.
Off slowly and raced 2-wide at midfield. Lacked a quickening pace on straightening and gradually faded.
Jumped slowly and trailed field into home straight. Made a late dash past beaten runners.
3-wide in a forward position before the turn. 2-wide and 3Ls behind the pace in 3rd rounding the turn. Unable to keep pace after straightening and steadily dropped out.
Ridden along out of the gates but was outpaced by leaders. Steadily regressed to a rearward position and was near last on straightening. Made up some late ground.
Among leaders early before taking sole possession of the lead after 800 M. Opened up a 3Ls advantage at the home turn and kept on gamely in the final stages to deny rival.
Botched the start but soon recovered to settle in a prominent spot behind the leaders. Midfield and raced along the rails making the turn. Kept on fairly in the straight for a distant 3rd.
Slowly away and driven along early; always no better than midfield and at least 4Ls from the pace; posed no great threat in homestretch.
