Shared last place about 9Ls off pace early; 8Ls back one from rear turning for home; never on terms.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1000 M; 3Ls down in 5th turning for home; plugged on fairly well to nick 3rd in final strides.
Another flat effort; didn't break well; 6Ls behind in 10th early on; never got any closer.
4Ls back in 7th when 2-wide early; much the same turning for home; failed to produce any kind of acceleration.
Led by a neck at 1000 M on fence; similar margin to the good before being headed by winner 150 M out; well clear of 3rd place.
3-wide no cover throughout; about 3Ls off speed in midfield until home turn; tired late.
3-back on fence in midfield about 3Ls off the pace until home turn; soon outpaced.
Away well from widest gate; over-raced a little early on; about a neck down in 2nd out 2-wide from 1000 M to home turn one-paced in home straight and lost a place final strides.
Had the box seat run on fence 2Ls off speed in 3rd until skipping past leader on the inside 150 M out and driven out to score readily.
Slowest away; always well back about 9Ls last early; struggling at 600 M; always well detached.
Awkward break; raced 3-wide with cover 4Ls back in 9th at 800 M; same turning for home; failed to quicken up sufficiently.
Ideally placed on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1000 M to 600 M when niggled along; kept on to lead 150 M out but no extra when nabbed by winner 40 M out.
Always at least 3-wide without cover; 4Ls back off pace around midfield until home turn; kept on at same pace until home turn.
Always one from rear until home turn about 8Ls off speed; ran on past a few tired rivals late.
Slow to begin; about 5Ls off pace in midfield until home turn; found nothing off the bridle.
1L back in 2nd until home turn; one-paced in homestretch.
Slow away; towards rear about 6Ls from the front until home turn; no impression from top of home turn.
Soon led on fence; enjoyed a very slow tempo in front from 1300 M to home turn; headed 150 M out and nudged out of the money.
Crossed from wide gate to fence and settled 5-back in rear about 6Ls off pace; 5Ls down turning for home; dug in well to overhaul 8 rivals in homestretch and lead about 40 M out.
In rear at 1300 M; still 8Ls last turning for home; made some moderate late ground.
3-back on fence at 1000 M when 4Ls back in 5th; niggled along at 700 M; responded well and just 1L down in 4th at 200 M; just missed out on a place.
About 4Ls or 5Ls back in midfield or slightly worse until home turn; ran on fairly well late to nick a place on the line.
Caught 3-wide no cover early; got in 2-wide 3Ls off pace in 4th from 800 M to home turn; weakened out very rapidly.
Hard ridden to get across the rail and battle for the lead, pressured throughout and raced keenly, weakened from 250 M.
Eased towards the rear as usual, raced 7.5Ls off pace, on the rail most of time, swept forward 4-wide before straightening, made ground only to 200 M.
Pushed early, lacked early speed, raced 6Ls behind the leaders 2-wide throughout, ran on okay from well back in straight.
Hard ridden to keep up just behind the front runners early secured rails run 3Ls off pace, progressed steadily in straight to finish 3rd.
Pushed early but failed to take prominent spot as it did in last victory, 3Ls off pace racing 2-wide throughout, on heels 400 M and 300 M, faded in straight.
Eased to get across towards rear, 7.5Ls off pace 2 wide at stable bend, moved up 500 M around the field, 3 to 4-wide, flattened out at 250 M.
Settled 4.5Ls behind the leaders along the rail, travelled well, swept to middle of track 250 M and dashed well for 2nd, just missed win.
Lacked early speed, 6Ls off pace along rail, lack room 300 M, made ground when clear.
Hard ridden to take a prominent rail spot, 1.5Ls behind the leaders, led 250 M, hung on strongly to win by a very narrow margin.
Eased to sit about midfield, raced 4.5Ls off pace 2 wide most of time, progressed steadily 400 M, forced to travel 4-wide before straightening, flattened out in last few strides.
Pushed to battle for the lead, kept pressuring 2-wide in front throughout racing keenly, dropped off quickly from 500 M.
Very slow away, hard ridden to go forward, 1.5Ls behind the leaders 2-wide throughout racing keenly, dropped off quickly from 500 M, checked 300 M.
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Always prominent. Plugged on under pressure for remote 2nd. (Lame next morning.)
Midfield early. Steadied and dropped to last few approaching 1200 M bend. Remained rear into straight. Sustained steady headway down straight.
Settled in rear. Went widest home turn. Fought on well under pressure down centre of straight. Did best work at finish.
Soon took up running and made all. Drew clear in straight to win unchallenged.
Sluggish at start. Gradually picked up along rails to rear of midfield. Mid-division turning in. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Raced mainly 4-wide in forward of midfield. In similar position entering straight then gradually faded.
Rear of midfield to Rock, then gave ground gradually.
Raced keenly in forward of midfield until faded out of contention passing Rock.
Never far off to straight. Gradually weakened.
Chased leader to straight. Found no extra under pressure.
Well back. Made up ground past beaten runners inside final 200 M.

Jumped nicely, allowed to stride forward to take up lead, dictated terms 1L clear before slowing to a crawl in mid-section, lost front and tracked leader on bend, hard ridden turning in, kept giving along rails to hold place.

Slow to begin, immediately at rear, raced 5Ls back on rails, not asked in mid-section, overraced with slow pace to bend, searching for run and behind tired horses turning in, held up to 200 M and flew late when clear. Unlucky.

Jumped well enough, allowed to relax in midfield role, raced 2-wide 4Ls from leaders, didn't settle, forced 3-wide with cover in mid-section, struggling when pace improved on turn, plugged away in straight. (No room late.)

Handy to begin, slotted in nicely on rails, had easy trail 3Ls back, angled 2-wide in mid-section, challenged at leaders girth on bend, tried hard to match winner grinding away but beaten by better horse.

Broke with them, taken back to slot in near rear, raced in running line 5-6Ls from leader, made ground to be 4Ls back passing Rock, couldn't go up a gear and was one-paced in run to line, tight for room late.

Began with rest, ridden to go forward, crossed to race outside leader leaving straight, raced 2Ls back before rolling on when pace slowed to take control at Rock, kicked strongly on bend, defied them in straight to score well.
With them from gates, held spot on rails in midfield 4Ls, had easy time but did overrace with slow speed, steadied leaving turn, couldn't quicken in time turning in and simply plugged away to line.

Average to leave gates, restrained to near last, raced on rails 6Ls away unsuited by slow tempo in front, still had field in front at Rock and circled 3 and 4-wide turning in, made some ground down middle without threatening.

Average to jump, allowed to slide back from wide alley, lobbed along at tail 2-wide 6Ls back in middle stages, in traffic turning and run closed at 200 M, not in it thereafter but wasn't ever really likely.
Began well, showed speed to cross to rails and assume prominent spot, raced behind leader on rails in mid-section but shuffled back passing Rock, angled out on turning but couldn't peg back margin.

Even break, ridden up to be 1 out 1 back early, 2-wide 3Ls down at mid-point but forced 3-wide without cover when pace slowed, pressed on to challenge 1L back on bend, couldn't sprint with them and was one-paced last 100 M.
Fast to begin, up there vying for early lead, trailed 3 wide 2Ls back with cover in mid-section, under pressure on bend, found nothing when asked and weakened right out in straight.

Even break, faded back from awkward alley, raced 4 wide worse than midfield 5Ls back, made ground working wide to bend, under pressure turning in, made little impression in straight plugging away to line.

Standard to leave gates, couldn't keep touch early, raced 5 to 6Ls back on rails, lobbed along at tail to turn, kept to rails in straight but couldn't go up a gear and only passed tired runners in run to line.

Broke with rest, ridden along to take up prominent spot outside leader, raced at leader's girth working with pressure applied by outside horse, under pressure on turning in, laboured in straight weakening out late.

Began nicely, showed good dash to challenge for early lead, took trail after 300 M, had run in behind leader to bend, lost touch at top of straight but stuck on gamely pegging back some ground late. No match for first two.
Standard break, ridden up to assume position just off speed, had dream run 1 out 1 back in mid-section, 2Ls back on bend, angled wide in straight and briefly threatened before run ended at 200 M.

Slowly into stride, ridden along to keep in touch, raced 3 wide 4Ls away with cover, amongst horses covering ground in mid-section, had job to do on bend, struggled to accelerate in straight and plodded to line.

Slow to begin, urged along to hold spot on rails 3Ls off lead, had easy time in middle stages, travelled well on bend, stuck to rails in straight, closed race off fairly at same speed without threatening.

Broke in line, pressed on from wide alley, caught 3 wide without cover, applied pressure in mid-section to bend them in mid-section (still wide), kept on turning in but workload told and run ended at 200 M.

Fast to jump, posted wide from outside alley, raced 3 to 4 wide at tail 5 to 6Ls back, well back on bend, angled wide on turning in, finished race off steadily down middle of track to be closest at finish. Trip too short.

Slowly away, ridden along to take closer order, raced further back than last start 2 wide 4Ls back in midfield, travelled well making ground on bend, had to switch out and ran on despite hanging. Solid effort giving too much start.

Jumped with rest, urged along to press forward and take up running, challenged throughout and set even tempo, ridden along and kicked strongly on turning in, held advantage in straight to secure strong win.
Led at a good tempo, weakened after being challenged turning for home.
Tracked wide throughout, always around midfield without cover, struggled in the straight.
Raced midfield along the fence, stayed on one paced in the straight.
Tracked the leader, 3 parts of a length to be outside, took the lead early in the straight but overhauled soon after.
Ridden vigorously early from a wide gate, settled midfield 1 off with cover, never likely.
Raced just off the speed 3 wide without cover, faded in the latter stages.
Parked along the fence behind the leaders, commenced to tire near the 400 M.
Parked behind the winner, just off midfield 3 wide, didn't sprint as quickly turning for home but found the line well.
Raced ungenerously early, settled towards the rear of the field along the rail, made steady ground after the 400 M.
Settled in last position, worked to the post satisfactorily.
Raced back in the field early, by the 800 M had taken up a midfield position 3 wide with cover, kicked entering the straight, kept on strongly.
Outpaced and raced in rear section. Trailed field into home straight and made no impression thereafter.
Travelled 3-wide behind midfield. Never quickened on straightening and stayed on same pace to the finish.
Soon trailed field. Detached from main field rounding the turn. Quickened and made up ground in the straight.
Behind leaders in early stages. Raced along the fence at midfield at the home turn. Quickened after straightening and took control final 100 M.
Raced wide in rear section. Made up a lot of ground at the turn and kept on well in the straight to claim a minor placing.
Missed the jump and raced in rear section early stages. Improved to be near midfield at the turn. Held up in the early part of the straight but closed the race off well once in the clear.
Led or disputed lead after 1000 M. Took a slim advantage into home straight but was headed at 250 M. Unable to find more to stay in contention final stages.
Led briefly in the early stages before taking a sit behind the leaders after 800 M. Kept on only fairly after straightening and was not able to gain any ground.
Ridden along to stay behind pacesetters in early stages. Unable to keep pace middle stages and was 4Ls behind the leader making the turn. Remained one-paced in the straight.
Best out but raced 3-wide in a disputed lead. Hung out making home turn. Weakened and dropped out quickly after straightening.

Slowly away but soon recovered to race behind leaders. Improved at the turn and was a neck down turning in. Took the lead near 200 M and seemed to be in control. Unable to sustain effort and was headed final 100 M.
Disputed early lead, appeared to wobble when about to be headed 400 M out, no extra late and lost out on quinella final 50 M.
Niggled along in rear at 700 M down centre of track, never dangerous and only stayed on past a few well beaten ones late.
In midfield about 3Ls off pace at halfway, ran on well late for 2nd but had zero chance with the winner.
Severely checked on stands' rail at 900 M, about 5Ls behind pace in rear until the 300 M, beaten when checked again 200 M out, eased late.
Bumped at start, awkwardly placed at 800 M when close up, within 1L of the speed until 300 M when still with place hopes but faded sharply late.
On pace early, hard ridden to keep up at halfway, lost more ground.
Bumped at start and always wanted to hang out, disputed early pace but back-pedalling at 400 M and lost further ground, performance deemed unacceptable.
Disputed the lead until being under pressure and headed by the winner about 300 M out, kept on at same pace late.
2Ls back in midfield early, struggling to maintain this proximity at the 400 M, tired late.
Never on terms in rear and always at least 4Ls off pace until the 200 M, dropped back further.
Close ot pace and one off the stand's rail early on, hard pressed to lie up at 400 M and faded out.
Lost ground at start, soon recovered to settle close up in midfield, eased to the front 300 M out and drew right away, impressive.
Within 1L of the pace on stands' rail until the 200 M mostly in 5th or 6th, checked 100 M out and well held late.
Awkward head carriage and hung always near rear about 4Ls off pace until the 200 M, weakened.
Crowded at start, 4Ls back in 8th at 1000 M, 4-wide turning for home, ran on to nick a place on the line but took his time doing it.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 3rd at 1200 M, still right there at final bend and at 200 M, ran on fairly and only marginally outstayed.
Keen early and blundered at 1300 M, 5Ls down in 8th or so at 1000 M, without clear running when turning for home, stayed on fairly on fence, nearest at finish.
Couldn't muster much early toe, checked at 1200 M, always without cover in rear about 5Ls or so off speed until homestretch, dropped out.
2Ls back in 2nd on fence at 1200 M, 2Ls back in 4th taking home turn, stayed on at the same pace but still didn't finish far away.
Always at least 6Ls off speed on fence in rear and always struggling.
Disputed pace out 3-wide no cover at 1000 M and 2-wide and on pace from 800 M to final turn, led by a neck at 200 M, no extra late and missed out on a place.
Checked at 1200 M, always at least 5Ls off pace and worse than midfield until home turn, plugged on at same pace.
Unbalanced at 1200 M, sent on 3-wide no cover at 800 M when 1L off pace 3rd and driven along to retain this position taking home turn, faded steadily.
Soon in rear about 8Ls behind, about 6Ls back in 10th taking final bend, never dangerous.
3-back on fence about 4Ls behind in midfield or a bit further back until home turn, very slow in the finish.
Improved effort, led by 2Ls on fence at 1200 M, disputing advantage from 800 M to home straight, still with a winning chance at 50 M and lost a place final strides.
Over-raced in places, with cover about 2Ls back in 6th or so until home turn, dug in well in the straight to lead close home.
Settled 4.5Ls off pace, 2 to 3 wide, dashed well 250 M despite the heavy weights on its back, finished a strong 4th.
Hard ridden to sit 1.5Ls behind the leaders, 3 wide throughout, ran on strongly to the line and finished 2nd, still improving.
Hard ridden to occupy a spot about midfield, 2.5Ls behind the leaders, 2 wide throughout, no progress in straight, flattened 100 M.
Slow away, eased to sit 4Ls off pace, raced keenly as usual, travelled 4 to 5 wide, lost too much ground at the bends, faded in straight.
Pushed to get across in front, settled nicely just outside the leader, kicked away 200 M to win, not fully tested on the dirt track.
Hard ridden to keep up with the leaders, 2Ls off pace along the rail, no turn of foot in straight, flattened 100 M.
Pushed early, failed to keep up with the early tempo, 3.5Ls off pace, trapped 3 to 4 wide, no progress in straight.
Hard ridden to keep up with the main bunch from a good draw, 4Ls off pace along the rails, had every chance to make ground in straight, but no turn of foot, just held ground.
Couldn't keep up with the early pace, 7Ls behind the leaders, 2 wide throughout, made ground 300 M, finished off nicely.
Hard ridden to get across and led by 0.5L along the rail, pressured by the winner throughout, overhauled 250 M, on heels 100 M, just ran on for 3rd.
2Ls off pace, raced 4 wide throughout, used too much fuel at the bends, weakened quickly 500 M.
Raced 3 to 4 wide, on heels 800 M, never competitive at the back.
Raced in rear to straight. Kept on same pace for remote 5th.
Went off the track turning into the back straight. Never recover.
Never far off on rails mainly in 4th. Kept on same pace without quickening down inner of straight.
Held narrow lead before headed into straight. Dropped out.
Not far off in 5th in mid-division of small field. Pulled up turning in. (Blood in trachea.)
In rear of midfield in 6th of small bunched field. Lost position and dropped to last passing halfway mark. Renewed effort turning in and ran on steadily to do best work at finish.
Slightly slow out. Soon crossed to rails and remained towards rear in 7th until angling off the rails for a run approaching straight. Ran on well from 3rd into straight to grab lead 200 M out.
Raced 4-wide in prominent position to home bend. Gradually weakened.
Tracked leader. Hit front turning for home only to be swamped 200 M out.

First to hit ground, showed plenty of speed to take up running, kept them going at good tempo, held 1L advantage on turning, kicked strongly in straight, headed at 200 M but stuck to task gamely to hold place.

Hit ground with them, drifted back to slot in to running line 7Ls back worse than midfield, not asked in mid-section, made ground to bend, switched to middle of track and came with strong run to overhaul them late.

Standard start, lacked early speed, forced to race wide worse than midfield 8Ls from pace, tracked nicely but well back on turning, came to outside and steadily made ground under hands and heels only. (Rider questioned.)

Slowly into stride, niggled along to make up ground, raced on rails 8Ls away behind midfield, gave big start turning in, made up plenty of ground in straight to be closest at finish. Vastly improved effort.

Jumped with field, pressed on to take up prominent spot 1 out 1 back 2 to 3Ls away, tracked well on bend and close enough on turning, made good run threatening until 200 M before running out of gas late.

Standard break, urged along to make up ground and hold leaders back, had run of race 1L back in mid-section, obtained dream split turning in, challenged strongly and took over at 200 M only to be denied late.
Amongst first few to break, did plenty to cross from wide alley to race at leaders girth, kept pace genuine not far away to turn, under pressure on turning, gradually faded out of it from 250 M.
Began in line, not far away early, raced 4Ls back behind speed, carted rest up to them on turn, switched out in straight, lacked usual finishing burst and only closed race off at same pace to line.
Average break, unable to match them early, raced 12Ls back detached from main pack, under hard riding on bend with job to do, didn't quicken but plugged away to get past a few horses late.
Fair break, pushed along but unable to hold prominent spot, drifted back to midfield, 3 wide 6Ls back in mid-section, struggling on bend, found nothing when pressure applied and only battled to line.

Began with field, urged along to hold spot behind speed in midfield, lost ground in mid-section to be 7 to 8Ls back on rails, never really travelling, gradually faded out in straight to be well beaten.
Tardy to begin, soon detached at rear, more than a dozen Ls back on rails throughout, hard pressed on bend, never responded and beaten a long way.
Around midfield. Faded out of contention steadily after straightening.
Travelled wide in last few. Last turning in. Made up ground running past beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Settled on rails in midfield. Shifted out onto centre of straight for a run turning in. Did not make too bad an impression in the run home.
Stalked leader. Hit front turning for home but unable to sustain and swamped 200 M out.
Always well behind and never seen with a chance.
Wide in rear of midfield early. Made rapid progress circling field turning into back straight reaching 3rd halfway out. Folded up quickly over 250 M out.
Never far off the pace on rails. Baulked turning in before obtaining rails run 200 M out. Ran on under pressure to just get up on line.
Raced wide in midfield. Made no show in straight.
Always prominent. Kept on in straight until finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Settled behind midfield. Produced moderate late impression inside final 200 M.
Raced wide in midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Sustained progress to hit front 200 M out only to be pipped at post.
Waited with. Made up good ground between horses down straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in rear of midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Ridden to take up running from wide draw, gradually crossing to rails turning into back straight. Headed approaching 400 M and weakened under pressure.

Jumped fairly and steadied shortly after, settled near tail on rails, raced 6 to 7Ls from front runners, over-raced in mid-section, not asked to bend, in traffic until 250 M and lost momentum, switched out but only held ground to line.
Jumped nicely, slotted in to running line 3 to 4Ls back, raced with wide trail behind speed, worked into race well on bend, eased out in straight, cruised up at 200 M but couldn't match winner late.

Began with rest, drifted back from a wide alley, raced 2 wide worse than midfield 6 to 7Ls back, ridden cold throughout well back behind horses on bend, made run between horses closing steadily without looking likely.

Out with them, didn't have early dash, took up midfield role 5Ls back on rails, enjoyed soft run throughout, in traffic turning in, steadying for run and shifted out at 200 M, closed off sharply when clear.

Left gates quickly, faded back to midfield to slot in to running line, raced 2 wide 5Ls away throughout, spent little to bend, eased to middle of track in straight and did best work late to be closest on line.
Began evenly, soon faded to next to last, raced 2 wide 8Ls away at tail, set off on 3 wide run, improving on bend, under pressure turning in, didn't show any turn of foot and simply plodded to line.

Began well, slotted straight into box seat behind leader, had run of race 1L back on rails, on bridle with plenty to offer on bend, challenged strongly at 300 M and hit lead briefly before condition gave out late.

Bounced out, pressed on from wide alley to race at leaders girth, kept leader honest in mid-section 1/2L down turning in, challenged to 250 M but unable to keep on when they sprinted and lost touch last furlong.

Average break, rushed along to hold spot 3 to 4Ls back on rails, given quiet ride in middle stages, travelled well on bend, kept to rails before gaining split at 250 M, went on with job to draw away at finish for nice win.

Reasonable break, ridden up to take prominent role 1 out 1 back, had easy run 2Ls back, eased 3 wide with something to offer on bend, challenged strongly and right there before run ended at 200 M. Couldn't match them last bit.

Showed speed from gates, pressed on to take up running, rolled along at solid clip 1L clear, dictated terms to turn, pressured on turning in, fought on to 200 M but couldn't find another speed and weakened out late.

Slow to begin, taken in behind to race at rear on rails 8Ls from front runners, not asked in middle stages, had plenty to do switching out on turning, closed off fairly down middle giving too great a start. (Abnormal breathing.)
Raced 3-wide in prominent position until giving ground gradually from 500 M.
Held running to 200 M. Weakened under pressure out of contention.
Raced wide towards rear. Took closer order around Rock. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Raced towards rear on rails. Produced good late impression in closing stages.
Broke well and led early. Taken back to just off the pace outside leader far side. Similar position turning in. Ran home one-paced.
Raced near rails just behind midfield. Made moderate headway before baulked inside final 100 M.
Settled one back on the rails. Shifted off rails for a split upon straightening. Hit front 200 M out and kicked clear to win impressively.
Raced in 5th within 2Ls of pace most of way to straight. Jostled early on and could only keep on at the same pace inside final 200 M.
Always struggling in last few. Tailed off shortly after straightening.
Settled in midfield on rails. Commenced run turning in. Squeezed through gap early in straight. Ran on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Began early. Settled in rear. Ran past beaten horses in straight with some good impression late.
Settled in rear to 400 M. Made moderate progress under pressure in straight. Nearest at finish.
Raced 3 back on the rail, finished off soundly.
Couldn't muster early and settled back in the field on the fence. Remained along the inside before shifting out slightly approaching the post to gain advantage late.
Settled midfield on the fence, kicked once clear and went close.
Ridden quietly from an outside barrier and was taken back at the start, raced 1 off with cover. Made a forward move around the field after the 500 M, finished off fairly.
Raced midfield, 1 off with cover, raced tight and under pressure from the 700 M to hold its position, didn't respond to pressure in the straight and was disappointing.
Settled in a handy position 1 off with cover, one-paced in the run home.
Parked behind the leader, came to the outside early in the straight, was inclined to hang in, collared close to the line.
Raced in last position, never went past another runner.
Raced wide without cover in midfield position, stuck to task nicely.
Began awkwardly and blundered. Ridden along to take up a position just behind the speed, 2-wide no cover, swamped turning for home.
Went forward after being wide early, commenced to tire after the 400 M.
Positioned just behind midfield 1 off with cover, worked home solidly.
Unable to muster early speed and raced at the back. Trailed field into home straight and made no impression thereafter.
Off slowly. Settled 2-wide in a rearward spot. Swung out for a rally on straightening and was closest at finish.

Better than midfield in a 2-wide position. Kept within 3Ls of the pace back straight and improved to be within a length of the leader turning for home. Took the lead inside 200 M but couldn't find more to hold off principals final stages.
Led field most of the way. Weakened final 200 M.
Disputed lead before taking a sit behind the leader at 1400 M. Checked badly at 200 M and never recovered.
Niggled along early stages and raced 2-wide behind the pace. Kept on fairly after straightening but unable to find extra to remain in contention over the final 200 M.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. Kept on well after straightening and steadily made up ground.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Improved steadily making the home turn and ran on well over the final stages.
Settled worse than midfield. 4Ls off the leader at the Rock and steadily made up ground on the home turn. Switched out on straightening, quickened nicely and drew clear final 100 M.
Off slowly. Raced along the fence behind midfield. Quickened on straightening but was held up in traffic inside final 100 M.
Missed the jump and raced in a rearward position until home straight. Never picked up and stayed on same pace to the finish.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Kept on fairly after straightening. Held up and found no clear running over final 150 M and was not able to be fully tested.
Slowest away, always well behind in rear, performance deemed unacceptable.
Midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls off speed until being unbalanced at 600 M, one-paced from top of home straight.
Never dangerous in rear bunch about 7Ls off the speed throughout.
Towards rear early on about 5Ls off speed, 4Ls down in 6th turning for home, stayed on well for 2nd without threatening the winner.
Always 1L off pace out 2-wide in 2nd or 3rd until home turn, quickened up to lead over 200 M out, ran on well.
Crowded at start losing ground, got about 8Ls back at 700 M, never on terms.
Led early on but always tended to hang out, about 1L clear until home turn, headed over 200 M out and missed out on a place late when tired.
Always without cover, 4Ls down in 7th with 700 M to race, forced wider again on the circle and struggling turning for home, found nothing.
One out, one back position about 2Ls or so off pace in 4th until home turn, lacked the gears to get into the quinella but overhauled tired Keen Flyer for a place.
Had the box run on fence until home turn, one-paced thereafter.
Steadied and lost ground 800 M out when 3Ls back in 5th, over 5Ls down turning for home, weakened.
Broke okay but soon hanging out very wide and dropped back to 10Ls down in 11th turning for home, inauspicious debut.
Unbalanced at 1200 M, always a fair way back and worse than midfield, never dangerous.
3Ls off pace in 2nd on fence at 800 M, 2Ls down and driven along turning for home, lost ground rapidly.
Mostly 3-wide no cover, and worse than midfield until home turn when making headway about 6Ls off speed, stayed on stoutly for a place.
Always in rear about 10Ls off pace until home turn, never found much room in homestretch and not given a hard race.
Established a 5Ls lead at 1000 M but always hung away from fence, 4-wide turning for home when 2Ls clear, very wayward veering left but did enough to win.
Slowly away, one off fence 6Ls down in mid-division at halfway, ran on only fairly before running out of room close home.
About 7Ls back in midfield at halfway, a little closer on straightening, ran on quite well late but never looked like catching the wayward winner.
Fly-leapt passing winning post for first time and became unbalanced, 6Ls down in 4th at 800 M, hard pressed to keep up at 500 M, faded out thereafter. (Blood in trachea.)
Never better than midfield nor closer than 5Ls to the pace.
6Ls down in mid-division at halfway, could only plug on evenly thereafter but still not far away from a place.
Sent on to race 2-wide in 3rd about 5Ls off speed at 1000 M then 3Ls back off final bend, one-paced turning for home.
Slowly away, soon 12Ls last, 10Ls last turning for home, ran on well, never nearer.
Slow away, raced along the rail at the back, 6-1/2Ls behind the leader, not suited by the slow tempo, lack of room 300 M little dash when clear.
Pushed to sit behind the pace group, raced keenly, trapped 3-wide until the home bend, took rail and lead at 700 M quickening the race tempo, hung on until 150 M when overhauled ran on for 3rd.
Never better than midfield 5-1/2Ls behind the leader, not suited by the slow pace, 1-wide early and 4 to 5-wide at home bend, no progress in straight.
Pushed to get across in front of the main bunch, settled just behind the leaders, travelled nicely and 1-wide throughout, dashed well last 300 M to win.
Pushed to take the rail and lead, clocked very slow early sectionals, box seated after running first 500 M, pushed further back 800 M, 2Ls off pace, weakened 200 M.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 5-1/2Ls off pace, rail-run early, 2 to 3-wide at home bend, switched towards middle of straight and dashed strongly despite the slow pace.
Pushed to get across in front, always prominent, benefited from the slow pace 1-wide throughout, had every chance in straight however showed no turn of foot, flattened 150 M, disappointing.
Eased towards the rear as usual, raced 7-1/2Ls behind the leader, 1-wide early but 3 to 5-wide at home bend, unsuited by the slow pace, dashed strongly 200 M.

Eased to sit about midfield, travelled comfortably throughout 4Ls behind the leader, 1-wide early and 3 to 4-wide at home bend, not suited by the slow pace, dashed strongly 300 M to run 2nd, just missed win.

Eased to get across at the rear, more than 8Ls behind the leader, unsuited by slow pace, raced on the rail until the home bend, forced 4 to 6-wide, lost too much ground, dashed impressively 200 M despite all negative situations.
Pushed on early to secure a midfield position, had rails run early, 2-wide at home bend 3-1/2Ls behind the leader, dashed well 200 M despite the slow tempo.
Pushed early but trapped wide about midfield, took rail and lead after running first 500 M, pressured from 700 M and overhauled, little room at 300 M, flattened 150 M.
Travelled wide in last few. Circled field swiftly around home bend joining 2nd into straight. Fought on under pressure until finding no extra over 100 M out.
Chased leader. Kept on early in straight before finding no extra over 200 M out.
Raced very wide in prominent position early stages and around stable bend. Take back to rear of midfield coming into back straight. Hampered and lost position 400 M out. Never recover.

Settled in last few. Commenced move passing 600 M, shifting off rails for a run 400 M out only to be baulked briefly turning in. Obtained split over 200 M out and fought on well to assert authority nearing finish.

Not far off on rails when badly squeezed and lost position passing winning post the first time. Soon recovered and raced in midfield on rails. Kept on early in straight before folded up quickly 200 M out.
Began fairly from wide draw. Soon took up running and obtained rails run stable bend, holding mainly 1L advantage until tiring and worn down over 100 M out.
Unseated rider passing winning post the first time. (See Racing Incidents.)
Rider lost the use of iron early and severely hampered passing winning post the first time. In rear of field when badly checked 400 M out. Never recover.
Well there to straight. Dropped out under pressure.

Badly squeezed and dropped to rear approaching winning post the first time. Commenced move rounding home bend and just over 3Ls off the lead turning in. Ran on dourly under pressure to narrowly miss 2nd.
Never far off in 3-wide position to home bend. Dropped out.

Standard break, raced in rearward division on rails 5-6Ls back, had easy time throughout, saved ground on turning in, improved steadily along inside in straight before running out of room at 150 M. Not tested thereafter.

Standard break, assumed usual role towards rear, raced on rails 7Ls off speed throughout, ridden along passing Rock, well back on turning in, weaved a passage between horses in straight closing hard to make frame.
Well enough to begin, slotted in nicely to running line, 4Ls away leaving straight, had easy time in mid-section, eased out making run on bend, closed solidly down middle to be closest on line.
Began with them, soon drifted back looking to slot in, raced 3-wide without cover when unable to get into running line, always working to bend, spent force turning in and weakened out late.
Began well, rolled forward to assume expected role as front runner, dictated terms in front at even clip, had 1L advantage on turning in, stuck on until 150 M but folded late when gas ran out.

Began nicely, pressed on as usual to take up forward spot raced outside of leader throughout, had good run with even speed, made a challenge on turning in and stayed on until 150 M before run ended late.
Poor to jump as usual, slotted in on rails in last place, lobbed along 8Ls from leaders, angled 2-wide passing Rock, well back turning in, closed evenly but gave away too much start.

First to hit ground, held early lead before taking trail leaving straight, had run of race behind leader with average speed on, tracked nicely on turning, gained dream split and hit lead but no match for winner late.
Began with rest, slotted in to midfield role, raced 2-wide 5-6Ls from leaders, relaxed well and had easy time to bend, made run 3 and 4-wide and briefly threatened before run ended at 150 M.

Amongst first few to jump, showed enough to hold prominent position 1 out 1 back, enjoyed ideal trip spending nothing in run, made 3-wide run on bend, came with dash down centre to claim them at 100 M for solid win.

Average break, drifted back as usual to race near rear, raced 2-wide 6-7Ls away, used little in the run, still well back on bend closed race of between runners making plenty of ground without threatening. (Steadied late.)
Shade tardy to begin, taken in behind to hold spot on rails 4Ls off front runners, not asked in mid-section. Stuck to rails saving ground turning in, kept to inside but only closed off at same speed.

Jumped with line, drifted back early to settle towards tail, raced 2 wide 5 to 6Ls off pace, tracked 3 wide with cover from midpoint, trailed nicely turning in, steadily made ground to be closest on line.

Average break, restrained from wide alley to assume spot at rear, raced on rails in last place 7 to 8Ls back, lobbed along at tail to bend, stuck to rails in straight, steadily closed off without a lot of room but never really a factor.

Even beginning, pushed up to hold midfield spot 7Ls back in 2 wide role, had even run but shuffled back on bend, pushed along amongst horses on turning in, kept giving in straight making some ground, without looking likely.

Slow to begin, niggled along to hold spot just behind midfield, raced on rails 4 to 5Ls away, didn't spend a lot in mid-section, in traffic on bend and had trouble getting clear throughout straight. Never really saw clear running.

Began with rest, pressed forward but unable to slot in to running line, posted 3 wide without cover 1L off leaders, did plenty but still challenged on bend, hit lead and fought on until 200 M but couldn't sprint again late.

Fastest into stride, lost advantage from wide alley, pushed on when posted wide to take over at top turn, worried by outside horses throughout, under siege on turning but kept giving to 250 M before early work took toll weakening out.

Began well, pressed on in search of lead, applied pressure outside early leader, raced at leader's girth thereafter, made another effort turning in and kept giving to 200 M but condition gave out and didn't finish off.

Tardy to begin, lacked speed and settled towards tail, raced on rails 6Ls from leaders, had quiet run in mid-section, angled out on bend and improved (on heels) turning, came with strong run at 250 M to gather them in for nice win.

Standard to leave gates, urged along to hold a forward position, raced behind early leader but angled into 1 out spot by midpoint, had plenty to offer but in traffic on bend, held up until 100 M, closed nicely when in clear.

Reasonable beginning, soon mustered speed to cross to early lead, took trail after 400 M, had easy run behind leader thereafter, struggling on turning, didn't find when asked and dropped right out in straight. (Mucopus.)

Fair to jump, unable to go early speed, dropped in for trail in midfield 4Ls away, raced 3 wide with cover improving on bend, challenged with run at 300 M, lacked extra gear to be a factor but stuck on well to make frame.
Parked behind the leader, gave ground quickly near the 300 M. (Mucopus.)
Raced 1 out 1 back, overhauled after the 400 M but stayed gallantly.
Settled last, came wide in the straight, made up good ground.
Began awkwardly, lost considerable ground, managed to take up a 2 wide midfield position with cover, weakened inside the 200 M.
Raced near the rear of the field along the fence, dropped out after entering the straight.
Positioned just behind midfield, 1 off with cover, commenced to shift out and made a forward move after the 600 M, extended well to score nicely.
Settled just behind the speed, along the fence, hung in early in the straight, went to the line one paced.
Travelled in second last position, 1 off with cover, came with a good late finish.
Positioned 1 off with cover, about 3 back, made a dash turning for home, didn't go on.
Raced 3 deep with cover in midfield, struggled in the run home.
Sat midfield on the trails, didn't obtain clear running for the majority of the race.
Led at a good clip, collared after the 400 M then faded late.
Raced handy but was caught wide without cover, even effort to stay on after doing plenty of work.
Raced at the leader's girth, commenced to tire after the 400 M.
Behind midfield early and middle stages. 4 to 5Ls off the leader and trailed field on straightening. Rallied but unable to keep momentum final 100 M.
Set the pace most of the way. Found no extra to stay in front after straightening and gradually faded.

Better than midfield. Kept within 4Ls of the pacesetter back straight. 3-wide and got to within a length of the leader turning for home. Opened up a clear advantage final 300 M. Mustered just enough to hold off a late challenger.
Never better than midfield. 4Ls off the leader at 800 M. Made a brief dash after straightening but was unable to sustain effort final 200 M.
Raced in a prominent position behind the leader. Unable to find a dash after straightening.
Raced behind the pace in a 2-wide position. Lacked the needed response on straightening and weakened final 300 M.
Settled on fence in midfield. Checked on straightening and ended in a bad spot near the back. Regrouped at 350 M and launched a strong rally. Came up a nose short.

Behind midfield early. Crowded and dropped to rear section at 1700 M. Towards rear and 4Ls off the leader turning for home. Had to clear traffic in the early part of the straight and made a late rally to be closest at finish.
Settled at the tail end of the field until 800 M. Advanced in a 3-wide position making the turn. Kept on well after straightening but was unable to gain much ground in the final stages.
Always prominent, 2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 1000 M, quickened up well to lead 250 M out but headed again at 100 M by winner, lost out on a place late.
Led on fence by 1L at 1000 M, headed 250 M out and tired late.
Worse than midfield about 7Ls off pace and 3-wide no cover until the 800 M, 4Ls down at 200 M but no extra late.
On fence about 8Ls off speed in rear, steadied at 800 M and 600 M, 6Ls back in 11th or so taking final bend, one-paced final 200 M.
Settled in rear about 8Ls off speed, pushed out 4-wide turning for home, 4Ls down at 200 M but no extra late.
Awkward break and keen early, always in rear bunch and 8Ls off pace early, short of room at top of homestretch, never looked like taking a hand.
3-back on fence when 5Ls off pace in 5th down the back, 4Ls down entering home turn, stayed on quite well but always outpaced by placed horses.
6Ls off pace in midfield at 1000 M, 5Ls back still in midfield when short of room at top of homestretch, never quite got to quinella pair. (Mucus.)
4-back on fence around midfield about 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, ran on as gamely as ever in homestretch but lacked the dash of principals.
Had a nice run on the fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd before sweeping to the front 100 M out, all out to get the verdict on the nod.
4-wide no cover in rear down the back, pressed on at 800 M to go 4Ls off pace in midfield turning for home, given little hope with the ride and tired final 200 M.
2-wide and 4Ls back in 4th at 1000 M, a little closer on straightening, a neck down in 2nd at 200 M, ran on strongly and missed out on bob of heads.
Switched from wide gate to fence in rear about 9Ls from the front, still in rear turning for home, never dangerous.
About 3Ls back in 4th until home turn, retreated steadily inside closing stages.
Went back about 8Ls off pace in rear early, still well behind and wide turning for home but made up some decent late ground, never nearer.
Midfield behind a very strong tempo early and edged over 2Ls down in 4th taking home turn, led over 250 M out, ran right away, very impressive.
Always towards rear at least 6Ls off pace, comfortably held in the home straight.
Cover ground in rear about 7Ls off pace at 800 M, never got on terms and well beaten over 200 M out.
Disputed pace out 2-wide but went much too quickly and knocked up in home straight.
7Ls last early on, 4Ls back in midfield turning for home but soon beaten once tempo quickened again.
Slowest away and barely raised a trot, took no part.
Towards rear early but moved into midfield about 4Ls off speed turning for home, stayed on well for a place.
Clear 3rd over 2Ls off pace at 800 M, 1L down in 3rd at top of home straight, weakened inside final 200 M.
On fence a little better than midfield at halfway, 3Ls down in 5th turning for home, no chance with winner but dug in well for a place.
Always about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in 5th or 6th but never threatened to draw much closer.
Disputed pace on fence but went much too quickly and knocked up in home straight.

Eased to sit about midfield, 4.5Ls off pace, 2 wide early but swept to 4 wide on straightening, had every chance to finish the race off strongly as it did in previous runs but was disappointing, just ran on OK.
Very slow away, pushed to keep up with the field along the rail, 6.5Ls behind the leaders, swept towards 4 wide on straightening, dashed well 300 M and kicked away to win.
Always about midfield, 3Ls behind the leaders along the rails, blocked most straight, just held ground, never tested.
Bumped start, more than 10Ls off pace along the rail, no progress in straight.
1.5Ls behind the leaders in box seat, blocked most straight, just held ground, never tested.
Pushed to sit 2.5Ls behind the leaders, 3 wide throughout, ran on well to the line to finish 2nd, keeps improving.
Pushed to lead by half a length along the rails at good pace, always under pressure, hung on until 150 M overhauled, ran on well to finish a strong 3rd despite the negative situation.
Pressured outside the leader throughout the trip, held ground until 100 M, flattened.
Eased to get across towards the rear, 8Ls off pace, 2 wide early and swept to 4 wide on straightening, followed the winner from 300 M and progressed steadily, had already done the best to run 4th.
Eased to sit at the back but failed to get across towards the rail, 3 to 5 wide throughout, used too much fuel at the bends, still made ground 250 M.
Settled 2.5Ls behind the leaders, travelled nicely and 2 wide throughout, had every chance in the straight, however no turn of foot, disappointing.
Never better than midfield, 4.5Ls behind the leaders along the rail, swept towards 3 wide on straightening, no progress in the straight.
Eased to sit 3Ls off the pace, trapped 4 wide throughout, lost too much ground at the bends, weakened quickly 300 M.
Eased back as usual, 6.5Ls off pace, 2 wide early, swept towards 5 wide on straightening, no progress in final stages.

Settled in midfield early far side. Steadied and lost position coming out of back straight. Towards rear turning for home. Obtained clear running 300 M out and quickened well to do best work at finish.

Settled in 3rd on rails not far off pace. Angled off the rails for a run when 2Ls back in 3rd turning in. Responded well to hit front over 200 M out and just held off runner-up's strong late surge to the line.
Travelled in 4th some 4 to 5Ls off the speed. Commenced move turning in and ran on steadily under pressure to look a place chance but unable to sustain run late.
Settled at the back. Came under pressure turning in but unable to make any impression in the run home.

Well there in 2nd position on rails. Shifted to one out one back position when leader crossed to rails coming out of back straight. Chased leader to home turn before weakening shortly after straightening.
Broke well from wide draw. Settled wide in rear of midfield. Slightly inconvenienced early in straight and could find nothing under pressure.

Held slight advantage after beginning from poor draw mainly one off the rails. Went 1L clear with rails run rounding home bend. Same turning in but had no answer to winner's challenge over 200 M out. Hung on gamely under pressure.
Raced wide without cover in forward of midfield. Not going places when jostled 350 M out. Soon weakened.
Settled on rails in midfield. Improved to 5th turning in. Quickened to hold some chance early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Travelled mainly 3-wide towards rear to straight. Slightly hampered on top of straight. Made modest headway without threatening.
Settled in midfield one off the rails. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening and finished off race strongly inside final 200 M to just fail to get up on line.
Waited with. Shaken up turning for home, making significant progress between runners down straight. Did best work at finish.
Mainly in rear of midfield on rails to straight. Kept on same pace before finding no extra inside final 200 M. (Lame.)
Always travelling towards rear. Only kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Moderate jump, ridden up to hold spot 2 wide 3Ls back, relaxed reasonably but eased 3 wide without cover at midpoint, took off 4 wide on bend, hit lead turning but run ended last 150 M.

Amongst first few early, couldn't go speed and forced to race 3 wide without cover 4Ls back, had cover from midpoint, tracked nicely 4 wide on turning, briefly threatened at 300 M but could only hold ground to line.

Fastest into stride, drifted back towards rear from wide alley, raced 2 wide 7Ls away in last place, tracked eventual winner 3 and 4 wide on bend, made some ground down middle of track but didn't finish off last 200 M.
Even break, slotted in behind midfield, raced 2 wide 5Ls away between horses, improved behind horses to be 3Ls back on bend, lacked turn of foot to be a factor and couldn't go on last 200 M.

Tardy to begin, taken in behind and drove through to hold position on leaders back, relaxed nicely and had run of race in mid-section, on bridle behind slowing horses turning, finished off nicely when clear to make frame.
Began well, pressed forward to race at leader's girth, overraced throughout and kept speed honest, began to struggle on bend when others made runs, there until 300 M but weakened right out late.

Began well, pressed forward to hold prominent spot, raced 1 out 1 back not really settling, forced 3 wide and bumped from 700 M, up there challenging on bend, under pressure turning in, workload took toll and didn't show usual finish.
Began with rest, taken back from outside draw, took up ideal position 4Ls back on rails, not asked throughout in traffic and shuffled back on turning, closed off evenly between horses in straight.
Jumped with them, mustered early speed to take up running, rolled along nicely with pressure from outside horse, had more pressure applied again on bend, outpaced and weakened right out in run home.

Average break, drifted back amongst rearward division, raced on rails 6Ls from pace, not asked in run, trailed nicely but held up behind horses on bend into clear at 250 M and surged with run late to be narrowly denied.

Standard to begin, took up role near tail as expected, raced at rear 6Ls back with 3 wide trail, appreciated reasonable tempo, had great 4 wide cart in 2Ls back on bend, gathered them in at 200 M and kicked hard to hold on late.

Standard jump out, pressed on to take close order, posted 4 wide, without cover in mid-section 5Ls away, always working to improve in mid-section, came 5 wide on bend, spent force and couldn't respond last 200 M.
Raced mainly 3-wide towards rear. Made no impression in straight.
Raced wide in midfield early, gradually dropped back around home bend to be last turning in. Finished off race well inside final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced wide in midfield. Quickened well under pressure to hold chance throughout final 200 M but just failed to peg back winner.
Travelled in rear. Saved ground on rails turning in. Folded up quickly inside final 200 M.
Soon took up running and led field to 200 M. Dropped out quickly.
Chased leader, joint 2nd into straight. Kept on one pace before tiring inside final 100 M.
Chased leader to straight, disputing 2nd home turn. Could only keep on steadily at the one pace without quickening under pressure. No extra near home.
Prominent to 500 M. Weakened.
Settled towards rear. Commenced run turning in. Ran on well inside final 200 M to assert authority nearing finish.
Raced wide throughout. Settled in just better than midfield far side, dropping back around home bend to rear of midfield into straight. Recovered some ground late. (Mucus.)
Settled at the back. Ran on quite well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide in rear of midfield. Shifted widest from towards rear into straight. Ran on steadily down centre of track for remote 4th.

Rear early. Made steady headway on rails to be midfield coming out of back straight. Slightly baulked about 300 M out but quickened well to hit front at the 200 M, however, only to be worn down close to home.
Settled in forward of midfield. Moved closer and shifted out for a run turning in. Found nothing.
Sluggish at start. Raced in rear. Improved gradually halfway out to be midfield rounding home bend. Lost position into straight. Only kept on steadily under pressure in straight.
Always well there, with brief lead rounding home bend the first time. Quickened to hit front again passing 400 M but unable to sustain effort and overhauled inside 200 M.
Raced wide behind midfield. Took closer order rounding stables bend, improving to 4th position after Rock. Ran home one-paced.

Wide in midfield early. Quickly ridden to 4th within 2Ls of pace. Still not far off when 5th or 6th rounding home bend. Fought on steadily under pressure despite tight between runners early in straight. Kept on one pace to the line.

Led early. Taken back to 3rd on rails on heels of leaders approaching home turn the first time, dropping to 5th in forward of midfield stables bend. Kept on steadily in straight before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Settled in rear. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Always in last few. Produced moderate late headway in straight without threatening.
Settled on rails in midfield. Dropped gradually towards rear far side. Snuck back up to midfield on inside turning for home and fought on well to assert authority inside final 200 M.
Mainly in midfield or rear of midfield throughout. Kept on same pace without quickening in the run home.
Well there. Took up running over 1600 M out. Overhauled inside final 300 M.
Settled mainly 3-wide in forward of midfield. Took closer order approaching 1200 M bend. Dropped out under pressure from 2nd 600 M out.
Waited with. Made up good ground down inner of straight to be nearest at finish.
Made every post a winner. Kicked away in the straight to score convincingly.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, settled just behind midfield along the fence. Maintained that position on straightening and made good ground along the inside.
Raced behind the speed, 2 back 1 off with cover, held its own in the straight.
Ridden along early from an outside gate to settle outside the leader 1L away. Found no extra in the run to the post.
Caught wide, midfield without cover, struggled in the run home.
Settled back in the run, 1 off with cover, improved through the middle, only made steady ground in run to line.
Midfield on the fence, commenced to give ground turning for home.
Sat midfield, 1 off with cover, commenced to make a dash early in the straight but faded on its run last 200 M.
Became unbalanced making the first turn and settled in last position. Didn't pass another runner.
Settled second last along the fence, came to the outside in the straight, finished off strongly.
Camped behind the leader on the fence, found little under pressure.
Handy position, 1 off with cover, went to the line one-paced.
Settled nicely behind midfield. Continued well after straightening. Kicked strongly at 200 M and took control final 50 M.
Raced along the rails at midfield until home straight. Remained on same pace but unable to gain much ground.
Trailed field most of the way. Wide turning for home and only ran past a beaten runner.

Even break. Hard ridden to maintain spot inside leader. Settled behind pace in back straight. Steadied and lost a bit of ground at 600 M. 2Ls off leader on straightening but unable to find daylight near 200 M. Closed hard once clear.
Led field until home straight. Found no extra to keep pace 300 M and steadily dropped out.

Even break but blundered and got shuffled to the back. Remained in rear section and made a ground saving trip around the bend. Steadily made up ground in the straight despite being briefly held up 200 M. Nearest at finish.
3-wide at midfield. Crept closer after the Rock and was within 2Ls of the leader turning for home. Kept on well and took the lead at 200 M but was unable to hold off winner final 50 M.
2-wide behind midfield. 3-wide making home turn and was running on same pace until 200 M. Finished with a late dash and was closest at the line.
Began only fairly from a wide draw. Steadily made up ground from the outside and settled behind the leader after 800 M. Contested the lead at 200 M but weakened thereafter.

Jumped awkwardly and raced in rear section. Lacked a response when hard ridden at the Rock and home turn. Last on straightening. Remained on same pace before mustering a strong closing run final 150 M.
3-wide in rear section. Made no impression in the straight.
Raced behind the pace. Checked and dropped to midfield after 800 M. Ran on same pace in the straight.
Midfield or better about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace until homestretch, ran on quite well for 3rd late but never threatened to quinella.
Disputed early lead out 2-wide at 1000 M, settled 1L back in 2nd at 600 M, still about 2Ls down in 2nd at 200 M but faded out of placegetters in final 50 M.
Always caught 4-wide no cover in midfield about 4Ls off pace until home turn, no surprise that he would fade out.
Disputed early lead on fence but over-racing until the 600 M when 1L clear, went about 2Ls clear at 150 M but no extra late and caught final strides.
Slowly away, towards rear about 6Ls off pace until home turn, never going to be much better than midfield when checked at 100 M, no danger.
Steadied at 1000 M eased right into box-seat trail 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 800 M to home turn, edged out to challenge 150 M out and ran on well to lead final strides.
Awkward break and jockey lucky to stay on, towards rear about 6Ls off pace until home turn, ran on fairly late, never nearer.
No speed and 5-wide no cover in rear early on about 8Ls off pace, about 7Ls behind in last turning for home, never figured.
Caught 3-wide no cover in 1L off pace early on, slipped back over 2Ls back at final bend, very one-paced in home straight.
Awkward break losing ground, 8Ls off pace in rear and under pressure 500 M out, plugged on at same pace.
3-wide with cover in about 8th place and 4Ls off pace until home straight, never threatened to run better than midfield.
3-back on fence throughout and about 4Ls off pace early, niggled along at 600 M to keep up, still with 4Ls to make up at 200 M but dashed well late, never nearer.
Never better than midfield or better than 5Ls off pace at any stage, always comfortably held in homestretch.
Won this very easily, led by half a length on fence early, shot over 2Ls clear on the bridle passing 200 M, drew right away.
About half a length outside THUNDER FLASH in 2nd until home turn, one-paced in the finish but just clung on for 2nd.
Got well back to 8Ls last early, not much better off taking final turn, looked reluctant to finish off between horses but always well held in any case.
3Ls off early pace, 4Ls down in 4th turning for home, ran on fairly late and nearly got a remote 3rd.
Soon near rear about 6Ls off pace, 7Ls back in rear and 4-wide (widest of all) turning for home, finished off tamely down centre of track.
Midfield early on about 4Ls off pace but slipped back to 8Ls last at top of home straight, soon well detached.
Box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd until home turn, had every possible hope to place, very weak in final 200 M.
4Ls back and worse than midfield early, briefly 3-wide no cover at 700 M but got in 2-wide at 600 M, stayed on well for a place late and nearly nicked 2nd.
Slowest away, checked at 800 M when 4Ls back in midfield on fence, slipped further back 6Ls off pace in 7th until home turn, no impression, still disappointing.
Pushed to get across in front of main bunch, on heels when crossed by the leader at 1200 M, travelled nicely in box seat and benefited by the slow pace, dashed well 200 M to win.

Eased at start to get across at the rear, 6-1/2Ls behind the leader on the rail at Stable Bend, 2-wide at home bend, harmed by the slow pace, blocked between 400 M and 200 M, dashed strongly when clear.
Raced wide throughout, never competitive.
Eased to sit at the tail about 6Ls behind the leader, raced along the rail throughout, not suited by the slow early tempo, no turn of foot in straight, just ran on.
Midfield, 2-wide throughout, not suited by the slow early sectionals, blocked 300 M, dashed well in final stage.
Slowly away, pushed to occupy the rail spot about 3Ls off pace, raced keenly when leader slowed down the tempo from 1200 M, lacked room between 400 M and 200 M, dashed strongly when clear to run 3rd.
Slow away, hard ridden to keep up about midfield, however raced keenly and trapped 3-wide, made ground around the field 800 M, dashed fairly in straight, strongly harmed by the racing situation.
Eased to sit behind the pace group, trapped 3-wide throughout, made ground around the field 800 M, used up too much fuel to the bend, weakened 200 M.
Hard ridden early to keep up about midfield, 4-1/2Ls behind the leader, helped by rails run but not suited by the slow pace, lacked room at 300 M, little dash late.
Hard ridden to sit outside the leader, 2-wide throughout, favoured by the slow tempo, faded quickly on straightening.
Awkwardly away, hard ridden to sit 2Ls behind the leader, 2-wide throughout, blocked at 300 M, dashed well when clear to finish 2nd.
Pushed to get across the field and led by 0-1/2Ls along the rail, slowed down the tempo quickly from 1200 M, advantaged by the muddling pace, hung on until 100 M overhauled, ran on okay.
Travelled on rails in forward of midfield to straight. Kept on before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Settled on rails in last few. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made running to 200 M, then weakened under pressure.
Never better than midfield. Found nil in straight.
Raced wide throughout. Not far off in 5th far side. Gained 4th rounding home bend. Fought on steadily under pressure in straight without threatening.

Ridden to hold slender advantage outside 2nd briefly. Taken back to about a length off the pace still one off the rails far side. Fought on to hit front momentarily inside 200 M before swamped by fast-finishing winner close to home.
Settled in midfield. Fought on steadily in straight without threatening.
Never far off. Some 2Ls back in 5th turning for home. Responded well to take charge over 100 M out.
Amongst leaders early, settling in 3rd on rails just off the pace. Baulked for a run 200 M out. Kept on well to finish.
Settled well behind. Made significant progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Well back. Trailed the field most of way until running on past beaten horses inside final 200 M.
With leaders early, settling in worse than midfield. Kept on same pace in the run home.

Standard to begin, faded back from wide alley when unable to slot in early, raced 3-wide 4-5Ls back with cover, under pressure to improve on bend, made some ground down middle until steadied at 250 M but never really likely.

Began well, showed early toe to hold lead leaving straight, worried by outside horse throughout setting even tempo, upped speed on bend, couldn't find extra last 200 M when tackled and stuck on same pace to finish.

Average into stride, hard ridden to take closer order, briefly challenged for lead before settling at leaders girth, applied pressure throughout contesting lead on bend, right there turning but ran out of petrol last 200 M.

Began well, showed enough to be prominent early, relaxed behind speed in 1 out 1 back spot, enjoyed soft run thereafter, had plenty to offer on turning, gained split and threatened with run but found winner too good late.

Awkward to begin, settled further back than expected on rails, raced 5Ls away throughout, in traffic on bend, kept t inside in straight and closed off evenly before hampered at 150 M, finished off at same pace to line.
Jumped with rest, showed good speed to push on from wide alley, caught 3-wide with cover 2Ls back for middle of journey, covered plenty to turn, was one-paced in run home battling to line.

Standard to begin, allowed to slide back to rear from wide alley, raced 2-wide 5Ls back between horses throughout, came with run between horses in straight closing steadily to be closest at the finish.

Began nicely, pushed on in search of lead, posted 3-wide outside leaders without cover, worried first two pressuring throughout, did plenty of work to bend, didn't find and weakened out late after hard run.

Jumped with rest, pushed up to hold leaders back, enjoyed run of race in mid-section, continued to save ground on bend, made run to inside, inconvenienced when run closed at 200 M and did very well to make frame.

Tardy to begin, moved up to hold position 3Ls back on rails, had easy time in mid-section, travelled well on bend behind horses, followed rails and bumped heavily when taking narrow run at 200 M, went on for impressive win.

Broke nicely, allowed to settle in midfield, 2-wide 3-4Ls away throughout, same distance back between horses on bend, in traffic before pushing into clear at 150 M, closed off nicely late to take 3rd.

Average beginning and showed no early toe, ended up at tail 7-8Ls away, raced solo at rear throughout, kept to inside saving ground on turning, finished off moderately only passing tired horses in run home.

Fair beginning, slotted in on rails 4Ls away in midfield, had cosy run behind speed throughout, not asked much of in run, kept to rails in straight, gained split on inside at 200 M and responded nicely to drive through to score.

Fast into stride, took up prominent role behind leader, had run of race in mid-section with even speed, held up in traffic turning in, run presented at 300 M and closed off nicely fighting out a 3 way finish.

Moderate beginning, drifted back soon after start, raced 2 wide 5 to 6Ls back in rearward division, still back and eased wide turning in, finished off only fairly down middle of track lacking dash to be a factor.

Lost ground shortly after start, settled down at rear 7Ls from frontrunners, had easy run but niggled along to bend, under pressure on turning, kept to rails but showed no dash and only plugged away to line.

Jumped with rest, pressed on in search of front, posted 3 wide without cover challenging for lead, always working hard to bend, still there until 300 M but weakened out in run home when workload took toll.

Standard to begin, ridden along to settle behind midfield on rails 5Ls off pace, had quiet trip to bend, in traffic turning for home, switched out and steadily made ground between horses without threatening.

Average to break, ridden along to settle behind midfield, checked at 800 M and forced to race 3 wide thereafter, 6 to 7Ls back on bend, came to outside in straight and closed race off fairly passing tired runners late. Inexperienced.

Broke with line, pressed on but posted 3 wide in midfield when unable to slot in, had cover 5Ls back in mid-section, gave a start on straightening, knuckled down last 200 M and made plenty of ground late to make frame.
Tardy to begin, at rear early but rushed around them 3 and 4 wide in mid-section, used up to be 2Ls back on bend 4 wide without cover, under pressure turning in, weakened right out after hard run.

Amongst first few to jump, taken hold of to drop in to 1 out 1 back trail 1 to 2Ls back, had soft run and ideally placed to bend, eased out on turning and challenged strongly throughout length of straight for a hard fought 2nd.

Began nicely, showed plenty of early speed to cross to front, set even tempo with pressure from outside horses, still under siege on running but kicked strongly making rest chase. Condition gave out at 200 M.

Began awkwardly and lost ground, ridden along to keep touch with last few, shared rear in 2 wide spot 7Ls from pace, still had field to beat on bend, kept to inside and made some ground past tiring horses. (Mucopus.)

Fast into stride, pressed on in search of lead, raced outside the leader applying pressure throughout, still close up challenging on bend, began to struggle when they sprinted at 300 M and finished at same pace to line.

Jumped well, pushed along but didn't have enough toe and had to be content 3 to 4Ls back on rails, switched 2 wide from midpoint, into clear running on straightening, inexperienced but kept giving in straight to be nearest on line.
Made reasonable ground over the latter stages after racing back in the field, 1 off with cover.
Checked at the start and settled in last position, 1 off with cover. Never likely.
Box seated, stuck to task gamely in the straight and held its own.
Sat just behind the trip leaders, however was 3 wide no cover, struggled in the straight.
Began well and took up front running duties, on the fence was shadowed by another runner in the middle stages, showed good turn of foot in the straight to score well.
Crowded at the start after missing the kick slightly. Travelled wide near the rear of the field for the majority of the trip, struggled in the run home.
Positioned behind midfield, 1 off with cover, came wide in the straight and worked to the line soundly.
Settled near the rear of the field along the fence, made appreciable ground over the concluding stages.
Finished distant after racing, back in the field along the fence. (Mucopus.)
Positioned midfield, 1 off with cover worked home soundly.
Raced just off the speed, 1 off with cover, faded after the 300 M.
Midfield on the fence, stayed to the inside over the last 400 M, got home one paced.
Settled about 6Ls back, 1 off with cover, came wide entering the straight, then for a considerable distance was steadied to shift out into clear running. Closed off satisfactorily.
Assumed front running, duties mid race, 1 off punctured after the 400 M.
3-wide in a forward position early. 2-wide in 2nd place making the home turn behind runaway leader. Stayed on only one-pace after straightening and was swamped final 150 M.
Settled at the rear and trailed field turning for home. Rallied in the straight and was closest at finish.
Settled in rear section. Made a brief run after straightening but unable to sustain effort final 200 M.
Settled on fence close to the pace early stages. Continued to race along the rails in 3rd place rounding the turn. Lacked a quickening pace on straightening and gradually faded final 150 M.
Raced behind midfield. Quickened nicely and started to rally from 450 M. Caught behind slow traffic near 200 M but continued strongly once steered into the clear.
On fence and behind the pace early. Checked at 1400 M and slipped to midfield. Struggled to keep pace at the turn. Weakened and tailed out.
No better than midfield. Showed a nice turn of foot on straightening and ran down the early leader final 50 M to claim victory.
Settled in rear section until straightening. Closed the race off nicely and made up good ground.
No worse than midfield. Kept on same pace in the straight.

Soon led. Tore away from the field and opened up a sizeable lead at the turn. Maintained a considerable lead deep into home straight but with little left in the tank. Swamped by principals final 50 M.
Nicely placed in 6th out 2-wide and about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed until home turn, ran on quite well late only to just miss out on the money.
In rear bunch with cover about 7Ls or 8Ls off speed until homestretch, made some moderate late ground without threatening.
Slowest away, caught 4-wide no cover down backstretch when towards rear at 6Ls off speed, got in 3-wide with cover on the circle, always in rear trio.
3-back on fence 4Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, struggling to stay in touch turning for home, faded out tamely.
Led by 2Ls on fence at 1100 M, same margin clear at top of home straight, headed 150 M out and narrowly missed out on a place.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1000 M, 2Ls down turning for home, very one-paced final 200 M.
Got quite a way back about 7Ls off pace on fence through to final bend, didn't find much under pressure and only made minor late ground.
Couldn't muster early speed to lead as usual, 3Ls off pace in 4th at 800 M, 4Ls back in 4th at home turn, weakened out.
About 9Ls last at 1000 M, hardly any closer turning into home straight, always a long way back.
With cover worse than midfield about 6Ls, plugged on fairly late but never likely to figure.
Head up early on, box run on fence 2Ls off pace at 1000 M, still 2Ls down in 2nd at top of home straight, led 150 M out and asserted late.
4-back on fence about 5Ls back in midfield until home turn, picked up well to be just 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, couldn't sustain effort to win but did enough for quinella.
Never dangerous in rear at least 8Ls off pace, tended to hang in straight when very one-paced.
3-wide no cover in about 8th or 9th about 5Ls or 6Ls off speed until home turn, about 2Ls down at 200 M and stayed on for a place, solid effort despite wide trip.
Didn't break and settled in rear with cover about 6Ls off pace, 5Ls back in 12th turning for home, ran on strongly late to take 2nd inside final 50 M but had little chance with winner.
Didn't break well, over-raced early, 3-back on fence about 3Ls off pace in midfield until home turn when under pressure, found zero off the bit.
Had the box-seat early but switched out 2-wide a neck off pace from 1000 M to home turn when hanging out, clear lead 350 M out and extended inside final 50 M.
Well placed 2-wide about 5th place and within 2Ls or 3Ls of the pace until home turn, failed to quicken up and well held through final stages.
On fence about 5Ls back in 10th at 1000 M, not much closer on straightening and never troubled principals.
Settled towards rear about 7Ls off pace early, ridden along when turning for home still well behind, moderate late headway.
Nice run despite a wide 3-wide no cover trip throughout, 2Ls down in 3rd from 1000 M to home straight, stayed on gamely for a place.
Settled midfield 3-wide but with cover and about 4Ls off pace through to final bend, had every chance to place but lacked the acceleration.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 4th from 1000 M to home straight, had every hope to place but one-paced inside final 200 M.
Always caught very wide 4-wide no cover, sent on 2Ls off pace in 6th or so at 900 M, struggling to lie up at final bend, faded out.
Broke very badly, veering sharply left losing considerable ground, 8Ls last at 800 M, 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home in rear, stayed on only fairly for midfield finish.
Led by 1L on fence at 1100 M, a neck ahead from 800 M to home turn, headed 350 M out and weakened out.
Always 2-wide and slightly worse than midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed until home turn, never threatened.
With cover 2 and 3-wide in midfield about 3Ls off speed until home turn, failed to kick and beaten over 200 M out.
Eased to sit about midfield, 2 wide throughout, 3.5Ls behind the leader, not suited by the slow tempo, had every chance on straightening but no turn of foot, checked 150 M.

Eased to sit at the back as usual, 5.5Ls behind the leader, trapped 3 wide throughout, lost too much ground at the bends and harmed by the slow pace, swept towards 5 wide turning in, ran on to line despite all the negative situations.
Always midfield, about 3.5Ls behind the leader, took advantages from the rail run but not suited by the slow pace, blocked 4-2, no turn of foot when clear. (Blood in trachea.)
Eased to get across towards the rear, took advantages from the rail run but not suited by the slow pace, never competitive.
Led easily by 0.5Ls along the fence with slow early sectionals, pressured from 800 M and quickened up, overhauled 300 M, still ran on to the line.
Eased at start to get across towards the rear, 2 wide early, 6.5Ls behind the leader, harmed by the slow pace, swept towards 4 wide on straightening, dashed well 300 M, improving.
Hard ridden to get across in front but failed, trapped 3 wide outside the pace group at stable bend, moved up 1000 M, tackled leader 800 M, 2 wide at home bend, led 300 M, hung on to win.

Hard ridden early but failed to muster speed and to take prominent spot, 2.5Ls behind the leader, 2 wide throughout, not suited by the slow pace, lacked turn of foot, just held ground in straight, checked 100 M.
Pushed to get across in front of the main bunch, settled nicely 1.5Ls behind the leader, 2 wide throughout, helped by the slow pace, lacked turn of foot but held ground in straight.
Eased to sit at the rear, 6.5Ls off pace, tried to make ground along the rail despite the slow tempo but failed, lacked room 400 M, no dash when clear.
Trapped 3 wide throughout about midfield, 2Ls behind the slow pace, moved up 1000 M and tackled the leaders, flattened 300 M, checked 100 M.
Eased to sit just behind midfield, 2 wide early, 5Ls behind the leader, swept towards 4 wide on straightening, not suited by the slow tempo, dashed strongly 300 M to finish a strong 3rd.
Eased to sit 2Ls behind the leader, travelled nicely in box seat, blocked 4-2, little dash when clear.
Very slow away, hard ridden to keep up with the field, 5Ls off pace, made ground 600 M along the rail, blocked 4-2, dashed strongly when clear to run 2nd despite the slow pace, just missed win.

Settled in forward of midfield of small field mainly 2 back on the rails. Baulked for a run upon straightening and switched back to rails over 250 M out. Fought on steadily under pressure and lost 2nd late.
Soon took up running, holding slender lead one off the fence before crossing to rails 1000 M out. Kept on well in straight to win unchallenged.
Jumped fairly settling behind midfield. Kept on well down centre of track in straight.
Settled in rear. Commenced move turning in and improved one or two positions but did not find much room the best part of the straight.
Raced wide in last few. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Settled at the back. Unable to obtain a clear run early in straight. Switched inside passing 300 M and finished off race strongly.
Raced 3-wide in midfield to straight. Made no further impression. (Blood in trachea.)
