Settled mainly in 2Ls 4th just better than mid-division of small field. In similar position turning in and ran home one-paced.
Chased leader to straight. Soon weakened.
Settled in 3rd on rails just behind leader. Switched out to challenge upon straightening and could only keep on at the same pace without quickening under pressure.

Began awkwardly, soon settled at tail 10Ls from leaders on rails, ridden along to steadily improve but still had job to do on turning, switched to middle and held up at 200 M, came again when clear to be closest on line.

Jumped with rest, pressed forward but couldn't go early pace, drifted back to settle behind midfield 6 to 7Ls back in 2 wide spot, switched out turning in, closed steadily making good ground without threatening first few.

Jumped with them, showed early speed to roll forward and battle for lead, surrendered and raced behind leader in mid-section, had easy time to bend, didn't find when gap appeared and dropped out badly in run home.

Well enough to begin, prominent early in coveted 1 out 1 back spot, still there 2Ls back on turn, under stick to improve 3 wide into straight, didn't let down when they sprinted and only plugged to line.

Began OK, hard ridden but failed to muster, settled further back than expected on rails 7 to 8Ls away, still had plenty to do when improving turning in, kept to rails making some ground until 250 M but laboured late. (Mucopus.)

Quick to leave gates, pushed on from wide alley to eventually sit outside leader 1L away, kept leader in sight on bend, under pressure but there to 250 M before early effort told and weakened out late.

Slow to begin, soon towards rear, raced 3 wide 10Ls back, reluctant to improve in mid-section and hung on bend, tracked nicely 4 wide turning in, made up huge amount of ground late to nearly snatch 2nd, still green.

Only fair to begin, steadily improved to race 5Ls back on rails in midfield, had easy time and appreciated pace on, improved on bend, eased out and gained split at 300 M, dashed over the top of them to earn win.

Started off nicely, didn't go with first few, assumed midfield trail 2 wide 4Ls away, angled into clear 4 wide on bend, came with promising run but condition gave out and only plugged to line thereafter.

First to hit ground, used plenty to challenge for lead from wide alley, took control and set good tempo 1L clear, still held advantage turning, kicked strongly to 150 M but couldn't muster another effort. Held on well to make frame.

Poor to begin, soon at rear, raced 12Ls away and struggling to keep touch, still detached with job to do on turning in, balanced up and got going in straight making up huge amount of ground late. (See Racing Incidents.)

Average break, pushed along to hold midfield spot from wide alley, forced to race 3 wide without cover 7Ls off them, angled 4 wide turning in, didn't finish off with much effort and made only moderate ground.

Even break, settled down behind pace 3 to 4Ls back on rails, had best run in race, improved turning in but held up until 250 M, bumped way into clear and fought on well despite still being a little green.

Moderate beginning, assumed usual position towards tail, raced on rails 9 to 10Ls away, did little in mid-section, kept to inside turning in, closed race off nicely weaving between horses to be closest on line.
Settled at the back to straight. Never nearer.
Soon took up running and attempted to make all. Kicked a length clear under pressure over 200 M out but quickly worn down by winner nearing home.
Chased leader to 250 M. Found no extra under pressure.
Settled at the back. Made significant progress inside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled behind midfield. Some 4Ls off the lead. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Settled behind midfield some 4Ls off the lead. Found nothing under pressure inside final 200 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Travelled in 2Ls 4th. Kept on steadily in straight but swamped inside final 200 M.
Raced 2-wide in midfield. Commenced run upon straightening and quickened well to assert authority inside 100 M.
Settled in 3rd one back on the rails. In box seat early in straight and dropped out tamely inside final 200 M.
Travelled on rails in midfield. Did not find much room early in straight until passing 200 M. Produced moderate late impression close to home.

Jumped in line, lacked early speed but continued to press on from wide alley, raced 3 wide outside leader without cover, did plenty of work to bend, contested lead on turning, fought back hard when headed at 200 M to just miss.
Tardy into stride, settled amongst tailenders, raced on rails 10Ls away in mid-section, angled 2 wide on turning, closed off evenly between horses (shifted out at 250 M) without looking likely.

Promising start, continued to press on from a wide alley to take up running, dictated terms in front, pressured on bend, kicked hard holding advantage to 250 M, couldn't sprint but stuck to task holding own to line.
Fast to leave gates, went on in search of lead, crossed to leaders girth but had more pressure from outside horse on bend, struggling and crossed turning in, didn't find and faded out of in straight.

Average beginning, taken in behind from a wide gate, race 10Ls back 2 to 3 wide sharing rear, had plenty to do on turning, switched to middle and made up many lengths to be closest on line. Set too big a task.
Amongst them from outset, unable to slot in and forced to race 3 wide 3Ls back, had cover and improved 4 wide on bend, threatened to 300 M but didn't let down and only battled last furlong.

Fair to break, allowed to settle just worse than midfield, raced 2 wide 5 to 6Ls away, came 3 wide with trail on circle, switched out in straight and steadily closed but just lacked the turn of foot of last time.

Began with rest, pushed through to hold spot behind speed in 1 out 1 back role, had easy trip thereafter, angled 3 wide on turning, came with well timed run to hit lead at 200 M, used everything to fight off challengers for narrow win.
Began with rest, drifted back to midfield, raced 2 wide 5Ls from them, not asked in mid-section, under pressure on turning, failed to find extra gear and gradually faded out in straight.

Jumped with line, didn't go early toe and allowed to drop in to midfield on rails, raced 5 to 6Ls back on fence saving ground to bend, not a lot of room at 350 M, closed race off evenly steadily making ground to line.

Jumped nicely but lacked early speed and faded back towards rear, raced 8Ls back in 2 wide position back with plenty to pass turning in, came to middle and closed hard making many lengths to be in frame.

Broke well, amongst them early before drifting back to be 3 to 4Ls away on rails, not asked in mid-section, stuck to fence but couldn't pick up when run presented and could only keep same pace to line.

Fast into stride, drove through to hold leaders back, had run of race 1L away throughout, had plenty to offer but held up in traffic until 200 M, switched out when clear and kept coming to fill placing late.

Unable to muster from outset, settled rearward as usual, raced on rails 7Ls away in mid-section, used nothing to turn, made run between runners in straight but showed little dash and only plugged to line.
Contested early lead and raced 3-wide most of way from start to 1200 M bend. Settled in 2nd one out one back far side but dropped out tamely before home turn.
Settled on rails in midfield. Lost position rounding home bend. Came under pressure upon straightening. Finished off race well inside final 200 M.
Steadied passing winning post the first time and travelled in rear. Raced very wide rounding home bend and into straight. Made moderate headway down centre of track without threatening.
Settled on rails behind midfield. Shuffled back behind fading runner approaching home bend dropping to last few. Made up ground past beaten horses inside final 400 M.
Settled on rails in 5th within 2Ls of pace most of way to straight. Responded well under pressure inside final 200 M to take command close to home.
Amongst leaders on rails early, settling just off the pace in 3rd. Fought on well to hold every chance throughout straight to just fail to peg back winner.
Amongst leaders 5-wide early, settling in forward of midfield in 6th turning into back straight. Came to challenge under pressure straightening but was only one-paced.
Amongst leaders early. Settled in 4th without 2Ls of pace turning into back straight. Weakened noticeably passing 400 M. (Lame next day.)
Settled in last few. Made rapid progress circling field around home bend disputing 2nd 1L back into straight. Soon gained slender lead over 200 M out only to be collared when no extra nearing finish.
Vying for lead 4-wide in a line of five early eventually taking lead on top of stables bend. Still held a length's advantage turning for home but quickly overhauled over 250 M out.
Raced 2-wide in midfield early. Dropped further back far side. Remained towards rear turning in. Made up some ground in straight without threatening.
Always struggling at the back.
Raced handy to the leaders, 1 off with cover, never in the hunt.
Positioned around midfield, 3-wide no cover, plugged away in the straight.
Ridden vigorously early to go forward from wide gate, trapped wide mid-race without cover with the forward division, weakened from the 500 M.
Took up front running duties, overhauled after the 400 M, found little in run to line.
Ridden quietly early in midfield, began to pull after the 1100 M and was then allowed to stride forward around the field to sit 1 off just behind the speed, struggled over the latter stages.
Settled just behind midfield on the fence, had to be steadied just prior to straightening, made up good ground over the last 300 M.
Settled midfield. 2-deep with cover, checked near the 400 M, made ground whilst briefly held up near the 100 M.
Railed up just behind midfield, closed off satisfactorily.
Raced at the leaders girth, 2-deep, one-paced in the concluding stages.
Failed to muster early speed despite being ridden along and settled near the rear on the rail, passed tiring horses in the run home.
Settled near last, came wide in the straight but was unable to close off in a quickly run last section. (See Racing Incidents.)
Camped just behind the speed along the rails, stuck to the inside in the straight to score with a big margin.
Raced along the rails and was no worse than midfield. Kept within 3Ls of the leader making the turn. Continued well in the straight but was unable to gain much ground final stages.
Found good early speed and soon led. Held a length's advantage into home straight. Kept on fairly but had no answer when challenged by winner over final 200 M.
Got bumped and lost ground at the start. Raced 2-wide behind midfield. Closed the race off with a strong rally.
Jumped only fairly but soon racing in forward position behind the pace. A length behind the leader on straightening but unable to find extra to keep pace. Weakened out late.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground. Raced in rear section until home straight. Made up ground by running past beaten runners.
Box-seated behind the leader. Quickened when asked on straightening and ran down the early leader final 100 M.
Raced 2-wide better than midfield. Kept within 3Ls of the leader making the turn. Stayed on same pace in the straight
Broke well but unable to keep pace in front. Gradually slipped to rear section. Near last on straightening and only ran past beaten runners.
Stayed within 2Ls of the leader back straight but struggled to keep up at the turn. Dropped out quickly in the straight. (Irregular heart beat.)
Allowed to drop to the rear from wide draw. Trailed field turning for home and made up some ground in the straight.
Raced along the fence but no better than midfield. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Raced 3-wide at midfield back straight. Niggled along to keep pace after the Rock. Failed to quicken on straightening and weakened final 200 M.
Slowest away, about 10Ls last early on, left 3-wide no cover at 800 M so pressed on out wide to 4Ls off pace in midfield from 600 M to home turn, no extra and weakened.
Led on fence by 2Ls at 1200 M, 1L clear on straightening, headed by winner 150 M out but did enough for a place.
5Ls back in 6th and 2-wide at 1100 M, same margin behind but in 8th on straightening, never troubled leaders.
Over 8Ls back in rear at 1200 M, still well back in rear swinging for home, didn't find much off the bridle.
3-wide no cover before getting in 2-wide over 2Ls back in 3rd at 900 M, 1L down and under pressure in 2nd turning for home, one-paced in the finish.
On fence 4Ls back in 5th at 1100 M, niggled along 3-back on fence around bend when 3Ls behind, disappointed for running at 200 M but looked held in any case.
4-back on fence about 6Ls off pace in 7th at 1200 M, closer about 4Ls back in 6th when 2-wide entering stretch, picked up nicely to lead 150 M out, driven out to hold a neck margin.
Over 8Ls behind in 10th at 1200 M, no closer on straightening for home, made some minor late ground without threatening.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 4th at 1100 M, 2Ls back in same position at home bend, every chance 200 M out, hung right under pressure and just lacked pace of winner.
Had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls off pace in 2nd or 3rd until final bend, had every possible hope to at least place so no excuses.
Always in rear, 7Ls behind in 8th at 1200 M relegated to last turning for home, stayed there.
Twice steadied early on and settled in 9th at 1000 M about 7Ls off pace, marginally closer taking home turn, moderate late headway, never nearer.
10Ls last off speed early on, still well back off home turn, never got into it.
2-wide in midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace until home turn, stayed on fairly well late but just missed a place.
Pushed out 5-wide at 1000 M and 6Ls off pace at 800 M, lost further ground turning for home, never really got involved.
3-wide no cover at 1000 M, disputing lead at 800 M and 1L off pace and tiring into home straight, soon faded out.
Slowly away, 2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, same margin behind but pushed out 4-wide off home turn, stayed on fairly well and just nicked a place.
Caught 4-wide at 1000 M, left without cover in midfield at 700 M and 5Ls off pace entering home straight, lacked any pick-up and eased through final 200 M. (Mucus in trachea.)
Soon led on fence, tended to hang out throughout, 1L clear turning for home but headed at 200 M, no extra late and missed a place.
3-back on fence in midfield throughout when about 4Ls off the speed, stayed on ok without threatening in the stretch, reasonable debut nonetheless.
2-wide and 1L back in 3rd early on, same margin back in 2nd turning into homestretch, very one-paced thereafter.
Failed to muster early speed and midfield or worse about 5Ls off pace through to final bend, never dangerous.
Had the box-seat position on fence about 2Ls from the speed in 4th or so until home turn, led 200 M out and looked all over the winner before being grabbed inside final 20 M.
Covered up towards rear early about 6Ls off pace, headway to be 5Ls back in mid-division off final bend, stayed on strongly to get up in final strides.
Outpaced early and soon got across at the back, raced 6Ls behind leaders 2-wide throughout, dashed well 200 M despite the slow pace.
Trapped 4-wide about midfield throughout, no cover, raced keenly, faded quickly 400 M.
Trapped 4-wide at first bend, hard ridden to get across to the rail and lead, slowed down the tempo from 700 M, weakened at 200 M.
Hard ridden to keep up with the main bunch, raced 4-1/2Ls off pace not suited by the slow tempo but benefited by the rail run, little dash in straight, slight improve.
Slow away, pushed to sit about midfield, 4-1/2Ls off pace, 3-wide at home bend, moved up at 600 M but showed no turn of foot in straight, flattened out 200 M.
Hard ridden early but failed to get across in front as usual trapped 4-5 wide about midfield throughout, covered too much ground on bend, weakened quickly 500 M.
Hard ridden to occupy a prominent spot behind leaders, travelled nicely 2Ls off pace, favoured by the rail run and slow pace, hung out 200 M but kept dashing well to win.
Pushed to take the lead as usual but soon eased to sit just behind leader at 700 M, trapped 4 wide at first bend, 2-wide at home bend, run finished at 250 M.
Pushed forward, 2Ls behind leaders, 2-3 wide, flattened out 200 M.
Very slow away, settled 7Ls off pace at the rear in 2-wide position, not suited by the slow tempo, showed little dash last 200 M.
Eased to get across the rail at the rear, settled 8-1/2Ls behind leaders, harmed by the slow pace, blocked between 400 M and 200 M, dashed strongly when clear to run 3rd.

Eased to sit behind pace along rail early, pushed back 700 M then swept to 2-wide and raced keenly, 3-1/2Ls off pace, not suited by the slow tempo, slightly interfered 200 M, dashed strongly to run 2nd.
Chased leader in 3rd to straight. Found nothing under pressure in the run home.
Made all to win unchallenged in straight.
Prominent early, dropping to midfield far side. Ran home one-paced.
Raced wide no cover in midfield before dropping out of contention rounding home bend.
Raced 3-wide behind midfield. Made some headway rounding home bend but could find nothing in straight.
Settled just behind midfield. Obtained split over 200 M out and fought on well to reach 2nd late.
Settled on rails in midfield. Came under pressure upon straightening but could only run home at the one pace.
Settled towards rear. Stuck to inside rails straightening and was tight on rails inside runner 200 M out before finishing off race nicely to be nearest at finish.
Very slowly away losing a lot of ground. Tailed off to 600 M. Still well back turning in but ran on past beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Ridden for pace early, settling 2-wide in 2nd just off the lead. Chased leader into home straight but soon weakened.
Raced wide in midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Some 2Ls 4th turning in and gradually faded.

Well enough to begin, took up more forward spot 4Ls back in 2-wide position, had easy time thereafter, stoked up on bend, cut back to inside turning in, made steady ground along rails to be closest on line.

Average to begin, drifted back from widest alley, raced 2-wide 7Ls off leaders, had easy time in mid-section, made 3-wide run on bend, well back turning in, closed hard last 200 M just missing a place. (Crowded late.)

Fastest to hit ground, showed further speed to hold leaders back early, had fair trip with reasonable pace on, unbalanced and lost position approaching Rock, struggling turning in and lost further ground before weakening out late

Started with them, didn't show enough dash to hold forward position early, posted 3-wide without cover and worked hard around field to be outside leader at mid-point, kept challenging to bend, ran out of gas and weakened from 200 M.

Standard beginning as usual, angled down to rails to be 5Ls away in midfield, had quiet time in mid-section, held up on bend behind tiring horses, came to inside and in traffic for most of straight, checked late and never saw daylight.

Average break, lacked early toe and eased back into running line, raced 5Ls back in 2-wide spot suited by speed, came with 3-wide run on bend, steadily closed but found trouble at 200 M and again late. Could have been closer.

Broke fairly, held spot 3-4Ls away on rails, had easy time and not asked in mid-section, eased 2-wide when shuffled back on bend, hanging in traffic for most of straight and held up until late, got clear and just failed. (Lame.)

Began nicely, assumed forward position and took trail behind speed, raced 2-wide 1 out 1 back 2-3Ls back in mid-section, had run of race and travelled nicely on bend, threatened to 150 M but condition gave out late.

Restrained from a wide alley and taken in behind runners, settled back in rearward division on rails 7Ls away, not set a task in mid-section, under pressure on bend, closed off only fairly from tail under hands and heels riding.

Jumped well, pressed on from wide alley to assume role at leaders girth, took 1 out 1 back trail when pace quickened at mid-point, switched to rails turning in, closed off nicely to hit lead late and narrowly miss out. (Bumped late)

Out with rest, showed more speed than usual to cross and take up running, kept them going at reasonable pace when pressed throughout, held slim lead turning in, kept giving in straight and right there before overhauled at 50 M.

Began evenly, didn't show enough early and faded back to rear, raced on rails 7-8Ls off leaders, lobbed along at tail appreciating pace in front, well back on bend, eased widest in straight making many lengths to come over the top late.

Began nicely, pushed on wide early to cross to running line, had cover in middle stages before taking up role at leader's girth on bend, close enough turning in but unable to offer much fight and weakened out late.
Jumped with them, didn't have a lot of early speed and held 2 wide spot 4Ls away, always well back to bend, held up turning in but found little when placed under pressure and plugged to line.

Awkward to begin, soon mustered and pressed on wider to take close order, continued on and used up to work around and hit lead, tried to back off on bend, kicked strongly turning in, ran out of gas but stuck on well to make frame.

Jumped with rest, didn't show early speed and faded back to rear, raced 5Ls back in 2 wide spot, still back on circle making 3 wide run, came with strong sprint at 250 M to close over top and score comfortably.

Fast into stride, drove through to take up early lead, pressured throughout and eventually handed up lead at midpoint, raced outside leader to turn, had chance but didn't finish off and simply battled to line.

Standard to begin, settled in midfield 3 wide without cover, 3 to 4Ls away posted wide and working throughout, still coming on bend, didn't quicken but steadily took ground off leader to fill place late.

Standard break, drifted back towards rear shortly after start, shared tail before improving 3 wide with cover 4Ls off leaders, angled 4 wide turning in, didn't show much dash but stuck on gamely for 2nd.
Amongst them early, punched up to hold early leaders back, uncomfortable and began to give ground at midpoint, lost further touch on bend and dropped right out in straight. (Mucopus.)

Average to begin, restrained from a wide barrier to be taken in behind runners, raced on rails 5Ls back throughout, in traffic turning in, shifted into clear and made good ground down middle giving too much start.

Moderate break, did enough to hold position just behind speed, raced 2 wide 2Ls back in nice trail throughout, came to inside into straight and held up to 200 M, only finished fairly when clear. (Blood in trachea.)
Raced 1 out 1 back, finished off soundly.
Bounded in the air at the jump and lost considerable ground. Settled near last on the fence, struggled in the run home.
Raced along the fence in a handy spot, never looked like threatening.
Raced wide and without cover in midfield, didn't offer much when asked in the straight.
Close to midfield 1 off, never likely.
Took up front running duties, overhauled near the 200 M, stayed on fairly.
Ridden forward to sit outside the leader, 3/4L back, struggled at the business end.
Settled midfield, 1 off with cover, one paced when under pressure over the concluding stages.
Camped behind the leader on the rail, had every chance but failed to capitalize.
Settled in second last position 1 off with cover, run peaked after the 200 M.
Travelled just behind midfield 3 wide with cover. Steadied at 800 M and shifted out when awkwardly placed. As a result raced wide and without cover, gave plenty in the run home just going down.
Bounded in the air at the start and lost ground. Made up good ground in the straight out wide after coming from last position.
Sat just of midfield on the fence, commenced to give ground turning for home.
Settled about 7Ls back 3 wide with cover, came to the outside turning for home to snatch victory late.
Settled prominently behind the leader. Kept on well in the straight but unable to draw closer in the final stages.
Kept with 3Ls of the pace until home straight. Steadied in traffic at 300 M and unable to quicken thereafter. Weakened final stages.
Raced 3-wide in a forward position. Unable to keep up making home turn and weakened in the straight.
Wide without cover at midfield early. Gradually dropped back after 1200 M and was trailing field turning for home. Made no impression thereafter.
Soon led and set a comfortable pace until final 400 M. Became unbalanced in its action when pressured near 300 M but kept on well over the final stages to hold rivals at bay.
Allowed to drop back from wide draw. Remained racing in rear section making the turn. Rallied and made up ground in the straight.
Ridden to stay alongside the leader early and middle stages. Continued to be pushed along turning for home to keep pace in front but weakened after straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced 2-wide at midfield. Switched out and raced wide turning for home. Remained on same pace in the straight.
Missed the jump and trailed field until the turn. Hugged the rails turning in and only ran past tired runners in the straight.
Raced along the rails in midfield. Switched out on straightening and quickened well. Kept on nicely but couldn't muster more in the final stages.
Missed the jump but was ridden along to be behind midfield. Took some time to pick up after straightening but showed a strong closing run in the final 200 M.
2-wide behind midfield. Swung widest turning for home. Made a strong rally in the straight despite having to be straightened by rider on a number of occasions and was closest at finish.
Didn't break well out wide and soon about 7Ls behind near rear and 3-wide with cover, under pressure turning for home, posed little threat despite moderate late headway.
Prominent position but 3-wide no cover throughout, hung out 600 M out and back-pedalling when 4-wide off home turn, very poor in the finish.
Niggled along despite having the box run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd early on, 3Ls down in 3rd at home turn, stayed on well for pressure and very nearly got up to win.
About 4Ls back in 5th or so until home straight, failed to quicken up in the finish though not helped by a bump about 100 M out.
About 4Ls back in 6th or so until home straight, always lacked the dash of the principals.
Settled in rear about 8Ls off pace through to home turn, stayed on well along inside fence on the run to be nearest at finish.
Led by 1L on fence at 1000 M, 2Ls to the good at final bend and 3Ls clear at 200 M, tired late and grabbed right on the line.
Inauspicious debut, slowest away, soon 10Ls last, stayed there.
Always worse than midfield at least 6Ls off the speed, under pressure turning for home near the rear, never dangerous despite making some minor late ground.
Midfield with cover about 5Ls off pace until home straight, still with 4Ls to make up at 200 M, rallied strongly to get up on the line.
At least 7Ls off pace towards rear until home turn, ran on very well in home straight and wasn't far away at the finish.
Raced in 2nd place out 2-wide and between 1L and 2Ls off speed through to straightening for home, one-paced thereafter.
Never travelled that well after an awkward break and 6Ls off pace in 10th at 1000 M, hard pressed to take closer order entering home straight, always held by principals.
With cover about 6Ls back in 9th at 1000 M, closer turning for home, place prospects when 1L down with 200 M to race but just failed to follow through.
Well placed 3-back on fence about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace in 4th or so until the 600 M, under pressure turning for home and one-paced thereafter.
Soon led on fence by 1L and same margin clear turning for home before fading out and very weak final 200 M.
Ridden coldly as usual about 6Ls to 8Ls off pace towards rear until home turn, quickened up well off final bend and only just missed out on a place.
Left 4-wide no cover about 8Ls towards rear at 900 M, over 4Ls down in midfield turning for home, stayed on fairly late without the necessary dash to place.
Raced 2nd about 1L outside pacesetter at 1000 M but under pressure to maintain this proximity at final turn and dropped out tamely final 200 M.
Left 3-wide no cover at 800 M when 5Ls back in 9th, 4-wide and 3Ls down in midfield turning for home, led briefly inside final furlong but grabbed by winner in final 30 M.
Always struggling towards rear about 7Ls of the pace through first half of race, very weak inside final 600 M.
Prominent out 2-wide and 3Ls back in 4th or 5th at 1000 M, loomed up right up on speed with a winning chance at 300 M, no extra inside final 100 M and just kept a place.
4-back on fence in midfield at 1000 M about 5Ls off pace, edged a little closer at top of stretch but short of room at 200 M, found a gap inside and got up to lead about 30 M out.
Around midfield and about 4Ls off pace until the 600 M, picked up well off final bend to lead 300 M but no extra inside final 150 M and missed a place.
Slowly away and soon 10Ls off pace in rear, about 8Ls off pace taking final turn, made no impression.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or so until the 600 M, struggling before home turn and faded out very tamely.
Slowly away, pushed to sit about midfield 5Ls off pace, 2 wide throughout, dashed well 300 M to run 3rd.
Eased to sit just worse than midfield, raced 6.5Ls off pace 2 wide throughout, lacked room at top straight, no progress when clear.
Eased to sit just behind midfield 6Ls off pace, trapped 3 wide throughout, dashed strongly 300 M to finish 2nd despite the slow pace.
Eased to sit worse than midfield, settled 6.5Ls off pace along the rail, not suited by the slow tempo, lacked room early in straight, no dash when clear.
Pushed to get across in front of the main bunch, 1.5Ls behind the leaders, 2 wide throughout, weakened from 200 M.
Trapped 3 to 4 wide throughout at the back, never competitive.
Eased to sit about midfield along the rail, raced 5Ls behind the leaders, blocked between 400 M and 200 M, dashed well when clear.
Eased early trying to sit behind the leading group, left racing wide thereafter, moved up at 1000 M to get across 1 wide and tackle the leader, weakened 300 M.
Eased to take sit in midfield, raced keenly 4Ls behind the leaders 3 wide throughout, had every chance in straight but lack turn of foot, just held ground late (on heels 100 M).
Eased at start to get across towards the rear, raced 9Ls off pace 2-3 wide, not suited by the slow tempo, lacked room at 400 M, little dash when clear.
Eased towards the tail, more than 10Ls behind the leaders, 3-4 wide, covered plenty of ground and not suited by the slow pace, dashed well 200 M and made up plenty of ground, improving.
Settled 3Ls off pace, trapped 3 wide in mid-section, kicked well on straightening, shifted in 300 M but kept finding to win.
Settled 2.5Ls behind the leaders along the rail, weakened from 300 M.
Pushed to get across the rail and lead at slow early sectionals, however pressured from 800 M, hung on until 250 M when overhauled, kept finding to the line.
Tracked leader. Hit front passing 300 M, kicking a length clear under pressure. Just held off runner-up's late challenge nearing finish.
Raced wide throughout. Gradually settled towards rear. Dropped to last upon straightening. Found nothing in straight.
Attempted to make all. Led until overhauled inside 300 M.
Settled behind midfield. In similar position when jostled and lost position turning in. No further impression.
Settled in rear. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Settled in rear. Commenced move turning in. Ran on determinedly under pressure in straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in 4th within 3Ls of pace. Commenced run rounding home bend gaining 3rd some 2Ls back entering straight. Sustained progress down straight to just fail to get up on line.
Settled on rails in midfield. Ran on down inside of straight to produce good late impression closing stages.
Not far off to 400 M, then gradually weakened.
Travelled on rails behind midfield. Made steady headway down straight for good impression at the finish.
Settled in rear. Ran on down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide most of way far side and around home bend. Took closer order to gain 4th within 2Ls of pace turning in. Found no extra inside final 250 M.

Moderate break, drifted back to assume usual role in rearward division, raced 2 wide 5 to 6Ls back, still back between horses on bend, into clear turning in and made plenty of ground down middle to just miss.
Began with them, pressed on but unable to slot in to running line, raced 3 wide in midfield 5Ls away with cover, made wide run turning in, made steady ground down middle without looking likely.
Even break, ridden along to hold forward spot, raced 2 wide 4Ls back, didn't settle well and over raced in mid-section, made 3 wide run on circle, threatened at 300 M but faded out late.

Amongst first few to begin, slotted in to trail on rails 3 to 4Ls off lead, used little in run, steadied at 600 M, held up in behind horses at 300 M, switched back to inside and closed off fairly without threatening.
Standard beginning and failed to muster speed early, settled just off midfield on rails 5 to 6Ls from the leaders, in traffic at 300 M, didn't have much room but closed off steadily when clear.

Fair to leave gates and taken in behind from a wide alley, took up spot on rails 7Ls off pace, not asked in run, had field to beat turning in, couldn't find extra gear in run home and battled to line.
Tardy to begin, assumed usual role at tail, raced 8Ls off lead on rails, angled 2 wide on bend, still well back turning in, didn't show usual finishing burst and simply plugged away in straight.

Average jump, caught 4 wide early and pressed on to take close order, used plenty to be outside leader at midpoint, still there turning in, showed plenty of fight to keep on and made frame given workload.

Fair to leave gates and steadied shortly after, positioned 2 wide in midfield 4 to 5Ls from lead, travelled nicely behind horses on bend, held up to 200 M, closed hard when in clear to just go down in 3 way finish.

First to hit ground, crossed to rails easily and took trail behind leader, had easy time thereafter with moderate speed on, still close enough turning in, didn't find when asked and weakened out from 250 M.

Began with rest, showed enough to take up role without cover, 1 out 1 back at midpoint 2Ls back, had run of race thereafter, angled into clear turning in, didn't show much turn of foot but kept grinding away to be close on line.

Jumped nicely, caught wide on first turn, unable to slot in and posted 3 wide without cover 4 to 5Ls away, always working to bend, under pressure turning in, workload took toll and couldn't go on with it late.

Jumped well enough, soon faded back to rear in search of cover, raced 3 wide with trail at rear 7Ls off pace, speed didn't suit and still well back on bend, came to outside and finished off nicely giving too great a start.

Amongst first to begin, pressed on very wide early to take control at 1200 M, dictated terms in front at steady pace held 1L advantage on bend, kicked strongly turning into straight, fought off challengers to score a narrow victory.
Settled behind midfield. Made up good ground between runners down inside of straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced mainly in forward of midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure to narrowly miss a placing.
Well there to 300 M. Weakened under pressure.
Shared pace early, settling within 2Ls of pace. Commenced move rounding home bend, gaining slender advantage turning in. Kicked about 1.5Ls clear at 200 M and hung on under pressure to the line.
Raced wide in prominent position early. Took up running 1000 M out and led field until overhauled shortly after straightening.
Raced keenly in rear of midfield early stages. Gradually dropped back to reach tail-end turning for home. Produced late impression closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced wide in rear of midfield to straight. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Travelled in rear. Made moderate progress in straight without threatening.
Settled in just better than midfield. Joint 3rd turning in reaching 2nd shortly afterwards. Fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Amongst leaders in early quarter. Gradually shifted back to just better than midfield in 5th. Kept on behind runners before coming one-paced inside 200 M.
Settled at the back. Commenced run 3-wide rounding home bend. Produced good late impression inside final 300 M.
Settled on rails in midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide in last few. Made moderate progress under pressure in straight without threatening.
Raced wide in midfield. Made short-lived effort early in straight before finding no extra inside final 200 M.

Even break, settled just off them 3 wide with cover, not comfortable and unbalanced. 3Ls back at midpoint, pushed 4 and 5 wide on circle, didn't respond turning in and lost further ground to be well beaten.

Showed early speed to challenge for lead, raced 3 wide without cover 1L from leaders, had tough run working throughout with strong speed, still there on bend, stuck to task to be there at 200 M, overhauled late when run ended.

Fast to begin, pressed on to hold lead, pressured throughout and kept a solid pace on, continually pressured to bend, under hard riding to make another effort turning in, early burn told and run ended at 250 M.

Slow into stride, urged along to hold midfield position on rails, raced 3 to 4Ls off lead, had comfortable run with speed on, kept to fence but never saw daylight in straight and was not properly tested in finish.

Average break, faded back to rear from a wide alley, raced slightly detached 9Ls back on rails, appreciated fast pace, chased along on bend, held up at 300 M, came with powerful run when clear to come over the top of them to score easily.

Jumped with rest, pressed on but unable to take closer order, raced 3 to 4 wide 3Ls back in front of midfield, improved 2Ls back turning in, still right in mix at 200 M and stuck on well despite hard run.
Fair to leave gates, soon worse than midfield, drove through to be 5Ls back on rails, had easy time to bend, in plenty of traffic in early part of straight but effort was one paced once clear.

Standard to begin, drifted back to be in last 3 racing 2 wide 8Ls away, not set a task in mid-section, bumped when coming to middle in straight, didn't finish off as normally would grinding to line. (Mucopus.)

Fastest into stride, pressed on to challenge for lead, raced outside leader challenging throughout, always working to bend, held narrow advantage turning in, lead to 200 M but condition gave out late. Big effort first up.

Jumped with line, faded into midfield, unable to slot in and posted 3 wide (with cover) for journey, raced further back than expected 5Ls off pace, 4 and 5 wide into straight, closed steadily down middle without looking likely.

Crowded slightly on jumping, soon regathered to hold midfield position 4 to 5Ls back racing 2 wide, tracked nicely 3 wide to bend, eased out in straight, steadily made ground to threaten at 250 M but run ended late.

Began with rest, soon drifted back to settle amongst rearward division, raced 2 wide 8Ls off pace suited by fast tempo, track 4 and 5 wide into straight, closed hard making up many lengths but unable to chase down winner.

Began nicely, drove through to hold leaders back, enjoyed nice trail but had to contend with fast pace, still travelling on bend, run opened turning in but couldn't take advantage and only held ground to line.

Average to begin, taken back from a wide alley, drove into nice spot 3 to 4Ls away in running line, had easy time in mid-section, didn't have much racing room but kept finding in straight closing nicely to make frame.

Off with rest, pushed on to settle closer, unable to slot in and posted 3-wide before taking 2-wide spot 4Ls back at mid-point, under pressure turning in, steadily made ground in run home doing best work late to make frame.

Moderate to begin, drifted back to settle in rearward division, raced 2-wide 6Ls away, not set a task in middle stages, back in traffic turning in, got into clear and made some good ground late without threatening.

Slow to begin, hard ridden to drive through to midfield, raced 4Ls back on rails, had easy trip thereafter, checked on first bend, back in traffic turning in, steadied when making run at 300 M, closed off evenly when clear.
Average to leave gates, positioned in midfield before severely checked on first turn, 3-wide thereafter 5-6Ls back on bend, made short-lived run turning in but only battled to line last 200 M.

Jumped nicely, pressed on and slotted into coveted 1 out 1 back spot 3Ls back, had reasonable run to bend, niggled along to make ground turning in, kept grinding away making many lengths to go down in 3 way go.
Began with them, unable to slot in from wide alley, posted 3 to 4-wide throughout in midfield 5Ls from pace, had hard run covering ground to bend, workload took toll and weakened out late.
Slowly into stride, soon in last place, lobbed along at tail throughout, still well back with field to beat turning in, steadily made ground between horses in straight to be closest on line.
Moderate to begin, drifted back to rear shortly after start, raced 2 to 3-wide 6Ls away, had field in front turning in, kept on at same pace only passing tired horses to line.

Standard break, lacked early speed and settled worse than midfield on rails, 5-6Ls off pace throughout, not used in mid-section, on bridle turning in, lacked extra gear but managed to finish off soundly at same speed.

Reasonable beginning, held spot behind leader before receiving bad check at first turn, not travelling on bend, found little in straight and dropped right out in run to line. (Bled and irregular heart beat.)

Began well, pushed along to hold prominent role, raced outside leader 1L away, had easy time with slow speed, kept in touch on circle, carted field up turning in, stuck to task well making up good ground late to score.

First to hit ground, easily crossed them to take up running, controlled race in front 1L clear, held further advantage turning in, kicked strongly establishing 5Ls break, run ended last 100 M but caught late close to line.
Tracked the leading division, didn't accelerate when asked however held its ground in the run to the line.
Led towards the outside fence, beaten for 2nd close to the line.
Sat around midfield towards the outside maintained its position over the concluding stages.
Sat in 3rd position, always in touch with the leaders, finished off soundly.
Raced near last and throughout in the run.
Raced handy along the middle of the track, gave ground while under pressure near the 250 M.
Slow to begin and raced towards the outside, just back from midfield, commenced to tire before the 200 M.
Positioned along the middle of the course about 3Ls from the leader, stuck to task without surrendering ground.
Slow to begin, settled back, closed off soundly.
Midfield on the outside rail while making fair ground, had to be eased when unable to improve close to the post.
Last position at the 800 M on the outside fence, made some ground over the concluding stages.
Took up prime position on the outside rail. Just behind and outside the leader, opened up a significant break after the 300 M to score impressively. Eased down late.
Slow to begin, then shifted in abruptly and took no part in the race.
Better than midfield. 7 to 8Ls behind the leader in 4th place at 800 M. Narrowed gap making the turn and was 4Ls behind the leader on straightening. Only stayed on same pace thereafter.
Off slowly and raced along the rails behind midfield. Had the rails making home turn and switched out in the straight. Closed the race off with a nice rally to grab a minor placing.
Raced along the rails in rear section. Near the end of the field on straightening and made no impression thereafter.
Raced keenly in the lead. Weakened and tailed out in the straight.
Settled 3-wide without cover in midfield. 2-wide still without cover in 4th place making home turn. Found nothing in the straight.
2-wide in rear section. Picked up at the 300 M and made a late charge to be closest at finish.
2-wide and no better than midfield. Switched out on straightening and picked up nicely. Closed the race off with a strong run but not enough to catch winner.
Off slowly and unable to muster speed. Raced 2-wide behind midfield. Failed to respond when asked to quicken on straightening and continued on same pace to the line.

Settled 5Ls behind the leader in 3rd place 1000 M out. Remained in 3rd but closed to within 3Ls of the leader turning for home. Continued well and took the lead final 200 M. Stayed on well final stages.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Remained on same pace in the straight and tired over the final stages.
Trailed field until straightening. Made up ground by running past tired runners.
Dropped to rear section from wide draw. Near last on straightening and made up ground in the straight to be closest at finish.

Tracked leader from 1600 M onwards. Continued to race behind leader making the turn before assuming the lead on straightening. Headed by winner at 200 M and stayed on only fairly over the concluding stages.
Raced 3-wide without cover behind midfield. Lacked a quickening pace on straightening and weakened final stages.
Soon 1L off pace in 2nd out 2-wide, 2Ls down in 2nd taking final bend, absolutely no chance with winner but did enough for 2nd.
Soon led on fence by 1L, skipped 2Ls clear at top of home straight, ridden to draw further clear, very easily.
Nicely placed 3-back on fence in 5th through to home turn, over 4Ls back in 5th and held at 200 M, plugged on at same tempo.
Without cover (4-wide) in places in rear about 10Ls off the pace until the 600 M, never remotely dangerous.
Couldn't muster much early pace, 6Ls back in 12th at 1000 M, 8Ls back and 4-wide on straightening, finished off at same pace down centre of track.
Awkward break and worse than midfield early, hanging out without cover at halfway and struggling entering home straight, continue to hang over to stand's rail, poor run.
Adopted the box-seat position within 2Ls of pace in 3rd at 900 M and similarly placed taking final turn, outpaced by runner-up and all out to hang on for 3rd.
2-wide and worse than midfield about 5Ls off speed at 1000 M, 6Ls back in 10th taking final turn but ran on quite well late and nearly placed.
Always close up better than midfield 2-wide and 3Ls or 4Ls off pace until home straight, one-paced in the finish but not overtaken by slower ones in behind.
4-back on fence about 4Ls off pace in midfield at 800 M, not the clearest passage turning into stretch about 5Ls back in midfield, faded steadily.
Soon in rear about 9Ls off pace, never got much closer and posed no threat.
Midfield mostly about 4Ls off speed, without cover and under pressure at 600 M, about 5Ls further back turning for home, found nothing off the bridle.
Slowly away but recovered to be 2Ls off pace in 4th at 800 M, struggling to maintain this position at 600 M, very weak in closing stages.
2-wide and 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 1000 M to home straight, still 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M and had no excuse not to place, missed out inside final 50 M.
Keen with head up early on towards rear about 9Ls off pace, never got involved fully.
Towards rear early on but (not for the first time) hung sharply right from 700 M to far rail and out of the race, eased final 200 M.
Restrained about 7Ls off pace near rear early on, still with 7Ls to make up off final turn in 8th, ran on well to take 2nd inside final 30 M.
Midfield on fence about 6Ls off pace through to final turn, hung out a little under pressure but still finished creditably.
Slowest away, 10Ls last at 1000 M, always a respectful distance from the pace.
Shared 5th and 6th place about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed out 2-wide until home turn, stayed on fairly well to nick a place inside final 50 M.
Best away and disputed lead on fence at 1000 M, same margin clear at top of home straight but headed at 300 M by winner, no extra inside final 50 M and missed out on a place.
Gifted the box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 1000 M to home turn, assumed the lead 300 M out and drew clear final 200 M.
Fractious in gates, on fence sharing 5th and 6th place about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed before hanging out at 800 M, under pressure turning for home and very one-paced on the run-in.
Caught 3-wide no cover at 800 M when 6Ls off speed in 9th, further back and outpaced turning for home, never likely to finish better than midfield.
Disputed early lead out 2-wide 1000 M, under pressure when 2Ls down in 3rd at final turn, dropped out very rapidly.
Never posed any danger, 2-wide and 6Ls behind at halfway, 8Ls off pace in 9th turning for home, no impression.
Eased to get across at the rear, raced 8-1/2Ls off pace 2-wide throughout, blocked for most of straight but kept dashing well to the line. (On heels 150 M.)
Hard ridden to keep up with the field, positioned 5Ls off pace 3 to 4-wide, never travelled well, dropped off quickly 500 M.
Pushed early to occupy a more prominent spot, 3-1/2Ls off pace, 2 to 3-wide, no turn of foot in straight, disappointing.
Bumped at start, settled at rear 9L off pace along the rail, blocked from 400 M to 200 M, dashed strongly when clear to finished a strong 2nd.
Hard ridden to get across to the rail and lead at slow early sectionals, however quickened up sharply from 700 M and used up too much fuel, overhauled 100 M when run ended.
Eased at start, raced 3-wide throughout at the rear, never competitive.
Prominent as usual, settled 1-1/2Ls off pace 2-wide throughout, used up too much fuel in the second last quarter to chase the runaway leader, just held ground in straight.
Pushed to get across the rail in front of midfield, 2-1/2Ls off pace, little dash in straight.
Pushed early to keep up in midfield and secure a rails spot, 5-1/2Ls off pace, dashed well along the rail in straight to finish 3rd. (Lacked room 100 M.)
Eased to sit worse than midfield early on, moved up at 1200 M 3Ls off pace 3-wide without cover, covered ground on the bend, just held ground in straight.
Eased to sit at the back about 7Ls off pace, raced 2 to 3-wide throughout, no dash, ran on fairly in last quarter.
Eased to sit about midfield 5Ls off pace, raced 2 to 3-wide throughout, dashed strongly 300 M to win, hung in 100 M.
Eased to sit behind the pace group along the rail, 4Ls off pace, blocked 400 M, showed little dash when clear. (On heels 50 M.)
Lacked early speed, raced worse than midfield along the rail about 7Ls off pace, blocked for most straight, dashed strongly 100 M.
Led inside group of four, within 2Ls of pace on stands' side. Weakened noticeably passing 200 M.
Never far off behind pace on stands' side. Steadied for a run passing 400 M before switched onto centre of straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Amongst leaders travelling well on stands' rails. Strolled clear of field coming into course proper. Won unextended.
Slow out. Niggled along at the back. Ran past well beaten horses closing stages.
Always travelling in rear of field on stands' side. Kept on steadily without quickening closing stages.
Not far off, gradually shifting out to race behind leaders of stands' group. Fought on steadily to grab 2nd inside final 200 M.
Never far off the pace on stands' rails. Kept on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Began fairly gradually settling in rear. Dropped out over 300 M out.
Disputed lead one off the stands' rails. Weakened under pressure passing 400 M.
Chased leaders of inside group to 200 M and never better than mid-division. Ran home one-paced.
Settled behind leaders of inside group, just behind mid-division of whole field. Commenced move passing 300 M and ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Close up on stands' side until finding no extra inside final 100 M.
Chased leader of inside group and never better than mid-division throughout. Kept on same pace under pressure.

Began well enough, took up ideal spot 1 out 1 back 3Ls behind leader, had dream trail with speed on, angled 3-wide on turning and joined in with strong run, couldn't find late but stuck on to be not far away.
Awkward to begin, regathered to assume role outside leader, raced 1L back in mid-section, struggling on circle with fast pace, began to weaken turning in and dropped right out in straight.
Jumped with rest, showed plenty of speed to take up running, kept going at a strong pace 1L clear, kept them chasing turning in, couldn't find when pressure applied and weakened noticeably late.

Average break, drifted back to take up usual rearward role, raced 2-wide 9 Ls off front runners, niggled along to get going on circle, came to middle of track and closed off evenly to be closest on line.

Restrained from wide alley to hold spot at rear, lobbed along 10Ls away at rear suited by fast tempo, still well back with field to beat on bend, came widest in straight making many lengths but gave too great a start.

Jumped with them, taken hold of obtain a midfield trail, drifted back to race amongst last few on rails 8Ls away, appreciated fast pace, kept to rails making many lengths, held up until 200 M but surged to lead when clear for win.

Average jump, faded back to hold a midfield position, raced 2-wide 6-7Ls away, not asked in mid-section, pushed along turning in, made a little ground to 600 M but very one-paced last furlong just plugging to line.

Standard to begin, took up midfield role on rails 4Ls off lead, overraced in mid-section, travelled strongly on circle, angled into clear on turning, came with strong run to hit lead at 200 M but no match for winner late.

Moderate to begin, soon settled worse than midfield, raced on rails 6Ls from leaders, not used in mid-section, tracked nicely on turn, into clear turning in and threatened with strong run at 200 M but just couldn't match others late.

Bounced out, restrained to obtain cover, unable to slot in and forced to race 3-wide without cover in midfield, improved to be 5Ls down on circle, did plenty of work to turn, kept to task to 200 M but was one-paced late.
Jumped with rest, held forward spot behind leader, carted along at good tempo, eased out and made strong run taking over briefly at 350 M, kept giving in straight and narrowly beaten out of frame.
Raced 3-wide midfield to straight. Gradually weakened under pressure.
Chased leaders in 3rd on rails. Remained same into straight but gradually weakened.
Chased leader to 300 M, then gradually faded.
Settled in last few. Ran on well inside final 300 M down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide in rear of midfield. Ran on in straight to be nearest at finish.
Gradually settled in rear of field. Made up good ground down centre of straight inside final 300 M to narrowly miss a placing.
Settled on rails in rear. Shifted off rails for a run upon straightening obtaining a clear passage 300 M out. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Raced 3-wide in prominent position early, gradually settling in forward of midfield still wide without cover. Took closer order rounding home bend but unable to sustain effort inside final 300 M.
Held slender lead to 350 M. Soon swamped.
Raced mainly 2-wide towards rear. Did not find much room early in straight until passing 200 M. Made up some ground late.
Settled in 4th within 3Ls of pace. Moved closer turning in and soon hit front over 300 M out. Hung on gamely under pressure to the line.
Settled on rails in midfield. Shifted off rails rounding home bend. Kept on steadily in straight without quickening.
Settled on rails just behind midfield. Did not find much room until 100 M out.

Restrained from a wide alley, positioned at rear 3-wide 9-10Ls from front runners, always wide with cover to bend, well back making wide run entering straight, made up many lengths in the straight to snatch 3rd. Gave too big a start

Jumped with field, didn't show any early toe, found spot near last 2-wide 9Ls away, never really comfortable in run and pushed along on bend, well back turning in and passed only tired horses in run to line.

Jumped well, taken back from wide alley, angled into position on rails 5Ls away inside eventual winner, had easy time to bend, took dream split in straight to hit lead but couldn't hold off winner. Well clear of 3rd.

Started with line, faded back to race in rearward division, raced 3-wide 7-8Ls back with cover, switched 4 to 5-wide on bend, well back turning in, kept finding in straight and made up many lengths to be closest on line.

First to hit ground, pressed on to race first without cover, 2Ls off draw away leader, had to cart field up when leader went ahead on bend, stuck to task in straight gradually making ground but couldn't sprint with first few last 200 M.

Began with them, slotted in behind the speed, had nice trail 2-wide 4-5Ls off pace, eased 3-wide on bend, picked up nicely when balanced up, made up plenty of ground to 200 M and went on for solid win.

Moderate break, showed speed thereafter to assume role behind leader, carted along by good speed in front, chased runaway leader on bend, under pressure turning in, couldn't keep on last 200 M and finished at same speed.

Even break, had ridden to take up coveted 1 out 1 back spot, had reasonable run 4Ls back on bend, angled 3-wide turning in but immediately under pressure, stopped quickly in straight. (Blood in trachea and lame morning after.)

Began well, allowed to slide back from a wide alley in search of cover, raced 2-wide 6Ls off pace, had easy trip thereafter, pushed along on bend, in some traffic turning in but didn't let down when clear and battled to line.

Average to begin, ridden along to regather and hold spot 4Ls back on rails, not set a task in mid-section, tracked nicely on bend into clear and made short-lived run at 300 M but couldn't find extra gear and kept same pace to line.

Jumped with them, showed plenty of dash to cross to lead, kept running at solid speed throughout, drew 4Ls clear on circle, held advantage to 250 M, didn't find when tackled at 200 M and weakened late when run ended. (See Incidents.)

Away with rest, pressed on to take closer order, posted 3-wide without cover from awkward alley, always working hard 4Ls back wide to bend, struggling turning in, run ended at 250 M and only plugged away in finish.

Shade tardy to begin, settled worse than midfield on rails 8Ls from pace, not asked in run, well back and kept to rails on bend saving ground, made a little ground until held up but making little progress anyway. (Lame.)

Awkward into stride, soon settled at tail on rails 10Ls off pace, well back not working in mid-section, had field to pass on bend, kept to inside saving ground in straight, did not make impression in run home just holding ground to line.
